authors_text: Nand Sharma,Joshua Millstein
title: CausNet : Generational orderings based search for optimal Bayesian networks via dynamic programming with parent set constraints
title_zh: CausNet：通过具有父集约束的动态规划，基于分代排序搜索最优贝叶斯网络
abstract: Finding a globally optimal Bayesian Network using exhaustive search is a problem with super-exponential complexity, which severely restricts the number of variables that it can work for. We implement a dynamic programming based algorithm with built-in dimensionality reduction and parent set identification. This reduces the search space drastically and can be applied to large-dimensional data. We use what we call generational orderings based search for optimal networks, which is a novel way to efficiently search the space of possible networks given the possible parent sets. The algorithm supports both continuous and categorical data, and categorical as well as survival outcomes. We demonstrate the efficacy of our algorithm on both synthetic and real data. In simulations, our algorithm performs better than three state-of-art algorithms that are currently used extensively. We then apply it to an Ovarian Cancer gene expression dataset with 513 genes and a survival outcome. Our algorithm is able to find an optimal network describing the disease pathway consisting of 6 genes leading to the outcome node in a few minutes on a basic computer. Our generational orderings based search for optimal networks, is both efficient and highly scalable approach to finding optimal Bayesian Networks, that can be applied to 1000s of variables. Using specifiable parameters - correlation, FDR cutoffs, and in-degree - one can increase or decrease the number of nodes and density of the networks. Availability of two scoring option-BIC and Bge-and implementation of survival outcomes and mixed data types makes our algorithm very suitable for many types of high dimensional biomedical data to find disease pathways.

We implement a dynamic programming based algorithm with built-in dimensionality reduction and parent set identification. This reduces the search space drastically and can be applied to large-dimensional data. We use what we call generational orderings based search for optimal networks, which is a novel way to efficiently search the space of possible networks given the possible parent sets. The algorithm supports both continuous and categorical data, and categorical as well as survival outcomes. We demonstrate the efficacy of our algorithm on both synthetic and real data. In simulations, our algorithm performs better than three state-of-art algorithms that are currently used extensively. We then apply it to an Ovarian Cancer gene expression dataset with 513 genes and a survival outcome. Our algorithm is able to find an optimal network describing the disease pathway consisting of 6 genes leading to the outcome node in a few minutes on a basic computer. Our generational orderings based search for optimal networks, is both efficient and highly scalable approach to finding optimal Bayesian Networks, that can be applied to 1000s of variables. Using specifiable parameters - correlation, FDR cutoffs, and in-degree - one can increase or decrease the number of nodes and density of the networks. Availability of two scoring option-BIC and Bge-and implementation of survival outcomes and mixed data types makes our algorithm very suitable for many types of high dimensional biomedical data to find disease pathways.
abstract_zh: 使用穷举搜索寻找全局最优贝叶斯网络是一个具有超指数复杂性的问题，这严重限制了它可以处理的变量数量。我们实现了一种基于动态规划的算法，具有内置的降维和父集识别功能。这大大减少了搜索空间，并且可以应用于大维数据。我们使用所谓的基于代序的搜索来搜索最优网络，这是一种在给定可能的父集的情况下有效搜索可能网络空间的新颖方法。该算法支持连续数据和分类数据，以及分类数据和生存结果。我们证明了我们的算法在合成数据和真实数据上的有效性。在模拟中，我们的算法比目前广泛使用的三种最先进的算法表现得更好。然后，我们将其应用于包含 513 个基因和生存结果的卵巢癌基因表达数据集。我们的算法能够在基本计算机上在几分钟内找到一个描述疾病路径的最佳网络，该网络由 6 个基因组成，通向结果节点。我们基于分代排序的最佳网络搜索是寻找最佳贝叶斯网络的高效且高度可扩展的方法，可应用于数千个变量。使用可指定的参数（相关性、FDR 截止值和入度）可以增加或减少节点数量和网络密度。两种评分选项（BIC 和 Bge）的可用性以及生存结果和混合数据类型的实现使我们的算法非常适合多种类型的高维生物医学数据来寻找疾病途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态规划和父集约束的生成式排序搜索算法，用于高效构建大规模变量的最优贝叶斯网络。
AI.motivation: 传统穷举搜索构建最优贝叶斯网络的复杂度呈超指数级增长，难以处理高维数据，需开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 通过动态规划结合生成式排序策略，引入维度约简和父集识别机制，支持连续、类别及生存数据，提供BIC和Bge两种评分选项。
AI.result: 算法在合成数据和卵巢癌基因表达数据（513个基因）上均优于三种主流算法，可在普通计算机上几分钟内构建包含6个基因的疾病通路网络。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可调节参数实现网络密度控制，适用于千级变量的高维生物医学数据，为疾病通路挖掘提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Xue Jiang,Xiulian Peng,Huaying Xue,Yuan Zhang,Yan Lu
title: Latent-Domain Predictive Neural Speech Coding
title_zh: 潜在域预测神经语音编码
comment: Accepted by IEEE/ACM TRANSACTIONS ON AUDIO, SPEECH, AND LANGUAGE PROCESSING (TASLP). Code and models are available at https://github.com/microsoft/TF-Codec
comments: Accepted by IEEE/ACM TRANSACTIONS ON AUDIO, SPEECH, AND LANGUAGE PROCESSING (TASLP). Code and models are available at https://github.com/microsoft/TF-Codec
abstract: Neural audio/speech coding has recently demonstrated its capability to deliver high quality at much lower bitrates than traditional methods. However, existing neural audio/speech codecs employ either acoustic features or learned blind features with a convolutional neural network for encoding, by which there are still temporal redundancies within encoded features. This paper introduces latent-domain predictive coding into the VQ-VAE framework to fully remove such redundancies and proposes the TF-Codec for low-latency neural speech coding in an end-to-end manner. Specifically, the extracted features are encoded conditioned on a prediction from past quantized latent frames so that temporal correlations are further removed. Moreover, we introduce a learnable compression on the time-frequency input to adaptively adjust the attention paid to main frequencies and details at different bitrates. A differentiable vector quantization scheme based on distance-to-soft mapping and Gumbel-Softmax is proposed to better model the latent distributions with rate constraint. Subjective results on multilingual speech datasets show that, with low latency, the proposed TF-Codec at 1 kbps achieves significantly better quality than Opus at 9 kbps, and TF-Codec at 3 kbps outperforms both EVS at 9.6 kbps and Opus at 12 kbps. Numerous studies are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of these techniques. Code and models are available at https://github.com/microsoft/TF-Codec.
summary: Neural audio/speech coding has recently demonstrated its capability to deliver high quality at much lower bitrates than traditional methods. However, existing neural audio/speech codecs employ either acoustic features or learned blind features with a convolutional neural network for encoding, by which there are still temporal redundancies within encoded features. This paper introduces latent-domain predictive coding into the VQ-VAE framework to fully remove such redundancies and proposes the TF-Codec for low-latency neural speech coding in an end-to-end manner. Specifically, the extracted features are encoded conditioned on a prediction from past quantized latent frames so that temporal correlations are further removed. Moreover, we introduce a learnable compression on the time-frequency input to adaptively adjust the attention paid to main frequencies and details at different bitrates. A differentiable vector quantization scheme based on distance-to-soft mapping and Gumbel-Softmax is proposed to better model the latent distributions with rate constraint. Subjective results on multilingual speech datasets show that, with low latency, the proposed TF-Codec at 1 kbps achieves significantly better quality than Opus at 9 kbps, and TF-Codec at 3 kbps outperforms both EVS at 9.6 kbps and Opus at 12 kbps. Numerous studies are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of these techniques. Code and models are available at https://github.com/microsoft/TF-Codec.
abstract_zh: 神经音频/语音编码最近展示了其以比传统方法低得多的比特率提供高质量的能力。然而，现有的神经音频/语音编解码器采用声学特征或通过卷积神经网络学习盲特征进行编码，通过这种方法，编码特征内仍然存在时间冗余。本文将潜在域预测编码引入到 VQ-VAE 框架中，以完全消除此类冗余，并提出用于端到端低延迟神经语音编码的 TF-Codec。具体来说，提取的特征根据过去量化潜在帧的预测进行编码，以便进一步消除时间相关性。此外，我们在时频输入上引入了可学习的压缩，以自适应地调整不同比特率下对主频率和细节的关注。提出了一种基于距离到软映射和 Gumbel-Softmax 的可微向量量化方案，以更好地对具有速率约束的潜在分布进行建模。多语言语音数据集的主观结果表明，在低延迟的情况下，所提出的 1 kbps TF-Codec 的质量明显优于 9 kbps 的 Opus，并且 3 kbps 的 TF-Codec 优于 9.6 kbps 的 EVS 和 12 kbps 的 Opus。进行了大量研究来证明这些技术的有效性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/microsoft/TF-Codec 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在域预测编码的端到端低延迟神经语音编码框架TF-Codec，通过消除时序冗余提升编码效率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经语音编码方法存在编码特征中的时序冗余问题，且难以在低比特率下保持高质量语音重建。
AI.method: 在VQ-VAE框架中引入潜在域预测编码，利用历史量化潜伏帧预测当前特征；结合可学习的时间频率压缩模块与基于距离软映射和Gumbel-Softmax的可微分向量量化方案。
AI.result: 在1kbps下显著优于Opus 9kbps，3kbps下超越EVS 9.6kbps和Opus 12kbps，多语言数据集主观测试验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过时序冗余消除与自适应注意力机制，TF-Codec在低比特率下实现了优于现有标准的语音编码质量。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在域预测编码的端到端低延迟神经语音编码框架TF-Codec，通过消除时序冗余提升编码效率。

search_text: Latent-Domain Predictive Neural Speech Coding 潜在域预测神经语音编码 Neural audio/speech coding has recently demonstrated its capability to deliver high quality at much lower bitrates than traditional methods. However, existing neural audio/speech codecs employ either acoustic features or learned blind features with a convolutional neural network for encoding, by which there are still temporal redundancies within encoded features. Specifically, the extracted features are encoded conditioned on a prediction from past quantized latent frames so that temporal correlations are further removed. Moreover, we introduce a learnable compression on the time-frequency input to adaptively adjust the attention paid to main frequencies and details at different bitrates. A differentiable vector quantization scheme based on distance-to-soft mapping and Gumbel-Softmax is proposed to better model the latent distributions with rate constraint. Subjective results on multilingual speech datasets show that, with low latency, the proposed TF-Codec at 1 kbps achieves significantly better quality than Opus at 9 kbps, and TF-Codec at 3 kbps outperforms both EVS at 9.6 kbps and Opus at 12 kbps. Numerous studies are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of these techniques. authors_text: Han Zhu,Zhenzhong Chen,Shan Liu
title: Learning Knowledge Representation with Meta Knowledge Distillation for Single Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 通过元知识蒸馏学习知识表示以实现单图像超分辨率
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD), which can efficiently transfer knowledge from a cumbersome network (teacher) to a compact network (student), has demonstrated its advantages in some computer vision applications. The representation of knowledge is vital for knowledge transferring and student learning, which is generally defined in hand-crafted manners or uses the intermediate features directly. In this paper, we propose a model-agnostic meta knowledge distillation method under the teacher-student architecture for the single image super-resolution task. It provides a more flexible and accurate way to help the teachers transmit knowledge in accordance with the abilities of students via knowledge representation networks (KRNets) with learnable parameters. In order to improve the perception ability of knowledge representation to students' requirements, we propose to solve the transformation process from intermediate outputs to transferred knowledge by employing the student features and the correlation between teacher and student in the KRNets. Specifically, the texture-aware dynamic kernels are generated and then extract texture features to be improved and the corresponding teacher guidance so as to decompose the distillation problem into texture-wise supervision for further promoting the recovery quality of high-frequency details. In addition, the KRNets are optimized in a meta-learning manner to ensure the knowledge transferring and the student learning are beneficial to improving the reconstructed quality of the student. Experiments conducted on various single image super-resolution datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms existing defined knowledge representation related distillation methods, and can help super-resolution algorithms achieve better reconstruction quality without introducing any inference complexity.

The representation of knowledge is vital for knowledge transferring and student learning, which is generally defined in hand-crafted manners or uses the intermediate features directly. In this paper, we propose a model-agnostic meta knowledge distillation method under the teacher-student architecture for the single image super-resolution task. abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）可以有效地将知识从繁琐的网络（教师）转移到紧凑的网络（学生），在一些计算机视觉应用中已经展示了其优势。知识的表示对于知识转移和学生学习至关重要，通常以手工方式定义或直接使用中间特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种师生架构下的模型无关元知识蒸馏方法，用于单图像超分辨率任务。它提供了一种更灵活、更准确的方式，帮助教师通过具有可学习参数的知识表示网络（KRNets）根据学生的能力传递知识。为了提高学生对知识表示的感知能力，我们提出利用KRNets中的学生特征和教师与学生之间的相关性来解决从中间输出到迁移知识的转换过程。具体来说，生成纹理感知动态核，然后提取需要改进的纹理特征和相应的教师指导，从而将蒸馏问题分解为纹理监督，进一步促进高频细节的恢复质量。此外，KRNets以元学习的方式进行优化，确保知识转移和学生学习有利于提高学生的重构质量。在各种单图像超分辨率数据集上进行的实验表明，我们提出的方法优于现有定义的知识表示相关的蒸馏方法，并且可以帮助超分辨率算法在不引入任何推理复杂性的情况下实现更好的重建质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元知识蒸馏的模型无关知识表示学习方法，用于单图像超分辨率任务，通过优化知识传递过程提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法依赖手工设计的知识表示或直接使用中间特征，缺乏对不同学生模型能力的自适应性，限制了知识传递的灵活性和准确性。
AI.method: 设计可学习参数的知识表示网络（KRNets），结合学生特征与师生关联性生成纹理感知动态核，分解为纹理级监督；通过元学习优化KRNets，实现知识传递与学生学习的协同优化。
AI.result: 在多个单图像超分辨率数据集上优于现有知识表示蒸馏方法，显著提升高频细节恢复质量且不增加推理复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自适应知识表示和元学习优化，有效提升了单图像超分辨率性能，为模型无关的知识蒸馏提供了新思路。

authors_text: Uttaran Bhattacharya,Gang Wu,Stefano Petrangeli,Viswanathan Swaminathan,Dinesh Manocha
title: Show Me What I Like: Detecting User-Specific Video Highlights Using Content-Based Multi-Head Attention
title_zh: 展示我喜欢的内容：使用基于内容的多头注意力检测特定于用户的视频精彩片段
abstract: We propose a method to detect individualized highlights for users on given target videos based on their preferred highlight clips marked on previous videos they have watched. Our method explicitly leverages the contents of both the preferred clips and the target videos using pre-trained features for the objects and the human activities. We design a multi-head attention mechanism to adaptively weigh the preferred clips based on their object- and human-activity-based contents, and fuse them using these weights into a single feature representation for each user. We compute similarities between these per-user feature representations and the per-frame features computed from the desired target videos to estimate the user-specific highlight clips from the target videos. We test our method on a large-scale highlight detection dataset containing the annotated highlights of individual users. Compared to current baselines, we observe an absolute improvement of 2-4% in the mean average precision of the detected highlights. We also perform extensive ablation experiments on the number of preferred highlight clips associated with each user as well as on the object- and human-activity-based feature representations to validate that our method is indeed both content-based and user-specific.
summary: We propose a method to detect individualized highlights for users on given target videos based on their preferred highlight clips marked on previous videos they have watched. Our method explicitly leverages the contents of both the preferred clips and the target videos using pre-trained features for the objects and the human activities. We design a multi-head attention mechanism to adaptively weigh the preferred clips based on their object- and human-activity-based contents, and fuse them using these weights into a single feature representation for each user. We compute similarities between these per-user feature representations and the per-frame features computed from the desired target videos to estimate the user-specific highlight clips from the target videos. We test our method on a large-scale highlight detection dataset containing the annotated highlights of individual users. Compared to current baselines, we observe an absolute improvement of 2-4% in the mean average precision of the detected highlights. We also perform extensive ablation experiments on the number of preferred highlight clips associated with each user as well as on the object- and human-activity-based feature representations to validate that our method is indeed both content-based and user-specific.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法，根据用户在之前观看过的视频上标记的首选精彩片段，检测给定目标视频上用户的个性化精彩片段。我们的方法使用对象和人类活动的预训练特征来明确利用首选剪辑和目标视频的内容。我们设计了一种多头注意力机制，根据基于对象和人类活动的内容自适应地权衡首选剪辑，并使用这些权重将它们融合到每个用户的单个特征表示中。我们计算这些每用户特征表示与从所需目标视频计算的每帧特征之间的相似性，以估计目标视频中的用户特定的精彩片段。我们在包含单个用户带注释的亮点的大规模亮点检测数据集上测试我们的方法。与当前基线相比，我们观察到检测到的亮点的平均精度绝对提高了 2-4%。我们还对与每个用户相关的首选精彩片段的数量以及基于对象和人类活动的特征表示进行了广泛的消融实验，以验证我们的方法确实是基于内容和特定于用户的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内容的多头注意力机制，通过用户历史偏好片段检测目标视频的个性化精彩片段。
AI.motivation: 现有视频精彩片段检测方法缺乏对用户个性化偏好的建模，无法准确匹配用户兴趣。
AI.method: 利用预训练特征提取视频对象和人类活动信息，设计多头注意力机制动态加权用户历史偏好片段，融合生成用户特征表示，并通过与目标视频帧特征相似度计算定位用户专属精彩片段。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上相较基线方法实现2-4%的mAP绝对提升，消融实验证实方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过内容感知的多头注意力机制实现了真正用户个性化和内容相关的精彩片段检测。

authors_text: Canqian Yang,Meiguang Jin,Yi Xu,Rui Zhang,Ying Chen,Huaida Liu
title: SepLUT: Separable Image-adaptive Lookup Tables for Real-time Image Enhancement
title_zh: SepLUT：用于实时图像增强的可分离图像自适应查找表
abstract: Image-adaptive lookup tables (LUTs) have achieved great success in real-time image enhancement tasks due to their high efficiency for modeling color transforms. However, they embed the complete transform, including the color component-independent and the component-correlated parts, into only a single type of LUTs, either 1D or 3D, in a coupled manner. This scheme raises a dilemma of improving model expressiveness or efficiency due to two factors. On the one hand, the 1D LUTs provide high computational efficiency but lack the critical capability of color components interaction. On the other, the 3D LUTs present enhanced component-correlated transform capability but suffer from heavy memory footprint, high training difficulty, and limited cell utilization. Inspired by the conventional divide-and-conquer practice in the image signal processor, we present SepLUT (separable image-adaptive lookup table) to tackle the above limitations. Specifically, we separate a single color transform into a cascade of component-independent and component-correlated sub-transforms instantiated as 1D and 3D LUTs, respectively. In this way, the capabilities of two sub-transforms can facilitate each other, where the 3D LUT complements the ability to mix up color components, and the 1D LUT redistributes the input colors to increase the cell utilization of the 3D LUT and thus enable the use of a more lightweight 3D LUT. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method presents enhanced performance on photo retouching benchmark datasets than the current state-of-the-art and achieves real-time processing on both GPUs and CPUs.
summary: Image-adaptive lookup tables (LUTs) have achieved great success in real-time image enhancement tasks due to their high efficiency for modeling color transforms. However, they embed the complete transform, including the color component-independent and the component-correlated parts, into only a single type of LUTs, either 1D or 3D, in a coupled manner. This scheme raises a dilemma of improving model expressiveness or efficiency due to two factors. On the one hand, the 1D LUTs provide high computational efficiency but lack the critical capability of color components interaction. On the other, the 3D LUTs present enhanced component-correlated transform capability but suffer from heavy memory footprint, high training difficulty, and limited cell utilization. Inspired by the conventional divide-and-conquer practice in the image signal processor, we present SepLUT (separable image-adaptive lookup table) to tackle the above limitations. Specifically, we separate a single color transform into a cascade of component-independent and component-correlated sub-transforms instantiated as 1D and 3D LUTs, respectively. In this way, the capabilities of two sub-transforms can facilitate each other, where the 3D LUT complements the ability to mix up color components, and the 1D LUT redistributes the input colors to increase the cell utilization of the 3D LUT and thus enable the use of a more lightweight 3D LUT. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method presents enhanced performance on photo retouching benchmark datasets than the current state-of-the-art and achieves real-time processing on both GPUs and CPUs.
abstract_zh: 图像自适应查找表（LUT）由于其对颜色变换建模的高效率，在实时图像增强任务中取得了巨大的成功。然而，他们以耦合方式将完整的变换（包括与颜色分量无关的部分和与分量相关的部分）嵌入到单一类型的 LUT（1D 或 3D）中。由于两个因素，该方案在提高模型表达力或效率方面遇到了困境。一方面，1D LUT 提供高计算效率，但缺乏颜色分量交互的关键能力。另一方面，3D LUT 提供了增强的组件相关变换能力，但存在内存占用大、训练难度高和单元利用率有限的问题。受到图像信号处理器中传统分而治之实践的启发，我们提出了 SepLUT（可分离图像自适应查找表）来解决上述限制。具体来说，我们将单一颜色变换分离为一系列独立于组件和组件相关的子变换，分别实例化为 1D 和 3D LUT。这样，两个子变换的功能可以互相促进，其中 3D LUT 补充了混合颜色分量的能力，而 1D LUT 重新分配输入颜色以提高 3D LUT 的单元利用率，从而能够使用更轻量级的 3D LUT。实验表明，所提出的方法在照片修饰基准数据集上呈现出比当前最先进的技术更高的性能，并且在 GPU 和 CPU 上实现了实时处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SepLUT方法，通过分离1D和3D查找表解决实时图像增强中色彩变换的效率与表达能力矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有1D LUT计算高效但无法处理色彩交互，3D LUT虽能处理色彩相关性但存在内存占用大、训练困难等问题，需平衡效率与表达能力。
AI.method: 将单一色彩变换分解为独立色彩变换（1D LUT）和相关色彩变换（3D LUT）级联结构，利用1D LUT优化输入分布以提升3D LUT利用率。
AI.result: 在图像润色基准数据集上优于现有方法，且能在GPU和CPU上实现实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦色彩变换组件，SepLUT在保持高效性的同时提升了模型表达能力，为实时图像增强提供新思路。

search_text: SepLUT: Separable Image-adaptive Lookup Tables for Real-time Image Enhancement SepLUT：用于实时图像增强的可分离图像自适应查找表 Image-adaptive lookup tables (LUTs) have achieved great success in real-time image enhancement tasks due to their high efficiency for modeling color transforms. However, they embed the complete transform, including the color component-independent and the component-correlated parts, into only a single type of LUTs, either 1D or 3D, in a coupled manner. This scheme raises a dilemma of improving model expressiveness or efficiency due to two factors. On the one hand, the 1D LUTs provide high computational efficiency but lack the critical capability of color components interaction. On the other, the 3D LUTs present enhanced component-correlated transform capability but suffer from heavy memory footprint, high training difficulty, and limited cell utilization. Inspired by the conventional divide-and-conquer practice in the image signal processor, we present SepLUT (separable image-adaptive lookup table) to tackle the above limitations. Specifically, we separate a single color transform into a cascade of component-independent and component-correlated sub-transforms instantiated as 1D and 3D LUTs, respectively. In this way, the capabilities of two sub-transforms can facilitate each other, where the 3D LUT complements the ability to mix up color components, and the 1D LUT redistributes the input colors to increase the cell utilization of the 3D LUT and thus enable the use of a more lightweight 3D LUT. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method presents enhanced performance on photo retouching benchmark datasets than the current state-of-the-art and achieves real-time processing on both GPUs and CPUs. 图像自适应查找表（LUT）由于其对颜色变换建模的高效率，在实时图像增强任务中取得了巨大的成功。然而，他们以耦合方式将完整的变换（包括与颜色分量无关的部分和与分量相关的部分）嵌入到单一类型的 LUT（1D 或 3D）中。由于两个因素，该方案在提高模型表达力或效率方面遇到了困境。一方面，1D LUT 提供高计算效率，但缺乏颜色分量交互的关键能力。另一方面，3D LUT 提供了增强的组件相关变换能力，但存在内存占用大、训练难度高和单元利用率有限的问题。受到图像信号处理器中传统分而治之实践的启发，我们提出了 SepLUT（可分离图像自适应查找表）来解决上述限制。具体来说，我们将单一颜色变换分离为一系列独立于组件和组件相关的子变换，分别实例化为 1D 和 3D LUT。这样，两个子变换的功能可以互相促进，其中 3D LUT 补充了混合颜色分量的能力，而 1D LUT 重新分配输入颜色以提高 3D LUT 的单元利用率，从而能够使用更轻量级的 3D LUT。实验表明，所提出的方法在照片修饰基准数据集上呈现出比当前最先进的技术更高的性能，并且在 GPU 和 CPU 上实现了实时处理。 本文提出SepLUT方法，通过分离1D和3D查找表解决实时图像增强中色彩变换的效率与表达能力矛盾。 Canqian Yang,Meiguang Jin,Yi Xu,Rui Zhang,Ying Chen,Huaida Liu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Liangzu Peng,Mahyar Fazlyab,René Vidal
title: Towards Understanding The Semidefinite Relaxations of Truncated Least-Squares in Robust Rotation Search
title_zh: 理解鲁棒旋转搜索中截断最小二乘的半定松弛
abstract: The rotation search problem aims to find a 3D rotation that best aligns a given number of point pairs. To induce robustness against outliers for rotation search, prior work considers truncated least-squares (TLS), which is a non-convex optimization problem, and its semidefinite relaxation (SDR) as a tractable alternative. Whether this SDR is theoretically tight in the presence of noise, outliers, or both has remained largely unexplored. We derive conditions that characterize the tightness of this SDR, showing that the tightness depends on the noise level, the truncation parameters of TLS, and the outlier distribution (random or clustered). In particular, we give a short proof for the tightness in the noiseless and outlier-free case, as opposed to the lengthy analysis of prior work.
summary: The rotation search problem aims to find a 3D rotation that best aligns a given number of point pairs. To induce robustness against outliers for rotation search, prior work considers truncated least-squares (TLS), which is a non-convex optimization problem, and its semidefinite relaxation (SDR) as a tractable alternative. Whether this SDR is theoretically tight in the presence of noise, outliers, or both has remained largely unexplored. We derive conditions that characterize the tightness of this SDR, showing that the tightness depends on the noise level, the truncation parameters of TLS, and the outlier distribution (random or clustered). In particular, we give a short proof for the tightness in the noiseless and outlier-free case, as opposed to the lengthy analysis of prior work.
abstract_zh: 旋转搜索问题旨在找到最能对齐给定数量的点对的 3D 旋转。为了提高旋转搜索对异常值的鲁棒性，先前的工作考虑截断最小二乘法（TLS）（这是一个非凸优化问题）及其半定松弛（SDR）作为一种易于处理的替代方案。在存在噪声、异常值或两者兼而有之的情况下，该 SDR 在理论上是否是严格的，很大程度上仍未得到探索。我们推导了表征该 SDR 紧密度的条件，表明紧密度取决于噪声水平、TLS 截断参数以及离群值分布（随机或聚集）。特别是，我们对无噪声和无异常值情况下的紧密性给出了简短的证明，而不是对先前工作的冗长分析。

AI.tldr: 研究截断最小二乘的半定松弛在鲁棒旋转搜索中的严格性条件。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过截断最小二乘及其半定松弛解决旋转搜索中的异常值问题，但其理论严格性在噪声和异常值存在时未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 推导SDR严格性的条件，分析噪声水平、截断参数及异常值分布（随机/聚类）的影响，并提供无噪声情况下的简洁证明。
AI.result: 确定SDR严格性依赖噪声、截断参数和异常值分布，且在无噪声无异常值时证明其严格性，较之前工作更简洁。
AI.conclusion: SDR严格性受多因素影响，为鲁棒旋转算法设计提供理论依据，并简化了无噪声场景的分析证明。

authors_text: Zechen Xiong,Liqi Chen,Wenxiong Hao,Yufeng Su,Hod Lipson
title: Fast Swimming Robots Based on Elastic Instability
title_zh: 基于弹性不稳定性的快速游泳机器人
comment: repeated submission with arXiv:2206.14867 - Pre-stressed Bi-stable Hair Clip Mechanism for Faster Swimming Robots
comments: repeated submission with arXiv:2206.14867 - Pre-stressed Bi-stable Hair Clip Mechanism for Faster Swimming Robots
abstract: Inspired by the snap-through action of a steel hairclip, we propose a design method for in-plane prestressed mechanisms that exhibit biomimetic morphing and high locomotion performance. Compliant bistable flapping mechanisms are fabricated using this method and are mounted on our untethered soft robotic fish. Using this mechanism, we achieve life-like undulation with a Strouhal number (1) of St = 0.28 and a velocity of 2.03 body lengths per second (43.6 cm/s), a three-fold improvement over past compliant fish robots. A tethered pneumatic version indicates that this mechanism is compatible with soft actuators. We study the mechanism both computationally and experimentally and suggest that elastic instability may offer a path to overcome the speed challenge of soft and compliant robots.
summary: Inspired by the snap-through action of a steel hairclip, we propose a design method for in-plane prestressed mechanisms that exhibit biomimetic morphing and high locomotion performance. Compliant bistable flapping mechanisms are fabricated using this method and are mounted on our untethered soft robotic fish. Using this mechanism, we achieve life-like undulation with a Strouhal number (1) of St = 0.28 and a velocity of 2.03 body lengths per second (43.6 cm/s), a three-fold improvement over past compliant fish robots. A tethered pneumatic version indicates that this mechanism is compatible with soft actuators. We study the mechanism both computationally and experimentally and suggest that elastic instability may offer a path to overcome the speed challenge of soft and compliant robots.
abstract_zh: 受钢发夹的快速穿透动作的启发，我们提出了一种平面内预应力机构的设计方法，该方法具有仿生变形和高运动性能。使用这种方法制造了兼容的双稳态扑动机构，并将其安装在我们的无绳软机器鱼上。利用这种机制，我们实现了逼真的波动，斯特劳哈尔数 (1) St = 0.28，速度为每秒 2.03 个体长（43.6 厘米/秒），比过去的顺应鱼机器人提高了三倍。系留气动版本表明该机构与软执行器兼容。我们通过计算和实验研究了该机制，并表明弹性不稳定性可能提供克服软柔顺机器人速度挑战的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于弹性失稳的快速游泳机器人设计方法，通过仿生形态变换实现高效运动。
AI.motivation: 解决软体机器人运动速度慢的问题，借鉴生物运动机制与弹性失稳原理提升性能。
AI.method: 受钢发夹snap-through动作启发，设计平面预应力机构并制造双稳态拍动装置，结合计算仿真与实验验证。
AI.result: 实现斯特劳哈尔数St=0.28、速度2.03身体长度/秒（43.6cm/s），较传统软体鱼机器人提升三倍，且兼容气动软体执行器。
AI.conclusion: 弹性失稳机制为突破软体机器人速度限制提供新路径，可拓展至其他仿生机器人设计领域。

conclusion: 弹性失稳机制为突破软体机器人速度限制提供新路径，可拓展至其他仿生机器人设计领域。
search_text: Fast Swimming Robots Based on Elastic Instability 基于弹性不稳定性的快速游泳机器人 Inspired by the snap-through action of a steel hairclip, we propose a design method for in-plane prestressed mechanisms that exhibit biomimetic morphing and high locomotion performance. Compliant bistable flapping mechanisms are fabricated using this method and are mounted on our untethered soft robotic fish. Using this mechanism, we achieve life-like undulation with a Strouhal number (1) of St = 0.28 and a velocity of 2.03 body lengths per second (43.6 cm/s), a three-fold improvement over past compliant fish robots. A tethered pneumatic version indicates that this mechanism is compatible with soft actuators. We study the mechanism both computationally and experimentally and suggest that elastic instability may offer a path to overcome the speed challenge of soft and compliant robots. 受钢发夹的快速穿透动作的启发，我们提出了一种平面内预应力机构的设计方法，该方法具有仿生变形和高运动性能。使用这种方法制造了兼容的双稳态扑动机构，并将其安装在我们的无绳软机器鱼上。利用这种机制，我们实现了逼真的波动，斯特劳哈尔数 (1) St = 0.28，速度为每秒 2.03 个体长（43.6 厘米/秒），比过去的顺应鱼机器人提高了三倍。系留气动版本表明该机构与软执行器兼容。我们通过计算和实验研究了该机制，并表明弹性不稳定性可能提供克服软柔顺机器人速度挑战的途径。 本文提出一种基于弹性失稳的快速游泳机器人设计方法，通过仿生形态变换实现高效运动。 Zechen Xiong,Liqi Chen,Wenxiong Hao,Yufeng Su,Hod Lipson cs.RO

authors_text: Shahram Ghandeharizadeh
title: Display of 3D Illuminations using Flying Light Specks
title_zh: 使用飞行光斑显示 3D 照明
comment: A shorter version in the Proceedings of the 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia (MM '22), October 10--14, 2022, Lisboa, Portugal, DOI https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3503161.3548250, ISBN 978-1-4503-9203-7/22/10. See https://github.com/shahramg/FLS-Multimedia2022 for experimental software
comments: A shorter version in the Proceedings of the 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia (MM '22), October 10--14, 2022, Lisboa, Portugal, DOI https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3503161.3548250, ISBN 978-1-4503-9203-7/22/10. See https://github.com/shahramg/FLS-Multimedia2022 for experimental software
abstract: This paper presents techniques to display 3D illuminations using Flying Light Specks, FLSs. Each FLS is a miniature (hundreds of micrometers) sized drone with one or more light sources to generate different colors and textures with adjustable brightness. It is network enabled with a processor and local storage. Synchronized swarms of cooperating FLSs render illumination of virtual objects in a pre-specified 3D volume, an FLS display. We present techniques to display both static and motion illuminations. Our display techniques consider the limited flight time of an FLS on a fully charged battery and the duration of time to charge the FLS battery. Moreover, our techniques assume failure of FLSs is the norm rather than an exception. We present a hardware and a software architecture for an FLS-display along with a family of techniques to compute flight paths of FLSs for illuminations. With motion illuminations, one technique (ICF) minimizes the overall distance traveled by the FLSs significantly when compared with the other techniques.
summary: This paper presents techniques to display 3D illuminations using Flying Light Specks, FLSs. Each FLS is a miniature (hundreds of micrometers) sized drone with one or more light sources to generate different colors and textures with adjustable brightness. It is network enabled with a processor and local storage. Synchronized swarms of cooperating FLSs render illumination of virtual objects in a pre-specified 3D volume, an FLS display. We present techniques to display both static and motion illuminations. Our display techniques consider the limited flight time of an FLS on a fully charged battery and the duration of time to charge the FLS battery. Moreover, our techniques assume failure of FLSs is the norm rather than an exception. We present a hardware and a software architecture for an FLS-display along with a family of techniques to compute flight paths of FLSs for illuminations. With motion illuminations, one technique (ICF) minimizes the overall distance traveled by the FLSs significantly when compared with the other techniques.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了使用飞行光斑 (FLS) 显示 3D 照明的技术。每个 FLS 都是一架微型（数百微米）尺寸的无人机，具有一个或多个光源，可产生不同的颜色和纹理，并具有可调节的亮度。它具有网络功能，配有处理器和本地存储。同步协作的 FLS 群在预先指定的 3D 体积（FLS 显示器）中渲染虚拟对象的照明。我们提出了显示静态和运动照明的技术。我们的显示技术考虑了 FLS 在充满电的电池上的有限飞行时间以及 FLS 电池的充电时间。此外，我们的技术假设 FLS 失败是常态，而不是例外。我们提出了 FLS 显示器的硬件和软件架构，以及计算照明 FLS 飞行路径的一系列技术。与其他技术相比，利用运动照明，一种技术 (ICF) 可以显着最小化 FLS 行进的总距离。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用微型无人机（Flying Light Specks, FLS）在三维空间中显示静态和动态照明的技术，通过同步控制FLS群组实现虚拟物体的光效渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统显示技术难以实现动态、可编程的三维光场效果，而FLS具备灵活性和可编程性，可突破物理屏幕的限制，但需解决续航、路径优化及故障容错等关键问题。
AI.method: 设计硬件架构与软件系统，提出飞行路径计算方法（包括ICF算法），通过网络同步控制FLS群组，并考虑电池续航时间与设备故障的鲁棒性设计。
AI.result: ICF算法相比其他方法显著减少FLS飞行总距离，系统可在有限续航和故障情况下稳定运行，成功实现静态与动态3D照明显示。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为三维光场显示提供了新型解决方案，验证了FLS在复杂场景下的可行性，未来可进一步优化能耗与大规模群组控制策略。

authors_text: Yi Zhou,Shan Hu,Zimo Sheng
title: Extracting Densest Sub-hypergraph with Convex Edge-weight Functions
title_zh: 用凸边权函数提取最稠密子超图
abstract: The densest subgraph problem (DSG) aiming at finding an induced subgraph such that the average edge-weights of the subgraph is maximized, is a well-studied problem. However, when the input graph is a hypergraph, the existing notion of DSG fails to capture the fact that a hyperedge partially belonging to an induced sub-hypergraph is also a part of the sub-hypergraph. To resolve the issue, we suggest a function $f_e:\mathbb{Z}_{\ge0}\rightarrow \mathbb{R}_{\ge 0}$ to represent the partial edge-weight of a hyperedge $e$ in the input hypergraph $\mathcal{H}=(V,\mathcal{E},f)$ and formulate a generalized densest sub-hypergraph problem (GDSH) as $\max_{S\subseteq V}\frac{\sum_{e\in \mathcal{E}}{f_e(|e\cap S|)}}{|S|}$. We demonstrate that, when all the edge-weight functions are non-decreasing convex, GDSH can be solved in polynomial-time by the linear program-based algorithm, the network flow-based algorithm and the greedy $\frac{1}{r}$-approximation algorithm where $r$ is the rank of the input hypergraph. Finally, we investigate the computational tractability of GDSH where some edge-weight functions are non-convex.
summary: The densest subgraph problem (DSG) aiming at finding an induced subgraph such that the average edge-weights of the subgraph is maximized, is a well-studied problem. However, when the input graph is a hypergraph, the existing notion of DSG fails to capture the fact that a hyperedge partially belonging to an induced sub-hypergraph is also a part of the sub-hypergraph. To resolve the issue, we suggest a function $f_e:\mathbb{Z}_{\ge0}\rightarrow \mathbb{R}_{\ge 0}$ to represent the partial edge-weight of a hyperedge $e$ in the input hypergraph $\mathcal{H}=(V,\mathcal{E},f)$ and formulate a generalized densest sub-hypergraph problem (GDSH) as $\max_{S\subseteq V}\frac{\sum_{e\in \mathcal{E}}{f_e(|e\cap S|)}}{|S|}$. We demonstrate that, when all the edge-weight functions are non-decreasing convex, GDSH can be solved in polynomial-time by the linear program-based algorithm, the network flow-based algorithm and the greedy $\frac{1}{r}$-approximation algorithm where $r$ is the rank of the input hypergraph. Finally, we investigate the computational tractability of GDSH where some edge-weight functions are non-convex.
abstract_zh: 最稠密子图问题（DSG）旨在找到一个归纳子图，使得子图的平均边权重最大化，是一个经过充分研究的问题。然而，当输入图是超图时，现有的 DSG 概念无法捕获这样的事实：部分属于导出子超图的超边也是子超图的一部分。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用函数 $f_e:\mathbb{Z}_{\ge0}\rightarrow \mathbb{R}_{\ge 0}$ 来表示输入超图 $\mathcal{H}=(V,\mathcal{E},f)$ 中超边 $e$ 的部分边权重，并将广义最稠密子超图问题 (GDSH) 公式化为 $\max_{S\subseteq V}\frac{\sum_{e\in \mathcal{E}}{f_e(|e\cap S|)}}{|S|}$。我们证明，当所有边权函数都是非递减凸函数时，GDSH 可以通过基于线性程序的算法、基于网络流的算法和贪婪的 $\frac{1}{r}$ 近似算法在多项式时间内求解，其中 $r$ 是输入超图的秩。最后，我们研究了 GDSH 的计算易处理性，其中一些边权重函数是非凸的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在超图中提取具有凸边权函数的最密集子超图的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统密集子图问题无法处理超边部分属于子超图的情况，需引入部分边权函数以更准确建模超图结构。
AI.method: 提出广义密集子超图问题（GDSH），并设计基于线性规划、网络流及贪心算法的求解方法，同时分析非凸函数场景的计算可行性。
AI.result: 证明当边权函数为非降凸函数时，GDSH可在多项式时间内通过线性规划、网络流算法或贪心算法求解，并探讨了非凸情形的计算复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为凸边权函数下的超图密集子图问题提供了多项式时间算法，并为非凸情形的可计算性研究奠定了基础。

Finally, we investigate the computational tractability of GDSH where some edge-weight functions are non-convex. 最稠密子图问题（DSG）旨在找到一个归纳子图，使得子图的平均边权重最大化，是一个经过充分研究的问题。然而，当输入图是超图时，现有的 DSG 概念无法捕获这样的事实：部分属于导出子超图的超边也是子超图的一部分。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用函数 $f_e:\mathbb{Z}_{\ge0}\rightarrow \mathbb{R}_{\ge 0}$ 来表示输入超图 $\mathcal{H}=(V,\mathcal{E},f)$ 中超边 $e$ 的部分边权重，并将广义最稠密子超图问题 (GDSH) 公式化为 $\max_{S\subseteq V}\frac{\sum_{e\in \mathcal{E}}{f_e(|e\cap S|)}}{|S|}$。我们证明，当所有边权函数都是非递减凸函数时，GDSH 可以通过基于线性程序的算法、基于网络流的算法和贪婪的 $\frac{1}{r}$ 近似算法在多项式时间内求解，其中 $r$ 是输入超图的秩。最后，我们研究了 GDSH 的计算易处理性，其中一些边权重函数是非凸的。 本文研究了在超图中提取具有凸边权函数的最密集子超图的问题。 Yi Zhou,Shan Hu,Zimo Sheng cs.DS

authors_text: Hoang Le,Liang Zhang,Amir Said,Guillaume Sautiere,Yang Yang,Pranav Shrestha,Fei Yin,Reza Pourreza,Auke Wiggers
title: MobileCodec: Neural Inter-frame Video Compression on Mobile Devices
title_zh: MobileCodec：移动设备上的神经帧间视频压缩
abstract: Realizing the potential of neural video codecs on mobile devices is a big technological challenge due to the computational complexity of deep networks and the power-constrained mobile hardware. We demonstrate practical feasibility by leveraging Qualcomm's technology and innovation, bridging the gap from neural network-based codec simulations running on wall-powered workstations, to real-time operation on a mobile device powered by Snapdragon technology. We show the first-ever inter-frame neural video decoder running on a commercial mobile phone, decoding high-definition videos in real-time while maintaining a low bitrate and high visual quality.
summary: Realizing the potential of neural video codecs on mobile devices is a big technological challenge due to the computational complexity of deep networks and the power-constrained mobile hardware. We demonstrate practical feasibility by leveraging Qualcomm's technology and innovation, bridging the gap from neural network-based codec simulations running on wall-powered workstations, to real-time operation on a mobile device powered by Snapdragon technology. We show the first-ever inter-frame neural video decoder running on a commercial mobile phone, decoding high-definition videos in real-time while maintaining a low bitrate and high visual quality.
abstract_zh: 由于深度网络的计算复杂性和功耗受限的移动硬件，在移动设备上实现神经视频编解码器的潜力是一项巨大的技术挑战。我们通过利用高通的技术和创新来展示实际可行性，缩小从在墙壁供电工作站上运行的基于神经网络的编解码器模拟到在由 Snapdragon 技术支持的移动设备上实时操作的差距。我们展示了首款在商用手机上运行的帧间神经视频解码器，实时解码高清视频，同时保持低比特率和高视觉质量。

AI.tldr: 开发适用于移动设备的神经网络帧间视频压缩技术，实现低比特率下的实时高清视频解码。
AI.motivation: 神经视频编解码器因计算复杂度高和移动设备功耗限制难以在手机端实时运行，需突破硬件与算法瓶颈以实现高效压缩。
AI.method: 基于高通Snapdragon技术优化神经网络模型，通过硬件加速与算法调整，将工作站上的编解码仿真移植至移动设备。
AI.result: 首次在商用手机上实现帧间神经视频解码，支持实时高清视频播放，同时保持低比特率和高画质。
AI.conclusion: 证明了神经视频编解码器在移动设备上的可行性，为移动端高效视频处理提供了技术路径。

authors_text: Canyu Chen,Yueqing Liang,Xiongxiao Xu,Shangyu Xie,Ashish Kundu,Ali Payani,Yuan Hong,Kai Shu
title: When Fairness Meets Privacy: Fair Classification with Semi-Private Sensitive Attributes
title_zh: 当公平遇到隐私：具有半隐私敏感属性的公平分类
abstract: Machine learning models have demonstrated promising performance in many areas. However, the concerns that they can be biased against specific demographic groups hinder their adoption in high-stake applications. Thus, it is essential to ensure fairness in machine learning models. Most previous efforts require direct access to sensitive attributes for mitigating bias. Nonetheless, it is often infeasible to obtain large-scale users' sensitive attributes considering users' concerns about privacy in the data collection process. Privacy mechanisms such as local differential privacy (LDP) are widely enforced on sensitive information in the data collection stage due to legal compliance and people's increasing awareness of privacy. Therefore, a critical problem is how to make fair predictions under privacy. We study a novel and practical problem of fair classification in a semi-private setting, where most of the sensitive attributes are private and only a small amount of clean ones are available. To this end, we propose a novel framework FairSP that can achieve Fair prediction under the Semi-Private setting. First, FairSP learns to correct the noise-protected sensitive attributes by exploiting the limited clean sensitive attributes. Then, it jointly models the corrected and clean data in an adversarial way for debiasing and prediction. Theoretical analysis shows that the proposed model can ensure fairness under mild assumptions in the semi-private setting. Extensive experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for making fair predictions under privacy and maintaining high accuracy.
summary: Machine learning models have demonstrated promising performance in many areas. However, the concerns that they can be biased against specific demographic groups hinder their adoption in high-stake applications. Thus, it is essential to ensure fairness in machine learning models. Most previous efforts require direct access to sensitive attributes for mitigating bias. Nonetheless, it is often infeasible to obtain large-scale users' sensitive attributes considering users' concerns about privacy in the data collection process. Privacy mechanisms such as local differential privacy (LDP) are widely enforced on sensitive information in the data collection stage due to legal compliance and people's increasing awareness of privacy. Therefore, a critical problem is how to make fair predictions under privacy. We study a novel and practical problem of fair classification in a semi-private setting, where most of the sensitive attributes are private and only a small amount of clean ones are available. To this end, we propose a novel framework FairSP that can achieve Fair prediction under the Semi-Private setting. First, FairSP learns to correct the noise-protected sensitive attributes by exploiting the limited clean sensitive attributes. Then, it jointly models the corrected and clean data in an adversarial way for debiasing and prediction. Theoretical analysis shows that the proposed model can ensure fairness under mild assumptions in the semi-private setting. Extensive experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for making fair predictions under privacy and maintaining high accuracy.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型在许多领域都表现出了良好的性能。然而，担心它们可能对特定人口群体存在偏见，阻碍了它们在高风险应用中的采用。因此，确保机器学习模型的公平性至关重要。之前的大多数工作都需要直接访问敏感属性以减少偏见。然而，考虑到用户在数据收集过程中对隐私的担忧，获取大规模用户的敏感属性往往是不可行的。由于法律合规性和人们隐私意识的增强，本地差分隐私（LDP）等隐私机制在数据收集阶段对敏感信息广泛实施。因此，一个关键问题是如何在隐私下做出公平的预测。我们研究了半私有环境中公平分类的新颖且实际的问题，其中大多数敏感属性都是私有的，只有少量干净的属性可用。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的框架FairSP，可以在半私有设置下实现公平预测。首先，FairSP 学习通过利用有限的干净敏感属性来纠正受噪声保护的敏感属性。然后，它以对抗性的方式对校正后的数据和干净的数据进行联合建模，以进行去偏和预测。理论分析表明，所提出的模型可以在半私密环境下的温和假设下保证公平性。对现实世界数据集的大量实验结果证明了我们的方法在隐私下进行公平预测并保持高精度的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半隐私设置下的公平分类框架FairSP，解决隐私保护与模型公平性之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 传统公平学习依赖直接访问敏感属性，但隐私机制（如LDP）导致敏感数据难以获取，需在隐私保护下实现公平预测。
AI.method: FairSP通过有限干净敏感属性修正噪声保护数据，再联合建模修正数据与干净数据进行对抗训练，实现去偏与预测。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了方法在隐私保护下保持高准确性，理论分析证明其在半隐私设置中的公平性保障。
AI.conclusion: FairSP为隐私与公平的平衡提供了新思路，既满足隐私合规要求，又有效缓解模型偏见问题。

Privacy mechanisms such as local differential privacy (LDP) are widely enforced on sensitive information in the data collection stage due to legal compliance and people's increasing awareness of privacy. To this end, we propose a novel framework FairSP that can achieve Fair prediction under the Semi-Private setting. Then, it jointly models the corrected and clean data in an adversarial way for debiasing and prediction. Theoretical analysis shows that the proposed model can ensure fairness under mild assumptions in the semi-private setting. authors_text: Salil Vadhan,Wanrong Zhang
title: Concurrent Composition Theorems for Differential Privacy
title_zh: 差分隐私的并发组合定理
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 55th Annual ACM Symposium on Theory of Computing (STOC '23), June 20--23, 2023, Orlando, FL, USA
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 55th Annual ACM Symposium on Theory of Computing (STOC '23), June 20--23, 2023, Orlando, FL, USA
abstract: We study the concurrent composition properties of interactive differentially private mechanisms, whereby an adversary can arbitrarily interleave its queries to the different mechanisms. We prove that all composition theorems for non-interactive differentially private mechanisms extend to the concurrent composition of interactive differentially private mechanisms, whenever differential privacy is measured using the hypothesis testing framework of $f$-DP, which captures standard $(\eps,δ)$-DP as a special case. We prove the concurrent composition theorem by showing that every interactive $f$-DP mechanism can be simulated by interactive post-processing of a non-interactive $f$-DP mechanism. In concurrent and independent work, Lyu~\cite{lyu2022composition} proves a similar result to ours for $(\eps,δ)$-DP, as well as a concurrent composition theorem for Rényi DP. We also provide a simple proof of Lyu's concurrent composition theorem for Rényi DP. Lyu leaves the general case of $f$-DP as an open problem, which we solve in this paper.
summary: We study the concurrent composition properties of interactive differentially private mechanisms, whereby an adversary can arbitrarily interleave its queries to the different mechanisms. We prove that all composition theorems for non-interactive differentially private mechanisms extend to the concurrent composition of interactive differentially private mechanisms, whenever differential privacy is measured using the hypothesis testing framework of $f$-DP, which captures standard $(\eps,δ)$-DP as a special case. We prove the concurrent composition theorem by showing that every interactive $f$-DP mechanism can be simulated by interactive post-processing of a non-interactive $f$-DP mechanism. In concurrent and independent work, Lyu~\cite{lyu2022composition} proves a similar result to ours for $(\eps,δ)$-DP, as well as a concurrent composition theorem for Rényi DP. We also provide a simple proof of Lyu's concurrent composition theorem for Rényi DP. Lyu leaves the general case of $f$-DP as an open problem, which we solve in this paper.
abstract_zh: 我们研究交互式差分隐私机制的并发组合属性，攻击者可以任意地将其查询交错到不同的机制。我们证明，每当使用 $f$-DP 的假设检验框架（捕获标准 $(\eps,δ)$-DP 作为特例）来测量差分隐私时，非交互式差分隐私机制的所有组合定理都可以扩展到交互式差分隐私机制的并发组合。我们通过证明每个交互式 $f$-DP 机制都可以通过非交互式 $f$-DP 机制的交互式后处理来模拟，从而证明并发组合定理。在并行和独立的工作中，Lyu~\cite{lyu2022composition} 证明了与我们的 $(\eps,δ)$-DP 类似的结果，以及 Rényi DP 的并发组合定理。我们还提供了 Rényi DP 的 Lyu 并发合成定理的简单证明。 Lyu 将 $f$-DP 的一般情况作为一个开放问题，我们在本文中解决了这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究交互式差分隐私机制的并发组合性质，并证明非交互式机制的组合定理可扩展至交互式场景，同时解决f-DP框架下的开放性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私组合定理主要针对非交互式机制，而实际场景中交互式机制的并发查询会引入复杂性，需扩展理论边界以覆盖更广泛的应用。
AI.method: 通过证明交互式f-DP机制可被非交互式机制的交互后处理模拟，并利用假设检验框架下的f-DP理论进行数学推导。
AI.result: 确立了交互式机制的并发组合定理，证明了Lyu关于Rényi DP的定理，并解决了f-DP一般情况的开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 该工作统一了非交互式与交互式机制的组合理论，为差分隐私的实际应用提供了更坚实的数学基础。

ai_content.method: 通过证明交互式f-DP机制可被非交互式机制的交互后处理模拟，并利用假设检验框架下的f-DP理论进行数学推导。
ai_content.result: 确立了交互式机制的并发组合定理，证明了Lyu关于Rényi DP的定理，并解决了f-DP一般情况的开放性问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 该工作统一了非交互式与交互式机制的组合理论，为差分隐私的实际应用提供了更坚实的数学基础。

ai_content_json.result: 确立了交互式机制的并发组合定理，证明了Lyu关于Rényi DP的定理，并解决了f-DP一般情况的开放性问题。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该工作统一了非交互式与交互式机制的组合理论，为差分隐私的实际应用提供了更坚实的数学基础。

tldr: 本文研究交互式差分隐私机制的并发组合性质，并证明非交互式机制的组合定理可扩展至交互式场景，同时解决f-DP框架下的开放性问题。

search_text: Concurrent Composition Theorems for Differential Privacy 差分隐私的并发组合定理 We study the concurrent composition properties of interactive differentially private mechanisms, whereby an adversary can arbitrarily interleave its queries to the different mechanisms. We prove that all composition theorems for non-interactive differentially private mechanisms extend to the concurrent composition of interactive differentially private mechanisms, whenever differential privacy is measured using the hypothesis testing framework of $f$-DP, which captures standard $(\eps,δ)$-DP as a special case. We prove the concurrent composition theorem by showing that every interactive $f$-DP mechanism can be simulated by interactive post-processing of a non-interactive $f$-DP mechanism. In concurrent and independent work, Lyu~\cite{lyu2022composition} proves a similar result to ours for $(\eps,δ)$-DP, as well as a concurrent composition theorem for Rényi DP. We also provide a simple proof of Lyu's concurrent composition theorem for Rényi DP. Lyu leaves the general case of $f$-DP as an open problem, which we solve in this paper. 我们研究交互式差分隐私机制的并发组合属性，攻击者可以任意地将其查询交错到不同的机制。我们证明，每当使用 $f$-DP 的假设检验框架（捕获标准 $(\eps,δ)$-DP 作为特例）来测量差分隐私时，非交互式差分隐私机制的所有组合定理都可以扩展到交互式差分隐私机制的并发组合。我们通过证明每个交互式 $f$-DP 机制都可以通过非交互式 $f$-DP 机制的交互式后处理来模拟，从而证明并发组合定理。在并行和独立的工作中，Lyu~\cite{lyu2022composition} 证明了与我们的 $(\eps,δ)$-DP 类似的结果，以及 Rényi DP 的并发组合定理。我们还提供了 Rényi DP 的 Lyu 并发合成定理的简单证明。 Lyu 将 $f$-DP 的一般情况作为一个开放问题，我们在本文中解决了这个问题。 本文研究交互式差分隐私机制的并发组合性质，并证明非交互式机制的组合定理可扩展至交互式场景，同时解决f-DP框架下的开放性问题。 Salil Vadhan,Wanrong Zhang cs.DS,cs.CR,cs.IT

authors_text: Sangmyeong Woh,Jaemin Lee,Ho Joong Kim,Jinsuk Lee
title: Towards the Human Global Context: Does the Vision-Language Model Really Judge Like a Human Being?
title_zh: 走向人类全球背景：视觉语言模型真的像人类一样进行判断吗？
abstract: As computer vision and NLP make progress, Vision-Language(VL) is becoming an important area of research. Despite the importance, evaluation metrics of the research domain is still at a preliminary stage of development. In this paper, we propose a quantitative metric "Equivariance Score" and evaluation dataset "Human Puzzle" to assess whether a VL model is understanding an image like a human. We observed that the VL model does not interpret the overall context of an input image but instead shows biases toward a specific object or shape that forms the local context. We aim to quantitatively measure a model's performance in understanding context. To verify the current existing VL model's capability, we sliced the original input image into pieces and randomly placed them, distorting the global context of the image. Our paper discusses each VL model's level of interpretation on global context and addresses how the structural characteristics influenced the results.
summary: As computer vision and NLP make progress, Vision-Language(VL) is becoming an important area of research. Despite the importance, evaluation metrics of the research domain is still at a preliminary stage of development. In this paper, we propose a quantitative metric "Equivariance Score" and evaluation dataset "Human Puzzle" to assess whether a VL model is understanding an image like a human. We observed that the VL model does not interpret the overall context of an input image but instead shows biases toward a specific object or shape that forms the local context. We aim to quantitatively measure a model's performance in understanding context. To verify the current existing VL model's capability, we sliced the original input image into pieces and randomly placed them, distorting the global context of the image. Our paper discusses each VL model's level of interpretation on global context and addresses how the structural characteristics influenced the results.
abstract_zh: 随着计算机视觉和自然语言处理的进步，视觉语言（VL）正在成为一个重要的研究领域。尽管很重要，但该研究领域的评估指标仍处于初步发展阶段。在本文中，我们提出了定量指标“Equivariance Score”和评估数据集“Human Puzzle”来评估 VL 模型是否像人类一样理解图像。我们观察到，VL 模型不能解释输入图像的整体上下文，而是显示出对形成局部上下文的特定对象或形状的偏见。我们的目标是定量衡量模型在理解上下文方面的表现。为了验证当前现有的 VL 模型的能力，我们将原始输入图像切成碎片并随机放置它们，从而扭曲图像的全局上下文。我们的论文讨论了每个 VL 模型对全球背景的解释水平，并讨论了结构特征如何影响结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种定量指标'Equivariance Score'和数据集'Human Puzzle'，评估视觉语言模型是否能像人类一样理解图像的全局上下文。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型的评估指标尚不完善，无法有效衡量模型对图像整体语义的理解能力，而现有模型倾向于关注局部特征而非全局上下文。
AI.method: 通过将图像分割并随机重组以破坏全局上下文，构建'Human Puzzle'数据集，并设计'Equivariance Score'指标量化模型对全局语义的感知能力。
AI.result: 实验表明现有视觉语言模型在全局上下文理解任务中表现不佳，存在对局部对象或形状的偏倚，且结构特征显著影响模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型尚未具备人类水平的全局语义理解能力，需改进模型设计和评估体系以增强对整体图像语义的捕捉能力。

authors_text: Wenhua Li,Shengjun Huang,Tao Zhang,Rui Wang,Ling Wang
title: Large-scale matrix optimization based multi microgrid topology design with a constrained differential evolution algorithm
title_zh: 基于约束差分进化算法的基于大规模矩阵优化的多微电网拓扑设计
abstract: Binary matrix optimization commonly arise in the real world, e.g., multi-microgrid network structure design problem (MGNSDP), which is to minimize the total length of the power supply line under certain constraints. Finding the global optimal solution for these problems faces a great challenge since such problems could be large-scale, sparse and multimodal. Traditional linear programming is time-consuming and cannot solve nonlinear problems. To address this issue, a novel improved feasibility rule based differential evolution algorithm, termed LBMDE, is proposed. To be specific, a general heuristic solution initialization method is first proposed to generate high-quality solutions. Then, a binary-matrix-based DE operator is introduced to produce offspring. To deal with the constraints, we proposed an improved feasibility rule based environmental selection strategy. The performance and searching behaviors of LBMDE are examined by a set of benchmark problems.
summary: Binary matrix optimization commonly arise in the real world, e.g., multi-microgrid network structure design problem (MGNSDP), which is to minimize the total length of the power supply line under certain constraints. Finding the global optimal solution for these problems faces a great challenge since such problems could be large-scale, sparse and multimodal. Traditional linear programming is time-consuming and cannot solve nonlinear problems. To address this issue, a novel improved feasibility rule based differential evolution algorithm, termed LBMDE, is proposed. To be specific, a general heuristic solution initialization method is first proposed to generate high-quality solutions. Then, a binary-matrix-based DE operator is introduced to produce offspring. To deal with the constraints, we proposed an improved feasibility rule based environmental selection strategy. The performance and searching behaviors of LBMDE are examined by a set of benchmark problems.
abstract_zh: 二元矩阵优化在现实世界中经常出现，例如多微电网网络结构设计问题（MGNSDP），即在一定约束下最小化供电线路的总长度。寻找这些问题的全局最优解面临着巨大的挑战，因为这些问题可能是大规模的、稀疏的和多模态的。传统的线性规划非常耗时且无法解决非线性问题。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种基于改进的可行性规则的差分进化算法，称为LBMDE。具体来说，首先提出了一种通用的启发式解初始化方法来生成高质量的解。然后，引入基于二元矩阵的 DE 算子来产生后代。为了应对这些限制，我们提出了一种改进的基于可行性规则的环境选择策略。 LBMDE 的性能和搜索行为通过一组基准问题进行检查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进可行性规则的差分进化算法（LBMDE），用于解决大规模二进制矩阵优化问题，特别是在多微电网网络结构设计问题中。
AI.motivation: 传统的线性规划方法在处理大规模、稀疏和多峰的二进制矩阵优化问题时效率低下，且无法解决非线性问题，因此需要一种更高效的优化算法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种改进的可行性规则差分进化算法（LBMDE），包括启发式解初始化方法、基于二进制矩阵的差分进化算子以及改进的可行性规则环境选择策略。
AI.result: 通过一系列基准问题测试了LBMDE的性能和搜索行为，结果显示该算法在解决大规模二进制矩阵优化问题上具有良好的效果。
AI.conclusion: LBMDE算法能够有效解决多微电网网络结构设计中的大规模二进制矩阵优化问题，具有较高的实用价值和应用前景。

authors_text: Jiahui Fu,Chengyuan Lin,Yuichi Taguchi,Andrea Cohen,Yifu Zhang,Stephen Mylabathula,John J. Leonard
title: PlaneSDF-based Change Detection for Long-term Dense Mapping
title_zh: 基于 PlaneSDF 的长期密集测绘变化检测
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, and 1 table. To be published in Robotics and Automation Letters and IROS 2022. Link to supplementary video added in the abstract: https://youtu.be/oh-MQPWTwZI
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, and 1 table. To be published in Robotics and Automation Letters and IROS 2022. Link to supplementary video added in the abstract: https://youtu.be/oh-MQPWTwZI
abstract: The ability to process environment maps across multiple sessions is critical for robots operating over extended periods of time. Specifically, it is desirable for autonomous agents to detect changes amongst maps of different sessions so as to gain a conflict-free understanding of the current environment. In this paper, we look into the problem of change detection based on a novel map representation, dubbed Plane Signed Distance Fields (PlaneSDF), where dense maps are represented as a collection of planes and their associated geometric components in SDF volumes. Given point clouds of the source and target scenes, we propose a three-step PlaneSDF-based change detection approach: (1) PlaneSDF volumes are instantiated within each scene and registered across scenes using plane poses; 2D height maps and object maps are extracted per volume via height projection and connected component analysis. (2) Height maps are compared and intersected with the object map to produce a 2D change location mask for changed object candidates in the source scene. (3) 3D geometric validation is performed using SDF-derived features per object candidate for change mask refinement. We evaluate our approach on both synthetic and real-world datasets and demonstrate its effectiveness via the task of changed object detection. Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/oh-MQPWTwZI
summary: The ability to process environment maps across multiple sessions is critical for robots operating over extended periods of time. Specifically, it is desirable for autonomous agents to detect changes amongst maps of different sessions so as to gain a conflict-free understanding of the current environment. In this paper, we look into the problem of change detection based on a novel map representation, dubbed Plane Signed Distance Fields (PlaneSDF), where dense maps are represented as a collection of planes and their associated geometric components in SDF volumes. Given point clouds of the source and target scenes, we propose a three-step PlaneSDF-based change detection approach: (1) PlaneSDF volumes are instantiated within each scene and registered across scenes using plane poses; 2D height maps and object maps are extracted per volume via height projection and connected component analysis. (2) Height maps are compared and intersected with the object map to produce a 2D change location mask for changed object candidates in the source scene. (3) 3D geometric validation is performed using SDF-derived features per object candidate for change mask refinement. We evaluate our approach on both synthetic and real-world datasets and demonstrate its effectiveness via the task of changed object detection. Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/oh-MQPWTwZI
abstract_zh: 跨多个会话处理环境地图的能力对于长时间运行的机器人至关重要。具体来说，自治代理需要检测不同会话的地图之间的变化，以便获得对当前环境的无冲突理解。在本文中，我们研究了基于一种新颖的地图表示形式的变化检测问题，称为平面有符号距离场（PlaneSDF），其中密集地图表示为平面及其在 SDF 体积中相关几何组件的集合。给定源场景和目标场景的点云，我们提出了一种基于 PlaneSDF 的三步变化检测方法：（1）PlaneSDF 体积在每个场景内实例化，并使用平面姿态跨场景注册；通过高度投影和连通分量分析提取每个体积的 2D 高度图和对象图。 (2) 将高度图与对象图进行比较和相交，以生成源场景中已更改对象候选的 2D 更改位置掩模。 (3) 使用每个候选对象的 SDF 派生特征来执行 3D 几何验证，以进行更改掩模细化。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集上评估我们的方法，并通过变化的对象检测任务证明其有效性。补充视频：https://youtu.be/oh-MQPWTwZI

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于PlaneSDF的长期密集地图变化检测方法，用于识别不同时间段环境地图中的变化区域。
AI.motivation: 机器人在长期运行中需处理多时段环境地图，需检测地图差异以实现对当前环境无冲突的理解。
AI.method: 提出三步PlaneSDF变化检测方法：1）构建场景PlaneSDF体积并注册；2）通过高度图与物体图对比生成2D变化掩码；3）利用SDF特征进行3D几何验证优化变化掩码。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证了方法有效性，成功检测出变化物体。
AI.conclusion: PlaneSDF方法为长期密集地图变化检测提供了有效解决方案，可提升机器人环境理解能力。

authors_text: Noyan Evirgen,Xiang 'Anthony' Chen
title: GANzilla: User-Driven Direction Discovery in Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: GANzilla：生成对抗网络中用户驱动的方向发现
abstract: Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) is widely adopted in numerous application areas, such as data preprocessing, image editing, and creativity support. However, GAN's 'black box' nature prevents non-expert users from controlling what data a model generates, spawning a plethora of prior work that focused on algorithm-driven approaches to extract editing directions to control GAN. Complementarily, we propose a GANzilla: a user-driven tool that empowers a user with the classic scatter/gather technique to iteratively discover directions to meet their editing goals. In a study with 12 participants, GANzilla users were able to discover directions that (i) edited images to match provided examples (closed-ended tasks) and that (ii) met a high-level goal, e.g., making the face happier, while showing diversity across individuals (open-ended tasks).
summary: Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) is widely adopted in numerous application areas, such as data preprocessing, image editing, and creativity support. However, GAN's 'black box' nature prevents non-expert users from controlling what data a model generates, spawning a plethora of prior work that focused on algorithm-driven approaches to extract editing directions to control GAN. Complementarily, we propose a GANzilla: a user-driven tool that empowers a user with the classic scatter/gather technique to iteratively discover directions to meet their editing goals. In a study with 12 participants, GANzilla users were able to discover directions that (i) edited images to match provided examples (closed-ended tasks) and that (ii) met a high-level goal, e.g., making the face happier, while showing diversity across individuals (open-ended tasks).
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）广泛应用于数据预处理、图像编辑和创造力支​​持等众多应用领域。然而，GAN 的“黑匣子”性质阻止非专家用户控制模型生成的数据，从而催生了大量先前的工作，这些工作专注于算法驱动的方法来提取编辑方向来控制 GAN。作为补充，我们提出了 GANzilla：一种用户驱动的工具，使用户能够使用经典的分散/聚集技术迭代地发现方向来满足其编辑目标。在一项有 12 名参与者参与的研究中，GANzilla 用户能够发现以下方向：(i) 编辑图像以匹配提供的示例（封闭式任务），以及 (ii) 实现高级目标，例如，让面部更快乐，同时显示个体之间的多样性（开放式任务）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GANzilla的用户驱动工具，帮助非专家用户通过交互式方法发现生成对抗网络（GAN）的编辑方向。
AI.motivation: GAN的黑盒特性使得非专家用户难以控制生成的数据，因此需要一种用户驱动的方法来实现对GAN的编辑控制。
AI.method: 该工具采用经典的散集/聚集技术，让用户通过迭代交互发现满足编辑目标的方向。
AI.result: 在12名参与者的实验中，用户能够发现符合给定示例的编辑方向，并实现如让面部更快乐等高层目标，同时表现出个体多样性。
AI.conclusion: GANzilla为非专家用户提供了一种有效控制GAN生成数据的方法，展示了用户驱动方法在GAN编辑中的潜力。

authors_text: Junpu Wang,Guili Xu,Fuju Yan,Jinjin Wang,Zhengsheng Wang
title: Defect Transformer: An Efficient Hybrid Transformer Architecture for Surface Defect Detection
title_zh: Defect Transformer：用于表面缺陷检测的高效混合变压器架构
abstract: Surface defect detection is an extremely crucial step to ensure the quality of industrial products. Nowadays, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) based on encoder-decoder architecture have achieved tremendous success in various defect detection tasks. However, due to the intrinsic locality of convolution, they commonly exhibit a limitation in explicitly modeling long-range interactions, critical for pixel-wise defect detection in complex cases, e.g., cluttered background and illegible pseudo-defects. Recent transformers are especially skilled at learning global image dependencies but with limited local structural information necessary for detailed defect location. To overcome the above limitations, we propose an efficient hybrid transformer architecture, termed Defect Transformer (DefT), for surface defect detection, which incorporates CNN and transformer into a unified model to capture local and non-local relationships collaboratively. Specifically, in the encoder module, a convolutional stem block is firstly adopted to retain more detailed spatial information. Then, the patch aggregation blocks are used to generate multi-scale representation with four hierarchies, each of them is followed by a series of DefT blocks, which respectively include a locally position-aware block for local position encoding, a lightweight multi-pooling self-attention to model multi-scale global contextual relationships with good computational efficiency, and a convolutional feed-forward network for feature transformation and further location information learning. Finally, a simple but effective decoder module is proposed to gradually recover spatial details from the skip connections in the encoder. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the superiority and efficiency of our method compared with other CNN- and transformer-based networks.
summary: Surface defect detection is an extremely crucial step to ensure the quality of industrial products. Nowadays, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) based on encoder-decoder architecture have achieved tremendous success in various defect detection tasks. However, due to the intrinsic locality of convolution, they commonly exhibit a limitation in explicitly modeling long-range interactions, critical for pixel-wise defect detection in complex cases, e.g., cluttered background and illegible pseudo-defects. Recent transformers are especially skilled at learning global image dependencies but with limited local structural information necessary for detailed defect location. To overcome the above limitations, we propose an efficient hybrid transformer architecture, termed Defect Transformer (DefT), for surface defect detection, which incorporates CNN and transformer into a unified model to capture local and non-local relationships collaboratively. Specifically, in the encoder module, a convolutional stem block is firstly adopted to retain more detailed spatial information. Then, the patch aggregation blocks are used to generate multi-scale representation with four hierarchies, each of them is followed by a series of DefT blocks, which respectively include a locally position-aware block for local position encoding, a lightweight multi-pooling self-attention to model multi-scale global contextual relationships with good computational efficiency, and a convolutional feed-forward network for feature transformation and further location information learning. Finally, a simple but effective decoder module is proposed to gradually recover spatial details from the skip connections in the encoder. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the superiority and efficiency of our method compared with other CNN- and transformer-based networks.
abstract_zh: 表面缺陷检测是保证工业产品质量极其关键的一步。如今，基于编码器-解码器架构的卷积神经网络（CNN）在各种缺陷检测任务中取得了巨大的成功。然而，由于卷积的固有局部性，它们通常在显式建模远程交互方面表现出局限性，这对于复杂情况下的像素级缺陷检测至关重要，例如杂乱的背景和难以辨认的伪缺陷。最近的变压器特别擅长学习全局图像依赖性，但详细缺陷定位所需的局部结构信息有限。为了克服上述限制，我们提出了一种高效的混合 Transformer 架构，称为 Defect Transformer (DefT)，用于表面缺陷检测，它将 CNN 和 Transformer 合并到一个统一的模型中，以协作捕获局部和非局部关系。具体来说，在编码器模块中，首先采用卷积茎块来保留更详细的空间信息。然后，使用补丁聚合块生成具有四个层次结构的多尺度表示，每个层次结构后面跟着一系列 DefT 块，分别包括用于局部位置编码的本地位置感知块、用于以良好计算效率建模多尺度全局上下文关系的轻量级多池自注意力块、以及用于特征转换和进一步位置信息学习的卷积前馈网络。最后，提出了一种简单但有效的解码器模块，以从编码器中的跳跃连接中逐渐恢复空间细节。对三个数据集的大量实验证明了我们的方法与其他基于 CNN 和 Transformer 的网络相比的优越性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的混合Transformer架构Defect Transformer（DefT），用于表面缺陷检测，结合CNN与Transformer的优势以提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在建模长程交互时存在局限，而Transformer缺乏局部结构信息，难以应对复杂场景下的缺陷检测需求。
AI.method: 通过卷积茎块保留局部细节，采用多层级的Patch聚合块生成多尺度特征，结合局部位置感知模块、轻量多池化自注意力机制及卷积前馈网络，最终通过简单解码器恢复空间细节。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，DefT在检测精度和计算效率上均优于现有CNN与Transformer基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DefT通过融合CNN与Transformer的优势，为复杂场景下的表面缺陷检测提供了新的有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的混合Transformer架构Defect Transformer（DefT），用于表面缺陷检测，结合CNN与Transformer的优势以提升检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统CNN在建模长程交互时存在局限，而Transformer缺乏局部结构信息，难以应对复杂场景下的缺陷检测需求。

ai_content.conclusion: DefT通过融合CNN与Transformer的优势，为复杂场景下的表面缺陷检测提供了新的有效解决方案。

search_text: Defect Transformer: An Efficient Hybrid Transformer Architecture for Surface Defect Detection Defect Transformer：用于表面缺陷检测的高效混合变压器架构 Surface defect detection is an extremely crucial step to ensure the quality of industrial products. Nowadays, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) based on encoder-decoder architecture have achieved tremendous success in various defect detection tasks. However, due to the intrinsic locality of convolution, they commonly exhibit a limitation in explicitly modeling long-range interactions, critical for pixel-wise defect detection in complex cases, e.g., cluttered background and illegible pseudo-defects. Recent transformers are especially skilled at learning global image dependencies but with limited local structural information necessary for detailed defect location. To overcome the above limitations, we propose an efficient hybrid transformer architecture, termed Defect Transformer (DefT), for surface defect detection, which incorporates CNN and transformer into a unified model to capture local and non-local relationships collaboratively. Specifically, in the encoder module, a convolutional stem block is firstly adopted to retain more detailed spatial information. Then, the patch aggregation blocks are used to generate multi-scale representation with four hierarchies, each of them is followed by a series of DefT blocks, which respectively include a locally position-aware block for local position encoding, a lightweight multi-pooling self-attention to model multi-scale global contextual relationships with good computational efficiency, and a convolutional feed-forward network for feature transformation and further location information learning. Finally, a simple but effective decoder module is proposed to gradually recover spatial details from the skip connections in the encoder. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the superiority and efficiency of our method compared with other CNN- and transformer-based networks. 表面缺陷检测是保证工业产品质量极其关键的一步。如今，基于编码器-解码器架构的卷积神经网络（CNN）在各种缺陷检测任务中取得了巨大的成功。然而，由于卷积的固有局部性，它们通常在显式建模远程交互方面表现出局限性，这对于复杂情况下的像素级缺陷检测至关重要，例如杂乱的背景和难以辨认的伪缺陷。最近的变压器特别擅长学习全局图像依赖性，但详细缺陷定位所需的局部结构信息有限。为了克服上述限制，我们提出了一种高效的混合 Transformer 架构，称为 Defect Transformer (DefT)，用于表面缺陷检测，它将 CNN 和 Transformer 合并到一个统一的模型中，以协作捕获局部和非局部关系。具体来说，在编码器模块中，首先采用卷积茎块来保留更详细的空间信息。然后，使用补丁聚合块生成具有四个层次结构的多尺度表示，每个层次结构后面跟着一系列 DefT 块，分别包括用于局部位置编码的本地位置感知块、用于以良好计算效率建模多尺度全局上下文关系的轻量级多池自注意力块、以及用于特征转换和进一步位置信息学习的卷积前馈网络。最后，提出了一种简单但有效的解码器模块，以从编码器中的跳跃连接中逐渐恢复空间细节。对三个数据集的大量实验证明了我们的方法与其他基于 CNN 和 Transformer 的网络相比的优越性和效率。 本文提出一种高效的混合Transformer架构Defect Transformer（DefT），用于表面缺陷检测，结合CNN与Transformer的优势以提升检测性能。 Junpu Wang,Guili Xu,Fuju Yan,Jinjin Wang,Zhengsheng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Reza Ghanavi,Craig Jin
title: Improving spatial cues for hearables using a parameterized binaural CDR estimator
title_zh: 使用参数化双耳 CDR 估计器改善耳穿戴设备的空间线索
comment: Accepted by ICA2022. An Australian provisional patent application based on this manuscript has been filed by the University of Sydney
comments: Accepted by ICA2022. An Australian provisional patent application based on this manuscript has been filed by the University of Sydney
abstract: We investigate a speech enhancement method based on the binaural coherence-to-diffuse power ratio (CDR), which preserves auditory spatial cues for maskers and a broadside target. Conventional CDR estimators typically rely on a mathematical coherence model of the desired signal and/or diffuse noise field in their formulation, which may influence their accuracy in natural environments. This work proposes a new robust and parameterized directional binaural CDR estimator. The estimator is calculated in the time-frequency domain and is based on a geometrical interpretation of the spatial coherence function between the binaural microphone signals. The binaural performance of the new CDR estimator is compared with three state-of-the-art CDR estimators in cocktail-party-like environments and has shown improvements in terms of several objective speech quality metrics such as PESQ and SRMR. We also discuss the benefits of the parameterizable CDR estimator for varying sound environments and briefly reflect on several informal subjective evaluations using a low-latency real-time framework.
summary: We investigate a speech enhancement method based on the binaural coherence-to-diffuse power ratio (CDR), which preserves auditory spatial cues for maskers and a broadside target. Conventional CDR estimators typically rely on a mathematical coherence model of the desired signal and/or diffuse noise field in their formulation, which may influence their accuracy in natural environments. This work proposes a new robust and parameterized directional binaural CDR estimator. The estimator is calculated in the time-frequency domain and is based on a geometrical interpretation of the spatial coherence function between the binaural microphone signals. The binaural performance of the new CDR estimator is compared with three state-of-the-art CDR estimators in cocktail-party-like environments and has shown improvements in terms of several objective speech quality metrics such as PESQ and SRMR. We also discuss the benefits of the parameterizable CDR estimator for varying sound environments and briefly reflect on several informal subjective evaluations using a low-latency real-time framework.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种基于双耳相干性与扩散功率比（CDR）的语音增强方法，该方法保留了掩蔽器和侧面目标的听觉空间线索。传统的 CDR 估计器在其公式中通常依赖于所需信号和/或扩散噪声场的数学相干模型，这可能会影响它们在自然环境中的准确性。这项工作提出了一种新的稳健且参数化的定向双耳 CDR 估计器。该估计器在时频域中计算，并且基于双耳麦克风信号之间的空间相干函数的几何解释。在类似鸡尾酒会的环境中，将新型 CDR 估计器的双耳性能与三种最先进的 CDR 估计器进行比较，并在 PESQ 和 SRMR 等多个客观语音质量指标方面显示出改进。我们还讨论了可参数化的 CDR 估计器对于不同声音环境的好处，并简要反思了使用低延迟实时框架的一些非正式主观评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数化双耳CDR估计器，以改进助听设备中的空间线索保留。
AI.motivation: 传统CDR估计器依赖数学模型，在自然环境中准确性不足，需更稳健的解决方案以适应复杂声学场景。
AI.method: 基于双耳麦克风信号的空间相干函数几何解释，提出时频域参数化方向性CDR估计方法，并与现有算法对比验证。
AI.result: 在类似鸡尾酒会的环境中，新方法在PESQ和SRMR等客观指标上优于现有方法，且支持动态环境适应性调整。
AI.conclusion: 参数化CDR估计器有效提升了空间线索保留能力，为低延迟实时助听应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Duncan Calvert,Bhavyansh Mishra,Stephen McCrory,Sylvain Bertrand,Robert Griffin,Jerry Pratt
title: A Fast, Autonomous, Bipedal Walking Behavior over Rapid Regions
title_zh: 在快速区域内的快速、自主、双足行走行为
abstract: In trying to build humanoid robots that perform useful tasks in a world built for humans, we address the problem of autonomous locomotion. Humanoid robot planning and control algorithms for walking over rough terrain are becoming increasingly capable. At the same time, commercially available depth cameras have been getting more accurate and GPU computing has become a primary tool in AI research. In this paper, we present a newly constructed behavior control system for achieving fast, autonomous, bipedal walking, without pauses or deliberation. We achieve this using a recently published rapid planar regions perception algorithm, a height map based body path planner, an A* footstep planner, and a momentum-based walking controller. We put these elements together to form a behavior control system supported by modern software development practices and simulation tools.
summary: In trying to build humanoid robots that perform useful tasks in a world built for humans, we address the problem of autonomous locomotion. Humanoid robot planning and control algorithms for walking over rough terrain are becoming increasingly capable. At the same time, commercially available depth cameras have been getting more accurate and GPU computing has become a primary tool in AI research. In this paper, we present a newly constructed behavior control system for achieving fast, autonomous, bipedal walking, without pauses or deliberation. We achieve this using a recently published rapid planar regions perception algorithm, a height map based body path planner, an A* footstep planner, and a momentum-based walking controller. We put these elements together to form a behavior control system supported by modern software development practices and simulation tools.
abstract_zh: 在尝试构建能够在人类构建的世界中执行有用任务的人形机器人时，我们解决了自主运动的问题。人形机器人在崎岖地形上行走的规划和控制算法的能力越来越强。与此同时，商用深度相机变得越来越精确，GPU 计算已成为人工智能研究的主要工具。在本文中，我们提出了一种新构建的行为控制系统，用于实现快速、自主、双足行走，无需暂停或深思熟虑。我们使用最近发布的快速平面区域感知算法、基于高度图的身体路径规划器、A* 脚步规划器和基于动量的行走控制器来实现这一目标。我们将这些元素组合在一起，形成一个由现代软件开发实践和模拟工具支持的行为控制系统。

AI.tldr: 开发一种快速自主的双足行走控制系统，使机器人能在复杂地形中连续行走。
AI.motivation: 为解决人形机器人在人类环境中执行任务的自主移动问题，结合深度相机与GPU计算的进步，需更高效的行走控制方案。
AI.method: 整合快速平面区域感知算法、基于高度图的路径规划器、A*步态规划器及动量控制器，结合现代软件开发工具。
AI.result: 实现无停顿的快速自主双足行走，系统在复杂地形中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过融合前沿算法与工具，为复杂地形自主移动提供可行方案，未来可进一步优化性能。
