authors_text: Cole Franks,Tasuku Soma,Michel X. Goemans
title: Shrunk subspaces via operator Sinkhorn iteration
title_zh: 通过算子 Sinkhorn 迭代缩小子空间
abstract: A recent breakthrough in Edmonds' problem showed that the noncommutative rank can be computed in deterministic polynomial time, and various algorithms for it were devised. However, only quite complicated algorithms are known for finding a so-called shrunk subspace, which acts as a dual certificate for the value of the noncommutative rank. In particular, the operator Sinkhorn algorithm, perhaps the simplest algorithm to compute the noncommutative rank with operator scaling, does not find a shrunk subspace. Finding a shrunk subspace plays a key role in applications, such as separation in the Brascamp-Lieb polytope, one-parameter subgroups in the null-cone membership problem, and primal-dual algorithms for matroid intersection and fractional matroid matching. In this paper, we provide a simple Sinkhorn-style algorithm to find the smallest shrunk subspace over the complex field in deterministic polynomial time. To this end, we introduce a generalization of the operator scaling problem, where the spectra of the marginals must be majorized by specified vectors. Then we design an efficient Sinkhorn-style algorithm for the generalized operator scaling problem. Applying this to the shrunk subspace problem, we show that a sufficiently long run of the algorithm also finds an approximate shrunk subspace close to the minimum exact shrunk subspace. Finally, we show that the approximate shrunk subspace can be rounded if it is sufficiently close. Along the way, we also provide a simple randomized algorithm to find the smallest shrunk subspace. As applications, we design a faster algorithm for fractional linear matroid matching and efficient weak membership and optimization algorithms for the rank-2 Brascamp-Lieb polytope.
summary: A recent breakthrough in Edmonds' problem showed that the noncommutative rank can be computed in deterministic polynomial time, and various algorithms for it were devised. However, only quite complicated algorithms are known for finding a so-called shrunk subspace, which acts as a dual certificate for the value of the noncommutative rank. In particular, the operator Sinkhorn algorithm, perhaps the simplest algorithm to compute the noncommutative rank with operator scaling, does not find a shrunk subspace. Finding a shrunk subspace plays a key role in applications, such as separation in the Brascamp-Lieb polytope, one-parameter subgroups in the null-cone membership problem, and primal-dual algorithms for matroid intersection and fractional matroid matching. In this paper, we provide a simple Sinkhorn-style algorithm to find the smallest shrunk subspace over the complex field in deterministic polynomial time. To this end, we introduce a generalization of the operator scaling problem, where the spectra of the marginals must be majorized by specified vectors. Then we design an efficient Sinkhorn-style algorithm for the generalized operator scaling problem. Applying this to the shrunk subspace problem, we show that a sufficiently long run of the algorithm also finds an approximate shrunk subspace close to the minimum exact shrunk subspace. Finally, we show that the approximate shrunk subspace can be rounded if it is sufficiently close. Along the way, we also provide a simple randomized algorithm to find the smallest shrunk subspace. As applications, we design a faster algorithm for fractional linear matroid matching and efficient weak membership and optimization algorithms for the rank-2 Brascamp-Lieb polytope.
abstract_zh: 埃德蒙兹问题的最新突破表明，非交换秩可以在确定性多项式时间内计算，并且为此设计了各种算法。然而，只有相当复杂的算法才能找到所谓的收缩子空间，该子空间充当非交换秩值的双重证书。特别是，算子 Sinkhorn 算法（可能是使用算子缩放来计算非交换秩的最简单算法）没有找到缩小的子空间。寻找收缩子空间在应用中起着关键作用，例如 Brascamp-Lieb 多胞体中的分离、空锥隶属问题中的单参数子群以及拟阵交集和分数拟阵匹配的原对偶算法。在本文中，我们提供了一种简单的 Sinkhorn 式算法，用于在确定性多项式时间内找到复杂域上的最小收缩子空间。为此，我们引入了算子缩放问题的推广，其中边缘的谱必须由指定的向量来放大。然后我们针对广义算子缩放问题设计了一种高效的 Sinkhorn 式算法。将其应用于收缩子空间问题，我们表明，足够长的算法运行也可以找到接近最小精确收缩子空间的近似收缩子空间。最后，我们证明，如果近似收缩子空间足够接近，则可以对其进行舍入。在此过程中，我们还提供了一个简单的随机算法来找到最小的收缩子空间。作为应用，我们设计了一种更快的分数线性拟阵匹配算法和针对 2 阶 Brascamp-Lieb 多胞体的高效弱隶属度和优化算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于算子Sinkhorn迭代的算法，用于在复数域上以确定性多项式时间找到最小的shrunk子空间。
AI.motivation: 尽管非交换秩的计算已取得突破，但寻找作为其对偶证书的shrunk子空间的算法仍较为复杂，而现有算子Sinkhorn算法无法直接实现该目标。shrunk子空间在Brascamp-Lieb多面体分离、null锥成员问题等应用中具有关键作用。
AI.method: 通过推广算子缩放问题（要求边缘谱被指定向量支配），设计了一种高效的Sinkhorn风格算法，并证明其能逼近最小精确shrunk子空间。同时提供了一种随机化算法以进一步优化结果。
AI.result: 实现了确定性多项式时间内寻找最小shrunk子空间的算法，并将其应用于加速分数线性_matroid匹配及rank-2 Brascamp-Lieb多面体的弱成员判定与优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为shrunk子空间的计算提供了简洁高效的解决方案，推动了相关应用领域的算法优化。

authors_text: Yongxin Zhou,François Portet,Fabien Ringeval
title: Effectiveness of French Language Models on Abstractive Dialogue Summarization Task
title_zh: 法语语言模型在抽象对话总结任务中的有效性
comment: Yongxin Zhou, François Portet, Fabien Ringeval. Effectiveness of French Language Models on Abstractive Dialogue Summarization Task. LREC 2022, Marseille, France, 21-23 June 2022
comments: Yongxin Zhou, François Portet, Fabien Ringeval. Effectiveness of French Language Models on Abstractive Dialogue Summarization Task. LREC 2022, Marseille, France, 21-23 June 2022
abstract: Pre-trained language models have established the state-of-the-art on various natural language processing tasks, including dialogue summarization, which allows the reader to quickly access key information from long conversations in meetings, interviews or phone calls. However, such dialogues are still difficult to handle with current models because the spontaneity of the language involves expressions that are rarely present in the corpora used for pre-training the language models. Moreover, the vast majority of the work accomplished in this field has been focused on English. In this work, we present a study on the summarization of spontaneous oral dialogues in French using several language specific pre-trained models: BARThez, and BelGPT-2, as well as multilingual pre-trained models: mBART, mBARThez, and mT5. Experiments were performed on the DECODA (Call Center) dialogue corpus whose task is to generate abstractive synopses from call center conversations between a caller and one or several agents depending on the situation. Results show that the BARThez models offer the best performance far above the previous state-of-the-art on DECODA. We further discuss the limits of such pre-trained models and the challenges that must be addressed for summarizing spontaneous dialogues.
summary: Pre-trained language models have established the state-of-the-art on various natural language processing tasks, including dialogue summarization, which allows the reader to quickly access key information from long conversations in meetings, interviews or phone calls. However, such dialogues are still difficult to handle with current models because the spontaneity of the language involves expressions that are rarely present in the corpora used for pre-training the language models. Moreover, the vast majority of the work accomplished in this field has been focused on English. In this work, we present a study on the summarization of spontaneous oral dialogues in French using several language specific pre-trained models: BARThez, and BelGPT-2, as well as multilingual pre-trained models: mBART, mBARThez, and mT5. Experiments were performed on the DECODA (Call Center) dialogue corpus whose task is to generate abstractive synopses from call center conversations between a caller and one or several agents depending on the situation. Results show that the BARThez models offer the best performance far above the previous state-of-the-art on DECODA. We further discuss the limits of such pre-trained models and the challenges that must be addressed for summarizing spontaneous dialogues.
abstract_zh: 预训练的语言模型已经在各种自然语言处理任务上建立了最先进的技术，包括对话摘要，它允许读者从会议、采访或电话中的长时间对话中快速获取关键信息。然而，这样的对话仍然很难用当前的模型来处理，因为语言的自发性涉及到用于预训练语言模型的语料库中很少出现的表达。此外，该领域完成的绝大多数工作都集中在英语上。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项关于法语自发口头对话总结的研究，使用几种特定于语言的预训练模型：BARThez 和 BelGPT-2，以及多语言预训练模型：mBART、mBARThez 和 mT5。在 DECODA（呼叫中心）对话语料库上进行了实验，其任务是根据情况从呼叫者与一个或多个座席之间的呼叫中心对话中生成抽象概要。结果表明，BARThez 模型提供的最佳性能远远高于 DECODA 上之前的最先进水平。我们进一步讨论了这种预训练模型的局限性以及总结自发对话必须解决的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了法语预训练语言模型在生成式对话摘要任务中的效果，使用DECODA数据集评估了多个模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理自发性对话中的语言表达，且相关研究多集中于英语，缺乏针对法语自发对话的系统性研究。
AI.method: 采用法语专用模型（BARThez、BelGPT-2）和多语言模型（mBART、mBARThez、mT5），在DECODA电话客服对话数据集上进行生成式摘要实验。
AI.result: BARThez模型在DECODA数据集上的表现显著优于现有最佳模型，但预训练模型在处理自发对话时仍存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 法语专用模型在生成式对话摘要任务中表现更优，但需进一步解决自发对话的语言特性和数据稀缺性挑战。

authors_text: Ruchika Chavhan,Henry Gouk,Jan Stühmer,Timothy Hospedales
title: HyperInvariances: Amortizing Invariance Learning
title_zh: HyperInvariances：摊销不变性学习
comment: ICML 2022, Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability
comments: ICML 2022, Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability
abstract: Providing invariances in a given learning task conveys a key inductive bias that can lead to sample-efficient learning and good generalisation, if correctly specified. However, the ideal invariances for many problems of interest are often not known, which has led both to a body of engineering lore as well as attempts to provide frameworks for invariance learning. However, invariance learning is expensive and data intensive for popular neural architectures. We introduce the notion of amortizing invariance learning. In an up-front learning phase, we learn a low-dimensional manifold of feature extractors spanning invariance to different transformations using a hyper-network. Then, for any problem of interest, both model and invariance learning are rapid and efficient by fitting a low-dimensional invariance descriptor an output head. Empirically, this framework can identify appropriate invariances in different downstream tasks and lead to comparable or better test performance than conventional approaches. Our HyperInvariance framework is also theoretically appealing as it enables generalisation-bounds that provide an interesting new operating point in the trade-off between model fit and complexity.
summary: Providing invariances in a given learning task conveys a key inductive bias that can lead to sample-efficient learning and good generalisation, if correctly specified. However, the ideal invariances for many problems of interest are often not known, which has led both to a body of engineering lore as well as attempts to provide frameworks for invariance learning. However, invariance learning is expensive and data intensive for popular neural architectures. We introduce the notion of amortizing invariance learning. In an up-front learning phase, we learn a low-dimensional manifold of feature extractors spanning invariance to different transformations using a hyper-network. Then, for any problem of interest, both model and invariance learning are rapid and efficient by fitting a low-dimensional invariance descriptor an output head. Empirically, this framework can identify appropriate invariances in different downstream tasks and lead to comparable or better test performance than conventional approaches. Our HyperInvariance framework is also theoretically appealing as it enables generalisation-bounds that provide an interesting new operating point in the trade-off between model fit and complexity.
abstract_zh: 在给定的学习任务中提供不变性传达了一个关键的归纳偏差，如果正确指定，可以导致样本有效的学习和良好的泛化。然而，许多感兴趣的问题的理想不变性通常是未知的，这导致了一系列工程知识的产生以及为不变性学习提供框架的尝试。然而，对于流行的神经架构来说，不变性学习成本高昂且数据密集。我们引入摊销不变性学习的概念。在前期学习阶段，我们使用超网络学习低维特征提取器流形，涵盖不同变换的不变性。然后，对于任何感兴趣的问题，通过将低维不变性描述符拟合到输出头，模型和不变性学习都可以快速有效。根据经验，该框架可以识别不同下游任务中适当的不变性，并产生与传统方法相当或更好的测试性能。我们的 HyperInvariance 框架在理论上也很有吸引力，因为它支持泛化边界，在模型拟合和复杂性之间的权衡中提供了一个有趣的新操作点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HyperInvariances的框架，通过预训练低维特征提取器的流形来实现不变性学习的摊销化，从而在不同任务中快速高效地学习不变性。
AI.motivation: 传统不变性学习方法计算成本高且数据需求大，而许多实际问题的最优不变性未知，亟需一种高效且通用的不变性学习框架。
AI.method: 使用超网络预训练一个低维特征提取器流形，覆盖多种变换的不变性。针对具体任务时，通过拟合低维不变性描述符的输出头，快速实现模型与不变性学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能在不同下游任务中有效识别合适不变性，测试性能与传统方法相当或更优，并提供了新的泛化界理论支持。
AI.conclusion: HyperInvariances框架在实践与理论层面均具优势，为模型拟合与复杂度之间的权衡提供了新视角，有望推动不变性学习的广泛应用。

search_text: HyperInvariances: Amortizing Invariance Learning HyperInvariances：摊销不变性学习 Providing invariances in a given learning task conveys a key inductive bias that can lead to sample-efficient learning and good generalisation, if correctly specified. However, the ideal invariances for many problems of interest are often not known, which has led both to a body of engineering lore as well as attempts to provide frameworks for invariance learning. However, invariance learning is expensive and data intensive for popular neural architectures. We introduce the notion of amortizing invariance learning. In an up-front learning phase, we learn a low-dimensional manifold of feature extractors spanning invariance to different transformations using a hyper-network. Then, for any problem of interest, both model and invariance learning are rapid and efficient by fitting a low-dimensional invariance descriptor an output head. Empirically, this framework can identify appropriate invariances in different downstream tasks and lead to comparable or better test performance than conventional approaches. Our HyperInvariance framework is also theoretically appealing as it enables generalisation-bounds that provide an interesting new operating point in the trade-off between model fit and complexity. 在给定的学习任务中提供不变性传达了一个关键的归纳偏差，如果正确指定，可以导致样本有效的学习和良好的泛化。然而，许多感兴趣的问题的理想不变性通常是未知的，这导致了一系列工程知识的产生以及为不变性学习提供框架的尝试。然而，对于流行的神经架构来说，不变性学习成本高昂且数据密集。我们引入摊销不变性学习的概念。在前期学习阶段，我们使用超网络学习低维特征提取器流形，涵盖不同变换的不变性。然后，对于任何感兴趣的问题，通过将低维不变性描述符拟合到输出头，模型和不变性学习都可以快速有效。根据经验，该框架可以识别不同下游任务中适当的不变性，并产生与传统方法相当或更好的测试性能。我们的 HyperInvariance 框架在理论上也很有吸引力，因为它支持泛化边界，在模型拟合和复杂性之间的权衡中提供了一个有趣的新操作点。 本文提出了一种名为HyperInvariances的框架，通过预训练低维特征提取器的流形来实现不变性学习的摊销化，从而在不同任务中快速高效地学习不变性。 Ruchika Chavhan,Henry Gouk,Jan Stühmer,Timothy Hospedales cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Rundong Ge,Moonyoung Lee,Vivek Radhakrishnan,Yang Zhou,Guanrui Li,Giuseppe Loianno
title: Vision-based Relative Detection and Tracking for Teams of Micro Aerial Vehicles
title_zh: 基于视觉的微型飞行器编队相对检测与跟踪
abstract: In this paper, we address the vision-based detection and tracking problems of multiple aerial vehicles using a single camera and Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) as well as the corresponding perception consensus problem (i.e., uniqueness and identical IDs across all observing agents). We design several vision-based decentralized Bayesian multi-tracking filtering strategies to resolve the association between the incoming unsorted measurements obtained by a visual detector algorithm and the tracked agents. We compare their accuracy in different operating conditions as well as their scalability according to the number of agents in the team. This analysis provides useful insights about the most appropriate design choice for the given task. We further show that the proposed perception and inference pipeline which includes a Deep Neural Network (DNN) as visual target detector is lightweight and capable of concurrently running control and planning with Size, Weight, and Power (SWaP) constrained robots on-board. Experimental results show the effective tracking of multiple drones in various challenging scenarios such as heavy occlusions.
summary: In this paper, we address the vision-based detection and tracking problems of multiple aerial vehicles using a single camera and Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) as well as the corresponding perception consensus problem (i.e., uniqueness and identical IDs across all observing agents). We design several vision-based decentralized Bayesian multi-tracking filtering strategies to resolve the association between the incoming unsorted measurements obtained by a visual detector algorithm and the tracked agents. We compare their accuracy in different operating conditions as well as their scalability according to the number of agents in the team. This analysis provides useful insights about the most appropriate design choice for the given task. We further show that the proposed perception and inference pipeline which includes a Deep Neural Network (DNN) as visual target detector is lightweight and capable of concurrently running control and planning with Size, Weight, and Power (SWaP) constrained robots on-board. Experimental results show the effective tracking of multiple drones in various challenging scenarios such as heavy occlusions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了使用单个摄像机和惯性测量单元（IMU）的多个飞行器的基于视觉的检测和跟踪问题，以及相应的感知一致性问题（即所有观察代理的唯一性和相同的ID）。我们设计了几种基于视觉的分散贝叶斯多跟踪过滤策略，以解决视觉检测器算法获得的传入未排序测量值与跟踪代理之间的关联。我们根据团队中代理的数量来比较它们在不同操作条件下的准确性以及可扩展性。此分析提供了有关给定任务的最合适设计选择的有用见解。我们进一步表明，所提出的感知和推理管道（包括深度神经网络（DNN）作为视觉目标检测器）是轻量级的，并且能够与机载尺寸、重量和功率（SWaP）受限的机器人同时运行控制和规划。实验结果表明，在各种具有挑战性的场景（例如严重遮挡）下，可以有效跟踪多架无人机。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究基于视觉的多无人机相对检测与跟踪方法，解决单相机与惯性测量单元（IMU）下的多目标关联及感知一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂环境下多无人机目标关联和感知一致性难以保证，需提升跟踪准确性和系统可扩展性。
AI.method: 设计基于视觉的去中心化贝叶斯多跟踪滤波策略，结合深度神经网络实现轻量级感知与推理，支持资源受限无人机的实时控制与规划。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在复杂场景（如严重遮挡）下的多无人机跟踪有效性，且系统具备良好的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的轻量级感知框架能够在资源受限的无人机上实现高精度多目标跟踪，为团队无人机系统提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Chenxi Feng,Haochen Wu
title: Accelerated RRT* By Local Directional Visibility
title_zh: 通过本地定向可见性加速 RRT*
abstract: RRT* is an efficient sampling-based motion planning algorithm. However, without taking advantages of accessible environment information, sampling-based algorithms usually result in sampling failures, generate useless nodes, and/or fail in exploring narrow passages. For this paper, in order to better utilize environment information and further improve searching efficiency, we proposed a novel approach to improve RRT* by 1) quantifying local knowledge of the obstacle configurations during neighbour rewiring in terms of directional visibility, 2) collecting environment information during searching, and 3) changing the sampling strategy biasing toward near-obstacle nodes after the first solution found. The proposed algorithm RRT* by Local Directional Visibility (RRT*-LDV) better utilizes local known information and innovates a weighted sampling strategy. The accelerated RRT*-LDV outperforms RRT* in convergence rate and success rate of finding narrow passages. A high Degree-Of-Freedom scenario is also experimented.
summary: RRT* is an efficient sampling-based motion planning algorithm. However, without taking advantages of accessible environment information, sampling-based algorithms usually result in sampling failures, generate useless nodes, and/or fail in exploring narrow passages. For this paper, in order to better utilize environment information and further improve searching efficiency, we proposed a novel approach to improve RRT* by 1) quantifying local knowledge of the obstacle configurations during neighbour rewiring in terms of directional visibility, 2) collecting environment information during searching, and 3) changing the sampling strategy biasing toward near-obstacle nodes after the first solution found. The proposed algorithm RRT* by Local Directional Visibility (RRT*-LDV) better utilizes local known information and innovates a weighted sampling strategy. The accelerated RRT*-LDV outperforms RRT* in convergence rate and success rate of finding narrow passages. A high Degree-Of-Freedom scenario is also experimented.
abstract_zh: RRT* 是一种高效的基于采样的运动规划算法。然而，如果不利用可访问的环境信息，基于采样的算法通常会导致采样失败、生成无用的节点和/或无法探索狭窄的通道。在本文中，为了更好地利用环境信息并进一步提高搜索效率，我们提出了一种改进 RRT* 的新方法，方法是：1）在方向可见性方面量化邻居重新布线期间障碍物配置的局部知识，2）在搜索过程中收集环境信息，3）在找到第一个解决方案后改变偏向近障碍物节点的采样策略。局部方向可见性（RRT*-LDV）提出的算法RRT*更好地利用了局部已知信息，创新了加权采样策略。加速RRT*-LDV在收敛速度和寻找狭窄通道的成功率方面优于RRT*。还尝试了高自由度场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部方向可见性的RRT*改进算法（RRT*-LDV），通过优化采样策略和利用环境信息提升运动规划效率。
AI.motivation: 传统RRT*算法因未充分利用环境信息，易导致采样失败、生成冗余节点及难以探索狭窄通道，需改进以提高搜索效率和成功率。
AI.method: 1) 通过方向可见性量化局部障碍物信息；2) 搜索过程中动态收集环境信息；3) 首次找到路径后调整采样策略，优先采样近障碍物区域。
AI.result: RRT*-LDV在收敛速度和狭窄通道成功率上优于传统RRT*，并在高自由度场景中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过局部信息利用和加权采样策略创新，显著提升了RRT*在复杂环境中的运动规划性能。

search_text: Accelerated RRT* By Local Directional Visibility 通过本地定向可见性加速 RRT* RRT* is an efficient sampling-based motion planning algorithm. However, without taking advantages of accessible environment information, sampling-based algorithms usually result in sampling failures, generate useless nodes, and/or fail in exploring narrow passages. For this paper, in order to better utilize environment information and further improve searching efficiency, we proposed a novel approach to improve RRT* by 1) quantifying local knowledge of the obstacle configurations during neighbour rewiring in terms of directional visibility, 2) collecting environment information during searching, and 3) changing the sampling strategy biasing toward near-obstacle nodes after the first solution found. The proposed algorithm RRT* by Local Directional Visibility (RRT*-LDV) better utilizes local known information and innovates a weighted sampling strategy. The accelerated RRT*-LDV outperforms RRT* in convergence rate and success rate of finding narrow passages. A high Degree-Of-Freedom scenario is also experimented. RRT* 是一种高效的基于采样的运动规划算法。然而，如果不利用可访问的环境信息，基于采样的算法通常会导致采样失败、生成无用的节点和/或无法探索狭窄的通道。在本文中，为了更好地利用环境信息并进一步提高搜索效率，我们提出了一种改进 RRT* 的新方法，方法是：1）在方向可见性方面量化邻居重新布线期间障碍物配置的局部知识，2）在搜索过程中收集环境信息，3）在找到第一个解决方案后改变偏向近障碍物节点的采样策略。局部方向可见性（RRT*-LDV）提出的算法RRT*更好地利用了局部已知信息，创新了加权采样策略。加速RRT*-LDV在收敛速度和寻找狭窄通道的成功率方面优于RRT*。还尝试了高自由度场景。 本文提出一种基于局部方向可见性的RRT*改进算法（RRT*-LDV），通过优化采样策略和利用环境信息提升运动规划效率。 Chenxi Feng,Haochen Wu cs.RO

authors_text: Haochen Wu,Amin Ghadami,Alparslan Emrah Bayrak,Jonathon M. Smereka,Bogdan I. Epureanu
title: Task Allocation with Load Management in Multi-Agent Teams
title_zh: 多代理团队中的负载管理任务分配
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
abstract: In operations of multi-agent teams ranging from homogeneous robot swarms to heterogeneous human-autonomy teams, unexpected events might occur. While efficiency of operation for multi-agent task allocation problems is the primary objective, it is essential that the decision-making framework is intelligent enough to manage unexpected task load with limited resources. Otherwise, operation effectiveness would drastically plummet with overloaded agents facing unforeseen risks. In this work, we present a decision-making framework for multi-agent teams to learn task allocation with the consideration of load management through decentralized reinforcement learning, where idling is encouraged and unnecessary resource usage is avoided. We illustrate the effect of load management on team performance and explore agent behaviors in example scenarios. Furthermore, a measure of agent importance in collaboration is developed to infer team resilience when facing handling potential overload situations.
summary: In operations of multi-agent teams ranging from homogeneous robot swarms to heterogeneous human-autonomy teams, unexpected events might occur. While efficiency of operation for multi-agent task allocation problems is the primary objective, it is essential that the decision-making framework is intelligent enough to manage unexpected task load with limited resources. Otherwise, operation effectiveness would drastically plummet with overloaded agents facing unforeseen risks. In this work, we present a decision-making framework for multi-agent teams to learn task allocation with the consideration of load management through decentralized reinforcement learning, where idling is encouraged and unnecessary resource usage is avoided. We illustrate the effect of load management on team performance and explore agent behaviors in example scenarios. Furthermore, a measure of agent importance in collaboration is developed to infer team resilience when facing handling potential overload situations.
abstract_zh: 在从同质机器人群到异构人类自治团队的多智能体团队的操作中，可能会发生意外事件。虽然多智能体任务分配问题的运行效率是主要目标，但决策框架必须足够智能，能够用有限的资源管理意外的任务负载。否则，运营效率将急剧下降，超负荷的工作人员将面临不可预见的风险。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个决策框架，供多智能体团队学习任务分配，并通过去中心化强化学习考虑负载管理，鼓励闲置并避免不必要的资源使用。我们说明了负载管理对团队绩效的影响，并探讨了示例场景中的代理行为。此外，还开发了一种衡量代理在协作中的重要性的方法，以推断团队在面临处理潜在超载情况时的弹性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分散强化学习的决策框架，用于多智能体团队的任务分配与负载管理，通过鼓励空闲和减少资源浪费提升团队在意外事件中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有任务分配方法在面对突发负载时可能导致团队效率骤降，需设计智能框架以应对资源受限下的负载波动风险。
AI.method: 采用分散强化学习方法，结合负载管理机制，通过激励空闲状态和避免冗余资源消耗，并开发智能体协作重要性指标评估团队弹性。
AI.result: 实验验证了负载管理对团队性能的积极影响，分析了智能体在过载场景下的行为模式，并通过重要性指标量化了团队抗风险能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了任务分配效率与负载风险，为多智能体团队在动态环境中的鲁棒协作提供了理论支持与实践方案。

authors_text: Paul Égré,Lorenzo Rossi,Jan Sprenger
title: Certain and Uncertain Inference with Indicative Conditionals
title_zh: 指示性条件的确定和不确定推理
abstract: This paper develops a trivalent semantics for the truth conditions and the probability of the natural language indicative conditional. Our framework rests on trivalent truth conditions first proposed by W. Cooper and yields two logics of conditional reasoning: (i) a logic C of inference from certain premises; and (ii) a logic U of inference from uncertain premises. But whereas C is monotonic for the conditional, U is not, and whereas C obeys Modus Ponens, U does not without restrictions. We show systematic correspondences between trivalent and probabilistic representations of inferences in either framework, and we use the distinction between the two systems to cast light, in particular, on McGee's puzzle about Modus Ponens. The result is a unified account of the semantics and epistemology of indicative conditionals that can be fruitfully applied to analyzing the validity of conditional inferences.
summary: This paper develops a trivalent semantics for the truth conditions and the probability of the natural language indicative conditional. Our framework rests on trivalent truth conditions first proposed by W. Cooper and yields two logics of conditional reasoning: (i) a logic C of inference from certain premises; and (ii) a logic U of inference from uncertain premises. But whereas C is monotonic for the conditional, U is not, and whereas C obeys Modus Ponens, U does not without restrictions. We show systematic correspondences between trivalent and probabilistic representations of inferences in either framework, and we use the distinction between the two systems to cast light, in particular, on McGee's puzzle about Modus Ponens. The result is a unified account of the semantics and epistemology of indicative conditionals that can be fruitfully applied to analyzing the validity of conditional inferences.
abstract_zh: 本文为自然语言指示条件的真值条件和概率开发了三价语义。我们的框架基于 W. Cooper 首先提出的三价真值条件，并产生两种条件推理逻辑：（i）从某些前提进行推理的逻辑 C； (ii) 根据不确定前提进行推理的逻辑 U。但是，虽然 C 对于条件而言是单调的，但 U 却不是，而且 C 遵循一定前提，而 U 则并非没有限制。我们展示了任一框架中推论的三价表示和概率表示之间的系统对应关系，并且我们利用这两个系统之间的区别来阐明，特别是麦基有关 Modus Ponens 的难题。其结果是对指示性条件句的语义和认识论的统一解释，可以有效地应用于分析条件推论的有效性。

AI.tldr: 构建三值语义框架分析确定与不确定前提下的条件推理，区分两种逻辑系统
AI.motivation: 解决传统逻辑在处理不确定前提条件推理时的局限性，如肯定前件的限制，并统一语义与认识论
AI.method: 基于三值语义和概率模型，构建两种逻辑系统C和U，分析其推理规则与概率对应关系
AI.result: 系统对应三值与概率推理，解释McGee谜题，并统一指示条件句的语义与认识论
AI.conclusion: 提出统一框架，有效分析条件推理，解决传统逻辑局限性

authors_text: David P. Woodruff,Taisuke Yasuda
title: Online Lewis Weight Sampling
title_zh: 在线刘易斯重量采样
comment: To appear in SODA 2023; Removed result on adversarial streaming
comments: To appear in SODA 2023; Removed result on adversarial streaming
abstract: The seminal work of Cohen and Peng introduced Lewis weight sampling to the theoretical computer science community, yielding fast row sampling algorithms for approximating $d$-dimensional subspaces of $\ell_p$ up to $(1+ε)$ error. Several works have extended this important primitive to other settings, including the online coreset and sliding window models. However, these results are only for $p\in\{1,2\}$, and results for $p=1$ require a suboptimal $\tilde O(d^2/ε^2)$ samples. In this work, we design the first nearly optimal $\ell_p$ subspace embeddings for all $p\in(0,\infty)$ in the online coreset and sliding window models. In both models, our algorithms store $\tilde O(d^{1\lor(p/2)}/ε^2)$ rows. This answers a substantial generalization of the main open question of [BDMMUWZ2020], and gives the first results for all $p\notin\{1,2\}$. Towards our result, we give the first analysis of "one-shot'' Lewis weight sampling of sampling rows proportionally to their Lewis weights, with sample complexity $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^2)$ for $p>2$. Previously, this scheme was only known to have sample complexity $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^5)$, whereas $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^2)$ is known if a more sophisticated recursive sampling is used. The recursive sampling cannot be implemented online, thus necessitating an analysis of one-shot Lewis weight sampling. Our analysis uses a novel connection to online numerical linear algebra. As an application, we obtain the first one-pass streaming coreset algorithms for $(1+ε)$ approximation of important generalized linear models, such as logistic regression and $p$-probit regression. Our upper bounds are parameterized by a complexity parameter $μ$ introduced by [MSSW2018], and we show the first lower bounds showing that a linear dependence on $μ$ is necessary.
summary: The seminal work of Cohen and Peng introduced Lewis weight sampling to the theoretical computer science community, yielding fast row sampling algorithms for approximating $d$-dimensional subspaces of $\ell_p$ up to $(1+ε)$ error. Several works have extended this important primitive to other settings, including the online coreset and sliding window models. However, these results are only for $p\in\{1,2\}$, and results for $p=1$ require a suboptimal $\tilde O(d^2/ε^2)$ samples. In this work, we design the first nearly optimal $\ell_p$ subspace embeddings for all $p\in(0,\infty)$ in the online coreset and sliding window models. In both models, our algorithms store $\tilde O(d^{1\lor(p/2)}/ε^2)$ rows. This answers a substantial generalization of the main open question of [BDMMUWZ2020], and gives the first results for all $p\notin\{1,2\}$. Towards our result, we give the first analysis of "one-shot'' Lewis weight sampling of sampling rows proportionally to their Lewis weights, with sample complexity $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^2)$ for $p>2$. Previously, this scheme was only known to have sample complexity $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^5)$, whereas $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^2)$ is known if a more sophisticated recursive sampling is used. The recursive sampling cannot be implemented online, thus necessitating an analysis of one-shot Lewis weight sampling. Our analysis uses a novel connection to online numerical linear algebra. As an application, we obtain the first one-pass streaming coreset algorithms for $(1+ε)$ approximation of important generalized linear models, such as logistic regression and $p$-probit regression. Our upper bounds are parameterized by a complexity parameter $μ$ introduced by [MSSW2018], and we show the first lower bounds showing that a linear dependence on $μ$ is necessary.
abstract_zh: Cohen 和 Peng 的开创性工作将 Lewis 权重采样引入了理论计算机科学界，产生了快速行采样算法，用于逼近 $\ell_p$ 的 $d$ 维子空间，最高可达 $(1+ε)$ 误差。一些工作已将这一重要的原语扩展到其他设置，包括在线核心集和滑动窗口模型。但是，这些结果仅适用于 $p\in\{1,2\}$，并且 $p=1$ 的结果需要次优的 $\tilde O(d^2/ε^2)$ 样本。在这项工作中，我们为在线核心集和滑动窗口模型中的所有 $p\in(0,\infty)$ 设计了第一个近乎最优的 $\ell_p$ 子空间嵌入。在这两个模型中，我们的算法存储 $\tilde O(d^{1\lor(p/2)}/ε^2)$ 行。这回答了 [BDMMUWZ2020] 主要开放问题的实质性概括，并给出了所有 $p\notin\{1,2\}$ 的第一个结果。针对我们的结果，我们对采样行的“一次性”Lewis 权重采样与它们的 Lewis 权重成正比进行了第一次分析，对于 $p>2$，样本复杂度为 $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^2)$。以前，仅知道该方案的样本复杂度为 $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^5)$，而 $\tilde O(d^{p/2}/ε^2)$ 是已知的，如果使用更复杂的递归采样，因此需要对一次性路易斯权重采样进行分析作为一种应用，我们获得了重要广义线性模型的第一个单通道流核心集算法，例如逻辑回归和$p$-概率回归。 [MSSW2018]，我们展示了第一个下界，表明对 $μ$ 的线性依赖是必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了在线核心集和滑动窗口模型中适用于所有p∈(0,∞)的近似最优ℓ_p子空间嵌入算法。
AI.motivation: 现有Lewis权重采样方法仅适用于p∈{1,2}，且p=1时样本复杂度次优，缺乏对所有p值的统一处理方案。
AI.method: 通过分析单次Lewis权重采样与在线数值线性代数的关联，提出近似最优采样复杂度分析，结合流式核心集算法实现在线处理。
AI.result: 在两种模型中实现存储复杂度为~O(d^{1∨(p/2)}/ε²)的算法，首次覆盖所有p∉{1,2}情况，并给出μ参数的下界证明。
AI.conclusion: 解决了BDMMUWZ2020提出的核心问题，为广义线性模型提供了一次性流式核心集算法，证明了μ参数线性依赖的必要性。

authors_text: Jingwei Zhang,Xin Zhang,Ke Ma,Rajarsi Gupta,Joel Saltz,Maria Vakalopoulou,Dimitris Samaras
title: Gigapixel Whole-Slide Images Classification using Locally Supervised Learning
title_zh: 使用本地监督学习进行十亿像素全幻灯片图像分类
abstract: Histopathology whole slide images (WSIs) play a very important role in clinical studies and serve as the gold standard for many cancer diagnoses. However, generating automatic tools for processing WSIs is challenging due to their enormous sizes. Currently, to deal with this issue, conventional methods rely on a multiple instance learning (MIL) strategy to process a WSI at patch level. Although effective, such methods are computationally expensive, because tiling a WSI into patches takes time and does not explore the spatial relations between these tiles. To tackle these limitations, we propose a locally supervised learning framework which processes the entire slide by exploring the entire local and global information that it contains. This framework divides a pre-trained network into several modules and optimizes each module locally using an auxiliary model. We also introduce a random feature reconstruction unit (RFR) to preserve distinguishing features during training and improve the performance of our method by 1% to 3%. Extensive experiments on three publicly available WSI datasets: TCGA-NSCLC, TCGA-RCC and LKS, highlight the superiority of our method on different classification tasks. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art MIL methods by 2% to 5% in accuracy, while being 7 to 10 times faster. Additionally, when dividing it into eight modules, our method requires as little as 20% of the total gpu memory required by end-to-end training. Our code is available at https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/local_learning_wsi.
summary: Histopathology whole slide images (WSIs) play a very important role in clinical studies and serve as the gold standard for many cancer diagnoses. However, generating automatic tools for processing WSIs is challenging due to their enormous sizes. Currently, to deal with this issue, conventional methods rely on a multiple instance learning (MIL) strategy to process a WSI at patch level. Although effective, such methods are computationally expensive, because tiling a WSI into patches takes time and does not explore the spatial relations between these tiles. To tackle these limitations, we propose a locally supervised learning framework which processes the entire slide by exploring the entire local and global information that it contains. This framework divides a pre-trained network into several modules and optimizes each module locally using an auxiliary model. We also introduce a random feature reconstruction unit (RFR) to preserve distinguishing features during training and improve the performance of our method by 1% to 3%. Extensive experiments on three publicly available WSI datasets: TCGA-NSCLC, TCGA-RCC and LKS, highlight the superiority of our method on different classification tasks. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art MIL methods by 2% to 5% in accuracy, while being 7 to 10 times faster. Additionally, when dividing it into eight modules, our method requires as little as 20% of the total gpu memory required by end-to-end training. Our code is available at https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/local_learning_wsi.
abstract_zh: 组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 在临床研究中发挥着非常重要的作用，并成为许多癌症诊断的金标准。然而，由于 WSI 规模巨大，生成用于处理 WSI 的自动工具具有挑战性。目前，为了解决这个问题，传统方法依赖于多实例学习（MIL）策略来处理补丁级别的 WSI。虽然有效，但此类方法的计算成本很高，因为将 WSI 平铺为图块需要时间，并且不会探索这些图块之间的空间关系。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一个本地监督学习框架，该框架通过探索其包含的整个本地和全局信息来处理整个幻灯片。该框架将预训练的网络划分为多个模块，并使用辅助模型在本地优化每个模块。我们还引入了随机特征重建单元（RFR）来在训练期间保留显着特征，并将我们的方法的性能提高 1% 到 3%。对三个公开可用的 WSI 数据集：TCGA-NSCLC、TCGA-RCC 和 LKS 进行的广泛实验凸显了我们的方法在不同分类任务上的优越性。我们的方法在准确度上比最先进的 MIL 方法高出 2% 到 5%，同时速度提高了 7 到 10 倍。此外，当将其划分为 8 个模块时，我们的方法只需要端到端训练所需总 GPU 内存的 20%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/local_learning_wsi 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部监督学习的框架，用于处理吉帕像素级的全切片病理图像分类任务，以提高计算效率和分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统多实例学习（MIL）方法在处理全切片图像时计算成本高且忽略局部空间关系，亟需更高效且能利用局部与全局信息的分类框架。
AI.method: 将预训练网络分割为多个模块并用辅助模型局部优化，引入随机特征重建单元（RFR）以保留区分性特征，减少计算资源消耗。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上分类准确率较最先进MIL方法提升2%-5%，速度加快7-10倍，八模块划分下仅需端到端训练20%的GPU内存。
AI.conclusion: 局部监督学习框架在保持高分类性能的同时显著降低了计算复杂度，为大规模病理图像分析提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Bin Xie,Hao Tang,Bin Duan,Dawen Cai,Yan Yan
title: MLP-GAN for Brain Vessel Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于脑血管图像分割的 MLP-GAN
abstract: Brain vessel image segmentation can be used as a promising biomarker for better prevention and treatment of different diseases. One successful approach is to consider the segmentation as an image-to-image translation task and perform a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) to learn a transformation between two distributions. In this paper, we present a novel multi-view approach, MLP-GAN, which splits a 3D volumetric brain vessel image into three different dimensional 2D images (i.e., sagittal, coronal, axial) and then feed them into three different 2D cGANs. The proposed MLP-GAN not only alleviates the memory issue which exists in the original 3D neural networks but also retains 3D spatial information. Specifically, we utilize U-Net as the backbone for our generator and redesign the pattern of skip connection integrated with the MLP-Mixer which has attracted lots of attention recently. Our model obtains the ability to capture cross-patch information to learn global information with the MLP-Mixer. Extensive experiments are performed on the public brain vessel dataset that show our MLP-GAN outperforms other state-of-the-art methods. We release our code at https://github.com/bxie9/MLP-GAN
summary: Brain vessel image segmentation can be used as a promising biomarker for better prevention and treatment of different diseases. One successful approach is to consider the segmentation as an image-to-image translation task and perform a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) to learn a transformation between two distributions. In this paper, we present a novel multi-view approach, MLP-GAN, which splits a 3D volumetric brain vessel image into three different dimensional 2D images (i.e., sagittal, coronal, axial) and then feed them into three different 2D cGANs. The proposed MLP-GAN not only alleviates the memory issue which exists in the original 3D neural networks but also retains 3D spatial information. Specifically, we utilize U-Net as the backbone for our generator and redesign the pattern of skip connection integrated with the MLP-Mixer which has attracted lots of attention recently. Our model obtains the ability to capture cross-patch information to learn global information with the MLP-Mixer. Extensive experiments are performed on the public brain vessel dataset that show our MLP-GAN outperforms other state-of-the-art methods. We release our code at https://github.com/bxie9/MLP-GAN
abstract_zh: 脑血管图像分割可以作为一种有前途的生物标志物，以更好地预防和治疗不同的疾病。一种成功的方法是将分割视为图像到图像的翻译任务，并执行条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）来学习两个分布之间的转换。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多视图方法 MLP-GAN，它将 3D 体积脑血管图像分割为三个不同维度的 2D 图像（即矢状面、冠状面、轴向），然后将它们输入到三个不同的 2D cGAN 中。所提出的 MLP-GAN 不仅缓解了原始 3D 神经网络中存在的记忆问题，而且保留了 3D 空间信息。具体来说，我们利用 U-Net 作为生成器的主干，并重新设计了与最近引起广泛关注的 MLP-Mixer 集成的跳跃连接模式。我们的模型获得了捕获跨补丁信息的能力，以通过 MLP-Mixer 学习全局信息。在公共脑血管数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的 MLP-GAN 优于其他最先进的方法。我们在 https://github.com/bxie9/MLP-GAN 发布了我们的代码

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MLP-GAN的多视角生成对抗网络，用于脑血管图像分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统3D神经网络存在内存消耗大问题，而单纯使用2D方法会丢失3D空间信息，需平衡计算效率与空间特征保留。
AI.method: 将3D脑部影像分解为矢状、冠状、轴向三个2D视图，分别输入三个2D cGAN。采用U-Net作为生成器主干，结合MLP-Mixer改进跳跃连接结构以捕捉全局信息。
AI.result: 在公开数据集实验中，MLP-GAN优于其他先进方法，验证了多视角融合与MLP-Mixer的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MLP-GAN通过多视角分解与改进网络结构，在降低内存消耗的同时提升了分割精度，为医学图像分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fajrian Yunus,Chloé Clavel,Catherine Pelachaud
title: Representation Learning of Image Schema
title_zh: 图像模式的表示学习
abstract: Image schema is a recurrent pattern of reasoning where one entity is mapped into another. Image schema is similar to conceptual metaphor and is also related to metaphoric gesture. Our main goal is to generate metaphoric gestures for an Embodied Conversational Agent. We propose a technique to learn the vector representation of image schemas. As far as we are aware of, this is the first work which addresses that problem. Our technique uses Ravenet et al's algorithm which we use to compute the image schemas from the text input and also BERT and SenseBERT which we use as the base word embedding technique to calculate the final vector representation of the image schema. Our representation learning technique works by clustering: word embedding vectors which belong to the same image schema should be relatively closer to each other, and thus form a cluster. With the image schemas representable as vectors, it also becomes possible to have a notion that some image schemas are closer or more similar to each other than to the others because the distance between the vectors is a proxy of the dissimilarity between the corresponding image schemas. Therefore, after obtaining the vector representation of the image schemas, we calculate the distances between those vectors. Based on these, we create visualizations to illustrate the relative distances between the different image schemas.
summary: Image schema is a recurrent pattern of reasoning where one entity is mapped into another. Image schema is similar to conceptual metaphor and is also related to metaphoric gesture. Our main goal is to generate metaphoric gestures for an Embodied Conversational Agent. We propose a technique to learn the vector representation of image schemas. As far as we are aware of, this is the first work which addresses that problem. Our technique uses Ravenet et al's algorithm which we use to compute the image schemas from the text input and also BERT and SenseBERT which we use as the base word embedding technique to calculate the final vector representation of the image schema. Our representation learning technique works by clustering: word embedding vectors which belong to the same image schema should be relatively closer to each other, and thus form a cluster. With the image schemas representable as vectors, it also becomes possible to have a notion that some image schemas are closer or more similar to each other than to the others because the distance between the vectors is a proxy of the dissimilarity between the corresponding image schemas. Therefore, after obtaining the vector representation of the image schemas, we calculate the distances between those vectors. Based on these, we create visualizations to illustrate the relative distances between the different image schemas.
abstract_zh: 图像模式是一种循环推理模式，其中一个实体映射到另一个实体。意象图式与概念隐喻类似，也与隐喻姿态有关。我们的主要目标是为实体对话代理生成隐喻手势。我们提出了一种学习图像模式的矢量表示的技术。据我们所知，这是第一个解决该问题的工作。我们的技术使用 Ravenet 等人的算法，我们用它来计算文本输入的图像模式，还使用 ​​BERT 和 SenseBERT，我们使用它作为基本词嵌入技术来计算图像模式的最终向量表示。我们的表示学习技术通过聚类来工作：属于同一图像模式的词嵌入向量应该彼此相对更接近，从而形成一个聚类。通过将图像模式表示为向量，还可以得出这样的概念：某些图像模式比其他图像模式彼此更接近或更相似，因为向量之间的距离代表了相应图像模式之间的不相似性。因此，在获得图像模式的向量表示后，我们计算这些向量之间的距离。基于这些，我们创建可视化来说明不同图像模式之间的相对距离。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过学习图像图式的向量表示，为具身对话代理生成隐喻手势。
AI.motivation: 现有研究尚未解决图像图式的向量表示问题，而该表示对于生成隐喻手势和理解概念隐喻至关重要。
AI.method: 结合Ravenet算法从文本提取图像图式，利用BERT和SenseBERT生成词向量，通过聚类使同一图式向量接近并计算其相似性。
AI.result: 成功将图像图式表示为向量，并通过可视化展示不同图式间的相对距离与相似性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现图像图式的向量表示，为隐喻手势生成和概念隐喻研究提供新途径。

authors_text: Yutong Li,Nan Li,H. Eric Tseng,Anouck Girard,Dimitar Filev,Ilya Kolmanovsky
title: Robust Action Governor for Uncertain Piecewise Affine Systems with Non-convex Constraints and Safe Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 具有非凸约束和安全强化学习的不确定分段仿射系统的鲁棒动作调节器
abstract: The action governor is an add-on scheme to a nominal control loop that monitors and adjusts the control actions to enforce safety specifications expressed as pointwise-in-time state and control constraints. In this paper, we introduce the Robust Action Governor (RAG) for systems the dynamics of which can be represented using discrete-time Piecewise Affine (PWA) models with both parametric and additive uncertainties and subject to non-convex constraints. We develop the theoretical properties and computational approaches for the RAG. After that, we introduce the use of the RAG for realizing safe Reinforcement Learning (RL), i.e., ensuring all-time constraint satisfaction during online RL exploration-and-exploitation process. This development enables safe real-time evolution of the control policy and adaptation to changes in the operating environment and system parameters (due to aging, damage, etc.). We illustrate the effectiveness of the RAG in constraint enforcement and safe RL using the RAG by considering their applications to a soft-landing problem of a mass-spring-damper system.
summary: The action governor is an add-on scheme to a nominal control loop that monitors and adjusts the control actions to enforce safety specifications expressed as pointwise-in-time state and control constraints. In this paper, we introduce the Robust Action Governor (RAG) for systems the dynamics of which can be represented using discrete-time Piecewise Affine (PWA) models with both parametric and additive uncertainties and subject to non-convex constraints. We develop the theoretical properties and computational approaches for the RAG. After that, we introduce the use of the RAG for realizing safe Reinforcement Learning (RL), i.e., ensuring all-time constraint satisfaction during online RL exploration-and-exploitation process. This development enables safe real-time evolution of the control policy and adaptation to changes in the operating environment and system parameters (due to aging, damage, etc.). We illustrate the effectiveness of the RAG in constraint enforcement and safe RL using the RAG by considering their applications to a soft-landing problem of a mass-spring-damper system.
abstract_zh: 动作调节器是标称控制环路的附加方案，用于监视和调整控制动作以强制执行以时间点状态和控制约束表示的安全规范。在本文中，我们介绍了系统的鲁棒作用调节器（RAG），其动态可以使用离散时间分段仿射（PWA）模型来表示，该模型具有参数和加性不确定性并受到非凸约束。我们开发了 RAG 的理论特性和计算方法。之后，我们介绍了使用 RAG 来实现安全的强化学习（RL），即确保在线 RL 探索和利用过程中始终满足约束。这一发展使得控制策略能够安全地实时演进，并适应操作环境和系统参数的变化（由于老化、损坏等）。我们通过考虑 RAG 在质量弹簧阻尼系统软着陆问题中的应用，说明了 RAG 在约束执行和安全强化学习中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒动作调节器（RAG），用于处理具有非凸约束和不确定性的分段仿射系统，并将其应用于安全强化学习中，以确保在线探索过程中的约束满足。
AI.motivation: 现有控制方法难以有效处理系统参数不确定性和非凸约束，导致安全规范无法保证，尤其在动态环境和系统退化场景下存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 基于离散时间分段仿射模型，设计具有参数和加性不确定性的鲁棒动作调节器理论框架，并开发计算方法；结合安全强化学习实现控制策略的实时安全演化。
AI.result: 通过质量-弹簧-阻尼系统的软着陆案例验证，RAG能够有效执行约束并保障强化学习过程的安全性，适应环境变化和参数退化。
AI.conclusion: RAG为不确定系统的安全控制提供了有效解决方案，可扩展至复杂动态环境下的实时控制与策略适应场景。

ai_content_json.result: 通过质量-弹簧-阻尼系统的软着陆案例验证，RAG能够有效执行约束并保障强化学习过程的安全性，适应环境变化和参数退化。
ai_content_json.conclusion: RAG为不确定系统的安全控制提供了有效解决方案，可扩展至复杂动态环境下的实时控制与策略适应场景。

tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒动作调节器（RAG），用于处理具有非凸约束和不确定性的分段仿射系统，并将其应用于安全强化学习中，以确保在线探索过程中的约束满足。
motivation: 现有控制方法难以有效处理系统参数不确定性和非凸约束，导致安全规范无法保证，尤其在动态环境和系统退化场景下存在安全隐患。
method: 基于离散时间分段仿射模型，设计具有参数和加性不确定性的鲁棒动作调节器理论框架，并开发计算方法；结合安全强化学习实现控制策略的实时安全演化。
result: 通过质量-弹簧-阻尼系统的软着陆案例验证，RAG能够有效执行约束并保障强化学习过程的安全性，适应环境变化和参数退化。
conclusion: RAG为不确定系统的安全控制提供了有效解决方案，可扩展至复杂动态环境下的实时控制与策略适应场景。
search_text: Robust Action Governor for Uncertain Piecewise Affine Systems with Non-convex Constraints and Safe Reinforcement Learning 具有非凸约束和安全强化学习的不确定分段仿射系统的鲁棒动作调节器 The action governor is an add-on scheme to a nominal control loop that monitors and adjusts the control actions to enforce safety specifications expressed as pointwise-in-time state and control constraints. In this paper, we introduce the Robust Action Governor (RAG) for systems the dynamics of which can be represented using discrete-time Piecewise Affine (PWA) models with both parametric and additive uncertainties and subject to non-convex constraints. We develop the theoretical properties and computational approaches for the RAG. After that, we introduce the use of the RAG for realizing safe Reinforcement Learning (RL), i.e., ensuring all-time constraint satisfaction during online RL exploration-and-exploitation process. This development enables safe real-time evolution of the control policy and adaptation to changes in the operating environment and system parameters (due to aging, damage, etc.). We illustrate the effectiveness of the RAG in constraint enforcement and safe RL using the RAG by considering their applications to a soft-landing problem of a mass-spring-damper system. 动作调节器是标称控制环路的附加方案，用于监视和调整控制动作以强制执行以时间点状态和控制约束表示的安全规范。在本文中，我们介绍了系统的鲁棒作用调节器（RAG），其动态可以使用离散时间分段仿射（PWA）模型来表示，该模型具有参数和加性不确定性并受到非凸约束。我们开发了 RAG 的理论特性和计算方法。之后，我们介绍了使用 RAG 来实现安全的强化学习（RL），即确保在线 RL 探索和利用过程中始终满足约束。这一发展使得控制策略能够安全地实时演进，并适应操作环境和系统参数的变化（由于老化、损坏等）。我们通过考虑 RAG 在质量弹簧阻尼系统软着陆问题中的应用，说明了 RAG 在约束执行和安全强化学习中的有效性。 本文提出了一种鲁棒动作调节器（RAG），用于处理具有非凸约束和不确定性的分段仿射系统，并将其应用于安全强化学习中，以确保在线探索过程中的约束满足。 Yutong Li,Nan Li,H. Eric Tseng,Anouck Girard,Dimitar Filev,Ilya Kolmanovsky eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Seyhmus Yilmaz,Sultan Zavrak
title: A Context-Sensitive Word Embedding Approach for The Detection of Troll Tweets
title_zh: 用于检测巨魔推文的上下文相关词嵌入方法
abstract: In this study, we aimed to address the growing concern of trolling behavior on social media by developing and evaluating a set of model architectures for the automatic detection of troll tweets. Utilizing deep learning techniques and pre-trained word embedding methods such as BERT, ELMo, and GloVe, we evaluated the performance of each architecture using metrics such as classification accuracy, F1 score, AUC, and precision. Our results indicate that BERT and ELMo embedding methods performed better than the GloVe method, likely due to their ability to provide contextualized word embeddings that better capture the nuances and subtleties of language use in online social media. Additionally, we found that CNN and GRU encoders performed similarly in terms of F1 score and AUC, suggesting their effectiveness in extracting relevant information from input text. The best-performing method was found to be an ELMo-based architecture that employed a GRU classifier, with an AUC score of 0.929. This research highlights the importance of utilizing contextualized word embeddings and appropriate encoder methods in the task of troll tweet detection, which can assist social-based systems in improving their performance in identifying and addressing trolling behavior on their platforms.
summary: In this study, we aimed to address the growing concern of trolling behavior on social media by developing and evaluating a set of model architectures for the automatic detection of troll tweets. Utilizing deep learning techniques and pre-trained word embedding methods such as BERT, ELMo, and GloVe, we evaluated the performance of each architecture using metrics such as classification accuracy, F1 score, AUC, and precision. Our results indicate that BERT and ELMo embedding methods performed better than the GloVe method, likely due to their ability to provide contextualized word embeddings that better capture the nuances and subtleties of language use in online social media. Additionally, we found that CNN and GRU encoders performed similarly in terms of F1 score and AUC, suggesting their effectiveness in extracting relevant information from input text. The best-performing method was found to be an ELMo-based architecture that employed a GRU classifier, with an AUC score of 0.929. This research highlights the importance of utilizing contextualized word embeddings and appropriate encoder methods in the task of troll tweet detection, which can assist social-based systems in improving their performance in identifying and addressing trolling behavior on their platforms.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们旨在通过开发和评估一组用于自动检测巨魔推文的模型架构来解决社交媒体上日益增长的巨魔行为问题。利用深度学习技术和预训练的词嵌入方法（例如 BERT、ELMo 和 GloVe），我们使用分类准确性、F1 分数、AUC 和精度等指标评估每个架构的性能。我们的结果表明，BERT 和 ELMo 嵌入方法比 GloVe 方法表现更好，这可能是因为它们能够提供上下文化的词嵌入，从而更好地捕捉在线社交媒体中语言使用的细微差别和微妙之处。此外，我们发现 CNN 和 GRU 编码器在 F1 分数和 AUC 方面表现相似，这表明它们在从输入文本中提取相关信息方面的有效性。结果发现，性能最佳的方法是采用 GRU 分类器的基于 ELMo 的架构，AUC 得分为 0.929。这项研究强调了在巨魔推文检测任务中利用上下文词嵌入和适当的编码器方法的重要性，这可以帮助基于社交的系统提高识别和解决平台上巨魔行为的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于上下文敏感词嵌入的方法，用于检测社交媒体中的网络水军推文。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体上网络水军行为的增加，本文旨在开发更有效的自动检测方法，以帮助平台识别和应对这种行为。
AI.method: 采用深度学习技术，结合BERT、ELMo和GloVe等预训练词嵌入方法，并评估CNN和GRU编码器在分类任务中的表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，BERT和ELMo在F1分数和AUC上优于GloVe，其中基于ELMo的GRU分类器达到最高的AUC得分0.929。
AI.conclusion: 研究结论指出，使用上下文敏感词嵌入和合适的编码器方法能有效提升网络水军推文的检测性能，为社交平台提供改进方案。

authors_text: Alex Lamb,Riashat Islam,Yonathan Efroni,Aniket Didolkar,Dipendra Misra,Dylan Foster,Lekan Molu,Rajan Chari,Akshay Krishnamurthy,John Langford
title: Guaranteed Discovery of Control-Endogenous Latent States with Multi-Step Inverse Models
title_zh: 用多步逆模型保证控制内源潜态的发现
abstract: In many sequential decision-making tasks, the agent is not able to model the full complexity of the world, which consists of multitudes of relevant and irrelevant information. For example, a person walking along a city street who tries to model all aspects of the world would quickly be overwhelmed by a multitude of shops, cars, and people moving in and out of view, each following their own complex and inscrutable dynamics. Is it possible to turn the agent's firehose of sensory information into a minimal latent state that is both necessary and sufficient for an agent to successfully act in the world? We formulate this question concretely, and propose the Agent Control-Endogenous State Discovery algorithm (AC-State), which has theoretical guarantees and is practically demonstrated to discover the minimal control-endogenous latent state which contains all of the information necessary for controlling the agent, while fully discarding all irrelevant information. This algorithm consists of a multi-step inverse model (predicting actions from distant observations) with an information bottleneck. AC-State enables localization, exploration, and navigation without reward or demonstrations. We demonstrate the discovery of the control-endogenous latent state in three domains: localizing a robot arm with distractions (e.g., changing lighting conditions and background), exploring a maze alongside other agents, and navigating in the Matterport house simulator.
summary: In many sequential decision-making tasks, the agent is not able to model the full complexity of the world, which consists of multitudes of relevant and irrelevant information. For example, a person walking along a city street who tries to model all aspects of the world would quickly be overwhelmed by a multitude of shops, cars, and people moving in and out of view, each following their own complex and inscrutable dynamics. Is it possible to turn the agent's firehose of sensory information into a minimal latent state that is both necessary and sufficient for an agent to successfully act in the world? We formulate this question concretely, and propose the Agent Control-Endogenous State Discovery algorithm (AC-State), which has theoretical guarantees and is practically demonstrated to discover the minimal control-endogenous latent state which contains all of the information necessary for controlling the agent, while fully discarding all irrelevant information. This algorithm consists of a multi-step inverse model (predicting actions from distant observations) with an information bottleneck. AC-State enables localization, exploration, and navigation without reward or demonstrations. We demonstrate the discovery of the control-endogenous latent state in three domains: localizing a robot arm with distractions (e.g., changing lighting conditions and background), exploring a maze alongside other agents, and navigating in the Matterport house simulator.
abstract_zh: 在许多顺序决策任务中，智能体无法对世界的全部复杂性进行建模，因为世界由大量相关和不相关的信息组成。例如，一个人沿着城市街道行走，试图模拟世界的各个方面，很快就会被大量的商店、汽车和进出视野的人所淹没，每个人都遵循着自己复杂而难以理解的动态。是否有可能将智能体的感官信息转化为最小的潜在状态，这对于智能体在现实世界中成功行动是必要且充分的？我们具体地阐述了这个问题，并提出了智能体控制内生状态发现算法（AC-State），该算法具有理论保证并被实践证明可以发现最小的控制内生潜在状态，该状态包含控制智能体所需的所有信息，同时完全丢弃所有不相关信息。该算法由具有信息瓶颈的多步逆模型（根据远程观察预测动作）组成。 AC-State 无需奖励或演示即可实现本地化、探索和导航。我们在三个领域展示了控制内源潜在状态的发现：用干扰（例如，改变照明条件和背景）定位机器人手臂，与其他代理一起探索迷宫，以及在 Matterport 房屋模拟器中导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AC-State的算法，用于发现控制内生的潜在状态，以简化代理在复杂环境中的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 在许多连续决策任务中，代理无法处理世界中的全部信息，需要提取必要的最小潜在状态以有效行动，同时忽略无关信息。
AI.method: 通过多步逆模型（预测远距离观测中的动作）结合信息瓶颈理论，构建AC-State算法，实现对控制内生状态的发现。
AI.result: 在三个领域验证了AC-State的有效性：机械臂定位（含干扰）、多智能体迷宫探索及Matterport房屋模拟器导航。
AI.conclusion: AC-State能够无需奖励或示范，成功提取控制所需的最小潜在状态，为自主决策提供了理论保证和实践支持。

This algorithm consists of a multi-step inverse model (predicting actions from distant observations) with an information bottleneck. AC-State enables localization, exploration, and navigation without reward or demonstrations. We demonstrate the discovery of the control-endogenous latent state in three domains: localizing a robot arm with distractions (e.g., changing lighting conditions and background), exploring a maze alongside other agents, and navigating in the Matterport house simulator. 在许多顺序决策任务中，智能体无法对世界的全部复杂性进行建模，因为世界由大量相关和不相关的信息组成。例如，一个人沿着城市街道行走，试图模拟世界的各个方面，很快就会被大量的商店、汽车和进出视野的人所淹没，每个人都遵循着自己复杂而难以理解的动态。是否有可能将智能体的感官信息转化为最小的潜在状态，这对于智能体在现实世界中成功行动是必要且充分的？我们具体地阐述了这个问题，并提出了智能体控制内生状态发现算法（AC-State），该算法具有理论保证并被实践证明可以发现最小的控制内生潜在状态，该状态包含控制智能体所需的所有信息，同时完全丢弃所有不相关信息。该算法由具有信息瓶颈的多步逆模型（根据远程观察预测动作）组成。 AC-State 无需奖励或演示即可实现本地化、探索和导航。我们在三个领域展示了控制内源潜在状态的发现：用干扰（例如，改变照明条件和背景）定位机器人手臂，与其他代理一起探索迷宫，以及在 Matterport 房屋模拟器中导航。 本文提出了一种名为AC-State的算法，用于发现控制内生的潜在状态，以简化代理在复杂环境中的决策过程。 Alex Lamb,Riashat Islam,Yonathan Efroni,Aniket Didolkar,Dipendra Misra,Dylan Foster,Lekan Molu,Rajan Chari,Akshay Krishnamurthy,John Langford cs.LG,cs.RO,stat.ML

authors_text: Peter Nicholas Hansen,Thomas T. Enevoldsen,Dimitrios Papageorgiou,Mogens Blanke
title: Autonomous Navigation in Confined Waters -- A COLREGs Rule 9 Compliant Framework
title_zh: 封闭水域自主导航——符合 COLREG 规则 9 的框架
comment: To be published at IFAC CAMS 2022
comments: To be published at IFAC CAMS 2022
abstract: Fully or partial autonomous marine vessels are actively being developed by many industry actors. In many cases, the autonomous vessels will be operating close to shore, and within range of a Remote Control Center (RCC). Close to shore operation requires that the autonomous vessel is able to navigate in close proximity to other autonomous or manned vessels, and possibly in confined waters, while obeying the COLREGs on equal terms as any other vessel at sea. In confined waters however, certain COLREGs rules apply, which might alter the expected actions (give-way or stand-on), depending on the manoeuvrability of the vessels. This paper presents a Situation Awareness (SAS) framework for autonomous navigation that complies with COLREGs rule 9 (Narrow Channels). The proposed solution comprises a method for evaluating the manoeuvrability of a vessel in confined waters, for assessing the applicability of COLREGs rule 9. This feature is then integrated into an already existing SAS framework for facilitating COLREGs-compliant navigation in restricted waters. The applicability of the proposed method is demonstrated in simulation using a case study of a small autonomous passenger ferry.
summary: Fully or partial autonomous marine vessels are actively being developed by many industry actors. In many cases, the autonomous vessels will be operating close to shore, and within range of a Remote Control Center (RCC). Close to shore operation requires that the autonomous vessel is able to navigate in close proximity to other autonomous or manned vessels, and possibly in confined waters, while obeying the COLREGs on equal terms as any other vessel at sea. In confined waters however, certain COLREGs rules apply, which might alter the expected actions (give-way or stand-on), depending on the manoeuvrability of the vessels. This paper presents a Situation Awareness (SAS) framework for autonomous navigation that complies with COLREGs rule 9 (Narrow Channels). The proposed solution comprises a method for evaluating the manoeuvrability of a vessel in confined waters, for assessing the applicability of COLREGs rule 9. This feature is then integrated into an already existing SAS framework for facilitating COLREGs-compliant navigation in restricted waters. The applicability of the proposed method is demonstrated in simulation using a case study of a small autonomous passenger ferry.
abstract_zh: 许多行业参与者正在积极开发完全或部分自主船舶。在许多情况下，自主船舶将在靠近海岸且在远程控制中心（RCC）范围内运行。近岸作业要求自主船舶能够在靠近其他自主或有人驾驶船舶的情况下航行，并且可能在封闭水域中航行，同时与海上任何其他船舶一样遵守 COLREG。然而，在封闭水域，某些 COLREG 规则适用，这可能会改变预期的行动（让路或停泊），具体取决于船舶的机动性。本文提出了一种符合 COLREG 规则 9（窄航道）的自主导航态势感知 (SAS) 框架。所提出的解决方案包括一种用于评估船舶在受限水域中的机动性的方法，用于评估 COLREG 规则 9 的适用性。然后将该功能集成到现有的 SAS 框架中，以促进受限水域中符合 COLREG 的航行。通过小型自主客运渡轮的案例研究，在模拟中证明了所提出方法的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种符合《国际海上避碰规则》第9条的自主导航框架，用于解决受限水域中的自主船舶路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 近岸水域自主船舶需在狭窄航道中与其他船舶协同航行，但传统COLREGs规则未充分考虑船舶机动性差异带来的避让逻辑变化，需建立专门的合规框架。
AI.method: 构建包含船舶机动性评估模块的态势感知系统，通过仿真验证框架在狭窄航道场景下的COLREGs第9条规则适用性，以小型渡轮案例进行测试。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明该框架能有效识别船舶机动性差异并生成符合第9条规则的避让策略，成功实现受限水域自主导航。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为近岸水域自主船舶提供了符合国际规则的导航解决方案，通过机动性评估增强了COLREGs规则在复杂场景下的适用性。

authors_text: Yinzhi Lu,Liu Yang,Simon X. Yang,Qiaozhi Hua,Arun Kumar Sangaiah,Tan Guo,Keping Yu
title: An Intelligent Deterministic Scheduling Method for Ultra-Low Latency Communication in Edge Enabled Industrial Internet of Things
title_zh: 边缘支持的工业物联网中超低延迟通信的智能确定性调度方法
abstract: Edge enabled Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) platform is of great significance to accelerate the development of smart industry. However, with the dramatic increase in real-time IIoT applications, it is a great challenge to support fast response time, low latency, and efficient bandwidth utilization. To address this issue, Time Sensitive Network (TSN) is recently researched to realize low latency communication via deterministic scheduling. To the best of our knowledge, the combinability of multiple flows, which can significantly affect the scheduling performance, has never been systematically analyzed before. In this article, we first analyze the combinability problem. Then a non-collision theory based deterministic scheduling (NDS) method is proposed to achieve ultra-low latency communication for the time-sensitive flows. Moreover, to improve bandwidth utilization, a dynamic queue scheduling (DQS) method is presented for the best-effort flows. Experiment results demonstrate that NDS/DQS can well support deterministic ultra-low latency services and guarantee efficient bandwidth utilization.
summary: Edge enabled Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) platform is of great significance to accelerate the development of smart industry. However, with the dramatic increase in real-time IIoT applications, it is a great challenge to support fast response time, low latency, and efficient bandwidth utilization. To address this issue, Time Sensitive Network (TSN) is recently researched to realize low latency communication via deterministic scheduling. To the best of our knowledge, the combinability of multiple flows, which can significantly affect the scheduling performance, has never been systematically analyzed before. In this article, we first analyze the combinability problem. Then a non-collision theory based deterministic scheduling (NDS) method is proposed to achieve ultra-low latency communication for the time-sensitive flows. Moreover, to improve bandwidth utilization, a dynamic queue scheduling (DQS) method is presented for the best-effort flows. Experiment results demonstrate that NDS/DQS can well support deterministic ultra-low latency services and guarantee efficient bandwidth utilization.
abstract_zh: 边缘工业物联网（IIoT）平台对于加快智能工业发展具有重要意义。然而，随着实时IIoT应用的急剧增加，支持快速响应时间、低延迟和高效的带宽利用是一个巨大的挑战。为了解决这个问题，最近研究了时间敏感网络（TSN），通过确定性调度实现低延迟通信。据我们所知，多个流的可组合性可以显着影响调度性能，之前从未被系统地分析过。在本文中，我们首先分析可组合性问题。然后提出一种基于非冲突理论的确定性调度（NDS）方法来实现时间敏感流的超低延迟通信。此外，为了提高带宽利用率，针对尽力而为流提出了动态队列调度（DQS）方法。实验结果表明，NDS/DQS能够很好地支持确定性超低时延业务，保证带宽的高效利用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非冲突理论的确定性调度方法（NDS）和动态队列调度方法（DQS），以解决边缘化工业物联网中超低延迟通信和带宽利用率的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着工业物联网实时应用的激增，现有技术难以同时满足超低延迟通信和高效带宽利用的需求，尤其缺乏对多流组合性对调度性能影响的系统分析。
AI.method: 首先分析多流组合性问题，提出基于非冲突理论的确定性调度方法（NDS）以实现时间敏感流的超低延迟通信；同时设计动态队列调度方法（DQS）优化尽力而为流的带宽利用率。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，NDS/DQS方法能有效支持确定性超低延迟服务，并保证带宽的高效利用。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的NDS/DQS方法通过系统分析多流组合性，为工业物联网中的超低延迟通信提供了高效的确定性调度解决方案。

authors_text: Eduardo Reck Miranda,Brian N. Siegelwax
title: Teaching Qubits to Sing: Mission Impossible?
title_zh: 教量子比特唱歌：不可能完成的任务？
comment: Preprint of paper to appear in International Journal of Unconventional Computing. Audio recordings of the musical examples and programming code are available: https://github.com/iccmr-quantum/QuSing and https://www.soundclick.com/artist/default.cfm?bandID=1504503
comments: Preprint of paper to appear in International Journal of Unconventional Computing. Audio recordings of the musical examples and programming code are available: https://github.com/iccmr-quantum/QuSing and https://www.soundclick.com/artist/default.cfm?bandID=1504503
abstract: This paper introduces a system that learns to sing new tunes by listening to examples. It extracts sequencing rules from input music and uses these rules to generate new tunes, which are sung by a vocal synthesiser. We developed a method to represent rules for musical composition as quantum circuits. We claim that such musical rules are quantum native: they are naturally encodable in the amplitudes of quantum states. To evaluate a rule to generate a subsequent event, the system builds the respective quantum circuit dynamically and measures it. After a brief discussion about the vocal synthesis methods that we have been experimenting with, the paper introduces our novel generative music method through a practical example. The paper shows some experiments and concludes with a discussion about harnessing the creative potential of the system.
summary: This paper introduces a system that learns to sing new tunes by listening to examples. It extracts sequencing rules from input music and uses these rules to generate new tunes, which are sung by a vocal synthesiser. We developed a method to represent rules for musical composition as quantum circuits. We claim that such musical rules are quantum native: they are naturally encodable in the amplitudes of quantum states. To evaluate a rule to generate a subsequent event, the system builds the respective quantum circuit dynamically and measures it. After a brief discussion about the vocal synthesis methods that we have been experimenting with, the paper introduces our novel generative music method through a practical example. The paper shows some experiments and concludes with a discussion about harnessing the creative potential of the system.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一个通过听例子来学习唱新曲子的系统。它从输入音乐中提取排序规则，并使用这些规则生成新的曲调，由声乐合成器演唱。我们开发了一种将音乐创作规则表示为量子电路的方法。我们声称这样的音乐规则是量子原生的：它们可以自然地编码在量子态的振幅中。为了评估生成后续事件的规则，系统动态构建相应的量子电路并对其进行测量。在简要讨论了我们一直在尝试的声音合成方法之后，本文通过一个实际例子介绍了我们新颖的生成音乐方法。本文展示了一些实验，并最后讨论了如何利用系统的创造潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用量子计算生成音乐的系统，通过学习示例音乐的规则并用量子电路表示，进而生成新曲目。
AI.motivation: 探索量子计算在创意领域的应用，特别是利用量子特性自然编码音乐规则，以生成新颖的音乐作品。
AI.method: 通过提取输入音乐的序列规则，将其转化为量子电路，并利用量子态振幅动态构建和测量电路以生成新音乐。
AI.result: 成功生成了新音乐曲目，并通过实验验证了量子电路在音乐规则编码和生成中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算在音乐生成中展现出潜力，未来需进一步探索其创造性和技术可行性。

authors_text: Jingwen Ye,Yifang Fu,Jie Song,Xingyi Yang,Songhua Liu,Xin Jin,Mingli Song,Xinchao Wang
title: Learning with Recoverable Forgetting
title_zh: 学习可恢复的遗忘
abstract: Life-long learning aims at learning a sequence of tasks without forgetting the previously acquired knowledge. However, the involved training data may not be life-long legitimate due to privacy or copyright reasons. In practical scenarios, for instance, the model owner may wish to enable or disable the knowledge of specific tasks or specific samples from time to time. Such flexible control over knowledge transfer, unfortunately, has been largely overlooked in previous incremental or decremental learning methods, even at a problem-setup level. In this paper, we explore a novel learning scheme, termed as Learning wIth Recoverable Forgetting (LIRF), that explicitly handles the task- or sample-specific knowledge removal and recovery. Specifically, LIRF brings in two innovative schemes, namely knowledge deposit and withdrawal, which allow for isolating user-designated knowledge from a pre-trained network and injecting it back when necessary. During the knowledge deposit process, the specified knowledge is extracted from the target network and stored in a deposit module, while the insensitive or general knowledge of the target network is preserved and further augmented. During knowledge withdrawal, the taken-off knowledge is added back to the target network. The deposit and withdraw processes only demand for a few epochs of finetuning on the removal data, ensuring both data and time efficiency. We conduct experiments on several datasets, and demonstrate that the proposed LIRF strategy yields encouraging results with gratifying generalization capability.
summary: Life-long learning aims at learning a sequence of tasks without forgetting the previously acquired knowledge. However, the involved training data may not be life-long legitimate due to privacy or copyright reasons. In practical scenarios, for instance, the model owner may wish to enable or disable the knowledge of specific tasks or specific samples from time to time. Such flexible control over knowledge transfer, unfortunately, has been largely overlooked in previous incremental or decremental learning methods, even at a problem-setup level. In this paper, we explore a novel learning scheme, termed as Learning wIth Recoverable Forgetting (LIRF), that explicitly handles the task- or sample-specific knowledge removal and recovery. Specifically, LIRF brings in two innovative schemes, namely knowledge deposit and withdrawal, which allow for isolating user-designated knowledge from a pre-trained network and injecting it back when necessary. During the knowledge deposit process, the specified knowledge is extracted from the target network and stored in a deposit module, while the insensitive or general knowledge of the target network is preserved and further augmented. During knowledge withdrawal, the taken-off knowledge is added back to the target network. The deposit and withdraw processes only demand for a few epochs of finetuning on the removal data, ensuring both data and time efficiency. We conduct experiments on several datasets, and demonstrate that the proposed LIRF strategy yields encouraging results with gratifying generalization capability.
abstract_zh: 终身学习的目的是学习一系列任务而不忘记以前获得的知识。然而，由于隐私或版权原因，所涉及的训练数据可能并非终身合法。例如，在实际场景中，模型所有者可能希望不时启用或禁用特定任务或特定样本的知识。不幸的是，这种对知识转移的灵活控制在以前的增量或递减学习方法中在很大程度上被忽视了，即使是在问题设置层面也是如此。在本文中，我们探索了一种新颖的学习方案，称为可恢复遗忘学习（LIRF），它明确地处理特定于任务或样本的知识删除和恢复。具体来说，LIRF引入了两种创新方案，即知识存储和提取，允许将用户指定的知识从预先训练的网络中隔离出来，并在必要时将其注入回来。在知识存储过程中，从目标网络中提取指定知识并将其存储在存储模块中，同时保留并进一步增强目标网络的不敏感或通用知识。在知识提取过程中，取出的知识被添加回目标网络。充值和提现过程只需要对移除数据进行几个epoch的微调，保证了数据和时间效率。我们在多个数据集上进行了实验，并证明所提出的 LIRF 策略产生了令人鼓舞的结果，具有令人满意的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为LIRF（Learning with Recoverable Forgetting）的新学习方案，旨在实现对特定任务或样本知识的可恢复遗忘。
AI.motivation: 由于隐私或版权问题，终身学习中的训练数据可能无法长期合法使用，而现有方法在知识转移的灵活性控制方面存在不足，因此需要一种能够灵活控制知识存储与恢复的学习方法。
AI.method: LIRF引入了知识存储和提取两种机制，允许从预训练网络中提取特定知识并存储于存款模块中，同时保留和增强通用知识。在知识提取过程中，仅需少量数据微调即可实现高效的知识存储与恢复。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，LIRF策略在保持良好泛化能力的同时取得了令人鼓舞的结果。
AI.conclusion: LIRF提供了一种灵活控制知识存储与恢复的方法，为终身学习中隐私和版权问题的解决提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Yuanzheng Ci,Chen Lin,Lei Bai,Wanli Ouyang
title: Fast-MoCo: Boost Momentum-based Contrastive Learning with Combinatorial Patches
title_zh: Fast-MoCo：通过组合补丁促进基于动量的对比学习
comment: Accepted for publication at the 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
abstract: Contrastive-based self-supervised learning methods achieved great success in recent years. However, self-supervision requires extremely long training epochs (e.g., 800 epochs for MoCo v3) to achieve promising results, which is unacceptable for the general academic community and hinders the development of this topic. This work revisits the momentum-based contrastive learning frameworks and identifies the inefficiency in which two augmented views generate only one positive pair. We propose Fast-MoCo - a novel framework that utilizes combinatorial patches to construct multiple positive pairs from two augmented views, which provides abundant supervision signals that bring significant acceleration with neglectable extra computational cost. Fast-MoCo trained with 100 epochs achieves 73.5% linear evaluation accuracy, similar to MoCo v3 (ResNet-50 backbone) trained with 800 epochs. Extra training (200 epochs) further improves the result to 75.1%, which is on par with state-of-the-art methods. Experiments on several downstream tasks also confirm the effectiveness of Fast-MoCo.
summary: Contrastive-based self-supervised learning methods achieved great success in recent years. However, self-supervision requires extremely long training epochs (e.g., 800 epochs for MoCo v3) to achieve promising results, which is unacceptable for the general academic community and hinders the development of this topic. This work revisits the momentum-based contrastive learning frameworks and identifies the inefficiency in which two augmented views generate only one positive pair. We propose Fast-MoCo - a novel framework that utilizes combinatorial patches to construct multiple positive pairs from two augmented views, which provides abundant supervision signals that bring significant acceleration with neglectable extra computational cost. Fast-MoCo trained with 100 epochs achieves 73.5% linear evaluation accuracy, similar to MoCo v3 (ResNet-50 backbone) trained with 800 epochs. Extra training (200 epochs) further improves the result to 75.1%, which is on par with state-of-the-art methods. Experiments on several downstream tasks also confirm the effectiveness of Fast-MoCo.
abstract_zh: 基于对比的自我监督学习方法近年来取得了巨大成功。然而，自我监督需要极长的训练周期（例如MoCo v3需要800个周期）才能取得有希望的结果，这对于一般学术界来说是不可接受的，并阻碍了该主题的发展。这项工作重新审视了基于动量的对比学习框架，并确定了两个增强视图仅生成一对正值的低效率。我们提出了 Fast-MoCo - 一种新颖的框架，利用组合补丁从两个增强视图构建多个正对，它提供了丰富的监督信号，可以在可忽略的额外计算成本下带来显着的加速。经过 100 个 epoch 训练的 Fast-MoCo 达到了 73.5% 的线性评估精度，类似于经过 800 个 epoch 训练的 MoCo v3（ResNet-50 主干网）。额外训练（200 个 epoch）将结果进一步提高到 75.1%，与最先进的方法相当。几个下游任务的实验也证实了 Fast-MoCo 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fast-MoCo框架，通过组合补丁生成多正样本对，加速基于动量的对比学习过程。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法（如MoCo v3）需数百个训练周期才能达到理想效果，训练效率低下，亟需改进。
AI.method: 利用组合补丁技术从两个增强视图中构建多个正样本对，通过增加监督信号提升学习效率，几乎不增加计算成本。
AI.result: 100个周期训练达到73.5%线性评估准确率（与MoCo v3 800周期相当），额外200周期提升至75.1%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Fast-MoCo通过优化正样本对生成机制，显著缩短训练时间，同时保持模型性能，为对比学习提供高效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Fast-MoCo框架，通过组合补丁生成多正样本对，加速基于动量的对比学习过程。
ai_content.motivation: 现有对比学习方法（如MoCo v3）需数百个训练周期才能达到理想效果，训练效率低下，亟需改进。
ai_content.method: 利用组合补丁技术从两个增强视图中构建多个正样本对，通过增加监督信号提升学习效率，几乎不增加计算成本。

search_text: Fast-MoCo: Boost Momentum-based Contrastive Learning with Combinatorial Patches Fast-MoCo：通过组合补丁促进基于动量的对比学习 Contrastive-based self-supervised learning methods achieved great success in recent years. However, self-supervision requires extremely long training epochs (e.g., 800 epochs for MoCo v3) to achieve promising results, which is unacceptable for the general academic community and hinders the development of this topic. This work revisits the momentum-based contrastive learning frameworks and identifies the inefficiency in which two augmented views generate only one positive pair. We propose Fast-MoCo - a novel framework that utilizes combinatorial patches to construct multiple positive pairs from two augmented views, which provides abundant supervision signals that bring significant acceleration with neglectable extra computational cost. Fast-MoCo trained with 100 epochs achieves 73.5% linear evaluation accuracy, similar to MoCo v3 (ResNet-50 backbone) trained with 800 epochs. Extra training (200 epochs) further improves the result to 75.1%, which is on par with state-of-the-art methods. Experiments on several downstream tasks also confirm the effectiveness of Fast-MoCo. 基于对比的自我监督学习方法近年来取得了巨大成功。然而，自我监督需要极长的训练周期（例如MoCo v3需要800个周期）才能取得有希望的结果，这对于一般学术界来说是不可接受的，并阻碍了该主题的发展。这项工作重新审视了基于动量的对比学习框架，并确定了两个增强视图仅生成一对正值的低效率。我们提出了 Fast-MoCo - 一种新颖的框架，利用组合补丁从两个增强视图构建多个正对，它提供了丰富的监督信号，可以在可忽略的额外计算成本下带来显着的加速。经过 100 个 epoch 训练的 Fast-MoCo 达到了 73.5% 的线性评估精度，类似于经过 800 个 epoch 训练的 MoCo v3（ResNet-50 主干网）。额外训练（200 个 epoch）将结果进一步提高到 75.1%，与最先进的方法相当。几个下游任务的实验也证实了 Fast-MoCo 的有效性。 本文提出Fast-MoCo框架，通过组合补丁生成多正样本对，加速基于动量的对比学习过程。 Yuanzheng Ci,Chen Lin,Lei Bai,Wanli Ouyang cs.CV

authors_text: Renbo Su,Yingjun Tian,Mingwei Du,Charlie C. L. Wang
title: Optimizing out-of-plane stiffness for soft grippers
title_zh: 优化软夹具的平面外刚度
abstract: In this paper, we presented a data-driven framework to optimize the out-of-plane stiffness for soft grippers to achieve mechanical properties as hard-to-twist and easy-to-bend. The effectiveness of this method is demonstrated in the design of a soft pneumatic bending actuator (SPBA). First, a new objective function is defined to quantitatively evaluate the out-of-plane stiffness as well as the bending performance. Then, sensitivity analysis is conducted on the parametric model of an SPBA design to determine the optimized design parameters with the help of Finite Element Analysis (FEA). To enable the computation of numerical optimization, a data-driven approach is employed to learn a cost function that directly represents the out-of-plane stiffness as a differentiable function of the design variables. A gradient-based method is used to maximize the out-of-plane stiffness of the SPBA while ensuring specific bending performance. The effectiveness of our method has been demonstrated in physical experiments taken on 3D-printed grippers.
summary: In this paper, we presented a data-driven framework to optimize the out-of-plane stiffness for soft grippers to achieve mechanical properties as hard-to-twist and easy-to-bend. The effectiveness of this method is demonstrated in the design of a soft pneumatic bending actuator (SPBA). First, a new objective function is defined to quantitatively evaluate the out-of-plane stiffness as well as the bending performance. Then, sensitivity analysis is conducted on the parametric model of an SPBA design to determine the optimized design parameters with the help of Finite Element Analysis (FEA). To enable the computation of numerical optimization, a data-driven approach is employed to learn a cost function that directly represents the out-of-plane stiffness as a differentiable function of the design variables. A gradient-based method is used to maximize the out-of-plane stiffness of the SPBA while ensuring specific bending performance. The effectiveness of our method has been demonstrated in physical experiments taken on 3D-printed grippers.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个数据驱动的框架来优化软夹具的面外刚度，以实现难以扭转和易于弯曲的机械性能。该方法的有效性在软气动弯曲执行器（SPBA）的设计中得到了证明。首先，定义了一个新的目标函数来定量评估面外刚度和弯曲性能。然后，借助有限元分析（FEA）对SPBA设计的参数模型进行灵敏度分析，以确定优化的设计参数。为了实现数值优化的计算，采用数据驱动的方法来学习成本函数，该函数直接将平面外刚度表示为设计变量的可微函数。基于梯度的方法用于最大化 SPBA 的面外刚度，同时确保特定的弯曲性能。我们的方法的有效性已在 3D 打印夹具上进行的物理实验得到证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动框架，通过优化软夹爪的平面外刚度，实现机械性能的硬难扭转与易弯曲。
AI.motivation: 传统软夹爪难以平衡平面外刚度与弯曲性能，需通过系统化方法实现机械特性优化。
AI.method: 定义量化目标函数，结合有限元分析进行敏感性分析，利用数据驱动方法构建可微成本函数，并采用梯度优化算法求解。
AI.result: 通过3D打印夹爪的物理实验验证了方法有效性，成功提升平面外刚度并保持弯曲性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为软体机器人设计提供了高效优化方案，可推广至其他柔性机械结构的性能调控。
