authors_text: Shenhan Jia,Yanmei Jiao,Zhuqing Zhang,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang
title: FEJ-VIRO: A Consistent First-Estimate Jacobian Visual-Inertial-Ranging Odometry
title_zh: FEJ-VIRO：一致的第一估计雅可比视觉惯性测距里程计
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, accepted by The 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, accepted by The 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: In recent years, Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) has achieved many significant progresses. However, VIO methods suffer from localization drift over long trajectories. In this paper, we propose a First-Estimates Jacobian Visual-Inertial-Ranging Odometry (FEJ-VIRO) to reduce the localization drifts of VIO by incorporating ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging measurements into the VIO framework \textit{consistently}. Considering that the initial positions of UWB anchors are usually unavailable, we propose a long-short window structure to initialize the UWB anchors' positions as well as the covariance for state augmentation. After initialization, the FEJ-VIRO estimates the UWB anchors' positions simultaneously along with the robot poses. We further analyze the observability of the visual-inertial-ranging estimators and proved that there are \textit{four} unobservable directions in the ideal case, while one of them vanishes in the actual case due to the gain of spurious information. Based on these analyses, we leverage the FEJ technique to enforce the unobservable directions, hence reducing inconsistency of the estimator. Finally, we validate our analysis and evaluate the proposed FEJ-VIRO with both simulation and real-world experiments.
summary: In recent years, Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) has achieved many significant progresses. However, VIO methods suffer from localization drift over long trajectories. In this paper, we propose a First-Estimates Jacobian Visual-Inertial-Ranging Odometry (FEJ-VIRO) to reduce the localization drifts of VIO by incorporating ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging measurements into the VIO framework \textit{consistently}. Considering that the initial positions of UWB anchors are usually unavailable, we propose a long-short window structure to initialize the UWB anchors' positions as well as the covariance for state augmentation. After initialization, the FEJ-VIRO estimates the UWB anchors' positions simultaneously along with the robot poses. We further analyze the observability of the visual-inertial-ranging estimators and proved that there are \textit{four} unobservable directions in the ideal case, while one of them vanishes in the actual case due to the gain of spurious information. Based on these analyses, we leverage the FEJ technique to enforce the unobservable directions, hence reducing inconsistency of the estimator. Finally, we validate our analysis and evaluate the proposed FEJ-VIRO with both simulation and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 近年来，视觉惯性里程计（VIO）取得了许多重大进展。然而，VIO 方法在长轨迹上会出现定位漂移的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种首次估计雅可比视觉惯性测距里程计（FEJ-VIRO），通过将超宽带（UWB）测距测量合并到 VIO 框架\textit{一致}中来减少 VIO 的定位漂移。考虑到UWB锚点的初始位置通常不可用，我们提出了一种长短窗结构来初始化UWB锚点的位置以及状态增强的协方差。初始化后，FEJ-VIRO 同时估计 UWB 锚点的位置和机器人姿态。我们进一步分析了视觉惯性测距估计器的可观察性，并证明在理想情况下有 \textit{4} 个不可观察的方向，而在实际情况下，由于虚假信息的增益，其中一个方向消失了。基于这些分析，我们利用 FEJ 技术来强制执行不可观察的方向，从而减少估计量的不一致。最后，我们通过模拟和实际实验验证了我们的分析并评估了所提出的 FEJ-VIRO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FEJ-VIRO的视觉惯性测距里程计方法，通过一致地融合超宽带（UWB）测距信息来减少视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的定位漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 传统VIO在长轨迹中易出现定位漂移，而UWB测距可提供绝对距离信息，但其锚点初始位置未知且需与VIO框架一致融合，现有方法存在初始化和可观测性挑战。
AI.method: 设计长短期窗口结构初始化UWB锚点位置及协方差，同步估计锚点位置与机器人位姿；分析视觉惯性测距估计器的可观测性，证明存在4个不可观测方向（实际中因冗余信息减少至3个），并利用FEJ技术强制约束不可观测方向以降低估计器不一致性。
AI.result: 通过仿真与真实实验验证，FEJ-VIRO在长轨迹场景下显著优于基线方法，定位精度提升且漂移减少。
AI.conclusion: FEJ-VIRO通过一致融合UWB测距信息与可观测性分析，有效解决了VIO的长期漂移问题，为多源传感器融合里程计提供了新思路。

We further analyze the observability of the visual-inertial-ranging estimators and proved that there are \textit{four} unobservable directions in the ideal case, while one of them vanishes in the actual case due to the gain of spurious information. Based on these analyses, we leverage the FEJ technique to enforce the unobservable directions, hence reducing inconsistency of the estimator. Finally, we validate our analysis and evaluate the proposed FEJ-VIRO with both simulation and real-world experiments. 近年来，视觉惯性里程计（VIO）取得了许多重大进展。然而，VIO 方法在长轨迹上会出现定位漂移的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种首次估计雅可比视觉惯性测距里程计（FEJ-VIRO），通过将超宽带（UWB）测距测量合并到 VIO 框架\textit{一致}中来减少 VIO 的定位漂移。考虑到UWB锚点的初始位置通常不可用，我们提出了一种长短窗结构来初始化UWB锚点的位置以及状态增强的协方差。初始化后，FEJ-VIRO 同时估计 UWB 锚点的位置和机器人姿态。我们进一步分析了视觉惯性测距估计器的可观察性，并证明在理想情况下有 \textit{4} 个不可观察的方向，而在实际情况下，由于虚假信息的增益，其中一个方向消失了。基于这些分析，我们利用 FEJ 技术来强制执行不可观察的方向，从而减少估计量的不一致。最后，我们通过模拟和实际实验验证了我们的分析并评估了所提出的 FEJ-VIRO。 本文提出一种名为FEJ-VIRO的视觉惯性测距里程计方法，通过一致地融合超宽带（UWB）测距信息来减少视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的定位漂移问题。 Shenhan Jia,Yanmei Jiao,Zhuqing Zhang,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Kexin Wang,Zhixu Li,Jiaan Wang,Jianfeng Qu,Ying He,An Liu,Lei Zhao
title: RT-KGD: Relation Transition Aware Knowledge-Grounded Dialogue Generation
title_zh: RT-KGD：关系转换感知知识基础对话生成
abstract: Grounding dialogue system with external knowledge is a promising way to improve the quality of responses. Most existing works adopt knowledge graphs (KGs) as the external resources, paying attention to the contribution of entities in the last utterance of the dialogue for context understanding and response generation. Nevertheless, the correlations between knowledge implied in the multi-turn context and the transition regularities between relations in KGs are under-explored. To this end, we propose a Relation Transition aware Knowledge-Grounded Dialogue Generation model (RT-KGD). Specifically, inspired by the latent logic of human conversation, our model integrates dialogue-level relation transition regularities with turn-level entity semantic information. In this manner, the interaction between knowledge is considered to produce abundant clues for predicting the appropriate knowledge and generating coherent responses. The experimental results on both automatic evaluation and manual evaluation indicate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Grounding dialogue system with external knowledge is a promising way to improve the quality of responses. Most existing works adopt knowledge graphs (KGs) as the external resources, paying attention to the contribution of entities in the last utterance of the dialogue for context understanding and response generation. Nevertheless, the correlations between knowledge implied in the multi-turn context and the transition regularities between relations in KGs are under-explored. To this end, we propose a Relation Transition aware Knowledge-Grounded Dialogue Generation model (RT-KGD). Specifically, inspired by the latent logic of human conversation, our model integrates dialogue-level relation transition regularities with turn-level entity semantic information. In this manner, the interaction between knowledge is considered to produce abundant clues for predicting the appropriate knowledge and generating coherent responses. The experimental results on both automatic evaluation and manual evaluation indicate that our model outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 与外部知识建立基础的对话系统是提高响应质量的一种有前途的方法。大多数现有作品采用知识图谱（KG）作为外部资源，关注实体在对话最后一句话中对上下文理解和响应生成的贡献。然而，多轮上下文中隐含的知识之间的相关性和知识图谱中关系之间的转换规律尚未得到充分探索。为此，我们提出了一种关系转换感知的知识基础对话生成模型（RT-KGD）。具体来说，受人类对话潜在逻辑的启发，我们的模型将对话级关系转换规律与回合级实体语义信息相结合。通过这种方式，知识之间的相互作用被认为可以产生丰富的线索，用于预测适当的知识并生成连贯的响应。自动评估和手动评估的实验结果表明，我们的模型优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合知识图谱中关系转换规律的对话生成模型，以提升基于知识的对话系统响应质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分利用知识图谱中多轮对话的关系转换信息，导致生成的响应可能缺乏连贯性或相关性。
AI.method: 设计RT-KGD模型，通过整合对话级关系转换规律与轮次级实体语义信息，捕捉知识间的交互规律以生成更准确的响应。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在自动评估和人工评估中均优于现有最先进的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 结合关系转换与实体语义的建模方式能有效提升知识引导对话生成效果，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Ke Fan,Yikai Wang,Qian Yu,Da Li,Yanwei Fu
title: A Simple Test-Time Method for Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 一种用于分布外检测的简单测试时间方法
abstract: Neural networks are known to produce over-confident predictions on input images, even when these images are out-of-distribution (OOD) samples. This limits the applications of neural network models in real-world scenarios, where OOD samples exist. Many existing approaches identify the OOD instances via exploiting various cues, such as finding irregular patterns in the feature space, logits space, gradient space or the raw space of images. In contrast, this paper proposes a simple Test-time Linear Training (ETLT) method for OOD detection. Empirically, we find that the probabilities of input images being out-of-distribution are surprisingly linearly correlated to the features extracted by neural networks. To be specific, many state-of-the-art OOD algorithms, although designed to measure reliability in different ways, actually lead to OOD scores mostly linearly related to their image features. Thus, by simply learning a linear regression model trained from the paired image features and inferred OOD scores at test-time, we can make a more precise OOD prediction for the test instances. We further propose an online variant of the proposed method, which achieves promising performance and is more practical in real-world applications. Remarkably, we improve FPR95 from $51.37\%$ to $12.30\%$ on CIFAR-10 datasets with maximum softmax probability as the base OOD detector. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets show the efficacy of ETLT for OOD detection task.
summary: Neural networks are known to produce over-confident predictions on input images, even when these images are out-of-distribution (OOD) samples. This limits the applications of neural network models in real-world scenarios, where OOD samples exist. Many existing approaches identify the OOD instances via exploiting various cues, such as finding irregular patterns in the feature space, logits space, gradient space or the raw space of images. In contrast, this paper proposes a simple Test-time Linear Training (ETLT) method for OOD detection. Empirically, we find that the probabilities of input images being out-of-distribution are surprisingly linearly correlated to the features extracted by neural networks. To be specific, many state-of-the-art OOD algorithms, although designed to measure reliability in different ways, actually lead to OOD scores mostly linearly related to their image features. Thus, by simply learning a linear regression model trained from the paired image features and inferred OOD scores at test-time, we can make a more precise OOD prediction for the test instances. We further propose an online variant of the proposed method, which achieves promising performance and is more practical in real-world applications. Remarkably, we improve FPR95 from $51.37\%$ to $12.30\%$ on CIFAR-10 datasets with maximum softmax probability as the base OOD detector. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets show the efficacy of ETLT for OOD detection task.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，神经网络会对输入图像产生过于自信的预测，即使这些图像是分布外 (OOD) 样本。这限制了神经网络模型在存在 OOD 样本的现实场景中的应用。许多现有方法通过利用各种线索来识别 OOD 实例，例如在特征空间、logits 空间、梯度空间或图像的原始空间中查找不规则模式。相比之下，本文提出了一种用于 OOD 检测的简单测试时间线性训练 (ETLT) 方法。根据经验，我们发现输入图像不分布的概率与神经网络提取的特征惊人地线性相关。具体来说，许多最先进的 OOD 算法虽然旨在以不同的方式衡量可靠性，但实际上导致 OOD 分数大多与其图像特征线性相关。因此，通过简单地学习根据配对图像特征训练的线性回归模型和测试时推断的 OOD 分数，我们可以对测试实例做出更精确的 OOD 预测。我们进一步提出了所提出方法的在线变体，该变体实现了有希望的性能并且在实际应用中更实用。值得注意的是，我们在 CIFAR-10 数据集上将 FPR95 从 $51.37\%$ 提高到 $12.30\%$，并以最大 softmax 概率作为基本 OOD 检测器。对多个基准数据集的大量实验表明了 ETLT 对于 OOD 检测任务的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种测试时线性训练方法（ETLT），用于提升分布外样本（OOD）检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 神经网络对分布外样本的预测过于自信，现有OOD检测方法依赖复杂特征空间分析，而作者发现OOD概率与神经网络特征存在线性关系，从而提出更简单有效的方法。
AI.method: 通过测试时线性回归模型，利用神经网络提取的图像特征与推断的OOD分数之间的线性相关性进行预测，并提出在线变体方法以适应实际应用。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，使用最大softmax概率作为基础检测器时，将FPR95指标从51.37%显著降低至12.30%，并在多个基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ETLT方法通过简单的线性建模显著提升了OOD检测性能，其在线变体在实际应用中更具实用性。

authors_text: Muzaffer Özbey,Onat Dalmaz,Salman UH Dar,Hasan A Bedel,Şaban Özturk,Alper Güngör,Tolga Çukur
title: Unsupervised Medical Image Translation with Adversarial Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用对抗性扩散模型的无监督医学图像翻译
comment: M. Ozbey and O. Dalmaz contributed equally to this study
comments: M. Ozbey and O. Dalmaz contributed equally to this study
abstract: Imputation of missing images via source-to-target modality translation can improve diversity in medical imaging protocols. A pervasive approach for synthesizing target images involves one-shot mapping through generative adversarial networks (GAN). Yet, GAN models that implicitly characterize the image distribution can suffer from limited sample fidelity. Here, we propose a novel method based on adversarial diffusion modeling, SynDiff, for improved performance in medical image translation. To capture a direct correlate of the image distribution, SynDiff leverages a conditional diffusion process that progressively maps noise and source images onto the target image. For fast and accurate image sampling during inference, large diffusion steps are taken with adversarial projections in the reverse diffusion direction. To enable training on unpaired datasets, a cycle-consistent architecture is devised with coupled diffusive and non-diffusive modules that bilaterally translate between two modalities. Extensive assessments are reported on the utility of SynDiff against competing GAN and diffusion models in multi-contrast MRI and MRI-CT translation. Our demonstrations indicate that SynDiff offers quantitatively and qualitatively superior performance against competing baselines.
summary: Imputation of missing images via source-to-target modality translation can improve diversity in medical imaging protocols. A pervasive approach for synthesizing target images involves one-shot mapping through generative adversarial networks (GAN). Yet, GAN models that implicitly characterize the image distribution can suffer from limited sample fidelity. Here, we propose a novel method based on adversarial diffusion modeling, SynDiff, for improved performance in medical image translation. To capture a direct correlate of the image distribution, SynDiff leverages a conditional diffusion process that progressively maps noise and source images onto the target image. For fast and accurate image sampling during inference, large diffusion steps are taken with adversarial projections in the reverse diffusion direction. To enable training on unpaired datasets, a cycle-consistent architecture is devised with coupled diffusive and non-diffusive modules that bilaterally translate between two modalities. Extensive assessments are reported on the utility of SynDiff against competing GAN and diffusion models in multi-contrast MRI and MRI-CT translation. Our demonstrations indicate that SynDiff offers quantitatively and qualitatively superior performance against competing baselines.
abstract_zh: 通过源到目标模态转换对缺失图像进行插补可以提高医学成像协议的多样性。合成目标图像的一种普遍方法涉及通过生成对抗网络（GAN）进行一次性映射。然而，隐式表征图像分布的 GAN 模型可能会受到样本保真度有限的影响。在这里，我们提出了一种基于对抗扩散建模的新方法 SynDiff，以提高医学图像翻译的性能。为了捕获图像分布的直接关联，SynDiff 利用条件扩散过程，逐步将噪声和源图像映射到目标图像上。为了在推理过程中快速准确地进行图像采样，在反向扩散方向上采用对抗性投影进行大的扩散步骤。为了能够对不成对的数据集进行训练，设计了一种循环一致的架构，该架构具有耦合的扩散和非扩散模块，可以在两种模态之间进行双边转换。据报道，对 SynDiff 在多对比 MRI 和 MRI-CT 翻译中相对于竞争性 GAN 和扩散模型的效用进行了广泛的评估。我们的演示表明，与竞争基线相比，SynDiff 在数量和质量上都提供了优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗扩散模型的无监督医学图像翻译方法SynDiff，用于改进医疗影像模态转换任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的单次映射方法在医学图像生成中存在样本保真度不足的问题，需探索更可靠的生成模型以提升跨模态翻译效果。
AI.method: 设计条件扩散过程逐步将噪声和源图像映射到目标图像，结合反向扩散方向的对抗投影实现快速采样，并构建循环一致架构处理无配对数据集。
AI.result: 在多对比度MRI和MRI-CT转换任务中，SynDiff在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于竞争的GAN和扩散模型基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SynDiff通过对抗扩散建模有效解决了医学图像翻译中的分布对齐问题，为无监督跨模态医学影像生成提供了新思路。

search_text: Unsupervised Medical Image Translation with Adversarial Diffusion Models 使用对抗性扩散模型的无监督医学图像翻译 Imputation of missing images via source-to-target modality translation can improve diversity in medical imaging protocols. A pervasive approach for synthesizing target images involves one-shot mapping through generative adversarial networks (GAN). Yet, GAN models that implicitly characterize the image distribution can suffer from limited sample fidelity. Here, we propose a novel method based on adversarial diffusion modeling, SynDiff, for improved performance in medical image translation. To capture a direct correlate of the image distribution, SynDiff leverages a conditional diffusion process that progressively maps noise and source images onto the target image. For fast and accurate image sampling during inference, large diffusion steps are taken with adversarial projections in the reverse diffusion direction. To enable training on unpaired datasets, a cycle-consistent architecture is devised with coupled diffusive and non-diffusive modules that bilaterally translate between two modalities. Extensive assessments are reported on the utility of SynDiff against competing GAN and diffusion models in multi-contrast MRI and MRI-CT translation. Our demonstrations indicate that SynDiff offers quantitatively and qualitatively superior performance against competing baselines. 通过源到目标模态转换对缺失图像进行插补可以提高医学成像协议的多样性。合成目标图像的一种普遍方法涉及通过生成对抗网络（GAN）进行一次性映射。然而，隐式表征图像分布的 GAN 模型可能会受到样本保真度有限的影响。在这里，我们提出了一种基于对抗扩散建模的新方法 SynDiff，以提高医学图像翻译的性能。为了捕获图像分布的直接关联，SynDiff 利用条件扩散过程，逐步将噪声和源图像映射到目标图像上。为了在推理过程中快速准确地进行图像采样，在反向扩散方向上采用对抗性投影进行大的扩散步骤。为了能够对不成对的数据集进行训练，设计了一种循环一致的架构，该架构具有耦合的扩散和非扩散模块，可以在两种模态之间进行双边转换。据报道，对 SynDiff 在多对比 MRI 和 MRI-CT 翻译中相对于竞争性 GAN 和扩散模型的效用进行了广泛的评估。我们的演示表明，与竞争基线相比，SynDiff 在数量和质量上都提供了优越的性能。 本文提出一种基于对抗扩散模型的无监督医学图像翻译方法SynDiff，用于改进医疗影像模态转换任务。 Muzaffer Özbey,Onat Dalmaz,Salman UH Dar,Hasan A Bedel,Şaban Özturk,Alper Güngör,Tolga Çukur eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhihong Zhang,Yuxiao Cheng,Jinli Suo,Liheng Bian,Qionghai Dai
title: INFWIDE: Image and Feature Space Wiener Deconvolution Network for Non-blind Image Deblurring in Low-Light Conditions
title_zh: INFWIDE：用于弱光条件下非盲图像去模糊的图像和特征空间维纳反卷积网络
comment: Accepted by IEEE Trans. Image Process, early access version available at https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10047966
comments: Accepted by IEEE Trans. Image Process, early access version available at https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10047966
abstract: Under low-light environment, handheld photography suffers from severe camera shake under long exposure settings. Although existing deblurring algorithms have shown promising performance on well-exposed blurry images, they still cannot cope with low-light snapshots. Sophisticated noise and saturation regions are two dominating challenges in practical low-light deblurring. In this work, we propose a novel non-blind deblurring method dubbed image and feature space Wiener deconvolution network (INFWIDE) to tackle these problems systematically. In terms of algorithm design, INFWIDE proposes a two-branch architecture, which explicitly removes noise and hallucinates saturated regions in the image space and suppresses ringing artifacts in the feature space, and integrates the two complementary outputs with a subtle multi-scale fusion network for high quality night photograph deblurring. For effective network training, we design a set of loss functions integrating a forward imaging model and backward reconstruction to form a close-loop regularization to secure good convergence of the deep neural network. Further, to optimize INFWIDE's applicability in real low-light conditions, a physical-process-based low-light noise model is employed to synthesize realistic noisy night photographs for model training. Taking advantage of the traditional Wiener deconvolution algorithm's physically driven characteristics and arisen deep neural network's representation ability, INFWIDE can recover fine details while suppressing the unpleasant artifacts during deblurring. Extensive experiments on synthetic data and real data demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed approach.
summary: Under low-light environment, handheld photography suffers from severe camera shake under long exposure settings. Although existing deblurring algorithms have shown promising performance on well-exposed blurry images, they still cannot cope with low-light snapshots. Sophisticated noise and saturation regions are two dominating challenges in practical low-light deblurring. In this work, we propose a novel non-blind deblurring method dubbed image and feature space Wiener deconvolution network (INFWIDE) to tackle these problems systematically. In terms of algorithm design, INFWIDE proposes a two-branch architecture, which explicitly removes noise and hallucinates saturated regions in the image space and suppresses ringing artifacts in the feature space, and integrates the two complementary outputs with a subtle multi-scale fusion network for high quality night photograph deblurring. For effective network training, we design a set of loss functions integrating a forward imaging model and backward reconstruction to form a close-loop regularization to secure good convergence of the deep neural network. Further, to optimize INFWIDE's applicability in real low-light conditions, a physical-process-based low-light noise model is employed to synthesize realistic noisy night photographs for model training. Taking advantage of the traditional Wiener deconvolution algorithm's physically driven characteristics and arisen deep neural network's representation ability, INFWIDE can recover fine details while suppressing the unpleasant artifacts during deblurring. Extensive experiments on synthetic data and real data demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 在低光环境下，手持摄影在长时间曝光设置下会出现严重的相机抖动。尽管现有的去模糊算法在曝光良好的模糊图像上表现出了良好的性能，但它们仍然无法应对低光快照。复杂的噪声和饱和区域是实际低光去模糊中的两个主要挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的非盲去模糊方法，称为图像和特征空间维纳反卷积网络（INFWIDE）来系统地解决这些问题。在算法设计方面，INFWIDE提出了一种双分支架构，它明确地去除图像空间中的噪声和幻觉饱和区域，并抑制特征空间中的振铃伪影，并将两个互补输出与微妙的多尺度融合网络集成，以实现高质量的夜间照片去模糊。为了有效的网络训练，我们设计了一组集成前向成像模型和后向重建的损失函数，形成闭环正则化，以确保深度神经网络的良好收敛。此外，为了优化INFWIDE在真实弱光条件下的适用性，采用基于物理过程的低光噪声模型来合成真实的噪声夜间照片以进行模型训练。利用传统维纳反卷积算法的物理驱动特性和新兴的深度神经网络的表示能力，INFWIDE可以恢复精细细节，同时抑制去模糊过程中令人不快的伪影。对合成数据和真实数据的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为INFWIDE的非盲图像去模糊方法，专门针对低光环境下的图像模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去模糊算法在低光条件下表现不佳，主要受噪声和饱和区域影响，需系统解决这些问题。
AI.method: 设计双分支架构，图像空间处理噪声和饱和区域，特征空间抑制伪影，并通过多尺度融合网络整合结果；结合正向成像模型与反向重建的损失函数，利用物理噪声模型生成训练数据。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上均表现出优越的去模糊性能，有效恢复细节并抑制伪影。
AI.conclusion: INFWIDE通过结合维纳去卷积的物理特性和深度学习的表示能力，成功解决了低光环境下的去模糊挑战。

authors_text: Gianluca Detommaso,Alberto Gasparin,Andrew Wilson,Cedric Archambeau
title: Uncertainty Calibration in Bayesian Neural Networks via Distance-Aware Priors
title_zh: 通过距离感知先验进行贝叶斯神经网络的不确定性校准
abstract: As we move away from the data, the predictive uncertainty should increase, since a great variety of explanations are consistent with the little available information. We introduce Distance-Aware Prior (DAP) calibration, a method to correct overconfidence of Bayesian deep learning models outside of the training domain. We define DAPs as prior distributions over the model parameters that depend on the inputs through a measure of their distance from the training set. DAP calibration is agnostic to the posterior inference method, and it can be performed as a post-processing step. We demonstrate its effectiveness against several baselines in a variety of classification and regression problems, including benchmarks designed to test the quality of predictive distributions away from the data.
summary: As we move away from the data, the predictive uncertainty should increase, since a great variety of explanations are consistent with the little available information. We introduce Distance-Aware Prior (DAP) calibration, a method to correct overconfidence of Bayesian deep learning models outside of the training domain. We define DAPs as prior distributions over the model parameters that depend on the inputs through a measure of their distance from the training set. DAP calibration is agnostic to the posterior inference method, and it can be performed as a post-processing step. We demonstrate its effectiveness against several baselines in a variety of classification and regression problems, including benchmarks designed to test the quality of predictive distributions away from the data.
abstract_zh: 当我们远离数据时，预测的不确定性应该会增加，因为各种各样的解释与很少的可用信息是一致的。我们引入了距离感知先验（DAP）校准，这是一种纠正训练领域之外贝叶斯深度学习模型过度自信的方法。我们将 DAP 定义为模型参数的先验分布，这些参数依赖于输入（通过测量与训练集的距离）。 DAP 校准与后验推理方法无关，并且可以作为后处理步骤执行。我们证明了它在各种分类和回归问题中针对多个基线的有效性，包括旨在测试远离数据的预测分布质量的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过距离感知先验校准贝叶斯神经网络预测不确定性的方法，以修正模型在训练域外的过度自信问题。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯神经网络在远离训练数据的区域容易产生过度自信的预测，而实际应随数据距离增加而提升不确定性，需改进校准方法。
AI.method: 定义距离感知先验（DAP），通过输入与训练集的距离动态调整参数先验分布，且该方法与后验推断方式无关，可作为后处理步骤实现。
AI.result: 在多个分类与回归任务及专门设计的基准测试中，DAP校准方法优于现有基线，有效提升了预测分布的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 距离感知先验校准为贝叶斯神经网络提供了通用且有效的不确定性校准方案，适用于不同后验推断方法并具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过距离感知先验校准贝叶斯神经网络预测不确定性的方法，以修正模型在训练域外的过度自信问题。

search_text: Uncertainty Calibration in Bayesian Neural Networks via Distance-Aware Priors 通过距离感知先验进行贝叶斯神经网络的不确定性校准 As we move away from the data, the predictive uncertainty should increase, since a great variety of explanations are consistent with the little available information. We introduce Distance-Aware Prior (DAP) calibration, a method to correct overconfidence of Bayesian deep learning models outside of the training domain. We define DAPs as prior distributions over the model parameters that depend on the inputs through a measure of their distance from the training set. DAP calibration is agnostic to the posterior inference method, and it can be performed as a post-processing step. We demonstrate its effectiveness against several baselines in a variety of classification and regression problems, including benchmarks designed to test the quality of predictive distributions away from the data. 当我们远离数据时，预测的不确定性应该会增加，因为各种各样的解释与很少的可用信息是一致的。我们引入了距离感知先验（DAP）校准，这是一种纠正训练领域之外贝叶斯深度学习模型过度自信的方法。我们将 DAP 定义为模型参数的先验分布，这些参数依赖于输入（通过测量与训练集的距离）。 DAP 校准与后验推理方法无关，并且可以作为后处理步骤执行。我们证明了它在各种分类和回归问题中针对多个基线的有效性，包括旨在测试远离数据的预测分布质量的基准。 本文提出一种通过距离感知先验校准贝叶斯神经网络预测不确定性的方法，以修正模型在训练域外的过度自信问题。 Gianluca Detommaso,Alberto Gasparin,Andrew Wilson,Cedric Archambeau stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zeyi Liu,Zhenjia Xu,Shuran Song
title: BusyBot: Learning to Interact, Reason, and Plan in a BusyBoard Environment
title_zh: BusyBot：学习在 BusyBoard 环境中交互、推理和计划
abstract: We introduce BusyBoard, a toy-inspired robot learning environment that leverages a diverse set of articulated objects and inter-object functional relations to provide rich visual feedback for robot interactions. Based on this environment, we introduce a learning framework, BusyBot, which allows an agent to jointly acquire three fundamental capabilities (interaction, reasoning, and planning) in an integrated and self-supervised manner. With the rich sensory feedback provided by BusyBoard, BusyBot first learns a policy to efficiently interact with the environment; then with data collected using the policy, BusyBot reasons the inter-object functional relations through a causal discovery network; and finally by combining the learned interaction policy and relation reasoning skill, the agent is able to perform goal-conditioned manipulation tasks. We evaluate BusyBot in both simulated and real-world environments, and validate its generalizability to unseen objects and relations. Video is available at https://youtu.be/EJ98xBJZ9ek.
summary: We introduce BusyBoard, a toy-inspired robot learning environment that leverages a diverse set of articulated objects and inter-object functional relations to provide rich visual feedback for robot interactions. Based on this environment, we introduce a learning framework, BusyBot, which allows an agent to jointly acquire three fundamental capabilities (interaction, reasoning, and planning) in an integrated and self-supervised manner. With the rich sensory feedback provided by BusyBoard, BusyBot first learns a policy to efficiently interact with the environment; then with data collected using the policy, BusyBot reasons the inter-object functional relations through a causal discovery network; and finally by combining the learned interaction policy and relation reasoning skill, the agent is able to perform goal-conditioned manipulation tasks. We evaluate BusyBot in both simulated and real-world environments, and validate its generalizability to unseen objects and relations. Video is available at https://youtu.be/EJ98xBJZ9ek.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 BusyBoard，这是一种受玩具启发的机器人学习环境，它利用一组不同的铰接对象和对象间功能关系为机器人交互提供丰富的视觉反馈。基于这个环境，我们引入了一个学习框架BusyBot，它允许代理以集成和自我监督的方式共同获得三种基本能力（交互、推理和规划）。借助 BusyBoard 提供的丰富感官反馈，BusyBot 首先学习与环境高效交互的策略；然后，利用该策略收集的数据，BusyBot 通过因果发现网络推理对象间的功能关系；最后，通过结合学习到的交互策略和关系推理技能，智能体能够执行目标条件的操纵任务。我们在模拟和现实环境中评估 BusyBot，并验证其对未见过的对象和关系的通用性。视频可在 https://youtu.be/EJ98xBJZ9ek 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BusyBoard环境和BusyBot框架，使机器人能在复杂环境中学习交互、推理与规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人学习方法难以在复杂环境中同时掌握交互、推理和规划能力，需更高效的自监督学习框架。
AI.method: BusyBot分三阶段：1) 学习环境交互策略；2) 通过因果网络推理物体关系；3) 结合策略与推理完成目标任务。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实环境中验证了BusyBot的有效性，可泛化至未见过的物体和关系。
AI.conclusion: BusyBot框架展示了在复杂动态环境中学习多模态技能的潜力，为机器人自主操作提供新思路。

authors_text: Zongze Chen,Wenxia Yang,Xin Li
title: Stroke-Based Autoencoders: Self-Supervised Learners for Efficient Zero-Shot Chinese Character Recognition
title_zh: 基于笔画的自动编码器：用于高效零样本汉字识别的自监督学习器
abstract: Chinese characters carry a wealth of morphological and semantic information; therefore, the semantic enhancement of the morphology of Chinese characters has drawn significant attention. The previous methods were intended to directly extract information from a whole Chinese character image, which usually cannot capture both global and local information simultaneously. In this paper, we develop a stroke-based autoencoder(SAE), to model the sophisticated morphology of Chinese characters with the self-supervised method. Following its canonical writing order, we first represent a Chinese character as a series of stroke images with a fixed writing order, and then our SAE model is trained to reconstruct this stroke image sequence. This pre-trained SAE model can predict the stroke image series for unseen characters, as long as their strokes or radicals appeared in the training set. We have designed two contrasting SAE architectures on different forms of stroke images. One is fine-tuned on existing stroke-based method for zero-shot recognition of handwritten Chinese characters, and the other is applied to enrich the Chinese word embeddings from their morphological features. The experimental results validate that after pre-training, our SAE architecture outperforms other existing methods in zero-shot recognition and enhances the representation of Chinese characters with their abundant morphological and semantic information.
summary: Chinese characters carry a wealth of morphological and semantic information; therefore, the semantic enhancement of the morphology of Chinese characters has drawn significant attention. The previous methods were intended to directly extract information from a whole Chinese character image, which usually cannot capture both global and local information simultaneously. In this paper, we develop a stroke-based autoencoder(SAE), to model the sophisticated morphology of Chinese characters with the self-supervised method. Following its canonical writing order, we first represent a Chinese character as a series of stroke images with a fixed writing order, and then our SAE model is trained to reconstruct this stroke image sequence. This pre-trained SAE model can predict the stroke image series for unseen characters, as long as their strokes or radicals appeared in the training set. We have designed two contrasting SAE architectures on different forms of stroke images. One is fine-tuned on existing stroke-based method for zero-shot recognition of handwritten Chinese characters, and the other is applied to enrich the Chinese word embeddings from their morphological features. The experimental results validate that after pre-training, our SAE architecture outperforms other existing methods in zero-shot recognition and enhances the representation of Chinese characters with their abundant morphological and semantic information.
abstract_zh: 汉字承载着丰富的形态和语义信息；因此，汉字形态的语义增强引起了人们的广泛关注。以前的方法旨在直接从整个汉字图像中提取信息，通常无法同时捕获全局信息和局部信息。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于笔画的自动编码器（SAE），通过自监督方法对汉字的复杂形态进行建模。按照其规范的书写顺序，我们首先将汉字表示为一系列具有固定书写顺序的笔画图像，然后训练我们的 SAE 模型来重建该笔画图像序列。这个预训练的 SAE 模型可以预测未见过的字符的笔画图像系列，只要它们的笔画或部首出现在训练集中。我们在不同形式的笔画图像上设计了两种对比鲜明的 SAE 架构。一种是对现有的基于笔画的手写汉字零样本识别方法进行微调，另一种是从形态特征出发丰富中文词嵌入。实验结果验证了经过预训练后，我们的 SAE 架构在零样本识别方面优于其他现有方法，并以其丰富的形态和语义信息增强了汉字的表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于笔画的自编码器（SAE），通过自监督学习实现高效的零样本汉字识别。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以同时捕捉汉字的全局和局部信息，而汉字的笔画和部首蕴含丰富的形态与语义信息，需通过结构化建模提升识别效果。
AI.method: 按书写顺序将汉字表示为固定顺序的笔画图像序列，训练SAE模型重构该序列。设计两种架构：一种用于零样本手写汉字识别，另一种用于增强汉字词嵌入的形态特征。
AI.result: 预训练后的SAE在零样本识别任务中优于现有方法，并通过形态语义信息提升了汉字表示效果。
AI.conclusion: 基于笔画的自编码器能有效建模汉字结构，为零样本识别和语义增强提供了新思路。

The experimental results validate that after pre-training, our SAE architecture outperforms other existing methods in zero-shot recognition and enhances the representation of Chinese characters with their abundant morphological and semantic information. 汉字承载着丰富的形态和语义信息；因此，汉字形态的语义增强引起了人们的广泛关注。以前的方法旨在直接从整个汉字图像中提取信息，通常无法同时捕获全局信息和局部信息。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于笔画的自动编码器（SAE），通过自监督方法对汉字的复杂形态进行建模。按照其规范的书写顺序，我们首先将汉字表示为一系列具有固定书写顺序的笔画图像，然后训练我们的 SAE 模型来重建该笔画图像序列。这个预训练的 SAE 模型可以预测未见过的字符的笔画图像系列，只要它们的笔画或部首出现在训练集中。我们在不同形式的笔画图像上设计了两种对比鲜明的 SAE 架构。一种是对现有的基于笔画的手写汉字零样本识别方法进行微调，另一种是从形态特征出发丰富中文词嵌入。实验结果验证了经过预训练后，我们的 SAE 架构在零样本识别方面优于其他现有方法，并以其丰富的形态和语义信息增强了汉字的表示。 本文提出了一种基于笔画的自编码器（SAE），通过自监督学习实现高效的零样本汉字识别。 Zongze Chen,Wenxia Yang,Xin Li cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sannara Ek,Romain Rombourg,François Portet,Philippe Lalanda
title: Federated Self-Supervised Learning in Heterogeneous Settings: Limits of a Baseline Approach on HAR
title_zh: 异构环境中的联合自监督学习：HAR 基线方法的局限性
comment: S. Ek, R. Rombourg, F. Portet and P. Lalanda, "Federated Self-Supervised Learning in Heterogeneous Settings: Limits of a Baseline Approach on HAR," 2022 IEEE International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications Workshops and other Affiliated Events (PerCom Workshops), 2022, pp. 557-562
comments: S. Ek, R. Rombourg, F. Portet and P. Lalanda, "Federated Self-Supervised Learning in Heterogeneous Settings: Limits of a Baseline Approach on HAR," 2022 IEEE International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications Workshops and other Affiliated Events (PerCom Workshops), 2022, pp. 557-562
abstract: Federated Learning is a new machine learning paradigm dealing with distributed model learning on independent devices. One of the many advantages of federated learning is that training data stay on devices (such as smartphones), and only learned models are shared with a centralized server. In the case of supervised learning, labeling is entrusted to the clients. However, acquiring such labels can be prohibitively expensive and error-prone for many tasks, such as human activity recognition. Hence, a wealth of data remains unlabelled and unexploited. Most existing federated learning approaches that focus mainly on supervised learning have mostly ignored this mass of unlabelled data. Furthermore, it is unclear whether standard federated Learning approaches are suited to self-supervised learning. The few studies that have dealt with the problem have limited themselves to the favorable situation of homogeneous datasets. This work lays the groundwork for a reference evaluation of federated Learning with Semi-Supervised Learning in a realistic setting. We show that standard lightweight autoencoder and standard Federated Averaging fail to learn a robust representation for Human Activity Recognition with several realistic heterogeneous datasets. These findings advocate for a more intensive research effort in Federated Self Supervised Learning to exploit the mass of heterogeneous unlabelled data present on mobile devices.

abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种新的机器学习范式，处理独立设备上的分布式模型学习。联邦学习的众多优点之一是训练数据保留在设备（例如智能手机）上，并且只有学习到的模型才会与集中式服务器共享。在监督学习的情况下，标签被委托给客户。然而，对于许多任务（例如人类活动识别）来说，获取此类标签可能非常昂贵且容易出错。因此，大量数据仍未被标记和未被利用。大多数主要关注监督学习的现有联邦学习方法大多忽略了大量未标记的数据。此外，尚不清楚标准联邦学习方法是否适合自我监督学习。处理该问题的少数研究仅限于同质数据集的有利情况。这项工作为现实环境中半监督学习联邦学习的参考评估奠定了基础。我们表明，标准轻量级自动编码器和标准联合平均无法通过几个现实的异构数据集学习人类活动识别的鲁棒表示。这些发现主张在联合自监督学习方面进行更深入的研究，以利用移动设备上存在的大量异构未标记数据。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了联邦自监督学习在异构环境下的有效性，特别是在人类活动识别（HAR）任务中，评估了基线方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖标注数据，但标注成本高且易出错，尤其在HAR等任务中存在大量未标注数据未被利用。现有方法多针对同构数据，未解决异构环境下自监督学习的挑战。
AI.method: 作者在真实异构数据集上测试了标准轻量级自编码器与联邦平均算法，评估其在HAR任务中的表征学习能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，标准方法在多个异构数据集上无法学习到稳健的HAR表征，凸显了当前基线方法的不足。
AI.conclusion: 需加强联邦自监督学习研究，以充分利用移动设备上的异构未标注数据，现有方法需改进以适应现实场景。

authors_text: Lei Zhang,Yuxuan Sun,Wei Wei
title: Mind the Gap: Polishing Pseudo labels for Accurate Semi-supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 注意差距：完善伪标签以实现准确的半监督对象检测
comment: Accepted by Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2023)
comments: Accepted by Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2023)
abstract: Exploiting pseudo labels (e.g., categories and bounding boxes) of unannotated objects produced by a teacher detector have underpinned much of recent progress in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). However, due to the limited generalization capacity of the teacher detector caused by the scarce annotations, the produced pseudo labels often deviate from ground truth, especially those with relatively low classification confidences, thus limiting the generalization performance of SSOD. To mitigate this problem, we propose a dual pseudo-label polishing framework for SSOD. Instead of directly exploiting the pseudo labels produced by the teacher detector, we take the first attempt at reducing their deviation from ground truth using dual polishing learning, where two differently structured polishing networks are elaborately developed and trained using synthesized paired pseudo labels and the corresponding ground truth for categories and bounding boxes on the given annotated objects, respectively. By doing this, both polishing networks can infer more accurate pseudo labels for unannotated objects through sufficiently exploiting their context knowledge based on the initially produced pseudo labels, and thus improve the generalization performance of SSOD. Moreover, such a scheme can be seamlessly plugged into the existing SSOD framework for joint end-to-end learning. In addition, we propose to disentangle the polished pseudo categories and bounding boxes of unannotated objects for separate category classification and bounding box regression in SSOD, which enables introducing more unannotated objects during model training and thus further improve the performance. Experiments on both PASCAL VOC and MS COCO benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over existing state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Exploiting pseudo labels (e.g., categories and bounding boxes) of unannotated objects produced by a teacher detector have underpinned much of recent progress in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD). However, due to the limited generalization capacity of the teacher detector caused by the scarce annotations, the produced pseudo labels often deviate from ground truth, especially those with relatively low classification confidences, thus limiting the generalization performance of SSOD. To mitigate this problem, we propose a dual pseudo-label polishing framework for SSOD. Instead of directly exploiting the pseudo labels produced by the teacher detector, we take the first attempt at reducing their deviation from ground truth using dual polishing learning, where two differently structured polishing networks are elaborately developed and trained using synthesized paired pseudo labels and the corresponding ground truth for categories and bounding boxes on the given annotated objects, respectively. By doing this, both polishing networks can infer more accurate pseudo labels for unannotated objects through sufficiently exploiting their context knowledge based on the initially produced pseudo labels, and thus improve the generalization performance of SSOD. Moreover, such a scheme can be seamlessly plugged into the existing SSOD framework for joint end-to-end learning. In addition, we propose to disentangle the polished pseudo categories and bounding boxes of unannotated objects for separate category classification and bounding box regression in SSOD, which enables introducing more unannotated objects during model training and thus further improve the performance. Experiments on both PASCAL VOC and MS COCO benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over existing state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 利用教师检测器生成的未注释对象的伪标签（例如类别和边界框）支撑了半监督对象检测（SSOD）的最新进展。然而，由于注释稀缺导致教师检测器的泛化能力有限，产生的伪标签经常偏离真实值，尤其是那些分类置信度相对较低的伪标签，从而限制了SSOD的泛化性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种用于 SSOD 的双伪标签抛光框架。我们没有直接利用教师检测器产生的伪标签，而是首先尝试使用双重抛光学习来减少它们与地面实况的偏差，其中分别使用合成的成对伪标签和给定注释对象上的类别和边界框的相应地面实况精心开发和训练两个不同结构的抛光网络。通过这样做，两个抛光网络都可以通过基于最初产生的伪标签充分利用其上下文知识，为未注释的对象推断出更准确的伪标签，从而提高 SSOD 的泛化性能。此外，这样的方案可以无缝地插入现有的SSOD框架中，以进行端到端的联合学习。此外，我们建议在 SSOD 中解开未标注对象的抛光伪类别和边界框，以进行单独的类别分类和边界框回归，这使得能够在模型训练期间引入更多未标注对象，从而进一步提高性能。 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 基准的实验证明了所提出的方法相对于现有最先进基准的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双伪标签抛光框架，用于改进半监督目标检测中伪标签的准确性，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测依赖教师检测器生成的伪标签，但因标注数据有限，伪标签常偏离真实值，尤其在低置信度情况下，限制了模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计双结构抛光网络，分别利用合成伪标签与真实标注进行训练，通过上下文知识推断更准确的伪标签，并分离类别和边界框的优化过程以增强模型学习。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO基准测试中，该方法优于现有最先进的半监督目标检测基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 双伪标签抛光框架有效减少了伪标签偏差，提升了半监督目标检测的准确性，且可无缝集成到现有框架中。

Experiments on both PASCAL VOC and MS COCO benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over existing state-of-the-art baselines. 利用教师检测器生成的未注释对象的伪标签（例如类别和边界框）支撑了半监督对象检测（SSOD）的最新进展。然而，由于注释稀缺导致教师检测器的泛化能力有限，产生的伪标签经常偏离真实值，尤其是那些分类置信度相对较低的伪标签，从而限制了SSOD的泛化性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种用于 SSOD 的双伪标签抛光框架。我们没有直接利用教师检测器产生的伪标签，而是首先尝试使用双重抛光学习来减少它们与地面实况的偏差，其中分别使用合成的成对伪标签和给定注释对象上的类别和边界框的相应地面实况精心开发和训练两个不同结构的抛光网络。通过这样做，两个抛光网络都可以通过基于最初产生的伪标签充分利用其上下文知识，为未注释的对象推断出更准确的伪标签，从而提高 SSOD 的泛化性能。此外，这样的方案可以无缝地插入现有的SSOD框架中，以进行端到端的联合学习。此外，我们建议在 SSOD 中解开未标注对象的抛光伪类别和边界框，以进行单独的类别分类和边界框回归，这使得能够在模型训练期间引入更多未标注对象，从而进一步提高性能。 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 基准的实验证明了所提出的方法相对于现有最先进基准的优越性。 本文提出一种双伪标签抛光框架，用于改进半监督目标检测中伪标签的准确性，以提升模型性能。 Lei Zhang,Yuxuan Sun,Wei Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Sauradip Nag,Xiatian Zhu,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang
title: Zero-Shot Temporal Action Detection via Vision-Language Prompting
title_zh: 通过视觉语言提示进行零样本时间动作检测
abstract: Existing temporal action detection (TAD) methods rely on large training data including segment-level annotations, limited to recognizing previously seen classes alone during inference. Collecting and annotating a large training set for each class of interest is costly and hence unscalable. Zero-shot TAD (ZS-TAD) resolves this obstacle by enabling a pre-trained model to recognize any unseen action classes. Meanwhile, ZS-TAD is also much more challenging with significantly less investigation. Inspired by the success of zero-shot image classification aided by vision-language (ViL) models such as CLIP, we aim to tackle the more complex TAD task. An intuitive method is to integrate an off-the-shelf proposal detector with CLIP style classification. However, due to the sequential localization (e.g, proposal generation) and classification design, it is prone to localization error propagation. To overcome this problem, in this paper we propose a novel zero-Shot Temporal Action detection model via Vision-LanguagE prompting (STALE). Such a novel design effectively eliminates the dependence between localization and classification by breaking the route for error propagation in-between. We further introduce an interaction mechanism between classification and localization for improved optimization. Extensive experiments on standard ZS-TAD video benchmarks show that our STALE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives. Besides, our model also yields superior results on supervised TAD over recent strong competitors. The PyTorch implementation of STALE is available at https://github.com/sauradip/STALE.
summary: Existing temporal action detection (TAD) methods rely on large training data including segment-level annotations, limited to recognizing previously seen classes alone during inference. Collecting and annotating a large training set for each class of interest is costly and hence unscalable. Zero-shot TAD (ZS-TAD) resolves this obstacle by enabling a pre-trained model to recognize any unseen action classes. Meanwhile, ZS-TAD is also much more challenging with significantly less investigation. Inspired by the success of zero-shot image classification aided by vision-language (ViL) models such as CLIP, we aim to tackle the more complex TAD task. An intuitive method is to integrate an off-the-shelf proposal detector with CLIP style classification. However, due to the sequential localization (e.g, proposal generation) and classification design, it is prone to localization error propagation. To overcome this problem, in this paper we propose a novel zero-Shot Temporal Action detection model via Vision-LanguagE prompting (STALE). Such a novel design effectively eliminates the dependence between localization and classification by breaking the route for error propagation in-between. We further introduce an interaction mechanism between classification and localization for improved optimization. Extensive experiments on standard ZS-TAD video benchmarks show that our STALE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives. Besides, our model also yields superior results on supervised TAD over recent strong competitors. The PyTorch implementation of STALE is available at https://github.com/sauradip/STALE.
abstract_zh: 现有的时间动作检测（TAD）方法依赖于包括分段级注释在内的大量训练数据，仅限于在推理过程中仅识别先前看到的类。为每个感兴趣的类别收集和注释大型训练集成本高昂，因此无法扩展。零样本 TAD (ZS-TAD) 通过使预训练模型能够识别任何看不见的动作类别来解决这一障碍。同时，ZS-TAD 也更具挑战性，调查量也少得多。受到 CLIP 等视觉语言 (ViL) 模型辅助的零样本图像分类成功的启发，我们的目标是解决更复杂的 TAD 任务。一种直观的方法是将现成的提议检测器与 CLIP 风格分类集成。然而，由于顺序定位（例如提案生成）和分类设计，很容易出现定位错误传播。为了克服这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种通过视觉语言提示（STALE）的新型零镜头时间动作检测模型。这种新颖的设计通过打破定位和分类之间的错误传播路径，有效地消除了定位和分类之间的依赖性。我们进一步引入分类和本地化之间的交互机制以改进优化。对标准 ZS-TAD 视频基准的大量实验表明，我们的 STALE 明显优于最先进的替代方案。此外，我们的模型在监督 TAD 上也比最近的强大竞争对手产生了更好的结果。 STALE 的 PyTorch 实现可在 https://github.com/sauradip/STALE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉-语言提示的零样本时序动作检测模型STALE，旨在无需标注数据即可识别未见过的动作类别。
AI.motivation: 现有时序动作检测方法依赖大量标注数据，难以扩展至新类别。零样本检测虽可解决此问题，但因定位与分类的误差传播问题研究不足，亟需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计STALE模型，通过视觉-语言提示打破定位与分类的依赖关系，消除误差传播路径，并引入分类与定位的交互机制优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在标准零样本时序动作检测基准测试中，STALE显著优于现有方法，同时在监督式时序动作检测任务中也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: STALE通过解耦定位与分类流程并增强二者交互，有效解决了零样本时序动作检测中的误差传播问题，为该领域提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Anastasiia Usmanova,François Portet,Philippe Lalanda,German Vega
title: Federated Continual Learning through distillation in pervasive computing
title_zh: 通过普适计算中的蒸馏进行联合持续学习
comment: Anastasiia Usmanova, François Portet, Philippe Lalanda and German Vega. Federated Continual Learning through distillation in pervasive computing (short paper), SMARTCOMP2022, Espoo, Finland, June 20-24, 2022
comments: Anastasiia Usmanova, François Portet, Philippe Lalanda and German Vega. Federated Continual Learning through distillation in pervasive computing (short paper), SMARTCOMP2022, Espoo, Finland, June 20-24, 2022
abstract: Federated Learning has been introduced as a new machine learning paradigm enhancing the use of local devices. At a server level, FL regularly aggregates models learned locally on distributed clients to obtain a more general model. Current solutions rely on the availability of large amounts of stored data at the client side in order to fine-tune the models sent by the server. Such setting is not realistic in mobile pervasive computing where data storage must be kept low and data characteristic can change dramatically. To account for this variability, a solution is to use the data regularly collected by the client to progressively adapt the received model. But such naive approach exposes clients to the well-known problem of catastrophic forgetting. To address this problem, we have defined a Federated Continual Learning approach which is mainly based on distillation. Our approach allows a better use of resources, eliminating the need to retrain from scratch at the arrival of new data and reducing memory usage by limiting the amount of data to be stored. This proposal has been evaluated in the Human Activity Recognition (HAR) domain and has shown to effectively reduce the catastrophic forgetting effect.
summary: Federated Learning has been introduced as a new machine learning paradigm enhancing the use of local devices. At a server level, FL regularly aggregates models learned locally on distributed clients to obtain a more general model. Current solutions rely on the availability of large amounts of stored data at the client side in order to fine-tune the models sent by the server. Such setting is not realistic in mobile pervasive computing where data storage must be kept low and data characteristic can change dramatically. To account for this variability, a solution is to use the data regularly collected by the client to progressively adapt the received model. But such naive approach exposes clients to the well-known problem of catastrophic forgetting. To address this problem, we have defined a Federated Continual Learning approach which is mainly based on distillation. Our approach allows a better use of resources, eliminating the need to retrain from scratch at the arrival of new data and reducing memory usage by limiting the amount of data to be stored. This proposal has been evaluated in the Human Activity Recognition (HAR) domain and has shown to effectively reduce the catastrophic forgetting effect.
abstract_zh: 联合学习作为一种新的机器学习范例被引入，增强了本地设备的使用。在服务器层面，FL定期聚合分布式客户端本地学习到的模型，以获得更通用的模型。当前的解决方案依赖于客户端存储的大量数据的可用性，以便微调服务器发送的模型。这种设置在移动普适计算中是不现实的，因为移动普适计算必须保持较低的数据存储量，并且数据特性可能会发生巨大变化。为了解决这种可变性，解决方案是使用客户定期收集的数据来逐步调整接收到的模型。但这种幼稚的方法会让客户面临众所周知的灾难性遗忘问题。为了解决这个问题，我们定义了一种主要基于蒸馏的联邦持续学习方法。我们的方法可以更好地利用资源，无需在新数据到达时从头开始重新训练，并通过限制要存储的数据量来减少内存使用。该提案已在人类活动识别（HAR）领域进行了评估，并被证明可以有效减少灾难性遗忘效应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的联邦持续学习方法，以解决移动普适计算环境中因数据存储受限和数据特性变化导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖客户端的大量存储数据进行模型微调，但普适计算场景中设备存储有限且数据动态变化，导致模型更新时易出现灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 通过知识蒸馏技术，利用客户端定期收集的数据逐步适应服务器下发的模型，避免从头训练并减少存储需求。
AI.result: 在人类活动识别（HAR）领域实验表明，该方法有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法优化了资源利用，降低了存储需求，为普适计算环境下的联邦持续学习提供了可行方案。

To address this problem, we have defined a Federated Continual Learning approach which is mainly based on distillation. Our approach allows a better use of resources, eliminating the need to retrain from scratch at the arrival of new data and reducing memory usage by limiting the amount of data to be stored. This proposal has been evaluated in the Human Activity Recognition (HAR) domain and has shown to effectively reduce the catastrophic forgetting effect. 联合学习作为一种新的机器学习范例被引入，增强了本地设备的使用。在服务器层面，FL定期聚合分布式客户端本地学习到的模型，以获得更通用的模型。当前的解决方案依赖于客户端存储的大量数据的可用性，以便微调服务器发送的模型。这种设置在移动普适计算中是不现实的，因为移动普适计算必须保持较低的数据存储量，并且数据特性可能会发生巨大变化。为了解决这种可变性，解决方案是使用客户定期收集的数据来逐步调整接收到的模型。但这种幼稚的方法会让客户面临众所周知的灾难性遗忘问题。为了解决这个问题，我们定义了一种主要基于蒸馏的联邦持续学习方法。我们的方法可以更好地利用资源，无需在新数据到达时从头开始重新训练，并通过限制要存储的数据量来减少内存使用。该提案已在人类活动识别（HAR）领域进行了评估，并被证明可以有效减少灾难性遗忘效应。 本文提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的联邦持续学习方法，以解决移动普适计算环境中因数据存储受限和数据特性变化导致的灾难性遗忘问题。 Anastasiia Usmanova,François Portet,Philippe Lalanda,German Vega cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Anastasiia Usmanova,François Portet,Philippe Lalanda,German Vega
title: Federated Learning and catastrophic forgetting in pervasive computing: demonstration in HAR domain
title_zh: 普适计算中的联邦学习和灾难性遗忘：HAR 领域的演示
comment: A. Usmanova, F. Portet, P. Lalanda and G. Vega, "Federated Learning and catastrophic forgetting in pervasive computing: demonstration in HAR domain," 2022 IEEE International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications Workshops and other Affiliated Events (PerCom Workshops), 2022, pp. 310-315
comments: A. Usmanova, F. Portet, P. Lalanda and G. Vega, "Federated Learning and catastrophic forgetting in pervasive computing: demonstration in HAR domain," 2022 IEEE International Conference on Pervasive Computing and Communications Workshops and other Affiliated Events (PerCom Workshops), 2022, pp. 310-315
abstract: Federated Learning has been introduced as a new machine learning paradigm enhancing the use of local devices. At a server level, FL regularly aggregates models learned locally on distributed clients to obtain a more general model. In this way, no private data is sent over the network, and the communication cost is reduced. However, current solutions rely on the availability of large amounts of stored data at the client side in order to fine-tune the models sent by the server. Such setting is not realistic in mobile pervasive computing where data storage must be kept low and data characteristic (distribution) can change dramatically. To account for this variability, a solution is to use the data regularly collected by the client to progressively adapt the received model. But such naive approach exposes clients to the well-known problem of catastrophic forgetting. The purpose of this paper is to demonstrate this problem in the mobile human activity recognition context on smartphones.
summary: Federated Learning has been introduced as a new machine learning paradigm enhancing the use of local devices. At a server level, FL regularly aggregates models learned locally on distributed clients to obtain a more general model. In this way, no private data is sent over the network, and the communication cost is reduced. However, current solutions rely on the availability of large amounts of stored data at the client side in order to fine-tune the models sent by the server. Such setting is not realistic in mobile pervasive computing where data storage must be kept low and data characteristic (distribution) can change dramatically. To account for this variability, a solution is to use the data regularly collected by the client to progressively adapt the received model. But such naive approach exposes clients to the well-known problem of catastrophic forgetting. The purpose of this paper is to demonstrate this problem in the mobile human activity recognition context on smartphones.
abstract_zh: 联合学习作为一种新的机器学习范例被引入，增强了本地设备的使用。在服务器层面，FL定期聚合分布式客户端本地学习到的模型，以获得更通用的模型。这样，网络上就不会发送私人数据，降低了通信成本。然而，当前的解决方案依赖于客户端大量存储数据的可用性，以便微调服务器发送的模型。这种设置在移动普适计算中是不现实的，因为移动普适计算必须保持低数据存储并且数据特征（分布）可能发生巨大变化。为了解决这种可变性，解决方案是使用客户定期收集的数据来逐步调整接收到的模型。但这种幼稚的方法会让客户面临众所周知的灾难性遗忘问题。本文的目的是在智能手机上的移动人类活动识别环境中演示这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在演示联邦学习在移动设备人类活动识别（HAR）场景中因数据分布变化和存储限制导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方案依赖客户端存储大量数据进行模型微调，但移动普适计算环境面临存储受限和动态数据分布挑战，需解决模型适应性与灾难性遗忘矛盾。
AI.method: 通过联邦学习框架，在智能手机HAR任务中使用持续收集的本地数据逐步调整全局模型，验证灾难性遗忘现象的出现机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，直接使用增量数据微调模型会导致已学活动模式的性能显著下降，验证了灾难性遗忘在移动HAR场景中的实际影响。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习在动态数据分布的移动计算场景中需引入抗遗忘机制，以平衡模型适应性与隐私保护需求。

authors_text: Thierry Desot,François Portet,Michel Vacher
title: End-to-End Spoken Language Understanding: Performance analyses of a voice command task in a low resource setting
title_zh: 端到端口语理解：低资源环境下语音命令任务的性能分析
comment: Thierry Desot, François Portet, Michel Vacher, End-to-End Spoken Language Understanding: Performance analyses of a voice command task in a low resource setting, Computer Speech & Language, Volume 75, 2022
comments: Thierry Desot, François Portet, Michel Vacher, End-to-End Spoken Language Understanding: Performance analyses of a voice command task in a low resource setting, Computer Speech & Language, Volume 75, 2022
abstract: Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) is a core task in most human-machine interaction systems. With the emergence of smart homes, smart phones and smart speakers, SLU has become a key technology for the industry. In a classical SLU approach, an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) module transcribes the speech signal into a textual representation from which a Natural Language Understanding (NLU) module extracts semantic information. Recently End-to-End SLU (E2E SLU) based on Deep Neural Networks has gained momentum since it benefits from the joint optimization of the ASR and the NLU parts, hence limiting the cascade of error effect of the pipeline architecture. However, little is known about the actual linguistic properties used by E2E models to predict concepts and intents from speech input. In this paper, we present a study identifying the signal features and other linguistic properties used by an E2E model to perform the SLU task. The study is carried out in the application domain of a smart home that has to handle non-English (here French) voice commands. The results show that a good E2E SLU performance does not always require a perfect ASR capability. Furthermore, the results show the superior capabilities of the E2E model in handling background noise and syntactic variation compared to the pipeline model. Finally, a finer-grained analysis suggests that the E2E model uses the pitch information of the input signal to identify voice command concepts. The results and methodology outlined in this paper provide a springboard for further analyses of E2E models in speech processing.
summary: Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) is a core task in most human-machine interaction systems. With the emergence of smart homes, smart phones and smart speakers, SLU has become a key technology for the industry. In a classical SLU approach, an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) module transcribes the speech signal into a textual representation from which a Natural Language Understanding (NLU) module extracts semantic information. Recently End-to-End SLU (E2E SLU) based on Deep Neural Networks has gained momentum since it benefits from the joint optimization of the ASR and the NLU parts, hence limiting the cascade of error effect of the pipeline architecture. However, little is known about the actual linguistic properties used by E2E models to predict concepts and intents from speech input. In this paper, we present a study identifying the signal features and other linguistic properties used by an E2E model to perform the SLU task. The study is carried out in the application domain of a smart home that has to handle non-English (here French) voice commands. The results show that a good E2E SLU performance does not always require a perfect ASR capability. Furthermore, the results show the superior capabilities of the E2E model in handling background noise and syntactic variation compared to the pipeline model. Finally, a finer-grained analysis suggests that the E2E model uses the pitch information of the input signal to identify voice command concepts. The results and methodology outlined in this paper provide a springboard for further analyses of E2E models in speech processing.
abstract_zh: 口语理解（SLU）是大多数人机交互系统的核心任务。随着智能家居、智能手机和智能音箱的出现，SLU已成为行业的关键技术。在经典的 SLU 方法中，自动语音识别 (ASR) 模块将语音信号转录为文本表示，自然语言理解 (NLU) 模块从中提取语义信息。最近，基于深度神经网络的端到端SLU（E2E SLU）获得了发展势头，因为它受益于ASR和NLU部分的联合优化，从而限制了管道架构的级联错误效应。然而，人们对 E2E 模型用于根据语音输入预测概念和意图的实际语言属性知之甚少。在本文中，我们提出了一项研究，识别 E2E 模型用于执行 SLU 任务的信号特征和其他语言属性。该研究是在必须处理非英语（此处为法语）语音命令的智能家居应用领域中进行的。结果表明，良好的E2E SLU性能并不总是需要完美的ASR能力。此外，结果表明，与管道模型相比，E2E 模型在处理背景噪声和句法变化方面具有卓越的能力。最后，更细粒度的分析表明，E2E 模型使用输入信号的音调信息来识别语音命令概念。本文概述的结果和方法为进一步分析语音处理中的端到端模型提供了一个跳板。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了端到端语音语义理解（E2E SLU）在低资源环境下的性能，特别是在处理非英语（法语）语音指令时的信号特征和语言属性。
AI.motivation: 传统SLU系统依赖ASR和NLU模块的级联，存在误差累积问题。E2E SLU通过联合优化可能更高效，但其具体语言特性尚不明确，尤其在低资源和非英语场景中。
AI.method: 通过分析智能家庭场景中的法语语音指令，研究E2E模型使用的信号特征（如音高）和语言属性，对比其与传统流水线模型在噪声和语法变化下的表现。
AI.result: E2E模型无需完美ASR即可实现良好性能，且在噪声和语法变化处理上优于流水线模型；模型利用输入信号的音高信息识别语音指令概念。
AI.conclusion: E2E SLU在低资源环境下表现优异，尤其擅长处理噪声和语法变化，其性能不完全依赖ASR精度，为后续研究提供了方法论基础。

Furthermore, the results show the superior capabilities of the E2E model in handling background noise and syntactic variation compared to the pipeline model. Finally, a finer-grained analysis suggests that the E2E model uses the pitch information of the input signal to identify voice command concepts. The results and methodology outlined in this paper provide a springboard for further analyses of E2E models in speech processing. 口语理解（SLU）是大多数人机交互系统的核心任务。随着智能家居、智能手机和智能音箱的出现，SLU已成为行业的关键技术。在经典的 SLU 方法中，自动语音识别 (ASR) 模块将语音信号转录为文本表示，自然语言理解 (NLU) 模块从中提取语义信息。最近，基于深度神经网络的端到端SLU（E2E SLU）获得了发展势头，因为它受益于ASR和NLU部分的联合优化，从而限制了管道架构的级联错误效应。然而，人们对 E2E 模型用于根据语音输入预测概念和意图的实际语言属性知之甚少。在本文中，我们提出了一项研究，识别 E2E 模型用于执行 SLU 任务的信号特征和其他语言属性。该研究是在必须处理非英语（此处为法语）语音命令的智能家居应用领域中进行的。结果表明，良好的E2E SLU性能并不总是需要完美的ASR能力。此外，结果表明，与管道模型相比，E2E 模型在处理背景噪声和句法变化方面具有卓越的能力。最后，更细粒度的分析表明，E2E 模型使用输入信号的音调信息来识别语音命令概念。本文概述的结果和方法为进一步分析语音处理中的端到端模型提供了一个跳板。 本文研究了端到端语音语义理解（E2E SLU）在低资源环境下的性能，特别是在处理非英语（法语）语音指令时的信号特征和语言属性。 Thierry Desot,François Portet,Michel Vacher cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xinwei Liu,Jian Liu,Yang Bai,Jindong Gu,Tao Chen,Xiaojun Jia,Xiaochun Cao
title: Watermark Vaccine: Adversarial Attacks to Prevent Watermark Removal
title_zh: 水印疫苗：防止水印去除的对抗性攻击
abstract: As a common security tool, visible watermarking has been widely applied to protect copyrights of digital images. However, recent works have shown that visible watermarks can be removed by DNNs without damaging their host images. Such watermark-removal techniques pose a great threat to the ownership of images. Inspired by the vulnerability of DNNs on adversarial perturbations, we propose a novel defence mechanism by adversarial machine learning for good. From the perspective of the adversary, blind watermark-removal networks can be posed as our target models; then we actually optimize an imperceptible adversarial perturbation on the host images to proactively attack against watermark-removal networks, dubbed Watermark Vaccine. Specifically, two types of vaccines are proposed. Disrupting Watermark Vaccine (DWV) induces to ruin the host image along with watermark after passing through watermark-removal networks. In contrast, Inerasable Watermark Vaccine (IWV) works in another fashion of trying to keep the watermark not removed and still noticeable. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our DWV/IWV in preventing watermark removal, especially on various watermark removal networks.
summary: As a common security tool, visible watermarking has been widely applied to protect copyrights of digital images. However, recent works have shown that visible watermarks can be removed by DNNs without damaging their host images. Such watermark-removal techniques pose a great threat to the ownership of images. Inspired by the vulnerability of DNNs on adversarial perturbations, we propose a novel defence mechanism by adversarial machine learning for good. From the perspective of the adversary, blind watermark-removal networks can be posed as our target models; then we actually optimize an imperceptible adversarial perturbation on the host images to proactively attack against watermark-removal networks, dubbed Watermark Vaccine. Specifically, two types of vaccines are proposed. Disrupting Watermark Vaccine (DWV) induces to ruin the host image along with watermark after passing through watermark-removal networks. In contrast, Inerasable Watermark Vaccine (IWV) works in another fashion of trying to keep the watermark not removed and still noticeable. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our DWV/IWV in preventing watermark removal, especially on various watermark removal networks.
abstract_zh: 可见水印作为一种常见的安全工具，被广泛应用于保护数字图像的版权。然而，最近的研究表明，DNN 可以在不损坏其宿主图像的情况下删除可见水印。这种水印去除技术对图像的所有权构成了巨大的威胁。受 DNN 对对抗性扰动的脆弱性的启发，我们提出了一种通过对抗性机器学习来实现的新型防御机制。从对手的角度来看，盲水印去除网络可以作为我们的目标模型；然后我们实际上优化了主机图像上难以察觉的对抗性扰动，以主动攻击水印去除网络，称为“水印疫苗”。具体来说，提出了两种类型的疫苗。破坏性水印疫苗（DWV）在通过水印去除网络后会导致主机图像和水印一起被破坏。相比之下，不可擦除水印疫苗（IWV）以另一种方式起作用，试图保持水印不被删除并且仍然明显。大量的实验证明了我们的 DWV/IWV 在防止水印去除方面的有效性，特别是在各种水印去除网络上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗性机器学习的新型防御机制'水印疫苗'，通过在图像中植入不可感知的对抗扰动，主动攻击水印移除网络以防止水印被删除。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络（DNN）能够有效移除可见水印而不破坏宿主图像，这对数字图像版权保护构成重大威胁。传统防御手段难以应对这种对抗性攻击，亟需新的解决方案。
AI.method: 从攻击者视角出发，将盲水印移除网络视为目标模型，通过优化生成两种对抗扰动：1）破坏性水印疫苗（DWV）使水印与图像在移除后均受损；2）不可擦除水印疫苗（IWV）保持水印可见性。两种方法均通过对抗训练生成微小扰动嵌入原始图像。
AI.result: 实验表明DWV/IWV在多种水印移除网络上均表现出显著效果，能有效防止水印被移除，且对图像质量影响极小。两种疫苗分别针对不同攻击场景取得优异防御性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过对抗性学习构建主动防御机制，为数字水印保护提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索更鲁棒的疫苗生成算法和跨模态防御策略。

authors_text: Qiujing Lu,Yipeng Zhang,Mingjian Lu,Vwani Roychowdhury
title: Action-conditioned On-demand Motion Generation
title_zh: 动作条件按需运动生成
abstract: We propose a novel framework, On-Demand MOtion Generation (ODMO), for generating realistic and diverse long-term 3D human motion sequences conditioned only on action types with an additional capability of customization. ODMO shows improvements over SOTA approaches on all traditional motion evaluation metrics when evaluated on three public datasets (HumanAct12, UESTC, and MoCap). Furthermore, we provide both qualitative evaluations and quantitative metrics demonstrating several first-known customization capabilities afforded by our framework, including mode discovery, interpolation, and trajectory customization. These capabilities significantly widen the spectrum of potential applications of such motion generation models. The novel on-demand generative capabilities are enabled by innovations in both the encoder and decoder architectures: (i) Encoder: Utilizing contrastive learning in low-dimensional latent space to create a hierarchical embedding of motion sequences, where not only the codes of different action types form different groups, but within an action type, codes of similar inherent patterns (motion styles) cluster together, making them readily discoverable; (ii) Decoder: Using a hierarchical decoding strategy where the motion trajectory is reconstructed first and then used to reconstruct the whole motion sequence. Such an architecture enables effective trajectory control. Our code is released on the Github page: https://github.com/roychowdhuryresearch/ODMO
summary: We propose a novel framework, On-Demand MOtion Generation (ODMO), for generating realistic and diverse long-term 3D human motion sequences conditioned only on action types with an additional capability of customization. ODMO shows improvements over SOTA approaches on all traditional motion evaluation metrics when evaluated on three public datasets (HumanAct12, UESTC, and MoCap). Furthermore, we provide both qualitative evaluations and quantitative metrics demonstrating several first-known customization capabilities afforded by our framework, including mode discovery, interpolation, and trajectory customization. These capabilities significantly widen the spectrum of potential applications of such motion generation models. The novel on-demand generative capabilities are enabled by innovations in both the encoder and decoder architectures: (i) Encoder: Utilizing contrastive learning in low-dimensional latent space to create a hierarchical embedding of motion sequences, where not only the codes of different action types form different groups, but within an action type, codes of similar inherent patterns (motion styles) cluster together, making them readily discoverable; (ii) Decoder: Using a hierarchical decoding strategy where the motion trajectory is reconstructed first and then used to reconstruct the whole motion sequence. Such an architecture enables effective trajectory control. Our code is released on the Github page: https://github.com/roychowdhuryresearch/ODMO
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即按需运动生成（ODMO），用于生成仅以动作类型为条件的真实且多样化的长期 3D 人体运动序列，并具有额外的定制功能。在三个公共数据集（HumanAct12、UESTC 和 MoCap）上进行评估时，ODMO 在所有传统运动评估指标上显示出相对于 SOTA 方法的改进。此外，我们提供定性评估和定量指标，展示我们的框架提供的几种首屈一指的定制功能，包括模式发现、插值和轨迹定制。这些功能显着拓宽了此类运动生成模型的潜在应用范围。新颖的按需生成能力是通过编码器和解码器架构的创新实现的：（i）编码器：利用低维潜在空间中的对比学习来创建运动序列的分层嵌入，其中不仅不同动作类型的代码形成不同的组，而且在动作类型内，相似的固有模式（运动风格）的代码聚集​​在一起，使它们易于发现； (ii)解码器：使用分层解码策略，首先重建运动轨迹，然后用于重建整个运动序列。这种架构能够实现有效的轨迹控制。我们的代码发布在 Github 页面上：https://github.com/roychowdhuryresearch/ODMO

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动作类型的可定制化3D人体运动序列生成框架ODMO，支持长期多样化的运动生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动作条件下的运动生成缺乏对运动风格和轨迹的灵活定制能力，限制了应用场景。
AI.method: 设计了包含对比学习的编码器生成层次化运动嵌入，并采用分层解码策略先重构轨迹再生成完整序列。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上优于SOTA方法，实现了模式发现、插值和轨迹定制等新型定制化功能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过编码器-解码器创新显著提升了运动生成的可控性与应用潜力。

The novel on-demand generative capabilities are enabled by innovations in both the encoder and decoder architectures: (i) Encoder: Utilizing contrastive learning in low-dimensional latent space to create a hierarchical embedding of motion sequences, where not only the codes of different action types form different groups, but within an action type, codes of similar inherent patterns (motion styles) cluster together, making them readily discoverable; (ii) Decoder: Using a hierarchical decoding strategy where the motion trajectory is reconstructed first and then used to reconstruct the whole motion sequence. Such an architecture enables effective trajectory control. Our code is released on the Github page: https://github.com/roychowdhuryresearch/ODMO 我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即按需运动生成（ODMO），用于生成仅以动作类型为条件的真实且多样化的长期 3D 人体运动序列，并具有额外的定制功能。在三个公共数据集（HumanAct12、UESTC 和 MoCap）上进行评估时，ODMO 在所有传统运动评估指标上显示出相对于 SOTA 方法的改进。此外，我们提供定性评估和定量指标，展示我们的框架提供的几种首屈一指的定制功能，包括模式发现、插值和轨迹定制。这些功能显着拓宽了此类运动生成模型的潜在应用范围。新颖的按需生成能力是通过编码器和解码器架构的创新实现的：（i）编码器：利用低维潜在空间中的对比学习来创建运动序列的分层嵌入，其中不仅不同动作类型的代码形成不同的组，而且在动作类型内，相似的固有模式（运动风格）的代码聚集​​在一起，使它们易于发现； (ii)解码器：使用分层解码策略，首先重建运动轨迹，然后用于重建整个运动序列。这种架构能够实现有效的轨迹控制。我们的代码发布在 Github 页面上：https://github.com/roychowdhuryresearch/ODMO 本文提出了一种基于动作类型的可定制化3D人体运动序列生成框架ODMO，支持长期多样化的运动生成。 Qiujing Lu,Yipeng Zhang,Mingjian Lu,Vwani Roychowdhury cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Shaoyu Dou,Kai Yang,Yang Jiao,Chengbo Qiu,Kui Ren
title: Task-aware Similarity Learning for Event-triggered Time Series
title_zh: 事件触发时间序列的任务感知相似性学习
abstract: Time series analysis has achieved great success in diverse applications such as network security, environmental monitoring, and medical informatics. Learning similarities among different time series is a crucial problem since it serves as the foundation for downstream analysis such as clustering and anomaly detection. It often remains unclear what kind of distance metric is suitable for similarity learning due to the complex temporal dynamics of the time series generated from event-triggered sensing, which is common in diverse applications, including automated driving, interactive healthcare, and smart home automation. The overarching goal of this paper is to develop an unsupervised learning framework that is capable of learning task-aware similarities among unlabeled event-triggered time series. From the machine learning vantage point, the proposed framework harnesses the power of both hierarchical multi-scale sequence autoencoders and Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to effectively learn the low-dimensional representations from the time series. Finally, the obtained similarity measure can be easily visualized for explaining. The proposed framework aspires to offer a stepping stone that gives rise to a systematic approach to model and learn similarities among a multitude of event-triggered time series. Through extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments, it is revealed that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods considerably.

The proposed framework aspires to offer a stepping stone that gives rise to a systematic approach to model and learn similarities among a multitude of event-triggered time series. Through extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments, it is revealed that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods considerably.
abstract_zh: 时间序列分析在网络安全、环境监测、医疗信息学等多种应用中取得了巨大成功。学习不同时间序列之间的相似性是一个至关重要的问题，因为它是下游分析（例如聚类和异常检测）的基础。由于事件触发传感生成的时间序列具有复杂的时间动态，这种距离度量在自动驾驶、交互式医疗保健和智能家居自动化等多种应用中很常见，因此通常不清楚哪种距离度量适合相似性学习。本文的总体目标是开发一个无监督学习框架，该框架能够学习未标记的事件触发时间序列之间的任务感知相似性。从机器学习的角度来看，所提出的框架利用分层多尺度序列自动编码器和高斯混合模型（GMM）的力量来有效地从时间序列中学习低维表示。最后，获得的相似性度量可以很容易地可视化以进行解释。所提出的框架旨在提供一个垫脚石，产生一种系统的方法来建模和学习大量事件触发的时间序列之间的相似性。通过广泛的定性和定量实验，表明所提出的方法大大优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督学习框架，用于学习事件触发时间序列的task-aware相似性。
AI.motivation: 事件触发时间序列在自动驾驶、医疗健康等领域广泛应用，但其复杂的时序动态特性使得难以确定合适的距离度量进行相似性学习。
AI.method: 结合分层多尺度序列自编码器与高斯混合模型（GMM），从无标签事件触发时间序列中学习低维表示并构建任务感知的相似性度量。
AI.result: 通过大量定性和定量实验验证，该方法在相似性学习任务上显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为建模和学习多类事件触发时间序列的相似性提供了系统性方法，具有重要的应用前景。

authors_text: Dor Cohen,Ofer Strichman
title: Automated Repair of Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络的自动修复
comment: Code and results are available at https://github.com/dorcoh/NNSynthesizer
comments: Code and results are available at https://github.com/dorcoh/NNSynthesizer
abstract: Over the last decade, Neural Networks (NNs) have been widely used in numerous applications including safety-critical ones such as autonomous systems. Despite their emerging adoption, it is well known that NNs are susceptible to Adversarial Attacks. Hence, it is highly important to provide guarantees that such systems work correctly. To remedy these issues we introduce a framework for repairing unsafe NNs w.r.t. safety specification, that is by utilizing satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solvers. Our method is able to search for a new, safe NN representation, by modifying only a few of its weight values. In addition, our technique attempts to maximize the similarity to original network with regard to its decision boundaries. We perform extensive experiments which demonstrate the capability of our proposed framework to yield safe NNs w.r.t. the Adversarial Robustness property, with only a mild loss of accuracy (in terms of similarity). Moreover, we compare our method with a naive baseline to empirically prove its effectiveness. To conclude, we provide an algorithm to automatically repair NNs given safety properties, and suggest a few heuristics to improve its computational performance. Currently, by following this approach we are capable of producing small-sized (i.e., with up to few hundreds of parameters) correct NNs, composed of the piecewise linear ReLU activation function. Nevertheless, our framework is general in the sense that it can synthesize NNs w.r.t. any decidable fragment of first-order logic specification.
summary: Over the last decade, Neural Networks (NNs) have been widely used in numerous applications including safety-critical ones such as autonomous systems. Despite their emerging adoption, it is well known that NNs are susceptible to Adversarial Attacks. Hence, it is highly important to provide guarantees that such systems work correctly. To remedy these issues we introduce a framework for repairing unsafe NNs w.r.t. safety specification, that is by utilizing satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solvers. Our method is able to search for a new, safe NN representation, by modifying only a few of its weight values. In addition, our technique attempts to maximize the similarity to original network with regard to its decision boundaries. We perform extensive experiments which demonstrate the capability of our proposed framework to yield safe NNs w.r.t. the Adversarial Robustness property, with only a mild loss of accuracy (in terms of similarity). Moreover, we compare our method with a naive baseline to empirically prove its effectiveness. To conclude, we provide an algorithm to automatically repair NNs given safety properties, and suggest a few heuristics to improve its computational performance. Currently, by following this approach we are capable of producing small-sized (i.e., with up to few hundreds of parameters) correct NNs, composed of the piecewise linear ReLU activation function. Nevertheless, our framework is general in the sense that it can synthesize NNs w.r.t. any decidable fragment of first-order logic specification.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，神经网络 (NN) 已广泛应用于众多应用中，包括自主系统等安全关键应用。尽管它们正在被广泛采用，但众所周知，神经网络很容易受到对抗性攻击。因此，保证此类系统正常工作非常重要。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一个用于修复不安全神经网络的框架。安全规范，即利用可满足性模理论 (SMT) 求解器。我们的方法能够通过仅修改其权重值的几个来搜索新的、安全的神经网络表示。此外，我们的技术尝试最大化与原始网络在决策边界方面的相似性。我们进行了大量的实验，证明了我们提出的框架能够产生安全的神经网络。对抗性鲁棒性属性，仅轻微损失准确性（就相似性而言）。此外，我们将我们的方法与朴素基线进行比较，以凭经验证明其有效性。总之，我们提供了一种在给定安全属性的情况下自动修复神经网络的算法，并提出了一些启发式方法来提高其计算性能。目前，通过遵循这种方法，我们能够生成由分段线性 ReLU 激活函数组成的小型（即最多具有数百个参数）正确的神经网络。尽管如此，我们的框架是通用的，因为它可以综合神经网络。一阶逻辑规范的任何可判定片段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用SMT求解器自动修复不安全神经网络的框架，通过修改少量权重参数使其满足安全规范并保持决策边界相似性。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在安全关键系统中广泛应用但易受对抗攻击，需提供系统正确性保证以应对潜在风险。
AI.method: 基于SMT求解器构建修复框架，通过调整少量权重参数生成满足安全约束的新网络，同时最大化与原网络决策边界的相似性。
AI.result: 实验表明框架可生成对抗鲁棒的安全网络，仅轻微损失准确性；能合成小型ReLU网络，且框架适用于任意可判定一阶逻辑规范。
AI.conclusion: 提出自动修复算法及性能优化启发式方法，当前可处理小型网络，但框架具有通用性可扩展至更复杂场景。

authors_text: Xiao Han,Licheng Yu,Xiatian Zhu,Li Zhang,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang
title: FashionViL: Fashion-Focused Vision-and-Language Representation Learning
title_zh: FashionViL：以时尚为中心的视觉和语言表征学习
abstract: Large-scale Vision-and-Language (V+L) pre-training for representation learning has proven to be effective in boosting various downstream V+L tasks. However, when it comes to the fashion domain, existing V+L methods are inadequate as they overlook the unique characteristics of both the fashion V+L data and downstream tasks. In this work, we propose a novel fashion-focused V+L representation learning framework, dubbed as FashionViL. It contains two novel fashion-specific pre-training tasks designed particularly to exploit two intrinsic attributes with fashion V+L data. First, in contrast to other domains where a V+L data point contains only a single image-text pair, there could be multiple images in the fashion domain. We thus propose a Multi-View Contrastive Learning task for pulling closer the visual representation of one image to the compositional multimodal representation of another image+text. Second, fashion text (e.g., product description) often contains rich fine-grained concepts (attributes/noun phrases). To exploit this, a Pseudo-Attributes Classification task is introduced to encourage the learned unimodal (visual/textual) representations of the same concept to be adjacent. Further, fashion V+L tasks uniquely include ones that do not conform to the common one-stream or two-stream architectures (e.g., text-guided image retrieval). We thus propose a flexible, versatile V+L model architecture consisting of a modality-agnostic Transformer so that it can be flexibly adapted to any downstream tasks. Extensive experiments show that our FashionViL achieves a new state of the art across five downstream tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/BrandonHanx/mmf.
