However, when it comes to the fashion domain, existing V+L methods are inadequate as they overlook the unique characteristics of both the fashion V+L data and downstream tasks. In this work, we propose a novel fashion-focused V+L representation learning framework, dubbed as FashionViL. It contains two novel fashion-specific pre-training tasks designed particularly to exploit two intrinsic attributes with fashion V+L data. First, in contrast to other domains where a V+L data point contains only a single image-text pair, there could be multiple images in the fashion domain. We thus propose a Multi-View Contrastive Learning task for pulling closer the visual representation of one image to the compositional multimodal representation of another image+text. Second, fashion text (e.g., product description) often contains rich fine-grained concepts (attributes/noun phrases). To exploit this, a Pseudo-Attributes Classification task is introduced to encourage the learned unimodal (visual/textual) representations of the same concept to be adjacent. Further, fashion V+L tasks uniquely include ones that do not conform to the common one-stream or two-stream architectures (e.g., text-guided image retrieval). We thus propose a flexible, versatile V+L model architecture consisting of a modality-agnostic Transformer so that it can be flexibly adapted to any downstream tasks. Extensive experiments show that our FashionViL achieves a new state of the art across five downstream tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/BrandonHanx/mmf.
abstract_zh: 用于表示学习的大规模视觉和语言 (V+L) 预训练已被证明可以有效地促进各种下游 V+L 任务。然而，当涉及到时尚领域时，现有的 V+L 方法是不够的，因为它们忽略了时尚 V+L 数据和下游任务的独特特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的以时尚为中心的 V+L 表示学习框架，称为 FashionViL。它包含两个新颖的特定于时尚的预训练任务，专门设计用于利用时尚 V+L 数据的两个内在属性。首先，与 V+L 数据点仅包含单个图像文本对的其他领域相比，时尚领域中可能存在多个图像。因此，我们提出了一种多视图对比学习任务，使一个图像的视觉表示与另一个图像+文本的组合多模态表示更加接近。其次，时尚文本（例如产品描述）通常包含丰富的细粒度概念（属性/名词短语）。为了利用这一点，引入了伪属性分类任务，以鼓励学习到的同一概念的单峰（视觉/文本）表示相邻。此外，时尚 V+L 任务独特地包括不符合常见的单流或双流架构的任务（例如，文本引导的图像检索）。因此，我们提出了一种灵活、通用的 V+L 模型架构，由模态无关的 Transformer 组成，以便它可以灵活地适应任何下游任务。大量实验表明，我们的 FashionViL 在五个下游任务中实现了新的最先进水平。代码可在 https://github.com/BrandonHanx/mmf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FashionViL的时尚领域视觉与语言表示学习框架，以提升时尚相关的视觉与语言任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉与语言预训练方法在时尚领域表现不足，因为它们忽略了时尚数据和下游任务的独特属性。
AI.method: 本文设计了两个新的预训练任务：多视图对比学习和伪属性分类任务，并提出了一种灵活的、基于模态无关Transformer的模型架构。
AI.result: 实验表明，FashionViL在五个下游任务中均达到了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: FashionViL通过针对性设计的预训练任务和灵活的模型架构，有效提升了时尚领域视觉与语言任务的性能。

search_text: FashionViL: Fashion-Focused Vision-and-Language Representation Learning FashionViL：以时尚为中心的视觉和语言表征学习 Large-scale Vision-and-Language (V+L) pre-training for representation learning has proven to be effective in boosting various downstream V+L tasks. However, when it comes to the fashion domain, existing V+L methods are inadequate as they overlook the unique characteristics of both the fashion V+L data and downstream tasks. In this work, we propose a novel fashion-focused V+L representation learning framework, dubbed as FashionViL. It contains two novel fashion-specific pre-training tasks designed particularly to exploit two intrinsic attributes with fashion V+L data. First, in contrast to other domains where a V+L data point contains only a single image-text pair, there could be multiple images in the fashion domain. We thus propose a Multi-View Contrastive Learning task for pulling closer the visual representation of one image to the compositional multimodal representation of another image+text. Second, fashion text (e.g., product description) often contains rich fine-grained concepts (attributes/noun phrases). To exploit this, a Pseudo-Attributes Classification task is introduced to encourage the learned unimodal (visual/textual) representations of the same concept to be adjacent. Further, fashion V+L tasks uniquely include ones that do not conform to the common one-stream or two-stream architectures (e.g., text-guided image retrieval). We thus propose a flexible, versatile V+L model architecture consisting of a modality-agnostic Transformer so that it can be flexibly adapted to any downstream tasks. Extensive experiments show that our FashionViL achieves a new state of the art across five downstream tasks. authors_text: Leonardo Scabini,Bernard De Baets,Odemir M. Bruno
title: Improving Deep Neural Network Random Initialization Through Neuronal Rewiring
title_zh: 通过神经元重新布线改进深度神经网络随机初始化
abstract: The deep learning literature is continuously updated with new architectures and training techniques. However, weight initialization is overlooked by most recent research, despite some intriguing findings regarding random weights. On the other hand, recent works have been approaching Network Science to understand the structure and dynamics of Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) after training. Therefore, in this work, we analyze the centrality of neurons in randomly initialized networks. We show that a higher neuronal strength variance may decrease performance, while a lower neuronal strength variance usually improves it. A new method is then proposed to rewire neuronal connections according to a preferential attachment (PA) rule based on their strength, which significantly reduces the strength variance of layers initialized by common methods. In this sense, PA rewiring only reorganizes connections, while preserving the magnitude and distribution of the weights. We show through an extensive statistical analysis in image classification that performance is improved in most cases, both during training and testing, when using both simple and complex architectures and learning schedules. Our results show that, aside from the magnitude, the organization of the weights is also relevant for better initialization of deep ANNs.
summary: The deep learning literature is continuously updated with new architectures and training techniques. However, weight initialization is overlooked by most recent research, despite some intriguing findings regarding random weights. On the other hand, recent works have been approaching Network Science to understand the structure and dynamics of Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) after training. Therefore, in this work, we analyze the centrality of neurons in randomly initialized networks. We show that a higher neuronal strength variance may decrease performance, while a lower neuronal strength variance usually improves it. A new method is then proposed to rewire neuronal connections according to a preferential attachment (PA) rule based on their strength, which significantly reduces the strength variance of layers initialized by common methods. In this sense, PA rewiring only reorganizes connections, while preserving the magnitude and distribution of the weights. We show through an extensive statistical analysis in image classification that performance is improved in most cases, both during training and testing, when using both simple and complex architectures and learning schedules. Our results show that, aside from the magnitude, the organization of the weights is also relevant for better initialization of deep ANNs.
abstract_zh: 深度学习文献不断更新新的架构和训练技术。然而，尽管关于随机权重有一些有趣的发现，但最近的研究忽视了权重初始化。另一方面，最近的工作一直在接近网络科学，以了解训练后人工神经网络（ANN）的结构和动态。因此，在这项工作中，我们分析了随机初始化网络中神经元的中心性。我们表明，较高的神经元强度方差可能会降低性能，而较低的神经元强度方差通常会提高性能。然后提出了一种新方法，根据基于神经元强度的优先附着（PA）规则重新连接神经元连接，这显着减少了通过常见方法初始化的层的强度方差。从这个意义上说，PA 重新布线只是重新组织连接，同时保留权重的大小和分布。我们通过图像分类中的广泛统计分析表明，在使用简单和复杂的架构和学习计划时，在大多数情况下，无论是在训练和测试期间，性能都会得到提高。我们的结果表明，除了大小之外，权重的组织也与深度人工神经网络更好的初始化相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过神经元重连方法优化深度神经网络的随机初始化，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管随机权重初始化对深度学习性能有重要影响，但现有研究多关注网络结构与训练技术，而忽视了初始化方法的优化。
AI.method: 分析随机初始化网络中神经元的中心性，提出基于强度的优先连接（PA）重连规则，重新组织连接结构以降低层内神经元强度方差。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务中，该方法在多种简单和复杂架构及学习计划下均显著提升训练和测试性能。
AI.conclusion: 权重的组织方式（而非仅幅度）对深度神经网络的初始化效果具有关键影响。

authors_text: Valentin Liévin,Christoffer Egeberg Hother,Andreas Geert Motzfeldt,Ole Winther
title: Can large language models reason about medical questions?
title_zh: 大型语言模型可以推理医学问题吗？
comment: 37 pages, 23 figures. v1: results using InstructGPT, v2.0: added the Codex experiments, v2.1: added the missing test MedMCQA results for Codex 5-shot CoT and using k=100 samples, v3.0: added results for open source models -- ready for publication (final version)
comments: 37 pages, 23 figures. v1: results using InstructGPT, v2.0: added the Codex experiments, v2.1: added the missing test MedMCQA results for Codex 5-shot CoT and using k=100 samples, v3.0: added results for open source models -- ready for publication (final version)
abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) often produce impressive outputs, it remains unclear how they perform in real-world scenarios requiring strong reasoning skills and expert domain knowledge. We set out to investigate whether close- and open-source models (GPT-3.5, LLama-2, etc.) can be applied to answer and reason about difficult real-world-based questions. We focus on three popular medical benchmarks (MedQA-USMLE, MedMCQA, and PubMedQA) and multiple prompting scenarios: Chain-of-Thought (CoT, think step-by-step), few-shot and retrieval augmentation. Based on an expert annotation of the generated CoTs, we found that InstructGPT can often read, reason and recall expert knowledge. Last, by leveraging advances in prompt engineering (few-shot and ensemble methods), we demonstrated that GPT-3.5 not only yields calibrated predictive distributions, but also reaches the passing score on three datasets: MedQA-USMLE 60.2%, MedMCQA 62.7% and PubMedQA 78.2%. Open-source models are closing the gap: Llama-2 70B also passed the MedQA-USMLE with 62.5% accuracy.
summary: Although large language models (LLMs) often produce impressive outputs, it remains unclear how they perform in real-world scenarios requiring strong reasoning skills and expert domain knowledge. We set out to investigate whether close- and open-source models (GPT-3.5, LLama-2, etc.) can be applied to answer and reason about difficult real-world-based questions. We focus on three popular medical benchmarks (MedQA-USMLE, MedMCQA, and PubMedQA) and multiple prompting scenarios: Chain-of-Thought (CoT, think step-by-step), few-shot and retrieval augmentation. Based on an expert annotation of the generated CoTs, we found that InstructGPT can often read, reason and recall expert knowledge. Last, by leveraging advances in prompt engineering (few-shot and ensemble methods), we demonstrated that GPT-3.5 not only yields calibrated predictive distributions, but also reaches the passing score on three datasets: MedQA-USMLE 60.2%, MedMCQA 62.7% and PubMedQA 78.2%. Open-source models are closing the gap: Llama-2 70B also passed the MedQA-USMLE with 62.5% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型 (LLM) 通常会产生令人印象深刻的输出，但仍不清楚它们在需要强大推理技能和专业领域知识的现实场景中的表现如何。我们着手研究闭源和开源模型（GPT-3.5、LLama-2 等）是否可以应用于回答和推理基于现实世界的困难问题。我们专注于三个流行的医学基准（MedQA-USMLE、MedMCQA 和 PubMedQA）和多种提示场景：思想链（CoT，逐步思考）、few-shot 和检索增强。基于生成的 CoT 的专家注释，我们发现 InstructGPT 通常可以读取、推理和回忆专家知识。最后，通过利用即时工程（少样本和集成方法）的进步，我们证明了 GPT-3.5 不仅能产生校准的预测分布，而且在三个数据集上达到了及格分数：MedQA-USMLE 60.2%、MedMCQA 62.7% 和 PubMedQA 78.2%。开源模型正在缩小差距：Llama-2 70B 也以 62.5% 的准确率通过了 MedQA-USMLE。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了大型语言模型在医学领域复杂问题上的推理能力，使用了多种提示方法和基准测试。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型表现优异，但其在需要强推理和专业知识的现实场景（如医疗领域）中的表现尚不明确，需验证其实际应用潜力。
AI.method: 基于三个医学基准（MedQA-USMLE、MedMCQA、PubMedQA），采用链式推理（CoT）、少样本学习和检索增强等提示策略，并通过专家标注验证推理过程。
AI.result: GPT-3.5在三个数据集上达到及格线（MedQA-USMLE 60.2%、MedMCQA 62.7%、PubMedQA 78.2%），Llama-2 70B在MedQA-USMLE上准确率为62.5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化提示工程，LLM可在医学问答中实现可靠推理，开源模型性能逐渐接近闭源模型，显示其在医疗领域的应用前景。

search_text: Can large language models reason about medical questions? 大型语言模型可以推理医学问题吗？ Although large language models (LLMs) often produce impressive outputs, it remains unclear how they perform in real-world scenarios requiring strong reasoning skills and expert domain knowledge. We set out to investigate whether close- and open-source models (GPT-3.5, LLama-2, etc.) can be applied to answer and reason about difficult real-world-based questions. We focus on three popular medical benchmarks (MedQA-USMLE, MedMCQA, and PubMedQA) and multiple prompting scenarios: Chain-of-Thought (CoT, think step-by-step), few-shot and retrieval augmentation. Based on an expert annotation of the generated CoTs, we found that InstructGPT can often read, reason and recall expert knowledge. Last, by leveraging advances in prompt engineering (few-shot and ensemble methods), we demonstrated that GPT-3.5 not only yields calibrated predictive distributions, but also reaches the passing score on three datasets: MedQA-USMLE 60.2%, MedMCQA 62.7% and PubMedQA 78.2%. Open-source models are closing the gap: Llama-2 70B also passed the MedQA-USMLE with 62.5% accuracy. 尽管大型语言模型 (LLM) 通常会产生令人印象深刻的输出，但仍不清楚它们在需要强大推理技能和专业领域知识的现实场景中的表现如何。我们着手研究闭源和开源模型（GPT-3.5、LLama-2 等）是否可以应用于回答和推理基于现实世界的困难问题。我们专注于三个流行的医学基准（MedQA-USMLE、MedMCQA 和 PubMedQA）和多种提示场景：思想链（CoT，逐步思考）、few-shot 和检索增强。基于生成的 CoT 的专家注释，我们发现 InstructGPT 通常可以读取、推理和回忆专家知识。最后，通过利用即时工程（少样本和集成方法）的进步，我们证明了 GPT-3.5 不仅能产生校准的预测分布，而且在三个数据集上达到了及格分数：MedQA-USMLE 60.2%、MedMCQA 62.7% 和 PubMedQA 78.2%。开源模型正在缩小差距：Llama-2 70B 也以 62.5% 的准确率通过了 MedQA-USMLE。 该论文评估了大型语言模型在医学领域复杂问题上的推理能力，使用了多种提示方法和基准测试。 Valentin Liévin,Christoffer Egeberg Hother,Andreas Geert Motzfeldt,Ole Winther cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hanadi Hassen Mohammed,Junaid Malik,Somaya Al-Madeed,Serkan Kiranyaz
title: 2D Self-Organized ONN Model For Handwritten Text Recognition
title_zh: 用于手写文本识别的 2D 自组织 ONN 模型
comment: To appear in in Applied Soft Computing Journal (Elsevier)
comments: To appear in in Applied Soft Computing Journal (Elsevier)
abstract: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have recently reached state-of-the-art Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) performance. However, recent research has shown that typical CNNs' learning performance is limited since they are homogeneous networks with a simple (linear) neuron model. With their heterogeneous network structure incorporating non-linear neurons, Operational Neural Networks (ONNs) have recently been proposed to address this drawback. Self-ONNs are self-organized variations of ONNs with the generative neuron model that can generate any non-linear function using the Taylor approximation. In this study, in order to improve the state-of-the-art performance level in HTR, the 2D Self-organized ONNs (Self-ONNs) in the core of a novel network model are proposed. Moreover, deformable convolutions, which have recently been demonstrated to tackle variations in the writing styles better, are utilized in this study. The results over the IAM English dataset and HADARA80P Arabic dataset show that the proposed model with the operational layers of Self-ONNs significantly improves Character Error Rate (CER) and Word Error Rate (WER). Compared with its counterpart CNNs, Self-ONNs reduce CER and WER by 1.2% and 3.4 % in the HADARA80P and 0.199% and 1.244% in the IAM dataset. The results over the benchmark IAM demonstrate that the proposed model with the operational layers of Self-ONNs outperforms recent deep CNN models by a significant margin while the use of Self-ONNs with deformable convolutions demonstrates exceptional results.
summary: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have recently reached state-of-the-art Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) performance. However, recent research has shown that typical CNNs' learning performance is limited since they are homogeneous networks with a simple (linear) neuron model. With their heterogeneous network structure incorporating non-linear neurons, Operational Neural Networks (ONNs) have recently been proposed to address this drawback. Self-ONNs are self-organized variations of ONNs with the generative neuron model that can generate any non-linear function using the Taylor approximation. In this study, in order to improve the state-of-the-art performance level in HTR, the 2D Self-organized ONNs (Self-ONNs) in the core of a novel network model are proposed. Moreover, deformable convolutions, which have recently been demonstrated to tackle variations in the writing styles better, are utilized in this study. The results over the IAM English dataset and HADARA80P Arabic dataset show that the proposed model with the operational layers of Self-ONNs significantly improves Character Error Rate (CER) and Word Error Rate (WER). Compared with its counterpart CNNs, Self-ONNs reduce CER and WER by 1.2% and 3.4 % in the HADARA80P and 0.199% and 1.244% in the IAM dataset. The results over the benchmark IAM demonstrate that the proposed model with the operational layers of Self-ONNs outperforms recent deep CNN models by a significant margin while the use of Self-ONNs with deformable convolutions demonstrates exceptional results.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 最近达到了最先进的手写文本识别 (HTR) 性能。然而，最近的研究表明，典型的 CNN 的学习性能有限，因为它们是具有简单（线性）神经元模型的同构网络。凭借其包含非线性神经元的异构网络结构，操作神经网络（ONN）最近被提出来解决这个缺点。自 ONN 是 ONN 的自组织变体，具有生成神经元模型，可以使用泰勒近似生成任何非线性函数。在本研究中，为了提高 HTR 中最先进的性能水平，提出了一种新型网络模型核心的二维自组织 ONN（Self-ONN）。此外，本研究中还利用了最近被证明可以更好地解决书写风格变化的可变形卷积。在 IAM 英语数据集和 HADARA80P 阿拉伯语数据集上的结果表明，所提出的具有 Self-ONN 操作层的模型显着提高了字符错误率（CER）和字错误率（WER）。与对应的 CNN 相比，Self-ONN 在 HADARA80P 中将 CER 和 WER 降低了 1.2% 和 3.4%，在 IAM 数据集中降低了 0.199% 和 1.244%。基准 IAM 的结果表明，所提出的具有 Self-ONN 操作层的模型明显优于最近的深度 CNN 模型，而使用具有可变形卷积的 Self-ONN 则显示出优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合2D自组织操作神经网络(Self-ONNs)和可变形卷积的新型网络模型，用于提升手写文本识别(HTR)性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因同质化结构和线性神经元模型存在学习性能局限，而Self-ONNs通过非线性神经元和生成模型可克服此缺陷，需探索其在HTR中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 设计2D Self-ONNs核心网络结构，集成操作层与可变形卷积模块，利用泰勒展开生成非线性函数，通过自组织机制优化特征学习。
AI.result: 在IAM英文数据集和HADARA80P阿拉伯语数据集上，Self-ONNs分别降低字符错误率(CER)0.199%/1.2%和词错误率(WER)1.244%/3.4%，显著优于传统CNN模型。
AI.conclusion: Self-ONNs与可变形卷积的结合有效提升了HTR性能，验证了异构非线性网络结构在处理书写风格变异中的优势。

authors_text: Xiao-Shan Gao,Shuang Liu,Lijia Yu
title: Achieve Optimal Adversarial Accuracy for Adversarial Deep Learning using Stackelberg Game
title_zh: 使用 Stackelberg 博弈实现对抗深度学习的最佳对抗精度
abstract: Adversarial deep learning is to train robust DNNs against adversarial attacks, which is one of the major research focuses of deep learning. Game theory has been used to answer some of the basic questions about adversarial deep learning such as the existence of a classifier with optimal robustness and the existence of optimal adversarial samples for a given class of classifiers. In most previous work, adversarial deep learning was formulated as a simultaneous game and the strategy spaces are assumed to be certain probability distributions in order for the Nash equilibrium to exist. But, this assumption is not applicable to the practical situation. In this paper, we give answers to these basic questions for the practical case where the classifiers are DNNs with a given structure, by formulating the adversarial deep learning as sequential games. The existence of Stackelberg equilibria for these games are proved. Furthermore, it is shown that the equilibrium DNN has the largest adversarial accuracy among all DNNs with the same structure, when Carlini-Wagner's margin loss is used. Trade-off between robustness and accuracy in adversarial deep learning is also studied from game theoretical aspect.
summary: Adversarial deep learning is to train robust DNNs against adversarial attacks, which is one of the major research focuses of deep learning. Game theory has been used to answer some of the basic questions about adversarial deep learning such as the existence of a classifier with optimal robustness and the existence of optimal adversarial samples for a given class of classifiers. In most previous work, adversarial deep learning was formulated as a simultaneous game and the strategy spaces are assumed to be certain probability distributions in order for the Nash equilibrium to exist. But, this assumption is not applicable to the practical situation. In this paper, we give answers to these basic questions for the practical case where the classifiers are DNNs with a given structure, by formulating the adversarial deep learning as sequential games. The existence of Stackelberg equilibria for these games are proved. Furthermore, it is shown that the equilibrium DNN has the largest adversarial accuracy among all DNNs with the same structure, when Carlini-Wagner's margin loss is used. Trade-off between robustness and accuracy in adversarial deep learning is also studied from game theoretical aspect.
abstract_zh: 对抗性深度学习是训练鲁棒的DNN来对抗对抗性攻击，这是深度学习的主要研究热点之一。博弈论已被用来回答有关对抗性深度学习的一些基本问题，例如是否存在具有最佳鲁棒性的分类器以及是否存在给定类别的分类器的最佳对抗性样本。在大多数先前的工作中，对抗性深度学习被表述为同时博弈，并且策略空间被假设为一定的概率分布，以便纳什均衡存在。但是，这个假设并不适用于实际情况。在本文中，我们通过将对抗性深度学习表述为序列博弈，针对分类器是具有给定结构的 DNN 的实际情况给出了这些基本问题的答案。这些博弈的 Stackelberg 均衡的存在性得到了证明。此外，结果表明，当使用 Carlini-Wagner 的边际损失时，平衡 DNN 在具有相同结构的所有 DNN 中具有最大的对抗精度。对抗性深度学习中鲁棒性和准确性之间的权衡也从博弈论的角度进行了研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过将对抗深度学习建模为Stackelberg博弈，解决实际场景中深度神经网络的最优对抗准确率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将对抗学习建模为同时博弈并假设策略空间为概率分布，但该假设不适用于实际深度神经网络的结构化场景。
AI.method: 将对抗深度学习问题形式化为序贯Stackelberg博弈，证明此类博弈的Stackelberg均衡存在性，并基于Carlini-Wagner边距损失进行分析。
AI.result: 证明均衡DNN在相同结构下具有最大对抗准确率，并从博弈论角度揭示了鲁棒性与准确率的权衡机制。
AI.conclusion: Stackelberg博弈框架为对抗深度学习提供了理论保证，实现了结构化DNN的最优对抗准确率分析。

search_text: Achieve Optimal Adversarial Accuracy for Adversarial Deep Learning using Stackelberg Game 使用 Stackelberg 博弈实现对抗深度学习的最佳对抗精度 Adversarial deep learning is to train robust DNNs against adversarial attacks, which is one of the major research focuses of deep learning. Game theory has been used to answer some of the basic questions about adversarial deep learning such as the existence of a classifier with optimal robustness and the existence of optimal adversarial samples for a given class of classifiers. In most previous work, adversarial deep learning was formulated as a simultaneous game and the strategy spaces are assumed to be certain probability distributions in order for the Nash equilibrium to exist. But, this assumption is not applicable to the practical situation. In this paper, we give answers to these basic questions for the practical case where the classifiers are DNNs with a given structure, by formulating the adversarial deep learning as sequential games. The existence of Stackelberg equilibria for these games are proved. Furthermore, it is shown that the equilibrium DNN has the largest adversarial accuracy among all DNNs with the same structure, when Carlini-Wagner's margin loss is used. Trade-off between robustness and accuracy in adversarial deep learning is also studied from game theoretical aspect. 对抗性深度学习是训练鲁棒的DNN来对抗对抗性攻击，这是深度学习的主要研究热点之一。博弈论已被用来回答有关对抗性深度学习的一些基本问题，例如是否存在具有最佳鲁棒性的分类器以及是否存在给定类别的分类器的最佳对抗性样本。在大多数先前的工作中，对抗性深度学习被表述为同时博弈，并且策略空间被假设为一定的概率分布，以便纳什均衡存在。但是，这个假设并不适用于实际情况。在本文中，我们通过将对抗性深度学习表述为序列博弈，针对分类器是具有给定结构的 DNN 的实际情况给出了这些基本问题的答案。这些博弈的 Stackelberg 均衡的存在性得到了证明。此外，结果表明，当使用 Carlini-Wagner 的边际损失时，平衡 DNN 在具有相同结构的所有 DNN 中具有最大的对抗精度。对抗性深度学习中鲁棒性和准确性之间的权衡也从博弈论的角度进行了研究。 本文通过将对抗深度学习建模为Stackelberg博弈，解决实际场景中深度神经网络的最优对抗准确率问题。 Xiao-Shan Gao,Shuang Liu,Lijia Yu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Haorui Song,Yong Du,Tianyi Xiang,Junyu Dong,Jing Qin,Shengfeng He
title: Editing Out-of-domain GAN Inversion via Differential Activations
title_zh: 通过差分激活编辑域外 GAN 反转
abstract: Despite the demonstrated editing capacity in the latent space of a pretrained GAN model, inverting real-world images is stuck in a dilemma that the reconstruction cannot be faithful to the original input. The main reason for this is that the distributions between training and real-world data are misaligned, and because of that, it is unstable of GAN inversion for real image editing. In this paper, we propose a novel GAN prior based editing framework to tackle the out-of-domain inversion problem with a composition-decomposition paradigm. In particular, during the phase of composition, we introduce a differential activation module for detecting semantic changes from a global perspective, \ie, the relative gap between the features of edited and unedited images. With the aid of the generated Diff-CAM mask, a coarse reconstruction can intuitively be composited by the paired original and edited images. In this way, the attribute-irrelevant regions can be survived in almost whole, while the quality of such an intermediate result is still limited by an unavoidable ghosting effect. Consequently, in the decomposition phase, we further present a GAN prior based deghosting network for separating the final fine edited image from the coarse reconstruction. Extensive experiments exhibit superiorities over the state-of-the-art methods, in terms of qualitative and quantitative evaluations. The robustness and flexibility of our method is also validated on both scenarios of single attribute and multi-attribute manipulations.
summary: Despite the demonstrated editing capacity in the latent space of a pretrained GAN model, inverting real-world images is stuck in a dilemma that the reconstruction cannot be faithful to the original input. The main reason for this is that the distributions between training and real-world data are misaligned, and because of that, it is unstable of GAN inversion for real image editing. In this paper, we propose a novel GAN prior based editing framework to tackle the out-of-domain inversion problem with a composition-decomposition paradigm. In particular, during the phase of composition, we introduce a differential activation module for detecting semantic changes from a global perspective, \ie, the relative gap between the features of edited and unedited images. With the aid of the generated Diff-CAM mask, a coarse reconstruction can intuitively be composited by the paired original and edited images. In this way, the attribute-irrelevant regions can be survived in almost whole, while the quality of such an intermediate result is still limited by an unavoidable ghosting effect. Consequently, in the decomposition phase, we further present a GAN prior based deghosting network for separating the final fine edited image from the coarse reconstruction. Extensive experiments exhibit superiorities over the state-of-the-art methods, in terms of qualitative and quantitative evaluations. The robustness and flexibility of our method is also validated on both scenarios of single attribute and multi-attribute manipulations.
abstract_zh: 尽管在预训练的 GAN 模型的潜在空间中展示了编辑能力，但反转现实世界图像却陷入了重建无法忠实于原始输入的困境。造成这种情况的主要原因是训练数据和真实数据之间的分布不一致，因此，GAN 反转用于真实图像编辑时不稳定。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 GAN 先验的编辑框架，以通过组合分解范式解决域外反演问题。特别是，在合成阶段，我们引入了一个差分激活模块，用于从全局角度检测语义变化，即编辑和未编辑图像的特征之间的相对差距。借助生成的 Diff-CAM 掩模，可以通过配对的原始图像和编辑图像直观地合成粗略重建。这样，与属性无关的区域几乎可以全部幸存下来，但这种中间结果的质量仍然受到不可避免的重影效应的限制。因此，在分解阶段，我们进一步提出了一种基于 GAN 先验的去重影网络，用于将最终的精细编辑图像与粗略重建分离。在定性和定量评估方面，广泛的实验表现出优于最先进方法的优势。我们的方法的鲁棒性和灵活性也在单属性和多属性操作的情况下得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于GAN先验的编辑框架，通过差分激活模块和去鬼影网络解决真实图像的域外逆向生成问题。
AI.motivation: 预训练GAN模型在真实图像逆向生成时因训练数据与真实数据分布不匹配，导致重建结果不忠实于原始输入，存在不稳定性和鬼影效应。
AI.method: 采用组成-分解范式：1) 组成阶段引入差分激活模块生成Diff-CAM掩码，通过编辑前后图像特征差异实现粗略重建；2) 分解阶段设计基于GAN先验的去鬼影网络分离最终精细编辑图像。
AI.result: 在定性和定量评估中均优于现有方法，验证了方法在单属性和多属性编辑场景下的鲁棒性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过差分激活与去鬼影网络的协同作用，有效解决了域外GAN逆向生成中的分布偏移问题，提升了真实图像编辑质量。

authors_text: Zizhang Li,Mengmeng Wang,Huaijin Pi,Kechun Xu,Jianbiao Mei,Yong Liu
title: E-NeRV: Expedite Neural Video Representation with Disentangled Spatial-Temporal Context
title_zh: E-NeRV：通过解开时空上下文加速神经视频表示
abstract: Recently, the image-wise implicit neural representation of videos, NeRV, has gained popularity for its promising results and swift speed compared to regular pixel-wise implicit representations. However, the redundant parameters within the network structure can cause a large model size when scaling up for desirable performance. The key reason of this phenomenon is the coupled formulation of NeRV, which outputs the spatial and temporal information of video frames directly from the frame index input. In this paper, we propose E-NeRV, which dramatically expedites NeRV by decomposing the image-wise implicit neural representation into separate spatial and temporal context. Under the guidance of this new formulation, our model greatly reduces the redundant model parameters, while retaining the representation ability. We experimentally find that our method can improve the performance to a large extent with fewer parameters, resulting in a more than $8\times$ faster speed on convergence. Code is available at https://github.com/kyleleey/E-NeRV.
summary: Recently, the image-wise implicit neural representation of videos, NeRV, has gained popularity for its promising results and swift speed compared to regular pixel-wise implicit representations. However, the redundant parameters within the network structure can cause a large model size when scaling up for desirable performance. The key reason of this phenomenon is the coupled formulation of NeRV, which outputs the spatial and temporal information of video frames directly from the frame index input. In this paper, we propose E-NeRV, which dramatically expedites NeRV by decomposing the image-wise implicit neural representation into separate spatial and temporal context. Under the guidance of this new formulation, our model greatly reduces the redundant model parameters, while retaining the representation ability. We experimentally find that our method can improve the performance to a large extent with fewer parameters, resulting in a more than $8\times$ faster speed on convergence. Code is available at https://github.com/kyleleey/E-NeRV.
abstract_zh: 最近，视频的图像式隐式神经表示 NeRV 因其有希望的结果和比常规像素式隐式表示更快的速度而受到欢迎。然而，在扩展以获得所需性能时，网络结构内的冗余参数可能会导致模型尺寸过大。这种现象的关键原因是 NeRV 的耦合公式，它直接从帧索引输入输出视频帧的空间和时间信息。在本文中，我们提出了 E-NeRV，它通过将图像隐式神经表示分解为单独的空间和时间上下文来极大地加速 NeRV。在这个新公式的指导下，我们的模型大大减少了冗余模型参数，同时保留了表示能力。我们通过实验发现，我们的方法可以用更少的参数在很大程度上提高性能，从而使收敛速度加快超过 $8\times$。代码可在 https://github.com/kyleleey/E-NeRV 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出E-NeRV方法，通过解耦空间-时序上下文，加速神经视频表示并减少模型参数。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRV方法因空间与时序信息耦合导致参数冗余，模型规模过大且效率不足。
AI.method: 将图像级隐式神经表示分解为独立的空间与时序上下文模块，降低参数耦合度。
AI.result: 在保持表示能力的前提下，参数量显著减少，收敛速度提升超过8倍。
AI.conclusion: E-NeRV通过解耦设计有效缓解了NeRV的冗余问题，实现了更高效的视频神经表示。

search_text: E-NeRV: Expedite Neural Video Representation with Disentangled Spatial-Temporal Context E-NeRV：通过解开时空上下文加速神经视频表示 Recently, the image-wise implicit neural representation of videos, NeRV, has gained popularity for its promising results and swift speed compared to regular pixel-wise implicit representations. However, the redundant parameters within the network structure can cause a large model size when scaling up for desirable performance. The key reason of this phenomenon is the coupled formulation of NeRV, which outputs the spatial and temporal information of video frames directly from the frame index input. In this paper, we propose E-NeRV, which dramatically expedites NeRV by decomposing the image-wise implicit neural representation into separate spatial and temporal context. Under the guidance of this new formulation, our model greatly reduces the redundant model parameters, while retaining the representation ability. We experimentally find that our method can improve the performance to a large extent with fewer parameters, resulting in a more than $8\times$ faster speed on convergence. Code is available at https://github.com/kyleleey/E-NeRV. 最近，视频的图像式隐式神经表示 NeRV 因其有希望的结果和比常规像素式隐式表示更快的速度而受到欢迎。然而，在扩展以获得所需性能时，网络结构内的冗余参数可能会导致模型尺寸过大。这种现象的关键原因是 NeRV 的耦合公式，它直接从帧索引输入输出视频帧的空间和时间信息。在本文中，我们提出了 E-NeRV，它通过将图像隐式神经表示分解为单独的空间和时间上下文来极大地加速 NeRV。在这个新公式的指导下，我们的模型大大减少了冗余模型参数，同时保留了表示能力。我们通过实验发现，我们的方法可以用更少的参数在很大程度上提高性能，从而使收敛速度加快超过 $8\times$。代码可在 https://github.com/kyleleey/E-NeRV 获取。 本文提出E-NeRV方法，通过解耦空间-时序上下文，加速神经视频表示并减少模型参数。 Zizhang Li,Mengmeng Wang,Huaijin Pi,Kechun Xu,Jianbiao Mei,Yong Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Tin Lai
title: Discover Life Skills for Planning with Bandits via Observing and Learning How the World Works
title_zh: 通过观察和学习世界如何运作，发现与强盗一起规划的生活技能
abstract: We propose a novel approach for planning agents to compose abstract skills via observing and learning from historical interactions with the world. Our framework operates in a Markov state-space model via a set of actions under unknown pre-conditions. We formulate skills as high-level abstract policies that propose action plans based on the current state. Each policy learns new plans by observing the states' transitions while the agent interacts with the world. Such an approach automatically learns new plans to achieve specific intended effects, but the success of such plans is often dependent on the states in which they are applicable. Therefore, we formulate the evaluation of such plans as infinitely many multi-armed bandit problems, where we balance the allocation of resources on evaluating the success probability of existing arms and exploring new options. The result is a planner capable of automatically learning robust high-level skills under a noisy environment; such skills implicitly learn the action pre-condition without explicit knowledge. We show that this planning approach is experimentally very competitive in high-dimensional state space domains.
summary: We propose a novel approach for planning agents to compose abstract skills via observing and learning from historical interactions with the world. Our framework operates in a Markov state-space model via a set of actions under unknown pre-conditions. We formulate skills as high-level abstract policies that propose action plans based on the current state. Each policy learns new plans by observing the states' transitions while the agent interacts with the world. Such an approach automatically learns new plans to achieve specific intended effects, but the success of such plans is often dependent on the states in which they are applicable. Therefore, we formulate the evaluation of such plans as infinitely many multi-armed bandit problems, where we balance the allocation of resources on evaluating the success probability of existing arms and exploring new options. The result is a planner capable of automatically learning robust high-level skills under a noisy environment; such skills implicitly learn the action pre-condition without explicit knowledge. We show that this planning approach is experimentally very competitive in high-dimensional state space domains.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，让规划代理通过观察和学习与世界的历史互动来构建抽象技能。我们的框架通过未知先决条件下的一组动作在马尔可夫状态空间模型中运行。我们将技能制定为高层抽象政策，根据当前状态提出行动计划。每个策略通过观察代理与世界交互时状态的转变来学习新的计划。这种方法会自动学习新的计划以实现特定的预期效果，但此类计划的成功往往取决于它们适用的状态。因此，我们将此类计划的评估制定为无限多个多臂老虎机问题，在评估现有臂的成功概率和探索新选项时平衡资源分配。结果是规划器能够在嘈杂的环境下自动学习强大的高级技能；这些技能在没有显性知识的情况下隐式地学习了动作的前提条件。我们证明这种规划方法在高维状态空间领域中在实验上非常有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于观察和学习的框架，使规划代理能够自动发现高层技能，并通过多臂老虎机方法处理不确定性和探索问题。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法依赖显式动作先决条件，但在复杂动态环境中难以获取此类信息，需开发无需显式知识的自动技能学习方法。
AI.method: 构建马尔可夫状态空间模型，将技能定义为高层抽象策略，通过观察状态转移学习新计划，并利用多臂老虎机框架平衡现有方案评估与新方案探索。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在高维状态空间领域能有效学习稳健的高层技能，成功隐式获取动作先决条件。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了无需显式先决条件的自动技能学习，在复杂动态环境中展现出优越的规划能力。

authors_text: Yicheng Hsu,Yonghan Lee,Mingsian R. Bai
title: Multi-channel target speech enhancement based on ERB-scaled spatial coherence features
title_zh: 基于ERB尺度空间相干特征的多通道目标语音增强
comment: Accepted by International Congress on Acoustics (ICA) 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.05686
comments: Accepted by International Congress on Acoustics (ICA) 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.05686
abstract: Recently, speech enhancement technologies that are based on deep learning have received considerable research attention. If the spatial information in microphone signals is exploited, microphone arrays can be advantageous under some adverse acoustic conditions compared with single-microphone systems. However, multichannel speech enhancement is often performed in the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) domain, which renders the enhancement approach computationally expensive. To remedy this problem, we propose a novel equivalent rectangular bandwidth (ERB)-scaled spatial coherence feature that is dependent on the target speaker activity between two ERB bands. Experiments conducted using a four-microphone array in a reverberant environment, which involved speech interference, demonstrated the efficacy of the proposed system. This study also demonstrated that a network that was trained with the ERB-scaled spatial feature was robust against variations in the geometry and number of the microphones in the array.
summary: Recently, speech enhancement technologies that are based on deep learning have received considerable research attention. If the spatial information in microphone signals is exploited, microphone arrays can be advantageous under some adverse acoustic conditions compared with single-microphone systems. However, multichannel speech enhancement is often performed in the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) domain, which renders the enhancement approach computationally expensive. To remedy this problem, we propose a novel equivalent rectangular bandwidth (ERB)-scaled spatial coherence feature that is dependent on the target speaker activity between two ERB bands. Experiments conducted using a four-microphone array in a reverberant environment, which involved speech interference, demonstrated the efficacy of the proposed system. This study also demonstrated that a network that was trained with the ERB-scaled spatial feature was robust against variations in the geometry and number of the microphones in the array.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的语音增强技术受到了广泛的研究关注。如果利用麦克风信号中的空间信息，与单麦克风系统相比，麦克风阵列在某些不利的声学条件下可能具有优势。然而，多通道语音增强通常在短时傅立叶变换（STFT）域中执行，这使得增强方法的计算成本昂贵。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的等效矩形带宽（ERB）尺度的空间相干性特征，该特征取决于两个 ERB 频带之间的目标说话者活动。在涉及语音干扰的混响环境中使用四麦克风阵列进行的实验证明了所提出系统的有效性。这项研究还证明，使用 ERB 尺度空间特征训练的网络对于阵列中麦克风的几何形状和数量的变化具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ERB尺度空间相干特性的多通道目标语音增强方法，以降低计算复杂度并提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统多通道语音增强依赖STFT域处理，计算成本高；且现有方法对麦克风阵列几何结构和数量变化敏感，需改进。
AI.method: 设计ERB尺度空间相干特征，结合目标说话人活动信息，通过深度学习网络进行语音增强。
AI.result: 在混响环境中四麦克风阵列实验表明，该方法有效提升增强效果且对麦克风配置变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ERB尺度特征降低了计算复杂度，同时提升了多通道语音增强系统的适应性与稳定性。

authors_text: Jianzhao Liu,Xin Li,Shukun An,Zhibo Chen
title: Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Blind Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: 用于盲图像质量评估的无源无监督域适应
abstract: Existing learning-based methods for blind image quality assessment (BIQA) are heavily dependent on large amounts of annotated training data, and usually suffer from a severe performance degradation when encountering the domain/distribution shift problem. Thanks to the development of unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), some works attempt to transfer the knowledge from a label-sufficient source domain to a label-free target domain under domain shift with UDA. However, it requires the coexistence of source and target data, which might be impractical for source data due to the privacy or storage issues. In this paper, we take the first step towards the source-free unsupervised domain adaptation (SFUDA) in a simple yet efficient manner for BIQA to tackle the domain shift without access to the source data. Specifically, we cast the quality assessment task as a rating distribution prediction problem. Based on the intrinsic properties of BIQA, we present a group of well-designed self-supervised objectives to guide the adaptation of the BN affine parameters towards the target domain. Among them, minimizing the prediction entropy and maximizing the batch prediction diversity aim to encourage more confident results while avoiding the trivial solution. Besides, based on the observation that the IQA rating distribution of single image follows the Gaussian distribution, we apply Gaussian regularization to the predicted rating distribution to make it more consistent with the nature of human scoring. Extensive experimental results under cross-domain scenarios demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed method to mitigate the domain shift.
summary: Existing learning-based methods for blind image quality assessment (BIQA) are heavily dependent on large amounts of annotated training data, and usually suffer from a severe performance degradation when encountering the domain/distribution shift problem. Thanks to the development of unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), some works attempt to transfer the knowledge from a label-sufficient source domain to a label-free target domain under domain shift with UDA. However, it requires the coexistence of source and target data, which might be impractical for source data due to the privacy or storage issues. In this paper, we take the first step towards the source-free unsupervised domain adaptation (SFUDA) in a simple yet efficient manner for BIQA to tackle the domain shift without access to the source data. Specifically, we cast the quality assessment task as a rating distribution prediction problem. Based on the intrinsic properties of BIQA, we present a group of well-designed self-supervised objectives to guide the adaptation of the BN affine parameters towards the target domain. Among them, minimizing the prediction entropy and maximizing the batch prediction diversity aim to encourage more confident results while avoiding the trivial solution. Besides, based on the observation that the IQA rating distribution of single image follows the Gaussian distribution, we apply Gaussian regularization to the predicted rating distribution to make it more consistent with the nature of human scoring. Extensive experimental results under cross-domain scenarios demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed method to mitigate the domain shift.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于学习的盲图像质量评估（BIQA）方法严重依赖于大量带注释的训练数据，并且在遇到域/分布偏移问题时通常会遭受严重的性能下降。由于无监督域适应（UDA）的发展，一些工作尝试在 UDA 的域转移下将知识从标签充足的源域转移到无标签的目标域。然而，它需要源数据和目标数据共存，由于隐私或存储问题，这对于源数据来说可能不切实际。在本文中，我们以一种简单而有效的方式向无源无监督域适应（SFUDA）迈出了第一步，让 BIQA 能够在不访问源数据的情况下解决域转移问题。具体来说，我们将质量评估任务视为评分分布预测问题。基于 BIQA 的内在特性，我们提出了一组精心设计的自监督目标来指导 BN 仿射参数对目标域的适应。其中，最小化预测熵和最大化批量预测多样性旨在鼓励更可信的结果，同时避免平凡的解决方案。此外，基于对单幅图像的IQA评分分布遵循高斯分布的观察，我们将高斯正则化应用于预测的评分分布，使其更符合人类评分的本质。跨域场景下的大量实验结果证明了我们提出的方法在减轻域转移方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需源域数据的无监督域适应方法，用于盲图像质量评估（BIQA），以解决跨域场景下的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的BIQA方法依赖大量标注数据，且在域偏移问题下表现下降。传统无监督域适应（UDA）需源域和目标域数据共存，但源域数据可能因隐私或存储问题无法获取，因此需探索源数据不可用的源免费域适应（SFUDA）方案。
AI.method: 将质量评估任务转化为评分分布预测问题，设计自监督目标引导批量归一化参数适应目标域，通过最小化预测熵、最大化批次预测多样性避免平凡解，并基于单图评分服从高斯分布的观察，应用高斯正则化使预测分布更贴近人类评分特性。
AI.result: 在跨域实验中，所提方法有效缓解了域偏移问题，验证了其在无源域数据情况下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的源免费无监督域适应方法为BIQA在实际应用中应对域偏移提供了可行方案，具有较高的实用价值。

search_text: Source-free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Blind Image Quality Assessment 用于盲图像质量评估的无源无监督域适应 Existing learning-based methods for blind image quality assessment (BIQA) are heavily dependent on large amounts of annotated training data, and usually suffer from a severe performance degradation when encountering the domain/distribution shift problem. Thanks to the development of unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), some works attempt to transfer the knowledge from a label-sufficient source domain to a label-free target domain under domain shift with UDA. However, it requires the coexistence of source and target data, which might be impractical for source data due to the privacy or storage issues. In this paper, we take the first step towards the source-free unsupervised domain adaptation (SFUDA) in a simple yet efficient manner for BIQA to tackle the domain shift without access to the source data. Specifically, we cast the quality assessment task as a rating distribution prediction problem. Based on the intrinsic properties of BIQA, we present a group of well-designed self-supervised objectives to guide the adaptation of the BN affine parameters towards the target domain. Among them, minimizing the prediction entropy and maximizing the batch prediction diversity aim to encourage more confident results while avoiding the trivial solution. Besides, based on the observation that the IQA rating distribution of single image follows the Gaussian distribution, we apply Gaussian regularization to the predicted rating distribution to make it more consistent with the nature of human scoring. Extensive experimental results under cross-domain scenarios demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed method to mitigate the domain shift. 现有的基于学习的盲图像质量评估（BIQA）方法严重依赖于大量带注释的训练数据，并且在遇到域/分布偏移问题时通常会遭受严重的性能下降。由于无监督域适应（UDA）的发展，一些工作尝试在 UDA 的域转移下将知识从标签充足的源域转移到无标签的目标域。然而，它需要源数据和目标数据共存，由于隐私或存储问题，这对于源数据来说可能不切实际。在本文中，我们以一种简单而有效的方式向无源无监督域适应（SFUDA）迈出了第一步，让 BIQA 能够在不访问源数据的情况下解决域转移问题。具体来说，我们将质量评估任务视为评分分布预测问题。基于 BIQA 的内在特性，我们提出了一组精心设计的自监督目标来指导 BN 仿射参数对目标域的适应。其中，最小化预测熵和最大化批量预测多样性旨在鼓励更可信的结果，同时避免平凡的解决方案。此外，基于对单幅图像的IQA评分分布遵循高斯分布的观察，我们将高斯正则化应用于预测的评分分布，使其更符合人类评分的本质。跨域场景下的大量实验结果证明了我们提出的方法在减轻域转移方面的有效性。 本文提出了一种无需源域数据的无监督域适应方法，用于盲图像质量评估（BIQA），以解决跨域场景下的性能退化问题。 Jianzhao Liu,Xin Li,Shukun An,Zhibo Chen cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Ora Amir,Amihood Amir,Aviezri Fraenkel,David Sarne
title: On the Practical Power of Automata in Pattern Matching
title_zh: 论自动机在模式匹配中的实用能力
abstract: The classical pattern matching paradigm is that of seeking occurrences of one string - the pattern, in another - the text, where both strings are drawn from an alphabet set $Σ$. Assuming the text length is $n$ and the pattern length is $m$, this problem can naively be solved in time $O(nm)$. In Knuth, Morris and Pratt's seminal paper of 1977, an automaton, was developed that allows solving this problem in time $O(n)$ for any alphabet. This automaton, which we will refer to as the {\em KMP-automaton}, has proven useful in solving many other problems. A notable example is the {\em parameterized pattern matching} model. In this model, a consistent renaming of symbols from $Σ$ is allowed in a match. The parameterized matching paradigm has proven useful in problems in software engineering, computer vision, and other applications. It has long been suspected that for texts where the symbols are uniformly random, the naive algorithm will perform as well as the KMP algorithm. In this paper we examine the practical efficiency of the KMP algorithm vs. the naive algorithm on a randomly generated text. We analyse the time under various parameters, such as alphabet size, pattern length, and the distribution of pattern occurrences in the text. We do this for both the original exact matching problem and parameterized matching. While the folklore wisdom is vindicated by these findings for the exact matching case, surprisingly, the KMP algorithm works significantly faster than the naive in the parameterized matching case. We check this hypothesis for DNA texts, and observe a similar behaviour as in the random text. We also show a very structured case where the automaton is much more efficient.
summary: The classical pattern matching paradigm is that of seeking occurrences of one string - the pattern, in another - the text, where both strings are drawn from an alphabet set $Σ$. Assuming the text length is $n$ and the pattern length is $m$, this problem can naively be solved in time $O(nm)$. In Knuth, Morris and Pratt's seminal paper of 1977, an automaton, was developed that allows solving this problem in time $O(n)$ for any alphabet. This automaton, which we will refer to as the {\em KMP-automaton}, has proven useful in solving many other problems. A notable example is the {\em parameterized pattern matching} model. In this model, a consistent renaming of symbols from $Σ$ is allowed in a match. The parameterized matching paradigm has proven useful in problems in software engineering, computer vision, and other applications. It has long been suspected that for texts where the symbols are uniformly random, the naive algorithm will perform as well as the KMP algorithm. In this paper we examine the practical efficiency of the KMP algorithm vs. the naive algorithm on a randomly generated text. We analyse the time under various parameters, such as alphabet size, pattern length, and the distribution of pattern occurrences in the text. We do this for both the original exact matching problem and parameterized matching. While the folklore wisdom is vindicated by these findings for the exact matching case, surprisingly, the KMP algorithm works significantly faster than the naive in the parameterized matching case. We check this hypothesis for DNA texts, and observe a similar behaviour as in the random text. We also show a very structured case where the automaton is much more efficient.
abstract_zh: 经典的模式匹配范式是寻找一个字符串（模式）在另一个字符串（文本）中的出现，其中两个字符串都是从字母表集 $Σ$ 中提取的。假设文本长度为$n$，图案长度为$m$，这个问题可以在$O(nm)$时间内简单地解决。在 Knuth、Morris 和 Pratt 1977 年的开创性论文中，开发了一种自动机，可以在 $O(n)$ 时间内解决任何字母表的问题。这个自动机，我们将其称为 {\em KMP 自动机}，已被证明在解决许多其他问题方面很有用。一个值得注意的例子是参数化模式匹配模型。在此模型中，在匹配中允许对 $Σ$ 中的符号进行一致的重命名。参数化匹配范例已被证明在软件工程、计算机视觉和其他应用程序中的问题中很有用。长期以来人们一直怀疑，对于符号均匀随机的文本，朴素算法的性能与 KMP 算法一样好。在本文中，我们研究了 KMP 算法与朴素算法在随机生成的文本上的实际效率。我们分析各种参数下的时间，例如字母大小、模式长度以及文本中模式出现的分布。我们针对原始精确匹配问题和参数化匹配都这样做。虽然这些精确匹配情况的发现证明了民间传说的智慧，但令人惊讶的是，在参数化匹配情况下，KMP 算法的运行速度明显快于朴素算法。我们检查 DNA 文本的这一假设，并观察到与随机文本类似的行为。我们还展示了一个非常结构化的案例，其中自动机的效率要高得多。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了KMP算法与朴素算法在随机文本和DNA文本中的实际效率，特别是在参数化模式匹配场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管传统观点认为在随机文本中朴素算法与KMP算法性能相近，但参数化模式匹配场景下KMP的效率优势尚未明确验证。
AI.method: 通过生成随机文本和DNA序列，分析不同字母表大小、模式长度及模式分布参数下两种算法的时间复杂度，并对比其在精确匹配与参数化匹配中的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，在精确匹配中朴素算法与KMP性能相近，但在参数化匹配中KMP显著更快；DNA文本实验也验证了类似结论，并发现特定结构化文本下KMP效率更优。
AI.conclusion: KMP自动机在参数化模式匹配中具有显著实践优势，其效率优势不仅适用于随机文本，也适用于DNA序列等实际数据场景。

authors_text: Duolikun Danier,Fan Zhang,David Bull
title: FloLPIPS: A Bespoke Video Quality Metric for Frame Interpoation
title_zh: FloLPIPS：用于帧插值的定制视频质量指标
abstract: Video frame interpolation (VFI) serves as a useful tool for many video processing applications. Recently, it has also been applied in the video compression domain for enhancing both conventional video codecs and learning-based compression architectures. While there has been an increased focus on the development of enhanced frame interpolation algorithms in recent years, the perceptual quality assessment of interpolated content remains an open field of research. In this paper, we present a bespoke full reference video quality metric for VFI, FloLPIPS, that builds on the popular perceptual image quality metric, LPIPS, which captures the perceptual degradation in extracted image feature space. In order to enhance the performance of LPIPS for evaluating interpolated content, we re-designed its spatial feature aggregation step by using the temporal distortion (through comparing optical flows) to weight the feature difference maps. Evaluated on the BVI-VFI database, which contains 180 test sequences with various frame interpolation artefacts, FloLPIPS shows superior correlation performance (with statistical significance) with subjective ground truth over 12 popular quality assessors. To facilitate further research in VFI quality assessment, our code is publicly available at https://danier97.github.io/FloLPIPS.
summary: Video frame interpolation (VFI) serves as a useful tool for many video processing applications. Recently, it has also been applied in the video compression domain for enhancing both conventional video codecs and learning-based compression architectures. While there has been an increased focus on the development of enhanced frame interpolation algorithms in recent years, the perceptual quality assessment of interpolated content remains an open field of research. In this paper, we present a bespoke full reference video quality metric for VFI, FloLPIPS, that builds on the popular perceptual image quality metric, LPIPS, which captures the perceptual degradation in extracted image feature space. In order to enhance the performance of LPIPS for evaluating interpolated content, we re-designed its spatial feature aggregation step by using the temporal distortion (through comparing optical flows) to weight the feature difference maps. Evaluated on the BVI-VFI database, which contains 180 test sequences with various frame interpolation artefacts, FloLPIPS shows superior correlation performance (with statistical significance) with subjective ground truth over 12 popular quality assessors. To facilitate further research in VFI quality assessment, our code is publicly available at https://danier97.github.io/FloLPIPS.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值 (VFI) 是许多视频处理应用程序的有用工具。最近，它也被应用于视频压缩领域，以增强传统的视频编解码器和基于学习的压缩架构。尽管近年来人们越来越关注增强帧插值算法的开发，但插值内容的感知质量评估仍然是一个开放的研究领域。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对 VFI 的定制完整参考视频质量指标 FloLPIPS，该指标建立在流行的感知图像质量指标 LPIPS 的基础上，可捕获提取的图像特征空间中的感知退化。为了增强 LPIPS 评估插值内容的性能，我们通过使用时间失真（通过比较光流）来对特征差异图进行加权，重新设计了其空间特征聚合步骤。在 BVI-VFI 数据库（包含 180 个具有各种帧插值伪影的测试序列）上进行评估，FloLPIPS 在 12 个流行的质量评估者中显示出与主观地面真实情况的优异相关性能（具有统计显着性）。为了促进 VFI 质量评估的进一步研究，我们的代码可在 https://danier97.github.io/FloLPIPS 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FloLPIPS的全参考视频质量评估指标，专门用于评估视频帧插值（VFI）的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管帧插值算法近年取得进展，但如何有效评估插值内容的感知质量仍是开放性问题，现有方法与主观评价的相关性不足。
AI.method: 基于LPIPS图像质量评估框架，通过引入光流计算的时序失真信息，重新设计特征差异图的加权聚合方式，增强对插值视频质量的感知敏感性。
AI.result: 在包含180个测试序列的BVI-VFI数据库上，FloLPIPS相较于12种主流评估方法，在与主观评分的相关性上表现出统计显著的优越性。
AI.conclusion: FloLPIPS通过时序信息增强的特征加权机制，有效提升了VFI质量评估的准确性，代码开源促进后续研究。

authors_text: Runmin Cong,Haowei Yang,Qiuping Jiang,Wei Gao,Haisheng Li,Cong Wang,Yao Zhao,Sam Kwong
title: BCS-Net: Boundary, Context and Semantic for Automatic COVID-19 Lung Infection Segmentation from CT Images
title_zh: BCS-Net：根据 CT 图像自动分割 COVID-19 肺部感染的边界、上下文和语义
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement 2022, Code: https://github.com/rmcong/BCS-Net-TIM22
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement 2022, Code: https://github.com/rmcong/BCS-Net-TIM22
abstract: The spread of COVID-19 has brought a huge disaster to the world, and the automatic segmentation of infection regions can help doctors to make diagnosis quickly and reduce workload. However, there are several challenges for the accurate and complete segmentation, such as the scattered infection area distribution, complex background noises, and blurred segmentation boundaries. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel network for automatic COVID-19 lung infection segmentation from CT images, named BCS-Net, which considers the boundary, context, and semantic attributes. The BCS-Net follows an encoder-decoder architecture, and more designs focus on the decoder stage that includes three progressively Boundary-Context-Semantic Reconstruction (BCSR) blocks. In each BCSR block, the attention-guided global context (AGGC) module is designed to learn the most valuable encoder features for decoder by highlighting the important spatial and boundary locations and modeling the global context dependence. Besides, a semantic guidance (SG) unit generates the semantic guidance map to refine the decoder features by aggregating multi-scale high-level features at the intermediate resolution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed framework outperforms the existing competitors both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: The spread of COVID-19 has brought a huge disaster to the world, and the automatic segmentation of infection regions can help doctors to make diagnosis quickly and reduce workload. However, there are several challenges for the accurate and complete segmentation, such as the scattered infection area distribution, complex background noises, and blurred segmentation boundaries. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel network for automatic COVID-19 lung infection segmentation from CT images, named BCS-Net, which considers the boundary, context, and semantic attributes. The BCS-Net follows an encoder-decoder architecture, and more designs focus on the decoder stage that includes three progressively Boundary-Context-Semantic Reconstruction (BCSR) blocks. In each BCSR block, the attention-guided global context (AGGC) module is designed to learn the most valuable encoder features for decoder by highlighting the important spatial and boundary locations and modeling the global context dependence. Besides, a semantic guidance (SG) unit generates the semantic guidance map to refine the decoder features by aggregating multi-scale high-level features at the intermediate resolution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed framework outperforms the existing competitors both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: COVID-19的传播给世界带来了巨大的灾难，感染区域的自动分割可以帮助医生快速做出诊断并减少工作量。然而，准确完整的分割面临着感染区域分布分散、背景噪声复杂、分割边界模糊等挑战。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种用于从 CT 图像中自动分割 COVID-19 肺部感染的新型网络，称为 BCS-Net，该网络考虑了边界、上下文和语义属性。 BCS-Net 遵循编码器-解码器架构，更多设计侧重于解码器阶段，其中包括三个渐进的边界上下文语义重建 (BCSR) 块。在每个 BCSR 块中，注意力引导的全局上下文 (AGGC) 模块旨在通过突出重要的空间和边界位置并对全局上下文依赖性进行建模来学习对解码器最有价值的编码器特征。此外，语义指导（SG）单元生成语义指导图，通过聚合中间分辨率的多尺度高级特征来细化解码器特征。大量的实验表明，我们提出的框架在质量和数量上都优于现有的竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BCS-Net网络，用于从CT图像中自动分割COVID-19肺部感染区域。
AI.motivation: COVID-19的传播需要快速准确的感染区域分割以辅助诊断，但现有方法面临感染区域分散、背景噪声复杂和边界模糊等挑战。
AI.method: 设计基于编码器-解码器架构的BCS-Net，解码器包含三个渐进式边界-上下文-语义重建（BCSR）模块，结合注意力引导的全局上下文模块（AGGC）和语义引导（SG）单元。
AI.result: 实验表明，BCS-Net在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合边界、上下文和语义信息，BCS-Net有效解决了COVID-19肺部感染分割的挑战。

authors_text: Thanh Tam Nguyen,Thanh Cong Phan,Minh Hieu Nguyen,Matthias Weidlich,Hongzhi Yin,Jun Jo,Quoc Viet Hung Nguyen
title: Model-Agnostic and Diverse Explanations for Streaming Rumour Graphs
title_zh: 对流式谣言图的模型不可知和多样化解释
abstract: The propagation of rumours on social media poses an important threat to societies, so that various techniques for rumour detection have been proposed recently. Yet, existing work focuses on \emph{what} entities constitute a rumour, but provides little support to understand \emph{why} the entities have been classified as such. This prevents an effective evaluation of the detected rumours as well as the design of countermeasures. In this work, we argue that explanations for detected rumours may be given in terms of examples of related rumours detected in the past. A diverse set of similar rumours helps users to generalize, i.e., to understand the properties that govern the detection of rumours. Since the spread of rumours in social media is commonly modelled using feature-annotated graphs, we propose a query-by-example approach that, given a rumour graph, extracts the $k$ most similar and diverse subgraphs from past rumours. The challenge is that all of the computations require fast assessment of similarities between graphs. To achieve an efficient and adaptive realization of the approach in a streaming setting, we present a novel graph representation learning technique and report on implementation considerations. Our evaluation experiments show that our approach outperforms baseline techniques in delivering meaningful explanations for various rumour propagation behaviours.
summary: The propagation of rumours on social media poses an important threat to societies, so that various techniques for rumour detection have been proposed recently. Yet, existing work focuses on \emph{what} entities constitute a rumour, but provides little support to understand \emph{why} the entities have been classified as such. This prevents an effective evaluation of the detected rumours as well as the design of countermeasures. In this work, we argue that explanations for detected rumours may be given in terms of examples of related rumours detected in the past. A diverse set of similar rumours helps users to generalize, i.e., to understand the properties that govern the detection of rumours. Since the spread of rumours in social media is commonly modelled using feature-annotated graphs, we propose a query-by-example approach that, given a rumour graph, extracts the $k$ most similar and diverse subgraphs from past rumours. The challenge is that all of the computations require fast assessment of similarities between graphs. To achieve an efficient and adaptive realization of the approach in a streaming setting, we present a novel graph representation learning technique and report on implementation considerations. Our evaluation experiments show that our approach outperforms baseline techniques in delivering meaningful explanations for various rumour propagation behaviours.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体上的谣言传播对社会构成了重要威胁，因此最近提出了各种谣言检测技术。然而，现有的工作主要关注\emph{什么}实体构成了谣言，但几乎没有提供任何支持来理解\emph{为什么}实体被归类为谣言。这阻碍了对检测到的谣言的有效评估以及对策的设计。在这项工作中，我们认为对检测到的谣言的解释可以通过过去检测到的相关谣言的例子来给出。一组不同的类似谣言可以帮助用户进行概括，即了解控制谣言检测的属性。由于社交媒体中谣言的传播通常使用特征注释图进行建模，因此我们提出了一种示例查询方法，在给定谣言图的情况下，从过去的谣言中提取 $k$ 个最相似和最多样化的子图。挑战在于所有计算都需要快速评估图之间的相似性。为了在流媒体环境中实现该方法的高效和自适应实现，我们提出了一种新颖的图表示学习技术并报告了实现注意事项。我们的评估实验表明，我们的方法在为各种谣言传播行为提供有意义的解释方面优于基线技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对流式谣言图的模型无关且多样化的解释方法，通过提取历史相似子图来解释当前谣言检测结果。
AI.motivation: 现有谣言检测方法仅关注识别谣言实体，但缺乏对分类原因的解释，导致难以评估检测效果和设计应对措施。
AI.method: 基于图表示学习技术，提出查询示例方法，在流式场景下高效提取与目标谣言图最相似且多样的历史子图作为解释。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种谣言传播行为的解释任务中优于基线技术，能提供更具意义的解释。
AI.conclusion: 通过历史相似子图的多样化解释，可增强对谣言检测逻辑的理解，为谣言防控提供有效支持。

search_text: Model-Agnostic and Diverse Explanations for Streaming Rumour Graphs 对流式谣言图的模型不可知和多样化解释 The propagation of rumours on social media poses an important threat to societies, so that various techniques for rumour detection have been proposed recently. Yet, existing work focuses on \emph{what} entities constitute a rumour, but provides little support to understand \emph{why} the entities have been classified as such. This prevents an effective evaluation of the detected rumours as well as the design of countermeasures. In this work, we argue that explanations for detected rumours may be given in terms of examples of related rumours detected in the past. A diverse set of similar rumours helps users to generalize, i.e., to understand the properties that govern the detection of rumours. Since the spread of rumours in social media is commonly modelled using feature-annotated graphs, we propose a query-by-example approach that, given a rumour graph, extracts the $k$ most similar and diverse subgraphs from past rumours. The challenge is that all of the computations require fast assessment of similarities between graphs. To achieve an efficient and adaptive realization of the approach in a streaming setting, we present a novel graph representation learning technique and report on implementation considerations. Our evaluation experiments show that our approach outperforms baseline techniques in delivering meaningful explanations for various rumour propagation behaviours. 社交媒体上的谣言传播对社会构成了重要威胁，因此最近提出了各种谣言检测技术。然而，现有的工作主要关注\emph{什么}实体构成了谣言，但几乎没有提供任何支持来理解\emph{为什么}实体被归类为谣言。这阻碍了对检测到的谣言的有效评估以及对策的设计。在这项工作中，我们认为对检测到的谣言的解释可以通过过去检测到的相关谣言的例子来给出。一组不同的类似谣言可以帮助用户进行概括，即了解控制谣言检测的属性。由于社交媒体中谣言的传播通常使用特征注释图进行建模，因此我们提出了一种示例查询方法，在给定谣言图的情况下，从过去的谣言中提取 $k$ 个最相似和最多样化的子图。挑战在于所有计算都需要快速评估图之间的相似性。为了在流媒体环境中实现该方法的高效和自适应实现，我们提出了一种新颖的图表示学习技术并报告了实现注意事项。我们的评估实验表明，我们的方法在为各种谣言传播行为提供有意义的解释方面优于基线技术。 本文提出一种针对流式谣言图的模型无关且多样化的解释方法，通过提取历史相似子图来解释当前谣言检测结果。 Thanh Tam Nguyen,Thanh Cong Phan,Minh Hieu Nguyen,Matthias Weidlich,Hongzhi Yin,Jun Jo,Quoc Viet Hung Nguyen cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Moshe Shienman,Vadim Indelman
title: Nonmyopic Distilled Data Association Belief Space Planning Under Budget Constraints
title_zh: 预算约束下的非短视蒸馏数据关联信念空间规划
comment: Accepted to International Symposium of Robotic Research (ISRR) 2022
comments: Accepted to International Symposium of Robotic Research (ISRR) 2022
abstract: Autonomous agents operating in perceptually aliased environments should ideally be able to solve the data association problem. Yet, planning for future actions while considering this problem is not trivial. State of the art approaches therefore use multi-modal hypotheses to represent the states of the agent and of the environment. However, explicitly considering all possible data associations, the number of hypotheses grows exponentially with the planning horizon. As such, the corresponding Belief Space Planning problem quickly becomes unsolvable. Moreover, under hard computational budget constraints, some non-negligible hypotheses must eventually be pruned in both planning and inference. Nevertheless, the two processes are generally treated separately and the effect of budget constraints in one process over the other was barely studied. We present a computationally efficient method to solve the nonmyopic Belief Space Planning problem while reasoning about data association. Moreover, we rigorously analyze the effects of budget constraints in both inference and planning.
summary: Autonomous agents operating in perceptually aliased environments should ideally be able to solve the data association problem. Yet, planning for future actions while considering this problem is not trivial. State of the art approaches therefore use multi-modal hypotheses to represent the states of the agent and of the environment. However, explicitly considering all possible data associations, the number of hypotheses grows exponentially with the planning horizon. As such, the corresponding Belief Space Planning problem quickly becomes unsolvable. Moreover, under hard computational budget constraints, some non-negligible hypotheses must eventually be pruned in both planning and inference. Nevertheless, the two processes are generally treated separately and the effect of budget constraints in one process over the other was barely studied. We present a computationally efficient method to solve the nonmyopic Belief Space Planning problem while reasoning about data association. Moreover, we rigorously analyze the effects of budget constraints in both inference and planning.
abstract_zh: 理想情况下，在感知别名环境中运行的自主代理应该能够解决数据关联问题。然而，在考虑这个问题的同时规划未来的行动并非易事。因此，最先进的方法使用多模态假设来表示主体和环境的状态。然而，明确考虑所有可能的数据关联，假设的数量随着规划范围呈指数增长。因此，相应的信念空间规划问题很快就变得无法解决。此外，在严格的计算预算约束下，一些不可忽略的假设最终必须在规划和推理中被修剪。然而，这两个过程通常是分开处理的，并且预算约束对一个过程相对于另一个过程的影响几乎没有研究。我们提出了一种计算有效的方法来解决非短视置信空间规划问题，同时推理数据关联。此外，我们严格分析了预算约束在推理和规划中的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在计算预算限制下解决非近视数据关联信念空间规划问题的方法，并分析预算约束对规划与推理的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多模态假设时计算复杂度呈指数增长，且规划与推理阶段的预算约束相互影响未被充分研究。
AI.method: 结合数据关联蒸馏技术与预算约束分析，设计高效剪枝策略，统一优化规划与推理阶段的计算资源分配。
AI.result: 提出的方法在保持规划质量的同时显著降低计算开销，并量化了预算约束对规划性能的动态影响机制。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦假设空间与预算约束的耦合关系，为复杂环境下的自主决策提供了可扩展的规划框架。

authors_text: Yansong Tang,Xingyu Liu,Xumin Yu,Danyang Zhang,Jiwen Lu,Jie Zhou
title: Learning from Temporal Spatial Cubism for Cross-Dataset Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: 学习时空立体主义进行跨数据集基于骨架的动作识别
abstract: Rapid progress and superior performance have been achieved for skeleton-based action recognition recently. In this article, we investigate this problem under a cross-dataset setting, which is a new, pragmatic, and challenging task in real-world scenarios. Following the unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) paradigm, the action labels are only available on a source dataset, but unavailable on a target dataset in the training stage. Different from the conventional adversarial learning-based approaches for UDA, we utilize a self-supervision scheme to reduce the domain shift between two skeleton-based action datasets. Our inspiration is drawn from Cubism, an art genre from the early 20th century, which breaks and reassembles the objects to convey a greater context. By segmenting and permuting temporal segments or human body parts, we design two self-supervised learning classification tasks to explore the temporal and spatial dependency of a skeleton-based action and improve the generalization ability of the model. We conduct experiments on six datasets for skeleton-based action recognition, including three large-scale datasets (NTU RGB+D, PKU-MMD, and Kinetics) where new cross-dataset settings and benchmarks are established. Extensive results demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches. The source codes of our model and all the compared methods are available at https://github.com/shanice-l/st-cubism.
summary: Rapid progress and superior performance have been achieved for skeleton-based action recognition recently. In this article, we investigate this problem under a cross-dataset setting, which is a new, pragmatic, and challenging task in real-world scenarios. Following the unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) paradigm, the action labels are only available on a source dataset, but unavailable on a target dataset in the training stage. Different from the conventional adversarial learning-based approaches for UDA, we utilize a self-supervision scheme to reduce the domain shift between two skeleton-based action datasets. Our inspiration is drawn from Cubism, an art genre from the early 20th century, which breaks and reassembles the objects to convey a greater context. By segmenting and permuting temporal segments or human body parts, we design two self-supervised learning classification tasks to explore the temporal and spatial dependency of a skeleton-based action and improve the generalization ability of the model. We conduct experiments on six datasets for skeleton-based action recognition, including three large-scale datasets (NTU RGB+D, PKU-MMD, and Kinetics) where new cross-dataset settings and benchmarks are established. Extensive results demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches. The source codes of our model and all the compared methods are available at https://github.com/shanice-l/st-cubism.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于骨架的动作识别取得了快速的进展和优越的性能。在本文中，我们在跨数据集设置下研究这个问题，这是现实场景中一项新的、务实的、具有挑战性的任务。遵循无监督域适应（UDA）范例，动作标签仅在源数据集上可用，但在训练阶段的目标数据集上不可用。与传统的基于对抗性学习的 UDA 方法不同，我们利用自我监督方案来减少两个基于骨架的动作数据集之间的域转移。我们的灵感来自立体主义，这是一种 20 世纪初的艺术流派，它将物体分解并重新组合以传达更大的背景。通过对时间段或人体部位进行分割和排列，我们设计了两个自监督学习分类任务，以探索基于骨架的动作的时间和空间依赖性，并提高模型的泛化能力。我们在六个数据集上进行了基于骨架的动作识别的实验，其中包括三个大型数据集（NTU RGB+D、PKU-MMD 和 Kinetics），其中建立了新的跨数据集设置和基准。大量结果表明我们的方法优于最先进的方法。我们的模型和所有比较方法的源代码可在 https://github.com/shanice-l/st-cubism 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨数据集的骨架动作识别问题，提出基于时空立方主义的自监督学习方法以减少领域差异。
AI.motivation: 现有跨数据集动作识别方法在领域适应上效果有限，尤其当目标数据集无标签时，需探索更有效的自监督学习策略。
AI.method: 受立体主义艺术启发，通过分割重组时间片段和身体部位，设计时空依赖性自监督分类任务，增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在六个数据集（包括NTU RGB+D等）实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的时空立方主义方法有效缓解跨数据集领域偏移，为无标签目标数据集的动作识别提供新思路。

motivation: 现有跨数据集动作识别方法在领域适应上效果有限，尤其当目标数据集无标签时，需探索更有效的自监督学习策略。
method: 受立体主义艺术启发，通过分割重组时间片段和身体部位，设计时空依赖性自监督分类任务，增强模型泛化能力。
result: 在六个数据集（包括NTU RGB+D等）实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进算法，代码已开源。
conclusion: 提出的时空立方主义方法有效缓解跨数据集领域偏移，为无标签目标数据集的动作识别提供新思路。
search_text: Learning from Temporal Spatial Cubism for Cross-Dataset Skeleton-based Action Recognition 学习时空立体主义进行跨数据集基于骨架的动作识别 Rapid progress and superior performance have been achieved for skeleton-based action recognition recently. In this article, we investigate this problem under a cross-dataset setting, which is a new, pragmatic, and challenging task in real-world scenarios. Following the unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) paradigm, the action labels are only available on a source dataset, but unavailable on a target dataset in the training stage. Different from the conventional adversarial learning-based approaches for UDA, we utilize a self-supervision scheme to reduce the domain shift between two skeleton-based action datasets. Our inspiration is drawn from Cubism, an art genre from the early 20th century, which breaks and reassembles the objects to convey a greater context. By segmenting and permuting temporal segments or human body parts, we design two self-supervised learning classification tasks to explore the temporal and spatial dependency of a skeleton-based action and improve the generalization ability of the model. We conduct experiments on six datasets for skeleton-based action recognition, including three large-scale datasets (NTU RGB+D, PKU-MMD, and Kinetics) where new cross-dataset settings and benchmarks are established. Extensive results demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches. The source codes of our model and all the compared methods are available at https://github.com/shanice-l/st-cubism. 近年来，基于骨架的动作识别取得了快速的进展和优越的性能。在本文中，我们在跨数据集设置下研究这个问题，这是现实场景中一项新的、务实的、具有挑战性的任务。遵循无监督域适应（UDA）范例，动作标签仅在源数据集上可用，但在训练阶段的目标数据集上不可用。与传统的基于对抗性学习的 UDA 方法不同，我们利用自我监督方案来减少两个基于骨架的动作数据集之间的域转移。我们的灵感来自立体主义，这是一种 20 世纪初的艺术流派，它将物体分解并重新组合以传达更大的背景。通过对时间段或人体部位进行分割和排列，我们设计了两个自监督学习分类任务，以探索基于骨架的动作的时间和空间依赖性，并提高模型的泛化能力。我们在六个数据集上进行了基于骨架的动作识别的实验，其中包括三个大型数据集（NTU RGB+D、PKU-MMD 和 Kinetics），其中建立了新的跨数据集设置和基准。大量结果表明我们的方法优于最先进的方法。我们的模型和所有比较方法的源代码可在 https://github.com/shanice-l/st-cubism 获取。 本文研究跨数据集的骨架动作识别问题，提出基于时空立方主义的自监督学习方法以减少领域差异。 Yansong Tang,Xingyu Liu,Xumin Yu,Danyang Zhang,Jiwen Lu,Jie Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Tsachi Blau,Roy Ganz,Bahjat Kawar,Alex Bronstein,Michael Elad
title: Threat Model-Agnostic Adversarial Defense using Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用扩散模型的与威胁模型无关的对抗性防御
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are highly sensitive to imperceptible malicious perturbations, known as adversarial attacks. Following the discovery of this vulnerability in real-world imaging and vision applications, the associated safety concerns have attracted vast research attention, and many defense techniques have been developed. Most of these defense methods rely on adversarial training (AT) -- training the classification network on images perturbed according to a specific threat model, which defines the magnitude of the allowed modification. Although AT leads to promising results, training on a specific threat model fails to generalize to other types of perturbations. A different approach utilizes a preprocessing step to remove the adversarial perturbation from the attacked image. In this work, we follow the latter path and aim to develop a technique that leads to robust classifiers across various realizations of threat models. To this end, we harness the recent advances in stochastic generative modeling, and means to leverage these for sampling from conditional distributions. Our defense relies on an addition of Gaussian i.i.d noise to the attacked image, followed by a pretrained diffusion process -- an architecture that performs a stochastic iterative process over a denoising network, yielding a high perceptual quality denoised outcome. The obtained robustness with this stochastic preprocessing step is validated through extensive experiments on the CIFAR-10 dataset, showing that our method outperforms the leading defense methods under various threat models.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are highly sensitive to imperceptible malicious perturbations, known as adversarial attacks. Following the discovery of this vulnerability in real-world imaging and vision applications, the associated safety concerns have attracted vast research attention, and many defense techniques have been developed. Most of these defense methods rely on adversarial training (AT) -- training the classification network on images perturbed according to a specific threat model, which defines the magnitude of the allowed modification. Although AT leads to promising results, training on a specific threat model fails to generalize to other types of perturbations. A different approach utilizes a preprocessing step to remove the adversarial perturbation from the attacked image. In this work, we follow the latter path and aim to develop a technique that leads to robust classifiers across various realizations of threat models. To this end, we harness the recent advances in stochastic generative modeling, and means to leverage these for sampling from conditional distributions. Our defense relies on an addition of Gaussian i.i.d noise to the attacked image, followed by a pretrained diffusion process -- an architecture that performs a stochastic iterative process over a denoising network, yielding a high perceptual quality denoised outcome. The obtained robustness with this stochastic preprocessing step is validated through extensive experiments on the CIFAR-10 dataset, showing that our method outperforms the leading defense methods under various threat models.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 对难以察觉的恶意扰动（称为对抗性攻击）高度敏感。在现实世界的成像和视觉应用中发现这一漏洞后，相关的安全问题引起了广泛的研究关注，并且开发了许多防御技术。这些防御方法大多数依赖于对抗性训练（AT）——根据特定威胁模型对受到扰动的图像进行分类网络训练，该模型定义了允许修改的幅度。尽管 AT 带来了有希望的结果，但对特定威胁模型的训练无法推广到其他类型的扰动。另一种方法利用预处理步骤来消除受攻击图像中的对抗性扰动。在这项工作中，我们遵循后一种路径，旨在开发一种技术，在威胁模型的各种实现中提供强大的分类器。为此，我们利用随机生成模型的最新进展，以及利用这些模型从条件分布中进行采样的方法。我们的防御依赖于向受攻击图像添加高斯独立同分布噪声，然后进行预训练的扩散过程——一种在去噪网络上执行随机迭代过程的架构，产生高感知质量的去噪结果。通过对 CIFAR-10 数据集的大量实验验证了这种随机预处理步骤所获得的鲁棒性，表明我们的方法在各种威胁模型下优于领先的防御方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的威胁模型无关的对抗防御方法，通过添加高斯噪声和预训练扩散过程提升分类器鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法依赖特定威胁模型，难以泛化到其他攻击类型，而预处理方法尚未有效解决跨威胁模型的鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 在输入图像中添加高斯i.i.d噪声后，通过预训练扩散模型进行迭代去噪，利用生成模型的条件分布采样能力消除对抗扰动。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上实验表明，该方法在多种威胁模型下均优于现有领先防御技术。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型的随机预处理步骤可实现跨威胁模型的鲁棒性，为对抗攻击防御提供了新的通用解决方案。

authors_text: Xingyu Liu,Gu Wang,Yi Li,Xiangyang Ji
title: CATRE: Iterative Point Clouds Alignment for Category-level Object Pose Refinement
title_zh: CATRE：用于类别级对象姿势细化的迭代点云对齐
abstract: While category-level 9DoF object pose estimation has emerged recently, previous correspondence-based or direct regression methods are both limited in accuracy due to the huge intra-category variances in object shape and color, etc. Orthogonal to them, this work presents a category-level object pose and size refiner CATRE, which is able to iteratively enhance pose estimate from point clouds to produce accurate results. Given an initial pose estimate, CATRE predicts a relative transformation between the initial pose and ground truth by means of aligning the partially observed point cloud and an abstract shape prior. In specific, we propose a novel disentangled architecture being aware of the inherent distinctions between rotation and translation/size estimation. Extensive experiments show that our approach remarkably outperforms state-of-the-art methods on REAL275, CAMERA25, and LM benchmarks up to a speed of ~85.32Hz, and achieves competitive results on category-level tracking. We further demonstrate that CATRE can perform pose refinement on unseen category. Code and trained models are available.
summary: While category-level 9DoF object pose estimation has emerged recently, previous correspondence-based or direct regression methods are both limited in accuracy due to the huge intra-category variances in object shape and color, etc. Orthogonal to them, this work presents a category-level object pose and size refiner CATRE, which is able to iteratively enhance pose estimate from point clouds to produce accurate results. Given an initial pose estimate, CATRE predicts a relative transformation between the initial pose and ground truth by means of aligning the partially observed point cloud and an abstract shape prior. In specific, we propose a novel disentangled architecture being aware of the inherent distinctions between rotation and translation/size estimation. Extensive experiments show that our approach remarkably outperforms state-of-the-art methods on REAL275, CAMERA25, and LM benchmarks up to a speed of ~85.32Hz, and achieves competitive results on category-level tracking. We further demonstrate that CATRE can perform pose refinement on unseen category. Code and trained models are available.
abstract_zh: 虽然最近出现了类别级9DoF物体姿态估计，但由于物体形状和颜色等方面存在巨大的类别内差异，以前的基于对应或直接回归的方法在准确性上都受到限制。与它们正交，本文提出了一种类别级物体姿态和尺寸细化器CATRE，它能够迭代增强点云的姿态估计以产生准确的结果。给定初始姿态估计，CATRE 通过对齐部分观察到的点云和先验抽象形状来预测初始姿态和地面实况之间的相对变换。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的解缠结架构，该架构意识到旋转和平移/大小估计之间的固有区别。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 REAL275、CAMERA25 和 LM 基准测试上的性能显着优于最先进的方法，速度高达 ~85.32Hz，并在类别级跟踪上取得了有竞争力的结果。我们进一步证明 CATRE 可以对看不见的类别进行姿势细化。代码和经过训练的模型可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CATRE方法，通过迭代点云对齐实现类别级物体位姿优化。
AI.motivation: 现有基于对应关系或直接回归的方法因物体形状和颜色的类内差异导致精度不足，需改进位姿估计准确性。
AI.method: CATRE通过初始位姿估计与抽象形状先验对齐部分观测点云，预测初始位姿与真实值的相对变换，采用解耦架构区分旋转与平移/尺寸估计。
AI.result: 在REAL275、CAMERA25和LM基准测试中显著优于现有方法，速度达85.32Hz，并在类别级跟踪和未见类别中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: CATRE通过点云与形状先验的迭代对齐有效提升位姿估计精度，方法具有良好的泛化能力且提供代码与模型。

Extensive experiments show that our approach remarkably outperforms state-of-the-art methods on REAL275, CAMERA25, and LM benchmarks up to a speed of ~85.32Hz, and achieves competitive results on category-level tracking.
