Code and trained models are available. 虽然最近出现了类别级9DoF物体姿态估计，但由于物体形状和颜色等方面存在巨大的类别内差异，以前的基于对应或直接回归的方法在准确性上都受到限制。与它们正交，本文提出了一种类别级物体姿态和尺寸细化器CATRE，它能够迭代增强点云的姿态估计以产生准确的结果。给定初始姿态估计，CATRE 通过对齐部分观察到的点云和先验抽象形状来预测初始姿态和地面实况之间的相对变换。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的解缠结架构，该架构意识到旋转和平移/大小估计之间的固有区别。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 REAL275、CAMERA25 和 LM 基准测试上的性能显着优于最先进的方法，速度高达 ~85.32Hz，并在类别级跟踪上取得了有竞争力的结果。我们进一步证明 CATRE 可以对看不见的类别进行姿势细化。代码和经过训练的模型可用。 本文提出CATRE方法，通过迭代点云对齐实现类别级物体位姿优化。 Xingyu Liu,Gu Wang,Yi Li,Xiangyang Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Yili Wang,Xin Li,Kun Xu,Dongliang He,Qi Zhang,Fu Li,Errui Ding
title: Neural Color Operators for Sequential Image Retouching
title_zh: 用于连续图像修饰的神经颜色算子
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/amberwangyili/neurop
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/amberwangyili/neurop
abstract: We propose a novel image retouching method by modeling the retouching process as performing a sequence of newly introduced trainable neural color operators. The neural color operator mimics the behavior of traditional color operators and learns pixelwise color transformation while its strength is controlled by a scalar. To reflect the homomorphism property of color operators, we employ equivariant mapping and adopt an encoder-decoder structure which maps the non-linear color transformation to a much simpler transformation (i.e., translation) in a high dimensional space. The scalar strength of each neural color operator is predicted using CNN based strength predictors by analyzing global image statistics. Overall, our method is rather lightweight and offers flexible controls. Experiments and user studies on public datasets show that our method consistently achieves the best results compared with SOTA methods in both quantitative measures and visual qualities. The code and pretrained models are provided at https://github.com/amberwangyili/neurop
summary: We propose a novel image retouching method by modeling the retouching process as performing a sequence of newly introduced trainable neural color operators. The neural color operator mimics the behavior of traditional color operators and learns pixelwise color transformation while its strength is controlled by a scalar. To reflect the homomorphism property of color operators, we employ equivariant mapping and adopt an encoder-decoder structure which maps the non-linear color transformation to a much simpler transformation (i.e., translation) in a high dimensional space. The scalar strength of each neural color operator is predicted using CNN based strength predictors by analyzing global image statistics. Overall, our method is rather lightweight and offers flexible controls. Experiments and user studies on public datasets show that our method consistently achieves the best results compared with SOTA methods in both quantitative measures and visual qualities. The code and pretrained models are provided at https://github.com/amberwangyili/neurop
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的图像修饰方法，通过将修饰过程建模为执行一系列新引入的可训练神经颜色算子。神经颜色算子模仿传统颜色算子的行为并学习像素级颜色变换，同时其强度由标量控制。为了反映颜色算子的同态性质，我们采用等变映射并采用编码器-解码器结构，将非线性颜色变换映射到高维空间中更简单的变换（即平移）。通过分析全局图像统计数据，使用基于 CNN 的强度预测器来预测每个神经颜色算子的标量强度。总的来说，我们的方法相当轻量级并且提供灵活的控制。对公共数据集的实验和用户研究表明，与 SOTA 方法相比，我们的方法在定量测量和视觉质量方面始终取得了最佳结果。代码和预训练模型位于 https://github.com/amberwangyili/neurop

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经颜色算子的图像润色方法，通过序列操作实现灵活的图像调整。
AI.motivation: 传统图像润色方法缺乏灵活性与可控性，现有深度学习方法难以有效建模颜色变换的复杂性。
AI.method: 设计可训练的神经颜色算子，结合等变映射与编码器-解码器结构，将非线性颜色变换转化为高维空间的简单变换，并通过CNN预测算子强度参数。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实验显示，该方法在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于现有SOTA方法，代码与预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 神经颜色算子框架实现了轻量级且高度可控的图像润色，为后续研究提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Harsh Maheshwari
title: Performance degradation of ImageNet trained models by simple image transformations
title_zh: 通过简单的图像转换，ImageNet 训练模型的性能下降
abstract: ImageNet trained PyTorch models are generally preferred as the off-the-shelf models for direct use or for initialisation in most computer vision tasks. In this paper, we simply test a representative set of these convolution and transformer based models under many simple image transformations like horizontal shifting, vertical shifting, scaling, rotation, presence of Gaussian noise, cutout, horizontal flip and vertical flip and report the performance drop caused by such transformations. We find that even simple transformations like rotating the image by 10° or zooming in by 20% can reduce the top-1 accuracy of models like ResNet152 by 1%+. The code is available at https://github.com/harshm121/imagenet-transformation-degradation.
summary: ImageNet trained PyTorch models are generally preferred as the off-the-shelf models for direct use or for initialisation in most computer vision tasks. In this paper, we simply test a representative set of these convolution and transformer based models under many simple image transformations like horizontal shifting, vertical shifting, scaling, rotation, presence of Gaussian noise, cutout, horizontal flip and vertical flip and report the performance drop caused by such transformations. We find that even simple transformations like rotating the image by 10° or zooming in by 20% can reduce the top-1 accuracy of models like ResNet152 by 1%+. The code is available at https://github.com/harshm121/imagenet-transformation-degradation.
abstract_zh: 经过 ImageNet 训练的 PyTorch 模型通常优选作为直接使用或在大多数计算机视觉任务中初始化的现成模型。在本文中，我们简单地在许多简单的图像变换（如水平移位、垂直移位、缩放、旋转、高斯噪声的存在、剪切、水平翻转和垂直翻转）下测试这些基于卷积和变换器的模型的代表性集合，并报告由此类变换引起的性能下降。我们发现，即使是简单的变换（例如将图像旋转 10° 或放大 20%）也会使 ResNet152 等模型的 top-1 精度降低 1% 以上。该代码可在 https://github.com/harshm121/imagenet-transformation-degradation 获取。

AI.tldr: 评估ImageNet训练模型在多种简单图像变换下的性能下降情况
AI.motivation: 尽管ImageNet训练的模型被广泛使用，但其在简单图像变换下的鲁棒性尚未被充分研究，影响实际应用中的性能
AI.method: 对卷积和Transformer模型应用水平/垂直移动、缩放、旋转、噪声、cutout和翻转等变换，评估准确率下降
AI.result: 实验发现，如ResNet152等模型在10度旋转或20%缩放后，top-1准确率下降超过1%
AI.conclusion: 现有ImageNet模型对简单图像变换敏感，需进一步研究以提高鲁棒性

authors_text: Kai Gao,Jingjin Yu
title: Toward Efficient Task Planning for Dual-Arm Tabletop Object Rearrangement
title_zh: 实现双臂桌面对象重新排列的高效任务规划
abstract: We investigate the problem of coordinating two robot arms to solve non-monotone tabletop multi-object rearrangement tasks. In a non-monotone rearrangement task, complex object-object dependencies exist that require moving some objects multiple times to solve an instance. In working with two arms in a large workspace, some objects must be handed off between the robots, which further complicates the planning process. For the challenging dual-arm tabletop rearrangement problem, we develop effective task planning algorithms for scheduling the pick-n-place sequence that can be properly distributed between the two arms. We show that, even without using a sophisticated motion planner, our method achieves significant time savings in comparison to greedy approaches and naive parallelization of single-robot plans.
summary: We investigate the problem of coordinating two robot arms to solve non-monotone tabletop multi-object rearrangement tasks. In a non-monotone rearrangement task, complex object-object dependencies exist that require moving some objects multiple times to solve an instance. In working with two arms in a large workspace, some objects must be handed off between the robots, which further complicates the planning process. For the challenging dual-arm tabletop rearrangement problem, we develop effective task planning algorithms for scheduling the pick-n-place sequence that can be properly distributed between the two arms. We show that, even without using a sophisticated motion planner, our method achieves significant time savings in comparison to greedy approaches and naive parallelization of single-robot plans.
abstract_zh: 我们研究协调两个机器人手臂来解决非单调桌面多对象重新排列任务的问题。在非单调重排任务中，存在复杂的对象-对象依赖关系，需要多次移动某些对象才能解决实例问题。在大型工作空间中使用两只手臂工作时，必须在机器人之间传递一些物体，这进一步使规划过程变得复杂。对于具有挑战性的双臂桌面重新排列问题，我们开发了有效的任务规划算法来调度可以在两个臂之间正确分配的拾取和放置序列。我们表明，即使不使用复杂的运动规划器，与单机器人计划的贪婪方法和朴素并行化相比，我们的方法也能节省大量时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究双臂协作完成桌面多物体非单调重排任务的高效任务规划方法。
AI.motivation: 非单调重排任务存在复杂的物体依赖关系，且双臂协作需处理物体交接问题，传统方法效率低下。
AI.method: 开发任务规划算法调度双臂的拾取-放置序列，通过合理分配任务实现高效协作。
AI.result: 无需复杂运动规划即可显著优于贪心算法和单臂计划的简单并行化方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了双臂桌面重排的规划难题，为复杂场景提供可行解决方案。

For the challenging dual-arm tabletop rearrangement problem, we develop effective task planning algorithms for scheduling the pick-n-place sequence that can be properly distributed between the two arms. We show that, even without using a sophisticated motion planner, our method achieves significant time savings in comparison to greedy approaches and naive parallelization of single-robot plans. 我们研究协调两个机器人手臂来解决非单调桌面多对象重新排列任务的问题。在非单调重排任务中，存在复杂的对象-对象依赖关系，需要多次移动某些对象才能解决实例问题。在大型工作空间中使用两只手臂工作时，必须在机器人之间传递一些物体，这进一步使规划过程变得复杂。对于具有挑战性的双臂桌面重新排列问题，我们开发了有效的任务规划算法来调度可以在两个臂之间正确分配的拾取和放置序列。我们表明，即使不使用复杂的运动规划器，与单机器人计划的贪婪方法和朴素并行化相比，我们的方法也能节省大量时间。 本文研究双臂协作完成桌面多物体非单调重排任务的高效任务规划方法。 Kai Gao,Jingjin Yu cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Yi Li,Honghao Lin,David P. Woodruff,Yuheng Zhang
title: Streaming Algorithms with Large Approximation Factors
title_zh: 具有大近似因子的流算法
abstract: We initiate a broad study of classical problems in the streaming model with insertions and deletions in the setting where we allow the approximation factor $α$ to be much larger than $1$. Such algorithms can use significantly less memory than the usual setting for which $α= 1+ε$ for an $ε\in (0,1)$. We study large approximations for a number of problems in sketching and streaming and the following are some of our results. For the $\ell_p$ norm/quasinorm $\|x\|_p$ of an $n$-dimensional vector $x$, $0 < p \le 2$, we show that obtaining a $\poly(n)$-approximation requires the same amount of memory as obtaining an $O(1)$-approximation for any $M = n^{Θ(1)}$. For estimating the $\ell_p$ norm, $p > 2$, we show an upper bound of $O(n^{1-2/p} (\log n \allowbreak \log M)/α^{2})$ bits for an $α$-approximation, and give a matching lower bound, for almost the full range of $α\geq 1$ for linear sketches. For the $\ell_2$-heavy hitters problem, we show that the known lower bound of $Ω(k \log n\log M)$ bits for identifying $(1/k)$-heavy hitters holds even if we are allowed to output items that are $1/(αk)$-heavy, for almost the full range of $α$, provided the algorithm succeeds with probability $1-O(1/n)$. We also obtain a lower bound for linear sketches that is tight even for constant probability algorithms. For estimating the number $\ell_0$ of distinct elements, we give an $n^{1/t}$-approximation algorithm using $O(t\log \log M)$ bits of space, as well as a lower bound of $Ω(t)$ bits, both excluding the storage of random bits.
summary: We initiate a broad study of classical problems in the streaming model with insertions and deletions in the setting where we allow the approximation factor $α$ to be much larger than $1$. Such algorithms can use significantly less memory than the usual setting for which $α= 1+ε$ for an $ε\in (0,1)$. We study large approximations for a number of problems in sketching and streaming and the following are some of our results. For the $\ell_p$ norm/quasinorm $\|x\|_p$ of an $n$-dimensional vector $x$, $0 < p \le 2$, we show that obtaining a $\poly(n)$-approximation requires the same amount of memory as obtaining an $O(1)$-approximation for any $M = n^{Θ(1)}$. For estimating the $\ell_p$ norm, $p > 2$, we show an upper bound of $O(n^{1-2/p} (\log n \allowbreak \log M)/α^{2})$ bits for an $α$-approximation, and give a matching lower bound, for almost the full range of $α\geq 1$ for linear sketches. For the $\ell_2$-heavy hitters problem, we show that the known lower bound of $Ω(k \log n\log M)$ bits for identifying $(1/k)$-heavy hitters holds even if we are allowed to output items that are $1/(αk)$-heavy, for almost the full range of $α$, provided the algorithm succeeds with probability $1-O(1/n)$. We also obtain a lower bound for linear sketches that is tight even for constant probability algorithms. For estimating the number $\ell_0$ of distinct elements, we give an $n^{1/t}$-approximation algorithm using $O(t\log \log M)$ bits of space, as well as a lower bound of $Ω(t)$ bits, both excluding the storage of random bits.
abstract_zh: 我们在允许近似因子 $α$ 远大于 $1$ 的情况下，对流模型中的插入和删除经典问题进行了广泛的研究。与通常的设置相比，此类算法使用的内存要少得多，对于 $ε\in (0,1)$，$α= 1+ε$。我们研究了草图和流处理中许多问题的大近似，以下是我们的一些结果。对于 $n$ 维向量 $x$ 的 $\ell_p$ 范数/拟范数 $\|x\|_p$，$0 < p \le 2$，我们表明获得 $\poly(n)$ 近似值需要与获得任何 $M = n^{θ(1)}$ 的 $O(1)$ 近似值相同的内存量。为了估计 $\ell_p$ 范数 $p > 2$，我们显示了 $O(n^{1-2/p} (\log n \allowbreak \log M)/α^{2})$ 位的 $α$ 近似上限，并给出了匹配的下界，几乎适用于线性草图的 $α\geq 1$ 的整个范围。对于 $\ell_2$-重击者问题，我们表明，即使我们被允许输出 $1/(αk)$-重的项目，对于几乎整个 $α$ 范围，用于识别 $(1/k)$-重击者的 $Ω(k \log n\log M)$ 位的已知下界仍然成立，前提是算法以 $1-O(1/n)$ 的概率成功。我们还获得了线性草图的下界，即使对于恒定概率算法，该下界也是严格的。为了估计不同元素的数量 $\ell_0$，我们使用 $O(t\log \log M)$ 位空间以及 $Ω(t)$ 位的下限给出 $n^{1/t}$ 近似算法，两者都不包括随机位的存储。

AI.tldr: 研究在允许较大近似因子的流模型中，经典问题的内存需求与算法性能关系。
AI.motivation: 传统流算法通常要求近似因子接近1，但实际应用中放宽近似因子可能显著减少内存消耗，而相关理论研究不足。
AI.method: 通过分析不同问题的上下界，设计算法并证明其内存复杂度，结合线性 sketch 技术与概率分析。
AI.result: 证明ℓ_p范数估计、ℓ_2重 hitters及ℓ_0计数问题在大近似因子下的内存需求界限，提出多项式近似算法并匹配下界。
AI.conclusion: 放宽近似因子可有效降低流算法内存需求，但存在理论极限，为实际应用提供优化方向。

authors_text: Zhihua Cheng,Xuejin Chen
title: Effect of Instance Normalization on Fine-Grained Control for Sketch-Based Face Image Generation
title_zh: 实例归一化对基于草图的人脸图像生成的细粒度控制的影响
abstract: Sketching is an intuitive and effective way for content creation. While significant progress has been made for photorealistic image generation by using generative adversarial networks, it remains challenging to take a fine-grained control on synthetic content. The instance normalization layer, which is widely adopted in existing image translation networks, washes away details in the input sketch and leads to loss of precise control on the desired shape of the generated face images. In this paper, we comprehensively investigate the effect of instance normalization on generating photorealistic face images from hand-drawn sketches. We first introduce a visualization approach to analyze the feature embedding for sketches with a group of specific changes. Based on the visual analysis, we modify the instance normalization layers in the baseline image translation model. We elaborate a new set of hand-drawn sketches with 11 categories of specially designed changes and conduct extensive experimental analysis. The results and user studies demonstrate that our method markedly improve the quality of synthesized images and the conformance with user intention.
summary: Sketching is an intuitive and effective way for content creation. While significant progress has been made for photorealistic image generation by using generative adversarial networks, it remains challenging to take a fine-grained control on synthetic content. The instance normalization layer, which is widely adopted in existing image translation networks, washes away details in the input sketch and leads to loss of precise control on the desired shape of the generated face images. In this paper, we comprehensively investigate the effect of instance normalization on generating photorealistic face images from hand-drawn sketches. We first introduce a visualization approach to analyze the feature embedding for sketches with a group of specific changes. Based on the visual analysis, we modify the instance normalization layers in the baseline image translation model. We elaborate a new set of hand-drawn sketches with 11 categories of specially designed changes and conduct extensive experimental analysis. The results and user studies demonstrate that our method markedly improve the quality of synthesized images and the conformance with user intention.
abstract_zh: 草图绘制是一种直观且有效的内容创建方式。尽管使用生成对抗网络在逼真图像生成方面取得了重大进展，但对合成内容进行细粒度控制仍然具有挑战性。现有图像翻译网络中广泛采用的实例归一化层会消除输入草图中的细节，并导致失去对生成的面部图像所需形状的精确控制。在本文中，我们全面研究了实例归一化对从手绘草图生成逼真的面部图像的影响。我们首先引入一种可视化方法来分析具有一组特定变化的草图的特征嵌入。基于视觉分析，我们修改了基线图像翻译模型中的实例归一化层。我们精心制作了一套新的手绘草图，其中包含 11 类专门设计的变化，并进行了广泛的实验分析。结果和用户研究表明，我们的方法显着提高了合成图像的质量以及与用户意图的一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究实例归一化对基于草图的人脸图像生成中细粒度控制的影响，并提出改进方法以提升生成质量与用户意图符合度。
AI.motivation: 现有图像翻译网络中的实例归一化层会模糊输入草图细节，导致生成人脸形状控制不精确，亟需改进细粒度控制能力。
AI.method: 引入可视化方法分析草图特征嵌入，修改基线模型的实例归一化层，并设计包含11类特定变化的手绘草图进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验与用户研究表明，改进方法显著提升合成图像质量及与用户意图的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析实例归一化的影响并优化网络结构，有效解决了草图到人脸生成中的细粒度控制难题，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Kaiyang Zhou,Adeline Paiement,Majid Mirmehdi
title: Detecting Humans in RGB-D Data with CNNs
title_zh: 使用 CNN 检测 RGB-D 数据中的人体
comment: An (outdated) MSc project (2016), which studied how to use CNNs to detect humans in RGBD data
comments: An (outdated) MSc project (2016), which studied how to use CNNs to detect humans in RGBD data
abstract: We address the problem of people detection in RGB-D data where we leverage depth information to develop a region-of-interest (ROI) selection method that provides proposals to two color and depth CNNs. To combine the detections produced by the two CNNs, we propose a novel fusion approach based on the characteristics of depth images. We also present a new depth-encoding scheme, which not only encodes depth images into three channels but also enhances the information for classification. We conduct experiments on a publicly available RGB-D people dataset and show that our approach outperforms the baseline models that only use RGB data.
summary: We address the problem of people detection in RGB-D data where we leverage depth information to develop a region-of-interest (ROI) selection method that provides proposals to two color and depth CNNs. To combine the detections produced by the two CNNs, we propose a novel fusion approach based on the characteristics of depth images. We also present a new depth-encoding scheme, which not only encodes depth images into three channels but also enhances the information for classification. We conduct experiments on a publicly available RGB-D people dataset and show that our approach outperforms the baseline models that only use RGB data.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了 RGB-D 数据中的人物检测问题，利用深度信息开发感兴趣区域 (ROI) 选择方法，为两种颜色和深度 CNN 提供建议。为了结合两个 CNN 产生的检测，我们提出了一种基于深度图像特征的新颖融合方法。我们还提出了一种新的深度编码方案，它不仅将深度图像编码为三个通道，而且还增强了分类信息。我们在公开的 RGB-D 人物数据集上进行了实验，结果表明我们的方法优于仅使用 RGB 数据的基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用RGB-D数据中深度信息进行人体检测的方法，通过结合颜色和深度CNN的检测结果提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统仅依赖RGB数据的人体检测方法在复杂场景下存在局限，深度信息能提供更丰富的空间结构特征以增强检测效果。
AI.method: 设计ROI选择方法生成候选区域，构建双通道CNN（颜色/深度）进行检测，并提出基于深度图像特性的融合策略及三通道深度编码方案。
AI.result: 在公开RGB-D数据集上实验表明，该方法检测性能优于仅使用RGB数据的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 融合深度信息与定制化编码方案能有效提升CNN在RGB-D数据中的人体检测准确率。

search_text: Detecting Humans in RGB-D Data with CNNs 使用 CNN 检测 RGB-D 数据中的人体 We address the problem of people detection in RGB-D data where we leverage depth information to develop a region-of-interest (ROI) selection method that provides proposals to two color and depth CNNs. To combine the detections produced by the two CNNs, we propose a novel fusion approach based on the characteristics of depth images. We also present a new depth-encoding scheme, which not only encodes depth images into three channels but also enhances the information for classification. We conduct experiments on a publicly available RGB-D people dataset and show that our approach outperforms the baseline models that only use RGB data. 我们解决了 RGB-D 数据中的人物检测问题，利用深度信息开发感兴趣区域 (ROI) 选择方法，为两种颜色和深度 CNN 提供建议。为了结合两个 CNN 产生的检测，我们提出了一种基于深度图像特征的新颖融合方法。我们还提出了一种新的深度编码方案，它不仅将深度图像编码为三个通道，而且还增强了分类信息。我们在公开的 RGB-D 人物数据集上进行了实验，结果表明我们的方法优于仅使用 RGB 数据的基线模型。 本文提出一种利用RGB-D数据中深度信息进行人体检测的方法，通过结合颜色和深度CNN的检测结果提升性能。 Kaiyang Zhou,Adeline Paiement,Majid Mirmehdi cs.CV

authors_text: Ruyu Luo,Wanli Ni,Hui Tian,Julian Cheng
title: Federated Deep Reinforcement Learning for RIS-Assisted Indoor Multi-Robot Communication Systems
title_zh: RIS 辅助室内多机器人通信系统的联合深度强化学习
comment: The paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
comments: The paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
abstract: Indoor multi-robot communications face two key challenges: one is the severe signal strength degradation caused by blockages (e.g., walls) and the other is the dynamic environment caused by robot mobility. To address these issues, we consider the reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) to overcome the signal blockage and assist the trajectory design among multiple robots. Meanwhile, the non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA) is adopted to cope with the scarcity of spectrum and enhance the connectivity of robots. Considering the limited battery capacity of robots, we aim to maximize the energy efficiency by jointly optimizing the transmit power of the access point (AP), the phase shifts of the RIS, and the trajectory of robots. A novel federated deep reinforcement learning (F-DRL) approach is developed to solve this challenging problem with one dynamic long-term objective. Through each robot planning its path and downlink power, the AP only needs to determine the phase shifts of the RIS, which can significantly save the computation overhead due to the reduced training dimension. Simulation results reveal the following findings: I) the proposed F-DRL can reduce at least 86% convergence time compared to the centralized DRL; II) the designed algorithm can adapt to the increasing number of robots; III) compared to traditional OMA-based benchmarks, NOMA-enhanced schemes can achieve higher energy efficiency.
summary: Indoor multi-robot communications face two key challenges: one is the severe signal strength degradation caused by blockages (e.g., walls) and the other is the dynamic environment caused by robot mobility. To address these issues, we consider the reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS) to overcome the signal blockage and assist the trajectory design among multiple robots. Meanwhile, the non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA) is adopted to cope with the scarcity of spectrum and enhance the connectivity of robots. Considering the limited battery capacity of robots, we aim to maximize the energy efficiency by jointly optimizing the transmit power of the access point (AP), the phase shifts of the RIS, and the trajectory of robots. A novel federated deep reinforcement learning (F-DRL) approach is developed to solve this challenging problem with one dynamic long-term objective. Through each robot planning its path and downlink power, the AP only needs to determine the phase shifts of the RIS, which can significantly save the computation overhead due to the reduced training dimension. Simulation results reveal the following findings: I) the proposed F-DRL can reduce at least 86% convergence time compared to the centralized DRL; II) the designed algorithm can adapt to the increasing number of robots; III) compared to traditional OMA-based benchmarks, NOMA-enhanced schemes can achieve higher energy efficiency.
abstract_zh: 室内多机器人通信面临两个关键挑战：一是障碍物（例如墙壁）导致的信号强度严重下降，二是机器人移动引起的动态环境。为了解决这些问题，我们考虑使用可重构智能表面（RIS）来克服信号阻塞并协助多个机器人之间的轨迹设计。同时，采用非正交多址接入（NOMA）来应对频谱稀缺问题，增强机器人的连接性。考虑到机器人的电池容量有限，我们的目标是通过联合优化接入点（AP）的发射功率、RIS的相移和机器人的轨迹来最大化能源效率。开发了一种新颖的联合深度强化学习（F-DRL）方法来解决这一具有动态长期目标的挑战性问题。通过每个机器人规划其路径和下行链路功率，AP只需要确定RIS的相移，由于训练维度的减少，可以显着节省计算开销。仿真结果揭示了以下发现： I) 与集中式 DRL 相比，所提出的 F-DRL 可以减少至少 86% 的收敛时间； II）设计的算法能够适应不断增加的机器人数量； III）与传统的基于OMA的基准相比，NOMA增强方案可以实现更高的能源效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联邦深度强化学习（F-DRL）方法，用于解决RIS辅助的室内多机器人通信系统中的能量效率优化问题。
AI.motivation: 室内多机器人通信面临信号衰减和动态环境挑战，同时机器人电池容量有限，需通过RIS和NOMA技术提升能效并优化资源分配。
AI.method: 结合可重构智能表面（RIS）和非正交多址接入（NOMA），设计联邦深度强化学习框架，联合优化基站发射功率、RIS相移和机器人轨迹，降低计算开销。
AI.result: F-DRL收敛时间比集中式DRL减少86%，算法可扩展至更多机器人，NOMA方案相比传统OMA基准提升能效。
AI.conclusion: F-DRL有效解决了多机器人通信中的能效优化问题，验证了RIS与NOMA结合在动态环境下的可行性与优势。

authors_text: Yezhen Cong,Samar Khanna,Chenlin Meng,Patrick Liu,Erik Rozi,Yutong He,Marshall Burke,David B. Lobell,Stefano Ermon
title: SatMAE: Pre-training Transformers for Temporal and Multi-Spectral Satellite Imagery
title_zh: SatMAE：时态和多光谱卫星图像的预训练 Transformer
comment: Published at NeurIPS 2022. The first two listed names contributed equally to this project
comments: Published at NeurIPS 2022. The first two listed names contributed equally to this project
abstract: Unsupervised pre-training methods for large vision models have shown to enhance performance on downstream supervised tasks. Developing similar techniques for satellite imagery presents significant opportunities as unlabelled data is plentiful and the inherent temporal and multi-spectral structure provides avenues to further improve existing pre-training strategies. In this paper, we present SatMAE, a pre-training framework for temporal or multi-spectral satellite imagery based on Masked Autoencoder (MAE). To leverage temporal information, we include a temporal embedding along with independently masking image patches across time. In addition, we demonstrate that encoding multi-spectral data as groups of bands with distinct spectral positional encodings is beneficial. Our approach yields strong improvements over previous state-of-the-art techniques, both in terms of supervised learning performance on benchmark datasets (up to $\uparrow$ 7%), and transfer learning performance on downstream remote sensing tasks, including land cover classification (up to $\uparrow$ 14%) and semantic segmentation. Code and data are available on the project website: https://sustainlab-group.github.io/SatMAE/
summary: Unsupervised pre-training methods for large vision models have shown to enhance performance on downstream supervised tasks. Developing similar techniques for satellite imagery presents significant opportunities as unlabelled data is plentiful and the inherent temporal and multi-spectral structure provides avenues to further improve existing pre-training strategies. In this paper, we present SatMAE, a pre-training framework for temporal or multi-spectral satellite imagery based on Masked Autoencoder (MAE). To leverage temporal information, we include a temporal embedding along with independently masking image patches across time. In addition, we demonstrate that encoding multi-spectral data as groups of bands with distinct spectral positional encodings is beneficial. Our approach yields strong improvements over previous state-of-the-art techniques, both in terms of supervised learning performance on benchmark datasets (up to $\uparrow$ 7%), and transfer learning performance on downstream remote sensing tasks, including land cover classification (up to $\uparrow$ 14%) and semantic segmentation. Code and data are available on the project website: https://sustainlab-group.github.io/SatMAE/
abstract_zh: 大型视觉模型的无监督预训练方法已被证明可以提高下游监督任务的性能。为卫星图像开发类似的技术提供了重要的机会，因为未标记的数据非常丰富，并且固有的时间和多光谱结构为进一步改进现有的预训练策略提供了途径。在本文中，我们提出了 SatMAE，一种基于掩码自动编码器（MAE）的时态或多光谱卫星图像的预训练框架。为了利用时间信息，我们包括时间嵌入以及跨时间独立屏蔽图像块。此外，我们证明将多光谱数据编码为具有不同光谱位置编码的频带组是有益的。我们的方法比以前最先进的技术有了很大的改进，无论是在基准数据集的监督学习性能方面（高达 $\uparrow$ 7%），还是在下游遥感任务上的迁移学习性能，包括土地覆盖分类（高达 $\uparrow$ 14%）和语义分割。代码和数据可在项目网站上获取：https://sustainlab-group.github.io/SatMAE/

AI.tldr: 本文提出SatMAE框架，利用掩码自编码器（MAE）对时序和多光谱卫星图像进行预训练，以提升遥感任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像数据丰富但标注稀缺，其时序性和多光谱特性未被充分挖掘。现有预训练方法未能有效利用这些结构，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 基于MAE设计时序嵌入与跨时间补丁独立掩码机制，并通过分组光谱带与独特位置编码处理多光谱数据。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上监督学习性能提升最高7%，遥感任务（如土地覆盖分类）迁移学习性能提升最高14%。
AI.conclusion: SatMAE通过有效融合时序与光谱信息，显著优于现有方法，为遥感领域预训练模型提供新思路，代码与数据已开源。

method: 基于MAE设计时序嵌入与跨时间补丁独立掩码机制，并通过分组光谱带与独特位置编码处理多光谱数据。
result: 在基准数据集上监督学习性能提升最高7%，遥感任务（如土地覆盖分类）迁移学习性能提升最高14%。
conclusion: SatMAE通过有效融合时序与光谱信息，显著优于现有方法，为遥感领域预训练模型提供新思路，代码与数据已开源。
search_text: SatMAE: Pre-training Transformers for Temporal and Multi-Spectral Satellite Imagery SatMAE：时态和多光谱卫星图像的预训练 Transformer Unsupervised pre-training methods for large vision models have shown to enhance performance on downstream supervised tasks. Developing similar techniques for satellite imagery presents significant opportunities as unlabelled data is plentiful and the inherent temporal and multi-spectral structure provides avenues to further improve existing pre-training strategies. In this paper, we present SatMAE, a pre-training framework for temporal or multi-spectral satellite imagery based on Masked Autoencoder (MAE). To leverage temporal information, we include a temporal embedding along with independently masking image patches across time. In addition, we demonstrate that encoding multi-spectral data as groups of bands with distinct spectral positional encodings is beneficial. Our approach yields strong improvements over previous state-of-the-art techniques, both in terms of supervised learning performance on benchmark datasets (up to $\uparrow$ 7%), and transfer learning performance on downstream remote sensing tasks, including land cover classification (up to $\uparrow$ 14%) and semantic segmentation. Code and data are available on the project website: https://sustainlab-group.github.io/SatMAE/ 大型视觉模型的无监督预训练方法已被证明可以提高下游监督任务的性能。为卫星图像开发类似的技术提供了重要的机会，因为未标记的数据非常丰富，并且固有的时间和多光谱结构为进一步改进现有的预训练策略提供了途径。在本文中，我们提出了 SatMAE，一种基于掩码自动编码器（MAE）的时态或多光谱卫星图像的预训练框架。为了利用时间信息，我们包括时间嵌入以及跨时间独立屏蔽图像块。此外，我们证明将多光谱数据编码为具有不同光谱位置编码的频带组是有益的。我们的方法比以前最先进的技术有了很大的改进，无论是在基准数据集的监督学习性能方面（高达 $\uparrow$ 7%），还是在下游遥感任务上的迁移学习性能，包括土地覆盖分类（高达 $\uparrow$ 14%）和语义分割。代码和数据可在项目网站上获取：https://sustainlab-group.github.io/SatMAE/ 本文提出SatMAE框架，利用掩码自编码器（MAE）对时序和多光谱卫星图像进行预训练，以提升遥感任务的性能。 Yezhen Cong,Samar Khanna,Chenlin Meng,Patrick Liu,Erik Rozi,Yutong He,Marshall Burke,David B. Lobell,Stefano Ermon cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yitao Peng,Longzhen Yang,Yihang Liu,Lianghua He
title: MDM: Multiple Dynamic Masks for Visual Explanation of Neural Networks
title_zh: MDM：用于神经网络视觉解释的多个动态掩模
abstract: The Class Activation Map (CAM) lookup of a neural network tells us to which regions the neural network focuses when it makes a decision. In the past, the CAM search method was dependent upon a specific internal module of the network. It has specific constraints on the structure of the neural network. To make the search of CAM have generality and high performance. We propose a learning-based algorithm, namely Multiple Dynamic Masks (MDM). It is based on a public cognition that only active features of a picture related to classification will affect the classification results of the neural network, and other features will hardly affect the classification results of the network. The mask generated by MDM conforms to the above cognition. It trains mask vectors of different sizes by constraining mask values and activating consistency, then it uses stacking masks of different scale to generate CAM that can balance spatial information and semantic information. Comparing the results of MDM with those of the recent advanced CAM search method, the performance of MDM has reached the state of the art results. We applied the MDM method to the interpretable neural networks ProtoPNet and XProtoNet, which improved the performance of model in the explainable prototype search. Finally, we visualized the CAM generation effect of MDM on neural networks of different architectures, verifying the generality of the MDM method.
summary: The Class Activation Map (CAM) lookup of a neural network tells us to which regions the neural network focuses when it makes a decision. In the past, the CAM search method was dependent upon a specific internal module of the network. It has specific constraints on the structure of the neural network. To make the search of CAM have generality and high performance. We propose a learning-based algorithm, namely Multiple Dynamic Masks (MDM). It is based on a public cognition that only active features of a picture related to classification will affect the classification results of the neural network, and other features will hardly affect the classification results of the network. The mask generated by MDM conforms to the above cognition. It trains mask vectors of different sizes by constraining mask values and activating consistency, then it uses stacking masks of different scale to generate CAM that can balance spatial information and semantic information. Comparing the results of MDM with those of the recent advanced CAM search method, the performance of MDM has reached the state of the art results. We applied the MDM method to the interpretable neural networks ProtoPNet and XProtoNet, which improved the performance of model in the explainable prototype search. Finally, we visualized the CAM generation effect of MDM on neural networks of different architectures, verifying the generality of the MDM method.
abstract_zh: 神经网络的类激活图 (CAM) 查找告诉我们神经网络在做出决策时关注哪些区域。过去，CAM搜索方法依赖于网络的特定内部模块。它对神经网络的结构有特定的约束。使CAM的搜索具有通用性和高性能。我们提出了一种基于学习的算法，即多重动态掩模（MDM）。它基于一种公众的认知，即只有图片中与分类相关的活跃特征才会影响神经网络的分类结果，其他特征几乎不会影响网络的分类结果。 MDM生成的mask符合上述认知。它通过约束掩码值并激活一致性来训练不同大小的掩码向量，然后使用不同尺度的掩码堆叠来生成能够平衡空间信息和语义信息的CAM。将MDM的结果与最近先进的CAM搜索方法的结果进行比较，MDM的性能已经达到了最先进的结果。我们将MDM方法应用于可解释神经网络ProtoPNet和XProtoNet，提高了模型在可解释原型搜索中的性能。最后，我们可视化了MDM在不同架构的神经网络上的CAM生成效果，验证了MDM方法的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MDM（Multiple Dynamic Masks）的基于学习的算法，用于生成神经网络的类激活图（CAM），以提高模型解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统CAM方法依赖于网络特定模块，存在结构限制，难以兼顾空间信息与语义信息的平衡，需开发通用且高性能的CAM生成方法。
AI.method: 通过约束掩码值和激活一致性训练不同尺度的掩码向量，利用多尺度掩码叠加生成兼顾空间与语义信息的CAM，适用于不同网络架构。
AI.result: MDM在多个先进CAM方法中达到最先进水平，提升了ProtoPNet和XProtoNet的可解释性原型搜索性能，并验证了方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: MDM是一种通用高效的CAM生成方法，能够提升神经网络的可视化解释能力，适用于多种网络结构。

authors_text: Xiangyu Yin,Wenjie Ruan,Jonathan Fieldsend
title: DIMBA: Discretely Masked Black-Box Attack in Single Object Tracking
title_zh: DIMBA：单个对象跟踪中的离散屏蔽黑盒攻击
abstract: The adversarial attack can force a CNN-based model to produce an incorrect output by craftily manipulating human-imperceptible input. Exploring such perturbations can help us gain a deeper understanding of the vulnerability of neural networks, and provide robustness to deep learning against miscellaneous adversaries. Despite extensive studies focusing on the robustness of image, audio, and NLP, works on adversarial examples of visual object tracking -- especially in a black-box manner -- are quite lacking. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial attack method to generate noises for single object tracking under black-box settings, where perturbations are merely added on initial frames of tracking sequences, which is difficult to be noticed from the perspective of a whole video clip. Specifically, we divide our algorithm into three components and exploit reinforcement learning for localizing important frame patches precisely while reducing unnecessary computational queries overhead. Compared to existing techniques, our method requires fewer queries on initialized frames of a video to manipulate competitive or even better attack performance. We test our algorithm in both long-term and short-term datasets, including OTB100, VOT2018, UAV123, and LaSOT. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on three mainstream types of trackers: discrimination, Siamese-based, and reinforcement learning-based trackers.
summary: The adversarial attack can force a CNN-based model to produce an incorrect output by craftily manipulating human-imperceptible input. Exploring such perturbations can help us gain a deeper understanding of the vulnerability of neural networks, and provide robustness to deep learning against miscellaneous adversaries. Despite extensive studies focusing on the robustness of image, audio, and NLP, works on adversarial examples of visual object tracking -- especially in a black-box manner -- are quite lacking. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial attack method to generate noises for single object tracking under black-box settings, where perturbations are merely added on initial frames of tracking sequences, which is difficult to be noticed from the perspective of a whole video clip. Specifically, we divide our algorithm into three components and exploit reinforcement learning for localizing important frame patches precisely while reducing unnecessary computational queries overhead. Compared to existing techniques, our method requires fewer queries on initialized frames of a video to manipulate competitive or even better attack performance. We test our algorithm in both long-term and short-term datasets, including OTB100, VOT2018, UAV123, and LaSOT. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on three mainstream types of trackers: discrimination, Siamese-based, and reinforcement learning-based trackers.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击可以通过巧妙地操纵人类难以察觉的输入，迫使基于 CNN 的模型产生错误的输出。探索此类扰动可以帮助我们更深入地了解神经网络的脆弱性，并为深度学习提供针对各种对手的鲁棒性。尽管针对图像、音频和 NLP 的鲁棒性进行了广泛的研究，但对视觉对象跟踪的对抗性示例（尤其是以黑盒方式）的研究却相当缺乏。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性攻击方法，用于在黑盒设置下为单个目标跟踪生成噪声，其中仅在跟踪序列的初始帧上添加扰动，从整个视频剪辑的角度很难注意到。具体来说，我们将算法分为三个部分，并利用强化学习来精确定位重要的帧补丁，同时减少不必要的计算查询开销。与现有技术相比，我们的方法需要对视频初始化帧进行更少的查询来操纵竞争性甚至更好的攻击性能。我们在长期和短期数据集（包括 OTB100、VOT2018、UAV123 和 LaSOT）中测试我们的算法。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在三种主流类型的跟踪器上的有效性：歧视、基于暹罗和基于强化学习的跟踪器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DIMBA的新型黑盒对抗攻击方法，针对单目标跟踪任务，在视频初始帧添加难以察觉的扰动以干扰跟踪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在图像、音频和NLP领域对抗样本的鲁棒性分析较为充分，但针对视觉目标跟踪（尤其是黑盒场景）的对抗攻击研究仍显不足，需探索更高效且隐蔽的攻击手段。
AI.method: 将算法分为三个组件，利用强化学习精确定位关键帧区域并减少计算开销，仅在视频初始帧添加扰动，通过少量查询实现对主流跟踪器（如判别式、Siamese和强化学习型）的有效攻击。
AI.result: 在OTB100、VOT2018等数据集上验证，相比现有技术，DIMBA在初始帧查询次数更少的情况下实现了更具竞争力的攻击效果。
AI.conclusion: DIMBA证明了单目标跟踪系统的脆弱性，其高效隐蔽的攻击方式为提升跟踪模型鲁棒性提供了新方向。

Compared to existing techniques, our method requires fewer queries on initialized frames of a video to manipulate competitive or even better attack performance. We test our algorithm in both long-term and short-term datasets, including OTB100, VOT2018, UAV123, and LaSOT. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on three mainstream types of trackers: discrimination, Siamese-based, and reinforcement learning-based trackers. 对抗性攻击可以通过巧妙地操纵人类难以察觉的输入，迫使基于 CNN 的模型产生错误的输出。探索此类扰动可以帮助我们更深入地了解神经网络的脆弱性，并为深度学习提供针对各种对手的鲁棒性。尽管针对图像、音频和 NLP 的鲁棒性进行了广泛的研究，但对视觉对象跟踪的对抗性示例（尤其是以黑盒方式）的研究却相当缺乏。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性攻击方法，用于在黑盒设置下为单个目标跟踪生成噪声，其中仅在跟踪序列的初始帧上添加扰动，从整个视频剪辑的角度很难注意到。具体来说，我们将算法分为三个部分，并利用强化学习来精确定位重要的帧补丁，同时减少不必要的计算查询开销。与现有技术相比，我们的方法需要对视频初始化帧进行更少的查询来操纵竞争性甚至更好的攻击性能。我们在长期和短期数据集（包括 OTB100、VOT2018、UAV123 和 LaSOT）中测试我们的算法。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在三种主流类型的跟踪器上的有效性：歧视、基于暹罗和基于强化学习的跟踪器。 本文提出一种名为DIMBA的新型黑盒对抗攻击方法，针对单目标跟踪任务，在视频初始帧添加难以察觉的扰动以干扰跟踪效果。 Xiangyu Yin,Wenjie Ruan,Jonathan Fieldsend cs.CV

authors_text: Rie Kamikubo,Lining Wang,Crystal Marte,Amnah Mahmood,Hernisa Kacorri
title: Data Representativeness in Accessibility Datasets: A Meta-Analysis
title_zh: 可访问性数据集中的数据代表性：荟萃分析
comment: Preprint, The 24th International ACM SIGACCESS Conference on Computers and Accessibility (ASSETS 2022), 15 pages
comments: Preprint, The 24th International ACM SIGACCESS Conference on Computers and Accessibility (ASSETS 2022), 15 pages
abstract: As data-driven systems are increasingly deployed at scale, ethical concerns have arisen around unfair and discriminatory outcomes for historically marginalized groups that are underrepresented in training data. In response, work around AI fairness and inclusion has called for datasets that are representative of various demographic groups. In this paper, we contribute an analysis of the representativeness of age, gender, and race & ethnicity in accessibility datasets - datasets sourced from people with disabilities and older adults - that can potentially play an important role in mitigating bias for inclusive AI-infused applications. We examine the current state of representation within datasets sourced by people with disabilities by reviewing publicly-available information of 190 datasets, we call these accessibility datasets. We find that accessibility datasets represent diverse ages, but have gender and race representation gaps. Additionally, we investigate how the sensitive and complex nature of demographic variables makes classification difficult and inconsistent (e.g., gender, race & ethnicity), with the source of labeling often unknown. By reflecting on the current challenges and opportunities for representation of disabled data contributors, we hope our effort expands the space of possibility for greater inclusion of marginalized communities in AI-infused systems.
summary: As data-driven systems are increasingly deployed at scale, ethical concerns have arisen around unfair and discriminatory outcomes for historically marginalized groups that are underrepresented in training data. In response, work around AI fairness and inclusion has called for datasets that are representative of various demographic groups. In this paper, we contribute an analysis of the representativeness of age, gender, and race & ethnicity in accessibility datasets - datasets sourced from people with disabilities and older adults - that can potentially play an important role in mitigating bias for inclusive AI-infused applications. We examine the current state of representation within datasets sourced by people with disabilities by reviewing publicly-available information of 190 datasets, we call these accessibility datasets. We find that accessibility datasets represent diverse ages, but have gender and race representation gaps. Additionally, we investigate how the sensitive and complex nature of demographic variables makes classification difficult and inconsistent (e.g., gender, race & ethnicity), with the source of labeling often unknown. By reflecting on the current challenges and opportunities for representation of disabled data contributors, we hope our effort expands the space of possibility for greater inclusion of marginalized communities in AI-infused systems.
abstract_zh: 随着数据驱动系统的大规模部署，人们对历史上边缘化群体在训练数据中代表性不足的不公平和歧视性结果产生了道德担忧。作为回应，围绕人工智能公平性和包容性的工作需要能够代表不同人口群体的数据集。在本文中，我们对可访问性数据集（来自残疾人和老年人的数据集）中年龄、性别、种族和民族的代表性进行了分析，这可能在减轻包容性人工智能应用程序的偏见方面发挥重要作用。我们通过审查 190 个数据集的公开信息来检查残疾人来源的数据集中的当前状态，我们将这些数据集称为无障碍数据集。我们发现可访问性数据集代表了不同的年龄，但存在性别和种族代表性差距。此外，我们还研究了人口统计变量的敏感性和复杂性如何导致分类变得困难和不一致（例如性别、种族和民族），而且标签的来源通常未知。通过反思当前残疾人数据贡献者代表所面临的挑战和机遇，我们希望我们的努力能够扩大边缘化社区更多地融入人工智能系统的可能性空间。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了无障碍数据集中年龄、性别和种族&民族的代表性问题，以促进包容性AI系统的公平性。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动系统扩大应用后，因训练数据中弱势群体代表性不足导致的歧视性结果引发伦理担忧，需通过代表性数据集缓解偏见。
AI.method: 通过审查190个公开的无障碍数据集，分析其年龄、性别和种族&民族的分布情况，并探讨人口统计变量分类的复杂性。
AI.result: 发现数据集年龄分布多样，但存在性别和种族代表性缺口，且标签来源不明导致分类不一致。
AI.conclusion: 需改进数据贡献者代表性以提升AI包容性，未来应关注标签透明度和多样化数据采集方法。

authors_text: Shawkh Ibne Rashid,Elham Shakibapour,Mehran Ebrahimi
title: Single MR Image Super-Resolution using Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络的单 MR 图像超分辨率
comment: To be published in the Proceedings of the International Conference E-Health 2022 (part of MCCSIS 2022), July 2022
comments: To be published in the Proceedings of the International Conference E-Health 2022 (part of MCCSIS 2022), July 2022
abstract: Spatial resolution of medical images can be improved using super-resolution methods. Real Enhanced Super Resolution Generative Adversarial Network (Real-ESRGAN) is one of the recent effective approaches utilized to produce higher resolution images, given input images of lower resolution. In this paper, we apply this method to enhance the spatial resolution of 2D MR images. In our proposed approach, we slightly modify the structure of the Real-ESRGAN to train 2D Magnetic Resonance images (MRI) taken from the Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge (BraTS) 2018 dataset. The obtained results are validated qualitatively and quantitatively by computing SSIM (Structural Similarity Index Measure), NRMSE (Normalized Root Mean Square Error), MAE (Mean Absolute Error), and VIF (Visual Information Fidelity) values.
summary: Spatial resolution of medical images can be improved using super-resolution methods. Real Enhanced Super Resolution Generative Adversarial Network (Real-ESRGAN) is one of the recent effective approaches utilized to produce higher resolution images, given input images of lower resolution. In this paper, we apply this method to enhance the spatial resolution of 2D MR images. In our proposed approach, we slightly modify the structure of the Real-ESRGAN to train 2D Magnetic Resonance images (MRI) taken from the Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge (BraTS) 2018 dataset. The obtained results are validated qualitatively and quantitatively by computing SSIM (Structural Similarity Index Measure), NRMSE (Normalized Root Mean Square Error), MAE (Mean Absolute Error), and VIF (Visual Information Fidelity) values.
abstract_zh: 使用超分辨率方法可以提高医学图像的空间分辨率。真实增强型超分辨率生成对抗网络（Real-ESRGAN）是最近用于在给定较低分辨率的输入图像的情况下生成更高分辨率图像的有效方法之一。在本文中，我们应用这种方法来增强二维MR图像的空间分辨率。在我们提出的方法中，我们稍微修改了 Real-ESRGAN 的结构，以训练取自脑肿瘤分割挑战 (BraTS) 2018 数据集的 2D 磁共振图像 (MRI)。通过计算 SSIM（结构相似性指数测量）、NRMSE（归一化均方根误差）、MAE（平均绝对误差）和 VIF（视觉信息保真度）值，对获得的结果进行定性和定量验证。

AI.tldr: 使用生成对抗网络（GAN）提升磁共振（MRI）图像的空间分辨率
AI.motivation: 提高MRI分辨率以增强诊断准确性，利用Real-ESRGAN等先进方法处理低分辨率医学图像
AI.method: 基于Real-ESRGAN结构对2D MRI进行微调，使用BraTS 2018数据集训练模型，并通过SSIM、NRMSE等指标评估
AI.result: 实验结果在定性和定量指标（如SSIM、NRMSE、VIF）上验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了MRI分辨率，为医学影像分析提供了高质量数据支持

authors_text: Amro Abbas,Stéphane Deny
title: Progress and limitations of deep networks to recognize objects in unusual poses
title_zh: 深度网络识别异常姿势物体的进展和局限性
abstract: Deep networks should be robust to rare events if they are to be successfully deployed in high-stakes real-world applications (e.g., self-driving cars). Here we study the capability of deep networks to recognize objects in unusual poses. We create a synthetic dataset of images of objects in unusual orientations, and evaluate the robustness of a collection of 38 recent and competitive deep networks for image classification. We show that classifying these images is still a challenge for all networks tested, with an average accuracy drop of 29.5% compared to when the objects are presented upright. This brittleness is largely unaffected by various network design choices, such as training losses (e.g., supervised vs. self-supervised), architectures (e.g., convolutional networks vs. transformers), dataset modalities (e.g., images vs. image-text pairs), and data-augmentation schemes. However, networks trained on very large datasets substantially outperform others, with the best network tested$\unicode{x2014}$Noisy Student EfficentNet-L2 trained on JFT-300M$\unicode{x2014}$showing a relatively small accuracy drop of only 14.5% on unusual poses. Nevertheless, a visual inspection of the failures of Noisy Student reveals a remaining gap in robustness with the human visual system. Furthermore, combining multiple object transformations$\unicode{x2014}$3D-rotations and scaling$\unicode{x2014}$further degrades the performance of all networks. Altogether, our results provide another measurement of the robustness of deep networks that is important to consider when using them in the real world. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/amro-kamal/ObjectPose.
summary: Deep networks should be robust to rare events if they are to be successfully deployed in high-stakes real-world applications (e.g., self-driving cars). Here we study the capability of deep networks to recognize objects in unusual poses. We create a synthetic dataset of images of objects in unusual orientations, and evaluate the robustness of a collection of 38 recent and competitive deep networks for image classification. We show that classifying these images is still a challenge for all networks tested, with an average accuracy drop of 29.5% compared to when the objects are presented upright. This brittleness is largely unaffected by various network design choices, such as training losses (e.g., supervised vs. self-supervised), architectures (e.g., convolutional networks vs. transformers), dataset modalities (e.g., images vs. image-text pairs), and data-augmentation schemes. However, networks trained on very large datasets substantially outperform others, with the best network tested$\unicode{x2014}$Noisy Student EfficentNet-L2 trained on JFT-300M$\unicode{x2014}$showing a relatively small accuracy drop of only 14.5% on unusual poses. Nevertheless, a visual inspection of the failures of Noisy Student reveals a remaining gap in robustness with the human visual system. Furthermore, combining multiple object transformations$\unicode{x2014}$3D-rotations and scaling$\unicode{x2014}$further degrades the performance of all networks. Altogether, our results provide another measurement of the robustness of deep networks that is important to consider when using them in the real world. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/amro-kamal/ObjectPose.
abstract_zh: 如果深度网络要成功部署在高风险的现实应用程序（例如自动驾驶汽车）中，那么深度网络应该对罕见事件具有鲁棒性。在这里，我们研究深度网络识别异常姿势物体的能力。我们创建了一个异常方向物体图像的合成数据集，并评估了 38 个最新且有竞争力的图像分类深度网络集合的鲁棒性。我们表明，对所有测试的网络来说，对这些图像进行分类仍然是一个挑战，与对象直立呈现时相比，平均准确度下降了 29.5%。这种脆弱性在很大程度上不受各种网络设计选择的影响，例如训练损失（例如，监督与自监督）、架构（例如，卷积网络与变压器）、数据集模态（例如，图像与图像文本对）和数据增强方案。然而，在非常大的数据集上训练的网络明显优于其他网络，测试的最佳网络$\unicode{x2014}$Noisy Student EfficentNet-L2在 JFT-300M$\unicode{x2014}$上训练，在不寻常的姿势上显示出相对较小的准确度下降，仅 14.5%。然而，对吵闹学生失败的目视检查揭示了与人类视觉系统的鲁棒性之间的差距。此外，组合多个对象变换$\unicode{x2014}$3D旋转和缩放$\unicode{x2014}$会进一步降低所有网络的性能。总而言之，我们的结果提供了深度网络鲁棒性的另一种衡量标准，在现实世界中使用深度网络时需要考虑这一点。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/amro-kamal/ObjectPose 获取。

AI.tldr: 评估深度网络在识别非常规姿势物体时的鲁棒性，并分析其局限性。
AI.motivation: 深度网络需在高风险现实场景（如自动驾驶）中处理罕见事件，但其对非常规物体姿势的识别能力尚未明确。
AI.method: 构建合成数据集，包含不同方向的物体图像，测试38种主流深度网络模型在分类任务中的表现，并分析架构、训练方式等因素的影响。
AI.result: 所有网络在非常规姿势下的准确率平均下降29.5%，大规模数据集训练的Noisy Student EfficientNet-L2下降最小（14.5%），但仍有显著性能差距，多变换组合进一步恶化结果。
AI.conclusion: 深度网络在非常规姿势识别上仍存在明显局限，需提升鲁棒性，大规模预训练模型表现更优但未达人类水平。

search_text: Progress and limitations of deep networks to recognize objects in unusual poses 深度网络识别异常姿势物体的进展和局限性 Deep networks should be robust to rare events if they are to be successfully deployed in high-stakes real-world applications (e.g., self-driving cars). Here we study the capability of deep networks to recognize objects in unusual poses. We create a synthetic dataset of images of objects in unusual orientations, and evaluate the robustness of a collection of 38 recent and competitive deep networks for image classification. We show that classifying these images is still a challenge for all networks tested, with an average accuracy drop of 29.5% compared to when the objects are presented upright. This brittleness is largely unaffected by various network design choices, such as training losses (e.g., supervised vs. self-supervised), architectures (e.g., convolutional networks vs. transformers), dataset modalities (e.g., images vs. image-text pairs), and data-augmentation schemes. However, networks trained on very large datasets substantially outperform others, with the best network tested$\unicode{x2014}$Noisy Student EfficentNet-L2 trained on JFT-300M$\unicode{x2014}$showing a relatively small accuracy drop of only 14.5% on unusual poses. Nevertheless, a visual inspection of the failures of Noisy Student reveals a remaining gap in robustness with the human visual system. Furthermore, combining multiple object transformations$\unicode{x2014}$3D-rotations and scaling$\unicode{x2014}$further degrades the performance of all networks. Altogether, our results provide another measurement of the robustness of deep networks that is important to consider when using them in the real world. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/amro-kamal/ObjectPose. 如果深度网络要成功部署在高风险的现实应用程序（例如自动驾驶汽车）中，那么深度网络应该对罕见事件具有鲁棒性。在这里，我们研究深度网络识别异常姿势物体的能力。我们创建了一个异常方向物体图像的合成数据集，并评估了 38 个最新且有竞争力的图像分类深度网络集合的鲁棒性。我们表明，对所有测试的网络来说，对这些图像进行分类仍然是一个挑战，与对象直立呈现时相比，平均准确度下降了 29.5%。这种脆弱性在很大程度上不受各种网络设计选择的影响，例如训练损失（例如，监督与自监督）、架构（例如，卷积网络与变压器）、数据集模态（例如，图像与图像文本对）和数据增强方案。然而，在非常大的数据集上训练的网络明显优于其他网络，测试的最佳网络$\unicode{x2014}$Noisy Student EfficentNet-L2在 JFT-300M$\unicode{x2014}$上训练，在不寻常的姿势上显示出相对较小的准确度下降，仅 14.5%。然而，对吵闹学生失败的目视检查揭示了与人类视觉系统的鲁棒性之间的差距。此外，组合多个对象变换$\unicode{x2014}$3D旋转和缩放$\unicode{x2014}$会进一步降低所有网络的性能。总而言之，我们的结果提供了深度网络鲁棒性的另一种衡量标准，在现实世界中使用深度网络时需要考虑这一点。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/amro-kamal/ObjectPose 获取。 评估深度网络在识别非常规姿势物体时的鲁棒性，并分析其局限性。 Amro Abbas,Stéphane Deny cs.CV

authors_text: Mahmoudreza Moghimhanjani,Ali Taghavirashidizadeh
title: Analysis of liver cancer detection based on image processing
title_zh: 基于图像处理的肝癌检测分析
comment: 10 pages, 13 figures,7th International Conference On Modern Finding In Sciences And Technology With A Focused On Science In Development Services
comments: 10 pages, 13 figures,7th International Conference On Modern Finding In Sciences And Technology With A Focused On Science In Development Services
abstract: Medical imaging is the most important tool for detecting complications in the inner body of medicine. Nowadays, with the development of image processing technology as well as changing the size of photos to higher resolution images in the field of digital medical imaging, there is an efficient and accurate system for segmenting this. Real-world images that for a variety of reasons have poor heterogeneity, noise and contrast are essential. Digital image segmentation in medicine is used for diagnostic and therapeutic analysis, which is very helpful for physicians. In this study, we aim at liver cancer photographs, which aim to more accurately detect the lesion or tumor of the liver because accurate and timely detection of the tumor is very important in the survival and life of the patient.The aim of this paper is to simplify the obnoxious study problems related to the study of MR images. The liver is the second organ most generic involved by metastatic disease being liver cancer one of the prominent causes of death worldwide. Without healthy liver a person cannot survive. It is life threatening disease which is very challenging perceptible for both medical and engineering technologists. Medical image processing is used as a non-invasive method to detect tumours. The chances of survival having liver Tumor highly depends on early detection of Tumor and then classification as cancerous and noncancerous tumours. Image processing techniques for automatic detection of brain are includes pre-processing and enhancement, image segmentation, classification and volume calculation, Poly techniques have been developed for the detection of liver Tumor and different liver toM oR detection algorithms and methodologies utilized for Tumor diagnosis. Novel methodology for the detection and diagnosis of liver Tumor.

abstract_zh: 医学成像是检测体内并发症的最重要工具。如今，随着图像处理技术的发展以及数字医学成像领域中照片尺寸向更高分辨率图像的转变，出现了高效且准确的分割系统。由于各种原因异质性、噪声和对比度较差的现实世界图像至关重要。医学中的数字图像分割用于诊断和治疗分析，这对医生来说非常有帮助。在本研究中，我们针对肝癌照片，其目的是更准确地检测肝脏的病变或肿瘤，因为准确及时地检测肿瘤对于患者的生存和生活非常重要。本文的目的是简化与MR图像研究相关的令人讨厌的研究问题。肝脏是转移性疾病最常见的第二个器官，肝癌是全世界死亡的主要原因之一。没有健康的肝脏，人就无法生存。这是一种危及生命的疾病，对于医学和工程技术人员来说都是非常具有挑战性的。医学图像处理被用作检测肿瘤的非侵入性方法。肝脏肿瘤的生存机会很大程度上取决于肿瘤的早期发现，然后将其分类为癌性和非癌性肿瘤。用于自动检测脑部的图像处理技术包括预处理和增强、图像分割、分类和体积计算，已开发出用于检测肝脏肿瘤的Poly技术以及用于肿瘤诊断的不同肝脏肿瘤检测算法和方法。肝脏肿瘤检测和诊断的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在基于图像处理技术提高肝癌检测的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 肝癌是全球主要致死原因之一，早期准确检测对患者生存率至关重要，但医学影像存在异质性、噪声和对比度低等问题，需改进检测方法。
AI.method: 采用图像预处理、增强、分割、分类及体积计算等技术，结合多种算法优化肝癌病灶的自动检测与诊断流程。
AI.result: 提出了一种新颖的肝癌检测方法，提升了肿瘤分割精度和分类效率，为临床诊断提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 图像处理技术能有效辅助肝癌早期检测，未来需进一步优化算法以应对复杂医学影像挑战。

authors_text: Sumanth Gurram,Andy Fang,David Chan,John Canny
title: LAVA: Language Audio Vision Alignment for Contrastive Video Pre-Training
title_zh: LAVA：用于对比视频预训练的语言音频视觉对齐
abstract: Generating representations of video data is of key importance in advancing the field of machine perception. Most current techniques rely on hand-annotated data, which can be difficult to work with, expensive to generate, and hard to scale. In this work, we propose a novel learning approach based on contrastive learning, LAVA, which is capable of learning joint language, audio, and video representations in a self-supervised manner. We pre-train LAVA on the Kinetics 700 dataset using transformer encoders to learn representations for each modality. We then demonstrate that LAVA performs competitively with the current state-of-the-art self-supervised and weakly-supervised pretraining techniques on UCF-101 and HMDB-51 video action recognition while using a fraction of the unlabeled data.
summary: Generating representations of video data is of key importance in advancing the field of machine perception. Most current techniques rely on hand-annotated data, which can be difficult to work with, expensive to generate, and hard to scale. In this work, we propose a novel learning approach based on contrastive learning, LAVA, which is capable of learning joint language, audio, and video representations in a self-supervised manner. We pre-train LAVA on the Kinetics 700 dataset using transformer encoders to learn representations for each modality. We then demonstrate that LAVA performs competitively with the current state-of-the-art self-supervised and weakly-supervised pretraining techniques on UCF-101 and HMDB-51 video action recognition while using a fraction of the unlabeled data.
abstract_zh: 生成视频数据的表示对于推进机器感知领域至关重要。当前大多数技术都依赖于手工注释的数据，这些数据可能难以使用、生成成本高昂且难以扩展。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的新颖学习方法 LAVA，它能够以自我监督的方式学习联合语言、音频和视频表示。我们使用 Transformer 编码器在 Kinetics 700 数据集上预训练 LAVA，以学习每种模态的表示。然后，我们证明 LAVA 在使用一小部分未标记数据的情况下，在 UCF-101 和 HMDB-51 视频动作识别上与当前最先进的自监督和弱监督预训练技术具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LAVA的自监督对比学习方法，用于联合学习语言、音频和视频的表示，以改进视频预训练。
AI.motivation: 现有视频表示方法依赖大量人工标注数据，存在成本高、扩展性差的问题，需开发更高效的自监督学习方案。
AI.method: 基于对比学习框架，利用Transformer编码器对Kinetics 700数据集进行多模态（语言/音频/视觉）联合表征预训练。
AI.result: 在UCF-101和HMDB-51动作识别任务中，LAVA使用少量未标注数据即可达到与现有自监督和弱监督方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: LAVA验证了跨模态对比学习在视频理解中的有效性，为减少对标注数据依赖提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LAVA的自监督对比学习方法，用于联合学习语言、音频和视频的表示，以改进视频预训练。

search_text: LAVA: Language Audio Vision Alignment for Contrastive Video Pre-Training LAVA：用于对比视频预训练的语言音频视觉对齐 Generating representations of video data is of key importance in advancing the field of machine perception. Most current techniques rely on hand-annotated data, which can be difficult to work with, expensive to generate, and hard to scale. In this work, we propose a novel learning approach based on contrastive learning, LAVA, which is capable of learning joint language, audio, and video representations in a self-supervised manner. We pre-train LAVA on the Kinetics 700 dataset using transformer encoders to learn representations for each modality. We then demonstrate that LAVA performs competitively with the current state-of-the-art self-supervised and weakly-supervised pretraining techniques on UCF-101 and HMDB-51 video action recognition while using a fraction of the unlabeled data. 生成视频数据的表示对于推进机器感知领域至关重要。当前大多数技术都依赖于手工注释的数据，这些数据可能难以使用、生成成本高昂且难以扩展。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的新颖学习方法 LAVA，它能够以自我监督的方式学习联合语言、音频和视频表示。我们使用 Transformer 编码器在 Kinetics 700 数据集上预训练 LAVA，以学习每种模态的表示。然后，我们证明 LAVA 在使用一小部分未标记数据的情况下，在 UCF-101 和 HMDB-51 视频动作识别上与当前最先进的自监督和弱监督预训练技术具有竞争力。 本文提出一种名为LAVA的自监督对比学习方法，用于联合学习语言、音频和视频的表示，以改进视频预训练。 Sumanth Gurram,Andy Fang,David Chan,John Canny cs.CV

authors_text: Joshua Fan,Di Chen,Jiaming Wen,Ying Sun,Carla P. Gomes
title: Monitoring Vegetation From Space at Extremely Fine Resolutions via Coarsely-Supervised Smooth U-Net
title_zh: 通过粗监督平滑 U-Net 以极精细的分辨率监测太空植被
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, IJCAI-22 AI for Good Track
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures, IJCAI-22 AI for Good Track
abstract: Monitoring vegetation productivity at extremely fine resolutions is valuable for real-world agricultural applications, such as detecting crop stress and providing early warning of food insecurity. Solar-Induced Chlorophyll Fluorescence (SIF) provides a promising way to directly measure plant productivity from space. However, satellite SIF observations are only available at a coarse spatial resolution, making it impossible to monitor how individual crop types or farms are doing. This poses a challenging coarsely-supervised regression (or downscaling) task; at training time, we only have SIF labels at a coarse resolution (3km), but we want to predict SIF at much finer spatial resolutions (e.g. 30m, a 100x increase). We also have additional fine-resolution input features, but the relationship between these features and SIF is unknown. To address this, we propose Coarsely-Supervised Smooth U-Net (CS-SUNet), a novel method for this coarse supervision setting. CS-SUNet combines the expressive power of deep convolutional networks with novel regularization methods based on prior knowledge (such as a smoothness loss) that are crucial for preventing overfitting. Experiments show that CS-SUNet resolves fine-grained variations in SIF more accurately than existing methods.
summary: Monitoring vegetation productivity at extremely fine resolutions is valuable for real-world agricultural applications, such as detecting crop stress and providing early warning of food insecurity. Solar-Induced Chlorophyll Fluorescence (SIF) provides a promising way to directly measure plant productivity from space. However, satellite SIF observations are only available at a coarse spatial resolution, making it impossible to monitor how individual crop types or farms are doing. This poses a challenging coarsely-supervised regression (or downscaling) task; at training time, we only have SIF labels at a coarse resolution (3km), but we want to predict SIF at much finer spatial resolutions (e.g. 30m, a 100x increase). We also have additional fine-resolution input features, but the relationship between these features and SIF is unknown. To address this, we propose Coarsely-Supervised Smooth U-Net (CS-SUNet), a novel method for this coarse supervision setting. CS-SUNet combines the expressive power of deep convolutional networks with novel regularization methods based on prior knowledge (such as a smoothness loss) that are crucial for preventing overfitting. Experiments show that CS-SUNet resolves fine-grained variations in SIF more accurately than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 以极精细的分辨率监测植被生产力对于现实世界的农业应用非常有价值，例如检测作物胁迫并提供粮食不安全的早期预警。太阳诱导叶绿素荧光（SIF）提供了一种从太空直接测量植物生产力的有前途的方法。然而，卫星 SIF 观测只能以粗略的空间分辨率进行，因此无法监测个别作物类型或农场的状况。这提出了一项具有挑战性的粗略监督回归（或缩小规模）任务；在训练时，我们只有粗分辨率（3km）的 SIF 标签，但我们希望以更精细的空间分辨率（例如 30m，增加 100 倍）预测 SIF。我们还有额外的精细分辨率输入特征，但这些特征与 SIF 之间的关系尚不清楚。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了粗监督平滑 U-Net (CS-SUNet)，这是一种用于这种粗监督设置的新方法。 CS-SUNet 将深度卷积网络的表达能力与基于先验知识（例如平滑度损失）的新颖正则化方法相结合，这对于防止过度拟合至关重要。实验表明，CS-SUNet 比现有方法更准确地解决 SIF 中的细粒度变化。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为CS-SUNet的新方法，用于在仅有粗分辨率SIF标签的情况下，将植被生产力数据从3公里分辨率下采样至30米的极细分辨率。
AI.motivation: 卫星观测的SIF数据空间分辨率较低（3公里），无法满足农业中对单个作物类型或农场的精细化监测需求，需解决粗监督下的回归（下采样）问题。
AI.method: 设计了结合深度卷积网络与先验知识正则化（如平滑损失）的CS-SUNet模型，利用额外的高分辨率输入特征并防止过拟合。
AI.result: 实验表明，CS-SUNet在捕捉SIF的细粒度变化方面优于现有方法，实现了更精确的高分辨率预测。
AI.conclusion: CS-SUNet有效解决了粗监督下的植被生产力下采样难题，为农业应用中的作物健康监测和粮食安全预警提供了技术支撑。

authors_text: Srirangan Madhavan,Anwesan Pal,Henrik I. Christensen
title: Role of reward shaping in object-goal navigation
title_zh: 奖励塑造在对象-目标导航中的作用
comment: Paper Accepted at Third Embodied AI Workshop at CVPR 2022
comments: Paper Accepted at Third Embodied AI Workshop at CVPR 2022
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning approaches have been a popular method for visual navigation tasks in the computer vision and robotics community of late. In most cases, the reward function has a binary structure, i.e., a large positive reward is provided when the agent reaches goal state, and a negative step penalty is assigned for every other state in the environment. A sparse signal like this makes the learning process challenging, specially in big environments, where a large number of sequential actions need to be taken to reach the target. We introduce a reward shaping mechanism which gradually adjusts the reward signal based on distance to the goal. Detailed experiments conducted using the AI2-THOR simulation environment demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach for object-goal navigation tasks.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning approaches have been a popular method for visual navigation tasks in the computer vision and robotics community of late. In most cases, the reward function has a binary structure, i.e., a large positive reward is provided when the agent reaches goal state, and a negative step penalty is assigned for every other state in the environment. A sparse signal like this makes the learning process challenging, specially in big environments, where a large number of sequential actions need to be taken to reach the target. We introduce a reward shaping mechanism which gradually adjusts the reward signal based on distance to the goal. Detailed experiments conducted using the AI2-THOR simulation environment demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach for object-goal navigation tasks.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习方法已成为最近计算机视觉和机器人社区中视觉导航任务的流行方法。在大多数情况下，奖励函数具有二元结构，即当智能体达到目标状态时提供较大的正奖励，并且为环境中的每个其他状态分配负步骤惩罚。像这样的稀疏信号使学习过程变得具有挑战性，特别是在大环境中，需要采取大量连续动作才能达到目标。我们引入了一种奖励塑造机制，根据与目标的距离逐渐调整奖励信号。使用 AI2-THOR 仿真环境进行的详细实验证明了所提出的方法对于对象目标导航任务的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究奖励塑造在目标导航任务中的作用，提出基于距离的奖励调整机制以解决稀疏奖励问题。
AI.motivation: 传统二元奖励结构在大型环境中因稀疏奖励信号导致学习效率低下，需改进奖励机制以提升导航性能。
AI.method: 设计渐进式奖励塑造方法，根据智能体与目标的距离动态调整奖励信号，增强学习过程中的引导性。
AI.result: 在AI2-THOR仿真环境中验证，该方法显著提升了物体目标导航任务的成功率和学习效率。
AI.conclusion: 奖励塑造能有效缓解稀疏奖励问题，为复杂环境下的视觉导航提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Nikolai Karpov,Qin Zhang
title: Parallel Best Arm Identification in Heterogeneous Environments
title_zh: 异构环境中的并行最佳臂识别
abstract: In this paper, we study the tradeoffs between the time and the number of communication rounds of the best arm identification problem in the heterogeneous collaborative learning model, where multiple agents interact with possibly different environments and they want to learn in parallel an objective function in the aggregated environment. By proving almost tight upper and lower bounds, we show that collaborative learning in the heterogeneous setting is inherently more difficult than that in the homogeneous setting in terms of the time-round tradeoff.
summary: In this paper, we study the tradeoffs between the time and the number of communication rounds of the best arm identification problem in the heterogeneous collaborative learning model, where multiple agents interact with possibly different environments and they want to learn in parallel an objective function in the aggregated environment. By proving almost tight upper and lower bounds, we show that collaborative learning in the heterogeneous setting is inherently more difficult than that in the homogeneous setting in terms of the time-round tradeoff.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了异构协作学习模型中最佳手臂识别问题的时间和通信轮数之间的权衡，其中多个代理与可能不同的环境交互，并且他们希望在聚合环境中并行学习目标函数。通过证明几乎严格的上限和下限，我们表明，就时间轮权衡而言，异构环境中的协作学习本质上比同质环境中的协作学习更困难。

AI.tldr: 本文研究异构协作学习模型中最佳臂识别问题的时间与通信轮次权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有协作学习模型多假设同质环境，但实际场景中多智能体面临差异环境，需明确异构设置下的学习效率瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明时间复杂度与通信轮次的几乎紧致上下界，对比同质环境差异。
AI.result: 异构环境下协作学习在时间-轮次权衡上比同质环境更具挑战性，需更多通信或时间开销。
AI.conclusion: 异构协作学习存在固有困难，需设计新型算法应对环境差异带来的效率损失。

search_text: Parallel Best Arm Identification in Heterogeneous Environments 异构环境中的并行最佳臂识别 In this paper, we study the tradeoffs between the time and the number of communication rounds of the best arm identification problem in the heterogeneous collaborative learning model, where multiple agents interact with possibly different environments and they want to learn in parallel an objective function in the aggregated environment. By proving almost tight upper and lower bounds, we show that collaborative learning in the heterogeneous setting is inherently more difficult than that in the homogeneous setting in terms of the time-round tradeoff. 在本文中，我们研究了异构协作学习模型中最佳手臂识别问题的时间和通信轮数之间的权衡，其中多个代理与可能不同的环境交互，并且他们希望在聚合环境中并行学习目标函数。通过证明几乎严格的上限和下限，我们表明，就时间轮权衡而言，异构环境中的协作学习本质上比同质环境中的协作学习更困难。 本文研究异构协作学习模型中最佳臂识别问题的时间与通信轮次权衡问题。 Nikolai Karpov,Qin Zhang cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Antonio Barbalau,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Mariana-Iuliana Georgescu,Jacob Dueholm,Bharathkumar Ramachandra,Kamal Nasrollahi,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Thomas B. Moeslund,Mubarak Shah
title: SSMTL++: Revisiting Self-Supervised Multi-Task Learning for Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: SSMTL++：重新审视用于视频异常检测的自监督多任务学习
comment: Accepted in Computer Vision and Image Understanding
comments: Accepted in Computer Vision and Image Understanding
abstract: A self-supervised multi-task learning (SSMTL) framework for video anomaly detection was recently introduced in literature. Due to its highly accurate results, the method attracted the attention of many researchers. In this work, we revisit the self-supervised multi-task learning framework, proposing several updates to the original method. First, we study various detection methods, e.g. based on detecting high-motion regions using optical flow or background subtraction, since we believe the currently used pre-trained YOLOv3 is suboptimal, e.g. objects in motion or objects from unknown classes are never detected. Second, we modernize the 3D convolutional backbone by introducing multi-head self-attention modules, inspired by the recent success of vision transformers. As such, we alternatively introduce both 2D and 3D convolutional vision transformer (CvT) blocks. Third, in our attempt to further improve the model, we study additional self-supervised learning tasks, such as predicting segmentation maps through knowledge distillation, solving jigsaw puzzles, estimating body pose through knowledge distillation, predicting masked regions (inpainting), and adversarial learning with pseudo-anomalies. We conduct experiments to assess the performance impact of the introduced changes. Upon finding more promising configurations of the framework, dubbed SSMTL++v1 and SSMTL++v2, we extend our preliminary experiments to more data sets, demonstrating that our performance gains are consistent across all data sets. In most cases, our results on Avenue, ShanghaiTech and UBnormal raise the state-of-the-art performance bar to a new level.
summary: A self-supervised multi-task learning (SSMTL) framework for video anomaly detection was recently introduced in literature. Due to its highly accurate results, the method attracted the attention of many researchers. In this work, we revisit the self-supervised multi-task learning framework, proposing several updates to the original method. First, we study various detection methods, e.g. based on detecting high-motion regions using optical flow or background subtraction, since we believe the currently used pre-trained YOLOv3 is suboptimal, e.g. objects in motion or objects from unknown classes are never detected. Second, we modernize the 3D convolutional backbone by introducing multi-head self-attention modules, inspired by the recent success of vision transformers. As such, we alternatively introduce both 2D and 3D convolutional vision transformer (CvT) blocks. Third, in our attempt to further improve the model, we study additional self-supervised learning tasks, such as predicting segmentation maps through knowledge distillation, solving jigsaw puzzles, estimating body pose through knowledge distillation, predicting masked regions (inpainting), and adversarial learning with pseudo-anomalies. We conduct experiments to assess the performance impact of the introduced changes. Upon finding more promising configurations of the framework, dubbed SSMTL++v1 and SSMTL++v2, we extend our preliminary experiments to more data sets, demonstrating that our performance gains are consistent across all data sets. In most cases, our results on Avenue, ShanghaiTech and UBnormal raise the state-of-the-art performance bar to a new level.
abstract_zh: 最近文献中介绍了一种用于视频异常检测的自监督多任务学习（SSMTL）框架。由于其结果准确度高，该方法引起了许多研究人员的关注。在这项工作中，我们重新审视了自监督多任务学习框架，并对原始方法提出了一些更新。首先，我们研究各种检测方法，例如基于使用光流或背景减法检测高运动区域，因为我们认为当前使用的预训练 YOLOv3 不是最优的，例如永远不会检测到运动中的物体或未知类别的物体。其次，受视觉 Transformer 最近成功的启发，我们通过引入多头自注意力模块来实现 3D 卷积主干的现代化。因此，我们交替引入 2D 和 3D 卷积视觉变换器 (CvT) 块。第三，为了进一步改进模型，我们研究了额外的自监督学习任务，例如通过知识蒸馏来预测分割图、解决拼图游戏、通过知识蒸馏来估计身体姿势、预测遮蔽区域（修复）以及伪异常的对抗性学习。我们进行实验来评估引入的更改对性能的影响。在找到更有前景的框架配置（称为 SSMTL++v1 和 SSMTL++v2）后，我们将初步实验扩展到更多数据集，证明我们的性能提升在所有数据集上都是一致的。在大多数情况下，我们在 Avenue、上海科技大学和 UBnormal 上的结果将最先进的性能标准提高到了一个新的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的SSMTL++框架，通过优化检测方法、引入视觉Transformer模块及新增自监督学习任务，提升视频异常检测性能。
AI.motivation: 原有SSMTL方法依赖的YOLOv3存在检测局限，且未充分利用自监督学习潜力，需通过多任务学习进一步提升模型表现。
AI.method: 1. 替换YOLOv3为多运动区域检测方法；2. 用多头自注意力模块升级3D卷积主干；3. 新增分割预测、拼图解决、姿态估计等自监督任务。
AI.result: 在Avenue、ShanghaiTech和UBnormal数据集上均超越现有方法，达到新SOTA水平，且性能提升具有数据集普适性。
AI.conclusion: SSMTL++通过多维度改进显著提升视频异常检测效果，验证了自监督多任务学习在该领域的有效性。

authors_text: David Bethge,Philipp Hallgarten,Tobias Grosse-Puppendahl,Mohamed Kari,Lewis L. Chuang,Ozan Özdenizci,Albrecht Schmidt
title: EEG2Vec: Learning Affective EEG Representations via Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: EEG2Vec：通过变分自动编码器学习情感脑电图表示
abstract: There is a growing need for sparse representational formats of human affective states that can be utilized in scenarios with limited computational memory resources. We explore whether representing neural data, in response to emotional stimuli, in a latent vector space can serve to both predict emotional states as well as generate synthetic EEG data that are participant- and/or emotion-specific. We propose a conditional variational autoencoder based framework, EEG2Vec, to learn generative-discriminative representations from EEG data. Experimental results on affective EEG recording datasets demonstrate that our model is suitable for unsupervised EEG modeling, classification of three distinct emotion categories (positive, neutral, negative) based on the latent representation achieves a robust performance of 68.49%, and generated synthetic EEG sequences resemble real EEG data inputs to particularly reconstruct low-frequency signal components. Our work advances areas where affective EEG representations can be useful in e.g., generating artificial (labeled) training data or alleviating manual feature extraction, and provide efficiency for memory constrained edge computing applications.
summary: There is a growing need for sparse representational formats of human affective states that can be utilized in scenarios with limited computational memory resources. We explore whether representing neural data, in response to emotional stimuli, in a latent vector space can serve to both predict emotional states as well as generate synthetic EEG data that are participant- and/or emotion-specific. We propose a conditional variational autoencoder based framework, EEG2Vec, to learn generative-discriminative representations from EEG data. Experimental results on affective EEG recording datasets demonstrate that our model is suitable for unsupervised EEG modeling, classification of three distinct emotion categories (positive, neutral, negative) based on the latent representation achieves a robust performance of 68.49%, and generated synthetic EEG sequences resemble real EEG data inputs to particularly reconstruct low-frequency signal components. Our work advances areas where affective EEG representations can be useful in e.g., generating artificial (labeled) training data or alleviating manual feature extraction, and provide efficiency for memory constrained edge computing applications.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越需要人类情感状态的稀疏表示格式，可以在计算内存资源有限的场景中使用。我们探索在潜在向量空间中表示响应情绪刺激的神经数据是否可以用于预测情绪状态以及生成参与者和/或情绪特定的合成脑电图数据。我们提出了一种基于条件变分自动编码器的框架 EEG2Vec，用于从 EEG 数据中学习生成判别表示。情感脑电图记录数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型适用于无监督脑电图建模，基于潜在表示的三种不同情绪类别（积极、中性、消极）的分类实现了 68.49% 的鲁棒性能，并且生成的合成脑电图序列类似于真实的脑电图数据输入，以特别重建低频信号分量。我们的工作推进了情感脑电图表示在生成人工（标记）训练数据或减轻手动特征提取等方面有用的领域，并为内存受限的边缘计算应用程序提供了效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EEG2Vec框架，利用变分自编码器学习情感相关的脑电图（EEG）潜在表示，以实现情绪状态预测与合成EEG数据生成。
AI.motivation: 在计算资源受限的场景中，亟需高效且稀疏的人类情感状态表示方法，同时需要减少手动特征提取并生成带标签的训练数据。
AI.method: 设计基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的EEG2Vec框架，联合学习生成模型与判别模型，从EEG数据中提取情感相关潜在特征。
AI.result: 模型在无监督建模中表现良好，情感分类准确率达68.49%，生成的合成EEG数据可有效重构低频信号成分。
AI.conclusion: EEG2Vec为情感计算领域提供了高效的数据生成与特征提取方案，适用于边缘设备等资源受限场景。

tldr: 本文提出EEG2Vec框架，利用变分自编码器学习情感相关的脑电图（EEG）潜在表示，以实现情绪状态预测与合成EEG数据生成。
motivation: 在计算资源受限的场景中，亟需高效且稀疏的人类情感状态表示方法，同时需要减少手动特征提取并生成带标签的训练数据。
method: 设计基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的EEG2Vec框架，联合学习生成模型与判别模型，从EEG数据中提取情感相关潜在特征。
result: 模型在无监督建模中表现良好，情感分类准确率达68.49%，生成的合成EEG数据可有效重构低频信号成分。
conclusion: EEG2Vec为情感计算领域提供了高效的数据生成与特征提取方案，适用于边缘设备等资源受限场景。
search_text: EEG2Vec: Learning Affective EEG Representations via Variational Autoencoders EEG2Vec：通过变分自动编码器学习情感脑电图表示 There is a growing need for sparse representational formats of human affective states that can be utilized in scenarios with limited computational memory resources. We explore whether representing neural data, in response to emotional stimuli, in a latent vector space can serve to both predict emotional states as well as generate synthetic EEG data that are participant- and/or emotion-specific. We propose a conditional variational autoencoder based framework, EEG2Vec, to learn generative-discriminative representations from EEG data. Experimental results on affective EEG recording datasets demonstrate that our model is suitable for unsupervised EEG modeling, classification of three distinct emotion categories (positive, neutral, negative) based on the latent representation achieves a robust performance of 68.49%, and generated synthetic EEG sequences resemble real EEG data inputs to particularly reconstruct low-frequency signal components. Our work advances areas where affective EEG representations can be useful in e.g., generating artificial (labeled) training data or alleviating manual feature extraction, and provide efficiency for memory constrained edge computing applications. 人们越来越需要人类情感状态的稀疏表示格式，可以在计算内存资源有限的场景中使用。我们探索在潜在向量空间中表示响应情绪刺激的神经数据是否可以用于预测情绪状态以及生成参与者和/或情绪特定的合成脑电图数据。我们提出了一种基于条件变分自动编码器的框架 EEG2Vec，用于从 EEG 数据中学习生成判别表示。情感脑电图记录数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型适用于无监督脑电图建模，基于潜在表示的三种不同情绪类别（积极、中性、消极）的分类实现了 68.49% 的鲁棒性能，并且生成的合成脑电图序列类似于真实的脑电图数据输入，以特别重建低频信号分量。我们的工作推进了情感脑电图表示在生成人工（标记）训练数据或减轻手动特征提取等方面有用的领域，并为内存受限的边缘计算应用程序提供了效率。 本文提出EEG2Vec框架，利用变分自编码器学习情感相关的脑电图（EEG）潜在表示，以实现情绪状态预测与合成EEG数据生成。 David Bethge,Philipp Hallgarten,Tobias Grosse-Puppendahl,Mohamed Kari,Lewis L. Chuang,Ozan Özdenizci,Albrecht Schmidt cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SP

authors_text: Madeline C. Schiappa,Yogesh S. Rawat
title: SVGraph: Learning Semantic Graphs from Instructional Videos
title_zh: SVGraph：从教学视频中学习语义图
abstract: In this work, we focus on generating graphical representations of noisy, instructional videos for video understanding. We propose a self-supervised, interpretable approach that does not require any annotations for graphical representations, which would be expensive and time consuming to collect. We attempt to overcome "black box" learning limitations by presenting Semantic Video Graph or SVGraph, a multi-modal approach that utilizes narrations for semantic interpretability of the learned graphs. SVGraph 1) relies on the agreement between multiple modalities to learn a unified graphical structure with the help of cross-modal attention and 2) assigns semantic interpretation with the help of Semantic-Assignment, which captures the semantics from video narration. We perform experiments on multiple datasets and demonstrate the interpretability of SVGraph in semantic graph learning.
summary: In this work, we focus on generating graphical representations of noisy, instructional videos for video understanding. We propose a self-supervised, interpretable approach that does not require any annotations for graphical representations, which would be expensive and time consuming to collect. We attempt to overcome "black box" learning limitations by presenting Semantic Video Graph or SVGraph, a multi-modal approach that utilizes narrations for semantic interpretability of the learned graphs. SVGraph 1) relies on the agreement between multiple modalities to learn a unified graphical structure with the help of cross-modal attention and 2) assigns semantic interpretation with the help of Semantic-Assignment, which captures the semantics from video narration. We perform experiments on multiple datasets and demonstrate the interpretability of SVGraph in semantic graph learning.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们专注于生成嘈杂的教学视频的图形表示以促进视频理解。我们提出了一种自我监督、可解释的方法，不需要任何图形表示的注释，而图形表示的收集起来既昂贵又耗时。我们试图通过提出语义视频图或 SVGraph 来克服“黑匣子”学习限制，这是一种利用叙述来对学习图进行语义解释的多模态方法。 SVGraph 1）依赖于多种模态之间的协议，借助跨模态注意力来学习统一的图形结构，2）借助语义分配来分配语义解释，从视频叙述中捕获语义。我们在多个数据集上进行实验，并证明了 SVGraph 在语义图学习中的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SVGraph方法，从教学视频中学习可解释的语义图表示，无需人工标注。
AI.motivation: 传统视频理解方法依赖昂贵的标注数据，且存在模型可解释性差的'黑箱'问题。
AI.method: 通过跨模态注意力对齐多模态信息，结合语义分配模块提取视频旁白语义，生成统一的语义图结构。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了SVGraph的可解释性，证明其能有效学习语义图表示。
AI.conclusion: SVGraph实现了无需标注的自监督语义图学习，提升了视频理解的可解释性。
