authors_text: Ruizhi Shao,Zerong Zheng,Hongwen Zhang,Jingxiang Sun,Yebin Liu
title: DiffuStereo: High Quality Human Reconstruction via Diffusion-based Stereo Using Sparse Cameras
title_zh: DiffuStereo：使用稀疏相机通过基于扩散的立体进行高质量人体重建
abstract: We propose DiffuStereo, a novel system using only sparse cameras (8 in this work) for high-quality 3D human reconstruction. At its core is a novel diffusion-based stereo module, which introduces diffusion models, a type of powerful generative models, into the iterative stereo matching network. To this end, we design a new diffusion kernel and additional stereo constraints to facilitate stereo matching and depth estimation in the network. We further present a multi-level stereo network architecture to handle high-resolution (up to 4k) inputs without requiring unaffordable memory footprint. Given a set of sparse-view color images of a human, the proposed multi-level diffusion-based stereo network can produce highly accurate depth maps, which are then converted into a high-quality 3D human model through an efficient multi-view fusion strategy. Overall, our method enables automatic reconstruction of human models with quality on par to high-end dense-view camera rigs, and this is achieved using a much more light-weight hardware setup. Experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: We propose DiffuStereo, a novel system using only sparse cameras (8 in this work) for high-quality 3D human reconstruction. At its core is a novel diffusion-based stereo module, which introduces diffusion models, a type of powerful generative models, into the iterative stereo matching network. To this end, we design a new diffusion kernel and additional stereo constraints to facilitate stereo matching and depth estimation in the network. We further present a multi-level stereo network architecture to handle high-resolution (up to 4k) inputs without requiring unaffordable memory footprint. Given a set of sparse-view color images of a human, the proposed multi-level diffusion-based stereo network can produce highly accurate depth maps, which are then converted into a high-quality 3D human model through an efficient multi-view fusion strategy. Overall, our method enables automatic reconstruction of human models with quality on par to high-end dense-view camera rigs, and this is achieved using a much more light-weight hardware setup. Experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DiffuStereo，这是一种仅使用稀疏相机（本工作中的 8 个）进行高质量 3D 人体重建的新颖系统。其核心是一种新颖的基于扩散的立体模块，它将扩散模型（一种强大的生成模型）引入到迭代立体匹配网络中。为此，我们设计了一个新的扩散内核和额外的立体约束，以促进网络中的立体匹配和深度估计。我们进一步提出了一种多级立体声网络架构来处理高分辨率（高达 4k）输入，而不需要昂贵的内存占用。给定一组人类的稀疏视图彩色图像，所提出的基于多级扩散的立体网络可以生成高精度的深度图，然后通过有效的多视图融合策略将其转换为高质量的 3D 人体模型。总的来说，我们的方法能够自动重建人体模型，其质量与高端密集视图相机装备相当，这是通过使用更轻量级的硬件设置来实现的。实验表明，我们的方法在定性和定量上都大大优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffuStereo系统，利用稀疏摄像头（8个）通过扩散模型实现高质量人体3D重建。
AI.motivation: 传统高精度3D重建需依赖昂贵密集摄像头阵列，本文旨在以轻量级硬件实现媲美高端设备的重建质量。
AI.method: 设计扩散核与立体约束的扩散立体模块，结合多级网络架构处理4K高分辨率输入，通过多视角融合生成深度图与3D模型。
AI.result: 在定性与定量指标上显著优于现有方法，实现与高端密集摄像头相当的重建精度。
AI.conclusion: DiffuStereo证明了稀疏摄像头结合扩散模型可有效完成高质量人体重建，为轻量化设备应用提供新方案。

authors_text: Andrew McNutt
title: No Grammar to Rule Them All: A Survey of JSON-style DSLs for Visualization
title_zh: 没有语法来统治它们：用于可视化的 JSON 风格 DSL 的调查
comment: 13 Pages, 11 Figures, including appendix. Accepted to IEEEVIS22
comments: 13 Pages, 11 Figures, including appendix. Accepted to IEEEVIS22
abstract: There has been substantial growth in the use of JSON-based grammars, as well as other standard data serialization languages, to create visualizations. Each of these grammars serves a purpose: some focus on particular computational tasks (such as animation), some are concerned with certain chart types (such as maps), and some target specific data domains (such as ML). Despite the prominence of this interface form, there has been little detailed analysis of the characteristics of these languages. In this study, we survey and analyze the design and implementation of 57 JSON-style DSLs for visualization. We analyze these languages supported by a collected corpus of examples for each DSL (consisting of 4395 instances) across a variety of axes organized into concerns related to domain, conceptual model, language relationships, affordances, and general practicalities. We identify tensions throughout these areas, such as between formal and colloquial specifications, among types of users, and within the composition of languages. Through this work, we seek to support language implementers by elucidating the choices, opportunities, and tradeoffs in visualization DSL design.
summary: There has been substantial growth in the use of JSON-based grammars, as well as other standard data serialization languages, to create visualizations. Each of these grammars serves a purpose: some focus on particular computational tasks (such as animation), some are concerned with certain chart types (such as maps), and some target specific data domains (such as ML). Despite the prominence of this interface form, there has been little detailed analysis of the characteristics of these languages. In this study, we survey and analyze the design and implementation of 57 JSON-style DSLs for visualization. We analyze these languages supported by a collected corpus of examples for each DSL (consisting of 4395 instances) across a variety of axes organized into concerns related to domain, conceptual model, language relationships, affordances, and general practicalities. We identify tensions throughout these areas, such as between formal and colloquial specifications, among types of users, and within the composition of languages. Through this work, we seek to support language implementers by elucidating the choices, opportunities, and tradeoffs in visualization DSL design.
abstract_zh: 使用基于 JSON 的语法以及其他标准数据序列化语言来创建可视化效果的情况大幅增长。这些语法中的每一个都有一个目的：一些专注于特定的计算任务（例如动画），一些关注某些图表类型（例如地图），还有一些针对特定的数据域（例如ML）。尽管这种界面形式很突出，但对这些语言的特性却很少进行详细分析。在本研究中，我们调查并分析了 57 个用于可视化的 JSON 风格 DSL 的设计和实现。我们分析了这些语言，这些语言由每个 DSL（由 4395 个实例组成）收集的示例语料库支持，跨多个轴组织成与领域、概念模型、语言关系、可供性和一般实用性相关的关注点。我们确定了这些领域中的紧张关系，例如正式规范和口语规范之间、用户类型之间以及语言构成内部的紧张关系。通过这项工作，我们试图通过阐明可视化 DSL 设计中的选择、机会和权衡来支持语言实现者。

AI.tldr: 本文对57种JSON风格的可视化领域特定语言（DSL）进行调查与分析，探讨其设计特点与实现差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管JSON-based语法在可视化中广泛应用，但其设计特征和实现细节缺乏系统性分析，阻碍了进一步优化与创新。
AI.method: 通过收集4395个实例，从领域、概念模型、语言关系、可用性及实用性等多个维度，对57种JSON-style DSL进行系统性对比分析。
AI.result: 识别出语言设计中的多重矛盾，如正式规范与非正式表达的冲突、用户群体差异及语言结构的组成张力。
AI.conclusion: 通过揭示设计选择与权衡，为可视化DSL的开发提供指导，促进更高效、灵活的语言设计。

search_text: No Grammar to Rule Them All: A Survey of JSON-style DSLs for Visualization 没有语法来统治它们：用于可视化的 JSON 风格 DSL 的调查 There has been substantial growth in the use of JSON-based grammars, as well as other standard data serialization languages, to create visualizations. Each of these grammars serves a purpose: some focus on particular computational tasks (such as animation), some are concerned with certain chart types (such as maps), and some target specific data domains (such as ML). Despite the prominence of this interface form, there has been little detailed analysis of the characteristics of these languages. In this study, we survey and analyze the design and implementation of 57 JSON-style DSLs for visualization. We analyze these languages supported by a collected corpus of examples for each DSL (consisting of 4395 instances) across a variety of axes organized into concerns related to domain, conceptual model, language relationships, affordances, and general practicalities. We identify tensions throughout these areas, such as between formal and colloquial specifications, among types of users, and within the composition of languages. Through this work, we seek to support language implementers by elucidating the choices, opportunities, and tradeoffs in visualization DSL design. 使用基于 JSON 的语法以及其他标准数据序列化语言来创建可视化效果的情况大幅增长。这些语法中的每一个都有一个目的：一些专注于特定的计算任务（例如动画），一些关注某些图表类型（例如地图），还有一些针对特定的数据域（例如ML）。尽管这种界面形式很突出，但对这些语言的特性却很少进行详细分析。在本研究中，我们调查并分析了 57 个用于可视化的 JSON 风格 DSL 的设计和实现。我们分析了这些语言，这些语言由每个 DSL（由 4395 个实例组成）收集的示例语料库支持，跨多个轴组织成与领域、概念模型、语言关系、可供性和一般实用性相关的关注点。我们确定了这些领域中的紧张关系，例如正式规范和口语规范之间、用户类型之间以及语言构成内部的紧张关系。通过这项工作，我们试图通过阐明可视化 DSL 设计中的选择、机会和权衡来支持语言实现者。 本文对57种JSON风格的可视化领域特定语言（DSL）进行调查与分析，探讨其设计特点与实现差异。 Andrew McNutt cs.HC

authors_text: Mohammed Shalaby,Charles Champagne Cossette,James Richard Forbes,Jerome Le Ny
title: Relative Position Estimation in Multi-Agent Systems Using Attitude-Coupled Range Measurements
title_zh: 使用姿态耦合距离测量的多智能体系统中的相对位置估计
comment: 7 pages, 10 figures, published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 7 pages, 10 figures, published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: The ability to accurately estimate the position of robotic agents relative to one another, in possibly GPS-denied environments, is crucial to execute collaborative tasks. Inter-agent range measurements are available at a low cost, due to technologies such as ultra-wideband radio. However, the task of three-dimensional relative position estimation using range measurements in multi-agent systems suffers from unobservabilities. This letter presents a sufficient condition for the observability of the relative positions, and satisfies the condition using a simple framework with only range measurements, an accelerometer, a rate gyro, and a magnetometer. The framework has been tested in simulation and in experiments, where 40-50 cm positioning accuracy is achieved using inexpensive off-the-shelf hardware.
summary: The ability to accurately estimate the position of robotic agents relative to one another, in possibly GPS-denied environments, is crucial to execute collaborative tasks. Inter-agent range measurements are available at a low cost, due to technologies such as ultra-wideband radio. However, the task of three-dimensional relative position estimation using range measurements in multi-agent systems suffers from unobservabilities. This letter presents a sufficient condition for the observability of the relative positions, and satisfies the condition using a simple framework with only range measurements, an accelerometer, a rate gyro, and a magnetometer. The framework has been tested in simulation and in experiments, where 40-50 cm positioning accuracy is achieved using inexpensive off-the-shelf hardware.
abstract_zh: 在可能无法使用 GPS 的环境中，准确估计机器人代理相对于彼此的位置的能力对于执行协作任务至关重要。借助超宽带无线电等技术，可以以较低的成本进行代理间距离测量。然而，在多智能体系统中使用距离测量进行三维相对位置估计的任务存在不可观测性。这封信提出了相对位置可观测性的充分条件，并使用仅具有距离测量、加速度计、速率陀螺仪和磁力计的简单框架来满足该条件。该框架已经过模拟和实验测试，使用廉价的现成硬件可实现 40-50 厘米的定位精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用姿态耦合距离测量的多智能体系统相对位置估计方法，解决了三维空间中仅依赖距离测量的不可观测性问题。
AI.motivation: 在GPS信号受限的环境中，多机器人协作任务需要精确的相对位置估计，但传统仅依赖距离测量的方法存在可观测性缺陷。
AI.method: 通过结合距离测量、加速度计、陀螺仪和磁力计，构建满足可观测性条件的框架，利用姿态信息辅助位置估计。
AI.result: 在仿真和实验中，使用低成本硬件实现了40-50厘米的定位精度，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入姿态耦合机制，有效解决了多智能体系统三维相对定位的可观测性问题，为低成本定位提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jinqi Huang,Spyros Stathopoulos,Alex Serb,Themis Prodromakis
title: A tool for emulating neuromorphic architectures with memristive models and devices
title_zh: 使用忆阻模型和设备模拟神经形态架构的工具
comment: 5 pages; To be published in ISCAS 2022
comments: 5 pages; To be published in ISCAS 2022
abstract: Memristors have shown promising features for enhancing neuromorphic computing concepts and AI hardware accelerators. In this paper, we present a user-friendly software infrastructure that allows emulating a wide range of neuromorphic architectures with memristor models. This tool empowers studies that exploit memristors for online learning and online classification tasks, predicting memristor resistive state changes during the training process. The versatility of the tool is showcased through the capability for users to customise parameters in the employed memristor and neuronal models as well as the employed learning rules. This further allows users to validate concepts and their sensitivity across a wide range of parameters. We demonstrate the use of the tool via an MNIST classification task. Finally, we show how this tool can also be used to emulate the concepts under study in-silico with practical memristive devices via appropriate interfacing with commercially available characterisation tools.
summary: Memristors have shown promising features for enhancing neuromorphic computing concepts and AI hardware accelerators. In this paper, we present a user-friendly software infrastructure that allows emulating a wide range of neuromorphic architectures with memristor models. This tool empowers studies that exploit memristors for online learning and online classification tasks, predicting memristor resistive state changes during the training process. The versatility of the tool is showcased through the capability for users to customise parameters in the employed memristor and neuronal models as well as the employed learning rules. This further allows users to validate concepts and their sensitivity across a wide range of parameters. We demonstrate the use of the tool via an MNIST classification task. Finally, we show how this tool can also be used to emulate the concepts under study in-silico with practical memristive devices via appropriate interfacing with commercially available characterisation tools.
abstract_zh: 忆阻器在增强神经形态计算概念和人工智能硬件加速器方面表现出了有前景的功能。在本文中，我们提出了一种用户友好的软件基础架构，允许使用忆阻器模型模拟各种神经形态架构。该工具支持利用忆阻器进行在线学习和在线分类任务的研究，预测训练过程中忆阻器电阻状态的变化。该工具的多功能性通过用户定制所使用的忆阻器和神经元模型中的参数以及所使用的学习规则的能力来展示。这进一步允许用户验证概念及其对各种参数的敏感性。我们通过 MNIST 分类任务演示了该工具的使用。最后，我们展示了如何使用该工具通过与商用表征工具的适当接口，使用实用的忆阻器件来模拟正在研究的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种用于模拟神经形态架构的软件工具，该工具结合了忆阻器模型和设备，支持在线学习和分类任务。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器在神经形态计算和AI硬件加速器中展现出潜力，但缺乏用户友好的工具来模拟其在不同架构中的应用，限制了相关研究的进展。
AI.method: 开发了一种可定制的软件基础设施，允许用户调整忆阻器模型、神经元模型及学习规则参数，并通过MNIST分类任务验证工具有效性。
AI.result: 工具成功模拟了MNIST分类任务，展示了参数敏感性分析能力，并可通过接口与商用表征工具结合，实现与实际忆阻器件的联合仿真。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为研究忆阻器在神经形态计算中的应用提供了灵活平台，支持概念验证和参数优化，推动了在线学习与分类任务的研究。

authors_text: Gogulapati Sreedurga,Soumyarup Sadhukhan,Souvik Roy,Yadati Narahari
title: Characterization of Group-Fair Social Choice Rules under Single-Peaked Preferences
title_zh: 单峰偏好下群体公平社会选择规则的表征
abstract: We study fairness in social choice settings under single-peaked preferences. Construction and characterization of social choice rules in the single-peaked domain has been extensively studied in prior works. In fact, in the single-peaked domain, it is known that unanimous and strategy-proof deterministic rules have to be min-max rules and those that also satisfy anonymity have to be median rules. Further, random social choice rules satisfying these properties have been shown to be convex combinations of respective deterministic rules. We non-trivially add to this body of results by including fairness considerations in social choice. Our study directly addresses fairness for groups of agents. To study group-fairness, we consider an existing partition of the agents into logical groups, based on natural attributes such as gender, race, and location. To capture fairness within each group, we introduce the notion of group-wise anonymity. To capture fairness across the groups, we propose a weak notion as well as a strong notion of fairness. The proposed fairness notions turn out to be natural generalizations of existing individual-fairness notions and moreover provide non-trivial outcomes for strict ordinal preferences, unlike the existing group-fairness notions. We provide two separate characterizations of random social choice rules that satisfy group-fairness: (i) direct characterization (ii) extreme point characterization (as convex combinations of fair deterministic social choice rules). We also explore the special case where there are no groups and provide sharper characterizations of rules that achieve individual-fairness.

abstract_zh: 我们研究单峰偏好下社会选择环境的公平性。单峰域中社会选择规则的构建和表征在先前的工作中已被广泛研究。事实上，在单峰域中，众所周知，一致且策略证明的确定性规则必须是最小-最大规则，而那些同时满足匿名性的规则必须是中值规则。此外，满足这些属性的随机社会选择规则已被证明是各个确定性规则的凸组合。我们通过在社会选择中纳入公平考虑，对这一结果进行了重要的补充。我们的研究直接解决了代理群体的公平问题。为了研究群体公平性，我们考虑基于性别、种族和位置等自然属性将代理划分为逻辑群体。为了实现每个组内的公平性，我们引入了按组匿名的概念。为了体现各群体之间的公平性，我们提出了弱公平概念和强公平概念。所提出的公平概念被证明是现有个人公平概念的自然概括，而且与现有的群体公平概念不同，它为严格的序数偏好提供了重要的结果。我们提供了满足群体公平性的随机社会选择规则的两个单独的表征：（i）直接表征（ii）极值点表征（作为公平确定性社会选择规则的凸组合）。我们还探索了没有群体的特殊情况，并提供了实现个人公平的规则的更清晰的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在单峰偏好下具有群体公平性的社会选择规则的特征。
AI.motivation: 已有的社会选择规则研究主要关注个体公平性，而对群体公平性的探讨较少。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过引入群体匿名性及跨群体公平性的概念，探索在单峰偏好下如何实现群体公平的社会选择规则。
AI.method: 本文采用直接特征化和极端点特征化两种方法，对满足群体公平性的随机社会选择规则进行分析，并探讨无群体情况下的个体公平性规则特征。
AI.result: 本文提出了群体公平性的两个概念（弱和强），并提供了两种特征化方法，同时对无群体情况下的个体公平性规则进行了更精确的特征分析。
AI.conclusion: 本文为单峰偏好下的群体公平性社会选择规则提供了理论支持和特征分析，扩展了现有社会选择理论的适用范围。

search_text: Characterization of Group-Fair Social Choice Rules under Single-Peaked Preferences 单峰偏好下群体公平社会选择规则的表征 We study fairness in social choice settings under single-peaked preferences. Construction and characterization of social choice rules in the single-peaked domain has been extensively studied in prior works. In fact, in the single-peaked domain, it is known that unanimous and strategy-proof deterministic rules have to be min-max rules and those that also satisfy anonymity have to be median rules. Further, random social choice rules satisfying these properties have been shown to be convex combinations of respective deterministic rules. We non-trivially add to this body of results by including fairness considerations in social choice. Our study directly addresses fairness for groups of agents. To study group-fairness, we consider an existing partition of the agents into logical groups, based on natural attributes such as gender, race, and location. To capture fairness within each group, we introduce the notion of group-wise anonymity. To capture fairness across the groups, we propose a weak notion as well as a strong notion of fairness. The proposed fairness notions turn out to be natural generalizations of existing individual-fairness notions and moreover provide non-trivial outcomes for strict ordinal preferences, unlike the existing group-fairness notions. We provide two separate characterizations of random social choice rules that satisfy group-fairness: (i) direct characterization (ii) extreme point characterization (as convex combinations of fair deterministic social choice rules). authors_text: R. Ravi,Weizhong Zhang,Michael Zlatin
title: Approximation algorithms for Steiner Tree Augmentation Problems
title_zh: Steiner 树增广问题的近似算法
abstract: In the Steiner Tree Augmentation Problem (STAP), we are given a graph $G = (V,E)$, a set of terminals $R \subseteq V$, and a Steiner tree $T$ spanning $R$. The edges $L := E \setminus E(T)$ are called links and have non-negative costs. The goal is to augment $T$ by adding a minimum cost set of links, so that there are 2 edge-disjoint paths between each pair of vertices in $R$. This problem is a special case of the Survivable Network Design Problem, which can be approximated to within a factor of 2 using iterative rounding~\cite{J2001}. We give the first polynomial time algorithm for STAP with approximation ratio better than 2. In particular, we achieve an approximation ratio of $(1.5 + \varepsilon)$. To do this, we employ the Local Search approach of~\cite{TZ2022} for the Tree Augmentation Problem and generalize their main decomposition theorem from links (of size two) to hyper-links. We also consider the Node-Weighted Steiner Tree Augmentation Problem (NW-STAP) in which the non-terminal nodes have non-negative costs. We seek a cheapest subset $S \subseteq V \setminus R$ so that $G[R \cup S]$ is 2-edge-connected. Using a result of Nutov~\cite{N2010}, there exists an $O(\log |R|)$-approximation for this problem. We provide an $O(\log^2 (|R|))$-approximation algorithm for NW-STAP using a greedy algorithm leveraging the spider decomposition of optimal solutions.
summary: In the Steiner Tree Augmentation Problem (STAP), we are given a graph $G = (V,E)$, a set of terminals $R \subseteq V$, and a Steiner tree $T$ spanning $R$. The edges $L := E \setminus E(T)$ are called links and have non-negative costs. The goal is to augment $T$ by adding a minimum cost set of links, so that there are 2 edge-disjoint paths between each pair of vertices in $R$. This problem is a special case of the Survivable Network Design Problem, which can be approximated to within a factor of 2 using iterative rounding~\cite{J2001}. We give the first polynomial time algorithm for STAP with approximation ratio better than 2. In particular, we achieve an approximation ratio of $(1.5 + \varepsilon)$. To do this, we employ the Local Search approach of~\cite{TZ2022} for the Tree Augmentation Problem and generalize their main decomposition theorem from links (of size two) to hyper-links. We also consider the Node-Weighted Steiner Tree Augmentation Problem (NW-STAP) in which the non-terminal nodes have non-negative costs. We seek a cheapest subset $S \subseteq V \setminus R$ so that $G[R \cup S]$ is 2-edge-connected. Using a result of Nutov~\cite{N2010}, there exists an $O(\log |R|)$-approximation for this problem. We provide an $O(\log^2 (|R|))$-approximation algorithm for NW-STAP using a greedy algorithm leveraging the spider decomposition of optimal solutions.
abstract_zh: 在斯坦纳树增广问题（STAP）中，我们得到一个图 $G = (V,E)$、一组终端 $R \subseteq V$ 和一个跨越 $R$ 的斯坦纳树 $T$。边 $L := E \setminus E(T)$ 称为链接并且具有非负成本。目标是通过添加最小成本的链接集来增强 $T$，以便 $R$ 中的每对顶点之间有 2 条边不相交的路径。这个问题是可生存网络设计问题的一个特例，可以使用迭代舍入将其近似到 2 倍以内~\cite{J2001}。我们给出了 STAP 的第一个多项式时间算法，其近似比优于 2。特别是，我们实现了 $(1.5 + \varepsilon)$ 的近似比。为此，我们采用 ~\cite{TZ2022} 的本地搜索方法来解决树增强问题，并将其主要分解定理从链接（大小为 2）推广到超链接。我们还考虑节点加权斯坦纳树增强问题（NW-STAP），其中非终端节点具有非负成本。我们寻找最便宜的子集 $S \subseteq V \setminus R$ 使得 $G[R \cup S]$ 是 2 边连通的。使用 Nutov~\cite{N2010} 的结果，该问题存在 $O(\log |R|)$ 近似。我们使用利用最优解的蜘蛛分解的贪心算法为 NW-STAP 提供 $O(\log^2 (|R|))$ 近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文针对Steiner树增强问题（STAP）设计了首个多项式时间近似算法，改进了原有2的近似比至1.5+ε，并提出了节点加权情况的近似方法。
AI.motivation: STAP是网络设计中的关键问题，需在已有Steiner树基础上增加最少成本边以实现终端节点两两双连通。原有方法近似比为2，改进该比值具有理论价值和实际意义。
AI.method: 采用局部搜索法推广Tree Augmentation问题的分解定理至超边，结合贪心算法与spider分解处理节点加权场景。
AI.result: 实现1.5+ε近似比的STAP算法，以及针对节点加权问题的O(log²|R|)近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文在理论层面突破了STAP的近似比上限，为网络增强问题提供了新方法，其分解定理推广和贪心策略对相关研究具有参考价值。

authors_text: Gogulapati Sreedurga,Yadati Narahari
title: Indivisible Participatory Budgeting under Weak Rankings
title_zh: 弱排名下不可分割的参与式预算
abstract: Participatory budgeting (PB) has attracted much attention in recent times due to its wide applicability in social choice settings. In this paper, we consider indivisible PB which involves allocating an available, limited budget to a set of indivisible projects, each having a certain cost, based on the preferences of agents over projects. The specific, important, research gap that we address in this paper is to propose classes of rules for indivisible PB with weak rankings (i.e., weak ordinal preferences) and investigate their key algorithmic and axiomatic issues. We propose two classes of rules having distinct significance and motivation. The first is layered approval rules which enable weak rankings to be studied by carefully translating them into approval votes. The second is need-based rules which enable to capture fairness issues. Under layered approval rules, we study two natural families of rules: greedy-truncation rules and cost-worthy rules. The paper has two parts. In the first part, we investigate algorithmic and complexity related issues for the proposed rules. In the second part, we present a detailed axiomatic analysis of these rules, for which, we examine and generalize axioms in the literature and also introduce a new axiom, pro-affordability. The paper helps to highlight the trade-offs among practical appeal, computational complexity, and axiomatic compliance of these rules.

In this paper, we consider indivisible PB which involves allocating an available, limited budget to a set of indivisible projects, each having a certain cost, based on the preferences of agents over projects. The specific, important, research gap that we address in this paper is to propose classes of rules for indivisible PB with weak rankings (i.e., weak ordinal preferences) and investigate their key algorithmic and axiomatic issues. We propose two classes of rules having distinct significance and motivation. The first is layered approval rules which enable weak rankings to be studied by carefully translating them into approval votes. The second is need-based rules which enable to capture fairness issues. Under layered approval rules, we study two natural families of rules: greedy-truncation rules and cost-worthy rules. The paper has two parts. In the first part, we investigate algorithmic and complexity related issues for the proposed rules. In the second part, we present a detailed axiomatic analysis of these rules, for which, we examine and generalize axioms in the literature and also introduce a new axiom, pro-affordability. The paper helps to highlight the trade-offs among practical appeal, computational complexity, and axiomatic compliance of these rules.
abstract_zh: 参与式预算（PB）由于其在社会选择环境中的广泛适用性而近年来引起了广泛关注。在本文中，我们考虑不可分割的 PB，它涉及根据代理商对项目的偏好，将可用的有限预算分配给一组不可分割的项目，每个项目都有一定的成本。我们在本文中解决的具体、重要的研究空白是为具有弱排名（即弱序数偏好）的不可分割的 PB 提出规则类别，并研究其关键算法和公理问题。我们提出了两类具有不同意义和动机的规则。第一个是分层批准规则，可以通过仔细地将其转化为批准票来研究较弱的排名。第二个是基于需求的规则，能够捕捉公平问题。在分层批准规则下，我们研究了两个自然规则族：贪婪截断规则和成本值得规则。本文分为两部分。在第一部分中，我们研究拟议规则的算法和复杂性相关问题。在第二部分中，我们对这些规则进行了详细的公理分析，为此，我们检查并概括了文献中的公理，并引入了一个新的公理：支持可负担性。该论文有助于强调这些规则的实际吸引力、计算复杂性和公理合规性之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究弱排序下不可分参与式预算的规则设计，提出两类规则并分析其算法与公理特性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对弱排序（允许并列偏好）的参与式预算规则，且需平衡实际可行性、计算复杂性与公平性要求。
AI.method: 提出分层批准规则（将弱排序转化为批准投票）与需求导向规则（强调公平性），并分别从算法复杂性分析和公理化角度进行系统研究，引入新公理'pro-affordability'。
AI.result: 确定两类规则的算法可行性与复杂度界限，揭示其在满足不同公理（如效率、公平）上的差异，并证明新公理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 为弱排序场景下的参与式预算提供了理论框架，明确了规则设计中实践需求、计算效率与公理准则间的权衡关系。

authors_text: Jingjia Huang,Baixiang Yang
title: Knowledge Guided Bidirectional Attention Network for Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: 用于人与物体交互检测的知识引导双向注意网络
abstract: Human Object Interaction (HOI) detection is a challenging task that requires to distinguish the interaction between a human-object pair. Attention based relation parsing is a popular and effective strategy utilized in HOI. However, current methods execute relation parsing in a "bottom-up" manner. We argue that the independent use of the bottom-up parsing strategy in HOI is counter-intuitive and could lead to the diffusion of attention. Therefore, we introduce a novel knowledge-guided top-down attention into HOI, and propose to model the relation parsing as a "look and search" process: execute scene-context modeling (i.e. look), and then, given the knowledge of the target pair, search visual clues for the discrimination of the interaction between the pair. We implement the process via unifying the bottom-up and top-down attention in a single encoder-decoder based model. The experimental results show that our model achieves competitive performance on the V-COCO and HICO-DET datasets.
summary: Human Object Interaction (HOI) detection is a challenging task that requires to distinguish the interaction between a human-object pair. Attention based relation parsing is a popular and effective strategy utilized in HOI. However, current methods execute relation parsing in a "bottom-up" manner. We argue that the independent use of the bottom-up parsing strategy in HOI is counter-intuitive and could lead to the diffusion of attention. Therefore, we introduce a novel knowledge-guided top-down attention into HOI, and propose to model the relation parsing as a "look and search" process: execute scene-context modeling (i.e. look), and then, given the knowledge of the target pair, search visual clues for the discrimination of the interaction between the pair. We implement the process via unifying the bottom-up and top-down attention in a single encoder-decoder based model. The experimental results show that our model achieves competitive performance on the V-COCO and HICO-DET datasets.
abstract_zh: 人体物体交互（HOI）检测是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要区分人与物体对之间的交互。基于注意力的关系解析是 HOI 中使用的一种流行且有效的策略。然而，当前的方法以“自下而上”的方式执行关系解析。我们认为 HOI 中独立使用自下而上的解析策略是违反直觉的，可能会导致注意力的扩散。因此，我们在 HOI 中引入了一种新颖的知识引导的自上而下的注意力机制，并提出将关系解析建模为“查看和搜索”过程：执行场景上下文建模（即查看），然后在给定目标对的知识的情况下，搜索视觉线索以区分对之间的交互。我们通过在基于单个编码器-解码器的模型中统一自下而上和自上而下的注意力来实现该过程。实验结果表明，我们的模型在 V-COCO 和 HICO-DET 数据集上取得了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合知识引导的双向注意力网络，用于改进人-物体交互检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用自底向上的注意力策略处理人-物体交互检测时存在注意力扩散问题，难以有效捕捉交互关系。
AI.method: 引入知识引导的自顶向下注意力机制，将场景上下文建模与目标对的视觉线索搜索结合，通过编码器-解码器结构统一实现双向注意力机制。
AI.result: 在V-COCO和HICO-DET数据集上取得具有竞争力的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 双向注意力机制有效提升了人-物体交互检测的准确性，验证了知识引导策略的有效性。

authors_text: Filip Matzner
title: Hyperparameter Tuning in Echo State Networks
title_zh: 回声状态网络中的超参数调整
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO '22)
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2022 (GECCO '22)
abstract: Echo State Networks represent a type of recurrent neural network with a large randomly generated reservoir and a small number of readout connections trained via linear regression. The most common topology of the reservoir is a fully connected network of up to thousands of neurons. Over the years, researchers have introduced a variety of alternative reservoir topologies, such as a circular network or a linear path of connections. When comparing the performance of different topologies or other architectural changes, it is necessary to tune the hyperparameters for each of the topologies separately since their properties may significantly differ. The hyperparameter tuning is usually carried out manually by selecting the best performing set of parameters from a sparse grid of predefined combinations. Unfortunately, this approach may lead to underperforming configurations, especially for sensitive topologies. We propose an alternative approach of hyperparameter tuning based on the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES). Using this approach, we have improved multiple topology comparison results by orders of magnitude suggesting that topology alone does not play as important role as properly tuned hyperparameters.
summary: Echo State Networks represent a type of recurrent neural network with a large randomly generated reservoir and a small number of readout connections trained via linear regression. The most common topology of the reservoir is a fully connected network of up to thousands of neurons. Over the years, researchers have introduced a variety of alternative reservoir topologies, such as a circular network or a linear path of connections. When comparing the performance of different topologies or other architectural changes, it is necessary to tune the hyperparameters for each of the topologies separately since their properties may significantly differ. The hyperparameter tuning is usually carried out manually by selecting the best performing set of parameters from a sparse grid of predefined combinations. Unfortunately, this approach may lead to underperforming configurations, especially for sensitive topologies. We propose an alternative approach of hyperparameter tuning based on the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES). Using this approach, we have improved multiple topology comparison results by orders of magnitude suggesting that topology alone does not play as important role as properly tuned hyperparameters.
abstract_zh: 回声状态网络代表一种循环神经网络，具有大型随机生成的存储库和通过线性回归训练的少量读出连接。水库最常见的拓扑是由多达数千个神经元组成的完全连接的网络。多年来，研究人员引入了各种替代储层拓扑，例如环形网络或线性连接路径。当比较不同拓扑或其他架构变化的性能时，有必要分别调整每个拓扑的超参数，因为它们的属性可能显着不同。超参数调整通常是通过从预定义组合的稀疏网格中选择性能最佳的一组参数来手动执行的。不幸的是，这种方法可能会导致配置性能不佳，特别是对于敏感拓扑。我们提出了一种基于协方差矩阵适应进化策略（CMA-ES）的超参数调整的替代方法。使用这种方法，我们将多个拓扑比较结果改进了几个数量级，这表明拓扑本身并没有像正确调整的超参数那样发挥重要作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）的超参数调优方法，以提升回声状态网络（ESN）不同水库拓扑结构的性能比较效果。
AI.motivation: 传统手动超参数调优方法依赖稀疏预定义组合，可能导致敏感拓扑结构性能不佳，需更高效的自动化调参策略。
AI.method: 采用CMA-ES算法替代手动调参，通过进化策略自动优化ESN的超参数配置。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法使多种拓扑结构的性能比较结果提升多个数量级，证明超参数调优比拓扑选择更为关键。
AI.conclusion: 超参数的精确调优对ESN性能具有决定性影响，CMA-ES能有效解决传统方法的局限性。

search_text: Hyperparameter Tuning in Echo State Networks 回声状态网络中的超参数调整 Echo State Networks represent a type of recurrent neural network with a large randomly generated reservoir and a small number of readout connections trained via linear regression. The most common topology of the reservoir is a fully connected network of up to thousands of neurons. Over the years, researchers have introduced a variety of alternative reservoir topologies, such as a circular network or a linear path of connections. When comparing the performance of different topologies or other architectural changes, it is necessary to tune the hyperparameters for each of the topologies separately since their properties may significantly differ. The hyperparameter tuning is usually carried out manually by selecting the best performing set of parameters from a sparse grid of predefined combinations. Unfortunately, this approach may lead to underperforming configurations, especially for sensitive topologies. We propose an alternative approach of hyperparameter tuning based on the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES). Using this approach, we have improved multiple topology comparison results by orders of magnitude suggesting that topology alone does not play as important role as properly tuned hyperparameters. 回声状态网络代表一种循环神经网络，具有大型随机生成的存储库和通过线性回归训练的少量读出连接。水库最常见的拓扑是由多达数千个神经元组成的完全连接的网络。多年来，研究人员引入了各种替代储层拓扑，例如环形网络或线性连接路径。当比较不同拓扑或其他架构变化的性能时，有必要分别调整每个拓扑的超参数，因为它们的属性可能显着不同。超参数调整通常是通过从预定义组合的稀疏网格中选择性能最佳的一组参数来手动执行的。不幸的是，这种方法可能会导致配置性能不佳，特别是对于敏感拓扑。我们提出了一种基于协方差矩阵适应进化策略（CMA-ES）的超参数调整的替代方法。使用这种方法，我们将多个拓扑比较结果改进了几个数量级，这表明拓扑本身并没有像正确调整的超参数那样发挥重要作用。 本文提出基于协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）的超参数调优方法，以提升回声状态网络（ESN）不同水库拓扑结构的性能比较效果。 Filip Matzner cs.NE

authors_text: Binghui Peng,Fred Zhang
title: Online Prediction in Sub-linear Space
title_zh: 次线性空间在线预测
abstract: We provide the first sub-linear space and sub-linear regret algorithm for online learning with expert advice (against an oblivious adversary), addressing an open question raised recently by Srinivas, Woodruff, Xu and Zhou (STOC 2022). We also demonstrate a separation between oblivious and (strong) adaptive adversaries by proving a linear memory lower bound of any sub-linear regret algorithm against an adaptive adversary. Our algorithm is based on a novel pool selection procedure that bypasses the traditional wisdom of leader selection for online learning, and a generic reduction that transforms any weakly sub-linear regret $o(T)$ algorithm to $T^{1-α}$ regret algorithm, which may be of independent interest. Our lower bound utilizes the connection of no-regret learning and equilibrium computation in zero-sum games, leading to a proof of a strong lower bound against an adaptive adversary.
summary: We provide the first sub-linear space and sub-linear regret algorithm for online learning with expert advice (against an oblivious adversary), addressing an open question raised recently by Srinivas, Woodruff, Xu and Zhou (STOC 2022). We also demonstrate a separation between oblivious and (strong) adaptive adversaries by proving a linear memory lower bound of any sub-linear regret algorithm against an adaptive adversary. Our algorithm is based on a novel pool selection procedure that bypasses the traditional wisdom of leader selection for online learning, and a generic reduction that transforms any weakly sub-linear regret $o(T)$ algorithm to $T^{1-α}$ regret algorithm, which may be of independent interest. Our lower bound utilizes the connection of no-regret learning and equilibrium computation in zero-sum games, leading to a proof of a strong lower bound against an adaptive adversary.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了第一个用于在线学习的次线性空间和次线性遗憾算法，并提供专家建议（针对一个不经意的对手），解决了 Srinivas、Woodruff、Xu 和 Zhou 最近提出的一个悬而未决的问题（STOC 2022）。我们还通过证明任何亚线性后悔算法针对自适应对手的线性记忆下界，证明了遗忘对手和（强）自适应对手之间的分离。我们的算法基于一种新颖的池选择程序，该程序绕过了在线学习的领导者选择的传统智慧，以及将任何弱子线性遗憾 $o(T)$ 算法转换为 $T^{1-α}$ 遗憾算法的通用归约，这可能是独立的兴趣。我们的下界利用了零和游戏中无悔学习和均衡计算的联系，从而证明了针对适应性对手的强大下界。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个在子线性空间和子线性遗憾下解决在线学习专家建议问题的算法，并区分了对抗性对手的类型差异。
AI.motivation: 回应STOC 2022提出的开放问题，探索在线学习中对抗性对手（oblivious vs. adaptive）的内存与遗憾下界差异。
AI.method: 设计新颖的池选择机制替代传统领导者选择，结合通用化归约技术将弱子线性遗憾算法转化为强遗憾算法；通过零和博弈均衡计算与无遗憾学习的关联证明自适应对手的线性内存下界。
AI.result: 实现首个针对oblivious对手的子线性空间与遗憾算法，证明自适应对手需线性内存的下界，归约技术可能具有独立价值。
AI.conclusion: 解决关键开放问题，明确区分对抗性对手的复杂度差异，方法论为在线学习与博弈论交叉研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Xinyi Zou,Yan Yan,Jing-Hao Xue,Si Chen,Hanzi Wang
title: Learn-to-Decompose: Cascaded Decomposition Network for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 学习分解：用于跨域少样本面部表情识别的级联分解网络
abstract: Most existing compound facial expression recognition (FER) methods rely on large-scale labeled compound expression data for training. However, collecting such data is labor-intensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we address the compound FER task in the cross-domain few-shot learning (FSL) setting, which requires only a few samples of compound expressions in the target domain. Specifically, we propose a novel cascaded decomposition network (CDNet), which cascades several learn-to-decompose modules with shared parameters based on a sequential decomposition mechanism, to obtain a transferable feature space. To alleviate the overfitting problem caused by limited base classes in our task, a partial regularization strategy is designed to effectively exploit the best of both episodic training and batch training. By training across similar tasks on multiple basic expression datasets, CDNet learns the ability of learn-to-decompose that can be easily adapted to identify unseen compound expressions. Extensive experiments on both in-the-lab and in-the-wild compound expression datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed CDNet against several state-of-the-art FSL methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/zouxinyi0625/CDNet.
summary: Most existing compound facial expression recognition (FER) methods rely on large-scale labeled compound expression data for training. However, collecting such data is labor-intensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we address the compound FER task in the cross-domain few-shot learning (FSL) setting, which requires only a few samples of compound expressions in the target domain. Specifically, we propose a novel cascaded decomposition network (CDNet), which cascades several learn-to-decompose modules with shared parameters based on a sequential decomposition mechanism, to obtain a transferable feature space. To alleviate the overfitting problem caused by limited base classes in our task, a partial regularization strategy is designed to effectively exploit the best of both episodic training and batch training. By training across similar tasks on multiple basic expression datasets, CDNet learns the ability of learn-to-decompose that can be easily adapted to identify unseen compound expressions. Extensive experiments on both in-the-lab and in-the-wild compound expression datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed CDNet against several state-of-the-art FSL methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/zouxinyi0625/CDNet.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的复合面部表情识别（FER）方法依赖于大规模标记的复合表情数据进行训练。然而，收集此类数据既费力又耗时。在本文中，我们解决了跨域少样本学习（FSL）设置中的复合 FER 任务，该任务仅需要目标域中的少量复合表达式样本。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的级联分解网络（CDNet），它基于顺序分解机制将多个具有共享参数的学习分解模块级联，以获得可转移的特征空间。为了缓解任务中有限基类引起的过拟合问题，设计了部分正则化策略来有效地利用情景训练和批量训练的优点。通过在多个基本表达数据集上进行类似任务的训练，CDNet 学会了学习分解的能力，可以轻松适应识别看不见的复合表达。对实验室和野外复合表达数据集的大量实验证明了我们提出的 CDNet 相对于几种最先进的 FSL 方法的优越性。代码位于：https://github.com/zouxinyi0625/CDNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种级联分解网络（CDNet），用于跨领域小样本复合面部表情识别任务，解决传统方法依赖大量标注数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有复合面部表情识别方法依赖大规模标注数据，但数据收集成本高。跨领域小样本学习场景下，目标领域仅有少量样本，需设计有效模型提升识别能力。
AI.method: 设计级联分解网络（CDNet），通过共享参数的级联分解模块和顺序分解机制构建可迁移特征空间，并引入部分正则化策略结合 episodic 和 batch 训练缓解过拟合问题。
AI.result: 在实验室和野外复合表情数据集上实验表明，CDNet 相比多个先进小样本学习方法具有更优性能。
AI.conclusion: CDNet 通过学习分解能力有效解决跨领域小样本复合表情识别问题，实验验证了其方法的有效性。

By training across similar tasks on multiple basic expression datasets, CDNet learns the ability of learn-to-decompose that can be easily adapted to identify unseen compound expressions. Extensive experiments on both in-the-lab and in-the-wild compound expression datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed CDNet against several state-of-the-art FSL methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/zouxinyi0625/CDNet. 大多数现有的复合面部表情识别（FER）方法依赖于大规模标记的复合表情数据进行训练。然而，收集此类数据既费力又耗时。在本文中，我们解决了跨域少样本学习（FSL）设置中的复合 FER 任务，该任务仅需要目标域中的少量复合表达式样本。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的级联分解网络（CDNet），它基于顺序分解机制将多个具有共享参数的学习分解模块级联，以获得可转移的特征空间。为了缓解任务中有限基类引起的过拟合问题，设计了部分正则化策略来有效地利用情景训练和批量训练的优点。通过在多个基本表达数据集上进行类似任务的训练，CDNet 学会了学习分解的能力，可以轻松适应识别看不见的复合表达。对实验室和野外复合表达数据集的大量实验证明了我们提出的 CDNet 相对于几种最先进的 FSL 方法的优越性。代码位于：https://github.com/zouxinyi0625/CDNet。 本文提出一种级联分解网络（CDNet），用于跨领域小样本复合面部表情识别任务，解决传统方法依赖大量标注数据的问题。 Xinyi Zou,Yan Yan,Jing-Hao Xue,Si Chen,Hanzi Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Xiuxian Li,Min Meng,Yiguang Hong,Jie Chen
title: A Survey of Decision Making in Adversarial Games
title_zh: 对抗性博弈中决策的调查
abstract: Game theory has by now found numerous applications in various fields, including economics, industry, jurisprudence, and artificial intelligence, where each player only cares about its own interest in a noncooperative or cooperative manner, but without obvious malice to other players. However, in many practical applications, such as poker, chess, evader pursuing, drug interdiction, coast guard, cyber-security, and national defense, players often have apparently adversarial stances, that is, selfish actions of each player inevitably or intentionally inflict loss or wreak havoc on other players. Along this line, this paper provides a systematic survey on three main game models widely employed in adversarial games, i.e., zero-sum normal-form and extensive-form games, Stackelberg (security) games, zero-sum differential games, from an array of perspectives, including basic knowledge of game models, (approximate) equilibrium concepts, problem classifications, research frontiers, (approximate) optimal strategy seeking techniques, prevailing algorithms, and practical applications. Finally, promising future research directions are also discussed for relevant adversarial games.
summary: Game theory has by now found numerous applications in various fields, including economics, industry, jurisprudence, and artificial intelligence, where each player only cares about its own interest in a noncooperative or cooperative manner, but without obvious malice to other players. However, in many practical applications, such as poker, chess, evader pursuing, drug interdiction, coast guard, cyber-security, and national defense, players often have apparently adversarial stances, that is, selfish actions of each player inevitably or intentionally inflict loss or wreak havoc on other players. Along this line, this paper provides a systematic survey on three main game models widely employed in adversarial games, i.e., zero-sum normal-form and extensive-form games, Stackelberg (security) games, zero-sum differential games, from an array of perspectives, including basic knowledge of game models, (approximate) equilibrium concepts, problem classifications, research frontiers, (approximate) optimal strategy seeking techniques, prevailing algorithms, and practical applications. Finally, promising future research directions are also discussed for relevant adversarial games.
abstract_zh: 博弈论目前已在经济学、工业、法学、人工智能等各个领域得到广泛应用，其中每个参与者以不合作或合作的方式只关心自己的利益，但对其他参与者没有明显的恶意。然而，在许多实际应用中，例如扑克、国际象棋、追捕逃犯、缉毒、海岸警卫队、网络安全、国防等，玩家往往具有明显的对抗性立场，即每个玩家的自私行为不可避免地或故意地给其他玩家造成损失或严重破坏。沿着这个思路，本文从博弈模型的基础知识、（近似）均衡概念、问题分类、研究前沿、（近似）最优策略寻求技术、主流算法和实际应用等多个角度，对对抗博弈中广泛使用的三种主要博弈模型，即零和范式博弈和扩展博弈、Stackelberg（安全）博弈、零和微分博弈进行了系统的综述。最后，还讨论了相关对抗性游戏未来有前景的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了对抗性游戏中常用的三种主要博弈模型及其相关理论和应用。
AI.motivation: 传统博弈论主要关注非合作或合作场景，但实际应用中存在明显对抗意图的场景（如网络安全、国防等）需要专门研究。
AI.method: 从博弈模型基础、均衡概念、问题分类、算法技术及应用等多个维度，对零和博弈、Stackelberg博弈和微分博弈进行系统性梳理。
AI.result: 总结了对抗性博弈的理论框架、求解方法及实际应用案例，并指出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为对抗性博弈的理论发展和工程应用提供了系统性参考，强调了跨学科研究的重要性。

authors_text: Hridesh Kedia,Shunhao Oh,Dana Randall
title: Local Stochastic Algorithms for Alignment in Self-Organizing Particle Systems
title_zh: 自组织粒子系统中的局部随机对齐算法
comment: long version of paper published in RANDOM 2022
comments: long version of paper published in RANDOM 2022
abstract: We present local distributed, stochastic algorithms for \emph{alignment} in self-organizing particle systems (SOPS) on two-dimensional lattices, where particles occupy unique sites on the lattice, and particles can make spatial moves to neighboring sites if they are unoccupied. Such models are abstractions of programmable matter, composed of individual computational particles with limited memory, strictly local communication abilities, and modest computational capabilities. We consider oriented particle systems, where particles are assigned a vector pointing in one of $q$ directions, and each particle can compute the angle between its direction and the direction of any neighboring particle, although without knowledge of global orientation with respect to a fixed underlying coordinate system. Particles move stochastically, with each particle able to either modify its direction or make a local spatial move along a lattice edge during a move. We consider two settings: (a) where particle configurations must remain simply connected at all times and (b) where spatial moves are unconstrained and configurations can disconnect. Taking inspiration from the Potts and clock models from statistical physics, we prove that for any $q \geq 2,$ these self-organizing particle systems can be made to collectively align along a single dominant direction (analogous to a solid or ordered state) or remain non-aligned, in which case the fraction of particles oriented along any direction is nearly equal (analogous to a gaseous or disordered state). Moreover, we show that with appropriate settings of the input parameters, we can achieve \emph{compression} and \emph{expansion}, controlling how tightly gathered the particles are, as well as \emph{alignment} or \emph{nonalignment}, producing a single dominant orientation or not.
summary: We present local distributed, stochastic algorithms for \emph{alignment} in self-organizing particle systems (SOPS) on two-dimensional lattices, where particles occupy unique sites on the lattice, and particles can make spatial moves to neighboring sites if they are unoccupied. Such models are abstractions of programmable matter, composed of individual computational particles with limited memory, strictly local communication abilities, and modest computational capabilities. We consider oriented particle systems, where particles are assigned a vector pointing in one of $q$ directions, and each particle can compute the angle between its direction and the direction of any neighboring particle, although without knowledge of global orientation with respect to a fixed underlying coordinate system. Particles move stochastically, with each particle able to either modify its direction or make a local spatial move along a lattice edge during a move. We consider two settings: (a) where particle configurations must remain simply connected at all times and (b) where spatial moves are unconstrained and configurations can disconnect. Taking inspiration from the Potts and clock models from statistical physics, we prove that for any $q \geq 2,$ these self-organizing particle systems can be made to collectively align along a single dominant direction (analogous to a solid or ordered state) or remain non-aligned, in which case the fraction of particles oriented along any direction is nearly equal (analogous to a gaseous or disordered state). Moreover, we show that with appropriate settings of the input parameters, we can achieve \emph{compression} and \emph{expansion}, controlling how tightly gathered the particles are, as well as \emph{alignment} or \emph{nonalignment}, producing a single dominant orientation or not.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了二维晶格上自组织粒子系统（SOPS）中\emph{对齐}的局部分布式随机算法，其中粒子占据晶格上的独特位置，并且如果粒子未被占据，则它们可以空间移动到相邻位置。这些模型是可编程物质的抽象，由具有有限内存、严格本地通信能力和适度计算能力的单个计算粒子组成。我们考虑定向粒子系统，其中粒子被分配一个指向 $q$ 方向之一的向量，每个粒子都可以计算其方向与任何相邻粒子的方向之间的角度，尽管不知道相对于固定基础坐标系的全局方向。粒子随机移动，每个粒子都能够在移动过程中修改其方向或沿着晶格边缘进行局部空间移动。我们考虑两种设置：(a) 粒子配置必须始终保持简单连接，(b) 空间移动不受约束并且配置可以断开连接。受到统计物理学中 Potts 和时钟模型的启发，我们证明，对于任何 $q \geq 2,$ 这些自组织粒子系统可以沿着单一主导方向集体排列（类似于固体或有序状态）或保持不排列，在这种情况下，沿着任何方向取向的粒子分数几乎相等（类似于气态或无序状态）。此外，我们表明，通过适当设置输入参数，我们可以实现 \emph{压缩} 和 \emph{膨胀}，控制粒子聚集的紧密程度，以及 \emph{alignment} 或 \emph{nonalignment}，从而产生或不产生单一主导方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于二维晶格自组织粒子系统（SOPS）中对齐的局部分布式随机算法，通过粒子方向调整和空间移动实现集体对齐或非对齐状态。
AI.motivation: 针对可编程物质的计算粒子系统，设计具有有限内存、局部通信能力和计算能力的分布式算法，以实现粒子系统的自组织对齐行为。
AI.method: 受统计物理中的Potts模型和时钟模型启发，采用局部随机方向调整与空间移动策略，考虑两种配置约束条件（保持连通性或允许断开）进行算法设计。
AI.result: 证明对于任意q≥2，系统可实现单主方向对齐（类似固态）或均匀非对齐（类似气态），并通过参数调节实现粒子聚集度（压缩/膨胀）控制。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效实现了自组织粒子系统的定向对齐与密度调控，为可编程物质的分布式控制提供了理论基础与方法支持。

authors_text: Matthieu Zins,Gilles Simon,Marie-Odile Berger
title: Level Set-Based Camera Pose Estimation From Multiple 2D/3D Ellipse-Ellipsoid Correspondences
title_zh: 基于多个 2D/3D 椭圆-椭球对应的基于水平集的相机位姿估计
abstract: In this paper, we propose an object-based camera pose estimation from a single RGB image and a pre-built map of objects, represented with ellipsoidal models. We show that contrary to point correspondences, the definition of a cost function characterizing the projection of a 3D object onto a 2D object detection is not straightforward. We develop an ellipse-ellipse cost based on level sets sampling, demonstrate its nice properties for handling partially visible objects and compare its performance with other common metrics. Finally, we show that the use of a predictive uncertainty on the detected ellipses allows a fair weighting of the contribution of the correspondences which improves the computed pose. The code is released at https://gitlab.inria.fr/tangram/level-set-based-camera-pose-estimation.
summary: In this paper, we propose an object-based camera pose estimation from a single RGB image and a pre-built map of objects, represented with ellipsoidal models. We show that contrary to point correspondences, the definition of a cost function characterizing the projection of a 3D object onto a 2D object detection is not straightforward. We develop an ellipse-ellipse cost based on level sets sampling, demonstrate its nice properties for handling partially visible objects and compare its performance with other common metrics. Finally, we show that the use of a predictive uncertainty on the detected ellipses allows a fair weighting of the contribution of the correspondences which improves the computed pose. The code is released at https://gitlab.inria.fr/tangram/level-set-based-camera-pose-estimation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于对象的相机姿态估计，该方法根据单个 RGB 图像和预先构建的对象图（用椭圆体模型表示）进行估计。我们表明，与点对应相反，表征 3D 对象到 2D 对象检测的投影的成本函数的定义并不简单。我们开发了基于水平集采样的椭圆-椭圆成本，展示了其处理部分可见对象的良好属性，并将其性能与其他常见指标进行了比较。最后，我们表明，在检测到的椭圆上使用预测不确定性可以对对应的贡献进行公平的加权，从而改善计算的姿态。该代码发布于 https://gitlab.inria.fr/tangram/level-set-based-camera-pose-estimation。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于水平集的相机位姿估计方法，利用多个2D/3D椭圆-椭球对应关系进行定位。
AI.motivation: 传统点对应方法在部分可见物体处理上存在局限，需更鲁棒的成本函数。
AI.method: 开发基于水平集采样的椭圆-椭圆成本函数，结合预测不确定性加权对应关系。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在部分可见物体场景下优于传统指标，位姿估计精度提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效处理椭圆-椭球对应关系，不确定性加权机制提升位姿估计鲁棒性。

authors_text: Christoph Grunau,Ahmet Alper Özüdoğru,Václav Rozhoň,Jakub Tětek
title: A Nearly Tight Analysis of Greedy k-means++
title_zh: 贪心 k-means++ 的近乎严格分析
abstract: The famous $k$-means++ algorithm of Arthur and Vassilvitskii [SODA 2007] is the most popular way of solving the $k$-means problem in practice. The algorithm is very simple: it samples the first center uniformly at random and each of the following $k-1$ centers is then always sampled proportional to its squared distance to the closest center so far. Afterward, Lloyd's iterative algorithm is run. The $k$-means++ algorithm is known to return a $Θ(\log k)$ approximate solution in expectation. In their seminal work, Arthur and Vassilvitskii [SODA 2007] asked about the guarantees for its following \emph{greedy} variant: in every step, we sample $\ell$ candidate centers instead of one and then pick the one that minimizes the new cost. This is also how $k$-means++ is implemented in e.g. the popular Scikit-learn library [Pedregosa et al.; JMLR 2011]. We present nearly matching lower and upper bounds for the greedy $k$-means++: We prove that it is an $O(\ell^3 \log^3 k)$-approximation algorithm. On the other hand, we prove a lower bound of $Ω(\ell^3 \log^3 k / \log^2(\ell\log k))$. Previously, only an $Ω(\ell \log k)$ lower bound was known [Bhattacharya, Eube, Röglin, Schmidt; ESA 2020] and there was no known upper bound.
summary: The famous $k$-means++ algorithm of Arthur and Vassilvitskii [SODA 2007] is the most popular way of solving the $k$-means problem in practice. The algorithm is very simple: it samples the first center uniformly at random and each of the following $k-1$ centers is then always sampled proportional to its squared distance to the closest center so far. Afterward, Lloyd's iterative algorithm is run. The $k$-means++ algorithm is known to return a $Θ(\log k)$ approximate solution in expectation. In their seminal work, Arthur and Vassilvitskii [SODA 2007] asked about the guarantees for its following \emph{greedy} variant: in every step, we sample $\ell$ candidate centers instead of one and then pick the one that minimizes the new cost. This is also how $k$-means++ is implemented in e.g. the popular Scikit-learn library [Pedregosa et al.; JMLR 2011]. We present nearly matching lower and upper bounds for the greedy $k$-means++: We prove that it is an $O(\ell^3 \log^3 k)$-approximation algorithm. On the other hand, we prove a lower bound of $Ω(\ell^3 \log^3 k / \log^2(\ell\log k))$. Previously, only an $Ω(\ell \log k)$ lower bound was known [Bhattacharya, Eube, Röglin, Schmidt; ESA 2020] and there was no known upper bound.
abstract_zh: Arthur 和 Vassilvitskii 著名的 $k$-means++ 算法 [SODA 2007] 是实践中解决 $k$-means 问题最流行的方法。该算法非常简单：它随机均匀地对第一个中心进行采样，然后始终按照其到迄今为止最近的中心的平方距离的比例对随后的每个 $k-1$ 中心进行采样。随后，运行 Lloyd 迭代算法。已知 $k$-means++ 算法会返回期望的 $θ(\log k)$ 近似解。在他们的开创性工作中，Arthur 和 Vassilvitskii [SODA 2007] 询问了其以下 \emph{greedy} 变体的保证：在每一步中，我们都会对 $\ell$ 候选中心而不是一个进行采样，然后选择一个能够最小化新成本的中心。这也是 $k$-means++ 的实现方式，例如流行的 Scikit-learn 库 [Pedregosa 等人； JMLR 2011]。我们提出了贪婪 $k$-means++ 几乎匹配的下限和上限：我们证明它是一个 $O(\ell^3 \log^3 k)$ 近似算法。另一方面，我们证明了 $Ω(\ell^3 \log^3 k / \log^2(\ell\log k))$ 的下界。此前，仅知道 $Ω(\ell \log k)$ 下界 [Bhattacharya, Eube, Röglin, Schmidt; ESA 2020]并且没有已知的上限。

AI.tldr: 本文对贪心k-means++算法进行了近似紧的分析，提供了其近似比的上下界。
AI.motivation: 尽管k-means++算法在实践中广泛应用，但其贪心变体的理论保证尚不明确，需填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 通过理论分析推导贪心k-means++算法的近似比上下界，结合已知结果进行对比验证。
AI.result: 证明贪心k-means++算法的近似比为O(ℓ³ log³k)，并给出下界Ω(ℓ³ log³k / log²(ℓ logk))，改进了先前的Ω(ℓ logk)下界。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为贪心k-means++算法提供了更精确的理论保证，揭示了其性能的紧界，推动了聚类算法分析的发展。

authors_text: Hanbyel Cho,Yekang Lee,Jaemyung Yu,Junmo Kim
title: Stochastic Attribute Modeling for Face Super-Resolution
title_zh: 人脸超分辨率的随机属性建模
abstract: When a high-resolution (HR) image is degraded into a low-resolution (LR) image, the image loses some of the existing information. Consequently, multiple HR images can correspond to the LR image. Most of the existing methods do not consider the uncertainty caused by the stochastic attribute, which can only be probabilistically inferred. Therefore, the predicted HR images are often blurry because the network tries to reflect all possibilities in a single output image. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a novel face super-resolution (SR) scheme to take into the uncertainty by stochastic modeling. Specifically, the information in LR images is separately encoded into deterministic and stochastic attributes. Furthermore, an Input Conditional Attribute Predictor is proposed and separately trained to predict the partially alive stochastic attributes from only the LR images. Extensive evaluation shows that the proposed method successfully reduces the uncertainty in the learning process and outperforms the existing state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: When a high-resolution (HR) image is degraded into a low-resolution (LR) image, the image loses some of the existing information. Consequently, multiple HR images can correspond to the LR image. Most of the existing methods do not consider the uncertainty caused by the stochastic attribute, which can only be probabilistically inferred. Therefore, the predicted HR images are often blurry because the network tries to reflect all possibilities in a single output image. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a novel face super-resolution (SR) scheme to take into the uncertainty by stochastic modeling. Specifically, the information in LR images is separately encoded into deterministic and stochastic attributes. Furthermore, an Input Conditional Attribute Predictor is proposed and separately trained to predict the partially alive stochastic attributes from only the LR images. Extensive evaluation shows that the proposed method successfully reduces the uncertainty in the learning process and outperforms the existing state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 当高分辨率（HR）图像降级为低分辨率（LR）图像时，图像会丢失一些现有信息。因此，多个HR图像可以对应于LR图像。现有方法大多没有考虑随机属性带来的不确定性，只能进行概率推断。因此，预测的 HR 图像通常是模糊的，因为网络试图在单个输出图像中反映所有可能性。为了克服这一限制，本文提出了一种新颖的人脸超分辨率（SR）方案，通过随机建模来考虑不确定性。具体来说，LR 图像中的信息被分别编码为确定性属性和随机属性。此外，提出了输入条件属性预测器并单独训练以仅从 LR 图像预测部分活跃的随机属性。广泛的评估表明，所提出的方法成功地减少了学习过程中的不确定性，并且优于现有的最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机属性建模的人脸超分辨率方法，通过建模低分辨率图像中的不确定性来提升重建的高分辨率图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法在生成高分辨率图像时未充分考虑低分辨率图像退化过程中丢失的信息不确定性，导致重建图像模糊。
AI.method: 将低分辨率图像信息分离为确定性属性和随机属性，并设计输入条件属性预测器从低分辨率图像中预测部分随机属性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效降低了学习过程中的不确定性，在多个指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模随机属性，该方法能够更准确地还原高分辨率人脸图像细节，为超分辨率任务提供了新思路。

conclusion: 通过显式建模随机属性，该方法能够更准确地还原高分辨率人脸图像细节，为超分辨率任务提供了新思路。
search_text: Stochastic Attribute Modeling for Face Super-Resolution 人脸超分辨率的随机属性建模 When a high-resolution (HR) image is degraded into a low-resolution (LR) image, the image loses some of the existing information. Consequently, multiple HR images can correspond to the LR image. Most of the existing methods do not consider the uncertainty caused by the stochastic attribute, which can only be probabilistically inferred. Therefore, the predicted HR images are often blurry because the network tries to reflect all possibilities in a single output image. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a novel face super-resolution (SR) scheme to take into the uncertainty by stochastic modeling. Specifically, the information in LR images is separately encoded into deterministic and stochastic attributes. Furthermore, an Input Conditional Attribute Predictor is proposed and separately trained to predict the partially alive stochastic attributes from only the LR images. Extensive evaluation shows that the proposed method successfully reduces the uncertainty in the learning process and outperforms the existing state-of-the-art approaches. 当高分辨率（HR）图像降级为低分辨率（LR）图像时，图像会丢失一些现有信息。因此，多个HR图像可以对应于LR图像。现有方法大多没有考虑随机属性带来的不确定性，只能进行概率推断。因此，预测的 HR 图像通常是模糊的，因为网络试图在单个输出图像中反映所有可能性。为了克服这一限制，本文提出了一种新颖的人脸超分辨率（SR）方案，通过随机建模来考虑不确定性。具体来说，LR 图像中的信息被分别编码为确定性属性和随机属性。此外，提出了输入条件属性预测器并单独训练以仅从 LR 图像预测部分活跃的随机属性。广泛的评估表明，所提出的方法成功地减少了学习过程中的不确定性，并且优于现有的最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种基于随机属性建模的人脸超分辨率方法，通过建模低分辨率图像中的不确定性来提升重建的高分辨率图像质量。 Hanbyel Cho,Yekang Lee,Jaemyung Yu,Junmo Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Amir Shirian,Krishna Somandepalli,Victor Sanchez,Tanaya Guha
title: Visually-aware Acoustic Event Detection using Heterogeneous Graphs
title_zh: 使用异构图的视觉感知声学事件检测
abstract: Perception of auditory events is inherently multimodal relying on both audio and visual cues. A large number of existing multimodal approaches process each modality using modality-specific models and then fuse the embeddings to encode the joint information. In contrast, we employ heterogeneous graphs to explicitly capture the spatial and temporal relationships between the modalities and represent detailed information about the underlying signal. Using heterogeneous graph approaches to address the task of visually-aware acoustic event classification, which serves as a compact, efficient and scalable way to represent data in the form of graphs. Through heterogeneous graphs, we show efficiently modelling of intra- and inter-modality relationships both at spatial and temporal scales. Our model can easily be adapted to different scales of events through relevant hyperparameters. Experiments on AudioSet, a large benchmark, shows that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Perception of auditory events is inherently multimodal relying on both audio and visual cues. A large number of existing multimodal approaches process each modality using modality-specific models and then fuse the embeddings to encode the joint information. In contrast, we employ heterogeneous graphs to explicitly capture the spatial and temporal relationships between the modalities and represent detailed information about the underlying signal. Using heterogeneous graph approaches to address the task of visually-aware acoustic event classification, which serves as a compact, efficient and scalable way to represent data in the form of graphs. Through heterogeneous graphs, we show efficiently modelling of intra- and inter-modality relationships both at spatial and temporal scales. Our model can easily be adapted to different scales of events through relevant hyperparameters. Experiments on AudioSet, a large benchmark, shows that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 听觉事件的感知本质上是多模态的，依赖于音频和视觉线索。大量现有的多模态方法使用特定于模态的模型来处理每种模态，然后融合嵌入以对联合信息进行编码。相比之下，我们采用异构图来明确捕获模态之间的空间和时间关系，并表示有关底层信号的详细信息。使用异构图方法来解决视觉感知声学事件分类的任务，这是一种紧凑、高效且可扩展的方式来以图的形式表示数据。通过异构图，我们展示了在空间和时间尺度上模态内和模态间关系的有效建模。我们的模型可以通过相关的超参数轻松适应不同规模的事件。在大型基准测试 AudioSet 上进行的实验表明，我们的模型实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异构图的视觉感知声学事件检测方法，通过建模音频与视觉模态的时空关系提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过独立处理多模态数据再融合，难以有效捕捉跨模态的时空关联，而异构图能显式建模复杂关系并提升表示效率。
AI.method: 构建异构图结构显式建模音频与视觉模态在时空维度的交互关系，通过图神经网络学习跨模态特征表示，并利用超参数调整适应不同事件规模。
AI.result: 在AudioSet数据集上达到当时最先进的声学事件分类性能，验证了方法的高效性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 异构图框架能有效捕捉多模态时空依赖关系，为视觉感知的声学事件检测提供了紧凑且可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaolin Chen,Xuemeng Song,Liqiang Jing,Shuo Li,Linmei Hu,Liqiang Nie
title: Multimodal Dialog Systems with Dual Knowledge-enhanced Generative Pretrained Language Model
title_zh: 具有双知识增强生成预训练语言模型的多模态对话系统
abstract: Text response generation for multimodal task-oriented dialog systems, which aims to generate the proper text response given the multimodal context, is an essential yet challenging task. Although existing efforts have achieved compelling success, they still suffer from two pivotal limitations: 1) overlook the benefit of generative pre-training, and 2) ignore the textual context related knowledge. To address these limitations, we propose a novel dual knowledge-enhanced generative pretrained language model for multimodal task-oriented dialog systems (DKMD), consisting of three key components: dual knowledge selection, dual knowledge-enhanced context learning, and knowledge-enhanced response generation. To be specific, the dual knowledge selection component aims to select the related knowledge according to both textual and visual modalities of the given context. Thereafter, the dual knowledge-enhanced context learning component targets seamlessly integrating the selected knowledge into the multimodal context learning from both global and local perspectives, where the cross-modal semantic relation is also explored. Moreover, the knowledge-enhanced response generation component comprises a revised BART decoder, where an additional dot-product knowledge-decoder attention sub-layer is introduced for explicitly utilizing the knowledge to advance the text response generation. Extensive experiments on a public dataset verify the superiority of the proposed DKMD over state-of-the-art competitors.
summary: Text response generation for multimodal task-oriented dialog systems, which aims to generate the proper text response given the multimodal context, is an essential yet challenging task. Although existing efforts have achieved compelling success, they still suffer from two pivotal limitations: 1) overlook the benefit of generative pre-training, and 2) ignore the textual context related knowledge. To address these limitations, we propose a novel dual knowledge-enhanced generative pretrained language model for multimodal task-oriented dialog systems (DKMD), consisting of three key components: dual knowledge selection, dual knowledge-enhanced context learning, and knowledge-enhanced response generation. To be specific, the dual knowledge selection component aims to select the related knowledge according to both textual and visual modalities of the given context. Thereafter, the dual knowledge-enhanced context learning component targets seamlessly integrating the selected knowledge into the multimodal context learning from both global and local perspectives, where the cross-modal semantic relation is also explored. Moreover, the knowledge-enhanced response generation component comprises a revised BART decoder, where an additional dot-product knowledge-decoder attention sub-layer is introduced for explicitly utilizing the knowledge to advance the text response generation. Extensive experiments on a public dataset verify the superiority of the proposed DKMD over state-of-the-art competitors.
abstract_zh: 面向多模态任务的对话系统的文本响应生成，旨在在给定多模态上下文的情况下生成正确的文本响应，是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。尽管现有的努力取得了令人瞩目的成功，但它们仍然面临两个关键的限制：1）忽视生成预训练的好处，2）忽视文本上下文相关知识。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种用于多模态任务导向对话系统（DKMD）的新型双知识增强生成预训练语言模型，由三个关键组件组成：双知识选择、双知识增强上下文学习和知识增强响应生成。具体来说，双重知识选择组件旨在根据给定上下文的文本和视觉模态选择相关知识。此后，双重知识增强上下文学习组件的目标是从全局和局部角度将所选知识无缝集成到多模态上下文学习中，同时还探索了跨模态语义关系。此外，知识增强的响应生成组件包括修订的 BART 解码器，其中引入了额外的点积知识解码器注意子层，用于明确地利用知识来推进文本响应生成。对公共数据集的大量实验验证了所提出的 DKMD 相对于最先进的竞争对手的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双知识增强的生成预训练语言模型（DKMD），用于改进多模态任务导向对话系统中的文本响应生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态对话系统中未能充分利用生成预训练的优势，并忽略了文本上下文相关知识，导致性能局限。
AI.method: DKMD包含三个核心组件：双知识选择、双知识增强上下文学习和知识增强响应生成，通过结合文本与视觉模态知识，并引入改进的BART解码器提升响应生成效果。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验验证了DKMD在多项指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过双知识增强机制，DKMD有效整合了多模态上下文与外部知识，显著提升了多模态任务导向对话系统的文本生成能力。

Although existing efforts have achieved compelling success, they still suffer from two pivotal limitations: 1) overlook the benefit of generative pre-training, and 2) ignore the textual context related knowledge. To address these limitations, we propose a novel dual knowledge-enhanced generative pretrained language model for multimodal task-oriented dialog systems (DKMD), consisting of three key components: dual knowledge selection, dual knowledge-enhanced context learning, and knowledge-enhanced response generation. authors_text: Qian Ye,Ling Jiang,Wang Zhen,Yuyang Du
title: Consistency of Implicit and Explicit Features Matters for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 隐式和显式特征的一致性对于单目 3D 物体检测很重要
abstract: Low-cost autonomous agents including autonomous driving vehicles chiefly adopt monocular 3D object detection to perceive surrounding environment. This paper studies 3D intermediate representation methods which generate intermediate 3D features for subsequent tasks. For example, the 3D features can be taken as input for not only detection, but also end-to-end prediction and/or planning that require a bird's-eye-view feature representation. In the study, we found that in generating 3D representation previous methods do not maintain the consistency between the objects' implicit poses in the latent space, especially orientations, and the explicitly observed poses in the Euclidean space, which can substantially hurt model performance. To tackle this problem, we present a novel monocular detection method, the first one being aware of the poses to purposefully guarantee that they are consistent between the implicit and explicit features. Additionally, we introduce a local ray attention mechanism to efficiently transform image features to voxels at accurate 3D locations. Thirdly, we propose a handcrafted Gaussian positional encoding function, which outperforms the sinusoidal encoding function while retaining the benefit of being continuous. Results show that our method improves the state-of-the-art 3D intermediate representation method by 3.15%. We are ranked 1st among all the reported monocular methods on both 3D and BEV detection benchmark on KITTI leaderboard as of th result's submission time.
summary: Low-cost autonomous agents including autonomous driving vehicles chiefly adopt monocular 3D object detection to perceive surrounding environment. This paper studies 3D intermediate representation methods which generate intermediate 3D features for subsequent tasks. For example, the 3D features can be taken as input for not only detection, but also end-to-end prediction and/or planning that require a bird's-eye-view feature representation. In the study, we found that in generating 3D representation previous methods do not maintain the consistency between the objects' implicit poses in the latent space, especially orientations, and the explicitly observed poses in the Euclidean space, which can substantially hurt model performance. To tackle this problem, we present a novel monocular detection method, the first one being aware of the poses to purposefully guarantee that they are consistent between the implicit and explicit features. Additionally, we introduce a local ray attention mechanism to efficiently transform image features to voxels at accurate 3D locations. Thirdly, we propose a handcrafted Gaussian positional encoding function, which outperforms the sinusoidal encoding function while retaining the benefit of being continuous. Results show that our method improves the state-of-the-art 3D intermediate representation method by 3.15%. We are ranked 1st among all the reported monocular methods on both 3D and BEV detection benchmark on KITTI leaderboard as of th result's submission time.
abstract_zh: 包括自动驾驶汽车在内的低成本自主智能体主要采用单目3D物体检测来感知周围环境。本文研究了 3D 中间表示方法，为后续任务生成中间 3D 特征。例如，3D 特征不仅可以作为检测的输入，还可以作为需要鸟瞰图特征表示的端到端预测和/或规划的输入。在研究中，我们发现在生成 3D 表示时，以前的方法不能保持对象在潜在空间中的隐式姿势（尤其是方向）与欧几里得空间中显式观察到的姿势之间的一致性，这会严重损害模型性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的单目检测方法，第一个方法是意识到姿势，有目的地保证它们在隐式特征和显式特征之间保持一致。此外，我们引入了局部射线注意机制，可以有效地将图像特征转换为精确 3D 位置的体素。第三，我们提出了一种手工设计的高斯位置编码函数，它优于正弦编码函数，同时保留了连续的优点。结果表明，我们的方法将最先进的 3D 中间表示方法提高了 3.15%。截至结果提交时，我们在 KITTI 排行榜上的 3D 和 BEV 检测基准的所有报告单目方法中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了单目3D目标检测中隐式特征与显式特征的一致性问题，并提出了一种新的方法以提高检测性能。
AI.motivation: 在单目3D目标检测中，现有方法未能保持隐式特征与显式特征之间的一致性，这会显著影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的单目检测方法，确保隐式和显式特征之间的一致性，并引入了局部射线注意力机制和手工高斯位置编码函数。
AI.result: 该方法在KITTI排行榜上分别在3D和BEV检测基准中排名第一，将最先进的3D中间表示方法性能提升了3.15%。
AI.conclusion: 隐式和显式特征的一致性对于单目3D目标检测至关重要，所提出的方法有效提升了检测性能。

search_text: Consistency of Implicit and Explicit Features Matters for Monocular 3D Object Detection 隐式和显式特征的一致性对于单目 3D 物体检测很重要 Low-cost autonomous agents including autonomous driving vehicles chiefly adopt monocular 3D object detection to perceive surrounding environment. This paper studies 3D intermediate representation methods which generate intermediate 3D features for subsequent tasks. For example, the 3D features can be taken as input for not only detection, but also end-to-end prediction and/or planning that require a bird's-eye-view feature representation. In the study, we found that in generating 3D representation previous methods do not maintain the consistency between the objects' implicit poses in the latent space, especially orientations, and the explicitly observed poses in the Euclidean space, which can substantially hurt model performance. To tackle this problem, we present a novel monocular detection method, the first one being aware of the poses to purposefully guarantee that they are consistent between the implicit and explicit features. Additionally, we introduce a local ray attention mechanism to efficiently transform image features to voxels at accurate 3D locations. Thirdly, we propose a handcrafted Gaussian positional encoding function, which outperforms the sinusoidal encoding function while retaining the benefit of being continuous. Results show that our method improves the state-of-the-art 3D intermediate representation method by 3.15%. We are ranked 1st among all the reported monocular methods on both 3D and BEV detection benchmark on KITTI leaderboard as of th result's submission time. 包括自动驾驶汽车在内的低成本自主智能体主要采用单目3D物体检测来感知周围环境。本文研究了 3D 中间表示方法，为后续任务生成中间 3D 特征。例如，3D 特征不仅可以作为检测的输入，还可以作为需要鸟瞰图特征表示的端到端预测和/或规划的输入。在研究中，我们发现在生成 3D 表示时，以前的方法不能保持对象在潜在空间中的隐式姿势（尤其是方向）与欧几里得空间中显式观察到的姿势之间的一致性，这会严重损害模型性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的单目检测方法，第一个方法是意识到姿势，有目的地保证它们在隐式特征和显式特征之间保持一致。此外，我们引入了局部射线注意机制，可以有效地将图像特征转换为精确 3D 位置的体素。第三，我们提出了一种手工设计的高斯位置编码函数，它优于正弦编码函数，同时保留了连续的优点。结果表明，我们的方法将最先进的 3D 中间表示方法提高了 3.15%。截至结果提交时，我们在 KITTI 排行榜上的 3D 和 BEV 检测基准的所有报告单目方法中排名第一。 本文研究了单目3D目标检测中隐式特征与显式特征的一致性问题，并提出了一种新的方法以提高检测性能。 Qian Ye,Ling Jiang,Wang Zhen,Yuyang Du cs.CV

authors_text: Jiazhen Liu,Xirong Li,Qijie Wei,Jie Xu,Dayong Ding
title: Semi-Supervised Keypoint Detector and Descriptor for Retinal Image Matching
title_zh: 用于视网膜图像匹配的半监督关键点检测器和描述符
abstract: For retinal image matching (RIM), we propose SuperRetina, the first end-to-end method with jointly trainable keypoint detector and descriptor. SuperRetina is trained in a novel semi-supervised manner. A small set of (nearly 100) images are incompletely labeled and used to supervise the network to detect keypoints on the vascular tree. To attack the incompleteness of manual labeling, we propose Progressive Keypoint Expansion to enrich the keypoint labels at each training epoch. By utilizing a keypoint-based improved triplet loss as its description loss, SuperRetina produces highly discriminative descriptors at full input image size. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world datasets justify the viability of SuperRetina. Even with manual labeling replaced by auto labeling and thus making the training process fully manual-annotation free, SuperRetina compares favorably against a number of strong baselines for two RIM tasks, i.e. image registration and identity verification. SuperRetina will be open source.
summary: For retinal image matching (RIM), we propose SuperRetina, the first end-to-end method with jointly trainable keypoint detector and descriptor. SuperRetina is trained in a novel semi-supervised manner. A small set of (nearly 100) images are incompletely labeled and used to supervise the network to detect keypoints on the vascular tree. To attack the incompleteness of manual labeling, we propose Progressive Keypoint Expansion to enrich the keypoint labels at each training epoch. By utilizing a keypoint-based improved triplet loss as its description loss, SuperRetina produces highly discriminative descriptors at full input image size. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world datasets justify the viability of SuperRetina. Even with manual labeling replaced by auto labeling and thus making the training process fully manual-annotation free, SuperRetina compares favorably against a number of strong baselines for two RIM tasks, i.e. image registration and identity verification. SuperRetina will be open source.
abstract_zh: 对于视网膜图像匹配（RIM），我们提出了 SuperRetina，这是第一个具有可联合训练的关键点检测器和描述符的端到端方法。 SuperRetina 以一种新颖的半监督方式进行训练。一小组（近 100 张）图像未完全标记，用于监督网络检测血管树上的关键点。为了解决手动标记的不完整性，我们提出渐进式关键点扩展来丰富每个训练时期的关键点标签。通过利用基于关键点的改进的三元组损失作为其描述损失，SuperRetina 在完整输入图像尺寸下生成具有高度辨别力的描述符。对多个现实世界数据集的大量实验证明了 SuperRetina 的可行性。即使手动标记被自动标记取代，从而使训练过程完全无需手动注释，SuperRetina 仍可与两个 RIM 任务（即图像配准和身份验证）的许多强大基线相比。 SuperRetina 将开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SuperRetina，一种用于视网膜图像匹配的端到端半监督关键点检测与描述符方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视网膜图像匹配方法依赖手动标注且难以处理血管结构复杂性，需开发无需大量标注的高效模型。
AI.method: 采用半监督训练框架，结合少量不完整标注数据与渐进式关键点扩展策略，并设计基于关键点的三元组损失函数优化描述符。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上验证有效性，即使完全去除手动标注仍优于多个基线方法，在图像配准和身份验证任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SuperRetina通过半监督学习显著降低对人工标注的依赖，为视网膜图像匹配提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Yu-Shan Tai,Cheng-Yang Chang,Chieh-Fang Teng,AnYeu,Wu
title: Learnable Mixed-precision and Dimension Reduction Co-design for Low-storage Activation
title_zh: 用于低存储激活的可学习混合精度和降维协同设计
abstract: Recently, deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved many eye-catching results. However, deploying CNNs on resource-constrained edge devices is constrained by limited memory bandwidth for transmitting large intermediated data during inference, i.e., activation. Existing research utilizes mixed-precision and dimension reduction to reduce computational complexity but pays less attention to its application for activation compression. To further exploit the redundancy in activation, we propose a learnable mixed-precision and dimension reduction co-design system, which separates channels into groups and allocates specific compression policies according to their importance. In addition, the proposed dynamic searching technique enlarges search space and finds out the optimal bit-width allocation automatically. Our experimental results show that the proposed methods improve 3.54%/1.27% in accuracy and save 0.18/2.02 bits per value over existing mixed-precision methods on ResNet18 and MobileNetv2, respectively.
summary: Recently, deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved many eye-catching results. However, deploying CNNs on resource-constrained edge devices is constrained by limited memory bandwidth for transmitting large intermediated data during inference, i.e., activation. Existing research utilizes mixed-precision and dimension reduction to reduce computational complexity but pays less attention to its application for activation compression. To further exploit the redundancy in activation, we propose a learnable mixed-precision and dimension reduction co-design system, which separates channels into groups and allocates specific compression policies according to their importance. In addition, the proposed dynamic searching technique enlarges search space and finds out the optimal bit-width allocation automatically. Our experimental results show that the proposed methods improve 3.54%/1.27% in accuracy and save 0.18/2.02 bits per value over existing mixed-precision methods on ResNet18 and MobileNetv2, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度卷积神经网络（CNN）取得了许多引人注目的成果。然而，在资源受限的边缘设备上部署 CNN 会受到推理（即激活）过程中传输大量中间数据的内存带宽的限制。现有研究利用混合精度和降维来降低计算复杂度，但很少关注其在激活压缩中的应用。为了进一步利用激活中的冗余，我们提出了一种可学习的混合精度和降维协同设计系统，该系统将通道分组并根据其重要性分配特定的压缩策略。此外，所提出的动态搜索技术扩大了搜索空间并自动找出最佳的位宽分配。我们的实验结果表明，与 ResNet18 和 MobileNetv2 上现有的混合精度方法相比，所提出的方法在精度上分别提高了 3.54%/1.27%，并且每个值节省了 0.18/2.02 位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的混合精度与维度缩减协同设计系统，用于压缩深度卷积神经网络（CNN）中的激活数据，以降低边缘设备的存储需求。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽利用混合精度和维度缩减降低计算复杂度，但未充分关注激活数据压缩，而边缘设备受限于内存带宽，需更高效的激活存储方案。
AI.method: 将通道分组并根据重要性分配压缩策略，结合动态搜索技术自动优化位宽分配，实现混合精度与维度缩减的协同设计。
AI.result: 在ResNet18和MobileNetv2上，相比现有混合精度方法，准确率分别提升3.54%/1.27%，每值存储节省0.18/2.02比特。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过通道分组与动态位宽分配有效压缩激活数据，在保持精度的同时降低存储需求，适用于资源受限的边缘设备。

tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的混合精度与维度缩减协同设计系统，用于压缩深度卷积神经网络（CNN）中的激活数据，以降低边缘设备的存储需求。
motivation: 现有研究虽利用混合精度和维度缩减降低计算复杂度，但未充分关注激活数据压缩，而边缘设备受限于内存带宽，需更高效的激活存储方案。
