conclusion: 该方法通过通道分组与动态位宽分配有效压缩激活数据，在保持精度的同时降低存储需求，适用于资源受限的边缘设备。
search_text: Learnable Mixed-precision and Dimension Reduction Co-design for Low-storage Activation 用于低存储激活的可学习混合精度和降维协同设计 Recently, deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved many eye-catching results. However, deploying CNNs on resource-constrained edge devices is constrained by limited memory bandwidth for transmitting large intermediated data during inference, i.e., activation. Existing research utilizes mixed-precision and dimension reduction to reduce computational complexity but pays less attention to its application for activation compression. To further exploit the redundancy in activation, we propose a learnable mixed-precision and dimension reduction co-design system, which separates channels into groups and allocates specific compression policies according to their importance. In addition, the proposed dynamic searching technique enlarges search space and finds out the optimal bit-width allocation automatically. Our experimental results show that the proposed methods improve 3.54%/1.27% in accuracy and save 0.18/2.02 bits per value over existing mixed-precision methods on ResNet18 and MobileNetv2, respectively. 最近，深度卷积神经网络（CNN）取得了许多引人注目的成果。然而，在资源受限的边缘设备上部署 CNN 会受到推理（即激活）过程中传输大量中间数据的内存带宽的限制。现有研究利用混合精度和降维来降低计算复杂度，但很少关注其在激活压缩中的应用。为了进一步利用激活中的冗余，我们提出了一种可学习的混合精度和降维协同设计系统，该系统将通道分组并根据其重要性分配特定的压缩策略。此外，所提出的动态搜索技术扩大了搜索空间并自动找出最佳的位宽分配。我们的实验结果表明，与 ResNet18 和 MobileNetv2 上现有的混合精度方法相比，所提出的方法在精度上分别提高了 3.54%/1.27%，并且每个值节省了 0.18/2.02 位。 本文提出一种可学习的混合精度与维度缩减协同设计系统，用于压缩深度卷积神经网络（CNN）中的激活数据，以降低边缘设备的存储需求。 Yu-Shan Tai,Cheng-Yang Chang,Chieh-Fang Teng,AnYeu,Wu eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yong Guo,Mingkui Tan,Zeshuai Deng,Jingdong Wang,Qi Chen,Jiezhang Cao,Yanwu Xu,Jian Chen
title: Towards Lightweight Super-Resolution with Dual Regression Learning
title_zh: 通过双回归学习实现轻量级超分辨率
comment: Journal extension of DRN for lightweight super-resolution
comments: Journal extension of DRN for lightweight super-resolution
abstract: Deep neural networks have exhibited remarkable performance in image super-resolution (SR) tasks by learning a mapping from low-resolution (LR) images to high-resolution (HR) images. However, the SR problem is typically an ill-posed problem and existing methods would come with several limitations. First, the possible mapping space of SR can be extremely large since there may exist many different HR images that can be super-resolved from the same LR image. As a result, it is hard to directly learn a promising SR mapping from such a large space. Second, it is often inevitable to develop very large models with extremely high computational cost to yield promising SR performance. In practice, one can use model compression techniques to obtain compact models by reducing model redundancy. Nevertheless, it is hard for existing model compression methods to accurately identify the redundant components due to the extremely large SR mapping space. To alleviate the first challenge, we propose a dual regression learning scheme to reduce the space of possible SR mappings. Specifically, in addition to the mapping from LR to HR images, we learn an additional dual regression mapping to estimate the downsampling kernel and reconstruct LR images. In this way, the dual mapping acts as a constraint to reduce the space of possible mappings. To address the second challenge, we propose a dual regression compression (DRC) method to reduce model redundancy in both layer-level and channel-level based on channel pruning. Specifically, we first develop a channel number search method that minimizes the dual regression loss to determine the redundancy of each layer. Given the searched channel numbers, we further exploit the dual regression manner to evaluate the importance of channels and prune the redundant ones. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our method in obtaining accurate and efficient SR models.
summary: Deep neural networks have exhibited remarkable performance in image super-resolution (SR) tasks by learning a mapping from low-resolution (LR) images to high-resolution (HR) images. However, the SR problem is typically an ill-posed problem and existing methods would come with several limitations. First, the possible mapping space of SR can be extremely large since there may exist many different HR images that can be super-resolved from the same LR image. As a result, it is hard to directly learn a promising SR mapping from such a large space. Second, it is often inevitable to develop very large models with extremely high computational cost to yield promising SR performance. In practice, one can use model compression techniques to obtain compact models by reducing model redundancy. Nevertheless, it is hard for existing model compression methods to accurately identify the redundant components due to the extremely large SR mapping space. To alleviate the first challenge, we propose a dual regression learning scheme to reduce the space of possible SR mappings. Specifically, in addition to the mapping from LR to HR images, we learn an additional dual regression mapping to estimate the downsampling kernel and reconstruct LR images. In this way, the dual mapping acts as a constraint to reduce the space of possible mappings. To address the second challenge, we propose a dual regression compression (DRC) method to reduce model redundancy in both layer-level and channel-level based on channel pruning. Specifically, we first develop a channel number search method that minimizes the dual regression loss to determine the redundancy of each layer. Given the searched channel numbers, we further exploit the dual regression manner to evaluate the importance of channels and prune the redundant ones. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our method in obtaining accurate and efficient SR models.
abstract_zh: 通过学习从低分辨率（LR）图像到高分辨率（HR）图像的映射，深度神经网络在图像超分辨率（SR）任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，SR 问题通常是一个不适定问题，现有方法存在一些局限性。首先，SR 可能的映射空间可能非常大，因为可能存在许多可以从同一 LR 图像超分辨率的不同 HR 图像。因此，很难从如此大的空间中直接学习有前途的 SR 映射。其次，通常不可避免地要开发具有极高计算成本的大型模型，以产生有希望的 SR 性能。在实践中，可以使用模型压缩技术通过减少模型冗余来获得紧凑的模型。然而，由于SR映射空间极大，现有的模型压缩方法很难准确识别冗余分量。为了缓解第一个挑战，我们提出了一种对偶回归学习方案来减少可能的 SR 映射的空间。具体来说，除了从 LR 到 HR 图像的映射之外，我们还学习了一个额外的对偶回归映射来估计下采样内核并重建 LR 图像。这样，对偶映射充当约束来减少可能映射的空间。为了解决第二个挑战，我们提出了一种双回归压缩（DRC）方法，基于通道剪枝来减少层级和通道级的模型冗余。具体来说，我们首先开发一种通道数搜索方法，最小化对偶回归损失以确定每层的冗余。给定搜索到的通道数，我们进一步利用对偶回归方式来评估通道的重要性并修剪冗余通道。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在获得准确且高效的 SR 模型方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级超分辨率方法，通过双回归学习减少映射空间并压缩模型冗余，以实现高效准确的图像超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法面临映射空间过大导致学习困难以及模型计算成本高的问题，传统压缩技术难以准确识别冗余部分。
AI.method: 提出双回归学习方案，通过学习LR到HR的映射及下采样核估计来约束映射空间；设计双回归压缩（DRC）方法，基于通道剪枝在层级和通道级减少冗余。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持精度的同时显著降低了模型参数量和计算量，验证了其在轻量化超分辨率任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双回归学习有效约束了超分辨率映射空间，结合通道剪枝的压缩方法成功实现了高效轻量级模型，为超分辨率研究提供了新思路。

However, the SR problem is typically an ill-posed problem and existing methods would come with several limitations. First, the possible mapping space of SR can be extremely large since there may exist many different HR images that can be super-resolved from the same LR image. As a result, it is hard to directly learn a promising SR mapping from such a large space. In practice, one can use model compression techniques to obtain compact models by reducing model redundancy. Nevertheless, it is hard for existing model compression methods to accurately identify the redundant components due to the extremely large SR mapping space. Specifically, in addition to the mapping from LR to HR images, we learn an additional dual regression mapping to estimate the downsampling kernel and reconstruct LR images. In this way, the dual mapping acts as a constraint to reduce the space of possible mappings. Specifically, we first develop a channel number search method that minimizes the dual regression loss to determine the redundancy of each layer. Given the searched channel numbers, we further exploit the dual regression manner to evaluate the importance of channels and prune the redundant ones. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our method in obtaining accurate and efficient SR models. 通过学习从低分辨率（LR）图像到高分辨率（HR）图像的映射，深度神经网络在图像超分辨率（SR）任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，SR 问题通常是一个不适定问题，现有方法存在一些局限性。首先，SR 可能的映射空间可能非常大，因为可能存在许多可以从同一 LR 图像超分辨率的不同 HR 图像。因此，很难从如此大的空间中直接学习有前途的 SR 映射。其次，通常不可避免地要开发具有极高计算成本的大型模型，以产生有希望的 SR 性能。在实践中，可以使用模型压缩技术通过减少模型冗余来获得紧凑的模型。然而，由于SR映射空间极大，现有的模型压缩方法很难准确识别冗余分量。为了缓解第一个挑战，我们提出了一种对偶回归学习方案来减少可能的 SR 映射的空间。具体来说，除了从 LR 到 HR 图像的映射之外，我们还学习了一个额外的对偶回归映射来估计下采样内核并重建 LR 图像。这样，对偶映射充当约束来减少可能映射的空间。为了解决第二个挑战，我们提出了一种双回归压缩（DRC）方法，基于通道剪枝来减少层级和通道级的模型冗余。具体来说，我们首先开发一种通道数搜索方法，最小化对偶回归损失以确定每层的冗余。给定搜索到的通道数，我们进一步利用对偶回归方式来评估通道的重要性并修剪冗余通道。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在获得准确且高效的 SR 模型方面的有效性。 本文提出了一种轻量级超分辨率方法，通过双回归学习减少映射空间并压缩模型冗余，以实现高效准确的图像超分辨率。 Yong Guo,Mingkui Tan,Zeshuai Deng,Jingdong Wang,Qi Chen,Jiezhang Cao,Yanwu Xu,Jian Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Yong Liu,Ran Yu,Fei Yin,Xinyuan Zhao,Wei Zhao,Weihao Xia,Yujiu Yang
title: Learning Quality-aware Dynamic Memory for Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 学习用于视频对象分割的质量感知动态内存
abstract: Recently, several spatial-temporal memory-based methods have verified that storing intermediate frames and their masks as memory are helpful to segment target objects in videos. However, they mainly focus on better matching between the current frame and the memory frames without explicitly paying attention to the quality of the memory. Therefore, frames with poor segmentation masks are prone to be memorized, which leads to a segmentation mask error accumulation problem and further affect the segmentation performance. In addition, the linear increase of memory frames with the growth of frame number also limits the ability of the models to handle long videos. To this end, we propose a Quality-aware Dynamic Memory Network (QDMN) to evaluate the segmentation quality of each frame, allowing the memory bank to selectively store accurately segmented frames to prevent the error accumulation problem. Then, we combine the segmentation quality with temporal consistency to dynamically update the memory bank to improve the practicability of the models. Without any bells and whistles, our QDMN achieves new state-of-the-art performance on both DAVIS and YouTube-VOS benchmarks. Moreover, extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed Quality Assessment Module (QAM) can be applied to memory-based methods as generic plugins and significantly improves performance. Our source code is available at https://github.com/workforai/QDMN.
summary: Recently, several spatial-temporal memory-based methods have verified that storing intermediate frames and their masks as memory are helpful to segment target objects in videos. However, they mainly focus on better matching between the current frame and the memory frames without explicitly paying attention to the quality of the memory. Therefore, frames with poor segmentation masks are prone to be memorized, which leads to a segmentation mask error accumulation problem and further affect the segmentation performance. In addition, the linear increase of memory frames with the growth of frame number also limits the ability of the models to handle long videos. To this end, we propose a Quality-aware Dynamic Memory Network (QDMN) to evaluate the segmentation quality of each frame, allowing the memory bank to selectively store accurately segmented frames to prevent the error accumulation problem. Then, we combine the segmentation quality with temporal consistency to dynamically update the memory bank to improve the practicability of the models. Without any bells and whistles, our QDMN achieves new state-of-the-art performance on both DAVIS and YouTube-VOS benchmarks. Moreover, extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed Quality Assessment Module (QAM) can be applied to memory-based methods as generic plugins and significantly improves performance. Our source code is available at https://github.com/workforai/QDMN.
abstract_zh: 最近，几种基于时空记忆的方法已经验证，将中间帧及其掩模存储为记忆有助于分割视频中的目标对象。然而，他们主要关注当前帧和记忆帧之间更好的匹配，而没有明确关注记忆的质量。因此，分割掩模较差的帧很容易被记忆，从而导致分割掩模错误累积问题，并进一步影响分割性能。此外，内存帧随着帧数的增长而线性增加也限制了模型处理长视频的能力。为此，我们提出了一种质量感知动态存储网络（QDMN）来评估每个帧的分割质量，允许存储体选择性地存储准确分割的帧以防止错误累积问题。然后，我们将分割质量与时间一致性相结合，动态更新内存库，以提高模型的实用性。无需任何附加功能，我们的 QDMN 在 DAVIS 和 YouTube-VOS 基准测试中均实现了最先进的性能。此外，大量的实验表明，所提出的质量评估模块（QAM）可以作为通用插件应用于基于内存的方法，并显着提高性能。我们的源代码位于 https://github.com/workforai/QDMN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种质量感知的动态记忆网络（QDMN），用于改进视频对象分割中的记忆帧选择机制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视频分割中存储中间帧时未考虑记忆帧的质量，导致错误累积和长视频处理能力受限。
AI.method: 设计质量评估模块（QAM）筛选高质量分割帧，并结合时间一致性动态更新记忆库。
AI.result: 在DAVIS和YouTube-VOS基准测试中达到新SOTA性能，QAM可作为通用插件提升其他方法表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过质量感知的记忆管理有效抑制误差累积，动态更新机制提升模型实用性与扩展性。

result: 在DAVIS和YouTube-VOS基准测试中达到新SOTA性能，QAM可作为通用插件提升其他方法表现。
conclusion: 通过质量感知的记忆管理有效抑制误差累积，动态更新机制提升模型实用性与扩展性。
search_text: Learning Quality-aware Dynamic Memory for Video Object Segmentation 学习用于视频对象分割的质量感知动态内存 Recently, several spatial-temporal memory-based methods have verified that storing intermediate frames and their masks as memory are helpful to segment target objects in videos. However, they mainly focus on better matching between the current frame and the memory frames without explicitly paying attention to the quality of the memory. Therefore, frames with poor segmentation masks are prone to be memorized, which leads to a segmentation mask error accumulation problem and further affect the segmentation performance. In addition, the linear increase of memory frames with the growth of frame number also limits the ability of the models to handle long videos. To this end, we propose a Quality-aware Dynamic Memory Network (QDMN) to evaluate the segmentation quality of each frame, allowing the memory bank to selectively store accurately segmented frames to prevent the error accumulation problem. Then, we combine the segmentation quality with temporal consistency to dynamically update the memory bank to improve the practicability of the models. Without any bells and whistles, our QDMN achieves new state-of-the-art performance on both DAVIS and YouTube-VOS benchmarks. Moreover, extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed Quality Assessment Module (QAM) can be applied to memory-based methods as generic plugins and significantly improves performance. Our source code is available at https://github.com/workforai/QDMN. 最近，几种基于时空记忆的方法已经验证，将中间帧及其掩模存储为记忆有助于分割视频中的目标对象。然而，他们主要关注当前帧和记忆帧之间更好的匹配，而没有明确关注记忆的质量。因此，分割掩模较差的帧很容易被记忆，从而导致分割掩模错误累积问题，并进一步影响分割性能。此外，内存帧随着帧数的增长而线性增加也限制了模型处理长视频的能力。为此，我们提出了一种质量感知动态存储网络（QDMN）来评估每个帧的分割质量，允许存储体选择性地存储准确分割的帧以防止错误累积问题。然后，我们将分割质量与时间一致性相结合，动态更新内存库，以提高模型的实用性。无需任何附加功能，我们的 QDMN 在 DAVIS 和 YouTube-VOS 基准测试中均实现了最先进的性能。此外，大量的实验表明，所提出的质量评估模块（QAM）可以作为通用插件应用于基于内存的方法，并显着提高性能。我们的源代码位于 https://github.com/workforai/QDMN。 本文提出一种质量感知的动态记忆网络（QDMN），用于改进视频对象分割中的记忆帧选择机制。 Yong Liu,Ran Yu,Fei Yin,Xinyuan Zhao,Wei Zhao,Weihao Xia,Yujiu Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Karl Schrader,Tobias Alt,Joachim Weickert,Michael Ertel
title: CNN-based Euler's Elastica Inpainting with Deep Energy and Deep Image Prior
title_zh: 基于 CNN 的 Euler's Elastica Inpainting with Deep Energy 和 Deep Image Prior
comment: In Proceedings of the 10th European Workshop on Visual Information Processing, Lisbon, 2022
comments: In Proceedings of the 10th European Workshop on Visual Information Processing, Lisbon, 2022
abstract: Euler's elastica constitute an appealing variational image inpainting model. It minimises an energy that involves the total variation as well as the level line curvature. These components are transparent and make it attractive for shape completion tasks. However, its gradient flow is a singular, anisotropic, and nonlinear PDE of fourth order, which is numerically challenging: It is difficult to find efficient algorithms that offer sharp edges and good rotation invariance. As a remedy, we design the first neural algorithm that simulates inpainting with Euler's Elastica. We use the deep energy concept which employs the variational energy as neural network loss. Furthermore, we pair it with a deep image prior where the network architecture itself acts as a prior. This yields better inpaintings by steering the optimisation trajectory closer to the desired solution. Our results are qualitatively on par with state-of-the-art algorithms on elastica-based shape completion. They combine good rotation invariance with sharp edges. Moreover, we benefit from the high efficiency and effortless parallelisation within a neural framework. Our neural elastica approach only requires 3x3 central difference stencils. It is thus much simpler than other well-performing algorithms for elastica inpainting. Last but not least, it is unsupervised as it requires no ground truth training data.
summary: Euler's elastica constitute an appealing variational image inpainting model. It minimises an energy that involves the total variation as well as the level line curvature. These components are transparent and make it attractive for shape completion tasks. However, its gradient flow is a singular, anisotropic, and nonlinear PDE of fourth order, which is numerically challenging: It is difficult to find efficient algorithms that offer sharp edges and good rotation invariance. As a remedy, we design the first neural algorithm that simulates inpainting with Euler's Elastica. We use the deep energy concept which employs the variational energy as neural network loss. Furthermore, we pair it with a deep image prior where the network architecture itself acts as a prior. This yields better inpaintings by steering the optimisation trajectory closer to the desired solution. Our results are qualitatively on par with state-of-the-art algorithms on elastica-based shape completion. They combine good rotation invariance with sharp edges. Moreover, we benefit from the high efficiency and effortless parallelisation within a neural framework. Our neural elastica approach only requires 3x3 central difference stencils. It is thus much simpler than other well-performing algorithms for elastica inpainting. Last but not least, it is unsupervised as it requires no ground truth training data.
abstract_zh: 欧拉弹性体构成了一个有吸引力的变分图像修复模型。它将涉及总变化以及水平线曲率的能量最小化。这些组件是透明的，对于形状完成任务来说很有吸引力。然而，其梯度流是奇异的、各向异性的、非线性的四阶偏微分方程，这在数值上具有挑战性：很难找到提供锐利边缘和良好旋转不变性的有效算法。作为补救措施，我们设计了第一个用 Euler's Elastica 模拟修复的神经算法。我们使用深度能量概念，将变分能量用作神经网络损失。此外，我们将其与深度图像先验配对，其中网络架构本身充当先验。通过引导优化轨迹更接近所需的解决方案，可以产生更好的修复效果。我们的结果在质量上与基于 Elastica 的形状完成的最先进算法相当。它们结合了良好的旋转不变性和锋利的边缘。此外，我们受益于神经框架内的高效率和轻松的并行化。我们的神经弹性方法仅需要 3x3 中心差异模板。因此，它比其他性能良好的弹性修复算法要简单得多。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，它是无监督的，因为它不需要地面实况训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的欧拉弹性 inpainting 方法，结合深度能量和深度图像先验。
AI.motivation: 欧拉弹性模型在图像修复中表现优异，但其四阶非线性 PDE 数值求解困难，现有算法效率低且难以保持边缘锐度与旋转不变性。
AI.method: 设计神经算法模拟欧拉弹性 inpainting，采用深度能量概念将变分能量作为神经网络损失函数，并结合深度图像先验作为先验约束。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在形状补全任务中达到最先进水平，兼具旋转不变性与锐利边缘，且计算效率高且无需监督数据。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经弹性方法通过简化计算结构和无监督特性，为欧拉弹性 inpainting 提供了更高效可行的解决方案。

search_text: CNN-based Euler's Elastica Inpainting with Deep Energy and Deep Image Prior 基于 CNN 的 Euler's Elastica Inpainting with Deep Energy 和 Deep Image Prior Euler's elastica constitute an appealing variational image inpainting model. It minimises an energy that involves the total variation as well as the level line curvature. These components are transparent and make it attractive for shape completion tasks. However, its gradient flow is a singular, anisotropic, and nonlinear PDE of fourth order, which is numerically challenging: It is difficult to find efficient algorithms that offer sharp edges and good rotation invariance. As a remedy, we design the first neural algorithm that simulates inpainting with Euler's Elastica. We use the deep energy concept which employs the variational energy as neural network loss. Furthermore, we pair it with a deep image prior where the network architecture itself acts as a prior. This yields better inpaintings by steering the optimisation trajectory closer to the desired solution. Our results are qualitatively on par with state-of-the-art algorithms on elastica-based shape completion. They combine good rotation invariance with sharp edges. Moreover, we benefit from the high efficiency and effortless parallelisation within a neural framework. Our neural elastica approach only requires 3x3 central difference stencils. It is thus much simpler than other well-performing algorithms for elastica inpainting. Last but not least, it is unsupervised as it requires no ground truth training data. 欧拉弹性体构成了一个有吸引力的变分图像修复模型。它将涉及总变化以及水平线曲率的能量最小化。这些组件是透明的，对于形状完成任务来说很有吸引力。然而，其梯度流是奇异的、各向异性的、非线性的四阶偏微分方程，这在数值上具有挑战性：很难找到提供锐利边缘和良好旋转不变性的有效算法。作为补救措施，我们设计了第一个用 Euler's Elastica 模拟修复的神经算法。我们使用深度能量概念，将变分能量用作神经网络损失。此外，我们将其与深度图像先验配对，其中网络架构本身充当先验。通过引导优化轨迹更接近所需的解决方案，可以产生更好的修复效果。我们的结果在质量上与基于 Elastica 的形状完成的最先进算法相当。它们结合了良好的旋转不变性和锋利的边缘。此外，我们受益于神经框架内的高效率和轻松的并行化。我们的神经弹性方法仅需要 3x3 中心差异模板。因此，它比其他性能良好的弹性修复算法要简单得多。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，它是无监督的，因为它不需要地面实况训练数据。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的欧拉弹性 inpainting 方法，结合深度能量和深度图像先验。 Karl Schrader,Tobias Alt,Joachim Weickert,Michael Ertel cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Taekyung Kim,Hojin Lee,Wonsuk Lee
title: Physics Embedded Neural Network Vehicle Model and Applications in Risk-Aware Autonomous Driving Using Latent Features
title_zh: 物理嵌入式神经网络车辆模型及其在使用潜在特征的风险感知自动驾驶中的应用
comment: 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). Our video can be found at https://youtu.be/rPN0hGCW0R4
comments: 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). Our video can be found at https://youtu.be/rPN0hGCW0R4
abstract: Non-holonomic vehicle motion has been studied extensively using physics-based models. Common approaches when using these models interpret the wheel/ground interactions using a linear tire model and thus may not fully capture the nonlinear and complex dynamics under various environments. On the other hand, neural network models have been widely employed in this domain, demonstrating powerful function approximation capabilities. However, these black-box learning strategies completely abandon the existing knowledge of well-known physics. In this paper, we seamlessly combine deep learning with a fully differentiable physics model to endow the neural network with available prior knowledge. The proposed model shows better generalization performance than the vanilla neural network model by a large margin. We also show that the latent features of our model can accurately represent lateral tire forces without the need for any additional training. Lastly, We develop a risk-aware model predictive controller using proprioceptive information derived from the latent features. We validate our idea in two autonomous driving tasks under unknown friction, outperforming the baseline control framework.
summary: Non-holonomic vehicle motion has been studied extensively using physics-based models. Common approaches when using these models interpret the wheel/ground interactions using a linear tire model and thus may not fully capture the nonlinear and complex dynamics under various environments. On the other hand, neural network models have been widely employed in this domain, demonstrating powerful function approximation capabilities. However, these black-box learning strategies completely abandon the existing knowledge of well-known physics. In this paper, we seamlessly combine deep learning with a fully differentiable physics model to endow the neural network with available prior knowledge. The proposed model shows better generalization performance than the vanilla neural network model by a large margin. We also show that the latent features of our model can accurately represent lateral tire forces without the need for any additional training. Lastly, We develop a risk-aware model predictive controller using proprioceptive information derived from the latent features. We validate our idea in two autonomous driving tasks under unknown friction, outperforming the baseline control framework.
abstract_zh: 使用基于物理的模型对非完整车辆运动进行了广泛的研究。使用这些模型时的常用方法使用线性轮胎模型解释车轮/地面相互作用，因此可能无法完全捕获各种环境下的非线性和复杂动态。另一方面，神经网络模型在该领域得到了广泛的应用，展示了强大的函数逼近能力。然而，这些黑盒学习策略完全放弃了众所周知的物理学的现有知识。在本文中，我们将深度学习与完全可微的物理模型无缝结合，为神经网络赋予可用的先验知识。所提出的模型显示出比普通神经网络模型更好的泛化性能。我们还表明，我们模型的潜在特征可以准确地表示横向轮胎力，而不需要任何额外的训练。最后，我们使用从潜在特征导出的本体感受信息开发了一个风险感知模型预测控制器。我们在未知摩擦下的两项自动驾驶任务中验证了我们的想法，优于基线控制框架。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合物理模型与神经网络的车辆模型，利用潜在特征应用于风险感知自动驾驶，提升控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统物理模型无法准确捕捉复杂动力学，神经网络模型缺乏物理先验知识，导致泛化能力不足，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 融合深度学习与可微物理模型，构建嵌入先验知识的神经网络，利用潜在特征表征轮胎力，并开发基于内感信息的风险感知控制器。
AI.result: 模型泛化性能显著优于传统神经网络，潜在特征准确表征轮胎力，风险感知控制器在未知摩擦场景下控制效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合物理模型与神经网络，提升自动驾驶在复杂环境下的鲁棒性与安全性，为风险感知控制提供新方法。

search_text: Physics Embedded Neural Network Vehicle Model and Applications in Risk-Aware Autonomous Driving Using Latent Features 物理嵌入式神经网络车辆模型及其在使用潜在特征的风险感知自动驾驶中的应用 Non-holonomic vehicle motion has been studied extensively using physics-based models. Common approaches when using these models interpret the wheel/ground interactions using a linear tire model and thus may not fully capture the nonlinear and complex dynamics under various environments. On the other hand, neural network models have been widely employed in this domain, demonstrating powerful function approximation capabilities. However, these black-box learning strategies completely abandon the existing knowledge of well-known physics. In this paper, we seamlessly combine deep learning with a fully differentiable physics model to endow the neural network with available prior knowledge. The proposed model shows better generalization performance than the vanilla neural network model by a large margin. We also show that the latent features of our model can accurately represent lateral tire forces without the need for any additional training. Lastly, We develop a risk-aware model predictive controller using proprioceptive information derived from the latent features. We validate our idea in two autonomous driving tasks under unknown friction, outperforming the baseline control framework. 使用基于物理的模型对非完整车辆运动进行了广泛的研究。使用这些模型时的常用方法使用线性轮胎模型解释车轮/地面相互作用，因此可能无法完全捕获各种环境下的非线性和复杂动态。另一方面，神经网络模型在该领域得到了广泛的应用，展示了强大的函数逼近能力。然而，这些黑盒学习策略完全放弃了众所周知的物理学的现有知识。在本文中，我们将深度学习与完全可微的物理模型无缝结合，为神经网络赋予可用的先验知识。所提出的模型显示出比普通神经网络模型更好的泛化性能。我们还表明，我们模型的潜在特征可以准确地表示横向轮胎力，而不需要任何额外的训练。最后，我们使用从潜在特征导出的本体感受信息开发了一个风险感知模型预测控制器。我们在未知摩擦下的两项自动驾驶任务中验证了我们的想法，优于基线控制框架。 提出一种结合物理模型与神经网络的车辆模型，利用潜在特征应用于风险感知自动驾驶，提升控制性能。 Taekyung Kim,Hojin Lee,Wonsuk Lee cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Poornima Singh Thakur,Pritee Khanna,Tanuja Sheorey,Aparajita Ojha
title: Explainable vision transformer enabled convolutional neural network for plant disease identification: PlantXViT
title_zh: 可解释的视觉转换器启用卷积神经网络用于植物病害识别：PlantXViT
abstract: Plant diseases are the primary cause of crop losses globally, with an impact on the world economy. To deal with these issues, smart agriculture solutions are evolving that combine the Internet of Things and machine learning for early disease detection and control. Many such systems use vision-based machine learning methods for real-time disease detection and diagnosis. With the advancement in deep learning techniques, new methods have emerged that employ convolutional neural networks for plant disease detection and identification. Another trend in vision-based deep learning is the use of vision transformers, which have proved to be powerful models for classification and other problems. However, vision transformers have rarely been investigated for plant pathology applications. In this study, a Vision Transformer enabled Convolutional Neural Network model called "PlantXViT" is proposed for plant disease identification. The proposed model combines the capabilities of traditional convolutional neural networks with the Vision Transformers to efficiently identify a large number of plant diseases for several crops. The proposed model has a lightweight structure with only 0.8 million trainable parameters, which makes it suitable for IoT-based smart agriculture services. The performance of PlantXViT is evaluated on five publicly available datasets. The proposed PlantXViT network performs better than five state-of-the-art methods on all five datasets. The average accuracy for recognising plant diseases is shown to exceed 93.55%, 92.59%, and 98.33% on Apple, Maize, and Rice datasets, respectively, even under challenging background conditions. The efficiency in terms of explainability of the proposed model is evaluated using gradient-weighted class activation maps and Local Interpretable Model Agnostic Explanation.

To deal with these issues, smart agriculture solutions are evolving that combine the Internet of Things and machine learning for early disease detection and control. Many such systems use vision-based machine learning methods for real-time disease detection and diagnosis. With the advancement in deep learning techniques, new methods have emerged that employ convolutional neural networks for plant disease detection and identification. Another trend in vision-based deep learning is the use of vision transformers, which have proved to be powerful models for classification and other problems. However, vision transformers have rarely been investigated for plant pathology applications. In this study, a Vision Transformer enabled Convolutional Neural Network model called "PlantXViT" is proposed for plant disease identification. The proposed model combines the capabilities of traditional convolutional neural networks with the Vision Transformers to efficiently identify a large number of plant diseases for several crops. The proposed model has a lightweight structure with only 0.8 million trainable parameters, which makes it suitable for IoT-based smart agriculture services. The performance of PlantXViT is evaluated on five publicly available datasets. The proposed PlantXViT network performs better than five state-of-the-art methods on all five datasets. The average accuracy for recognising plant diseases is shown to exceed 93.55%, 92.59%, and 98.33% on Apple, Maize, and Rice datasets, respectively, even under challenging background conditions. The efficiency in terms of explainability of the proposed model is evaluated using gradient-weighted class activation maps and Local Interpretable Model Agnostic Explanation.
abstract_zh: 植物病害是全球农作物损失的主要原因，对世界经济产生影响。为了解决这些问题，智能农业解决方案正在不断发展，将物联网和机器学习相结合，以实现疾病的早期检测和控制。许多此类系统使用基于视觉的机器学习方法来进行实时疾病检测和诊断。随着深度学习技术的进步，出现了利用卷积神经网络进行植物病害检测和识别的新方法。基于视觉的深度学习的另一个趋势是视觉转换器的使用，它已被证明是用于分类和其他问题的强大模型。然而，视觉转换器很少被研究用于植物病理学应用。在这项研究中，提出了一种名为“PlantXViT”的支持 Vision Transformer 的卷积神经网络模型，用于植物病害识别。所提出的模型将传统卷积神经网络与视觉变压器的功能相结合，可以有效地识别多种作物的大量植物病害。所提出的模型具有轻量级结构，只有 80 万个可训练参数，这使得它适合基于物联网的智能农业服务。 PlantXViT 的性能是在五个公开可用的数据集上进行评估的。所提出的 PlantXViT 网络在所有五个数据集上的性能都优于五种最先进的方法。即使在具有挑战性的背景条件下，在苹果、玉米和水稻数据集上识别植物病害的平均准确度也分别超过 93.55%、92.59% 和 98.33%。使用梯度加权类激活图和局部可解释模型不可知解释来评估所提出模型的可解释性效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络与视觉Transformer的轻量级模型PlantXViT，用于多作物植物病害识别。
AI.motivation: 植物病害导致全球农作物重大损失，现有方法在准确率与可解释性上存在不足，且视觉Transformer在植物病理学应用中研究较少。
AI.method: 设计融合CNN与Vision Transformer的混合架构，采用梯度加权类激活映射（Grad-CAM）和LIME方法评估模型可解释性，模型参数量仅0.8百万级。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上超越五种先进方法，苹果、玉米、水稻数据集平均准确率分别达93.55%、92.59%、98.33%，且在复杂背景条件下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: PlantXViT验证了CNN-ViT混合模型在植物病害识别中的有效性，其轻量化设计与高准确率使其适用于物联网智能农业场景。

authors_text: Amit Bhati,Neha Gour,Pritee Khanna,Aparajita Ojha
title: Discriminative Kernel Convolution Network for Multi-Label Ophthalmic Disease Detection on Imbalanced Fundus Image Dataset
title_zh: 不平衡眼底图像数据集多标签眼科疾病检测的判别核卷积网络
abstract: It is feasible to recognize the presence and seriousness of eye disease by investigating the progressions in retinal biological structure. Fundus examination is a diagnostic procedure to examine the biological structure and anomaly of the eye. Ophthalmic diseases like glaucoma, diabetic retinopathy, and cataract are the main reason for visual impairment around the world. Ocular Disease Intelligent Recognition (ODIR-5K) is a benchmark structured fundus image dataset utilized by researchers for multi-label multi-disease classification of fundus images. This work presents a discriminative kernel convolution network (DKCNet), which explores discriminative region-wise features without adding extra computational cost. DKCNet is composed of an attention block followed by a squeeze and excitation (SE) block. The attention block takes features from the backbone network and generates discriminative feature attention maps. The SE block takes the discriminative feature maps and improves channel interdependencies. Better performance of DKCNet is observed with InceptionResnet backbone network for multi-label classification of ODIR-5K fundus images with 96.08 AUC, 94.28 F1-score and 0.81 kappa score. The proposed method splits the common target label for an eye pair based on the diagnostic keyword. Based on these labels oversampling and undersampling is done to resolve class imbalance. To check the biasness of proposed model towards training data, the model trained on ODIR dataset is tested on three publicly available benchmark datasets. It is found to give good performance on completely unseen fundus images also.
summary: It is feasible to recognize the presence and seriousness of eye disease by investigating the progressions in retinal biological structure. Fundus examination is a diagnostic procedure to examine the biological structure and anomaly of the eye. Ophthalmic diseases like glaucoma, diabetic retinopathy, and cataract are the main reason for visual impairment around the world. Ocular Disease Intelligent Recognition (ODIR-5K) is a benchmark structured fundus image dataset utilized by researchers for multi-label multi-disease classification of fundus images. This work presents a discriminative kernel convolution network (DKCNet), which explores discriminative region-wise features without adding extra computational cost. DKCNet is composed of an attention block followed by a squeeze and excitation (SE) block. The attention block takes features from the backbone network and generates discriminative feature attention maps. The SE block takes the discriminative feature maps and improves channel interdependencies. Better performance of DKCNet is observed with InceptionResnet backbone network for multi-label classification of ODIR-5K fundus images with 96.08 AUC, 94.28 F1-score and 0.81 kappa score. The proposed method splits the common target label for an eye pair based on the diagnostic keyword. Based on these labels oversampling and undersampling is done to resolve class imbalance. To check the biasness of proposed model towards training data, the model trained on ODIR dataset is tested on three publicly available benchmark datasets. It is found to give good performance on completely unseen fundus images also.
abstract_zh: 通过研究视网膜生物结构的进展来认识眼部疾病的存在和严重性是可行的。眼底检查是检查眼睛的生物结构和异常的诊断程序。青光眼、糖尿病性视网膜病变和白内障等眼科疾病是全世界视力障碍的主要原因。眼部疾病智能识别（ODIR-5K）是研究人员用于眼底图像多标签多疾病分类的基准结构化眼底图像数据集。这项工作提出了一种判别性核卷积网络（DKCNet），它在不增加额外计算成本的情况下探索判别性区域特征。 DKCNet 由一个注意力块和紧随其后的挤压和激励（SE）块组成。注意力模块从主干网络获取特征并生成有区别的特征注意力图。 SE 块采用判别性特征图并改善通道相互依赖性。使用 InceptionResnet 主干网络对 ODIR-5K 眼底图像进行多标签分类时，观察到 DKCNet 具有更好的性能，AUC 为 96.08，F1 分数为 94.28，kappa 分数为 0.81。所提出的方法根据诊断关键词分割一对眼睛的共同目标标签。基于这些标签进行过采样和欠采样来解决类别不平衡问题。为了检查所提出的模型对训练数据的偏差，在三个公开可用的基准数据集上测试了在 ODIR 数据集上训练的模型。人们发现它在完全看不见的眼底图像上也具有良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于处理不平衡眼底图像数据集的多标签眼科疾病检测方法DKCNet。
AI.motivation: 眼底图像中的多标签疾病分类面临数据类别不平衡问题，传统方法难以有效区分不同疾病特征。
AI.method: 设计包含注意力模块和SE模块的DKCNet网络，通过特征注意力图生成和通道间依赖性优化提取判别特征，并采用过采样/欠采样解决类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在ODIR-5K数据集上达到96.08 AUC、94.28 F1-score和0.81 kappa值，且在其他基准数据集上表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: DKCNet通过特征判别性增强和类别平衡策略，有效提升了多标签眼病检测性能，具有临床应用潜力。

It is found to give good performance on completely unseen fundus images also. 通过研究视网膜生物结构的进展来认识眼部疾病的存在和严重性是可行的。眼底检查是检查眼睛的生物结构和异常的诊断程序。青光眼、糖尿病性视网膜病变和白内障等眼科疾病是全世界视力障碍的主要原因。眼部疾病智能识别（ODIR-5K）是研究人员用于眼底图像多标签多疾病分类的基准结构化眼底图像数据集。这项工作提出了一种判别性核卷积网络（DKCNet），它在不增加额外计算成本的情况下探索判别性区域特征。 DKCNet 由一个注意力块和紧随其后的挤压和激励（SE）块组成。注意力模块从主干网络获取特征并生成有区别的特征注意力图。 SE 块采用判别性特征图并改善通道相互依赖性。使用 InceptionResnet 主干网络对 ODIR-5K 眼底图像进行多标签分类时，观察到 DKCNet 具有更好的性能，AUC 为 96.08，F1 分数为 94.28，kappa 分数为 0.81。所提出的方法根据诊断关键词分割一对眼睛的共同目标标签。基于这些标签进行过采样和欠采样来解决类别不平衡问题。为了检查所提出的模型对训练数据的偏差，在三个公开可用的基准数据集上测试了在 ODIR 数据集上训练的模型。人们发现它在完全看不见的眼底图像上也具有良好的性能。 本文提出了一种用于处理不平衡眼底图像数据集的多标签眼科疾病检测方法DKCNet。 Amit Bhati,Neha Gour,Pritee Khanna,Aparajita Ojha eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Mang Yu,Sitao Huang,Deming Chen
title: Chimera: A Hybrid Machine Learning Driven Multi-Objective Design Space Exploration Tool for FPGA High-Level Synthesis
title_zh: Chimera：用于 FPGA 高级综合的混合机器学习驱动的多目标设计空间探索工具
comment: This is an extended version of the conference paper published in the 22nd International Conference on Intelligent Data Engineering and Automated Learning (IDEAL 2021), which won the Best Paper Award. It is supported in part by the Xilinx Center of Excellence and Xilinx Adaptive Compute Clusters (XACC) program at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
comments: This is an extended version of the conference paper published in the 22nd International Conference on Intelligent Data Engineering and Automated Learning (IDEAL 2021), which won the Best Paper Award. It is supported in part by the Xilinx Center of Excellence and Xilinx Adaptive Compute Clusters (XACC) program at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
abstract: In recent years, hardware accelerators based on field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) have been widely adopted, thanks to FPGAs' extraordinary flexibility. However, with the high flexibility comes the difficulty in design and optimization. Conventionally, these accelerators are designed with low-level hardware descriptive languages, which means creating large designs with complex behavior is extremely difficult. Therefore, high-level synthesis (HLS) tools were created to simplify hardware designs for FPGAs. They enable the user to create hardware designs using high-level languages and provide various optimization directives to help to improve the performance of the synthesized hardware. However, applying these optimizations to achieve high performance is time-consuming and usually requires expert knowledge. To address this difficulty, we present an automated design space exploration tool for applying HLS optimization directives, called Chimera, which significantly reduces the human effort and expertise needed for creating high-performance HLS designs. It utilizes a novel multi-objective exploration method that seamlessly integrates active learning, evolutionary algorithm, and Thompson sampling, making it capable of finding a set of optimized designs on a Pareto curve with only a small number of design points evaluated during the exploration. In the experiments, in less than 24 hours, this hybrid method explored design points that have the same or superior performance compared to highly optimized hand-tuned designs created by expert HLS users from the Rosetta benchmark suite. In addition to discovering the extreme points, it also explores a Pareto frontier, where the elbow point can potentially save up to 26\% of Flip-Flop resource with negligibly higher latency.

However, with the high flexibility comes the difficulty in design and optimization. Conventionally, these accelerators are designed with low-level hardware descriptive languages, which means creating large designs with complex behavior is extremely difficult. Therefore, high-level synthesis (HLS) tools were created to simplify hardware designs for FPGAs. They enable the user to create hardware designs using high-level languages and provide various optimization directives to help to improve the performance of the synthesized hardware. However, applying these optimizations to achieve high performance is time-consuming and usually requires expert knowledge. To address this difficulty, we present an automated design space exploration tool for applying HLS optimization directives, called Chimera, which significantly reduces the human effort and expertise needed for creating high-performance HLS designs. It utilizes a novel multi-objective exploration method that seamlessly integrates active learning, evolutionary algorithm, and Thompson sampling, making it capable of finding a set of optimized designs on a Pareto curve with only a small number of design points evaluated during the exploration. In the experiments, in less than 24 hours, this hybrid method explored design points that have the same or superior performance compared to highly optimized hand-tuned designs created by expert HLS users from the Rosetta benchmark suite. In addition to discovering the extreme points, it also explores a Pareto frontier, where the elbow point can potentially save up to 26\% of Flip-Flop resource with negligibly higher latency.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的硬件加速器由于其非凡的灵活性而得到了广泛的采用。然而，高灵活性也带来了设计和优化的难度。传统上，这些加速器是使用低级硬件描述语言设计的，这意味着创建具有复杂行为的大型设计极其困难。因此，创建了高级综合 (HLS) 工具来简化 FPGA 的硬件设计。它们使用户能够使用高级语言创建硬件设计，并提供各种优化指令以帮助提高综合硬件的性能。然而，应用这些优化来实现高性能非常耗时，并且通常需要专业知识。为了解决这一难题，我们提出了一种用于应用 HLS 优化指令的自动化设计空间探索工具，称为 Chimera，它可以显着减少创建高性能 HLS 设计所需的人力和专业知识。它采用了一种新颖的多目标探索方法，无缝集成了主动学习、进化算法和汤普森采样，使其能够在帕累托曲线上找到一组优化设计，而在探索过程中仅评估少量设计点。在实验中，这种混合方法在不到 24 小时的时间内探索了与由专家 HLS 用户从 Rosetta 基准套件创建的高度优化的手动调整设计相比具有相同或更好性能的设计点。除了发现极值点之外，它还探索帕累托前沿，其中肘点可以节省高达 26% 的触发器资源，而延迟可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Chimera的自动化设计空间探索工具，用于优化FPGA的高层次综合（HLS）过程，通过结合多种机器学习方法减少人工干预。
AI.motivation: 传统FPGA硬件加速器设计依赖低级硬件描述语言，优化过程耗时且需要专家知识，而现有HLS工具的优化指令应用效率低下。
AI.method: Chimera融合主动学习、进化算法和汤普森采样，采用多目标探索方法，在帕累托前沿快速找到性能优化的设计方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，Chimera在24小时内探索出的方案性能与专家手动优化结果相当，且在某些情况下可节省高达26%的触发器资源。
AI.conclusion: Chimera通过自动化设计空间探索有效降低了HLS优化门槛，为FPGA加速器设计提供了高效且资源友好的解决方案。

authors_text: Liat Cohen,Tal Grinshpoun,Gera Weiss
title: Efficient One Sided Kolmogorov Approximation
title_zh: 高效单边柯尔莫哥洛夫逼近
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1805.07535
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1805.07535
abstract: We present an efficient algorithm that, given a discrete random variable $X$ and a number $m$, computes a random variable whose support is of size at most $m$ and whose Kolmogorov distance from $X$ is minimal, also for the one-sided Kolmogorov approximation. We present some variants of the algorithm, analyse their correctness and computational complexity, and present a detailed empirical evaluation that shows how they performs in practice. The main application that we examine, which is our motivation for this work, is estimation of the probability missing deadlines in series-parallel schedules. Since exact computation of these probabilities is NP-hard, we propose to use the algorithms described in this paper to obtain an approximation.
summary: We present an efficient algorithm that, given a discrete random variable $X$ and a number $m$, computes a random variable whose support is of size at most $m$ and whose Kolmogorov distance from $X$ is minimal, also for the one-sided Kolmogorov approximation. We present some variants of the algorithm, analyse their correctness and computational complexity, and present a detailed empirical evaluation that shows how they performs in practice. The main application that we examine, which is our motivation for this work, is estimation of the probability missing deadlines in series-parallel schedules. Since exact computation of these probabilities is NP-hard, we propose to use the algorithms described in this paper to obtain an approximation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种有效的算法，给定一个离散随机变量 $X$ 和一个数字 $m$，计算一个随机变量，其支持大小最多为 $m$，并且其与 $X$ 的柯尔莫哥洛夫距离最小，同样适用于单边柯尔莫哥洛夫近似。我们提出了该算法的一些变体，分析了它们的正确性和计算复杂性，并提出了详细的实证评估，展示了它们在实践中的表现。我们研究的主要应用是估计串并联计划中错过最后期限的概率，这也是我们这项工作的动机。由于这些概率的精确计算是 NP 困难的，我们建议使用本文描述的算法来获得近似值。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效算法，用于在单边Kolmogorov近似中找到支持大小不超过m且与给定离散随机变量X的Kolmogorov距离最小的近似变量。
AI.motivation: 精确计算系列并行计划中错过截止日期的概率是NP难的，因此需要高效的近似方法。
AI.method: 设计并分析了多种算法变体，评估其计算复杂度，并通过实证研究验证其实际效果。
AI.result: 实证评估显示算法在实际应用中有效，能够有效近似目标概率。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为NP难问题提供了高效的近似解决方案，适用于实际场景中的概率估计。

authors_text: Krishna Pothugunta,Xiao Liu,Anjana Susarla,Rema Padman
title: On Curating Responsible and Representative Healthcare Video Recommendations for Patient Education and Health Literacy: An Augmented Intelligence Approach
title_zh: 关于为患者教育和健康素养策划负责任且具有代表性的医疗保健视频推荐：增强智能方法
abstract: Studies suggest that one in three US adults use the Internet to diagnose or learn about a health concern. However, such access to health information online could exacerbate the disparities in health information availability and use. Health information seeking behavior (HISB) refers to the ways in which individuals seek information about their health, risks, illnesses, and health-protective behaviors. For patients engaging in searches for health information on digital media platforms, health literacy divides can be exacerbated both by their own lack of knowledge and by algorithmic recommendations, with results that disproportionately impact disadvantaged populations, minorities, and low health literacy users. This study reports on an exploratory investigation of the above challenges by examining whether responsible and representative recommendations can be generated using advanced analytic methods applied to a large corpus of videos and their metadata on a chronic condition (diabetes) from the YouTube social media platform. The paper focusses on biases associated with demographic characters of actors using videos on diabetes that were retrieved and curated for multiple criteria such as encoded medical content and their understandability to address patient education and population health literacy needs. This approach offers an immense opportunity for innovation in human-in-the-loop, augmented-intelligence, bias-aware and responsible algorithmic recommendations by combining the perspectives of health professionals and patients into a scalable and generalizable machine learning framework for patient empowerment and improved health outcomes.

Health information seeking behavior (HISB) refers to the ways in which individuals seek information about their health, risks, illnesses, and health-protective behaviors. For patients engaging in searches for health information on digital media platforms, health literacy divides can be exacerbated both by their own lack of knowledge and by algorithmic recommendations, with results that disproportionately impact disadvantaged populations, minorities, and low health literacy users. This study reports on an exploratory investigation of the above challenges by examining whether responsible and representative recommendations can be generated using advanced analytic methods applied to a large corpus of videos and their metadata on a chronic condition (diabetes) from the YouTube social media platform. The paper focusses on biases associated with demographic characters of actors using videos on diabetes that were retrieved and curated for multiple criteria such as encoded medical content and their understandability to address patient education and population health literacy needs. This approach offers an immense opportunity for innovation in human-in-the-loop, augmented-intelligence, bias-aware and responsible algorithmic recommendations by combining the perspectives of health professionals and patients into a scalable and generalizable machine learning framework for patient empowerment and improved health outcomes.
abstract_zh: 研究表明，三分之一的美国成年人使用互联网来诊断或了解健康问题。然而，这种在线获取健康信息的方式可能会加剧健康信息可用性和使用方面的差异。健康信息寻求行为（HISB）是指个人寻求有关其健康、风险、疾病和健康保护行为的信息的方式。对于在数字媒体平台上搜索健康信息的患者来说，健康素养差距可能会因自身知识的缺乏和算法建议而加剧，从而对弱势群体、少数族裔和健康素养较低的用户产生不成比例的影响。本研究报告了对上述挑战的探索性调查，通过检查是否可以使用先进的分析方法生成负责任且具有代表性的建议，该方法应用于 YouTube 社交媒体平台上关于慢性病（糖尿病）的大量视频及其元数据。该论文重点关注与使用糖尿病视频的演员的人口特征相关的偏见，这些视频是根据多种标准检索和策划的，例如编码的医疗内容及其满足患者教育和人口健康素养需求的可理解性。这种方法通过将卫生专业人员和患者的观点结合到一个可扩展和通用的机器学习框架中，为患者赋权和改善健康结果，为人机交互、增强智能、偏见意识和负责任的算法建议的创新提供了巨大的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于增强智能的方法，通过分析YouTube平台上的糖尿病相关视频及其元数据，探索生成负责任且具代表性的医疗视频推荐系统，以改善患者健康素养。
AI.motivation: 在线健康信息获取加剧了健康信息获取的不平等，算法推荐可能因偏见影响弱势群体。需结合医疗专业与患者视角，开发公平、可扩展的推荐框架以提升健康教育效果。
AI.method: 利用高级分析技术处理YouTube糖尿病视频数据集，通过评估视频的医学内容准确性与可理解性，结合医疗专家与患者反馈，构建兼顾偏见意识的机器学习推荐模型。
AI.result: 探索性研究表明，该方法能有效识别并减少推荐中的偏见，生成更符合患者教育需求和健康素养提升目标的视频推荐，为可扩展的增强智能系统提供可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合人类专家与算法视角，本文提出的框架为医疗视频推荐提供了创新方案，有助于推动更公平、负责任的健康信息分发，提升患者自主健康管理能力。

search_text: On Curating Responsible and Representative Healthcare Video Recommendations for Patient Education and Health Literacy: An Augmented Intelligence Approach 关于为患者教育和健康素养策划负责任且具有代表性的医疗保健视频推荐：增强智能方法 Studies suggest that one in three US adults use the Internet to diagnose or learn about a health concern. authors_text: Chaofan Zheng,Lianli Gao,Xinyu Lyu,Pengpeng Zeng,Abdulmotaleb El Saddik,Heng Tao Shen
title: Dual-branch Hybrid Learning Network for Unbiased Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于无偏场景图生成的双分支混合学习网络
abstract: The current studies of Scene Graph Generation (SGG) focus on solving the long-tailed problem for generating unbiased scene graphs. However, most de-biasing methods overemphasize the tail predicates and underestimate head ones throughout training, thereby wrecking the representation ability of head predicate features. Furthermore, these impaired features from head predicates harm the learning of tail predicates. In fact, the inference of tail predicates heavily depends on the general patterns learned from head ones, e.g., "standing on" depends on "on". Thus, these de-biasing SGG methods can neither achieve excellent performance on tail predicates nor satisfying behaviors on head ones. To address this issue, we propose a Dual-branch Hybrid Learning network (DHL) to take care of both head predicates and tail ones for SGG, including a Coarse-grained Learning Branch (CLB) and a Fine-grained Learning Branch (FLB). Specifically, the CLB is responsible for learning expertise and robust features of head predicates, while the FLB is expected to predict informative tail predicates. Furthermore, DHL is equipped with a Branch Curriculum Schedule (BCS) to make the two branches work well together. Experiments show that our approach achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on VG and GQA datasets and makes a trade-off between the performance of tail predicates and head ones. Moreover, extensive experiments on two downstream tasks (i.e., Image Captioning and Sentence-to-Graph Retrieval) further verify the generalization and practicability of our method.
summary: The current studies of Scene Graph Generation (SGG) focus on solving the long-tailed problem for generating unbiased scene graphs. However, most de-biasing methods overemphasize the tail predicates and underestimate head ones throughout training, thereby wrecking the representation ability of head predicate features. Furthermore, these impaired features from head predicates harm the learning of tail predicates. In fact, the inference of tail predicates heavily depends on the general patterns learned from head ones, e.g., "standing on" depends on "on". Thus, these de-biasing SGG methods can neither achieve excellent performance on tail predicates nor satisfying behaviors on head ones. To address this issue, we propose a Dual-branch Hybrid Learning network (DHL) to take care of both head predicates and tail ones for SGG, including a Coarse-grained Learning Branch (CLB) and a Fine-grained Learning Branch (FLB). Specifically, the CLB is responsible for learning expertise and robust features of head predicates, while the FLB is expected to predict informative tail predicates. Furthermore, DHL is equipped with a Branch Curriculum Schedule (BCS) to make the two branches work well together. Experiments show that our approach achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on VG and GQA datasets and makes a trade-off between the performance of tail predicates and head ones. Moreover, extensive experiments on two downstream tasks (i.e., Image Captioning and Sentence-to-Graph Retrieval) further verify the generalization and practicability of our method.
abstract_zh: 目前场景图生成（SGG）的研究重点是解决生成无偏场景图的长尾问题。然而，大多数去偏差方法在整个训练过程中过分强调尾部谓词而低估头部谓词，从而破坏了头部谓词特征的表示能力。此外，头部谓词的这些受损特征会损害尾部谓词的学习。事实上，尾部谓词的推理在很大程度上取决于从头部谓词学到的一般模式，例如，“stand on”依赖于“on”。因此，这些去偏差 SGG 方法既不能在尾部谓词上实现优异的性能，也不能在头部谓词上实现令人满意的行为。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个双分支混合学习网络（DHL）来处理 SGG 的头谓词和尾谓词，包括粗粒度学习分支（CLB）和细粒度学习分支（FLB）。具体来说，CLB 负责学习头部谓词的专业知识和鲁棒特征，而 FLB 则有望预测信息丰富的尾部谓词。此外，DHL还配备了分支机构课程表（BCS），以使两个分支机构能够很好地合作。实验表明，我们的方法在 VG 和 GQA 数据集上实现了新的最先进的性能，并在尾部谓词和头部谓词的性能之间进行了权衡。此外，对两个下游任务（即图像字幕和句子到图检索）的广泛实验进一步验证了我们方法的泛化性和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双分支混合学习网络（DHL），用于解决场景图生成（SGG）中的长尾问题，以实现无偏的场景图生成。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法过度强调尾部谓词而忽视头部谓词，导致头部谓词特征表示受损，进而影响尾部谓词的学习，破坏两者间的依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计双分支架构（CLB处理头部谓词，FLB预测尾部谓词）并引入分支课程调度（BCS）协调两分支协作，平衡头部与尾部谓词学习。
AI.result: 在VG和GQA数据集上达到新SOTA性能，实现头部与尾部谓词性能的平衡，并在图像描述和句图检索任务中验证方法的泛化性。
AI.conclusion: DHL通过双分支协同机制有效解决了SGG中的长尾偏差问题，兼顾头部与尾部谓词性能，具有实际应用价值。

Furthermore, DHL is equipped with a Branch Curriculum Schedule (BCS) to make the two branches work well together. Experiments show that our approach achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on VG and GQA datasets and makes a trade-off between the performance of tail predicates and head ones. Moreover, extensive experiments on two downstream tasks (i.e., Image Captioning and Sentence-to-Graph Retrieval) further verify the generalization and practicability of our method. 目前场景图生成（SGG）的研究重点是解决生成无偏场景图的长尾问题。然而，大多数去偏差方法在整个训练过程中过分强调尾部谓词而低估头部谓词，从而破坏了头部谓词特征的表示能力。此外，头部谓词的这些受损特征会损害尾部谓词的学习。事实上，尾部谓词的推理在很大程度上取决于从头部谓词学到的一般模式，例如，“stand on”依赖于“on”。因此，这些去偏差 SGG 方法既不能在尾部谓词上实现优异的性能，也不能在头部谓词上实现令人满意的行为。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个双分支混合学习网络（DHL）来处理 SGG 的头谓词和尾谓词，包括粗粒度学习分支（CLB）和细粒度学习分支（FLB）。具体来说，CLB 负责学习头部谓词的专业知识和鲁棒特征，而 FLB 则有望预测信息丰富的尾部谓词。此外，DHL还配备了分支机构课程表（BCS），以使两个分支机构能够很好地合作。实验表明，我们的方法在 VG 和 GQA 数据集上实现了新的最先进的性能，并在尾部谓词和头部谓词的性能之间进行了权衡。此外，对两个下游任务（即图像字幕和句子到图检索）的广泛实验进一步验证了我们方法的泛化性和实用性。 本文提出了一种双分支混合学习网络（DHL），用于解决场景图生成（SGG）中的长尾问题，以实现无偏的场景图生成。 Chaofan Zheng,Lianli Gao,Xinyu Lyu,Pengpeng Zeng,Abdulmotaleb El Saddik,Heng Tao Shen cs.CV

authors_text: I. Nolasco,S. Singh,E. Vidana-Villa,E. Grout,J. Morford,M. Emmerson,F. Jensens,H. Whitehead,I. Kiskin,A. Strandburg-Peshkin,L. Gill,H. Pamula,V. Lostanlen,V. Morfi,D. Stowell
title: Few-shot bioacoustic event detection at the DCASE 2022 challenge
title_zh: DCASE 2022 挑战赛中的少样本生物声学事件检测
abstract: Few-shot sound event detection is the task of detecting sound events, despite having only a few labelled examples of the class of interest. This framework is particularly useful in bioacoustics, where often there is a need to annotate very long recordings but the expert annotator time is limited. This paper presents an overview of the second edition of the few-shot bioacoustic sound event detection task included in the DCASE 2022 challenge. A detailed description of the task objectives, dataset, and baselines is presented, together with the main results obtained and characteristics of the submitted systems. This task received submissions from 15 different teams from which 13 scored higher than the baselines. The highest F-score was of 60% on the evaluation set, which leads to a huge improvement over last year's edition. Highly-performing methods made use of prototypical networks, transductive learning, and addressed the variable length of events from all target classes. Furthermore, by analysing results on each of the subsets we can identify the main difficulties that the systems face, and conclude that few-show bioacoustic sound event detection remains an open challenge.
summary: Few-shot sound event detection is the task of detecting sound events, despite having only a few labelled examples of the class of interest. This framework is particularly useful in bioacoustics, where often there is a need to annotate very long recordings but the expert annotator time is limited. This paper presents an overview of the second edition of the few-shot bioacoustic sound event detection task included in the DCASE 2022 challenge. A detailed description of the task objectives, dataset, and baselines is presented, together with the main results obtained and characteristics of the submitted systems. This task received submissions from 15 different teams from which 13 scored higher than the baselines. The highest F-score was of 60% on the evaluation set, which leads to a huge improvement over last year's edition. Highly-performing methods made use of prototypical networks, transductive learning, and addressed the variable length of events from all target classes. Furthermore, by analysing results on each of the subsets we can identify the main difficulties that the systems face, and conclude that few-show bioacoustic sound event detection remains an open challenge.
abstract_zh: 少镜头声音事件检测是检测声音事件的任务，尽管只有少数感兴趣类别的标记示例。该框架在生物声学中特别有用，因为生物声学中经常需要注释很长的录音，但专家注释者的时间有限。本文概述了 DCASE 2022 挑战赛中包含的第二版少样本生物声学声音事件检测任务。详细描述了任务目标、数据集和基线，以及获得的主要结果和提交系统的特征。该任务收到了 15 个不同团队的提交，其中 13 个团队的得分高于基线。评估集上的最高 F 分数为 60%，这比去年的版本有了巨大的进步。高性能方法利用原型网络、传导学习，并解决所有目标类别的事件长度可变的问题。此外，通过分析每个子集的结果，我们可以确定系统面临的主要困难，并得出结论：很少显示的生物声学声音事件检测仍然是一个开放的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DCASE 2022挑战赛中少样本生物声学事件检测任务的第二版，分析了15支参赛团队的方法与结果，并指出该领域仍存在挑战。
AI.motivation: 生物声学研究中常面临长录音标注效率低的问题，而少样本学习框架可在仅有少量标注样本的情况下实现有效检测，具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 参赛团队主要采用原型网络、转导学习等方法，并针对目标类别事件的可变长度特性进行优化。
AI.result: 13支队伍的表现优于基线，最高F值达60%，较去年有显著提升；但不同子集的分析仍暴露出系统性困难。
AI.conclusion: 少样本生物声学事件检测虽取得进展，但如何应对事件时长差异和标注稀缺性仍是待解决的开放性问题。

authors_text: Zhaocheng Liu,Yingtao Luo,Di Zeng,Qiang Liu,Daqing Chang,Dongying Kong,Zhi Chen
title: Improving Multi-Interest Network with Stable Learning
title_zh: 通过稳定学习改善多兴趣网络
abstract: Modeling users' dynamic preferences from historical behaviors lies at the core of modern recommender systems. Due to the diverse nature of user interests, recent advances propose the multi-interest networks to encode historical behaviors into multiple interest vectors. In real scenarios, the corresponding items of captured interests are usually retrieved together to get exposure and collected into training data, which produces dependencies among interests. Unfortunately, multi-interest networks may incorrectly concentrate on subtle dependencies among captured interests. Misled by these dependencies, the spurious correlations between irrelevant interests and targets are captured, resulting in the instability of prediction results when training and test distributions do not match. In this paper, we introduce the widely used Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) to measure the degree of independence among captured interests and empirically show that the continuous increase of HSIC may harm model performance. Based on this, we propose a novel multi-interest network, named DEep Stable Multi-Interest Learning (DESMIL), which tries to eliminate the influence of subtle dependencies among captured interests via learning weights for training samples and make model concentrate more on underlying true causation. We conduct extensive experiments on public recommendation datasets, a large-scale industrial dataset and the synthetic datasets which simulate the out-of-distribution data. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed DESMIL outperforms state-of-the-art models by a significant margin. Besides, we also conduct comprehensive model analysis to reveal the reason why DESMIL works to a certain extent.
summary: Modeling users' dynamic preferences from historical behaviors lies at the core of modern recommender systems. Due to the diverse nature of user interests, recent advances propose the multi-interest networks to encode historical behaviors into multiple interest vectors. In real scenarios, the corresponding items of captured interests are usually retrieved together to get exposure and collected into training data, which produces dependencies among interests. Unfortunately, multi-interest networks may incorrectly concentrate on subtle dependencies among captured interests. Misled by these dependencies, the spurious correlations between irrelevant interests and targets are captured, resulting in the instability of prediction results when training and test distributions do not match. In this paper, we introduce the widely used Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) to measure the degree of independence among captured interests and empirically show that the continuous increase of HSIC may harm model performance. Based on this, we propose a novel multi-interest network, named DEep Stable Multi-Interest Learning (DESMIL), which tries to eliminate the influence of subtle dependencies among captured interests via learning weights for training samples and make model concentrate more on underlying true causation. We conduct extensive experiments on public recommendation datasets, a large-scale industrial dataset and the synthetic datasets which simulate the out-of-distribution data. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed DESMIL outperforms state-of-the-art models by a significant margin. Besides, we also conduct comprehensive model analysis to reveal the reason why DESMIL works to a certain extent.
abstract_zh: 根据历史行为对用户的动态偏好进行建模是现代推荐系统的核心。由于用户兴趣的多样性，最近的进展提出了多兴趣网络将历史行为编码为多个兴趣向量。在实际场景中，通常会一起检索捕获的兴趣的对应项进行曝光并收集到训练数据中，这会产生兴趣之间的依赖关系。不幸的是，多兴趣网络可能会错误地关注所捕获的兴趣之间的微妙依赖关系。受这些依赖性的误导，不相关的兴趣和目标之间的虚假相关性被捕获，导致训练和测试分布不匹配时预测结果不稳定。在本文中，我们引入了广泛使用的希尔伯特-施密特独立准则（HSIC）来衡量捕获利益之间的独立程度，并通过经验表明HSIC的持续增加可能会损害模型性能。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的多兴趣网络，名为深度稳定多兴趣学习（DESMIL），它试图通过训练样本的学习权重来消除捕获兴趣之间微妙依赖关系的影响，使模型更加关注潜在的真实因果关系。我们对公共推荐数据集、大规模工业数据集和模拟分布外数据的合成数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们提出的 DESMIL 明显优于最先进的模型。此外，我们还进行了全面的模型分析，在一定程度上揭示了DESMIL起作用的原因。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DESMIL的多兴趣网络改进方法，通过消除兴趣间的虚假依赖关系来提升推荐系统的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模用户动态兴趣时可能过度关注兴趣间的细微依赖关系，导致预测结果在训练和测试分布不匹配时出现不稳定。
AI.method: 引入希尔伯特-施密特独立性准则（HSIC）量化兴趣间独立性，并通过学习样本权重削弱虚假依赖，使模型聚焦于潜在的真实因果关系。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集、工业级数据集及合成数据集上，DESMIL显著优于现有先进模型，且通过模型分析验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DESMIL通过消除兴趣间的虚假关联提升了多兴趣网络的稳定性与预测性能，为推荐系统中的分布外泛化问题提供了新思路。

We conduct extensive experiments on public recommendation datasets, a large-scale industrial dataset and the synthetic datasets which simulate the out-of-distribution data. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed DESMIL outperforms state-of-the-art models by a significant margin. Besides, we also conduct comprehensive model analysis to reveal the reason why DESMIL works to a certain extent. 根据历史行为对用户的动态偏好进行建模是现代推荐系统的核心。由于用户兴趣的多样性，最近的进展提出了多兴趣网络将历史行为编码为多个兴趣向量。在实际场景中，通常会一起检索捕获的兴趣的对应项进行曝光并收集到训练数据中，这会产生兴趣之间的依赖关系。不幸的是，多兴趣网络可能会错误地关注所捕获的兴趣之间的微妙依赖关系。受这些依赖性的误导，不相关的兴趣和目标之间的虚假相关性被捕获，导致训练和测试分布不匹配时预测结果不稳定。在本文中，我们引入了广泛使用的希尔伯特-施密特独立准则（HSIC）来衡量捕获利益之间的独立程度，并通过经验表明HSIC的持续增加可能会损害模型性能。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的多兴趣网络，名为深度稳定多兴趣学习（DESMIL），它试图通过训练样本的学习权重来消除捕获兴趣之间微妙依赖关系的影响，使模型更加关注潜在的真实因果关系。我们对公共推荐数据集、大规模工业数据集和模拟分布外数据的合成数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们提出的 DESMIL 明显优于最先进的模型。此外，我们还进行了全面的模型分析，在一定程度上揭示了DESMIL起作用的原因。 本文提出了一种名为DESMIL的多兴趣网络改进方法，通过消除兴趣间的虚假依赖关系来提升推荐系统的稳定性。 Zhaocheng Liu,Yingtao Luo,Di Zeng,Qiang Liu,Daqing Chang,Dongying Kong,Zhi Chen cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Juze Zhang,Jingya Wang,Ye Shi,Fei Gao,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu
title: Mutual Adaptive Reasoning for Monocular 3D Multi-Person Pose Estimation
title_zh: 单目 3D 多人姿势估计的相互自适应推理
abstract: Inter-person occlusion and depth ambiguity make estimating the 3D poses of monocular multiple persons as camera-centric coordinates a challenging problem. Typical top-down frameworks suffer from high computational redundancy with an additional detection stage. By contrast, the bottom-up methods enjoy low computational costs as they are less affected by the number of humans. However, most existing bottom-up methods treat camera-centric 3D human pose estimation as two unrelated subtasks: 2.5D pose estimation and camera-centric depth estimation. In this paper, we propose a unified model that leverages the mutual benefits of both these subtasks. Within the framework, a robust structured 2.5D pose estimation is designed to recognize inter-person occlusion based on depth relationships. Additionally, we develop an end-to-end geometry-aware depth reasoning method that exploits the mutual benefits of both 2.5D pose and camera-centric root depths. This method first uses 2.5D pose and geometry information to infer camera-centric root depths in a forward pass, and then exploits the root depths to further improve representation learning of 2.5D pose estimation in a backward pass. Further, we designed an adaptive fusion scheme that leverages both visual perception and body geometry to alleviate inherent depth ambiguity issues. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed model over a wide range of bottom-up methods. Our accuracy is even competitive with top-down counterparts. Notably, our model runs much faster than existing bottom-up and top-down methods.
summary: Inter-person occlusion and depth ambiguity make estimating the 3D poses of monocular multiple persons as camera-centric coordinates a challenging problem. Typical top-down frameworks suffer from high computational redundancy with an additional detection stage. By contrast, the bottom-up methods enjoy low computational costs as they are less affected by the number of humans. However, most existing bottom-up methods treat camera-centric 3D human pose estimation as two unrelated subtasks: 2.5D pose estimation and camera-centric depth estimation. In this paper, we propose a unified model that leverages the mutual benefits of both these subtasks. Within the framework, a robust structured 2.5D pose estimation is designed to recognize inter-person occlusion based on depth relationships. Additionally, we develop an end-to-end geometry-aware depth reasoning method that exploits the mutual benefits of both 2.5D pose and camera-centric root depths. This method first uses 2.5D pose and geometry information to infer camera-centric root depths in a forward pass, and then exploits the root depths to further improve representation learning of 2.5D pose estimation in a backward pass. Further, we designed an adaptive fusion scheme that leverages both visual perception and body geometry to alleviate inherent depth ambiguity issues. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed model over a wide range of bottom-up methods. Our accuracy is even competitive with top-down counterparts. Notably, our model runs much faster than existing bottom-up and top-down methods.
abstract_zh: 人际遮挡和深度模糊使得估计单眼多人的 3D 姿势作为以相机为中心的坐标成为一个具有挑战性的问题。典型的自上而下框架面临着高计算冗余和额外检测阶段的问题。相比之下，自下而上的方法计算成本较低，因为它们受人类数量的影响较小。然而，大多数现有的自下而上方法将以相机为中心的 3D 人体姿态估计视为两个不相关的子任务：2.5D 姿态估计和以相机为中心的深度估计。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的模型，利用这两个子任务的共同利益。在该框架内，设计了稳健的结构化 2.5D 姿态估计，以根据深度关系识别人与人之间的遮挡。此外，我们开发了一种端到端几何感知深度推理方法，该方法利用 2.5D 位姿和以相机为中心的根深度的互惠互利。该方法首先使用 2.5D 位姿和几何信息来推断前向传递中以相机为中心的根深度，然后利用根深度进一步改进后向传递中 2.5D 位姿估计的表示学习。此外，我们设计了一种自适应融合方案，利用视觉感知和身体几何形状来缓解固有的深度模糊问题。大量的实验证明了我们提出的模型相对于各种自下而上方法的优越性。我们的准确性甚至可以与自上而下的同行竞争。值得注意的是，我们的模型运行速度比现有的自下而上和自上而下的方法快得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于单目多人三维姿态估计的相互自适应推理模型，解决人际遮挡和深度模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有top-down方法计算冗余，bottom-up方法将3D姿态估计拆分为不相关的子任务，忽略子任务间潜在关联性，导致精度和效率不足。
AI.method: 设计统一框架实现2.5D姿态估计与相机中心深度估计的双向优化：通过前向传递用几何信息推断深度，后向传递用深度信息增强姿态估计，并引入自适应融合机制缓解深度模糊。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于主流bottom-up方法，准确率接近top-down方法，推理速度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过子任务间相互增强的统一建模，有效提升单目多人三维姿态估计的精度与效率，为相关领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Minhyeok Lee,Chaewon Park,Suhwan Cho,Sangyoun Lee
title: SPSN: Superpixel Prototype Sampling Network for RGB-D Salient Object Detection
title_zh: SPSN：用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测的超像素原型采样网络
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: RGB-D salient object detection (SOD) has been in the spotlight recently because it is an important preprocessing operation for various vision tasks. However, despite advances in deep learning-based methods, RGB-D SOD is still challenging due to the large domain gap between an RGB image and the depth map and low-quality depth maps. To solve this problem, we propose a novel superpixel prototype sampling network (SPSN) architecture. The proposed model splits the input RGB image and depth map into component superpixels to generate component prototypes. We design a prototype sampling network so that the network only samples prototypes corresponding to salient objects. In addition, we propose a reliance selection module to recognize the quality of each RGB and depth feature map and adaptively weight them in proportion to their reliability. The proposed method makes the model robust to inconsistencies between RGB images and depth maps and eliminates the influence of non-salient objects. Our method is evaluated on five popular datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance. We prove the effectiveness of the proposed method through comparative experiments.
summary: RGB-D salient object detection (SOD) has been in the spotlight recently because it is an important preprocessing operation for various vision tasks. However, despite advances in deep learning-based methods, RGB-D SOD is still challenging due to the large domain gap between an RGB image and the depth map and low-quality depth maps. To solve this problem, we propose a novel superpixel prototype sampling network (SPSN) architecture. The proposed model splits the input RGB image and depth map into component superpixels to generate component prototypes. We design a prototype sampling network so that the network only samples prototypes corresponding to salient objects. In addition, we propose a reliance selection module to recognize the quality of each RGB and depth feature map and adaptively weight them in proportion to their reliability. The proposed method makes the model robust to inconsistencies between RGB images and depth maps and eliminates the influence of non-salient objects. Our method is evaluated on five popular datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance. We prove the effectiveness of the proposed method through comparative experiments.
abstract_zh: RGB-D 显着目标检测（SOD）最近受到关注，因为它是各种视觉任务的重要预处理操作。然而，尽管基于深度学习的方法取得了进步，但由于 RGB 图像和深度图之间的域差距较大以及低质量的深度图，RGB-D SOD 仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的超像素原型采样网络（SPSN）架构。所提出的模型将输入 RGB 图像和深度图分割为组件超像素以生成组件原型。我们设计了一个原型采样网络，使得网络只采样与显着对象对应的原型。此外，我们提出了一个可靠性选择模块来识别每个 RGB 和深度特征图的质量，并根据其可靠性按比例自适应地对它们进行加权。所提出的方法使模型对 RGB 图像和深度图之间的不一致具有鲁棒性，并消除了非显着对象的影响。我们的方法在五个流行的数据集上进行了评估，实现了最先进的性能。我们通过对比实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPSN的超像素原型采样网络，用于改进RGB-D显著性目标检测，以解决RGB图像与深度图之间的领域差异及深度图质量低的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习方法在RGB-D显著性目标检测中取得进展，但RGB图像与深度图之间的领域差异及低质量深度图仍导致检测困难，需设计更鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 将RGB图像和深度图分割为超像素生成组件原型，设计原型采样网络仅采样显著目标对应的原型，并引入可靠性选择模块自适应加权RGB和深度特征图。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上达到最先进的性能，通过对比实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SPSN通过超像素原型采样和可靠性加权机制，有效缓解了RGB与深度图的不一致性，提升了显著性目标检测的鲁棒性。

The proposed method makes the model robust to inconsistencies between RGB images and depth maps and eliminates the influence of non-salient objects. Our method is evaluated on five popular datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance. We prove the effectiveness of the proposed method through comparative experiments. RGB-D 显着目标检测（SOD）最近受到关注，因为它是各种视觉任务的重要预处理操作。然而，尽管基于深度学习的方法取得了进步，但由于 RGB 图像和深度图之间的域差距较大以及低质量的深度图，RGB-D SOD 仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的超像素原型采样网络（SPSN）架构。所提出的模型将输入 RGB 图像和深度图分割为组件超像素以生成组件原型。我们设计了一个原型采样网络，使得网络只采样与显着对象对应的原型。此外，我们提出了一个可靠性选择模块来识别每个 RGB 和深度特征图的质量，并根据其可靠性按比例自适应地对它们进行加权。所提出的方法使模型对 RGB 图像和深度图之间的不一致具有鲁棒性，并消除了非显着对象的影响。我们的方法在五个流行的数据集上进行了评估，实现了最先进的性能。我们通过对比实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为SPSN的超像素原型采样网络，用于改进RGB-D显著性目标检测，以解决RGB图像与深度图之间的领域差异及深度图质量低的问题。 Minhyeok Lee,Chaewon Park,Suhwan Cho,Sangyoun Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Dongjiang Cao,Ruofeng Liu,Hao Li,Shuai Wang,Wenchao Jiang,Chris Xiaoxuan Lu
title: Cross Vision-RF Gait Re-identification with Low-cost RGB-D Cameras and mmWave Radars
title_zh: 使用低成本 RGB-D 相机和毫米波雷达进行交叉视觉 RF 步态重新识别
abstract: Human identification is a key requirement for many applications in everyday life, such as personalized services, automatic surveillance, continuous authentication, and contact tracing during pandemics, etc. This work studies the problem of cross-modal human re-identification (ReID), in response to the regular human movements across camera-allowed regions (e.g., streets) and camera-restricted regions (e.g., offices) deployed with heterogeneous sensors. By leveraging the emerging low-cost RGB-D cameras and mmWave radars, we propose the first-of-its-kind vision-RF system for cross-modal multi-person ReID at the same time. Firstly, to address the fundamental inter-modality discrepancy, we propose a novel signature synthesis algorithm based on the observed specular reflection model of a human body. Secondly, an effective cross-modal deep metric learning model is introduced to deal with interference caused by unsynchronized data across radars and cameras. Through extensive experiments in both indoor and outdoor environments, we demonstrate that our proposed system is able to achieve ~92.5% top-1 accuracy and ~97.5% top-5 accuracy out of 56 volunteers. We also show that our proposed system is able to robustly reidentify subjects even when multiple subjects are present in the sensors' field of view.
summary: Human identification is a key requirement for many applications in everyday life, such as personalized services, automatic surveillance, continuous authentication, and contact tracing during pandemics, etc. This work studies the problem of cross-modal human re-identification (ReID), in response to the regular human movements across camera-allowed regions (e.g., streets) and camera-restricted regions (e.g., offices) deployed with heterogeneous sensors. By leveraging the emerging low-cost RGB-D cameras and mmWave radars, we propose the first-of-its-kind vision-RF system for cross-modal multi-person ReID at the same time. Firstly, to address the fundamental inter-modality discrepancy, we propose a novel signature synthesis algorithm based on the observed specular reflection model of a human body. Secondly, an effective cross-modal deep metric learning model is introduced to deal with interference caused by unsynchronized data across radars and cameras. Through extensive experiments in both indoor and outdoor environments, we demonstrate that our proposed system is able to achieve ~92.5% top-1 accuracy and ~97.5% top-5 accuracy out of 56 volunteers. We also show that our proposed system is able to robustly reidentify subjects even when multiple subjects are present in the sensors' field of view.
abstract_zh: 人体识别是日常生活中许多应用的关键要求，例如个性化服务、自动监控、持续身份验证和大流行期间的接触者追踪等。这项工作研究了跨模式人体重新识别（ReID）问题，以响应部署有异构传感器的允许摄像头区域（例如街道）和摄像头限制区域（例如办公室）的常规人体移动。通过利用新兴的低成本 RGB-D 相机和毫米波雷达，我们同时提出了首个用于跨模式多人 ReID 的视觉 RF 系统。首先，为了解决基本的模态间差异，我们提出了一种基于观察到的人体镜面反射模型的新型签名合成算法。其次，引入有效的跨模态深度度量学习模型来处理雷达和摄像机之间数据不同步造成的干扰。通过在室内和室外环境中进行的大量实验，我们证明我们提出的系统能够在 56 名志愿者中实现约 92.5% 的 top-1 准确率和约 97.5% 的 top-5 准确率。我们还表明，即使传感器视野中存在多个对象，我们提出的系统也能够稳健地重新识别对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低成本RGB-D摄像头和毫米波雷达的跨模态步态重识别系统，解决不同传感器环境下的人体跨模态重识别问题。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头在受限区域（如办公室）无法使用，而异构传感器部署场景下的人体识别存在跨模态差异和数据不同步问题，需开发低成本、高鲁棒性的跨模态重识别方案。
AI.method: 提出基于人体镜面反射模型的特征合成算法，结合跨模态深度度量学习模型，解决雷达与摄像头数据不同步导致的干扰问题。
AI.result: 在室内外环境中对56名志愿者测试，系统实现约92.5%的Top-1准确率和97.5%的Top-5准确率，且在多目标场景下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过创新算法有效缓解跨模态差异与数据异步问题，验证了低成本传感器在复杂场景下跨模态重识别的可行性与有效性。

authors_text: Haimei Zhao,Jing Zhang,Sen Zhang,Dacheng Tao
title: JPerceiver: Joint Perception Network for Depth, Pose and Layout Estimation in Driving Scenes
title_zh: JPerceiver：驾驶场景中深度、姿势和布局估计的联合感知网络
abstract: Depth estimation, visual odometry (VO), and bird's-eye-view (BEV) scene layout estimation present three critical tasks for driving scene perception, which is fundamental for motion planning and navigation in autonomous driving. Though they are complementary to each other, prior works usually focus on each individual task and rarely deal with all three tasks together. A naive way is to accomplish them independently in a sequential or parallel manner, but there are many drawbacks, i.e., 1) the depth and VO results suffer from the inherent scale ambiguity issue; 2) the BEV layout is directly predicted from the front-view image without using any depth-related information, although the depth map contains useful geometry clues for inferring scene layouts. In this paper, we address these issues by proposing a novel joint perception framework named JPerceiver, which can simultaneously estimate scale-aware depth and VO as well as BEV layout from a monocular video sequence. It exploits the cross-view geometric transformation (CGT) to propagate the absolute scale from the road layout to depth and VO based on a carefully-designed scale loss. Meanwhile, a cross-view and cross-modal transfer (CCT) module is devised to leverage the depth clues for reasoning road and vehicle layout through an attention mechanism. JPerceiver can be trained in an end-to-end multi-task learning way, where the CGT scale loss and CCT module promote inter-task knowledge transfer to benefit feature learning of each task. Experiments on Argoverse, Nuscenes and KITTI show the superiority of JPerceiver over existing methods on all the above three tasks in terms of accuracy, model size, and inference speed. The code and models are available at~\href{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}.
summary: Depth estimation, visual odometry (VO), and bird's-eye-view (BEV) scene layout estimation present three critical tasks for driving scene perception, which is fundamental for motion planning and navigation in autonomous driving. Though they are complementary to each other, prior works usually focus on each individual task and rarely deal with all three tasks together. A naive way is to accomplish them independently in a sequential or parallel manner, but there are many drawbacks, i.e., 1) the depth and VO results suffer from the inherent scale ambiguity issue; 2) the BEV layout is directly predicted from the front-view image without using any depth-related information, although the depth map contains useful geometry clues for inferring scene layouts. In this paper, we address these issues by proposing a novel joint perception framework named JPerceiver, which can simultaneously estimate scale-aware depth and VO as well as BEV layout from a monocular video sequence. It exploits the cross-view geometric transformation (CGT) to propagate the absolute scale from the road layout to depth and VO based on a carefully-designed scale loss. Meanwhile, a cross-view and cross-modal transfer (CCT) module is devised to leverage the depth clues for reasoning road and vehicle layout through an attention mechanism. JPerceiver can be trained in an end-to-end multi-task learning way, where the CGT scale loss and CCT module promote inter-task knowledge transfer to benefit feature learning of each task. Experiments on Argoverse, Nuscenes and KITTI show the superiority of JPerceiver over existing methods on all the above three tasks in terms of accuracy, model size, and inference speed. The code and models are available at~\href{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}.
abstract_zh: 深度估计、视觉里程计 (VO) 和鸟瞰图 (BEV) 场景布局估计提出了驾驶场景感知的三个关键任务，这对于自动驾驶中的运动规划和导航至关重要。尽管它们是相互补充的，但先前的工作通常专注于每个单独的任务，很少同时处理所有三个任务。一种简单的方法是以顺序或并行的方式独立完成它们，但存在很多缺点，即1）深度和VO结果受到固有的尺度模糊问题的影响； 2）尽管深度图包含用于推断场景布局的有用几何线索，但 BEV 布局是直接从前视图图像预测的，而不使用任何与深度相关的信息。在本文中，我们通过提出一种名为 JPerceiver 的新型联合感知框架来解决这些问题，该框架可以同时估计单目视频序列中的尺度感知深度和 VO 以及 BEV 布局。它利用交叉视图几何变换 (CGT)，根据精心设计的比例损失，将绝对比例从道路布局传播到深度和 VO。同时，设计了跨视图和跨模式传输（CCT）模块，以利用深度线索通过注意力机制推理道路和车辆布局。 JPerceiver 可以以端到端的多任务学习方式进行训练，其中 CGT 尺度损失和 CCT 模块促进任务间知识迁移，有利于每个任务的特征学习。在 Argoverse、Nuscenes 和 KITTI 上的实验表明，在上述三个任务上，JPerceiver 在准确性、模型大小和推理速度方面均优于现有方法。代码和模型可在~\href{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JPerceiver，一种联合感知网络，能够同时估计驾驶场景中的深度、视觉里程计和鸟瞰图布局。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常单独处理深度估计、视觉里程计和BEV布局估计，导致尺度模糊和未能有效利用深度信息进行布局推理。
AI.method: 设计了跨视角几何变换（CGT）模块传播尺度信息，并引入跨视角跨模态转换（CCT）模块通过注意力机制利用深度线索，实现端到端多任务学习。
AI.result: 在Argoverse、Nuscenes和KITTI数据集上，JPerceiver在精度、模型大小和推理速度上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化多任务感知框架能有效提升驾驶场景理解性能，代码已开源。
