The code and models are available at~\href{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}. 深度估计、视觉里程计 (VO) 和鸟瞰图 (BEV) 场景布局估计提出了驾驶场景感知的三个关键任务，这对于自动驾驶中的运动规划和导航至关重要。尽管它们是相互补充的，但先前的工作通常专注于每个单独的任务，很少同时处理所有三个任务。一种简单的方法是以顺序或并行的方式独立完成它们，但存在很多缺点，即1）深度和VO结果受到固有的尺度模糊问题的影响； 2）尽管深度图包含用于推断场景布局的有用几何线索，但 BEV 布局是直接从前视图图像预测的，而不使用任何与深度相关的信息。在本文中，我们通过提出一种名为 JPerceiver 的新型联合感知框架来解决这些问题，该框架可以同时估计单目视频序列中的尺度感知深度和 VO 以及 BEV 布局。它利用交叉视图几何变换 (CGT)，根据精心设计的比例损失，将绝对比例从道路布局传播到深度和 VO。同时，设计了跨视图和跨模式传输（CCT）模块，以利用深度线索通过注意力机制推理道路和车辆布局。 JPerceiver 可以以端到端的多任务学习方式进行训练，其中 CGT 尺度损失和 CCT 模块促进任务间知识迁移，有利于每个任务的特征学习。在 Argoverse、Nuscenes 和 KITTI 上的实验表明，在上述三个任务上，JPerceiver 在准确性、模型大小和推理速度方面均优于现有方法。代码和模型可在~\href{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}{https://github.com/sunnyHelen/JPerceiver}获取。 本文提出JPerceiver，一种联合感知网络，能够同时估计驾驶场景中的深度、视觉里程计和鸟瞰图布局。 Haimei Zhao,Jing Zhang,Sen Zhang,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Muhammad Abdullah Jamal,Omid Mohareri
title: Multi-Modal Unsupervised Pre-Training for Surgical Operating Room Workflow Analysis
title_zh: 外科手术室工作流程分析的多模式无监督预训练
comment: International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI'22)
comments: International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI'22)
abstract: Data-driven approaches to assist operating room (OR) workflow analysis depend on large curated datasets that are time consuming and expensive to collect. On the other hand, we see a recent paradigm shift from supervised learning to self-supervised and/or unsupervised learning approaches that can learn representations from unlabeled datasets. In this paper, we leverage the unlabeled data captured in robotic surgery ORs and propose a novel way to fuse the multi-modal data for a single video frame or image. Instead of producing different augmentations (or 'views') of the same image or video frame which is a common practice in self-supervised learning, we treat the multi-modal data as different views to train the model in an unsupervised manner via clustering. We compared our method with other state of the art methods and results show the superior performance of our approach on surgical video activity recognition and semantic segmentation.
summary: Data-driven approaches to assist operating room (OR) workflow analysis depend on large curated datasets that are time consuming and expensive to collect. On the other hand, we see a recent paradigm shift from supervised learning to self-supervised and/or unsupervised learning approaches that can learn representations from unlabeled datasets. In this paper, we leverage the unlabeled data captured in robotic surgery ORs and propose a novel way to fuse the multi-modal data for a single video frame or image. Instead of producing different augmentations (or 'views') of the same image or video frame which is a common practice in self-supervised learning, we treat the multi-modal data as different views to train the model in an unsupervised manner via clustering. We compared our method with other state of the art methods and results show the superior performance of our approach on surgical video activity recognition and semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 协助手术室 (OR) 工作流程分析的数据驱动方法依赖于收集起来耗时且昂贵的大型数据集。另一方面，我们看到最近的范式从监督学习转向自监督和/或无监督学习方法，可以从未标记的数据集中学习表示。在本文中，我们利用机器人手术室中捕获的未标记数据，提出了一种融合单个视频帧或图像的多模态数据的新方法。我们不是对同一图像或视频帧产生不同的增强（或“视图”），这是自监督学习中的常见做法，而是将多模态数据视为不同的视图，通过聚类以无监督的方式训练模型。我们将我们的方法与其他最先进的方法进行比较，结果表明我们的方法在手术视频活动识别和语义分割方面具有卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态无监督预训练方法，用于手术室工作流程分析，通过融合未标记的多模态数据提升手术视频活动识别和语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统手术室数据分析依赖昂贵的标注数据集，而无监督学习能有效利用未标记数据，且多模态数据融合可提升模型表征能力。
AI.method: 将多模态数据（如视频帧、图像等）视为不同视图，通过聚类方法进行无监督训练，无需数据增强即可融合多模态信息。
AI.result: 在手术视频活动识别和语义分割任务中，该方法优于现有先进算法，验证了多模态无监督预训练的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文创新性地提出多模态无监督预训练框架，为手术室数据分析提供了低成本、高效的数据利用方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Zhenchao Jin,Dongdong Yu,Luchuan Song,Zehuan Yuan,Lequan Yu
title: You Should Look at All Objects
title_zh: 你应该观察所有的物体
abstract: Feature pyramid network (FPN) is one of the key components for object detectors. However, there is a long-standing puzzle for researchers that the detection performance of large-scale objects are usually suppressed after introducing FPN. To this end, this paper first revisits FPN in the detection framework and reveals the nature of the success of FPN from the perspective of optimization. Then, we point out that the degraded performance of large-scale objects is due to the arising of improper back-propagation paths after integrating FPN. It makes each level of the backbone network only has the ability to look at the objects within a certain scale range. Based on these analysis, two feasible strategies are proposed to enable each level of the backbone to look at all objects in the FPN-based detection frameworks. Specifically, one is to introduce auxiliary objective functions to make each backbone level directly receive the back-propagation signals of various-scale objects during training. The other is to construct the feature pyramid in a more reasonable way to avoid the irrational back-propagation paths. Extensive experiments on the COCO benchmark validate the soundness of our analysis and the effectiveness of our methods. Without bells and whistles, we demonstrate that our method achieves solid improvements (more than 2%) on various detection frameworks: one-stage, two-stage, anchor-based, anchor-free and transformer-based detectors.
summary: Feature pyramid network (FPN) is one of the key components for object detectors. However, there is a long-standing puzzle for researchers that the detection performance of large-scale objects are usually suppressed after introducing FPN. To this end, this paper first revisits FPN in the detection framework and reveals the nature of the success of FPN from the perspective of optimization. Then, we point out that the degraded performance of large-scale objects is due to the arising of improper back-propagation paths after integrating FPN. It makes each level of the backbone network only has the ability to look at the objects within a certain scale range. Based on these analysis, two feasible strategies are proposed to enable each level of the backbone to look at all objects in the FPN-based detection frameworks. Specifically, one is to introduce auxiliary objective functions to make each backbone level directly receive the back-propagation signals of various-scale objects during training. The other is to construct the feature pyramid in a more reasonable way to avoid the irrational back-propagation paths. Extensive experiments on the COCO benchmark validate the soundness of our analysis and the effectiveness of our methods. Without bells and whistles, we demonstrate that our method achieves solid improvements (more than 2%) on various detection frameworks: one-stage, two-stage, anchor-based, anchor-free and transformer-based detectors.
abstract_zh: 特征金字塔网络（FPN）是目标检测器的关键组件之一。然而，长期以来困扰研究人员的一个难题是，引入 FPN 后，大尺寸物体的检测性能通常会受到抑制。为此，本文首先重新审视检测框架中的 FPN，并从优化的角度揭示了 FPN 成功的本质。然后，我们指出，大规模物体的性能下降是由于集成 FPN 后出现不正确的反向传播路径。它使得每一级骨干网络只能看到一定尺度范围内的物体。基于这些分析，提出了两种可行的策略，使骨干网的每个级别都能查看基于 FPN 的检测框架中的所有对象。具体来说，一是引入辅助目标函数，使每个骨干层在训练时直接接收各种尺度物体的反向传播信号。二是以更合理的方式构建特征金字塔，避免不合理的反向传播路径。对 COCO 基准的大量实验验证了我们分析的合理性和方法的有效性。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们证明了我们的方法在各种检测框架上实现了扎实的改进（超过 2%）：一级、两级、基于锚点、无锚点和基于变压器的检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文针对特征金字塔网络（FPN）在目标检测中导致大尺度物体性能下降的问题，提出改进方法以提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: FPN作为目标检测的关键组件，其引入后大尺度物体的检测性能常被抑制，现有研究未明确其根本原因及解决方案。
AI.method: 通过优化视角分析FPN成功本质，提出两种策略：1）引入辅助目标函数使骨干网络各层级直接接收多尺度物体的反向传播信号；2）重构特征金字塔以消除不合理反向传播路径。
AI.result: 在COCO基准测试中，方法在单阶段、两阶段、基于锚点/无锚点及Transformer的检测框架上均实现超过2%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 分析揭示了FPN退化根源，所提方法有效解决了大尺度物体检测抑制问题，适用于多种检测框架。

authors_text: Juan Gómez-Luna,Yuxin Guo,Sylvan Brocard,Julien Legriel,Remy Cimadomo,Geraldo F. Oliveira,Gagandeep Singh,Onur Mutlu
title: An Experimental Evaluation of Machine Learning Training on a Real Processing-in-Memory System
title_zh: 真实内存处理系统上机器学习训练的实验评估
comment: Our open-source software is available at https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/pim-ml
comments: Our open-source software is available at https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/pim-ml
abstract: Training machine learning (ML) algorithms is a computationally intensive process, which is frequently memory-bound due to repeatedly accessing large training datasets. As a result, processor-centric systems (e.g., CPU, GPU) suffer from costly data movement between memory units and processing units, which consumes large amounts of energy and execution cycles. Memory-centric computing systems, i.e., with processing-in-memory (PIM) capabilities, can alleviate this data movement bottleneck. Our goal is to understand the potential of modern general-purpose PIM architectures to accelerate ML training. To do so, we (1) implement several representative classic ML algorithms (namely, linear regression, logistic regression, decision tree, K-Means clustering) on a real-world general-purpose PIM architecture, (2) rigorously evaluate and characterize them in terms of accuracy, performance and scaling, and (3) compare to their counterpart implementations on CPU and GPU. Our evaluation on a real memory-centric computing system with more than 2500 PIM cores shows that general-purpose PIM architectures can greatly accelerate memory-bound ML workloads, when the necessary operations and datatypes are natively supported by PIM hardware. For example, our PIM implementation of decision tree is $27\times$ faster than a state-of-the-art CPU version on an 8-core Intel Xeon, and $1.34\times$ faster than a state-of-the-art GPU version on an NVIDIA A100. Our K-Means clustering on PIM is $2.8\times$ and $3.2\times$ than state-of-the-art CPU and GPU versions, respectively. To our knowledge, our work is the first one to evaluate ML training on a real-world PIM architecture. We conclude with key observations, takeaways, and recommendations that can inspire users of ML workloads, programmers of PIM architectures, and hardware designers & architects of future memory-centric computing systems.

Memory-centric computing systems, i.e., with processing-in-memory (PIM) capabilities, can alleviate this data movement bottleneck. Our goal is to understand the potential of modern general-purpose PIM architectures to accelerate ML training. To do so, we (1) implement several representative classic ML algorithms (namely, linear regression, logistic regression, decision tree, K-Means clustering) on a real-world general-purpose PIM architecture, (2) rigorously evaluate and characterize them in terms of accuracy, performance and scaling, and (3) compare to their counterpart implementations on CPU and GPU. For example, our PIM implementation of decision tree is $27\times$ faster than a state-of-the-art CPU version on an 8-core Intel Xeon, and $1.34\times$ faster than a state-of-the-art GPU version on an NVIDIA A100. Our K-Means clustering on PIM is $2.8\times$ and $3.2\times$ than state-of-the-art CPU and GPU versions, respectively. To our knowledge, our work is the first one to evaluate ML training on a real-world PIM architecture. We conclude with key observations, takeaways, and recommendations that can inspire users of ML workloads, programmers of PIM architectures, and hardware designers & architects of future memory-centric computing systems.
abstract_zh: 训练机器学习 (ML) 算法是一个计算密集型过程，由于重复访问大型训练数据集，该过程经常会受到内存限制。因此，以处理器为中心的系统（例如 CPU、GPU）会遭受内存单元和处理单元之间昂贵的数据移动的困扰，这会消耗大量的能量和执行周期。以内存为中心的计算系统，即具有内存处理（PIM）功能，可以缓解这种数据移动瓶颈。我们的目标是了解现代通用 PIM 架构在加速 ML 训练方面的潜力。为此，我们 (1) 在现实世界的通用 PIM 架构上实现了几种代表性的经典 ML 算法（即线性回归、逻辑回归、决策树、K 均值聚类），(2) 在准确性、性能和扩展方面严格评估和表征它们，以及 (3) 与 CPU 和 GPU 上的对应实现进行比较。我们对具有超过 2500 个 PIM 核心的真正以内存为中心的计算系统的评估表明，当 PIM 硬件本机支持必要的操作和数据类型时，通用 PIM 架构可以极大地加速受内存限制的 ML 工作负载。例如，我们的决策树 PIM 实现比 8 核 Intel Xeon 上最先进的 CPU 版本快 27 倍，比 NVIDIA A100 上最先进的 GPU 版本快 1.34 倍。我们在 PIM 上的 K-Means 集群分别比最先进的 CPU 和 GPU 版本便宜 2.8 倍和 3.2 倍。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个评估真实 PIM 架构上的 ML 训练的工作。最后，我们提出了重要的观察结果、要点和建议，这些可以激励 ML 工作负载的用户、PIM 架构的程序员以及未来以内存为中心的计算系统的硬件设计师和架构师。

AI.tldr: 本文在真实处理-in-内存（PIM）系统上评估机器学习训练性能，并与CPU和GPU进行对比。
AI.motivation: 传统处理器系统因频繁数据移动导致机器学习训练效率低下，而PIM架构可能通过减少数据移动瓶颈提升性能。
AI.method: 实现线性回归、逻辑回归、决策树和K-Means聚类算法于真实PIM架构，评估其准确性、性能及扩展性，并与CPU/GPU版本对比。
AI.result: PIM实现的决策树比8核Intel Xeon CPU快27倍，比NVIDIA A100 GPU快1.34倍；K-Means聚类分别比CPU和GPU快2.8倍和3.2倍。
AI.conclusion: 通用PIM架构在支持原生操作时可显著加速内存密集型机器学习任务，为未来内存计算系统设计提供关键见解与建议。

search_text: An Experimental Evaluation of Machine Learning Training on a Real Processing-in-Memory System 真实内存处理系统上机器学习训练的实验评估 Training machine learning (ML) algorithms is a computationally intensive process, which is frequently memory-bound due to repeatedly accessing large training datasets. As a result, processor-centric systems (e.g., CPU, GPU) suffer from costly data movement between memory units and processing units, which consumes large amounts of energy and execution cycles. Memory-centric computing systems, i.e., with processing-in-memory (PIM) capabilities, can alleviate this data movement bottleneck. Our goal is to understand the potential of modern general-purpose PIM architectures to accelerate ML training. To do so, we (1) implement several representative classic ML algorithms (namely, linear regression, logistic regression, decision tree, K-Means clustering) on a real-world general-purpose PIM architecture, (2) rigorously evaluate and characterize them in terms of accuracy, performance and scaling, and (3) compare to their counterpart implementations on CPU and GPU. Our evaluation on a real memory-centric computing system with more than 2500 PIM cores shows that general-purpose PIM architectures can greatly accelerate memory-bound ML workloads, when the necessary operations and datatypes are natively supported by PIM hardware. For example, our PIM implementation of decision tree is $27\times$ faster than a state-of-the-art CPU version on an 8-core Intel Xeon, and $1.34\times$ faster than a state-of-the-art GPU version on an NVIDIA A100. To our knowledge, our work is the first one to evaluate ML training on a real-world PIM architecture. We conclude with key observations, takeaways, and recommendations that can inspire users of ML workloads, programmers of PIM architectures, and hardware designers & architects of future memory-centric computing systems. 训练机器学习 (ML) 算法是一个计算密集型过程，由于重复访问大型训练数据集，该过程经常会受到内存限制。因此，以处理器为中心的系统（例如 CPU、GPU）会遭受内存单元和处理单元之间昂贵的数据移动的困扰，这会消耗大量的能量和执行周期。以内存为中心的计算系统，即具有内存处理（PIM）功能，可以缓解这种数据移动瓶颈。我们的目标是了解现代通用 PIM 架构在加速 ML 训练方面的潜力。为此，我们 (1) 在现实世界的通用 PIM 架构上实现了几种代表性的经典 ML 算法（即线性回归、逻辑回归、决策树、K 均值聚类），(2) 在准确性、性能和扩展方面严格评估和表征它们，以及 (3) 与 CPU 和 GPU 上的对应实现进行比较。我们对具有超过 2500 个 PIM 核心的真正以内存为中心的计算系统的评估表明，当 PIM 硬件本机支持必要的操作和数据类型时，通用 PIM 架构可以极大地加速受内存限制的 ML 工作负载。例如，我们的决策树 PIM 实现比 8 核 Intel Xeon 上最先进的 CPU 版本快 27 倍，比 NVIDIA A100 上最先进的 GPU 版本快 1.34 倍。我们在 PIM 上的 K-Means 集群分别比最先进的 CPU 和 GPU 版本便宜 2.8 倍和 3.2 倍。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个评估真实 PIM 架构上的 ML 训练的工作。最后，我们提出了重要的观察结果、要点和建议，这些可以激励 ML 工作负载的用户、PIM 架构的程序员以及未来以内存为中心的计算系统的硬件设计师和架构师。 本文在真实处理-in-内存（PIM）系统上评估机器学习训练性能，并与CPU和GPU进行对比。 Juan Gómez-Luna,Yuxin Guo,Sylvan Brocard,Julien Legriel,Remy Cimadomo,Geraldo F. authors_text: Jingjia Huang,Yinan Li,Jiashi Feng,Xinglong Wu,Xiaoshuai Sun,Rongrong Ji
title: Clover: Towards A Unified Video-Language Alignment and Fusion Model
title_zh: Clover：迈向统一的视频语言对齐和融合模型
abstract: Building a universal Video-Language model for solving various video understanding tasks (\emph{e.g.}, text-video retrieval, video question answering) is an open challenge to the machine learning field. Towards this goal, most recent works build the model by stacking uni-modal and cross-modal feature encoders and train it with pair-wise contrastive pre-text tasks. Though offering attractive generality, the resulted models have to compromise between efficiency and performance. They mostly adopt different architectures to deal with different downstream tasks. We find this is because the pair-wise training cannot well \emph{align} and \emph{fuse} features from different modalities. We then introduce \textbf{Clover}\textemdash a Correlated Video-Language pre-training method\textemdash towards a universal Video-Language model for solving multiple video understanding tasks with neither performance nor efficiency compromise. It improves cross-modal feature alignment and fusion via a novel tri-modal alignment pre-training task. Additionally, we propose to enhance the tri-modal alignment via incorporating learning from semantic masked samples and a new pair-wise ranking loss. Clover establishes new state-of-the-arts on multiple downstream tasks, including three retrieval tasks for both zero-shot and fine-tuning settings, and eight video question answering tasks. Codes and pre-trained models will be released at \url{https://github.com/LeeYN-43/Clover}.
summary: Building a universal Video-Language model for solving various video understanding tasks (\emph{e.g.}, text-video retrieval, video question answering) is an open challenge to the machine learning field. Towards this goal, most recent works build the model by stacking uni-modal and cross-modal feature encoders and train it with pair-wise contrastive pre-text tasks. Though offering attractive generality, the resulted models have to compromise between efficiency and performance. They mostly adopt different architectures to deal with different downstream tasks. We find this is because the pair-wise training cannot well \emph{align} and \emph{fuse} features from different modalities. We then introduce \textbf{Clover}\textemdash a Correlated Video-Language pre-training method\textemdash towards a universal Video-Language model for solving multiple video understanding tasks with neither performance nor efficiency compromise. It improves cross-modal feature alignment and fusion via a novel tri-modal alignment pre-training task. Additionally, we propose to enhance the tri-modal alignment via incorporating learning from semantic masked samples and a new pair-wise ranking loss. Clover establishes new state-of-the-arts on multiple downstream tasks, including three retrieval tasks for both zero-shot and fine-tuning settings, and eight video question answering tasks. Codes and pre-trained models will be released at \url{https://github.com/LeeYN-43/Clover}.
abstract_zh: 构建通用视频语言模型来解决各种视频理解任务（\emph{e.g.}、文本视频检索、视频问答）是机器学习领域的一个公开挑战。为了实现这一目标，最近的工作通过堆叠单模态和跨模态特征编码器来构建模型，并使用成对对比前置文本任务对其进行训练。尽管提供了有吸引力的通用性，但最终的模型必须在效率和性能之间进行折衷。他们大多采用不同的架构来处理不同的下游任务。我们发现这是因为成对训练不能很好地融合不同模态的 emph{align} 和 \emph{fuse} 特征。然后，我们引入了 \textbf{Clover}\textemdash 一种相关视频语言预训练方法\textemdash，以实现通用视频语言模型，用于解决多个视频理解任务，而不会影响性能或效率。它通过新颖的三模态对齐预训练任务改进了跨模态特征对齐和融合。此外，我们建议通过结合语义屏蔽样本的学习和新的成对排名损失来增强三模态对齐。 Clover 在多个下游任务上建立了新的最先进技术，包括三个用于零样本和微调设置的检索任务，以及八个视频问答任务。代码和预训练模型将在 \url{https://github.com/LeeYN-43/Clover} 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Clover模型，旨在通过统一的视频-语言对齐与融合方法，解决多任务视频理解问题，兼顾效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通过堆叠单模态和跨模态编码器并使用成对对比任务进行训练，但难以有效对齐和融合不同模态特征，导致效率与性能无法兼得。
AI.method: 引入三模态对齐预训练任务，结合语义掩码样本学习和新型成对排序损失，提升跨模态特征对齐与融合效果。
AI.result: 在三种零样本和微调设置的检索任务及八种视频问答任务中均取得新的最先进成果。
AI.conclusion: Clover通过改进的预训练方法实现了多任务视频理解的性能与效率平衡，代码和预训练模型已开源。

authors_text: Diane Wagner,Fabio Ferreira,Danny Stoll,Robin Tibor Schirrmeister,Samuel Müller,Frank Hutter
title: On the Importance of Hyperparameters and Data Augmentation for Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 论超参数和数据增强对于自监督学习的重要性
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2022 Pre-training Workshop
comments: Accepted at the ICML 2022 Pre-training Workshop
abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has become a very active area of Deep Learning research where it is heavily used as a pre-training method for classification and other tasks. However, the rapid pace of advancements in this area comes at a price: training pipelines vary significantly across papers, which presents a potentially crucial confounding factor. Here, we show that, indeed, the choice of hyperparameters and data augmentation strategies can have a dramatic impact on performance. To shed light on these neglected factors and help maximize the power of SSL, we hyperparameterize these components and optimize them with Bayesian optimization, showing improvements across multiple datasets for the SimSiam SSL approach. Realizing the importance of data augmentations for SSL, we also introduce a new automated data augmentation algorithm, GroupAugment, which considers groups of augmentations and optimizes the sampling across groups. In contrast to algorithms designed for supervised learning, GroupAugment achieved consistently high linear evaluation accuracy across all datasets we considered. Overall, our results indicate the importance and likely underestimated role of data augmentation for SSL.
summary: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has become a very active area of Deep Learning research where it is heavily used as a pre-training method for classification and other tasks. However, the rapid pace of advancements in this area comes at a price: training pipelines vary significantly across papers, which presents a potentially crucial confounding factor. Here, we show that, indeed, the choice of hyperparameters and data augmentation strategies can have a dramatic impact on performance. To shed light on these neglected factors and help maximize the power of SSL, we hyperparameterize these components and optimize them with Bayesian optimization, showing improvements across multiple datasets for the SimSiam SSL approach. Realizing the importance of data augmentations for SSL, we also introduce a new automated data augmentation algorithm, GroupAugment, which considers groups of augmentations and optimizes the sampling across groups. In contrast to algorithms designed for supervised learning, GroupAugment achieved consistently high linear evaluation accuracy across all datasets we considered. Overall, our results indicate the importance and likely underestimated role of data augmentation for SSL.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）已成为深度学习研究的一个非常活跃的领域，它被大量用作分类和其他任务的预训练方法。然而，这一领域的快速进步是有代价的：不同论文的训练流程差异很大，这提出了一个潜在的关键混杂因素。在这里，我们证明，超参数和数据增强策略的选择确实可以对性能产生巨大影响。为了阐明这些被忽视的因素并帮助最大限度地发挥 SSL 的威力，我们对这些组件进行了超参数化，并通过贝叶斯优化对其进行了优化，展示了 SimSiam SSL 方法在多个数据集上的改进。认识到数据增强对 SSL 的重要性，我们还引入了一种新的自动数据增强算法 GroupAugment，该算法考虑增强组并优化跨组采样。与为监督学习设计的算法相比，GroupAugment 在我们考虑的所有数据集上都实现了一致的高线性评估精度。总的来说，我们的结果表明 SSL 数据增强的重要性和可能被低估的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督学习中超参数和数据增强策略的重要性，并提出了优化方法以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习的训练流程差异较大，可能导致性能差异的关键因素被忽视，需明确超参数和数据增强的影响。
AI.method: 通过贝叶斯优化调整超参数和数据增强策略，并提出针对自监督学习的自动化数据增强算法GroupAugment。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上改进了SimSiam方法的性能，GroupAugment在所有数据集上均实现了高线性评估准确率。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强在自监督学习中具有重要但被低估的作用，优化相关策略可显著提升模型效果。

search_text: On the Importance of Hyperparameters and Data Augmentation for Self-Supervised Learning 论超参数和数据增强对于自监督学习的重要性 Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has become a very active area of Deep Learning research where it is heavily used as a pre-training method for classification and other tasks. However, the rapid pace of advancements in this area comes at a price: training pipelines vary significantly across papers, which presents a potentially crucial confounding factor. Here, we show that, indeed, the choice of hyperparameters and data augmentation strategies can have a dramatic impact on performance. To shed light on these neglected factors and help maximize the power of SSL, we hyperparameterize these components and optimize them with Bayesian optimization, showing improvements across multiple datasets for the SimSiam SSL approach. Realizing the importance of data augmentations for SSL, we also introduce a new automated data augmentation algorithm, GroupAugment, which considers groups of augmentations and optimizes the sampling across groups. In contrast to algorithms designed for supervised learning, GroupAugment achieved consistently high linear evaluation accuracy across all datasets we considered. Overall, our results indicate the importance and likely underestimated role of data augmentation for SSL. 自监督学习（SSL）已成为深度学习研究的一个非常活跃的领域，它被大量用作分类和其他任务的预训练方法。然而，这一领域的快速进步是有代价的：不同论文的训练流程差异很大，这提出了一个潜在的关键混杂因素。在这里，我们证明，超参数和数据增强策略的选择确实可以对性能产生巨大影响。为了阐明这些被忽视的因素并帮助最大限度地发挥 SSL 的威力，我们对这些组件进行了超参数化，并通过贝叶斯优化对其进行了优化，展示了 SimSiam SSL 方法在多个数据集上的改进。认识到数据增强对 SSL 的重要性，我们还引入了一种新的自动数据增强算法 GroupAugment，该算法考虑增强组并优化跨组采样。与为监督学习设计的算法相比，GroupAugment 在我们考虑的所有数据集上都实现了一致的高线性评估精度。总的来说，我们的结果表明 SSL 数据增强的重要性和可能被低估的作用。 本文研究了自监督学习中超参数和数据增强策略的重要性，并提出了优化方法以提升性能。 Diane Wagner,Fabio Ferreira,Danny Stoll,Robin Tibor Schirrmeister,Samuel Müller,Frank Hutter cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Luca Cavalli,Marc Pollefeys,Daniel Barath
title: NeFSAC: Neurally Filtered Minimal Samples
title_zh: NeFSAC：神经过滤最小样本
comment: Published in the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
comments: Published in the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
abstract: Since RANSAC, a great deal of research has been devoted to improving both its accuracy and run-time. Still, only a few methods aim at recognizing invalid minimal samples early, before the often expensive model estimation and quality calculation are done. To this end, we propose NeFSAC, an efficient algorithm for neural filtering of motion-inconsistent and poorly-conditioned minimal samples. We train NeFSAC to predict the probability of a minimal sample leading to an accurate relative pose, only based on the pixel coordinates of the image correspondences. Our neural filtering model learns typical motion patterns of samples which lead to unstable poses, and regularities in the possible motions to favour well-conditioned and likely-correct samples. The novel lightweight architecture implements the main invariants of minimal samples for pose estimation, and a novel training scheme addresses the problem of extreme class imbalance. NeFSAC can be plugged into any existing RANSAC-based pipeline. We integrate it into USAC and show that it consistently provides strong speed-ups even under extreme train-test domain gaps - for example, the model trained for the autonomous driving scenario works on PhotoTourism too. We tested NeFSAC on more than 100k image pairs from three publicly available real-world datasets and found that it leads to one order of magnitude speed-up, while often finding more accurate results than USAC alone. The source code is available at https://github.com/cavalli1234/NeFSAC.
summary: Since RANSAC, a great deal of research has been devoted to improving both its accuracy and run-time. Still, only a few methods aim at recognizing invalid minimal samples early, before the often expensive model estimation and quality calculation are done. To this end, we propose NeFSAC, an efficient algorithm for neural filtering of motion-inconsistent and poorly-conditioned minimal samples. We train NeFSAC to predict the probability of a minimal sample leading to an accurate relative pose, only based on the pixel coordinates of the image correspondences. Our neural filtering model learns typical motion patterns of samples which lead to unstable poses, and regularities in the possible motions to favour well-conditioned and likely-correct samples. The novel lightweight architecture implements the main invariants of minimal samples for pose estimation, and a novel training scheme addresses the problem of extreme class imbalance. NeFSAC can be plugged into any existing RANSAC-based pipeline. We integrate it into USAC and show that it consistently provides strong speed-ups even under extreme train-test domain gaps - for example, the model trained for the autonomous driving scenario works on PhotoTourism too. We tested NeFSAC on more than 100k image pairs from three publicly available real-world datasets and found that it leads to one order of magnitude speed-up, while often finding more accurate results than USAC alone. The source code is available at https://github.com/cavalli1234/NeFSAC.
abstract_zh: 自 RANSAC 以来，大量研究致力于提高其准确性和运行时间。尽管如此，只有少数方法旨在在通常昂贵的模型估计和质量计算完成之前尽早识别无效的最小样本。为此，我们提出了 NeFSAC，一种用于对运动不一致和条件不良的最小样本进行神经过滤的有效算法。我们训练 NeFSAC 仅基于图像对应的像素坐标来预测最小样本导致准确相对姿势的概率。我们的神经过滤模型学习导致不稳定姿势的样本的典型运动模式，以及可能运动的规律性，以支持条件良好且可能正确的样本。新颖的轻量级架构实现了姿态估计的最小样本的主要不变量，并且新颖的训练方案解决了极端类别不平衡的问题。 NeFSAC 可以插入任何现有的基于 RANSAC 的管道。我们将其集成到 USAC 中，并表明即使在极端的训练测试域差距下，它也能始终提供强大的加速 - 例如，为自动驾驶场景训练的模型也适用于 PhotoTourism。我们在来自三个公开可用的真实数据集的超过 10 万个图像对上测试了 NeFSAC，发现它可以带来一个数量级的加速，同时通常会发现比单独使用 USAC 更准确的结果。源代码可在 https://github.com/cavalli1234/NeFSAC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeFSAC算法，通过神经网络过滤运动不一致和条件不佳的最小样本，提升RANSAC类算法的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统RANSAC方法在模型估计前缺乏对无效最小样本的早期识别，导致计算资源浪费，而现有方法对此关注不足。
AI.method: 训练神经网络仅基于图像对应点的像素坐标预测样本有效性，采用轻量级架构捕捉运动模式不变性，并设计应对类别不平衡的训练方案。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集的10万+图像对测试中，NeFSAC实现10倍加速且精度优于USAC，且跨领域（如自动驾驶到PhotoTourism）表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: NeFSAC通过神经过滤有效提升RANSAC效率，其领域适应性与轻量化设计使其可广泛集成于现有视觉流水线。

authors_text: Yuhong Deng,Qie Sima,Di Guo,Huaping Liu,Yi Wang,Fuchun Sun
title: Scene Graph for Embodied Exploration in Cluttered Scenario
title_zh: 用于杂乱场景中的具体探索的场景图
abstract: The ability to handle objects in cluttered environment has been long anticipated by robotic community. However, most of works merely focus on manipulation instead of rendering hidden semantic information in cluttered objects. In this work, we introduce the scene graph for embodied exploration in cluttered scenarios to solve this problem. To validate our method in cluttered scenario, we adopt the Manipulation Question Answering (MQA) tasks as our test benchmark, which requires an embodied robot to have the active exploration ability and semantic understanding ability of vision and language.As a general solution framework to the task, we propose an imitation learning method to generate manipulations for exploration. Meanwhile, a VQA model based on dynamic scene graph is adopted to comprehend a series of RGB frames from wrist camera of manipulator along with every step of manipulation is conducted to answer questions in our framework.The experiments on of MQA dataset with different interaction requirements demonstrate that our proposed framework is effective for MQA task a representative of tasks in cluttered scenario.
summary: The ability to handle objects in cluttered environment has been long anticipated by robotic community. However, most of works merely focus on manipulation instead of rendering hidden semantic information in cluttered objects. In this work, we introduce the scene graph for embodied exploration in cluttered scenarios to solve this problem. To validate our method in cluttered scenario, we adopt the Manipulation Question Answering (MQA) tasks as our test benchmark, which requires an embodied robot to have the active exploration ability and semantic understanding ability of vision and language.As a general solution framework to the task, we propose an imitation learning method to generate manipulations for exploration. Meanwhile, a VQA model based on dynamic scene graph is adopted to comprehend a series of RGB frames from wrist camera of manipulator along with every step of manipulation is conducted to answer questions in our framework.The experiments on of MQA dataset with different interaction requirements demonstrate that our proposed framework is effective for MQA task a representative of tasks in cluttered scenario.
abstract_zh: 机器人界长期以来一直期待能够在杂乱的环境中处理物体。然而，大多数作品仅仅关注于操作，而不是在杂乱的对象中呈现隐藏的语义信息。在这项工作中，我们引入了场景图来在杂乱的场景中进行具体探索来解决这个问题。为了在杂乱场景中验证我们的方法，我们采用操作问答（MQA）任务作为我们的测试基准，这要求实体机器人具有主动探索能力以及视觉和语言的语义理解能力。作为该任务的通用解决方案框架，我们提出了一种模仿学习方法来生成探索操作。同时，采用基于动态场景图的 VQA 模型来理解来自机械臂手腕摄像头的一系列 RGB 帧，并进行每一步操作，以回答我们框架中的问题。在具有不同交互要求的 MQA 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们提出的框架对于代表杂乱场景中任务的 MQA 任务是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于场景图的框架，用于解决杂乱场景中具身机器人的探索与语义理解问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注物体操作而非杂乱环境中隐藏的语义信息，导致机器人缺乏主动探索与语义理解能力。
AI.method: 采用模仿学习生成探索操作，并结合动态场景图的VQA模型处理机械臂腕部相机的RGB图像序列及操作步骤以回答问题。
AI.result: 在MQA数据集上验证了框架有效性，证明其能有效处理不同交互需求的杂乱场景任务。
AI.conclusion: 场景图框架为具身探索提供了通用解决方案，展示了语义理解与操作结合在复杂环境中的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于场景图的框架，用于解决杂乱场景中具身机器人的探索与语义理解问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有研究多关注物体操作而非杂乱环境中隐藏的语义信息，导致机器人缺乏主动探索与语义理解能力。
ai_content.method: 采用模仿学习生成探索操作，并结合动态场景图的VQA模型处理机械臂腕部相机的RGB图像序列及操作步骤以回答问题。
ai_content.result: 在MQA数据集上验证了框架有效性，证明其能有效处理不同交互需求的杂乱场景任务。
ai_content.conclusion: 场景图框架为具身探索提供了通用解决方案，展示了语义理解与操作结合在复杂环境中的潜力。

search_text: Scene Graph for Embodied Exploration in Cluttered Scenario 用于杂乱场景中的具体探索的场景图 The ability to handle objects in cluttered environment has been long anticipated by robotic community. However, most of works merely focus on manipulation instead of rendering hidden semantic information in cluttered objects. In this work, we introduce the scene graph for embodied exploration in cluttered scenarios to solve this problem. To validate our method in cluttered scenario, we adopt the Manipulation Question Answering (MQA) tasks as our test benchmark, which requires an embodied robot to have the active exploration ability and semantic understanding ability of vision and language.As a general solution framework to the task, we propose an imitation learning method to generate manipulations for exploration. Meanwhile, a VQA model based on dynamic scene graph is adopted to comprehend a series of RGB frames from wrist camera of manipulator along with every step of manipulation is conducted to answer questions in our framework.The experiments on of MQA dataset with different interaction requirements demonstrate that our proposed framework is effective for MQA task a representative of tasks in cluttered scenario. 机器人界长期以来一直期待能够在杂乱的环境中处理物体。然而，大多数作品仅仅关注于操作，而不是在杂乱的对象中呈现隐藏的语义信息。在这项工作中，我们引入了场景图来在杂乱的场景中进行具体探索来解决这个问题。为了在杂乱场景中验证我们的方法，我们采用操作问答（MQA）任务作为我们的测试基准，这要求实体机器人具有主动探索能力以及视觉和语言的语义理解能力。作为该任务的通用解决方案框架，我们提出了一种模仿学习方法来生成探索操作。同时，采用基于动态场景图的 VQA 模型来理解来自机械臂手腕摄像头的一系列 RGB 帧，并进行每一步操作，以回答我们框架中的问题。在具有不同交互要求的 MQA 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们提出的框架对于代表杂乱场景中任务的 MQA 任务是有效的。 本文提出一种基于场景图的框架，用于解决杂乱场景中具身机器人的探索与语义理解问题。 Yuhong Deng,Qie Sima,Di Guo,Huaping Liu,Yi Wang,Fuchun Sun cs.RO

authors_text: Shunli Wang,Shuaibing Wang,Bo Jiao,Dingkang Yang,Liuzhen Su,Peng Zhai,Chixiao Chen,Lihua Zhang
title: CA-SpaceNet: Counterfactual Analysis for 6D Pose Estimation in Space
title_zh: CA-SpaceNet：空间 6D 姿态估计的反事实分析
abstract: Reliable and stable 6D pose estimation of uncooperative space objects plays an essential role in on-orbit servicing and debris removal missions. Considering that the pose estimator is sensitive to background interference, this paper proposes a counterfactual analysis framework named CASpaceNet to complete robust 6D pose estimation of the spaceborne targets under complicated background. Specifically, conventional methods are adopted to extract the features of the whole image in the factual case. In the counterfactual case, a non-existent image without the target but only the background is imagined. Side effect caused by background interference is reduced by counterfactual analysis, which leads to unbiased prediction in final results. In addition, we also carry out lowbit-width quantization for CA-SpaceNet and deploy part of the framework to a Processing-In-Memory (PIM) accelerator on FPGA. Qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed method. To our best knowledge, this paper applies causal inference and network quantization to the 6D pose estimation of space-borne targets for the first time. The code is available at https://github.com/Shunli-Wang/CA-SpaceNet.
summary: Reliable and stable 6D pose estimation of uncooperative space objects plays an essential role in on-orbit servicing and debris removal missions. Considering that the pose estimator is sensitive to background interference, this paper proposes a counterfactual analysis framework named CASpaceNet to complete robust 6D pose estimation of the spaceborne targets under complicated background. Specifically, conventional methods are adopted to extract the features of the whole image in the factual case. In the counterfactual case, a non-existent image without the target but only the background is imagined. Side effect caused by background interference is reduced by counterfactual analysis, which leads to unbiased prediction in final results. In addition, we also carry out lowbit-width quantization for CA-SpaceNet and deploy part of the framework to a Processing-In-Memory (PIM) accelerator on FPGA. Qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed method. To our best knowledge, this paper applies causal inference and network quantization to the 6D pose estimation of space-borne targets for the first time. The code is available at https://github.com/Shunli-Wang/CA-SpaceNet.
abstract_zh: 对不合作空间物体进行可靠且稳定的 6D 位姿估计在在轨服务和碎片清除任务中发挥着至关重要的作用。考虑到位姿估计器对背景干扰敏感，本文提出了一种名为CASpaceNet的反事实分析框架，以完成复杂背景下星载目标的鲁棒6维位姿估计。具体而言，采用常规方法提取实际情况下整幅图像的特征。在反事实情况下，想象出一个不存在的图像，没有目标，只有背景。通过反事实分析减少了背景干扰造成的副作用，从而导致最终结果的公正预测。此外，我们还对CA-SpaceNet进行低位宽量化，并将部分框架部署到FPGA上的PIM加速器上。定性和定量结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性和效率。据我们所知，本文首次将因果推理和网络量化应用于星载目标的6D位姿估计。代码可在 https://github.com/Shunli-Wang/CA-SpaceNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CA-SpaceNet框架，通过反事实分析实现复杂背景下空间目标的鲁棒6D位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 空间目标6D位姿估计易受背景干扰影响，现有方法在复杂背景下稳定性不足，需提升估计可靠性以支持在轨服务与碎片清除任务。
AI.method: 采用反事实分析框架：实际场景中提取全图特征，反事实场景中构建无目标仅含背景的虚拟图像，通过对比消除背景干扰；结合低比特量化并在FPGA的PIM加速器部署部分模块。
AI.result: 定性和定量实验验证方法有效性与效率，首次将因果推理与网络量化应用于空间目标6D位姿估计，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CA-SpaceNet通过反事实分析与硬件加速有效提升空间目标位姿估计鲁棒性，为相关任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Zixuan Zhou,Xuefei Ning,Yi Cai,Jiashu Han,Yiping Deng,Yuhan Dong,Huazhong Yang,Yu Wang
title: CLOSE: Curriculum Learning On the Sharing Extent Towards Better One-shot NAS
title_zh: 关闭：关于共享程度的课程学习，以实现更好的一次性 NAS
comment: accepted by ECCV 2022 (14 pages main texts)
comments: accepted by ECCV 2022 (14 pages main texts)
abstract: One-shot Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has been widely used to discover architectures due to its efficiency. However, previous studies reveal that one-shot performance estimations of architectures might not be well correlated with their performances in stand-alone training because of the excessive sharing of operation parameters (i.e., large sharing extent) between architectures. Thus, recent methods construct even more over-parameterized supernets to reduce the sharing extent. But these improved methods introduce a large number of extra parameters and thus cause an undesirable trade-off between the training costs and the ranking quality. To alleviate the above issues, we propose to apply Curriculum Learning On Sharing Extent (CLOSE) to train the supernet both efficiently and effectively. Specifically, we train the supernet with a large sharing extent (an easier curriculum) at the beginning and gradually decrease the sharing extent of the supernet (a harder curriculum). To support this training strategy, we design a novel supernet (CLOSENet) that decouples the parameters from operations to realize a flexible sharing scheme and adjustable sharing extent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CLOSE can obtain a better ranking quality across different computational budget constraints than other one-shot supernets, and is able to discover superior architectures when combined with various search strategies. Code is available at https://github.com/walkerning/aw_nas.
summary: One-shot Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has been widely used to discover architectures due to its efficiency. However, previous studies reveal that one-shot performance estimations of architectures might not be well correlated with their performances in stand-alone training because of the excessive sharing of operation parameters (i.e., large sharing extent) between architectures. Thus, recent methods construct even more over-parameterized supernets to reduce the sharing extent. But these improved methods introduce a large number of extra parameters and thus cause an undesirable trade-off between the training costs and the ranking quality. To alleviate the above issues, we propose to apply Curriculum Learning On Sharing Extent (CLOSE) to train the supernet both efficiently and effectively. Specifically, we train the supernet with a large sharing extent (an easier curriculum) at the beginning and gradually decrease the sharing extent of the supernet (a harder curriculum). To support this training strategy, we design a novel supernet (CLOSENet) that decouples the parameters from operations to realize a flexible sharing scheme and adjustable sharing extent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CLOSE can obtain a better ranking quality across different computational budget constraints than other one-shot supernets, and is able to discover superior architectures when combined with various search strategies. Code is available at https://github.com/walkerning/aw_nas.
abstract_zh: 一次性神经架构搜索（NAS）由于其效率而被广泛用于发现架构。然而，之前的研究表明，由于架构之间操作参数的过度共享（即共享程度大），架构的一次性性能估计可能与其在独立训练中的性能没有很好的相关性。因此，最近的方法构建了更多过度参数化的超网以减少共享程度。但这些改进的方法引入了大量的额外参数，从而导致训练成本和排名质量之间出现不良的权衡。为了缓解上述问题，我们建议应用共享程度的课程学习（CLOSE）来高效且有效地训练超网。具体来说，我们一开始就以较大的共享程度（较容易的课程）来训练超网，并逐渐减少超网的共享程度（较难的课程）。为了支持这种训练策略，我们设计了一种新颖的超网（CLOSENet），将参数与操作解耦，以实现灵活的共享方案和可调节的共享程度。大量的实验表明，与其他一次性超网相比，CLOSE 可以在不同的计算预算约束下获得更好的排名质量，并且能够在与各种搜索策略相结合时发现更好的架构。代码可在 https://github.com/walkerning/aw_nas 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLOSE方法，通过课程学习调整超网络中操作参数的共享程度，以改进一次性神经网络架构搜索（NAS）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有一次性NAS方法因操作参数过度共享导致超网络性能与独立训练性能关联性差，而增加参数量的改进方法又带来训练成本与排序质量的权衡问题。
AI.method: 设计CLOSENet超网络实现参数与操作的解耦，通过课程学习策略逐步降低共享程度，从高共享（易）到低共享（难）分阶段训练。
AI.result: 在不同计算预算下优于其他一次性超网络的排序质量，并能结合多种搜索策略发现更优架构。
AI.conclusion: CLOSE通过灵活调整共享程度，在训练效率与排序质量间取得平衡，为一次性NAS提供有效解决方案。

search_text: CLOSE: Curriculum Learning On the Sharing Extent Towards Better One-shot NAS 关闭：关于共享程度的课程学习，以实现更好的一次性 NAS One-shot Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has been widely used to discover architectures due to its efficiency. However, previous studies reveal that one-shot performance estimations of architectures might not be well correlated with their performances in stand-alone training because of the excessive sharing of operation parameters (i.e., large sharing extent) between architectures. Thus, recent methods construct even more over-parameterized supernets to reduce the sharing extent. But these improved methods introduce a large number of extra parameters and thus cause an undesirable trade-off between the training costs and the ranking quality. To alleviate the above issues, we propose to apply Curriculum Learning On Sharing Extent (CLOSE) to train the supernet both efficiently and effectively. Specifically, we train the supernet with a large sharing extent (an easier curriculum) at the beginning and gradually decrease the sharing extent of the supernet (a harder curriculum). To support this training strategy, we design a novel supernet (CLOSENet) that decouples the parameters from operations to realize a flexible sharing scheme and adjustable sharing extent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CLOSE can obtain a better ranking quality across different computational budget constraints than other one-shot supernets, and is able to discover superior architectures when combined with various search strategies. Code is available at https://github.com/walkerning/aw_nas. 一次性神经架构搜索（NAS）由于其效率而被广泛用于发现架构。然而，之前的研究表明，由于架构之间操作参数的过度共享（即共享程度大），架构的一次性性能估计可能与其在独立训练中的性能没有很好的相关性。因此，最近的方法构建了更多过度参数化的超网以减少共享程度。但这些改进的方法引入了大量的额外参数，从而导致训练成本和排名质量之间出现不良的权衡。为了缓解上述问题，我们建议应用共享程度的课程学习（CLOSE）来高效且有效地训练超网。具体来说，我们一开始就以较大的共享程度（较容易的课程）来训练超网，并逐渐减少超网的共享程度（较难的课程）。为了支持这种训练策略，我们设计了一种新颖的超网（CLOSENet），将参数与操作解耦，以实现灵活的共享方案和可调节的共享程度。大量的实验表明，与其他一次性超网相比，CLOSE 可以在不同的计算预算约束下获得更好的排名质量，并且能够在与各种搜索策略相结合时发现更好的架构。代码可在 https://github.com/walkerning/aw_nas 获取。 本文提出CLOSE方法，通过课程学习调整超网络中操作参数的共享程度，以改进一次性神经网络架构搜索（NAS）的性能。 Zixuan Zhou,Xuefei Ning,Yi Cai,Jiashu Han,Yiping Deng,Yuhan Dong,Huazhong Yang,Yu Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaotian Lin,Leiyang Xu,Qiang Wang
title: Automatic dataset generation for specific object detection
title_zh: 用于特定对象检测的自动数据集生成
abstract: In the past decade, object detection tasks are defined mostly by large public datasets. However, building object detection datasets is not scalable due to inefficient image collecting and labeling. Furthermore, most labels are still in the form of bounding boxes, which provide much less information than the real human visual system. In this paper, we present a method to synthesize object-in-scene images, which can preserve the objects' detailed features without bringing irrelevant information. In brief, given a set of images containing a target object, our algorithm first trains a model to find an approximate center of the object as an anchor, then makes an outline regression to estimate its boundary, and finally blends the object into a new scene. Our result shows that in the synthesized image, the boundaries of objects blend very well with the background. Experiments also show that SOTA segmentation models work well with our synthesized data.
summary: In the past decade, object detection tasks are defined mostly by large public datasets. However, building object detection datasets is not scalable due to inefficient image collecting and labeling. Furthermore, most labels are still in the form of bounding boxes, which provide much less information than the real human visual system. In this paper, we present a method to synthesize object-in-scene images, which can preserve the objects' detailed features without bringing irrelevant information. In brief, given a set of images containing a target object, our algorithm first trains a model to find an approximate center of the object as an anchor, then makes an outline regression to estimate its boundary, and finally blends the object into a new scene. Our result shows that in the synthesized image, the boundaries of objects blend very well with the background. Experiments also show that SOTA segmentation models work well with our synthesized data.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，目标检测任务主要由大型公共数据集定义。然而，由于图像收集和标记效率低下，构建对象检测数据集不可扩展。此外，大多数标签仍然采用边界框的形式，其提供的信息比真实的人类视觉系统少得多。在本文中，我们提出了一种合成场景中对象图像的方法，该方法可以保留对象的详细特征而不带来不相关的信息。简而言之，给定一组包含目标对象的图像，我们的算法首先训练模型以找到对象的近似中心作为锚点，然后进行轮廓回归以估计其边界，最后将对象混合到新场景中。我们的结果表明，在合成图像中，对象的边界与背景融合得很好。实验还表明，SOTA 分割模型与我们的合成数据配合良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动合成特定目标检测数据集的方法，通过生成包含详细物体特征的场景图像来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测数据集构建效率低且依赖人工标注，而现有边界框标签缺乏人类视觉系统的丰富信息，限制了检测模型的发展。
AI.method: 算法通过训练模型定位目标物体中心锚点，进行轮廓回归估计边界，并将物体融合至新场景中，保留细节且避免无关信息干扰。
AI.result: 合成图像中物体与背景边界融合自然，且主流分割模型在该数据集上表现优异，验证了数据质量的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可高效生成高质量合成数据，为特定目标检测任务提供可靠数据支持，推动检测技术进步。

authors_text: Minki Jeong,Wanyeong Jung
title: MAC-DO: An Efficient Output-Stationary GEMM Accelerator for CNNs Using DRAM Technology
title_zh: MAC-DO：使用 DRAM 技术的 CNN 高效输出固定 GEMM 加速器
abstract: DRAM-based in-situ accelerators have shown their potential in addressing the memory wall challenge of the traditional von Neumann architecture. Such accelerators exploit charge sharing or logic circuits for simple logic operations at the DRAM subarray level. However, their throughput is limited due to low array utilization, as only a few row cells in a DRAM array participate in operations while most rows remain deactivated. Moreover, they require many cycles for more complex operations such as a multi-bit multiply-accumulate (MAC) operation, resulting in significant data access and movement and potentially worsening power efficiency. To overcome these limitations, this paper presents MAC-DO, an efficient and low-power DRAM-based in-situ accelerator. Compared to previous DRAM-based in-situ accelerators, a MAC-DO cell, consisting of two 1T1C DRAM cells (two transistors and two capacitors), innately supports a multi-bit MAC operation within a single cycle, ensuring good linearity and compatibility with existing 1T1C DRAM cells and array structures. This achievement is facilitated by a novel analog computation method utilizing charge steering. Additionally, MAC-DO enables concurrent individual MAC operations in each MAC-DO cell without idle cells, significantly improving throughput and energy efficiency. As a result, a MAC-DO array efficiently can accelerate matrix multiplications based on output stationary mapping, supporting the majority of computations performed in deep neural networks (DNNs). Furthermore, a MAC-DO array efficiently reuses three types of data (input, weight and output), minimizing data movement.
summary: DRAM-based in-situ accelerators have shown their potential in addressing the memory wall challenge of the traditional von Neumann architecture. Such accelerators exploit charge sharing or logic circuits for simple logic operations at the DRAM subarray level. However, their throughput is limited due to low array utilization, as only a few row cells in a DRAM array participate in operations while most rows remain deactivated. Moreover, they require many cycles for more complex operations such as a multi-bit multiply-accumulate (MAC) operation, resulting in significant data access and movement and potentially worsening power efficiency. To overcome these limitations, this paper presents MAC-DO, an efficient and low-power DRAM-based in-situ accelerator. Compared to previous DRAM-based in-situ accelerators, a MAC-DO cell, consisting of two 1T1C DRAM cells (two transistors and two capacitors), innately supports a multi-bit MAC operation within a single cycle, ensuring good linearity and compatibility with existing 1T1C DRAM cells and array structures. This achievement is facilitated by a novel analog computation method utilizing charge steering. Additionally, MAC-DO enables concurrent individual MAC operations in each MAC-DO cell without idle cells, significantly improving throughput and energy efficiency. As a result, a MAC-DO array efficiently can accelerate matrix multiplications based on output stationary mapping, supporting the majority of computations performed in deep neural networks (DNNs). Furthermore, a MAC-DO array efficiently reuses three types of data (input, weight and output), minimizing data movement.
abstract_zh: 基于 DRAM 的原位加速器已显示出其在解决传统冯·诺依曼架构的内存墙挑战方面的潜力。此类加速器利用电荷共享或逻辑电路在 DRAM 子阵列级别进行简单的逻辑操作。然而，由于阵列利用率低，它们的吞吐量受到限制，因为 DRAM 阵列中只有少数行单元参与操作，而大多数行仍处于停用状态。此外，它们需要许多周期来进行更复杂的操作，例如多位乘法累加（MAC）操作，从而导致大量的数据访问和移动，并可能恶化功率效率。为了克服这些限制，本文提出了 MAC-DO，一种高效、低功耗的基于 DRAM 的原位加速器。与之前基于 DRAM 的原位加速器相比，MAC-DO 单元由两个 1T1C DRAM 单元（两个晶体管和两个电容器）组成，天生支持单周期内的多位 MAC 操作，确保良好的线性度以及与现有 1T1C DRAM 单元和阵列结构的兼容性。这一成就得益于利用电荷引导的新颖模拟计算方法。此外，MAC-DO 可以在每个 MAC-DO 单元中实现并发的单独 MAC 操作，无需空闲单元，从而显着提高吞吐量和能源效率。因此，MAC-DO 阵列可以有效地加速基于输出平稳映射的矩阵乘法，支持深度神经网络 (DNN) 中执行的大部分计算。此外，MAC-DO 阵列有效地重复使用三种类型的数据（输入、权重和输出），从而最大限度地减少数据移动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAC-DO，一种基于DRAM技术的高效输出站内GEMM加速器，用于卷积神经网络（CNN）计算。
AI.motivation: 传统DRAM原位加速器因阵列利用率低、复杂操作周期多导致吞吐量受限，且数据移动和能耗较高，需改进以提升效率。
AI.method: 设计包含两个1T1C DRAM单元的MAC-DO单元，利用电荷转向实现单周期多比特MAC运算，并通过输出站内映射和数据重用减少数据移动。
AI.result: MAC-DO阵列显著提升吞吐量与能效，支持DNN主流计算，实现输入、权重和输出三类数据的高效复用。
AI.conclusion: MAC-DO通过创新的模拟计算方法和架构设计，有效解决了传统DRAM加速器的性能瓶颈，为CNN计算提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: Hongtao Wen,Jianhang Yan,Wanli Peng,Yi Sun
title: TransGrasp: Grasp Pose Estimation of a Category of Objects by Transferring Grasps from Only One Labeled Instance
title_zh: TransGrasp：通过仅从一个标记实例传输抓取来估计一类对象的抓取姿势
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Grasp pose estimation is an important issue for robots to interact with the real world. However, most of existing methods require exact 3D object models available beforehand or a large amount of grasp annotations for training. To avoid these problems, we propose TransGrasp, a category-level grasp pose estimation method that predicts grasp poses of a category of objects by labeling only one object instance. Specifically, we perform grasp pose transfer across a category of objects based on their shape correspondences and propose a grasp pose refinement module to further fine-tune grasp pose of grippers so as to ensure successful grasps. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on achieving high-quality grasps with the transferred grasp poses. Our code is available at https://github.com/yanjh97/TransGrasp.
summary: Grasp pose estimation is an important issue for robots to interact with the real world. However, most of existing methods require exact 3D object models available beforehand or a large amount of grasp annotations for training. To avoid these problems, we propose TransGrasp, a category-level grasp pose estimation method that predicts grasp poses of a category of objects by labeling only one object instance. Specifically, we perform grasp pose transfer across a category of objects based on their shape correspondences and propose a grasp pose refinement module to further fine-tune grasp pose of grippers so as to ensure successful grasps. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on achieving high-quality grasps with the transferred grasp poses. Our code is available at https://github.com/yanjh97/TransGrasp.
abstract_zh: 抓取姿势估计是机器人与现实世界交互的一个重要问题。然而，大多数现有方法需要事先提供精确的 3D 对象模型或大量的掌握注释来进行训练。为了避免这些问题，我们提出了 TransGrasp，一种类别级抓取姿势估计方法，通过仅标记一个对象实例来预测一类对象的抓取姿势。具体来说，我们根据一类物体的形状对应关系进行抓取姿势转移，并提出抓取姿势细化模块来进一步微调抓手的抓取姿势，以确保成功抓取。实验证明了我们的方法在通过转移的抓取姿势实现高质量抓取方面的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yanjh97/TransGrasp 获取。

AI.motivation: 现有抓取姿态估计方法依赖精确3D模型或大量标注数据，存在数据获取成本高、泛化能力差的问题。
AI.method: 基于形状对应关系实现跨物体类别的抓取姿态迁移，并设计抓取姿态精炼模块优化机械臂抓取精度。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在多种物体类别上均能生成高质量抓取姿态，代码已开源验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: TransGrasp通过单实例标注实现类别级抓取，显著降低了数据需求，为实际机器人应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Jianfei Yang,Xinyan Chen,Dazhuo Wang,Han Zou,Chris Xiaoxuan Lu,Sumei Sun,Lihua Xie
title: SenseFi: A Library and Benchmark on Deep-Learning-Empowered WiFi Human Sensing
title_zh: SenseFi：基于深度学习的 WiFi 人类感知的库和基准
comment: A benchmark and model zoo for WiFi CSI Human sensing based on deep learning methods. Accepted by Patterns, Cell Press
comments: A benchmark and model zoo for WiFi CSI Human sensing based on deep learning methods. Accepted by Patterns, Cell Press
abstract: WiFi sensing has been evolving rapidly in recent years. Empowered by propagation models and deep learning methods, many challenging applications are realized such as WiFi-based human activity recognition and gesture recognition. However, in contrast to deep learning for visual recognition and natural language processing, no sufficiently comprehensive public benchmark exists. In this paper, we review the recent progress on deep learning enabled WiFi sensing, and then propose a benchmark, SenseFi, to study the effectiveness of various deep learning models for WiFi sensing. These advanced models are compared in terms of distinct sensing tasks, WiFi platforms, recognition accuracy, model size, computational complexity, feature transferability, and adaptability of unsupervised learning. It is also regarded as a tutorial for deep learning based WiFi sensing, starting from CSI hardware platform to sensing algorithms. The extensive experiments provide us with experiences in deep model design, learning strategy skills and training techniques for real-world applications. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first benchmark with an open-source library for deep learning in WiFi sensing research. The benchmark codes are available at https://github.com/xyanchen/WiFi-CSI-Sensing-Benchmark.
summary: WiFi sensing has been evolving rapidly in recent years. Empowered by propagation models and deep learning methods, many challenging applications are realized such as WiFi-based human activity recognition and gesture recognition. However, in contrast to deep learning for visual recognition and natural language processing, no sufficiently comprehensive public benchmark exists. In this paper, we review the recent progress on deep learning enabled WiFi sensing, and then propose a benchmark, SenseFi, to study the effectiveness of various deep learning models for WiFi sensing. These advanced models are compared in terms of distinct sensing tasks, WiFi platforms, recognition accuracy, model size, computational complexity, feature transferability, and adaptability of unsupervised learning. It is also regarded as a tutorial for deep learning based WiFi sensing, starting from CSI hardware platform to sensing algorithms. The extensive experiments provide us with experiences in deep model design, learning strategy skills and training techniques for real-world applications. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first benchmark with an open-source library for deep learning in WiFi sensing research. The benchmark codes are available at https://github.com/xyanchen/WiFi-CSI-Sensing-Benchmark.
abstract_zh: 近年来，WiFi 传感技术发展迅速。在传播模型和深度学习方法的支持下，许多具有挑战性的应用得以实现，例如基于 WiFi 的人体活动识别和手势识别。然而，与视觉识别和自然语言处理的深度学习相比，不存在足够全面的公共基准。在本文中，我们回顾了基于深度学习的 WiFi 传感的最新进展，然后提出了一个基准 SenseFi，以研究各种深度学习模型在 WiFi 传感方面的有效性。这些先进模型在不同的传感任务、WiFi 平台、识别精度、模型大小、计算复杂性、特征可转移性和无监督学习的适应性方面进行了比较。它也被视为基于深度学习的 WiFi 传感教程，从 CSI 硬件平台到传感算法。大量的实验为我们提供了深度模型设计、学习策略技巧和实际应用训练技术方面的经验。据我们所知，这是第一个针对 WiFi 传感研究深度学习的开源库的基准测试。基准代码可在 https://github.com/xyanchen/WiFi-CSI-Sensing-Benchmark 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为SenseFi的开源基准库和教程，用于评估深度学习在WiFi人体感知中的效果，并比较多种模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管WiFi感知应用广泛，但缺乏一个全面的公共基准来系统评估深度学习模型，限制了该领域的发展。
AI.method: 通过回顾深度学习在WiFi感知的最新进展，设计包含多任务、多平台比较的基准测试，并提供从硬件到算法的完整教程。
AI.result: 实验验证了不同模型在准确性、计算复杂度等指标的表现，首次公开了深度学习WiFi感知的开源基准库及代码。
AI.conclusion: SenseFi填补了WiFi感知领域深度学习基准的空白，为未来研究和实际应用提供了系统化参考。

authors_text: Zhongzhan Huang,Senwei Liang,Mingfu Liang,Wei He,Haizhao Yang,Liang Lin
title: The Lottery Ticket Hypothesis for Self-attention in Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 卷积神经网络中自注意力的彩票假设
comment: Technical report. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.14058
comments: Technical report. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.14058
abstract: Recently many plug-and-play self-attention modules (SAMs) are proposed to enhance the model generalization by exploiting the internal information of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In general, previous works ignore where to plug in the SAMs since they connect the SAMs individually with each block of the entire CNN backbone for granted, leading to incremental computational cost and the number of parameters with the growth of network depth. However, we empirically find and verify some counterintuitive phenomena that: (a) Connecting the SAMs to all the blocks may not always bring the largest performance boost, and connecting to partial blocks would be even better; (b) Adding the SAMs to a CNN may not always bring a performance boost, and instead it may even harm the performance of the original CNN backbone. Therefore, we articulate and demonstrate the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis for Self-attention Networks: a full self-attention network contains a subnetwork with sparse self-attention connections that can (1) accelerate inference, (2) reduce extra parameter increment, and (3) maintain accuracy. In addition to the empirical evidence, this hypothesis is also supported by our theoretical evidence. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective reinforcement-learning-based method to search the ticket, i.e., the connection scheme that satisfies the three above-mentioned conditions. Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmark datasets and popular self-attention networks show the effectiveness of our method. Besides, our experiments illustrate that our searched ticket has the capacity of transferring to some vision tasks, e.g., crowd counting and segmentation.
summary: Recently many plug-and-play self-attention modules (SAMs) are proposed to enhance the model generalization by exploiting the internal information of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In general, previous works ignore where to plug in the SAMs since they connect the SAMs individually with each block of the entire CNN backbone for granted, leading to incremental computational cost and the number of parameters with the growth of network depth. However, we empirically find and verify some counterintuitive phenomena that: (a) Connecting the SAMs to all the blocks may not always bring the largest performance boost, and connecting to partial blocks would be even better; (b) Adding the SAMs to a CNN may not always bring a performance boost, and instead it may even harm the performance of the original CNN backbone. Therefore, we articulate and demonstrate the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis for Self-attention Networks: a full self-attention network contains a subnetwork with sparse self-attention connections that can (1) accelerate inference, (2) reduce extra parameter increment, and (3) maintain accuracy. In addition to the empirical evidence, this hypothesis is also supported by our theoretical evidence. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective reinforcement-learning-based method to search the ticket, i.e., the connection scheme that satisfies the three above-mentioned conditions. Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmark datasets and popular self-attention networks show the effectiveness of our method. Besides, our experiments illustrate that our searched ticket has the capacity of transferring to some vision tasks, e.g., crowd counting and segmentation.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们提出了许多即插即用的自注意力模块（SAM），通过利用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的内部信息来增强模型泛化能力。一般来说，以前的工作忽略了在哪里插入 SAM，因为它们理所当然地将 SAM 与整个 CNN 主干的每个块单独连接，导致计算成本和参数数量随着网络深度的增长而增加。然而，我们凭经验发现并验证了一些违反直觉的现象：（a）将 SAM 连接到所有块可能并不总是带来最大的性能提升，连接到部分块会更好； (b) 将 SAM 添加到 CNN 可能并不总能带来性能提升，甚至可能会损害原始 CNN 主干的性能。因此，我们阐明并论证了自注意力网络的彩票假设：完整的自注意力网络包含一个具有稀疏自注意力连接的子网络，可以（1）加速推理，（2）减少额外的参数增量，（3）保持准确性。除了经验证据之外，这个假设也得到了我们的理论证据的支持。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的基于强化学习的方法来搜索票证，即满足上述三个条件的连接方案。对广泛使用的基准数据集和流行的自注意力网络进行的大量实验表明了我们方法的有效性。此外，我们的实验表明，我们的搜索票证具有转移到某些视觉任务的能力，例如人群计数和分割。

AI.tldr: 本文将彩票票假设（LTH）应用于卷积神经网络中的自注意模块（SAMs），提出通过搜索稀疏连接子网络以提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将SAMs连接到所有CNN块导致计算量和参数增加，但实验发现并非所有连接都能提升性能，甚至可能损害原模型表现。
AI.method: 提出基于强化学习的方法搜索满足加速推理、减少参数增量和保持精度的稀疏连接方案（即'彩票票'）。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和视觉任务（如人群计数、分割）中验证了方法有效性，证明所搜索的稀疏连接具有迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 彩票票假设在SAMs中成立，通过优化连接方案可实现高效准确的模型改进，为自注意模块的轻量化应用提供新思路。

search_text: The Lottery Ticket Hypothesis for Self-attention in Convolutional Neural Network 卷积神经网络中自注意力的彩票假设 Recently many plug-and-play self-attention modules (SAMs) are proposed to enhance the model generalization by exploiting the internal information of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In general, previous works ignore where to plug in the SAMs since they connect the SAMs individually with each block of the entire CNN backbone for granted, leading to incremental computational cost and the number of parameters with the growth of network depth. However, we empirically find and verify some counterintuitive phenomena that: (a) Connecting the SAMs to all the blocks may not always bring the largest performance boost, and connecting to partial blocks would be even better; (b) Adding the SAMs to a CNN may not always bring a performance boost, and instead it may even harm the performance of the original CNN backbone. Therefore, we articulate and demonstrate the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis for Self-attention Networks: a full self-attention network contains a subnetwork with sparse self-attention connections that can (1) accelerate inference, (2) reduce extra parameter increment, and (3) maintain accuracy. In addition to the empirical evidence, this hypothesis is also supported by our theoretical evidence. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective reinforcement-learning-based method to search the ticket, i.e., the connection scheme that satisfies the three above-mentioned conditions. Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmark datasets and popular self-attention networks show the effectiveness of our method. Besides, our experiments illustrate that our searched ticket has the capacity of transferring to some vision tasks, e.g., crowd counting and segmentation. 最近，人们提出了许多即插即用的自注意力模块（SAM），通过利用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的内部信息来增强模型泛化能力。一般来说，以前的工作忽略了在哪里插入 SAM，因为它们理所当然地将 SAM 与整个 CNN 主干的每个块单独连接，导致计算成本和参数数量随着网络深度的增长而增加。然而，我们凭经验发现并验证了一些违反直觉的现象：（a）将 SAM 连接到所有块可能并不总是带来最大的性能提升，连接到部分块会更好； (b) 将 SAM 添加到 CNN 可能并不总能带来性能提升，甚至可能会损害原始 CNN 主干的性能。因此，我们阐明并论证了自注意力网络的彩票假设：完整的自注意力网络包含一个具有稀疏自注意力连接的子网络，可以（1）加速推理，（2）减少额外的参数增量，（3）保持准确性。除了经验证据之外，这个假设也得到了我们的理论证据的支持。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的基于强化学习的方法来搜索票证，即满足上述三个条件的连接方案。对广泛使用的基准数据集和流行的自注意力网络进行的大量实验表明了我们方法的有效性。此外，我们的实验表明，我们的搜索票证具有转移到某些视觉任务的能力，例如人群计数和分割。 本文将彩票票假设（LTH）应用于卷积神经网络中的自注意模块（SAMs），提出通过搜索稀疏连接子网络以提升模型效率。 Zhongzhan Huang,Senwei Liang,Mingfu Liang,Wei He,Haizhao Yang,Liang Lin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuqi Liu,Pengfei Xiong,Luhui Xu,Shengming Cao,Qin Jin
title: TS2-Net: Token Shift and Selection Transformer for Text-Video Retrieval
title_zh: TS2-Net：用于文本视频检索的令牌移位和选择转换器
abstract: Text-Video retrieval is a task of great practical value and has received increasing attention, among which learning spatial-temporal video representation is one of the research hotspots. The video encoders in the state-of-the-art video retrieval models usually directly adopt the pre-trained vision backbones with the network structure fixed, they therefore can not be further improved to produce the fine-grained spatial-temporal video representation. In this paper, we propose Token Shift and Selection Network (TS2-Net), a novel token shift and selection transformer architecture, which dynamically adjusts the token sequence and selects informative tokens in both temporal and spatial dimensions from input video samples. The token shift module temporally shifts the whole token features back-and-forth across adjacent frames, to preserve the complete token representation and capture subtle movements. Then the token selection module selects tokens that contribute most to local spatial semantics. Based on thorough experiments, the proposed TS2-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance on major text-video retrieval benchmarks, including new records on MSRVTT, VATEX, LSMDC, ActivityNet, and DiDeMo.
summary: Text-Video retrieval is a task of great practical value and has received increasing attention, among which learning spatial-temporal video representation is one of the research hotspots. The video encoders in the state-of-the-art video retrieval models usually directly adopt the pre-trained vision backbones with the network structure fixed, they therefore can not be further improved to produce the fine-grained spatial-temporal video representation. In this paper, we propose Token Shift and Selection Network (TS2-Net), a novel token shift and selection transformer architecture, which dynamically adjusts the token sequence and selects informative tokens in both temporal and spatial dimensions from input video samples. The token shift module temporally shifts the whole token features back-and-forth across adjacent frames, to preserve the complete token representation and capture subtle movements. Then the token selection module selects tokens that contribute most to local spatial semantics. Based on thorough experiments, the proposed TS2-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance on major text-video retrieval benchmarks, including new records on MSRVTT, VATEX, LSMDC, ActivityNet, and DiDeMo.
abstract_zh: 文本视频检索是一项极具实用价值的任务，受到越来越多的关注，其中学习时空视频表示是研究热点之一。最先进的视频检索模型中的视频编码器通常直接采用网络结构固定的预训练视觉主干，因此无法进一步改进以产生细粒度的时空视频表示。在本文中，我们提出了令牌移位和选择网络（TS2-Net），这是一种新颖的令牌移位和选择变压器架构，它动态调整令牌序列并从输入视频样本中选择时间和空间维度上的信息令牌。令牌移位模块会临时在相邻帧之间来回移动整个令牌特征，以保留完整的令牌表示并捕获微妙的运动。然后标记选择模块选择对局部空间语义贡献最大的标记。基于彻底的实验，所提出的 TS2-Net 在主要文本视频检索基准上实现了最先进的性能，包括 MSRVTT、VATEX、LSMDC、ActivityNet 和 DiDeMo 上的新记录。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TS2-Net，通过动态调整视频中的token序列并选择关键token，提升文本-视频检索任务中的时空表征能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索模型依赖固定结构的预训练视觉主干网络，难以进一步优化以生成细粒度的时空表征，限制了检索性能的提升。
AI.method: 设计Token Shift模块在相邻帧间动态移动token特征以捕捉细微运动，结合Token Selection模块筛选对局部空间语义贡献最大的token。
AI.result: 在MSRVTT、VATEX等主流文本-视频检索基准测试中取得SOTA性能，多个数据集刷新现有记录。
AI.conclusion: TS2-Net通过时空维度的动态token调整机制，有效提升了视频表征的细粒度刻画能力，为文本-视频检索任务提供了新思路。

Then the token selection module selects tokens that contribute most to local spatial semantics. authors_text: Viet Anh Trinh,Pegah Ghahremani,Brian King,Jasha Droppo,Andreas Stolcke,Roland Maas
title: Reducing Geographic Disparities in Automatic Speech Recognition via Elastic Weight Consolidation
title_zh: 通过弹性权重合并减少自动语音识别中的地理差异
abstract: We present an approach to reduce the performance disparity between geographic regions without degrading performance on the overall user population for ASR. A popular approach is to fine-tune the model with data from regions where the ASR model has a higher word error rate (WER). However, when the ASR model is adapted to get better performance on these high-WER regions, its parameters wander from the previous optimal values, which can lead to worse performance in other regions. In our proposed method, we utilize the elastic weight consolidation (EWC) regularization loss to identify directions in parameters space along which the ASR weights can vary to improve for high-error regions, while still maintaining performance on the speaker population overall. Our results demonstrate that EWC can reduce the word error rate (WER) in the region with highest WER by 3.2% relative while reducing the overall WER by 1.3% relative. We also evaluate the role of language and acoustic models in ASR fairness and propose a clustering algorithm to identify WER disparities based on geographic region.
summary: We present an approach to reduce the performance disparity between geographic regions without degrading performance on the overall user population for ASR. A popular approach is to fine-tune the model with data from regions where the ASR model has a higher word error rate (WER). However, when the ASR model is adapted to get better performance on these high-WER regions, its parameters wander from the previous optimal values, which can lead to worse performance in other regions. In our proposed method, we utilize the elastic weight consolidation (EWC) regularization loss to identify directions in parameters space along which the ASR weights can vary to improve for high-error regions, while still maintaining performance on the speaker population overall. Our results demonstrate that EWC can reduce the word error rate (WER) in the region with highest WER by 3.2% relative while reducing the overall WER by 1.3% relative. We also evaluate the role of language and acoustic models in ASR fairness and propose a clustering algorithm to identify WER disparities based on geographic region.
abstract_zh: We present an approach to reduce the performance disparity between geographic regions without degrading performance on the overall user population for ASR.一种流行的方法是使用 ASR 模型误字率 (WER) 较高的地区的数据来微调模型。 However, when the ASR model is adapted to get better performance on these high-WER regions, its parameters wander from the previous optimal values, which can lead to worse performance in other regions. In our proposed method, we utilize the elastic weight consolidation (EWC) regularization loss to identify directions in parameters space along which the ASR weights can vary to improve for high-error regions, while still maintaining performance on the speaker population overall. Our results demonstrate that EWC can reduce the word error rate (WER) in the region with highest WER by 3.2% relative while reducing the overall WER by 1.3% relative. We also evaluate the role of language and acoustic models in ASR fairness and propose a clustering algorithm to identify WER disparities based on geographic region.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过弹性权重合并（EWC）减少自动语音识别（ASR）系统在不同地理区域间性能差异的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法在提升高词错误率（WER）地区性能时会导致其他地区性能下降，需在优化特定区域与保持整体性能间取得平衡。
AI.method: 利用EWC正则化损失识别参数空间中可调整方向，优先优化高WER地区的同时保留全局最优参数。
AI.result: 实验显示最高WER地区相对下降3.2%，整体WER下降1.3%，并提出聚类算法识别地理区域WER差异。
AI.conclusion: EWC有效缓解地理性能差异，未来可进一步研究语言/声学模型对公平性的影响及更精细的参数保护策略。

authors_text: Xuan Lin,Feng Xu,Alexander Schperberg,Dennis Hong
title: Learning Near-global-optimal Strategies for Hybrid Non-convex Model Predictive Control of Single Rigid Body Locomotion
title_zh: 学习单刚体运动的混合非凸模型预测控制的近全局最优策略
abstract: Convex model predictive controls (MPCs) with a single rigid body model have demonstrated strong performance on real legged robots. However, convex MPCs are limited by their assumptions such as small rotation angle and pre-defined gait, limiting the richness of potential solutions. We remove those assumptions and solve the complete mixed-integer non-convex programming with single rigid body model. We first collect datasets of pre-solved problems offline, then learn the problem-solution map to solve this optimization fast for MPC. If warm-starts can be found, offline problems can be solved close to the global optimality. The proposed controller is tested by generating various gaits and behaviors depending on the initial conditions. Hardware test demonstrates online gait generation and adaptation running at more than 50 Hz based on sensor feedback.
summary: Convex model predictive controls (MPCs) with a single rigid body model have demonstrated strong performance on real legged robots. However, convex MPCs are limited by their assumptions such as small rotation angle and pre-defined gait, limiting the richness of potential solutions. We remove those assumptions and solve the complete mixed-integer non-convex programming with single rigid body model. We first collect datasets of pre-solved problems offline, then learn the problem-solution map to solve this optimization fast for MPC. If warm-starts can be found, offline problems can be solved close to the global optimality. The proposed controller is tested by generating various gaits and behaviors depending on the initial conditions. Hardware test demonstrates online gait generation and adaptation running at more than 50 Hz based on sensor feedback.
abstract_zh: 具有单个刚体模型的凸模型预测控制（MPC）在真实的有腿机器人上表现出了强大的性能。然而，凸 MPC 受到小旋转角度和预定义步态等假设的限制，限制了潜在解决方案的丰富性。我们删除这些假设并用单个刚体模型求解完整的混合整数非凸规划。我们首先离线收集预先解决的问题的数据集，然后学习问题解决方案图以快速解决 MPC 的优化问题。如果能够找到热启动，就可以接近全局最优来解决离线问题。通过根据初始条件生成各种步态和行为来测试所提出的控制器。硬件测试演示了基于传感器反馈以超过 50 Hz 的频率运行的在线步态生成和适应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合非凸模型预测控制（MPC）的单刚体运动控制方法，通过学习接近全局最优策略实现灵活步态生成与适应。
AI.motivation: 传统凸MPC因假设小旋转角度和预定义步态，限制了运动控制的解空间多样性，难以应对复杂动态场景。
AI.method: 离线收集预解问题数据集，构建问题-解映射模型加速优化求解；在线结合混合整数非凸规划与MPC实现实时控制。
AI.result: 硬件实验证明系统可基于传感器反馈以超50Hz频率实现在线步态生成与适应，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破传统MPC限制，通过学习近似全局最优策略，为单刚体运动控制提供了更丰富灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Kaile Du,Linyan Li,Fan Lyu,Fuyuan Hu,Zhenping Xia,Fenglei Xu
title: Class-Incremental Lifelong Learning in Multi-Label Classification
title_zh: 多标签分类中的班级增量终身学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.05534
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.05534
abstract: Existing class-incremental lifelong learning studies only the data is with single-label, which limits its adaptation to multi-label data. This paper studies Lifelong Multi-Label (LML) classification, which builds an online class-incremental classifier in a sequential multi-label classification data stream. Training on the data with Partial Labels in LML classification may result in more serious Catastrophic Forgetting in old classes. To solve the problem, the study proposes an Augmented Graph Convolutional Network (AGCN) with a built Augmented Correlation Matrix (ACM) across sequential partial-label tasks. The results of two benchmarks show that the method is effective for LML classification and reducing forgetting.
summary: Existing class-incremental lifelong learning studies only the data is with single-label, which limits its adaptation to multi-label data. This paper studies Lifelong Multi-Label (LML) classification, which builds an online class-incremental classifier in a sequential multi-label classification data stream. Training on the data with Partial Labels in LML classification may result in more serious Catastrophic Forgetting in old classes. To solve the problem, the study proposes an Augmented Graph Convolutional Network (AGCN) with a built Augmented Correlation Matrix (ACM) across sequential partial-label tasks. The results of two benchmarks show that the method is effective for LML classification and reducing forgetting.
abstract_zh: 现有的班级增量终身学习仅研究单标签数据，这限制了其对多标签数据的适应。本文研究终身多标签（LML）分类，它在顺序多标签分类数据流中构建在线类增量分类器。对 LML 分类中带有部分标签的数据进行训练可能会导致旧类别中出现更严重的灾难性遗忘。为了解决这个问题，该研究提出了一种增强图卷积网络（AGCN），它在顺序部分标签任务中构建了增强相关矩阵（ACM）。两个基准测试的结果表明该方法对于 LML 分类和减少遗忘是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多标签分类中的类增量终身学习问题，提出一种新型网络结构以解决部分标签训练导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有类增量终身学习方法仅适用于单标签数据，难以处理多标签场景下部分标签训练引发的更严重灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出增强图卷积网络（AGCN），通过构建跨序列部分标签任务的增强相关矩阵（ACM）来缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多标签终身学习任务中有效提升了分类性能并减少了遗忘。
AI.conclusion: AGCN方法为多标签终身学习提供了新思路，通过相关矩阵建模有效缓解了类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。

authors_text: Fangzhou Yu,Ryan Batke,Jeremy Dao,Jonathan Hurst,Kevin Green,Alan Fern
title: Dynamic Bipedal Maneuvers through Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过模拟到真实的强化学习实现动态双足机动
comment: In review for the 2022 IEEE-RAS International Conference on Humanoid Robots. 8 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
comments: In review for the 2022 IEEE-RAS International Conference on Humanoid Robots. 8 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
abstract: For legged robots to match the athletic capabilities of humans and animals, they must not only produce robust periodic walking and running, but also seamlessly switch between nominal locomotion gaits and more specialized transient maneuvers. Despite recent advancements in controls of bipedal robots, there has been little focus on producing highly dynamic behaviors. Recent work utilizing reinforcement learning to produce policies for control of legged robots have demonstrated success in producing robust walking behaviors. However, these learned policies have difficulty expressing a multitude of different behaviors on a single network. Inspired by conventional optimization-based control techniques for legged robots, this work applies a recurrent policy to execute four-step, 90 degree turns trained using reference data generated from optimized single rigid body model trajectories. We present a novel training framework using epilogue terminal rewards for learning specific behaviors from pre-computed trajectory data and demonstrate a successful transfer to hardware on the bipedal robot Cassie.
summary: For legged robots to match the athletic capabilities of humans and animals, they must not only produce robust periodic walking and running, but also seamlessly switch between nominal locomotion gaits and more specialized transient maneuvers. Despite recent advancements in controls of bipedal robots, there has been little focus on producing highly dynamic behaviors. Recent work utilizing reinforcement learning to produce policies for control of legged robots have demonstrated success in producing robust walking behaviors. However, these learned policies have difficulty expressing a multitude of different behaviors on a single network. Inspired by conventional optimization-based control techniques for legged robots, this work applies a recurrent policy to execute four-step, 90 degree turns trained using reference data generated from optimized single rigid body model trajectories. We present a novel training framework using epilogue terminal rewards for learning specific behaviors from pre-computed trajectory data and demonstrate a successful transfer to hardware on the bipedal robot Cassie.
abstract_zh: 对于腿式机器人来说，要与人类和动物的运动能力相匹配，它们不仅必须产生强大的周期性行走和跑步，而且还必须在名义运动步态和更专业的瞬态动作之间无缝切换。尽管双足机器人的控制最近取得了进展，但人们很少关注产生高动态行为。最近利用强化学习来制定腿式机器人控制策略的工作已证明在产生稳健的步行行为方面取得了成功。然而，这些学习策略很难在单个网络上表达多种不同的行为。受腿式机器人传统的基于优化的控制技术的启发，这项工作应用循环策略来执行四步、90 度转弯，并使用优化的单个刚体模型轨迹生成的参考数据进行训练。我们提出了一种新颖的训练框架，使用尾声终端奖励从预先计算的轨迹数据中学习特定行为，并演示了双足机器人 Cassie 上硬件的成功传输。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过模拟到现实的强化学习方法，使双足机器人能够执行动态的四步90度转向动作。
AI.motivation: 现有双足机器人控制方法难以实现多种动态行为的无缝切换，且单一网络难以表达多样化动作，需提升动态机动性以接近生物运动能力。
AI.method: 基于优化的单刚体模型轨迹生成参考数据，采用递归策略网络结合终局奖励机制进行训练，并将策略迁移至实体机器人Cassie。
AI.result: 成功在Cassie机器人上实现预设的动态转向行为，验证了模拟到现实的策略迁移有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合强化学习与轨迹优化，为双足机器人复杂动态行为的生成与迁移提供了可行方案。
