search_text: Dynamic Bipedal Maneuvers through Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning 通过模拟到真实的强化学习实现动态双足机动 For legged robots to match the athletic capabilities of humans and animals, they must not only produce robust periodic walking and running, but also seamlessly switch between nominal locomotion gaits and more specialized transient maneuvers. Despite recent advancements in controls of bipedal robots, there has been little focus on producing highly dynamic behaviors. Recent work utilizing reinforcement learning to produce policies for control of legged robots have demonstrated success in producing robust walking behaviors. However, these learned policies have difficulty expressing a multitude of different behaviors on a single network. Inspired by conventional optimization-based control techniques for legged robots, this work applies a recurrent policy to execute four-step, 90 degree turns trained using reference data generated from optimized single rigid body model trajectories. We present a novel training framework using epilogue terminal rewards for learning specific behaviors from pre-computed trajectory data and demonstrate a successful transfer to hardware on the bipedal robot Cassie. 对于腿式机器人来说，要与人类和动物的运动能力相匹配，它们不仅必须产生强大的周期性行走和跑步，而且还必须在名义运动步态和更专业的瞬态动作之间无缝切换。尽管双足机器人的控制最近取得了进展，但人们很少关注产生高动态行为。最近利用强化学习来制定腿式机器人控制策略的工作已证明在产生稳健的步行行为方面取得了成功。然而，这些学习策略很难在单个网络上表达多种不同的行为。受腿式机器人传统的基于优化的控制技术的启发，这项工作应用循环策略来执行四步、90 度转弯，并使用优化的单个刚体模型轨迹生成的参考数据进行训练。我们提出了一种新颖的训练框架，使用尾声终端奖励从预先计算的轨迹数据中学习特定行为，并演示了双足机器人 Cassie 上硬件的成功传输。 本文提出通过模拟到现实的强化学习方法，使双足机器人能够执行动态的四步90度转向动作。 Fangzhou Yu,Ryan Batke,Jeremy Dao,Jonathan Hurst,Kevin Green,Alan Fern cs.RO

authors_text: William Chang,Hassan Hamad,Keith M. Chugg
title: Approximation Capabilities of Neural Networks using Morphological Perceptrons and Generalizations
title_zh: 使用形态感知器和泛化的神经网络的逼近能力
abstract: Standard artificial neural networks (ANNs) use sum-product or multiply-accumulate node operations with a memoryless nonlinear activation. These neural networks are known to have universal function approximation capabilities. Previously proposed morphological perceptrons use max-sum, in place of sum-product, node processing and have promising properties for circuit implementations. In this paper we show that these max-sum ANNs do not have universal approximation capabilities. Furthermore, we consider proposed signed-max-sum and max-star-sum generalizations of morphological ANNs and show that these variants also do not have universal approximation capabilities. We contrast these variations to log-number system (LNS) implementations which also avoid multiplications, but do exhibit universal approximation capabilities.
summary: Standard artificial neural networks (ANNs) use sum-product or multiply-accumulate node operations with a memoryless nonlinear activation. These neural networks are known to have universal function approximation capabilities. Previously proposed morphological perceptrons use max-sum, in place of sum-product, node processing and have promising properties for circuit implementations. In this paper we show that these max-sum ANNs do not have universal approximation capabilities. Furthermore, we consider proposed signed-max-sum and max-star-sum generalizations of morphological ANNs and show that these variants also do not have universal approximation capabilities. We contrast these variations to log-number system (LNS) implementations which also avoid multiplications, but do exhibit universal approximation capabilities.
abstract_zh: 标准人工神经网络 (ANN) 使用具有无记忆非线性激活的和积或乘累加节点运算。众所周知，这些神经网络具有通用函数逼近能力。先前提出的形态感知器使用最大和代替和积、节点处理，并且对于电路实现具有有前景的特性。在本文中，我们证明这些最大和人工神经网络不具有通用逼近能力。此外，我们考虑了形态学 ANN 的有符号最大和和最大星和概括，并表明这些变体也不具有通用逼近能力。我们将这些变体与对数系统 (LNS) 实现进行对比，后者也避免了乘法，但确实表现出了通用逼近功能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究形态感知器及其泛化版本在神经网络中的逼近能力，证明其不具有普遍逼近能力，并与LNS结构进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 形态感知器因电路实现优势被提出，但其逼近能力尚未明确，需验证是否具备与传统神经网络相同的普遍逼近特性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和数学证明，对比max-sum、signed-max-sum、max-star-sum等形态感知器变体与LNS结构的逼近能力差异。
AI.result: 形态感知器及其变体均无法实现普遍函数逼近，而避免乘法的LNS结构仍具备该能力。
AI.conclusion: 形态感知器的逼近能力受限，需进一步探索其他结构以实现高效计算与逼近性能的平衡。

authors_text: Subramanya Nageshrao,Yousaf Rahman,Vladimir Ivanovic,Mrdjan Jankovic,Eric Tseng,Michael Hafner,Dimitar Filev
title: Robust AI Driving Strategy for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的强大人工智能驾驶策略
abstract: There has been significant progress in sensing, perception, and localization for automated driving, However, due to the wide spectrum of traffic/road structure scenarios and the long tail distribution of human driver behavior, it has remained an open challenge for an intelligent vehicle to always know how to make and execute the best decision on road given available sensing / perception / localization information. In this chapter, we talk about how artificial intelligence and more specifically, reinforcement learning, can take advantage of operational knowledge and safety reflex to make strategical and tactical decisions. We discuss some challenging problems related to the robustness of reinforcement learning solutions and their implications to the practical design of driving strategies for autonomous vehicles. We focus on automated driving on highway and the integration of reinforcement learning, vehicle motion control, and control barrier function, leading to a robust AI driving strategy that can learn and adapt safely.
summary: There has been significant progress in sensing, perception, and localization for automated driving, However, due to the wide spectrum of traffic/road structure scenarios and the long tail distribution of human driver behavior, it has remained an open challenge for an intelligent vehicle to always know how to make and execute the best decision on road given available sensing / perception / localization information. In this chapter, we talk about how artificial intelligence and more specifically, reinforcement learning, can take advantage of operational knowledge and safety reflex to make strategical and tactical decisions. We discuss some challenging problems related to the robustness of reinforcement learning solutions and their implications to the practical design of driving strategies for autonomous vehicles. We focus on automated driving on highway and the integration of reinforcement learning, vehicle motion control, and control barrier function, leading to a robust AI driving strategy that can learn and adapt safely.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶的传感、感知和定位已经取得了重大进展，然而，由于交通/道路结构场景的广泛性和人类驾驶员行为的长尾分布，智能车辆如何在给定可用传感/感知/定位信息的情况下始终知道如何在道路上做出和执行最佳决策仍然是一个开放的挑战。在本章中，我们讨论人工智能，更具体地说，强化学习如何利用操作知识和安全反射来做出战略和战术决策。我们讨论了与强化学习解决方案的稳健性相关的一些具有挑战性的问题及其对自动驾驶车辆驾驶策略的实际设计的影响。我们专注于高速公路自动驾驶，以及强化学习、车辆运动控制和控制障碍功能的集成，从而形成能够安全学习和适应的强大人工智能驾驶策略。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何利用强化学习等人工智能技术，为自动驾驶车辆设计一种稳健的驾驶策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管在感知、感知和定位方面取得了显著进展，但由于交通和道路结构场景的广泛谱系以及人类驾驶行为的长尾分布，智能车辆在各种情况下做出最佳决策仍然是一个挑战。
AI.method: 本文讨论了强化学习在自动驾驶策略设计中的应用，结合车辆运动控制和控制屏障函数，以实现安全学习和适应的稳健AI驾驶策略。
AI.result: 提出了一种结合强化学习、车辆运动控制和控制屏障函数的稳健AI驾驶策略，能够安全地学习和适应复杂交通场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了强化学习在自动驾驶策略设计中的潜力，并讨论了其在实际应用中的稳健性挑战和设计意义。

authors_text: Cong Wang,Jinshan Pan,Xiao-Ming Wu
title: Structural Prior Guided Generative Adversarial Transformers for Low-Light Image Enhancement
title_zh: 用于低光图像增强的结构先验引导生成对抗变压器
abstract: We propose an effective Structural Prior guided Generative Adversarial Transformer (SPGAT) to solve low-light image enhancement. Our SPGAT mainly contains a generator with two discriminators and a structural prior estimator (SPE). The generator is based on a U-shaped Transformer which is used to explore non-local information for better clear image restoration. The SPE is used to explore useful structures from images to guide the generator for better structural detail estimation. To generate more realistic images, we develop a new structural prior guided adversarial learning method by building the skip connections between the generator and discriminators so that the discriminators can better discriminate between real and fake features. Finally, we propose a parallel windows-based Swin Transformer block to aggregate different level hierarchical features for high-quality image restoration. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SPGAT performs favorably against recent state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: We propose an effective Structural Prior guided Generative Adversarial Transformer (SPGAT) to solve low-light image enhancement. Our SPGAT mainly contains a generator with two discriminators and a structural prior estimator (SPE). The generator is based on a U-shaped Transformer which is used to explore non-local information for better clear image restoration. The SPE is used to explore useful structures from images to guide the generator for better structural detail estimation. To generate more realistic images, we develop a new structural prior guided adversarial learning method by building the skip connections between the generator and discriminators so that the discriminators can better discriminate between real and fake features. Finally, we propose a parallel windows-based Swin Transformer block to aggregate different level hierarchical features for high-quality image restoration. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SPGAT performs favorably against recent state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种有效的结构先验引导生成对抗变换器（SPGAT）来解决低光图像增强问题。我们的 SPGAT 主要包含一个带有两个判别器的生成器和一个结构先验估计器（SPE）。该生成器基于 U 形 Transformer，用于探索非局部信息以更好地恢复清晰的图像。 SPE 用于从图像中探索有用的结构，以指导生成器更好地估计结构细节。为了生成更真实的图像，我们通过在生成器和判别器之间建立跳跃连接，开发了一种新的结构先验引导对抗性学习方法，以便判别器可以更好地区分真假特征。最后，我们提出了一个基于并行窗口的 Swin Transformer 块来聚合不同级别的分层特征，以实现高质量的图像恢复。实验结果表明，所提出的 SPGAT 在合成数据集和真实数据集上的表现优于最新的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构先验引导的生成对抗Transformer（SPGAT），用于解决低光照图像增强问题。
AI.motivation: 现有低光照图像增强方法在保留结构细节和生成真实感图像方面存在不足，需结合结构先验信息与对抗学习提升效果。
AI.method: SPGAT包含生成器、两个判别器和结构先验估计器（SPE），采用U型Transformer提取非局部信息，通过SPE引导结构细节估计，并构建生成器与判别器的跳接连接实现结构先验引导的对抗学习，最后使用并行窗口Swin Transformer块聚合多级特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，SPGAT在合成与真实世界数据集上均优于最新方法，能生成更清晰真实的增强图像。
AI.conclusion: SPGAT通过融合结构先验与对抗学习机制，有效提升了低光照图像增强的质量，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Structural Prior Guided Generative Adversarial Transformers for Low-Light Image Enhancement 用于低光图像增强的结构先验引导生成对抗变压器 We propose an effective Structural Prior guided Generative Adversarial Transformer (SPGAT) to solve low-light image enhancement. Our SPGAT mainly contains a generator with two discriminators and a structural prior estimator (SPE). The generator is based on a U-shaped Transformer which is used to explore non-local information for better clear image restoration. The SPE is used to explore useful structures from images to guide the generator for better structural detail estimation. To generate more realistic images, we develop a new structural prior guided adversarial learning method by building the skip connections between the generator and discriminators so that the discriminators can better discriminate between real and fake features. Finally, we propose a parallel windows-based Swin Transformer block to aggregate different level hierarchical features for high-quality image restoration. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SPGAT performs favorably against recent state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real-world datasets. 我们提出了一种有效的结构先验引导生成对抗变换器（SPGAT）来解决低光图像增强问题。我们的 SPGAT 主要包含一个带有两个判别器的生成器和一个结构先验估计器（SPE）。该生成器基于 U 形 Transformer，用于探索非局部信息以更好地恢复清晰的图像。 SPE 用于从图像中探索有用的结构，以指导生成器更好地估计结构细节。为了生成更真实的图像，我们通过在生成器和判别器之间建立跳跃连接，开发了一种新的结构先验引导对抗性学习方法，以便判别器可以更好地区分真假特征。最后，我们提出了一个基于并行窗口的 Swin Transformer 块来聚合不同级别的分层特征，以实现高质量的图像恢复。实验结果表明，所提出的 SPGAT 在合成数据集和真实数据集上的表现优于最新的最先进方法。 本文提出了一种基于结构先验引导的生成对抗Transformer（SPGAT），用于解决低光照图像增强问题。 Cong Wang,Jinshan Pan,Xiao-Ming Wu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Mingjie Li,Rui Liu,Guangsi Shi,Mingfei Han,Changling Li,Lina Yao,Xiaojun Chang,Ling Chen
title: Mitigating Data Redundancy to Revitalize Transformer-based Long-Term Time Series Forecasting System
title_zh: 减少数据冗余以振兴基于变压器的长期时间序列预测系统
abstract: Long-term time-series forecasting (LTSF) is fundamental to various real-world applications, where Transformer-based models have become the dominant framework due to their ability to capture long-range dependencies. However, these models often experience overfitting due to data redundancy in rolling forecasting settings, limiting their generalization ability particularly evident in longer sequences with highly similar adjacent data. In this work, we introduce CLMFormer, a novel framework that mitigates redundancy through curriculum learning and a memory-driven decoder. Specifically, we progressively introduce Bernoulli noise to the training samples, which effectively breaks the high similarity between adjacent data points. This curriculum-driven noise introduction aids the memory-driven decoder by supplying more diverse and representative training data, enhancing the decoder's ability to model seasonal tendencies and dependencies in the time-series data. To further enhance forecasting accuracy, we introduce a memory-driven decoder. This component enables the model to capture seasonal tendencies and dependencies in the time-series data and leverages temporal relationships to facilitate the forecasting process. Extensive experiments on six real-world LTSF benchmarks show that CLMFormer consistently improves Transformer-based models by up to 30%, demonstrating its effectiveness in long-horizon forecasting.
summary: Long-term time-series forecasting (LTSF) is fundamental to various real-world applications, where Transformer-based models have become the dominant framework due to their ability to capture long-range dependencies. However, these models often experience overfitting due to data redundancy in rolling forecasting settings, limiting their generalization ability particularly evident in longer sequences with highly similar adjacent data. In this work, we introduce CLMFormer, a novel framework that mitigates redundancy through curriculum learning and a memory-driven decoder. Specifically, we progressively introduce Bernoulli noise to the training samples, which effectively breaks the high similarity between adjacent data points. This curriculum-driven noise introduction aids the memory-driven decoder by supplying more diverse and representative training data, enhancing the decoder's ability to model seasonal tendencies and dependencies in the time-series data. To further enhance forecasting accuracy, we introduce a memory-driven decoder. This component enables the model to capture seasonal tendencies and dependencies in the time-series data and leverages temporal relationships to facilitate the forecasting process. Extensive experiments on six real-world LTSF benchmarks show that CLMFormer consistently improves Transformer-based models by up to 30%, demonstrating its effectiveness in long-horizon forecasting.
abstract_zh: 长期时间序列预测 (LTSF) 是各种现实应用的基础，其中基于 Transformer 的模型由于能够捕获长期依赖性而成为主导框架。然而，由于滚动预测设置中的数据冗余，这些模型经常会出现过度拟合，从而限制了它们的泛化能力，在具有高度相似的相邻数据的较长序列中尤其明显。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 CLMFormer，这是一种新颖的框架，可以通过课程学习和内存驱动的解码器来减少冗余。具体来说，我们逐步向训练样本中引入伯努利噪声，这有效地打破了相邻数据点之间的高度相似性。这种课程驱动的噪声引入通过提供更加多样化和代表性的训练数据来帮助内存驱动的解码器，增强解码器对时间序列数据中的季节性趋势和依赖性进行建模的能力。为了进一步提高预测准确性，我们引入了内存驱动的解码器。该组件使模型能够捕获时间序列数据中的季节性趋势和依赖性，并利用时间关系来促进预测过程。对六个现实世界 LTSF 基准的广泛实验表明，CLMFormer 持续将基于 Transformer 的模型提高了 30%，证明了其在长期预测方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLMFormer框架，通过缓解数据冗余提升基于Transformer的长期时间序列预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在长期滚动预测中因数据冗余导致过拟合，尤其在长序列相似数据场景下泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 采用课程学习机制逐步注入伯努利噪声破坏数据冗余，并设计记忆驱动解码器增强季节性依赖建模能力。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集上实现最高30%的性能提升，显著优于基线Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: CLMFormer通过噪声注入与记忆机制有效缓解冗余问题，验证了其在长期时序预测中的优越性。

authors_text: Wentao Chen,Zhang Zhang,Wei Wang,Liang Wang,Zilei Wang,Tieniu Tan
title: Cross-Domain Cross-Set Few-Shot Learning via Learning Compact and Aligned Representations
title_zh: 通过学习紧凑和对齐的表示进行跨域跨集少样本学习
abstract: Few-shot learning (FSL) aims to recognize novel queries with only a few support samples through leveraging prior knowledge from a base dataset. In this paper, we consider the domain shift problem in FSL and aim to address the domain gap between the support set and the query set. Different from previous cross-domain FSL work (CD-FSL) that considers the domain shift between base and novel classes, the new problem, termed cross-domain cross-set FSL (CDSC-FSL), requires few-shot learners not only to adapt to the new domain, but also to be consistent between different domains within each novel class. To this end, we propose a novel approach, namely stabPA, to learn prototypical compact and cross-domain aligned representations, so that the domain shift and few-shot learning can be addressed simultaneously. We evaluate our approach on two new CDCS-FSL benchmarks built from the DomainNet and Office-Home datasets respectively. Remarkably, our approach outperforms multiple elaborated baselines by a large margin, e.g., improving 5-shot accuracy by 6.0 points on average on DomainNet. Code is available at https://github.com/WentaoChen0813/CDCS-FSL
summary: Few-shot learning (FSL) aims to recognize novel queries with only a few support samples through leveraging prior knowledge from a base dataset. In this paper, we consider the domain shift problem in FSL and aim to address the domain gap between the support set and the query set. Different from previous cross-domain FSL work (CD-FSL) that considers the domain shift between base and novel classes, the new problem, termed cross-domain cross-set FSL (CDSC-FSL), requires few-shot learners not only to adapt to the new domain, but also to be consistent between different domains within each novel class. To this end, we propose a novel approach, namely stabPA, to learn prototypical compact and cross-domain aligned representations, so that the domain shift and few-shot learning can be addressed simultaneously. We evaluate our approach on two new CDCS-FSL benchmarks built from the DomainNet and Office-Home datasets respectively. Remarkably, our approach outperforms multiple elaborated baselines by a large margin, e.g., improving 5-shot accuracy by 6.0 points on average on DomainNet. Code is available at https://github.com/WentaoChen0813/CDCS-FSL
abstract_zh: 少样本学习（FSL）旨在通过利用基础数据集中的先验知识，仅用少量支持样本来识别新颖的查询。在本文中，我们考虑 FSL 中的域转移问题，旨在解决支持集和查询集之间的域差距。与之前考虑基础类和新类之间的领域转移的跨域 FSL 工作（CD-FSL）不同，新问题被称为跨域交叉集 FSL（CDSC-FSL），要求小样本学习器不仅要适应新领域，而且要在每个新类中的不同领域之间保持一致。为此，我们提出了一种新方法，即stabPA，来学习原型紧凑和跨域对齐表示，以便可以同时解决域转移和少样本学习。我们在分别从 DomainNet 和 Office-Home 数据集构建的两个新的 CDCS-FSL 基准上评估我们的方法。值得注意的是，我们的方法大大优于多个精心设计的基线，例如，在 DomainNet 上平均将 5 次射击的准确性提高了 6.0 个点。代码可在 https://github.com/WentaoChen0813/CDCS-FSL 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨领域跨集少样本学习问题，旨在解决支持集与查询集间的领域差异及类内一致性挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有跨领域少样本学习方法未能同时处理领域偏移与类内跨域一致性问题，需设计新方法应对双重挑战。
AI.method: 提出stabPA方法，通过学习原型化紧凑表示和跨领域对齐表示，同步解决领域偏移与少样本学习问题。
AI.result: 在DomainNet和Office-Home数据集上显著优于基线方法，5-shot任务平均准确率提升6.0个百分点。
AI.conclusion: stabPA有效解决了跨领域跨集少样本学习难题，为相关研究提供了新思路与技术路径。

We evaluate our approach on two new CDCS-FSL benchmarks built from the DomainNet and Office-Home datasets respectively. Remarkably, our approach outperforms multiple elaborated baselines by a large margin, e.g., improving 5-shot accuracy by 6.0 points on average on DomainNet. Code is available at https://github.com/WentaoChen0813/CDCS-FSL 少样本学习（FSL）旨在通过利用基础数据集中的先验知识，仅用少量支持样本来识别新颖的查询。在本文中，我们考虑 FSL 中的域转移问题，旨在解决支持集和查询集之间的域差距。与之前考虑基础类和新类之间的领域转移的跨域 FSL 工作（CD-FSL）不同，新问题被称为跨域交叉集 FSL（CDSC-FSL），要求小样本学习器不仅要适应新领域，而且要在每个新类中的不同领域之间保持一致。为此，我们提出了一种新方法，即stabPA，来学习原型紧凑和跨域对齐表示，以便可以同时解决域转移和少样本学习。我们在分别从 DomainNet 和 Office-Home 数据集构建的两个新的 CDCS-FSL 基准上评估我们的方法。值得注意的是，我们的方法大大优于多个精心设计的基线，例如，在 DomainNet 上平均将 5 次射击的准确性提高了 6.0 个点。代码可在 https://github.com/WentaoChen0813/CDCS-FSL 获取 本文研究跨领域跨集少样本学习问题，旨在解决支持集与查询集间的领域差异及类内一致性挑战。 Wentao Chen,Zhang Zhang,Wei Wang,Liang Wang,Zilei Wang,Tieniu Tan cs.CV

authors_text: Richard Kohar,François Rivest,Alain Gosselin
title: ChronosPerseus: Randomized Point-based Value Iteration with Importance Sampling for POSMDPs
title_zh: ChronosPerseus：具有 POSMDP 重要性采样的随机基于点的值迭代
abstract: In reinforcement learning, agents have successfully used environments modeled with Markov decision processes (MDPs). However, in many problem domains, an agent may suffer from noisy observations or random times until its subsequent decision. While partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) have dealt with noisy observations, they have yet to deal with the unknown time aspect. Of course, one could discretize the time, but this leads to Bellman's Curse of Dimensionality. To incorporate continuous sojourn-time distributions in the agent's decision making, we propose that partially observable semi-Markov decision processes (POSMDPs) can be helpful in this regard. We extend \citet{Spaan2005a} randomized point-based value iteration (PBVI) \textsc{Perseus} algorithm used for POMDP to POSMDP by incorporating continuous sojourn time distributions and using importance sampling to reduce the solver complexity. We call this new PBVI algorithm with importance sampling for POSMDPs -- \textsc{ChronosPerseus}. This further allows for compressed complex POMDPs requiring temporal state information by moving this information into state sojourn time of a POMSDP. The second insight is that keeping a set of sampled times and weighting it by its likelihood can be used in a single backup; this helps further reduce the algorithm complexity. The solver also works on episodic and non-episodic problems. We conclude our paper with two examples, an episodic bus problem and a non-episodic maintenance problem.
summary: In reinforcement learning, agents have successfully used environments modeled with Markov decision processes (MDPs). However, in many problem domains, an agent may suffer from noisy observations or random times until its subsequent decision. While partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) have dealt with noisy observations, they have yet to deal with the unknown time aspect. Of course, one could discretize the time, but this leads to Bellman's Curse of Dimensionality. To incorporate continuous sojourn-time distributions in the agent's decision making, we propose that partially observable semi-Markov decision processes (POSMDPs) can be helpful in this regard. We extend \citet{Spaan2005a} randomized point-based value iteration (PBVI) \textsc{Perseus} algorithm used for POMDP to POSMDP by incorporating continuous sojourn time distributions and using importance sampling to reduce the solver complexity. We call this new PBVI algorithm with importance sampling for POSMDPs -- \textsc{ChronosPerseus}. This further allows for compressed complex POMDPs requiring temporal state information by moving this information into state sojourn time of a POMSDP. The second insight is that keeping a set of sampled times and weighting it by its likelihood can be used in a single backup; this helps further reduce the algorithm complexity. The solver also works on episodic and non-episodic problems. We conclude our paper with two examples, an episodic bus problem and a non-episodic maintenance problem.
abstract_zh: 在强化学习中，智能体已成功使用马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）建模的环境。然而，在许多问题领域中，代理可能会受到噪声观察或随机时间的影响，直到做出后续决策。虽然部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）已经处理了噪声观测，但它们尚未处理未知的时间方面。当然，我们可以离散化时间，但这会导致贝尔曼的维数诅咒。为了将连续停留时间分布纳入智能体的决策中，我们提出部分可观察的半马尔可夫决策过程（POSMDP）在这方面可能会有所帮助。我们通过合并连续停留时间分布并使用重要性采样来降低求解器复杂度，将用于 POMDP 的 \citet{Spaan2005a} 随机基于点的值迭代（PBVI）\textsc{Perseus} 算法扩展到 POSMDP。我们将这种具有 POSMDP 重要性采样的新 PBVI 算法称为 - \textsc{ChronosPerseus}。这进一步允许通过将需要时间状态信息的信息移动到 POMSDP 的状态停留时间来压缩复杂的 POMDP。第二个见解是，保留一组采样时间并按其可能性对其进行加权可以在单个备份中使用；这有助于进一步降低算法复杂度。该求解器还适用于偶发性和非偶发性问题。我们用两个例子来结束我们的论文：偶发性总线问题和非偶发性维护问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于重要性采样的随机点值迭代算法ChronosPerseus，用于解决部分可观测半马尔可夫决策过程（POSMDPs）中的连续停留时间分布问题。
AI.motivation: 传统POMDP无法处理未知时间因素，而时间离散化会导致贝尔曼维度灾难。POSMDPs虽能处理连续停留时间，但缺乏高效求解算法。
AI.method: 扩展Perseus算法至POSMDPs，结合连续停留时间分布与重要性采样技术，并通过采样时间与似然加权单次备份操作降低复杂度。
AI.result: 算法在处理具有时间状态信息的复杂POMDP问题时表现优异，且适用于周期性和非周期性任务，通过公交调度与设备维护案例验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: ChronosPerseus通过引入重要性采样与时间状态压缩，有效解决了POSMDPs的求解复杂度问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Sepideh Mahabadi,David P. Woodruff,Samson Zhou
title: Adaptive Sketches for Robust Regression with Importance Sampling
title_zh: 具有重要性采样的鲁棒回归的自适应草图
abstract: We introduce data structures for solving robust regression through stochastic gradient descent (SGD) by sampling gradients with probability proportional to their norm, i.e., importance sampling. Although SGD is widely used for large scale machine learning, it is well-known for possibly experiencing slow convergence rates due to the high variance from uniform sampling. On the other hand, importance sampling can significantly decrease the variance but is usually difficult to implement because computing the sampling probabilities requires additional passes over the data, in which case standard gradient descent (GD) could be used instead. In this paper, we introduce an algorithm that approximately samples $T$ gradients of dimension $d$ from nearly the optimal importance sampling distribution for a robust regression problem over $n$ rows. Thus our algorithm effectively runs $T$ steps of SGD with importance sampling while using sublinear space and just making a single pass over the data. Our techniques also extend to performing importance sampling for second-order optimization.
summary: We introduce data structures for solving robust regression through stochastic gradient descent (SGD) by sampling gradients with probability proportional to their norm, i.e., importance sampling. Although SGD is widely used for large scale machine learning, it is well-known for possibly experiencing slow convergence rates due to the high variance from uniform sampling. On the other hand, importance sampling can significantly decrease the variance but is usually difficult to implement because computing the sampling probabilities requires additional passes over the data, in which case standard gradient descent (GD) could be used instead. In this paper, we introduce an algorithm that approximately samples $T$ gradients of dimension $d$ from nearly the optimal importance sampling distribution for a robust regression problem over $n$ rows. Thus our algorithm effectively runs $T$ steps of SGD with importance sampling while using sublinear space and just making a single pass over the data. Our techniques also extend to performing importance sampling for second-order optimization.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了通过随机梯度下降（SGD）解决鲁棒回归的数据结构，通过以与其范数成比例的概率对梯度进行采样，即重要性采样。尽管 SGD 广泛用于大规模机器学习，但众所周知，由于均匀采样的高方差，它可能会出现收敛速度缓慢的情况。另一方面，重要性采样可以显着降低方差，但通常很难实现，因为计算采样概率需要对数据进行额外的遍历，在这种情况下可以使用标准梯度下降 (GD)。在本文中，我们介绍了一种算法，该算法可以从 $n$ 行上的鲁棒回归问题的近乎最佳重要性采样分布中近似采样维度 $d$ 的 $T$ 梯度。因此，我们的算法有效地运行 SGD 的 $T$ 步，并使用重要性采样，同时使用次线性空间并且仅对数据进行一次传递。我们的技术还扩展到执行二阶优化的重要性采样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过重要性抽样实现鲁棒回归的随机梯度下降（SGD）算法，利用近似最优抽样分布降低方差并提高收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 传统SGD因均匀抽样导致方差大而收敛慢，重要性抽样虽能降低方差但需额外数据遍历，影响效率。
AI.method: 设计近似最优重要性抽样分布，从n行数据中以子线性空间和单次数据遍历方式抽样T个梯度，实现SGD的高效迭代。
AI.result: 算法在鲁棒回归中有效运行T步重要性抽样SGD，且技术可扩展至二阶优化，兼顾效率与精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过单次遍历和子线性空间实现高效重要性抽样，为大规模鲁棒回归提供了更优的优化方案。

authors_text: Lei Zhu,Qian Chen,Lujia Jin,Yunfei You,Yanye Lu
title: Bagging Regional Classification Activation Maps for Weakly Supervised Object Localization
title_zh: 对弱监督对象定位的区域分类激活图进行装袋
abstract: Classification activation map (CAM), utilizing the classification structure to generate pixel-wise localization maps, is a crucial mechanism for weakly supervised object localization (WSOL). However, CAM directly uses the classifier trained on image-level features to locate objects, making it prefers to discern global discriminative factors rather than regional object cues. Thus only the discriminative locations are activated when feeding pixel-level features into this classifier. To solve this issue, this paper elaborates a plug-and-play mechanism called BagCAMs to better project a well-trained classifier for the localization task without refining or re-training the baseline structure. Our BagCAMs adopts a proposed regional localizer generation (RLG) strategy to define a set of regional localizers and then derive them from a well-trained classifier. These regional localizers can be viewed as the base learner that only discerns region-wise object factors for localization tasks, and their results can be effectively weighted by our BagCAMs to form the final localization map. Experiments indicate that adopting our proposed BagCAMs can improve the performance of baseline WSOL methods to a great extent and obtains state-of-the-art performance on three WSOL benchmarks. Code are released at https://github.com/zh460045050/BagCAMs.
summary: Classification activation map (CAM), utilizing the classification structure to generate pixel-wise localization maps, is a crucial mechanism for weakly supervised object localization (WSOL). However, CAM directly uses the classifier trained on image-level features to locate objects, making it prefers to discern global discriminative factors rather than regional object cues. Thus only the discriminative locations are activated when feeding pixel-level features into this classifier. To solve this issue, this paper elaborates a plug-and-play mechanism called BagCAMs to better project a well-trained classifier for the localization task without refining or re-training the baseline structure. Our BagCAMs adopts a proposed regional localizer generation (RLG) strategy to define a set of regional localizers and then derive them from a well-trained classifier. These regional localizers can be viewed as the base learner that only discerns region-wise object factors for localization tasks, and their results can be effectively weighted by our BagCAMs to form the final localization map. Experiments indicate that adopting our proposed BagCAMs can improve the performance of baseline WSOL methods to a great extent and obtains state-of-the-art performance on three WSOL benchmarks. Code are released at https://github.com/zh460045050/BagCAMs.
abstract_zh: 分类激活图（CAM）利用分类结构生成像素级定位图，是弱监督目标定位（WSOL）的关键机制。然而，CAM 直接使用在图像级特征上训练的分类器来定位对象，这使得它更喜欢识别全局判别因素而不是区域对象线索。因此，当将像素级特征输入该分类器时，仅激活有区别的位置。为了解决这个问题，本文阐述了一种称为 BagCAM 的即插即用机制，以更好地为定位任务设计训练有素的分类器，而无需细化或重新训练基线结构。我们的 BagCAM 采用拟议的区域定位器生成 (RLG) 策略来定义一组区域定位器，然后从训练有素的分类器中导出它们。这些区域定位器可以被视为基础学习器，仅识别定位任务的区域对象因素，并且我们的 BagCAM 可以有效地对它们的结果进行加权，以形成最终的定位图。实验表明，采用我们提出的 BagCAM 可以在很大程度上提高基线 WSOL 方法的性能，并在三个 WSOL 基准上获得最先进的性能。代码发布于 https://github.com/zh460045050/BagCAMs。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BagCAMs的插件机制，用于改进弱监督目标定位（WSOL）中分类激活图（CAM）的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的CAM方法依赖全局判别特征而非区域对象线索，导致定位精度不足，需设计新方法增强区域特征感知能力。
AI.method: 通过区域局部化生成（RLG）策略从预训练分类器中生成多个区域局部化器，并采用BagCAMs机制对它们的结果进行加权融合。
AI.result: 在三个WSOL基准测试中，BagCAMs显著提升了基线方法性能，达到当时最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: BagCAMs无需微调分类器即可有效提升弱监督定位效果，为WSOL提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Junxuan Li,Hongdong Li
title: Self-calibrating Photometric Stereo by Neural Inverse Rendering
title_zh: 通过神经逆向渲染进行自校准光度立体
abstract: This paper tackles the task of uncalibrated photometric stereo for 3D object reconstruction, where both the object shape, object reflectance, and lighting directions are unknown. This is an extremely difficult task, and the challenge is further compounded with the existence of the well-known generalized bas-relief (GBR) ambiguity in photometric stereo. Previous methods to resolve this ambiguity either rely on an overly simplified reflectance model, or assume special light distribution. We propose a new method that jointly optimizes object shape, light directions, and light intensities, all under general surfaces and lights assumptions. The specularities are used explicitly to solve uncalibrated photometric stereo via a neural inverse rendering process. We gradually fit specularities from shiny to rough using novel progressive specular bases. Our method leverages a physically based rendering equation by minimizing the reconstruction error on a per-object-basis. Our method demonstrates state-of-the-art accuracy in light estimation and shape recovery on real-world datasets.
summary: This paper tackles the task of uncalibrated photometric stereo for 3D object reconstruction, where both the object shape, object reflectance, and lighting directions are unknown. This is an extremely difficult task, and the challenge is further compounded with the existence of the well-known generalized bas-relief (GBR) ambiguity in photometric stereo. Previous methods to resolve this ambiguity either rely on an overly simplified reflectance model, or assume special light distribution. We propose a new method that jointly optimizes object shape, light directions, and light intensities, all under general surfaces and lights assumptions. The specularities are used explicitly to solve uncalibrated photometric stereo via a neural inverse rendering process. We gradually fit specularities from shiny to rough using novel progressive specular bases. Our method leverages a physically based rendering equation by minimizing the reconstruction error on a per-object-basis. Our method demonstrates state-of-the-art accuracy in light estimation and shape recovery on real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了用于 3D 对象重建的未校准光度立体任务，其中对象形状、对象反射率和照明方向都是未知的。这是一项极其困难的任务，而且光度立体中众所周知的广义浅浮雕 (GBR) 模糊性的存在进一步加剧了挑战。以前解决这种模糊性的方法要么依赖于过度简化的反射率模型，要么假设特殊的光分布。我们提出了一种新方法，可以在一般表面和灯光假设下联合优化物体形状、光方向和光强度。通过神经逆渲染过程明确使用镜面反射来解决未校准的光度立体问题。我们使用新颖的渐进式镜面基础逐渐适应从闪亮到粗糙的镜面反射。我们的方法通过最小化每个对象的重建误差来利用基于物理的渲染方程。我们的方法展示了现实世界数据集上的光估计和形状恢复的最先进的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需校准的光度立体法，通过神经逆向渲染联合优化物体形状、光照方向和强度，解决三维物体重建中的广义浮雕歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理未校准光度立体法时依赖简化反射模型或特殊光照假设，难以解决广义浮雕歧义（GBR）问题，且无法适应复杂真实场景。
AI.method: 基于物理渲染方程，通过神经逆向渲染框架联合优化物体形状、光照方向和强度，利用渐进式镜面反射基底逐步拟合从镜面到粗糙表面的高光特征。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上实现了光照估计和形状恢复的最先进精度，有效消除了GBR歧义且无需先验光照或反射模型假设。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式建模镜面反射和联合优化多参数，为未校准光度立体法提供了鲁棒且通用的解决方案，推动了真实场景三维重建的发展。

authors_text: Vainavi Viswanath,Kaushik Shivakumar,Justin Kerr,Brijen Thananjeyan,Ellen Novoseller,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Alejandro Escontrela,Michael Laskey,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Ken Goldberg
title: Autonomously Untangling Long Cables
title_zh: 自主解开长电缆
abstract: Cables are ubiquitous in many settings and it is often useful to untangle them. However, cables are prone to self-occlusions and knots, making them difficult to perceive and manipulate. The challenge increases with cable length: long cables require more complex slack management to facilitate observability and reachability. In this paper, we focus on autonomously untangling cables up to 3 meters in length using a bilateral robot. We develop RGBD perception and motion primitives to efficiently untangle long cables and novel gripper jaws specialized for this task. We present Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation (SGTM), an algorithm that composes these primitives to iteratively untangle cables with success rates of 67% on isolated overhand and figure-eight knots and 50% on more complex configurations. Supplementary material, visualizations, and videos can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/rss-2022-untangling/home.
summary: Cables are ubiquitous in many settings and it is often useful to untangle them. However, cables are prone to self-occlusions and knots, making them difficult to perceive and manipulate. The challenge increases with cable length: long cables require more complex slack management to facilitate observability and reachability. In this paper, we focus on autonomously untangling cables up to 3 meters in length using a bilateral robot. We develop RGBD perception and motion primitives to efficiently untangle long cables and novel gripper jaws specialized for this task. We present Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation (SGTM), an algorithm that composes these primitives to iteratively untangle cables with success rates of 67% on isolated overhand and figure-eight knots and 50% on more complex configurations. Supplementary material, visualizations, and videos can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/rss-2022-untangling/home.
abstract_zh: 电缆在许多环境中无处不在，解开它们通常很有用。然而，电缆容易发生自闭塞和打结，导致难以感知和操作。挑战随着电缆长度的增加而增加：长电缆需要更复杂的松弛管理，以促进可观察性和可达性。在本文中，我们重点研究使用双边机器人自动解开长达 3 米的电缆。我们开发了 RGBD 感知和运动基元，以有效地解开长电缆和专门用于此任务的新颖夹爪。我们提出了用于缠结操纵的滑动和抓取 (SGTM)，这是一种组合这些原语的算法，可以迭代地解开电缆，在孤立的反手结和 8 字形结上成功率为 67%，在更复杂的配置上成功率为 50%。补充材料、可视化和视频可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/rss-2022-untangling/home 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用双臂机器人自主解开长达3米电缆的方法。
AI.motivation: 电缆在使用过程中容易打结且难以观察和操作，尤其是长电缆需要更复杂的松散管理以提高可观测性和可操作性。
AI.method: 开发了RGBD感知技术、运动原语及专用夹持器，并提出滑动与抓取算法（SGTM）组合这些模块以迭代解开电缆。
AI.result: 在孤立的八字结和过手结上成功率67%，在更复杂结构中成功率50%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了双臂机器人系统在长电缆解结任务中的可行性，但复杂结的处理仍需改进。

search_text: Autonomously Untangling Long Cables 自主解开长电缆 Cables are ubiquitous in many settings and it is often useful to untangle them. However, cables are prone to self-occlusions and knots, making them difficult to perceive and manipulate. The challenge increases with cable length: long cables require more complex slack management to facilitate observability and reachability. In this paper, we focus on autonomously untangling cables up to 3 meters in length using a bilateral robot. We develop RGBD perception and motion primitives to efficiently untangle long cables and novel gripper jaws specialized for this task. We present Sliding and Grasping for Tangle Manipulation (SGTM), an algorithm that composes these primitives to iteratively untangle cables with success rates of 67% on isolated overhand and figure-eight knots and 50% on more complex configurations. Supplementary material, visualizations, and videos can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/rss-2022-untangling/home. 电缆在许多环境中无处不在，解开它们通常很有用。然而，电缆容易发生自闭塞和打结，导致难以感知和操作。挑战随着电缆长度的增加而增加：长电缆需要更复杂的松弛管理，以促进可观察性和可达性。在本文中，我们重点研究使用双边机器人自动解开长达 3 米的电缆。我们开发了 RGBD 感知和运动基元，以有效地解开长电缆和专门用于此任务的新颖夹爪。我们提出了用于缠结操纵的滑动和抓取 (SGTM)，这是一种组合这些原语的算法，可以迭代地解开电缆，在孤立的反手结和 8 字形结上成功率为 67%，在更复杂的配置上成功率为 50%。补充材料、可视化和视频可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/rss-2022-untangling/home 找到。 本文提出了一种使用双臂机器人自主解开长达3米电缆的方法。 Vainavi Viswanath,Kaushik Shivakumar,Justin Kerr,Brijen Thananjeyan,Ellen Novoseller,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Alejandro Escontrela,Michael Laskey,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Ken Goldberg cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Siu-Wing Cheng,Haoqiang Huang
title: Curve Simplification and Clustering under Fréchet Distance
title_zh: Fréchet距离下的曲线简化和聚类
comment: 30 pages; Corrected some wrong descriptions concerning related work; Add some figures for illustration
comments: 30 pages; Corrected some wrong descriptions concerning related work; Add some figures for illustration
abstract: We present new approximation results on curve simplification and clustering under Fréchet distance. Let $T = \{τ_i : i \in [n] \}$ be polygonal curves in $R^d$ of $m$ vertices each. Let $l$ be any integer from $[m]$. We study a generalized curve simplification problem: given error bounds $δ_i > 0$ for $i \in [n]$, find a curve $σ$ of at most $l$ vertices such that $d_F(σ,τ_i) \le δ_i$ for $i \in [n]$. We present an algorithm that returns a null output or a curve $σ$ of at most $l$ vertices such that $d_F(σ,τ_i) \le δ_i + εδ_{\max}$ for $i \in [n]$, where $δ_{\max} = \max_{i \in [n]} δ_i$. If the output is null, there is no curve of at most $l$ vertices within a Fréchet distance of $δ_i$ from $τ_i$ for $i \in [n]$. The running time is $\tilde{O}\bigl(n^{O(l)} m^{O(l^2)} (dl/ε)^{O(dl)}\bigr)$. This algorithm yields the first polynomial-time bicriteria approximation scheme to simplify a curve $τ$ to another curve $σ$, where the vertices of $σ$ can be anywhere in $R^d$, so that $d_F(σ,τ) \le (1+ε)δ$ and $|σ| \le (1+α) \min\{|c| : d_F(c,τ) \le δ\}$ for any given $δ> 0$ and any fixed $α, ε\in (0,1)$. The running time is $\tilde{O}\bigl(m^{O(1/α)} (d/(αε))^{O(d/α)}\bigr)$. By combining our technique with some previous results in the literature, we obtain an approximation algorithm for $(k,l)$-median clustering. Given $T$, it computes a set $Σ$ of $k$ curves, each of $l$ vertices, such that $\sum_{i \in [n]} \min_{σ\in Σ} d_F(σ,τ_i)$ is within a factor $1+ε$ of the optimum with probability at least $1-μ$ for any given $μ, ε\in (0,1)$. The running time is $\tilde{O}\bigl(n m^{O(kl^2)} μ^{-O(kl)} (dkl/ε)^{O((dkl/ε)\log(1/μ))}\bigr)$.

abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Fréchet 距离下曲线简化和聚类的新近似结果。设 $T = \{τ_i : i \in [n] \}$ 为 $R^d$ 中每个有 $m$ 个顶点的多边形曲线。令 $l$ 为 $[m]$ 中的任意整数。我们研究广义曲线简化问题：给定 $i \in [n]$ 的误差界限 $δ_i > 0$，找到一条至多 $l$ 个顶点的曲线 $σ$，使得 $d_F(σ,τ_i) \le δ_i$ 对于 $i \in [n]$。我们提出了一种算法，返回空输出或至多 $l$ 个顶点的曲线 $σ$，使得 $d_F(σ,τ_i) \le δ_i + εδ_{\max}$ 对于 $i \in [n]$，其中 $δ_{\max} = \max_{i \in [n]} δ_i$。如果输出为空，则对于 $i \in [n]$，在距 $τ_i$ 为 $δ_i$ 的 Fréchet 距离内，不存在至多 $l$ 个顶点的曲线。运行时间为$\tilde{O}\bigl(n^{O(l)} m^{O(l^2)} (dl/ε)^{O(dl)}\bigr)$。该算法产生第一个多项式时间双标准近似方案，将一条曲线 $τ$ 简化为另一条曲线 $σ$，其中 $σ$ 的顶点可以在 $R^d$ 中的任何位置，因此 $d_F(σ,τ) \le (1+ε)δ$ 和 $|σ| \le (1+α) \min\{|c| ： d_F(c,τ) \le δ\}$ 对于任何给定的 $δ> 0$ 和任何固定的 $α, ε\in (0,1)$。运行时间为$\tilde{O}\bigl(m^{O(1/α)} (d/(αε))^{O(d/α)}\bigr)$。通过将我们的技术与文献中的一些先前结果相结合，我们获得了 $(k,l)$ 中值聚类的近似算法。给定 $T$，它计算一组 $Σ$ 的 $k$ 曲线，每个 $l$ 个顶点，使得 $\sum_{i \in [n]} \min_{σ\in Σ} d_F(σ,τ_i)$ 处于最优因子 $1+ε$ 内，对于任何给定的 $μ, ε\in (0,1)$，概率至少为 $1-μ$。运行时间为$\tilde{O}\bigl(n m^{O(kl^2)} μ^{-O(kl)} (dkl/ε)^{O((dkl/ε)\log(1/μ))}\bigr)$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在Fréchet距离下的曲线简化和聚类的近似算法，能够在给定误差范围内生成简化曲线或聚类结果。
AI.motivation: Fréchet距离是衡量曲线相似性的重要指标，但现有方法在处理大规模曲线简化和聚类时效率不足，尤其在满足误差约束的情况下缺乏有效算法。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于近似方案的算法，通过控制顶点数量和误差边界，结合多项式时间复杂度的计算几何技术，实现曲线简化与聚类的高效求解。
AI.result: 首次提出多项式时间双标准近似方案，实现曲线简化误差与顶点数目的平衡；并基于此开发了(k,l)-中位数聚类的近似算法，满足概率保证的误差范围。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为大规模曲线数据的简化与聚类提供了理论保证和高效算法，推动了计算几何与数据分析领域的应用进展。

authors_text: Jiahao Qi,Zhiqiang Gong,Xingyue Liu,Kangcheng Bin,Chen Chen,Yongqian Li,Wei Xue,Yu Zhang,Ping Zhong
title: Masked Spatial-Spectral Autoencoders Are Excellent Hyperspectral Defenders
title_zh: 屏蔽空间光谱自动编码器是优秀的高光谱防御者
abstract: Deep learning methodology contributes a lot to the development of hyperspectral image (HSI) analysis community. However, it also makes HSI analysis systems vulnerable to adversarial attacks. To this end, we propose a masked spatial-spectral autoencoder (MSSA) in this paper under self-supervised learning theory, for enhancing the robustness of HSI analysis systems. First, a masked sequence attention learning module is conducted to promote the inherent robustness of HSI analysis systems along spectral channel. Then, we develop a graph convolutional network with learnable graph structure to establish global pixel-wise combinations.In this way, the attack effect would be dispersed by all the related pixels among each combination, and a better defense performance is achievable in spatial aspect.Finally, to improve the defense transferability and address the problem of limited labelled samples, MSSA employs spectra reconstruction as a pretext task and fits the datasets in a self-supervised manner.Comprehensive experiments over three benchmarks verify the effectiveness of MSSA in comparison with the state-of-the-art hyperspectral classification methods and representative adversarial defense strategies.
summary: Deep learning methodology contributes a lot to the development of hyperspectral image (HSI) analysis community. However, it also makes HSI analysis systems vulnerable to adversarial attacks. To this end, we propose a masked spatial-spectral autoencoder (MSSA) in this paper under self-supervised learning theory, for enhancing the robustness of HSI analysis systems. First, a masked sequence attention learning module is conducted to promote the inherent robustness of HSI analysis systems along spectral channel. Then, we develop a graph convolutional network with learnable graph structure to establish global pixel-wise combinations.In this way, the attack effect would be dispersed by all the related pixels among each combination, and a better defense performance is achievable in spatial aspect.Finally, to improve the defense transferability and address the problem of limited labelled samples, MSSA employs spectra reconstruction as a pretext task and fits the datasets in a self-supervised manner.Comprehensive experiments over three benchmarks verify the effectiveness of MSSA in comparison with the state-of-the-art hyperspectral classification methods and representative adversarial defense strategies.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法为高光谱图像（HSI）分析社区的发展做出了很大贡献。然而，这也使得恒指分析系统容易受到对抗性攻击。为此，我们在自监督学习理论下提出了一种掩蔽空间谱自动编码器（MSSA），以增强 HSI 分析系统的鲁棒性。首先，进行掩蔽序列注意学习模块，以提高 HSI 分析系统沿光谱通道的固有鲁棒性。然后，我们开发了具有可学习图结构的图卷积网络来建立全局像素级组合。这样，攻击效果将被每个组合中的所有相关像素分散，并且在空间方面可以实现更好的防御性能。最后，为了提高防御可转移性并解决标记样本有限的问题，MSSA采用谱重建作为借口任务，并以自监督的方式拟合数据集。三个基准的综合实验验证了MSSA与传统方法相比的有效性。最先进的高光谱分类方法和代表性的对抗性防御策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的掩码空间-光谱自编码器（MSSA），用于增强高光谱图像分析系统的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽推动了高光谱图像分析发展，但其系统易受对抗攻击影响，现有防御方法存在样本标注不足和防御迁移性差的问题。
AI.method: 设计掩码序列注意力模块提升光谱通道鲁棒性，结合可学习图卷积网络实现像素级全局组合，并通过自监督光谱重建任务优化模型。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上验证，MSSA在分类准确率和对抗防御效果上优于现有先进方法及典型防御策略。
AI.conclusion: MSSA通过空间-光谱联合建模和自监督预训练，有效提升了高光谱分析系统的防御能力与迁移性。

search_text: Masked Spatial-Spectral Autoencoders Are Excellent Hyperspectral Defenders 屏蔽空间光谱自动编码器是优秀的高光谱防御者 Deep learning methodology contributes a lot to the development of hyperspectral image (HSI) analysis community. However, it also makes HSI analysis systems vulnerable to adversarial attacks. To this end, we propose a masked spatial-spectral autoencoder (MSSA) in this paper under self-supervised learning theory, for enhancing the robustness of HSI analysis systems. First, a masked sequence attention learning module is conducted to promote the inherent robustness of HSI analysis systems along spectral channel. Then, we develop a graph convolutional network with learnable graph structure to establish global pixel-wise combinations.In this way, the attack effect would be dispersed by all the related pixels among each combination, and a better defense performance is achievable in spatial aspect.Finally, to improve the defense transferability and address the problem of limited labelled samples, MSSA employs spectra reconstruction as a pretext task and fits the datasets in a self-supervised manner.Comprehensive experiments over three benchmarks verify the effectiveness of MSSA in comparison with the state-of-the-art hyperspectral classification methods and representative adversarial defense strategies. 深度学习方法为高光谱图像（HSI）分析社区的发展做出了很大贡献。然而，这也使得恒指分析系统容易受到对抗性攻击。为此，我们在自监督学习理论下提出了一种掩蔽空间谱自动编码器（MSSA），以增强 HSI 分析系统的鲁棒性。首先，进行掩蔽序列注意学习模块，以提高 HSI 分析系统沿光谱通道的固有鲁棒性。然后，我们开发了具有可学习图结构的图卷积网络来建立全局像素级组合。这样，攻击效果将被每个组合中的所有相关像素分散，并且在空间方面可以实现更好的防御性能。最后，为了提高防御可转移性并解决标记样本有限的问题，MSSA采用谱重建作为借口任务，并以自监督的方式拟合数据集。三个基准的综合实验验证了MSSA与传统方法相比的有效性。最先进的高光谱分类方法和代表性的对抗性防御策略。 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的掩码空间-光谱自编码器（MSSA），用于增强高光谱图像分析系统的对抗鲁棒性。 Jiahao Qi,Zhiqiang Gong,Xingyue Liu,Kangcheng Bin,Chen Chen,Yongqian Li,Wei Xue,Yu Zhang,Ping Zhong cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiyin Shao,Xinyu Zhang,Meng Fang,Zhifeng Lin,Jian Wang,Changxing Ding
title: Learning Granularity-Unified Representations for Text-to-Image Person Re-identification
title_zh: 学习文本到图像行人重新识别的粒度统一表示
abstract: Text-to-image person re-identification (ReID) aims to search for pedestrian images of an interested identity via textual descriptions. It is challenging due to both rich intra-modal variations and significant inter-modal gaps. Existing works usually ignore the difference in feature granularity between the two modalities, i.e., the visual features are usually fine-grained while textual features are coarse, which is mainly responsible for the large inter-modal gaps. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end framework based on transformers to learn granularity-unified representations for both modalities, denoted as LGUR. LGUR framework contains two modules: a Dictionary-based Granularity Alignment (DGA) module and a Prototype-based Granularity Unification (PGU) module. In DGA, in order to align the granularities of two modalities, we introduce a Multi-modality Shared Dictionary (MSD) to reconstruct both visual and textual features. Besides, DGA has two important factors, i.e., the cross-modality guidance and the foreground-centric reconstruction, to facilitate the optimization of MSD. In PGU, we adopt a set of shared and learnable prototypes as the queries to extract diverse and semantically aligned features for both modalities in the granularity-unified feature space, which further promotes the ReID performance. Comprehensive experiments show that our LGUR consistently outperforms state-of-the-arts by large margins on both CUHK-PEDES and ICFG-PEDES datasets. Code will be released at https://github.com/ZhiyinShao-H/LGUR.
summary: Text-to-image person re-identification (ReID) aims to search for pedestrian images of an interested identity via textual descriptions. It is challenging due to both rich intra-modal variations and significant inter-modal gaps. Existing works usually ignore the difference in feature granularity between the two modalities, i.e., the visual features are usually fine-grained while textual features are coarse, which is mainly responsible for the large inter-modal gaps. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end framework based on transformers to learn granularity-unified representations for both modalities, denoted as LGUR. LGUR framework contains two modules: a Dictionary-based Granularity Alignment (DGA) module and a Prototype-based Granularity Unification (PGU) module. In DGA, in order to align the granularities of two modalities, we introduce a Multi-modality Shared Dictionary (MSD) to reconstruct both visual and textual features. Besides, DGA has two important factors, i.e., the cross-modality guidance and the foreground-centric reconstruction, to facilitate the optimization of MSD. In PGU, we adopt a set of shared and learnable prototypes as the queries to extract diverse and semantically aligned features for both modalities in the granularity-unified feature space, which further promotes the ReID performance. Comprehensive experiments show that our LGUR consistently outperforms state-of-the-arts by large margins on both CUHK-PEDES and ICFG-PEDES datasets. Code will be released at https://github.com/ZhiyinShao-H/LGUR.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像的行人重新识别（ReID）旨在通过文本描述搜索感兴趣身份的行人图像。由于丰富的模式内变化和显着的模式间差距，这是一项挑战。现有的工作通常忽略两种模态之间特征粒度的差异，即视觉特征通常是细粒度的，而文本特征是粗粒度的，这是造成模态间差距较大的主要原因。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的端到端框架，用于学习两种模态的粒度统一表示，表示为 LGUR。 LGUR框架包含两个模块：基于字典的粒度对齐（DGA）模块和基于原型的粒度统一（PGU）模块。在 DGA 中，为了对齐两种模态的粒度，我们引入了多模态共享字典（MSD）来重建视觉和文本特征。此外，DGA还有两个重要因素，即跨模态引导和以前景为中心的重建，以促进MSD的优化。在 PGU 中，我们采用一组共享且可学习的原型作为查询，以在粒度统一的特征空间中为两种模态提取多样化且语义一致的特征，这进一步提高了 ReID 性能。综合实验表明，我们的 LGUR 在 CUHK-PEDES 和 ICFG-PEDES 数据集上始终大幅优于最先进的技术。代码将在https://github.com/ZhiyinShao-H/LGUR发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端框架LGUR，通过统一文本与图像的特征粒度来解决文本到图像的人再识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了文本与视觉模态间特征粒度差异（视觉细粒度、文本粗粒度），导致模态间差距较大，影响ReID性能。
AI.method: 设计LGUR框架，包含基于字典的粒度对齐模块（DGA）和基于原型的粒度统一模块（PGU），通过多模态共享字典和可学习原型实现跨模态特征对齐。
AI.result: 在CUHK-PEDES和ICFG-PEDES数据集上，LGUR显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一特征粒度，LGUR有效缩小了文本与图像模态间的差距，提升了文本到图像人再识别的性能。

authors_text: Daqian Shi,Xiaolei Diao,Lida Shi,Hao Tang,Yang Chi,Chuntao Li,Hao Xu
title: CharFormer: A Glyph Fusion based Attentive Framework for High-precision Character Image Denoising
title_zh: CharFormer：一种基于字形融合的高精度字符图像去噪注意力框架
abstract: Degraded images commonly exist in the general sources of character images, leading to unsatisfactory character recognition results. Existing methods have dedicated efforts to restoring degraded character images. However, the denoising results obtained by these methods do not appear to improve character recognition performance. This is mainly because current methods only focus on pixel-level information and ignore critical features of a character, such as its glyph, resulting in character-glyph damage during the denoising process. In this paper, we introduce a novel generic framework based on glyph fusion and attention mechanisms, i.e., CharFormer, for precisely recovering character images without changing their inherent glyphs. Unlike existing frameworks, CharFormer introduces a parallel target task for capturing additional information and injecting it into the image denoising backbone, which will maintain the consistency of character glyphs during character image denoising. Moreover, we utilize attention-based networks for global-local feature interaction, which will help to deal with blind denoising and enhance denoising performance. We compare CharFormer with state-of-the-art methods on multiple datasets. The experimental results show the superiority of CharFormer quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Degraded images commonly exist in the general sources of character images, leading to unsatisfactory character recognition results. Existing methods have dedicated efforts to restoring degraded character images. However, the denoising results obtained by these methods do not appear to improve character recognition performance. This is mainly because current methods only focus on pixel-level information and ignore critical features of a character, such as its glyph, resulting in character-glyph damage during the denoising process. In this paper, we introduce a novel generic framework based on glyph fusion and attention mechanisms, i.e., CharFormer, for precisely recovering character images without changing their inherent glyphs. Unlike existing frameworks, CharFormer introduces a parallel target task for capturing additional information and injecting it into the image denoising backbone, which will maintain the consistency of character glyphs during character image denoising. Moreover, we utilize attention-based networks for global-local feature interaction, which will help to deal with blind denoising and enhance denoising performance. We compare CharFormer with state-of-the-art methods on multiple datasets. The experimental results show the superiority of CharFormer quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 一般的字符图像源中普遍存在图像质量下降的情况，导致字符识别结果不理想。现有方法致力于恢复退化的字符图像。然而，这些方法获得的去噪结果似乎并没有提高字符识别性能。这主要是因为当前的方法仅关注像素级信息，而忽略了字符的关键特征，例如其字形，导致去噪过程中字符字形损坏。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于字形融合和注意力机制的新型通用框架，即 CharFormer，用于在不改变其固有字形的情况下精确恢复字符图像。与现有框架不同，CharFormer 引入了并行目标任务，用于捕获附加信息并将其注入到图像去噪主干中，这将在字符图像去噪过程中保持字符字形的一致性。此外，我们利用基于注意力的网络进行全局局部特征交互，这将有助于处理盲目去噪并提高去噪性能。我们在多个数据集上将 CharFormer 与最先进的方法进行比较。实验结果从数量和质量上都证明了CharFormer的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于字形融合与注意力机制的CharFormer框架，用于高精度字符图像去噪，同时保持字符固有字形不变。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法仅关注像素级信息，忽略字符关键特征（如字形），导致去噪过程中字形损伤，影响字符识别效果。
AI.method: 引入并行目标任务捕获额外信息并注入去噪主干网络，结合基于注意力的全局-局部特征交互机制，实现字形一致性维护与盲去噪增强。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，CharFormer在定量与定性指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CharFormer通过融合字形特征与注意力机制，有效解决了传统方法忽视字符结构导致的去噪效果不足问题。

ai_content_json.conclusion: CharFormer通过融合字形特征与注意力机制，有效解决了传统方法忽视字符结构导致的去噪效果不足问题。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于字形融合与注意力机制的CharFormer框架，用于高精度字符图像去噪，同时保持字符固有字形不变。
motivation: 现有去噪方法仅关注像素级信息，忽略字符关键特征（如字形），导致去噪过程中字形损伤，影响字符识别效果。
method: 引入并行目标任务捕获额外信息并注入去噪主干网络，结合基于注意力的全局-局部特征交互机制，实现字形一致性维护与盲去噪增强。
result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，CharFormer在定量与定性指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: CharFormer通过融合字形特征与注意力机制，有效解决了传统方法忽视字符结构导致的去噪效果不足问题。
search_text: CharFormer: A Glyph Fusion based Attentive Framework for High-precision Character Image Denoising CharFormer：一种基于字形融合的高精度字符图像去噪注意力框架 Degraded images commonly exist in the general sources of character images, leading to unsatisfactory character recognition results. Existing methods have dedicated efforts to restoring degraded character images. However, the denoising results obtained by these methods do not appear to improve character recognition performance. This is mainly because current methods only focus on pixel-level information and ignore critical features of a character, such as its glyph, resulting in character-glyph damage during the denoising process. In this paper, we introduce a novel generic framework based on glyph fusion and attention mechanisms, i.e., CharFormer, for precisely recovering character images without changing their inherent glyphs. Unlike existing frameworks, CharFormer introduces a parallel target task for capturing additional information and injecting it into the image denoising backbone, which will maintain the consistency of character glyphs during character image denoising. Moreover, we utilize attention-based networks for global-local feature interaction, which will help to deal with blind denoising and enhance denoising performance. We compare CharFormer with state-of-the-art methods on multiple datasets. The experimental results show the superiority of CharFormer quantitatively and qualitatively. 一般的字符图像源中普遍存在图像质量下降的情况，导致字符识别结果不理想。现有方法致力于恢复退化的字符图像。然而，这些方法获得的去噪结果似乎并没有提高字符识别性能。这主要是因为当前的方法仅关注像素级信息，而忽略了字符的关键特征，例如其字形，导致去噪过程中字符字形损坏。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于字形融合和注意力机制的新型通用框架，即 CharFormer，用于在不改变其固有字形的情况下精确恢复字符图像。与现有框架不同，CharFormer 引入了并行目标任务，用于捕获附加信息并将其注入到图像去噪主干中，这将在字符图像去噪过程中保持字符字形的一致性。此外，我们利用基于注意力的网络进行全局局部特征交互，这将有助于处理盲目去噪并提高去噪性能。我们在多个数据集上将 CharFormer 与最先进的方法进行比较。实验结果从数量和质量上都证明了CharFormer的优越性。 本文提出了一种基于字形融合与注意力机制的CharFormer框架，用于高精度字符图像去噪，同时保持字符固有字形不变。 Daqian Shi,Xiaolei Diao,Lida Shi,Hao Tang,Yang Chi,Chuntao Li,Hao Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Lei Hsiung,Yun-Yun Tsai,Pin-Yu Chen,Tsung-Yi Ho
title: CARBEN: Composite Adversarial Robustness Benchmark
title_zh: CARBEN：复合对抗鲁棒性基准
comment: IJCAI 2022 Demo Track; The demonstration is at https://hsiung.cc/CARBEN/
comments: IJCAI 2022 Demo Track; The demonstration is at https://hsiung.cc/CARBEN/
abstract: Prior literature on adversarial attack methods has mainly focused on attacking with and defending against a single threat model, e.g., perturbations bounded in Lp ball. However, multiple threat models can be combined into composite perturbations. One such approach, composite adversarial attack (CAA), not only expands the perturbable space of the image, but also may be overlooked by current modes of robustness evaluation. This paper demonstrates how CAA's attack order affects the resulting image, and provides real-time inferences of different models, which will facilitate users' configuration of the parameters of the attack level and their rapid evaluation of model prediction. A leaderboard to benchmark adversarial robustness against CAA is also introduced.
summary: Prior literature on adversarial attack methods has mainly focused on attacking with and defending against a single threat model, e.g., perturbations bounded in Lp ball. However, multiple threat models can be combined into composite perturbations. One such approach, composite adversarial attack (CAA), not only expands the perturbable space of the image, but also may be overlooked by current modes of robustness evaluation. This paper demonstrates how CAA's attack order affects the resulting image, and provides real-time inferences of different models, which will facilitate users' configuration of the parameters of the attack level and their rapid evaluation of model prediction. A leaderboard to benchmark adversarial robustness against CAA is also introduced.
abstract_zh: 先前关于对抗性攻击方法的文献主要集中于使用单一威胁模型进行攻击和防御，例如 Lp 球中的扰动。然而，多个威胁模型可以组合成复合扰动。其中一种方法是复合对抗攻击（CAA），它不仅扩大了图像的可扰动空间，而且还可能被当前的鲁棒性评估模式所忽视。本文演示了CAA的攻击顺序如何影响结果图像，并提供不同模型的实时推理，这将有助于用户配置攻击级别的参数以及快速评估模型预测。还引入了一个排行榜来衡量 CAA 的对抗鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CARBEN基准，用于评估模型在复合对抗攻击（CAA）下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击研究主要针对单一威胁模型，而复合扰动可能被现有评估方法忽略，需更全面的基准测试。
AI.method: 引入复合对抗攻击（CAA），通过不同攻击顺序生成复合扰动，并提供实时推理辅助参数配置与模型评估，同时建立基准排行榜。
AI.result: 验证CAA攻击顺序对图像的影响，提供多模型实时推理结果，并构建对抗鲁棒性基准排行榜。
AI.conclusion: CARBEN基准可更全面评估模型在复合对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Daqian Shi,Xiaolei Diao,Hao Tang,Xiaomin Li,Hao Xing,Hao Xu
title: RCRN: Real-world Character Image Restoration Network via Skeleton Extraction
title_zh: RCRN：通过骨架提取的真实世界角色图像恢复网络
abstract: Constructing high-quality character image datasets is challenging because real-world images are often affected by image degradation. There are limitations when applying current image restoration methods to such real-world character images, since (i) the categories of noise in character images are different from those in general images; (ii) real-world character images usually contain more complex image degradation, e.g., mixed noise at different noise levels. To address these problems, we propose a real-world character restoration network (RCRN) to effectively restore degraded character images, where character skeleton information and scale-ensemble feature extraction are utilized to obtain better restoration performance. The proposed method consists of a skeleton extractor (SENet) and a character image restorer (CiRNet). SENet aims to preserve the structural consistency of the character and normalize complex noise. Then, CiRNet reconstructs clean images from degraded character images and their skeletons. Due to the lack of benchmarks for real-world character image restoration, we constructed a dataset containing 1,606 character images with real-world degradation to evaluate the validity of the proposed method. The experimental results demonstrate that RCRN outperforms state-of-the-art methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Constructing high-quality character image datasets is challenging because real-world images are often affected by image degradation. There are limitations when applying current image restoration methods to such real-world character images, since (i) the categories of noise in character images are different from those in general images; (ii) real-world character images usually contain more complex image degradation, e.g., mixed noise at different noise levels. To address these problems, we propose a real-world character restoration network (RCRN) to effectively restore degraded character images, where character skeleton information and scale-ensemble feature extraction are utilized to obtain better restoration performance. The proposed method consists of a skeleton extractor (SENet) and a character image restorer (CiRNet). SENet aims to preserve the structural consistency of the character and normalize complex noise. Then, CiRNet reconstructs clean images from degraded character images and their skeletons. Due to the lack of benchmarks for real-world character image restoration, we constructed a dataset containing 1,606 character images with real-world degradation to evaluate the validity of the proposed method. The experimental results demonstrate that RCRN outperforms state-of-the-art methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 构建高质量的角色图像数据集具有挑战性，因为现实世界的图像经常受到图像退化的影响。将当前的图像恢复方法应用于此类现实世界的字符图像时存在局限性，因为（i）字符图像中的噪声类别与一般图像中的噪声类别不同； （ii）现实世界的角色图像通常包含更复杂的图像退化，例如不同噪声级别的混合噪声。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种现实世界字符恢复网络（RCRN）来有效地恢复退化的字符图像，其中利用字符骨架信息和尺度集成特征提取来获得更好的恢复性能。所提出的方法由骨架提取器（SENet）和字符图像恢复器（CiRNet）组成。 SENet 的目标是保持角色的结构一致性并标准化复杂的噪声。然后，CiRNet 从退化的角色图像及其骨架中重建干净的图像。由于缺乏真实世界字符图像恢复的基准，我们构建了一个包含 1,606 个真实世界退化的字符图像的数据集，以评估所提出方法的有效性。实验结果表明，RCRN 在数量和质量上都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于真实世界字符图像修复的网络RCRN，旨在解决字符图像中复杂退化问题。
AI.motivation: 当前图像修复方法在处理真实世界字符图像时存在局限性，因为字符图像中的噪声类型和退化复杂度与普通图像不同。
AI.method: 该方法包括一个骨骼提取器（SENet）和一个字符图像修复器（CiRNet），通过提取字符骨骼信息和多尺度特征提取来提高修复效果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，RCRN在定量和定性方面均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: RCRN有效修复了真实世界字符图像中的复杂退化问题，为该领域提供了一个新的基准数据集和方法。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Liang,Yaguan Qian,Jianchang Huang,Xiang Ling,Bin Wang,Chunming Wu,Wassim Swaileh
title: Towards the Desirable Decision Boundary by Moderate-Margin Adversarial Training
title_zh: 通过中等裕度对抗训练走向理想的决策边界
abstract: Adversarial training, as one of the most effective defense methods against adversarial attacks, tends to learn an inclusive decision boundary to increase the robustness of deep learning models. However, due to the large and unnecessary increase in the margin along adversarial directions, adversarial training causes heavy cross-over between natural examples and adversarial examples, which is not conducive to balancing the trade-off between robustness and natural accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial training scheme to achieve a better trade-off between robustness and natural accuracy. It aims to learn a moderate-inclusive decision boundary, which means that the margins of natural examples under the decision boundary are moderate. We call this scheme Moderate-Margin Adversarial Training (MMAT), which generates finer-grained adversarial examples to mitigate the cross-over problem. We also take advantage of logits from a teacher model that has been well-trained to guide the learning of our model. Finally, MMAT achieves high natural accuracy and robustness under both black-box and white-box attacks. On SVHN, for example, state-of-the-art robustness and natural accuracy are achieved.
summary: Adversarial training, as one of the most effective defense methods against adversarial attacks, tends to learn an inclusive decision boundary to increase the robustness of deep learning models. However, due to the large and unnecessary increase in the margin along adversarial directions, adversarial training causes heavy cross-over between natural examples and adversarial examples, which is not conducive to balancing the trade-off between robustness and natural accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial training scheme to achieve a better trade-off between robustness and natural accuracy. It aims to learn a moderate-inclusive decision boundary, which means that the margins of natural examples under the decision boundary are moderate. We call this scheme Moderate-Margin Adversarial Training (MMAT), which generates finer-grained adversarial examples to mitigate the cross-over problem. We also take advantage of logits from a teacher model that has been well-trained to guide the learning of our model. Finally, MMAT achieves high natural accuracy and robustness under both black-box and white-box attacks. On SVHN, for example, state-of-the-art robustness and natural accuracy are achieved.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练作为对抗对抗性攻击最有效的防御方法之一，往往会学习一个包容性的决策边界，以提高深度学习模型的鲁棒性。然而，由于沿对抗方向的余量大量且不必要地增加，对抗训练导致自然示例和对抗示例之间的严重交叉，这不利于平衡鲁棒性和自然准确性之间的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性训练方案，以实现鲁棒性和自然准确性之间的更好权衡。它的目的是学习一个中等包容的决策边界，这意味着该决策边界下的自然示例的边缘是适度的。我们将此方案称为中等边缘对抗训练（MMAT），它生成更细粒度的对抗示例以减轻交叉问题。我们还利用经过良好训练的教师模型的 logits 来指导我们模型的学习。最后，MMAT 在黑盒和白盒攻击下都实现了很高的自然准确性和鲁棒性。例如，在 SVHN 上，实现了最先进的鲁棒性和自然准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的对抗训练方法MMAT，通过生成细粒度对抗样本和利用教师模型logits，实现鲁棒性与自然准确率的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练因扩大对抗方向边距导致自然样本与对抗样本交叉，破坏准确率与鲁棒性的平衡。
AI.method: 设计Moderate-Margin Adversarial Training (MMAT)方案，生成细粒度对抗样本并引入教师模型logits指导训练。
AI.result: 在SVHN数据集上同时达到最先进鲁棒性与自然准确率，有效缓解交叉问题。
AI.conclusion: MMAT通过控制决策边界边距实现性能平衡，为对抗训练提供新思路。

search_text: Towards the Desirable Decision Boundary by Moderate-Margin Adversarial Training 通过中等裕度对抗训练走向理想的决策边界 Adversarial training, as one of the most effective defense methods against adversarial attacks, tends to learn an inclusive decision boundary to increase the robustness of deep learning models. However, due to the large and unnecessary increase in the margin along adversarial directions, adversarial training causes heavy cross-over between natural examples and adversarial examples, which is not conducive to balancing the trade-off between robustness and natural accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial training scheme to achieve a better trade-off between robustness and natural accuracy. It aims to learn a moderate-inclusive decision boundary, which means that the margins of natural examples under the decision boundary are moderate. We call this scheme Moderate-Margin Adversarial Training (MMAT), which generates finer-grained adversarial examples to mitigate the cross-over problem. We also take advantage of logits from a teacher model that has been well-trained to guide the learning of our model. Finally, MMAT achieves high natural accuracy and robustness under both black-box and white-box attacks. On SVHN, for example, state-of-the-art robustness and natural accuracy are achieved. 对抗性训练作为对抗对抗性攻击最有效的防御方法之一，往往会学习一个包容性的决策边界，以提高深度学习模型的鲁棒性。然而，由于沿对抗方向的余量大量且不必要地增加，对抗训练导致自然示例和对抗示例之间的严重交叉，这不利于平衡鲁棒性和自然准确性之间的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性训练方案，以实现鲁棒性和自然准确性之间的更好权衡。它的目的是学习一个中等包容的决策边界，这意味着该决策边界下的自然示例的边缘是适度的。我们将此方案称为中等边缘对抗训练（MMAT），它生成更细粒度的对抗示例以减轻交叉问题。我们还利用经过良好训练的教师模型的 logits 来指导我们模型的学习。最后，MMAT 在黑盒和白盒攻击下都实现了很高的自然准确性和鲁棒性。例如，在 SVHN 上，实现了最先进的鲁棒性和自然准确性。 本文提出一种新的对抗训练方法MMAT，通过生成细粒度对抗样本和利用教师模型logits，实现鲁棒性与自然准确率的平衡。 Xiaoyu Liang,Yaguan Qian,Jianchang Huang,Xiang Ling,Bin Wang,Chunming Wu,Wassim Swaileh cs.CV

authors_text: Mengyuan Li,Arman Kazemi,Ann Franchesca Laguna,X. Sharon Hu
title: Associative Memory Based Experience Replay for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于深度强化学习的基于联想记忆的经验回放
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures. The work was accepted by the 41st International Conference on Computer-Aided Design (ICCAD), 2022, San Diego
comments: 9 pages, 9 figures. The work was accepted by the 41st International Conference on Computer-Aided Design (ICCAD), 2022, San Diego
abstract: Experience replay is an essential component in deep reinforcement learning (DRL), which stores the experiences and generates experiences for the agent to learn in real time. Recently, prioritized experience replay (PER) has been proven to be powerful and widely deployed in DRL agents. However, implementing PER on traditional CPU or GPU architectures incurs significant latency overhead due to its frequent and irregular memory accesses. This paper proposes a hardware-software co-design approach to design an associative memory (AM) based PER, AMPER, with an AM-friendly priority sampling operation. AMPER replaces the widely-used time-costly tree-traversal-based priority sampling in PER while preserving the learning performance. Further, we design an in-memory computing hardware architecture based on AM to support AMPER by leveraging parallel in-memory search operations. AMPER shows comparable learning performance while achieving 55x to 270x latency improvement when running on the proposed hardware compared to the state-of-the-art PER running on GPU.
summary: Experience replay is an essential component in deep reinforcement learning (DRL), which stores the experiences and generates experiences for the agent to learn in real time. Recently, prioritized experience replay (PER) has been proven to be powerful and widely deployed in DRL agents. However, implementing PER on traditional CPU or GPU architectures incurs significant latency overhead due to its frequent and irregular memory accesses. This paper proposes a hardware-software co-design approach to design an associative memory (AM) based PER, AMPER, with an AM-friendly priority sampling operation. AMPER replaces the widely-used time-costly tree-traversal-based priority sampling in PER while preserving the learning performance. Further, we design an in-memory computing hardware architecture based on AM to support AMPER by leveraging parallel in-memory search operations. AMPER shows comparable learning performance while achieving 55x to 270x latency improvement when running on the proposed hardware compared to the state-of-the-art PER running on GPU.
abstract_zh: 经验回放是深度强化学习（DRL）的重要组成部分，它存储经验并生成经验供代理实时学习。最近，优先体验重放（PER）已被证明是强大的，并且在 DRL 代理中得到了广泛部署。然而，由于频繁且不规则的内存访问，在传统 CPU 或 GPU 架构上实现 PER 会产生显着的延迟开销。本文提出了一种硬件-软件协同设计方法来设计基于关联存储器（AM）的 PER、AMPER，并具有 AM 友好的优先级采样操作。 AMPER 取代了 PER 中广泛使用的、耗时的、基于树遍历的优先级采样，同时保留了学习性能。此外，我们设计了基于 AM 的内存计算硬件架构，通过利用并行内存搜索操作来支持 AMPER。与在 GPU 上运行的最先进的 PER 相比，在建议的硬件上运行时，AMPER 表现出相当的学习性能，同时实现了 55 至 270 倍的延迟改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于联想记忆的高效经验回放机制AMPER，解决传统优先级经验回放的高延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优先级经验回放在CPU/GPU架构上因频繁不规则内存访问导致显著延迟开销，影响深度强化学习效率。
AI.method: 设计硬件-软件协同架构AMPER，采用联想记忆友好型优先级采样操作替代树遍历方法，并构建并行内存计算硬件架构。
AI.result: 相比GPU上最先进的PER，AMPER在保持学习性能的同时实现55-270倍的延迟改进。
AI.conclusion: AMPER通过联想记忆与硬件加速有效解决PER延迟瓶颈，验证了存算一体架构在强化学习中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Yanran Wang,James O'Keeffe,Qiuchen Qian,David Boyle
title: QuaDUE-CCM: Interpretable Distributional Reinforcement Learning using Uncertain Contraction Metrics for Precise Quadrotor Trajectory Tracking
title_zh: QuaDUE-CCM：使用不确定收缩度量进行精确四旋翼轨迹跟踪的可解释分布式强化学习
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures, Quadrotor trajectory tracking, Learning-based control
comments: 18 pages, 9 figures, Quadrotor trajectory tracking, Learning-based control
abstract: Accuracy and stability are common requirements for Quadrotor trajectory tracking systems. Designing an accurate and stable tracking controller remains challenging, particularly in unknown and dynamic environments with complex aerodynamic disturbances. We propose a Quantile-approximation-based Distributional-reinforced Uncertainty Estimator (QuaDUE) to accurately identify the effects of aerodynamic disturbances, i.e., the uncertainties between the true and estimated Control Contraction Metrics (CCMs). Taking inspiration from contraction theory and integrating the QuaDUE for uncertainties, our novel CCM-based trajectory tracking framework tracks any feasible reference trajectory precisely whilst guaranteeing exponential convergence. More importantly, the convergence and training acceleration of the distributional RL are guaranteed and analyzed, respectively, from theoretical perspectives. We also demonstrate our system under unknown and diverse aerodynamic forces. Under large aerodynamic forces (>2m/s^2), compared with the classic data-driven approach, our QuaDUE-CCM achieves at least a 56.6% improvement in tracking error. Compared with QuaDRED-MPC, a distributional RL-based approach, QuaDUE-CCM achieves at least a 3 times improvement in contraction rate.
summary: Accuracy and stability are common requirements for Quadrotor trajectory tracking systems. Designing an accurate and stable tracking controller remains challenging, particularly in unknown and dynamic environments with complex aerodynamic disturbances. We propose a Quantile-approximation-based Distributional-reinforced Uncertainty Estimator (QuaDUE) to accurately identify the effects of aerodynamic disturbances, i.e., the uncertainties between the true and estimated Control Contraction Metrics (CCMs). Taking inspiration from contraction theory and integrating the QuaDUE for uncertainties, our novel CCM-based trajectory tracking framework tracks any feasible reference trajectory precisely whilst guaranteeing exponential convergence. More importantly, the convergence and training acceleration of the distributional RL are guaranteed and analyzed, respectively, from theoretical perspectives. We also demonstrate our system under unknown and diverse aerodynamic forces. Under large aerodynamic forces (>2m/s^2), compared with the classic data-driven approach, our QuaDUE-CCM achieves at least a 56.6% improvement in tracking error. Compared with QuaDRED-MPC, a distributional RL-based approach, QuaDUE-CCM achieves at least a 3 times improvement in contraction rate.
abstract_zh: 准确性和稳定性是四旋翼轨迹跟踪系统的常见要求。设计准确且稳定的跟踪控制器仍然具有挑战性，特别是在具有复杂空气动力扰动的未知和动态环境中。我们提出了一种基于分位数近似的分布增强不确定性估计器（QuaDUE）来准确识别空气动力扰动的影响，即真实和估计的控制收缩指标（CCM）之间的不确定性。受收缩理论的启发，并结合 QuaDUE 的不确定性，我们新颖的基于 CCM 的轨迹跟踪框架精确跟踪任何可行的参考轨迹，同时保证指数收敛。更重要的是，从理论角度分别保证和分析了分布式强化学习的收敛性和训练加速。我们还在未知和不同的空气动力下展示了我们的系统。在大气动力（>2m/s^2）下，与经典的数据驱动方法相比，我们的QuaDUE-CCM在跟踪误差方面实现了至少56.6%的改进。与基于分布式强化学习的方法 QuaDRED-MPC 相比，QuaDUE-CCM 的收缩率至少提高了 3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布强化学习和不确定收缩度量的四旋翼轨迹跟踪框架QuaDUE-CCM，以提高在复杂气动干扰下的跟踪精度和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 四旋翼轨迹跟踪系统在未知动态环境中面临气动干扰等不确定性挑战，传统方法难以兼顾精度与稳定性，亟需理论保证的鲁棒控制方案。
AI.method: 设计量化近似分布强化学习估计器QuaDUE，结合收缩理论建模气动干扰不确定性，构建具有指数收敛性的CCM轨迹跟踪框架，并从理论层面分析收敛性与训练加速机制。
AI.result: 在大于2m/s²的气动干扰下，相比经典数据驱动方法跟踪误差降低56.6%，相比QuaDRED-MPC方法收缩率提升3倍。
AI.conclusion: QuaDUE-CCM通过融合分布强化学习与收缩度量理论，有效解决了动态环境下的四旋翼精确轨迹跟踪问题，兼具理论保证与工程实用性。
