search_text: QuaDUE-CCM: Interpretable Distributional Reinforcement Learning using Uncertain Contraction Metrics for Precise Quadrotor Trajectory Tracking QuaDUE-CCM：使用不确定收缩度量进行精确四旋翼轨迹跟踪的可解释分布式强化学习 Accuracy and stability are common requirements for Quadrotor trajectory tracking systems. Designing an accurate and stable tracking controller remains challenging, particularly in unknown and dynamic environments with complex aerodynamic disturbances. We propose a Quantile-approximation-based Distributional-reinforced Uncertainty Estimator (QuaDUE) to accurately identify the effects of aerodynamic disturbances, i.e., the uncertainties between the true and estimated Control Contraction Metrics (CCMs). Taking inspiration from contraction theory and integrating the QuaDUE for uncertainties, our novel CCM-based trajectory tracking framework tracks any feasible reference trajectory precisely whilst guaranteeing exponential convergence. More importantly, the convergence and training acceleration of the distributional RL are guaranteed and analyzed, respectively, from theoretical perspectives. We also demonstrate our system under unknown and diverse aerodynamic forces. Under large aerodynamic forces (>2m/s^2), compared with the classic data-driven approach, our QuaDUE-CCM achieves at least a 56.6% improvement in tracking error. Compared with QuaDRED-MPC, a distributional RL-based approach, QuaDUE-CCM achieves at least a 3 times improvement in contraction rate. 准确性和稳定性是四旋翼轨迹跟踪系统的常见要求。设计准确且稳定的跟踪控制器仍然具有挑战性，特别是在具有复杂空气动力扰动的未知和动态环境中。我们提出了一种基于分位数近似的分布增强不确定性估计器（QuaDUE）来准确识别空气动力扰动的影响，即真实和估计的控制收缩指标（CCM）之间的不确定性。受收缩理论的启发，并结合 QuaDUE 的不确定性，我们新颖的基于 CCM 的轨迹跟踪框架精确跟踪任何可行的参考轨迹，同时保证指数收敛。更重要的是，从理论角度分别保证和分析了分布式强化学习的收敛性和训练加速。我们还在未知和不同的空气动力下展示了我们的系统。在大气动力（>2m/s^2）下，与经典的数据驱动方法相比，我们的QuaDUE-CCM在跟踪误差方面实现了至少56.6%的改进。与基于分布式强化学习的方法 QuaDRED-MPC 相比，QuaDUE-CCM 的收缩率至少提高了 3 倍。 本文提出一种基于分布强化学习和不确定收缩度量的四旋翼轨迹跟踪框架QuaDUE-CCM，以提高在复杂气动干扰下的跟踪精度和稳定性。 Yanran Wang,James O'Keeffe,Qiuchen Qian,David Boyle cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Kyle Min,Sourya Roy,Subarna Tripathi,Tanaya Guha,Somdeb Majumdar
title: Learning Long-Term Spatial-Temporal Graphs for Active Speaker Detection
title_zh: 学习长期时空图以进行主动说话人检测
comment: ECCV 2022 camera ready (Supplementary videos: on ECVA soon). This paper supersedes arXiv:2112.01479
comments: ECCV 2022 camera ready (Supplementary videos: on ECVA soon). This paper supersedes arXiv:2112.01479
abstract: Active speaker detection (ASD) in videos with multiple speakers is a challenging task as it requires learning effective audiovisual features and spatial-temporal correlations over long temporal windows. In this paper, we present SPELL, a novel spatial-temporal graph learning framework that can solve complex tasks such as ASD. To this end, each person in a video frame is first encoded in a unique node for that frame. Nodes corresponding to a single person across frames are connected to encode their temporal dynamics. Nodes within a frame are also connected to encode inter-person relationships. Thus, SPELL reduces ASD to a node classification task. Importantly, SPELL is able to reason over long temporal contexts for all nodes without relying on computationally expensive fully connected graph neural networks. Through extensive experiments on the AVA-ActiveSpeaker dataset, we demonstrate that learning graph-based representations can significantly improve the active speaker detection performance owing to its explicit spatial and temporal structure. SPELL outperforms all previous state-of-the-art approaches while requiring significantly lower memory and computational resources. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/SRA2/SPELL
summary: Active speaker detection (ASD) in videos with multiple speakers is a challenging task as it requires learning effective audiovisual features and spatial-temporal correlations over long temporal windows. In this paper, we present SPELL, a novel spatial-temporal graph learning framework that can solve complex tasks such as ASD. To this end, each person in a video frame is first encoded in a unique node for that frame. Nodes corresponding to a single person across frames are connected to encode their temporal dynamics. Nodes within a frame are also connected to encode inter-person relationships. Thus, SPELL reduces ASD to a node classification task. Importantly, SPELL is able to reason over long temporal contexts for all nodes without relying on computationally expensive fully connected graph neural networks. Through extensive experiments on the AVA-ActiveSpeaker dataset, we demonstrate that learning graph-based representations can significantly improve the active speaker detection performance owing to its explicit spatial and temporal structure. SPELL outperforms all previous state-of-the-art approaches while requiring significantly lower memory and computational resources. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/SRA2/SPELL
abstract_zh: 多说话人视频中的主动说话人检测（ASD）是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它需要在长时间窗口上学习有效的视听特征和时空相关性。在本文中，我们提出了 SPELL，一种新颖的时空图学习框架，可以解决 ASD 等复杂任务。为此，视频帧中的每个人首先被编码到该帧的唯一节点中。跨帧对应于单个人的节点被连接以编码其时间动态。框架内的节点也相互连接以编码人与人之间的关系。因此，SPELL 将 ASD 简化为节点分类任务。重要的是，SPELL 能够对所有节点的长时间上下文进行推理，而无需依赖计算成本昂贵的全连接图神经网络。通过对 AVA-ActiveSpeaker 数据集的大量实验，我们证明了学习基于图的表示由于其明确的空间和时间结构可以显着提高主动说话者检测性能。 SPELL 优于以前所有最先进的方法，同时需要显着降低的内存和计算资源。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/SRA2/SPELL 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPELL框架，通过学习长期时空图表示来解决多说话人视频中的主动说话人检测问题。
AI.motivation: 主动说话人检测需要建模长时序窗口内的时空关联，但现有方法在计算效率和长时序建模能力上存在不足。
AI.method: 将视频中每个人编码为节点，通过跨帧连接建模时序动态，帧内连接建模人际交互，将检测任务转化为图节点分类问题。
AI.result: 在AVA-ActiveSpeaker数据集上超越所有现有方法，且内存和计算资源消耗显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的表示学习能有效捕捉时空结构，SPELL为复杂时序任务提供了高效解决方案。

In this paper, we present SPELL, a novel spatial-temporal graph learning framework that can solve complex tasks such as ASD. To this end, each person in a video frame is first encoded in a unique node for that frame. Nodes corresponding to a single person across frames are connected to encode their temporal dynamics. Through extensive experiments on the AVA-ActiveSpeaker dataset, we demonstrate that learning graph-based representations can significantly improve the active speaker detection performance owing to its explicit spatial and temporal structure. SPELL outperforms all previous state-of-the-art approaches while requiring significantly lower memory and computational resources. authors_text: Minho Jin,Chelsea J. -T. Ju,Zeya Chen,Yi-Chieh Liu,Jasha Droppo,Andreas Stolcke
title: Adversarial Reweighting for Speaker Verification Fairness
title_zh: 用于说话者验证公平性的对抗性重新加权
abstract: We address performance fairness for speaker verification using the adversarial reweighting (ARW) method. ARW is reformulated for speaker verification with metric learning, and shown to improve results across different subgroups of gender and nationality, without requiring annotation of subgroups in the training data. An adversarial network learns a weight for each training sample in the batch so that the main learner is forced to focus on poorly performing instances. Using a min-max optimization algorithm, this method improves overall speaker verification fairness. We present three different ARWformulations: accumulated pairwise similarity, pseudo-labeling, and pairwise weighting, and measure their performance in terms of equal error rate (EER) on the VoxCeleb corpus. Results show that the pairwise weighting method can achieve 1.08% overall EER, 1.25% for male and 0.67% for female speakers, with relative EER reductions of 7.7%, 10.1% and 3.0%, respectively. For nationality subgroups, the proposed algorithm showed 1.04% EER for US speakers, 0.76% for UK speakers, and 1.22% for all others. The absolute EER gap between gender groups was reduced from 0.70% to 0.58%, while the standard deviation over nationality groups decreased from 0.21 to 0.19.
summary: We address performance fairness for speaker verification using the adversarial reweighting (ARW) method. ARW is reformulated for speaker verification with metric learning, and shown to improve results across different subgroups of gender and nationality, without requiring annotation of subgroups in the training data. An adversarial network learns a weight for each training sample in the batch so that the main learner is forced to focus on poorly performing instances. Using a min-max optimization algorithm, this method improves overall speaker verification fairness. We present three different ARWformulations: accumulated pairwise similarity, pseudo-labeling, and pairwise weighting, and measure their performance in terms of equal error rate (EER) on the VoxCeleb corpus. Results show that the pairwise weighting method can achieve 1.08% overall EER, 1.25% for male and 0.67% for female speakers, with relative EER reductions of 7.7%, 10.1% and 3.0%, respectively. For nationality subgroups, the proposed algorithm showed 1.04% EER for US speakers, 0.76% for UK speakers, and 1.22% for all others. The absolute EER gap between gender groups was reduced from 0.70% to 0.58%, while the standard deviation over nationality groups decreased from 0.21 to 0.19.
abstract_zh: 我们使用对抗性重新加权（ARW）方法来解决说话者验证的性能公平性。 ARW 经过重新设计，用于通过度量学习进行说话者验证，并显示可以改善不同性别和国籍子组的结果，而无需在训练数据中对子组进行注释。对抗网络学习批次中每个训练样本的权重，以便主要学习者被迫专注于表现不佳的实例。该方法使用最小-最大优化算法，提高了说话人验证的整体公平性。我们提出了三种不同的 ARW 公式：累积成对相似度、伪标签和成对加权，并根据 VoxCeleb 语料库上的等错误率 (EER) 来衡量它们的性能。结果表明，成对加权方法可以实现总体 EER 1.08%、男性说话者 1.25% 和女性说话者 0.67%，相对 EER 分别降低 7.7%、10.1% 和 3.0%。对于国籍亚组，所提出的算法显示美国使用者的 EER 为 1.04%，英国使用者的 EER 为 0.76%，所有其他国家的 EER 为 1.22%。性别组之间的绝对 EER 差距从 0.70% 缩小到 0.58%，而国籍组之间的标准差从 0.21 缩小到 0.19。

AI.tldr: 本文提出对抗重加权（ARW）方法，通过度量学习提升说话人验证系统的性别和国籍子群体公平性，无需标注训练数据中的子群体信息。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人验证系统在不同性别、国籍等子群体上表现存在偏差，而现有方法通常需要标注子群体信息才能改进公平性，存在数据获取难度大、隐私风险等问题。
AI.method: 设计对抗网络为每个训练样本动态分配权重，强制主学习器关注表现差的样本。提出三种ARW实现方式：成对相似度累积、伪标签生成和成对加权，通过最小最大优化算法提升模型公平性。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb数据集上，成对加权方法实现整体EER 1.08%（较基线下降7.7%），男性/女性EER分别为1.25%/0.67%（降幅10.1%/3.0%），美国/英国/其他国籍EER分别为1.04%/0.76%/1.22%。性别组EER差距缩小17.1%，国籍组标准差降低9.5%。
AI.conclusion: ARW方法通过动态样本重加权有效提升了说话人验证系统的公平性，显著缩小了性别和国籍子群体间的性能差距，且无需依赖子群体标注数据。

result: 在VoxCeleb数据集上，成对加权方法实现整体EER 1.08%（较基线下降7.7%），男性/女性EER分别为1.25%/0.67%（降幅10.1%/3.0%），美国/英国/其他国籍EER分别为1.04%/0.76%/1.22%。性别组EER差距缩小17.1%，国籍组标准差降低9.5%。
conclusion: ARW方法通过动态样本重加权有效提升了说话人验证系统的公平性，显著缩小了性别和国籍子群体间的性能差距，且无需依赖子群体标注数据。
search_text: Adversarial Reweighting for Speaker Verification Fairness 用于说话者验证公平性的对抗性重新加权 We address performance fairness for speaker verification using the adversarial reweighting (ARW) method. ARW is reformulated for speaker verification with metric learning, and shown to improve results across different subgroups of gender and nationality, without requiring annotation of subgroups in the training data. An adversarial network learns a weight for each training sample in the batch so that the main learner is forced to focus on poorly performing instances. Using a min-max optimization algorithm, this method improves overall speaker verification fairness. We present three different ARWformulations: accumulated pairwise similarity, pseudo-labeling, and pairwise weighting, and measure their performance in terms of equal error rate (EER) on the VoxCeleb corpus. Results show that the pairwise weighting method can achieve 1.08% overall EER, 1.25% for male and 0.67% for female speakers, with relative EER reductions of 7.7%, 10.1% and 3.0%, respectively. For nationality subgroups, the proposed algorithm showed 1.04% EER for US speakers, 0.76% for UK speakers, and 1.22% for all others. The absolute EER gap between gender groups was reduced from 0.70% to 0.58%, while the standard deviation over nationality groups decreased from 0.21 to 0.19. 我们使用对抗性重新加权（ARW）方法来解决说话者验证的性能公平性。 ARW 经过重新设计，用于通过度量学习进行说话者验证，并显示可以改善不同性别和国籍子组的结果，而无需在训练数据中对子组进行注释。对抗网络学习批次中每个训练样本的权重，以便主要学习者被迫专注于表现不佳的实例。该方法使用最小-最大优化算法，提高了说话人验证的整体公平性。我们提出了三种不同的 ARW 公式：累积成对相似度、伪标签和成对加权，并根据 VoxCeleb 语料库上的等错误率 (EER) 来衡量它们的性能。结果表明，成对加权方法可以实现总体 EER 1.08%、男性说话者 1.25% 和女性说话者 0.67%，相对 EER 分别降低 7.7%、10.1% 和 3.0%。对于国籍亚组，所提出的算法显示美国使用者的 EER 为 1.04%，英国使用者的 EER 为 0.76%，所有其他国家的 EER 为 1.22%。性别组之间的绝对 EER 差距从 0.70% 缩小到 0.58%，而国籍组之间的标准差从 0.21 缩小到 0.19。 本文提出对抗重加权（ARW）方法，通过度量学习提升说话人验证系统的性别和国籍子群体公平性，无需标注训练数据中的子群体信息。 Minho Jin,Chelsea J. -T. Ju,Zeya Chen,Yi-Chieh Liu,Jasha Droppo,Andreas Stolcke eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Haohe Liu,Xubo Liu,Xinhao Mei,Qiuqiang Kong,Wenwu Wang,Mark D. Plumbley
title: Segment-level Metric Learning for Few-shot Bioacoustic Event Detection
title_zh: 用于少样本生物声学事件检测的分段级度量学习
comment: 2nd place in the DCASE 2022 Challenge Task 5. Submitted to the DCASE 2022 workshop
comments: 2nd place in the DCASE 2022 Challenge Task 5. Submitted to the DCASE 2022 workshop
abstract: Few-shot bioacoustic event detection is a task that detects the occurrence time of a novel sound given a few examples. Previous methods employ metric learning to build a latent space with the labeled part of different sound classes, also known as positive events. In this study, we propose a segment-level few-shot learning framework that utilizes both the positive and negative events during model optimization. Training with negative events, which are larger in volume than positive events, can increase the generalization ability of the model. In addition, we use transductive inference on the validation set during training for better adaptation to novel classes. We conduct ablation studies on our proposed method with different setups on input features, training data, and hyper-parameters. Our final system achieves an F-measure of 62.73 on the DCASE 2022 challenge task 5 (DCASE2022-T5) validation set, outperforming the performance of the baseline prototypical network 34.02 by a large margin. Using the proposed method, our submitted system ranks 2nd in DCASE2022-T5. The code of this paper is fully open-sourced at https://github.com/haoheliu/DCASE_2022_Task_5.
summary: Few-shot bioacoustic event detection is a task that detects the occurrence time of a novel sound given a few examples. Previous methods employ metric learning to build a latent space with the labeled part of different sound classes, also known as positive events. In this study, we propose a segment-level few-shot learning framework that utilizes both the positive and negative events during model optimization. Training with negative events, which are larger in volume than positive events, can increase the generalization ability of the model. In addition, we use transductive inference on the validation set during training for better adaptation to novel classes. We conduct ablation studies on our proposed method with different setups on input features, training data, and hyper-parameters. Our final system achieves an F-measure of 62.73 on the DCASE 2022 challenge task 5 (DCASE2022-T5) validation set, outperforming the performance of the baseline prototypical network 34.02 by a large margin. Using the proposed method, our submitted system ranks 2nd in DCASE2022-T5. The code of this paper is fully open-sourced at https://github.com/haoheliu/DCASE_2022_Task_5.
abstract_zh: 少样本生物声学事件检测是一项在给出几个示例的情况下检测新声音发生时间的任务。以前的方法采用度量学习来构建具有不同声音类别的标记部分（也称为积极事件）的潜在空间。在本研究中，我们提出了一个分段级的小样本学习框架，该框架在模型优化期间同时利用积极和消极事件。使用负事件进行训练，其数量比正事件大，可以提高模型的泛化能力。此外，我们在训练期间对验证集使用转导推理，以便更好地适应新的类别。我们对我们提出的方法进行了消融研究，对输入特征、训练数据和超参数进行了不同的设置。我们的最终系统在 DCASE 2022 挑战任务 5 (DCASE2022-T5) 验证集上实现了 62.73 的 F 测量，大幅优于基线原型网络 34.02 的性能。使用所提出的方法，我们提交的系统在 DCASE2022-T5 中排名第二。本文代码完全开源于https://github.com/haoheliu/DCASE_2022_Task_5。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于片段级度量学习的少样本生物声学事件检测方法，通过结合正负样本优化模型并提升泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅利用正样本（目标声音）进行度量学习，而负样本（非目标声音）数量更多且能增强模型区分能力，但未被充分利用。
AI.method: 设计段级少样本学习框架，在训练中同时使用正负样本；通过验证集进行直推式推理以适应新类别，并进行多组消融实验验证效果。
AI.result: 在DCASE2022-T5验证集上达到62.73的F值，较基线方法提升34.02，系统在该任务中排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 融合负样本与直推推理的框架有效提升了少样本检测性能，代码已开源供研究复现。

authors_text: Lei Zhang,Tianying Chen,Olivia Seow,Tim Chong,Sven Kratz,Yu Jiang Tham,Andrés Monroy-Hernández,Rajan Vaish,Fannie Liu
title: Auggie: Encouraging Effortful Communication through Handcrafted Digital Experiences
title_zh: Auggie：通过手工数字体验鼓励有效沟通
comment: To appear at the 25th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing (CSCW '22). 25 pages
comments: To appear at the 25th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing (CSCW '22). 25 pages
abstract: Digital communication is often brisk and automated. From auto-completed messages to "likes," research has shown that such lightweight interactions can affect perceptions of authenticity and closeness. On the other hand, effort in relationships can forge emotional bonds by conveying a sense of caring and is essential in building and maintaining relationships. To explore effortful communication, we designed and evaluated Auggie, an iOS app that encourages partners to create digitally handcrafted Augmented Reality (AR) experiences for each other. Auggie is centered around crafting a 3D character with photos, animated movements, drawings, and audio for someone else. We conducted a two-week-long field study with 30 participants (15 pairs), who used Auggie with their partners remotely. Our qualitative findings show that Auggie participants engaged in meaningful effort through the handcrafting process, and felt closer to their partners, although the tool may not be appropriate in all situations. We discuss design implications and future directions for systems that encourage effortful communication.
summary: Digital communication is often brisk and automated. From auto-completed messages to "likes," research has shown that such lightweight interactions can affect perceptions of authenticity and closeness. On the other hand, effort in relationships can forge emotional bonds by conveying a sense of caring and is essential in building and maintaining relationships. To explore effortful communication, we designed and evaluated Auggie, an iOS app that encourages partners to create digitally handcrafted Augmented Reality (AR) experiences for each other. Auggie is centered around crafting a 3D character with photos, animated movements, drawings, and audio for someone else. We conducted a two-week-long field study with 30 participants (15 pairs), who used Auggie with their partners remotely. Our qualitative findings show that Auggie participants engaged in meaningful effort through the handcrafting process, and felt closer to their partners, although the tool may not be appropriate in all situations. We discuss design implications and future directions for systems that encourage effortful communication.
abstract_zh: 数字通信通常是快速且自动化的。从自动完成的消息到“点赞”，研究表明，这种轻量级的互动会影响人们对真实性和亲密感的看法。另一方面，在人际关系中的努力可以通过传达关怀感来建立情感纽带，这对于建立和维持关系至关重要。为了探索有效的沟通，我们设计并评估了 Auggie，这是一款 iOS 应用程序，它鼓励合作伙伴为彼此创建数字手工制作的增强现实 (AR) 体验。 Auggie 致力于为其他人制作带有照片、动画动作、图画和音频的 3D 角色。我们对 30 名参与者（15 对）进行了为期两周的实地研究，他们与伴侣远程使用 Auggie。我们的定性研究结果表明，Auggie 参与者在手工制作过程中做出了有意义的努力，并感觉与他们的合作伙伴更亲近，尽管该工具可能并不适合所有情况。我们讨论鼓励有效沟通的系统的设计含义和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Auggie应用，通过手工制作的增强现实（AR）体验鼓励伴侣之间进行努力的沟通。
AI.motivation: 数字沟通常因自动化而缺乏真实感和亲密感，而努力投入的沟通能增强情感联系。研究旨在探索如何通过数字工具促进更有意义的互动。
AI.method: 设计并评估了Auggie iOS应用，用户通过照片、动画、绘画和音频创建3D角色，进行为期两周的远程田野研究，共30名参与者（15对情侣）。
AI.result: 参与者通过手工制作过程投入努力，感受到与伴侣的亲密感增强，但工具在特定情境下可能不适用。
AI.conclusion: 手工制作的数字体验能有效促进努力沟通，未来需进一步探索适用于不同场景的设计方案。

On the other hand, effort in relationships can forge emotional bonds by conveying a sense of caring and is essential in building and maintaining relationships. We conducted a two-week-long field study with 30 participants (15 pairs), who used Auggie with their partners remotely. Our qualitative findings show that Auggie participants engaged in meaningful effort through the handcrafting process, and felt closer to their partners, although the tool may not be appropriate in all situations. We discuss design implications and future directions for systems that encourage effortful communication. 数字通信通常是快速且自动化的。从自动完成的消息到“点赞”，研究表明，这种轻量级的互动会影响人们对真实性和亲密感的看法。另一方面，在人际关系中的努力可以通过传达关怀感来建立情感纽带，这对于建立和维持关系至关重要。为了探索有效的沟通，我们设计并评估了 Auggie，这是一款 iOS 应用程序，它鼓励合作伙伴为彼此创建数字手工制作的增强现实 (AR) 体验。 Auggie 致力于为其他人制作带有照片、动画动作、图画和音频的 3D 角色。我们对 30 名参与者（15 对）进行了为期两周的实地研究，他们与伴侣远程使用 Auggie。我们的定性研究结果表明，Auggie 参与者在手工制作过程中做出了有意义的努力，并感觉与他们的合作伙伴更亲近，尽管该工具可能并不适合所有情况。我们讨论鼓励有效沟通的系统的设计含义和未来方向。 本文介绍了Auggie应用，通过手工制作的增强现实（AR）体验鼓励伴侣之间进行努力的沟通。 Lei Zhang,Tianying Chen,Olivia Seow,Tim Chong,Sven Kratz,Yu Jiang Tham,Andrés Monroy-Hernández,Rajan Vaish,Fannie Liu cs.HC

authors_text: Vinod Subramanian,Siddharth Gururani,Emmanouil Benetos,Mark Sandler
title: Anomalous behaviour in loss-gradient based interpretability methods
title_zh: 基于损失梯度的可解释性方法中的异常行为
abstract: Loss-gradients are used to interpret the decision making process of deep learning models. In this work, we evaluate loss-gradient based attribution methods by occluding parts of the input and comparing the performance of the occluded input to the original input. We observe that the occluded input has better performance than the original across the test dataset under certain conditions. Similar behaviour is observed in sound and image recognition tasks. We explore different loss-gradient attribution methods, occlusion levels and replacement values to explain the phenomenon of performance improvement under occlusion.

abstract_zh: 损失梯度用于解释深度学习模型的决策过程。在这项工作中，我们通过遮挡部分输入并将遮挡输入的性能与原始输入进行比较来评估基于损失梯度的归因方法。我们观察到，在某些条件下，在测试数据集中，被遮挡的输入比原始输入具有更好的性能。在声音和图像识别任务中也观察到类似的行为。我们探索不同的损失梯度归因方法、遮挡级别和替换值来解释遮挡下性能提高的现象。

AI.tldr: 本文评估基于损失梯度的归因方法，并研究遮挡输入后模型性能提升的异常现象。
AI.motivation: 现有基于损失梯度的可解释性方法可能存在未被发现的异常行为，需验证其可靠性并探索性能提升的原因。
AI.method: 通过遮挡输入部分并比较遮挡后与原输入的性能，结合不同归因方法、遮挡水平及替换值进行实验分析。
AI.result: 在特定条件下，遮挡输入的模型性能优于原输入，且该现象在图像和声音识别任务中均被观察到。
AI.conclusion: 基于损失梯度的归因方法存在异常行为，遮挡可能提升性能，需进一步研究其成因及影响。

authors_text: Hilson Shrestha,Kathleen Cachel,Mallak Alkhathlan,Elke Rundensteiner,Lane Harrison
title: FairFuse: Interactive Visual Support for Fair Consensus Ranking
title_zh: FairFuse：公平共识排名的交互式视觉支持
abstract: Fair consensus building combines the preferences of multiple rankers into a single consensus ranking, while ensuring any group defined by a protected attribute (such as race or gender) is not disadvantaged compared to other groups. Manually generating a fair consensus ranking is time-consuming and impractical -- even for a fairly small number of candidates. While algorithmic approaches for auditing and generating fair consensus rankings have been developed, these have not been operationalized in interactive systems. To bridge this gap, we introduce FairFuse, a visualization system for generating, analyzing, and auditing fair consensus rankings. We construct a data model which includes base rankings entered by rankers, augmented with measures of group fairness, and algorithms for generating consensus rankings with varying degrees of fairness. We design novel visualizations that encode these measures in a parallel-coordinates style rank visualization, with interactions for generating and exploring fair consensus rankings. We describe use cases in which FairFuse supports a decision-maker in ranking scenarios in which fairness is important, and discuss emerging challenges for future efforts supporting fairness-oriented rank analysis. Code and demo videos available at https://osf.io/hd639/.
summary: Fair consensus building combines the preferences of multiple rankers into a single consensus ranking, while ensuring any group defined by a protected attribute (such as race or gender) is not disadvantaged compared to other groups. Manually generating a fair consensus ranking is time-consuming and impractical -- even for a fairly small number of candidates. While algorithmic approaches for auditing and generating fair consensus rankings have been developed, these have not been operationalized in interactive systems. To bridge this gap, we introduce FairFuse, a visualization system for generating, analyzing, and auditing fair consensus rankings. We construct a data model which includes base rankings entered by rankers, augmented with measures of group fairness, and algorithms for generating consensus rankings with varying degrees of fairness. We design novel visualizations that encode these measures in a parallel-coordinates style rank visualization, with interactions for generating and exploring fair consensus rankings. We describe use cases in which FairFuse supports a decision-maker in ranking scenarios in which fairness is important, and discuss emerging challenges for future efforts supporting fairness-oriented rank analysis. Code and demo videos available at https://osf.io/hd639/.
abstract_zh: 公平共识的建立将多个排名者的偏好结合到一个共识排名中，同时确保由受保护属性（例如种族或性别）定义的任何群体与其他群体相比不会处于不利地位。手动生成公平的共识排名既耗时又不切实际——即使对于相当少数的候选人也是如此。虽然已经开发出了用于审核和生成公平共识排名的算法方法，但这些方法尚未在交互式系统中得到实施。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了 FairFuse，这是一个用于生成、分析和审核公平共识排名的可视化系统。我们构建了一个数据模型，其中包括排名者输入的基本排名，并通过群体公平性度量进行增强，以及用于生成具有不同公平程度的共识排名的算法。我们设计新颖的可视化，将这些度量编码为平行坐标风格的排名可视化，并通过交互来生成和探索公平的共识排名。我们描述了 FairFuse 在公平性很重要的排名场景中支持决策者的用例，并讨论了支持面向公平性的排名分析的未来工作面临的新挑战。代码和演示视频可在 https://osf.io/hd639/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 开发交互式可视化系统FairFuse，用于生成、分析和审计公平共识排序。
AI.motivation: 手动生成公平共识排序耗时低效，现有算法未集成到交互系统中，需工具支持公平性分析。
AI.method: 构建包含基础排序和公平性度量的数据模型，设计平行坐标可视化与交互功能，结合不同公平程度的共识排序算法。
AI.result: 系统支持决策者处理公平性关键场景，揭示交互式公平排序分析的挑战，提供代码与演示视频。
AI.conclusion: FairFuse填补了交互式公平排序工具的空白，但未来需解决动态数据更新与多维度公平性平衡等挑战。

authors_text: Emmanuel Senft,David Porfirio,Katie Winkle
title: PD/EUP Workshop Proceedings
title_zh: PD/EUP 研讨会论文集
comment: HTML file with clickable links to papers - All papers have been reviewed by two reviewers in a single blind fashion - Symposium website: https://sites.google.com/wisc.edu/hri22pdeupworkshop/
comments: HTML file with clickable links to papers - All papers have been reviewed by two reviewers in a single blind fashion - Symposium website: https://sites.google.com/wisc.edu/hri22pdeupworkshop/
abstract: People who need robots are often not the same as people who can program them. This key observation in human-robot interaction (HRI) has lead to a number of challenges when developing robotic applications, since developers must understand the exact needs of end-users. Participatory Design (PD), the process of including stakeholders such as end users early in the robot design process, has been used with noteworthy success in HRI, but typically remains limited to the early phases of development. Resulting robot behaviors are often then hardcoded by engineers or utilized in Wizard-of-Oz (WoZ) systems that rarely achieve autonomy. End-User Programming (EUP), i.e., the research of tools allowing end users with limited computer knowledge to program systems, has been widely applied to the design of robot behaviors for interaction with humans, but these tools risk being used solely as research demonstrations only existing for the amount of time required for them to be evaluated and published. In the PD/EUP Workshop, we aim to facilitate mutual learning between these communities and to create communication opportunities that could help the larger HRI community work towards end-user personalized and adaptable interactions. Both PD and EUP will be key requirements if we want robots to be useful for wider society. From this workshop, we expect new collaboration opportunities to emerge and we aim to formalize new methodologies that integrate PD and EUP approaches.

End-User Programming (EUP), i.e., the research of tools allowing end users with limited computer knowledge to program systems, has been widely applied to the design of robot behaviors for interaction with humans, but these tools risk being used solely as research demonstrations only existing for the amount of time required for them to be evaluated and published. In the PD/EUP Workshop, we aim to facilitate mutual learning between these communities and to create communication opportunities that could help the larger HRI community work towards end-user personalized and adaptable interactions. Both PD and EUP will be key requirements if we want robots to be useful for wider society. From this workshop, we expect new collaboration opportunities to emerge and we aim to formalize new methodologies that integrate PD and EUP approaches.
abstract_zh: 需要机器人的人通常与会编程的人不同。人机交互 (HRI) 中的这一关键观察结果在开发机器人应用程序时带来了许多挑战，因为开发人员必须了解最终用户的确切需求。参与式设计 (PD) 是在机器人设计过程的早期将最终用户等利益相关者纳入其中的过程，已在 HRI 中取得了显着的成功，但通常仍仅限于开发的早期阶段。由此产生的机器人行为通常由工程师进行硬编码，或用于很少实现自主的绿野仙踪 (WoZ) 系统。终端用户编程（EUP），即允许计算机知识有限的终端用户对系统进行编程的工具研究，已广泛应用于与人类交互的机器人行为设计，但这些工具有可能仅用作研究演示，仅在评估和发布所需的时间内存在。在 PD/EUP 研讨会中，我们的目标是促进这些社区之间的相互学习，并创造沟通机会，帮助更大的 HRI 社区实现最终用户个性化和适应性强的交互。如果我们希望机器人对更广泛的社会有用，PD 和 EUP 都将是关键要求。通过本次研讨会，我们预计会出现新的合作机会，我们的目标是正式确定整合 PD 和 EUP 方法的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过举办PD/EUP研讨会，促进参与式设计（PD）与终端用户编程（EUP）社区的协作，推动人机交互（HRI）中更个性化和可适应的机器人交互方法。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人开发中，开发者与终端用户需求存在脱节，PD和EUP虽各有成效但应用受限，需整合两者以提升机器人对社会的实用性。
AI.method: 通过组织跨领域研讨会，促进PD与EUP研究者交流，探索融合两者的方法论，推动长期可落地的协作模式。
AI.result: 预期产生新的跨领域合作机会，并形成结合PD与EUP的系统化方法，以实现更自主、个性化的机器人交互。
AI.conclusion: PD与EUP的整合是推动机器人服务大众的关键，研讨会为HRI领域提供了方法论创新与实践结合的方向。

search_text: PD/EUP Workshop Proceedings PD/EUP 研讨会论文集 People who need robots are often not the same as people who can program them. This key observation in human-robot interaction (HRI) has lead to a number of challenges when developing robotic applications, since developers must understand the exact needs of end-users. Participatory Design (PD), the process of including stakeholders such as end users early in the robot design process, has been used with noteworthy success in HRI, but typically remains limited to the early phases of development. Resulting robot behaviors are often then hardcoded by engineers or utilized in Wizard-of-Oz (WoZ) systems that rarely achieve autonomy. End-User Programming (EUP), i.e., the research of tools allowing end users with limited computer knowledge to program systems, has been widely applied to the design of robot behaviors for interaction with humans, but these tools risk being used solely as research demonstrations only existing for the amount of time required for them to be evaluated and published. In the PD/EUP Workshop, we aim to facilitate mutual learning between these communities and to create communication opportunities that could help the larger HRI community work towards end-user personalized and adaptable interactions. Both PD and EUP will be key requirements if we want robots to be useful for wider society. From this workshop, we expect new collaboration opportunities to emerge and we aim to formalize new methodologies that integrate PD and EUP approaches. 需要机器人的人通常与会编程的人不同。人机交互 (HRI) 中的这一关键观察结果在开发机器人应用程序时带来了许多挑战，因为开发人员必须了解最终用户的确切需求。参与式设计 (PD) 是在机器人设计过程的早期将最终用户等利益相关者纳入其中的过程，已在 HRI 中取得了显着的成功，但通常仍仅限于开发的早期阶段。由此产生的机器人行为通常由工程师进行硬编码，或用于很少实现自主的绿野仙踪 (WoZ) 系统。终端用户编程（EUP），即允许计算机知识有限的终端用户对系统进行编程的工具研究，已广泛应用于与人类交互的机器人行为设计，但这些工具有可能仅用作研究演示，仅在评估和发布所需的时间内存在。在 PD/EUP 研讨会中，我们的目标是促进这些社区之间的相互学习，并创造沟通机会，帮助更大的 HRI 社区实现最终用户个性化和适应性强的交互。如果我们希望机器人对更广泛的社会有用，PD 和 EUP 都将是关键要求。通过本次研讨会，我们预计会出现新的合作机会，我们的目标是正式确定整合 PD 和 EUP 方法的新方法。 本文通过举办PD/EUP研讨会，促进参与式设计（PD）与终端用户编程（EUP）社区的协作，推动人机交互（HRI）中更个性化和可适应的机器人交互方法。 Emmanuel Senft,David Porfirio,Katie Winkle cs.RO

authors_text: Ronghui Mu,Wenjie Ruan,Leandro S. Marcolino,Qiang Ni
title: 3DVerifier: Efficient Robustness Verification for 3D Point Cloud Models
title_zh: 3DVerifier：3D 点云模型的高效鲁棒性验证
abstract: 3D point cloud models are widely applied in safety-critical scenes, which delivers an urgent need to obtain more solid proofs to verify the robustness of models. Existing verification method for point cloud model is time-expensive and computationally unattainable on large networks. Additionally, they cannot handle the complete PointNet model with joint alignment network (JANet) that contains multiplication layers, which effectively boosts the performance of 3D models. This motivates us to design a more efficient and general framework to verify various architectures of point cloud models. The key challenges in verifying the large-scale complete PointNet models are addressed as dealing with the cross-non-linearity operations in the multiplication layers and the high computational complexity of high-dimensional point cloud inputs and added layers. Thus, we propose an efficient verification framework, 3DVerifier, to tackle both challenges by adopting a linear relaxation function to bound the multiplication layer and combining forward and backward propagation to compute the certified bounds of the outputs of the point cloud models. Our comprehensive experiments demonstrate that 3DVerifier outperforms existing verification algorithms for 3D models in terms of both efficiency and accuracy. Notably, our approach achieves an orders-of-magnitude improvement in verification efficiency for the large network, and the obtained certified bounds are also significantly tighter than the state-of-the-art verifiers. We release our tool 3DVerifier via https://github.com/TrustAI/3DVerifier for use by the community.
summary: 3D point cloud models are widely applied in safety-critical scenes, which delivers an urgent need to obtain more solid proofs to verify the robustness of models. Existing verification method for point cloud model is time-expensive and computationally unattainable on large networks. Additionally, they cannot handle the complete PointNet model with joint alignment network (JANet) that contains multiplication layers, which effectively boosts the performance of 3D models. This motivates us to design a more efficient and general framework to verify various architectures of point cloud models. The key challenges in verifying the large-scale complete PointNet models are addressed as dealing with the cross-non-linearity operations in the multiplication layers and the high computational complexity of high-dimensional point cloud inputs and added layers. Thus, we propose an efficient verification framework, 3DVerifier, to tackle both challenges by adopting a linear relaxation function to bound the multiplication layer and combining forward and backward propagation to compute the certified bounds of the outputs of the point cloud models. Our comprehensive experiments demonstrate that 3DVerifier outperforms existing verification algorithms for 3D models in terms of both efficiency and accuracy. Notably, our approach achieves an orders-of-magnitude improvement in verification efficiency for the large network, and the obtained certified bounds are also significantly tighter than the state-of-the-art verifiers. We release our tool 3DVerifier via https://github.com/TrustAI/3DVerifier for use by the community.
abstract_zh: 3D点云模型广泛应用于安全关键场景，迫切需要获得更可靠的证据来验证模型的鲁棒性。现有的点云模型验证方法耗时且在大型网络上无法实现。此外，它们无法处理包含乘法层的联合对齐网络（JANet）的完整 PointNet 模型，从而有效提高 3D 模型的性能。这促使我们设计一个更高效、更通用的框架来验证点云模型的各种架构。验证大规模完整PointNet模型的关键挑战是处理乘法层中的交叉非线性运算以及高维点云输入和附加层的高计算复杂性。因此，我们提出了一种高效的验证框架 3DVerifier，通过采用线性松弛函数来限制乘法层并结合前向和后向传播来计算点云模型输出的认证边界来解决这两个挑战。我们的综合实验表明，3DVerifier 在效率和准确性方面均优于现有的 3D 模型验证算法。值得注意的是，我们的方法在大型网络的验证效率方面实现了数量级的提高，并且获得的认证范围也比最先进的验证器要严格得多。我们通过 https://github.com/TrustAI/3DVerifier 发布了我们的工具 3DVerifier 供社区使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3DVerifier框架，用于高效验证3D点云模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有验证方法计算成本高且无法处理含乘法层的完整PointNet模型，亟需更高效通用的验证方案。
AI.method: 采用线性松弛函数约束乘法层，并结合前向与反向传播计算输出的认证边界。
AI.result: 验证效率较现有方法提升数量级，认证边界显著更紧，实验覆盖多种模型架构。
AI.conclusion: 3DVerifier实现了对大规模点云模型的高效鲁棒性验证，工具已开源共享。

authors_text: Benjamin Alt,Darko Katic,Rainer Jäkel,Michael Beetz
title: Heuristic-free Optimization of Force-Controlled Robot Search Strategies in Stochastic Environments
title_zh: 随机环境中力控机器人搜索策略的无启发式优化
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022), Kyoto, Japan For code and data, see https://github.com/benjaminalt/dpse
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022), Kyoto, Japan For code and data, see https://github.com/benjaminalt/dpse
abstract: In both industrial and service domains, a central benefit of the use of robots is their ability to quickly and reliably execute repetitive tasks. However, even relatively simple peg-in-hole tasks are typically subject to stochastic variations, requiring search motions to find relevant features such as holes. While search improves robustness, it comes at the cost of increased runtime: More exhaustive search will maximize the probability of successfully executing a given task, but will significantly delay any downstream tasks. This trade-off is typically resolved by human experts according to simple heuristics, which are rarely optimal. This paper introduces an automatic, data-driven and heuristic-free approach to optimize robot search strategies. By training a neural model of the search strategy on a large set of simulated stochastic environments, conditioning it on few real-world examples and inverting the model, we can infer search strategies which adapt to the time-variant characteristics of the underlying probability distributions, while requiring very few real-world measurements. We evaluate our approach on two different industrial robots in the context of spiral and probe search for THT electronics assembly.
summary: In both industrial and service domains, a central benefit of the use of robots is their ability to quickly and reliably execute repetitive tasks. However, even relatively simple peg-in-hole tasks are typically subject to stochastic variations, requiring search motions to find relevant features such as holes. While search improves robustness, it comes at the cost of increased runtime: More exhaustive search will maximize the probability of successfully executing a given task, but will significantly delay any downstream tasks. This trade-off is typically resolved by human experts according to simple heuristics, which are rarely optimal. This paper introduces an automatic, data-driven and heuristic-free approach to optimize robot search strategies. By training a neural model of the search strategy on a large set of simulated stochastic environments, conditioning it on few real-world examples and inverting the model, we can infer search strategies which adapt to the time-variant characteristics of the underlying probability distributions, while requiring very few real-world measurements. We evaluate our approach on two different industrial robots in the context of spiral and probe search for THT electronics assembly.
abstract_zh: 在工业和服务领域，使用机器人的一个主要好处是它们能够快速可靠地执行重复性任务。然而，即使是相对简单的孔洞任务通常也会受到随机变化的影响，需要搜索运动来找到相关特征，例如孔。虽然搜索提高了鲁棒性，但它是以增加运行时间为代价的：更详尽的搜索将最大限度地提高成功执行给定任务的概率，但会显着延迟任何下游任务。这种权衡通常由人类专家根据简单的启发法来解决，但这种方法很少是最佳的。本文介绍了一种自动的、数据驱动的、无启发式的方法来优化机器人搜索策略。通过在大量模拟随机环境上训练搜索策略的神经模型，以很少的现实世界示例为条件并反转模型，我们可以推断出适应潜在概率分布的时变特征的搜索策略，同时需要很少的现实世界测量。我们在 THT 电子装配的螺旋和探针搜索背景下评估了两种不同工业机器人的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需启发式的优化方法，用于改进力控机器人在随机环境中的搜索策略。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工启发式规则解决随机性任务中的搜索策略优化问题，但这些规则通常非最优且难以适应动态变化的概率分布。
AI.method: 通过在大量模拟随机环境中训练神经网络模型，结合少量真实场景数据并逆向推导模型，生成适应概率分布变化的搜索策略。
AI.result: 在两种工业机器人上验证了该方法在THT电子元件装配的螺旋搜索和探针搜索任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动方法能在极少真实测量情况下生成自适应搜索策略，优于传统启发式方法。

authors_text: Wencan Cheng,Jong Hwan Ko
title: Bi-PointFlowNet: Bidirectional Learning for Point Cloud Based Scene Flow Estimation
title_zh: Bi-PointFlowNet：基于点云的场景流估计的双向学习
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Scene flow estimation, which extracts point-wise motion between scenes, is becoming a crucial task in many computer vision tasks. However, all of the existing estimation methods utilize only the unidirectional features, restricting the accuracy and generality. This paper presents a novel scene flow estimation architecture using bidirectional flow embedding layers. The proposed bidirectional layer learns features along both forward and backward directions, enhancing the estimation performance. In addition, hierarchical feature extraction and warping improve the performance and reduce computational overhead. Experimental results show that the proposed architecture achieved a new state-of-the-art record by outperforming other approaches with large margin in both FlyingThings3D and KITTI benchmarks. Codes are available at https://github.com/cwc1260/BiFlow.
summary: Scene flow estimation, which extracts point-wise motion between scenes, is becoming a crucial task in many computer vision tasks. However, all of the existing estimation methods utilize only the unidirectional features, restricting the accuracy and generality. This paper presents a novel scene flow estimation architecture using bidirectional flow embedding layers. The proposed bidirectional layer learns features along both forward and backward directions, enhancing the estimation performance. In addition, hierarchical feature extraction and warping improve the performance and reduce computational overhead. Experimental results show that the proposed architecture achieved a new state-of-the-art record by outperforming other approaches with large margin in both FlyingThings3D and KITTI benchmarks. Codes are available at https://github.com/cwc1260/BiFlow.
abstract_zh: 场景流估计提取场景之间的逐点运动，正在成为许多计算机视觉任务中的关键任务。然而，现有的估计方法都仅利用单向特征，限制了准确性和通用性。本文提出了一种使用双向流嵌入层的新型场景流估计架构。所提出的双向层学习前向和后向的特征，从而提高估计性能。此外，分层特征提取和扭曲提高了性能并减少了计算开销。实验结果表明，所提出的架构在 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI 基准测试中均大幅优于其他方法，创下了新的最先进记录。代码可在 https://github.com/cwc1260/BiFlow 获取。

AI.motivation: 现有场景流估计方法仅利用单向特征，导致精度和泛化能力受限，需探索双向特征学习以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计双向流嵌入层同时提取前向和后向特征，结合分层特征提取与变形机制降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在FlyingThings3D和KITTI基准测试中显著超越现有方法，达到新的SOTA水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 双向学习框架与分层结构有效提升场景流估计精度与效率，为点云运动分析提供新思路。

search_text: Bi-PointFlowNet: Bidirectional Learning for Point Cloud Based Scene Flow Estimation Bi-PointFlowNet：基于点云的场景流估计的双向学习 Scene flow estimation, which extracts point-wise motion between scenes, is becoming a crucial task in many computer vision tasks. However, all of the existing estimation methods utilize only the unidirectional features, restricting the accuracy and generality. This paper presents a novel scene flow estimation architecture using bidirectional flow embedding layers. The proposed bidirectional layer learns features along both forward and backward directions, enhancing the estimation performance. In addition, hierarchical feature extraction and warping improve the performance and reduce computational overhead. Experimental results show that the proposed architecture achieved a new state-of-the-art record by outperforming other approaches with large margin in both FlyingThings3D and KITTI benchmarks. Codes are available at https://github.com/cwc1260/BiFlow. 场景流估计提取场景之间的逐点运动，正在成为许多计算机视觉任务中的关键任务。然而，现有的估计方法都仅利用单向特征，限制了准确性和通用性。本文提出了一种使用双向流嵌入层的新型场景流估计架构。所提出的双向层学习前向和后向的特征，从而提高估计性能。此外，分层特征提取和扭曲提高了性能并减少了计算开销。实验结果表明，所提出的架构在 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI 基准测试中均大幅优于其他方法，创下了新的最先进记录。代码可在 https://github.com/cwc1260/BiFlow 获取。 本文提出基于点云的场景流估计方法Bi-PointFlowNet，通过双向学习提升估计性能。 Wencan Cheng,Jong Hwan Ko cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sayan Bhattacharya,Peter Kiss,Thatchaphol Saranurak
title: Dynamic Algorithms for Packing-Covering LPs via Multiplicative Weight Updates
title_zh: 通过乘法权重更新进行打包覆盖 LP 的动态算法
abstract: In the dynamic linear program (LP) problem, we are given an LP undergoing updates and we need to maintain an approximately optimal solution. Recently, significant attention (e.g., [Gupta et al. STOC'17; Arar et al. ICALP'18, Wajc STOC'20]) has been devoted to the study of special cases of dynamic packing and covering LPs, such as the dynamic fractional matching and set cover problems. But until now, there is no non-trivial dynamic algorithm for general packing and covering LPs. In this paper, we settle the complexity of dynamic packing and covering LPs, up to a polylogarithmic factor in update time. More precisely, in the partially dynamic setting (where updates can either only relax or only restrict the feasible region), we give near-optimal deterministic $ε$-approximation algorithms with polylogarithmic amortized update time. Then, we show that both partially dynamic updates and amortized update time are necessary; without any of these conditions, the trivial algorithm that recomputes the solution from scratch after every update is essentially the best possible, assuming SETH. To obtain our results, we initiate a systematic study of the multiplicative weights update (MWU) method in the dynamic setting. As by-products of our techniques, we also obtain the first online $(1+ε)$-competitive algorithms for both covering and packing LPs with polylogarithmic recourse, and the first streaming algorithms for covering and packing LPs with linear space and polylogarithmic passes.
summary: In the dynamic linear program (LP) problem, we are given an LP undergoing updates and we need to maintain an approximately optimal solution. Recently, significant attention (e.g., [Gupta et al. STOC'17; Arar et al. ICALP'18, Wajc STOC'20]) has been devoted to the study of special cases of dynamic packing and covering LPs, such as the dynamic fractional matching and set cover problems. But until now, there is no non-trivial dynamic algorithm for general packing and covering LPs. In this paper, we settle the complexity of dynamic packing and covering LPs, up to a polylogarithmic factor in update time. More precisely, in the partially dynamic setting (where updates can either only relax or only restrict the feasible region), we give near-optimal deterministic $ε$-approximation algorithms with polylogarithmic amortized update time. Then, we show that both partially dynamic updates and amortized update time are necessary; without any of these conditions, the trivial algorithm that recomputes the solution from scratch after every update is essentially the best possible, assuming SETH. To obtain our results, we initiate a systematic study of the multiplicative weights update (MWU) method in the dynamic setting. As by-products of our techniques, we also obtain the first online $(1+ε)$-competitive algorithms for both covering and packing LPs with polylogarithmic recourse, and the first streaming algorithms for covering and packing LPs with linear space and polylogarithmic passes.
abstract_zh: 在动态线性规划（LP）问题中，给定一个正在更新的 LP，我们需要维持一个近似最优解。最近，人们广泛关注（例如，[Gupta 等人 STOC'17；Arar 等人 ICALP'18，Wajc STOC'20]）致力于研究动态打包和覆盖 LP 的特殊情况，例如动态分数匹配和集合覆盖问题。但到目前为止，还没有用于通用打包和覆盖 LP 的重要动态算法。在本文中，我们解决了动态打包和覆盖 LP 的复杂性，直至更新时间的多对数因子。更准确地说，在部分动态设置（其中更新只能放松或仅限制可行区域）中，我们给出了具有多对数摊销更新时间的近乎最优的确定性 $ε$ 近似算法。然后，我们证明部分动态更新和摊销更新时间都是必要的；如果没有这些条件，每次更新后从头开始重新计算解决方案的简单算法本质上是最好的算法（假设 SETH）。为了获得我们的结果，我们在动态设置中启动了乘法权重更新（MWU）方法的系统研究。作为我们技术的副产品，我们还获得了第一个在线 $(1+ε)$ 竞争算法，用于使用多对数资源覆盖和打包 LP，以及第一个用于使用线性空间和多对数通道覆盖和打包 LP 的流算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动态线性规划（LP）问题中一般装箱-覆盖LP的动态算法，提出基于乘法权重更新（MWU）方法的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究针对动态匹配和集合覆盖等特殊情形，但尚未有针对一般装箱-覆盖LP的非平凡动态算法，需填补该领域空白。
AI.method: 通过系统研究动态场景下的乘法权重更新（MWU）方法，设计近似最优算法并分析其复杂度。
AI.result: 在部分动态设置下，提出具有对数因子近似比的确定性算法，证明部分动态更新和均摊时间的必要性，并衍生出在线和流算法。
AI.conclusion: 解决了动态装箱-覆盖LP的复杂度问题，证明所提方法的最优性，并为相关问题提供新算法框架。

authors_text: Guoxuan Xia,Christos-Savvas Bouganis
title: On the Usefulness of Deep Ensemble Diversity for Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 论深度集成多样性对于分布外检测的有用性
comment: Workshop on Uncertainty Quantification for Computer Vision, ECCV 2022
comments: Workshop on Uncertainty Quantification for Computer Vision, ECCV 2022
abstract: The ability to detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) data is important in safety-critical applications of deep learning. The aim is to separate In-Distribution (ID) data drawn from the training distribution from OOD data using a measure of uncertainty extracted from a deep neural network. Deep Ensembles are a well-established method of improving the quality of uncertainty estimates produced by deep neural networks, and have been shown to have superior OOD detection performance compared to single models. An existing intuition in the literature is that the diversity of Deep Ensemble predictions indicates distributional shift, and so measures of diversity such as Mutual Information (MI) should be used for OOD detection. We show experimentally that this intuition is not valid on ImageNet-scale OOD detection -- using MI leads to 30-40% worse %FPR@95 compared to single-model entropy on some OOD datasets. We suggest an alternative explanation for Deep Ensembles' better OOD detection performance -- OOD detection is binary classification and we are ensembling diverse classifiers. As such we show that practically, even better OOD detection performance can be achieved for Deep Ensembles by averaging task-specific detection scores such as Energy over the ensemble.
summary: The ability to detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) data is important in safety-critical applications of deep learning. The aim is to separate In-Distribution (ID) data drawn from the training distribution from OOD data using a measure of uncertainty extracted from a deep neural network. Deep Ensembles are a well-established method of improving the quality of uncertainty estimates produced by deep neural networks, and have been shown to have superior OOD detection performance compared to single models. An existing intuition in the literature is that the diversity of Deep Ensemble predictions indicates distributional shift, and so measures of diversity such as Mutual Information (MI) should be used for OOD detection. We show experimentally that this intuition is not valid on ImageNet-scale OOD detection -- using MI leads to 30-40% worse %FPR@95 compared to single-model entropy on some OOD datasets. We suggest an alternative explanation for Deep Ensembles' better OOD detection performance -- OOD detection is binary classification and we are ensembling diverse classifiers. As such we show that practically, even better OOD detection performance can be achieved for Deep Ensembles by averaging task-specific detection scores such as Energy over the ensemble.
abstract_zh: 在深度学习的安全关键型应用中，检测分布外 (OOD) 数据的能力非常重要。目的是使用从深度神经网络提取的不确定性度量，将训练分布中提取的分布内 (ID) 数据与 OOD 数据分开。深度集成是一种完善的方法，可提高深度神经网络产生的不确定性估计的质量，并且已被证明与单一模型相比具有卓越的 OOD 检测性能。文献中现有的直觉是，深度集成预测的多样性表明分布变化，因此应该使用互信息 (MI) 等多样性度量来进行 OOD 检测。我们通过实验证明，这种直觉在 ImageNet 规模的 OOD 检测上是无效的——与某些 OOD 数据集上的单模型熵相比，使用 MI 会导致 %FPR@95 差 30-40%。我们对深度集成更好的 OOD 检测性能提出了另一种解释——OOD 检测是二元分类，我们正在集成不同的分类器。因此，我们表明，实际上，通过平均特定于任务的检测分数（例如集成的能量），可以为深度集成实现更好的 OOD 检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度集成（Deep Ensemble）的多样性在分布外检测（OOD Detection）中的有效性，并验证其在大规模数据集上的实际表现。
AI.motivation: 深度集成被广泛认为能提升不确定性估计和OOD检测性能，但现有文献认为其多样性（如互信息MI）可直接用于检测分布偏移，而本文发现这一假设在ImageNet规模数据中并不成立。
AI.method: 通过实验对比不同OOD检测指标（如MI、单模型熵、能量函数），分析深度集成的多样性与检测性能的关系，并提出基于任务特定检测分数平均的新方法。
AI.result: 在部分OOD数据集上，使用MI的检测性能比单模型熵低30-40%（%FPR@95），而通过平均能量等任务特定分数可进一步提升深度集成的检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 深度集成的OOD检测优势并非源于多样性本身，而是源于集成多个分类器的二分类特性；建议采用任务特定检测分数的平均方法以提升性能。

ai_content_json.method: 通过实验对比不同OOD检测指标（如MI、单模型熵、能量函数），分析深度集成的多样性与检测性能的关系，并提出基于任务特定检测分数平均的新方法。
ai_content_json.result: 在部分OOD数据集上，使用MI的检测性能比单模型熵低30-40%（%FPR@95），而通过平均能量等任务特定分数可进一步提升深度集成的检测效果。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 深度集成的OOD检测优势并非源于多样性本身，而是源于集成多个分类器的二分类特性；建议采用任务特定检测分数的平均方法以提升性能。

search_text: On the Usefulness of Deep Ensemble Diversity for Out-of-Distribution Detection 论深度集成多样性对于分布外检测的有用性 The ability to detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) data is important in safety-critical applications of deep learning. The aim is to separate In-Distribution (ID) data drawn from the training distribution from OOD data using a measure of uncertainty extracted from a deep neural network. Deep Ensembles are a well-established method of improving the quality of uncertainty estimates produced by deep neural networks, and have been shown to have superior OOD detection performance compared to single models. An existing intuition in the literature is that the diversity of Deep Ensemble predictions indicates distributional shift, and so measures of diversity such as Mutual Information (MI) should be used for OOD detection. We show experimentally that this intuition is not valid on ImageNet-scale OOD detection -- using MI leads to 30-40% worse %FPR@95 compared to single-model entropy on some OOD datasets. We suggest an alternative explanation for Deep Ensembles' better OOD detection performance -- OOD detection is binary classification and we are ensembling diverse classifiers. As such we show that practically, even better OOD detection performance can be achieved for Deep Ensembles by averaging task-specific detection scores such as Energy over the ensemble. 在深度学习的安全关键型应用中，检测分布外 (OOD) 数据的能力非常重要。目的是使用从深度神经网络提取的不确定性度量，将训练分布中提取的分布内 (ID) 数据与 OOD 数据分开。深度集成是一种完善的方法，可提高深度神经网络产生的不确定性估计的质量，并且已被证明与单一模型相比具有卓越的 OOD 检测性能。文献中现有的直觉是，深度集成预测的多样性表明分布变化，因此应该使用互信息 (MI) 等多样性度量来进行 OOD 检测。我们通过实验证明，这种直觉在 ImageNet 规模的 OOD 检测上是无效的——与某些 OOD 数据集上的单模型熵相比，使用 MI 会导致 %FPR@95 差 30-40%。我们对深度集成更好的 OOD 检测性能提出了另一种解释——OOD 检测是二元分类，我们正在集成不同的分类器。因此，我们表明，实际上，通过平均特定于任务的检测分数（例如集成的能量），可以为深度集成实现更好的 OOD 检测性能。 本文研究深度集成（Deep Ensemble）的多样性在分布外检测（OOD Detection）中的有效性，并验证其在大规模数据集上的实际表现。 Guoxuan Xia,Christos-Savvas Bouganis cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Alex F. Spies,Alessandra Russo,Murray Shanahan
title: Sparse Relational Reasoning with Object-Centric Representations
title_zh: 具有以对象为中心的表示的稀疏关系推理
abstract: We investigate the composability of soft-rules learned by relational neural architectures when operating over object-centric (slot-based) representations, under a variety of sparsity-inducing constraints. We find that increasing sparsity, especially on features, improves the performance of some models and leads to simpler relations. Additionally, we observe that object-centric representations can be detrimental when not all objects are fully captured; a failure mode to which CNNs are less prone. These findings demonstrate the trade-offs between interpretability and performance, even for models designed to tackle relational tasks.
summary: We investigate the composability of soft-rules learned by relational neural architectures when operating over object-centric (slot-based) representations, under a variety of sparsity-inducing constraints. We find that increasing sparsity, especially on features, improves the performance of some models and leads to simpler relations. Additionally, we observe that object-centric representations can be detrimental when not all objects are fully captured; a failure mode to which CNNs are less prone. These findings demonstrate the trade-offs between interpretability and performance, even for models designed to tackle relational tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了在各种稀疏性约束下，在以对象为中心（基于槽）的表示上进行操作时，由关系神经架构学习到的软规则的可组合性。我们发现，增加稀疏性，尤其是特征上的稀疏性，可以提高某些模型的性能并导致更简单的关系。此外，我们观察到，当并非所有对象都被完全捕获时，以对象为中心的表示可能是有害的。 CNN 不易出现的故障模式。这些发现证明了可解释性和性能之间的权衡，即使对于旨在解决关系任务的模型也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在对象中心表示下，稀疏性约束对关系推理模型性能和可解释性的影响。
AI.motivation: 论文旨在探索稀疏性约束下关系神经网络在对象中心表示中的表现，以及其在可解释性与性能间的权衡。
AI.method: 采用关系神经网络架构，结合对象中心表示，引入特征和对象级别的稀疏性约束，对比不同稀疏程度下的模型表现。
AI.result: 实验发现特征稀疏性提升部分模型性能并简化关系，但对象中心表示在对象缺失时效果差，而CNN对此不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出稀疏性约束下，对象中心表示在可解释性与性能间存在权衡，需根据任务需求选择合适模型。

authors_text: Xingming Wang,Xiaoyi Qin,Yikang Wang,Yunfei Xu,Ming Li
title: The DKU-OPPO System for the 2022 Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification Challenge
title_zh: 昆山杜克-OPPO系统应对2022欺骗感知扬声器验证挑战赛
abstract: This paper describes our DKU-OPPO system for the 2022 Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification (SASV) Challenge. First, we split the joint task into speaker verification (SV) and spoofing countermeasure (CM), these two tasks which are optimized separately. For ASV systems, four state-of-the-art methods are employed. For CM systems, we propose two methods on top of the challenge baseline to further improve the performance, namely Embedding Random Sampling Augmentation (ERSA) and One-Class Confusion Loss(OCCL). Second, we also explore whether SV embedding could help improve CM system performance. We observe a dramatic performance degradation of existing CM systems on the domain-mismatched Voxceleb2 dataset. Third, we compare different fusion strategies, including parallel score fusion and sequential cascaded systems. Compared to the 1.71% SASV-EER baseline, our submitted cascaded system obtains a 0.21% SASV-EER on the challenge official evaluation set.
summary: This paper describes our DKU-OPPO system for the 2022 Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification (SASV) Challenge. First, we split the joint task into speaker verification (SV) and spoofing countermeasure (CM), these two tasks which are optimized separately. For ASV systems, four state-of-the-art methods are employed. For CM systems, we propose two methods on top of the challenge baseline to further improve the performance, namely Embedding Random Sampling Augmentation (ERSA) and One-Class Confusion Loss(OCCL). Second, we also explore whether SV embedding could help improve CM system performance. We observe a dramatic performance degradation of existing CM systems on the domain-mismatched Voxceleb2 dataset. Third, we compare different fusion strategies, including parallel score fusion and sequential cascaded systems. Compared to the 1.71% SASV-EER baseline, our submitted cascaded system obtains a 0.21% SASV-EER on the challenge official evaluation set.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们用于 2022 年欺骗感知说话人验证 (SASV) 挑战赛的 DKU-OPPO 系统。首先，我们将联合任务分为说话人验证（SV）和欺骗对策（CM），这两个任务分别进行优化。对于 ASV 系统，采用了四种最先进的方法。对于 CM 系统，我们在挑战基线之上提出了两种方法来进一步提高性能，即嵌入随机采样增强（ERSA）和一类混淆损失（OCCL）。其次，我们还探讨了 SV 嵌入是否有助于提高 CM 系统性能。我们观察到现有 CM 系统在域不匹配的 Voxceleb2 数据集上的性能急剧下降。第三，我们比较不同的融合策略，包括并行分数融合和顺序级联系统。与 1.71% SASV-EER 基线相比，我们提交的级联系统在挑战官方评估集上获得了 0.21% SASV-EER。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DKU-OPPO系统在2022年防欺骗说话人验证挑战中的解决方案，通过拆分任务、优化方法及融合策略提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在防欺骗攻击和领域不匹配场景下表现不足，需改进欺骗检测方法并探索有效融合策略。
AI.method: 将任务拆分为说话人验证(SV)与欺骗检测(CM)分别优化，采用四种ASV方法及提出的ERAS和OCCL技术，对比平行得分融合与级联系统。
AI.result: 级联系统在挑战测试集上达到0.21% SASV-EER，较基线1.71%提升1.5个百分点，但SV嵌入在Voxceleb2数据集上性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 级联系统优于其他策略，ERAS和OCCL有效提升CM性能，但需谨慎处理SV嵌入的领域泛化问题。

authors_text: Guoxuan Xia,Christos-Savvas Bouganis
title: Augmenting Softmax Information for Selective Classification with Out-of-Distribution Data
title_zh: 使用分布外数据增强 Softmax 信息以进行选择性分类
abstract: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) data is a task that is receiving an increasing amount of research attention in the domain of deep learning for computer vision. However, the performance of detection methods is generally evaluated on the task in isolation, rather than also considering potential downstream tasks in tandem. In this work, we examine selective classification in the presence of OOD data (SCOD). That is to say, the motivation for detecting OOD samples is to reject them so their impact on the quality of predictions is reduced. We show under this task specification, that existing post-hoc methods perform quite differently compared to when evaluated only on OOD detection. This is because it is no longer an issue to conflate in-distribution (ID) data with OOD data if the ID data is going to be misclassified. However, the conflation within ID data of correct and incorrect predictions becomes undesirable. We also propose a novel method for SCOD, Softmax Information Retaining Combination (SIRC), that augments softmax-based confidence scores with feature-agnostic information such that their ability to identify OOD samples is improved without sacrificing separation between correct and incorrect ID predictions. Experiments on a wide variety of ImageNet-scale datasets and convolutional neural network architectures show that SIRC is able to consistently match or outperform the baseline for SCOD, whilst existing OOD detection methods fail to do so.
summary: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) data is a task that is receiving an increasing amount of research attention in the domain of deep learning for computer vision. However, the performance of detection methods is generally evaluated on the task in isolation, rather than also considering potential downstream tasks in tandem. In this work, we examine selective classification in the presence of OOD data (SCOD). That is to say, the motivation for detecting OOD samples is to reject them so their impact on the quality of predictions is reduced. We show under this task specification, that existing post-hoc methods perform quite differently compared to when evaluated only on OOD detection. This is because it is no longer an issue to conflate in-distribution (ID) data with OOD data if the ID data is going to be misclassified. However, the conflation within ID data of correct and incorrect predictions becomes undesirable. We also propose a novel method for SCOD, Softmax Information Retaining Combination (SIRC), that augments softmax-based confidence scores with feature-agnostic information such that their ability to identify OOD samples is improved without sacrificing separation between correct and incorrect ID predictions. Experiments on a wide variety of ImageNet-scale datasets and convolutional neural network architectures show that SIRC is able to consistently match or outperform the baseline for SCOD, whilst existing OOD detection methods fail to do so.
abstract_zh: 检测分布外（OOD）数据是一项在计算机视觉深度学习领域受到越来越多研究关注的任务。然而，检测方法的性能通常是单独评估任务，而不是同时考虑潜在的下游任务。在这项工作中，我们研究了 OOD 数据 (SCOD) 存在下的选择性分类。也就是说，检测 OOD 样本的动机是拒绝它们，从而减少它们对预测质量的影响。我们在此任务规范下表明，与仅在 OOD 检测上进行评估时相比，现有的事后方法的表现有很大不同。这是因为，如果 ID 数据会被错误分类，那么将分布内 (ID) 数据与 OOD 数据混为一谈就不再是问题了。然而，将正确和错误预测的 ID 数据混为一谈是不受欢迎的。我们还提出了一种新的 SCOD 方法，即 Softmax 信息保留组合 (SIRC)，该方法用与特征无关的信息增强基于 softmax 的置信度分数，从而提高识别 OOD 样本的能力，而不会牺牲正确和错误 ID 预测之间的分离。对各种 ImageNet 规模数据集和卷积神经网络架构的实验表明，SIRC 能够始终匹配或优于 SCOD 的基线，而现有的 OOD 检测方法则无法做到这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进选择性分类的新方法SIRC，通过增强softmax信息来提升分布外数据（OOD）检测与分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法在单独评估时表现良好，但在选择性分类任务中未能有效区分正确与错误的样本预测，导致下游任务性能下降。
AI.method: 设计Softmax Information Retaining Combination（SIRC）方法，通过结合softmax置信度与特征无关信息，增强对OOD样本的识别能力，同时保持对正确ID预测的区分度。
AI.result: 在多个ImageNet规模数据集和CNN架构上，SIRC在SCOD任务中持续匹配或超越基线方法，而现有OOD检测方法未能达到此效果。
AI.conclusion: SIRC方法有效解决了SCOD任务中的性能瓶颈，表明在设计OOD检测方法时需综合考虑下游分类任务的影响。

search_text: Augmenting Softmax Information for Selective Classification with Out-of-Distribution Data 使用分布外数据增强 Softmax 信息以进行选择性分类 Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) data is a task that is receiving an increasing amount of research attention in the domain of deep learning for computer vision. However, the performance of detection methods is generally evaluated on the task in isolation, rather than also considering potential downstream tasks in tandem. In this work, we examine selective classification in the presence of OOD data (SCOD). That is to say, the motivation for detecting OOD samples is to reject them so their impact on the quality of predictions is reduced. We show under this task specification, that existing post-hoc methods perform quite differently compared to when evaluated only on OOD detection. This is because it is no longer an issue to conflate in-distribution (ID) data with OOD data if the ID data is going to be misclassified. However, the conflation within ID data of correct and incorrect predictions becomes undesirable. We also propose a novel method for SCOD, Softmax Information Retaining Combination (SIRC), that augments softmax-based confidence scores with feature-agnostic information such that their ability to identify OOD samples is improved without sacrificing separation between correct and incorrect ID predictions. Experiments on a wide variety of ImageNet-scale datasets and convolutional neural network architectures show that SIRC is able to consistently match or outperform the baseline for SCOD, whilst existing OOD detection methods fail to do so. 检测分布外（OOD）数据是一项在计算机视觉深度学习领域受到越来越多研究关注的任务。然而，检测方法的性能通常是单独评估任务，而不是同时考虑潜在的下游任务。在这项工作中，我们研究了 OOD 数据 (SCOD) 存在下的选择性分类。也就是说，检测 OOD 样本的动机是拒绝它们，从而减少它们对预测质量的影响。我们在此任务规范下表明，与仅在 OOD 检测上进行评估时相比，现有的事后方法的表现有很大不同。这是因为，如果 ID 数据会被错误分类，那么将分布内 (ID) 数据与 OOD 数据混为一谈就不再是问题了。然而，将正确和错误预测的 ID 数据混为一谈是不受欢迎的。我们还提出了一种新的 SCOD 方法，即 Softmax 信息保留组合 (SIRC)，该方法用与特征无关的信息增强基于 softmax 的置信度分数，从而提高识别 OOD 样本的能力，而不会牺牲正确和错误 ID 预测之间的分离。对各种 ImageNet 规模数据集和卷积神经网络架构的实验表明，SIRC 能够始终匹配或优于 SCOD 的基线，而现有的 OOD 检测方法则无法做到这一点。 本文提出一种改进选择性分类的新方法SIRC，通过增强softmax信息来提升分布外数据（OOD）检测与分类性能。 Guoxuan Xia,Christos-Savvas Bouganis cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Weijian Chen,Yixin Cao,Fuli Feng,Xiangnan He,Yongdong Zhang
title: Explainable Sparse Knowledge Graph Completion via High-order Graph Reasoning Network
title_zh: 通过高阶图推理网络完成可解释的稀疏知识图
abstract: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) are becoming increasingly essential infrastructures in many applications while suffering from incompleteness issues. The KG completion task (KGC) automatically predicts missing facts based on an incomplete KG. However, existing methods perform unsatisfactorily in real-world scenarios. On the one hand, their performance will dramatically degrade along with the increasing sparsity of KGs. On the other hand, the inference procedure for prediction is an untrustworthy black box. This paper proposes a novel explainable model for sparse KGC, compositing high-order reasoning into a graph convolutional network, namely HoGRN. It can not only improve the generalization ability to mitigate the information insufficiency issue but also provide interpretability while maintaining the model's effectiveness and efficiency. There are two main components that are seamlessly integrated for joint optimization. First, the high-order reasoning component learns high-quality relation representations by capturing endogenous correlation among relations. This can reflect logical rules to justify a broader of missing facts. Second, the entity updating component leverages a weight-free Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) to efficiently model KG structures with interpretability. Unlike conventional methods, we conduct entity aggregation and design composition-based attention in the relational space without additional parameters. The lightweight design makes HoGRN better suitable for sparse settings. For evaluation, we have conducted extensive experiments-the results of HoGRN on several sparse KGs present impressive improvements (9% MRR gain on average). Further ablation and case studies demonstrate the effectiveness of the main components. Our codes will be released upon acceptance.
summary: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) are becoming increasingly essential infrastructures in many applications while suffering from incompleteness issues. The KG completion task (KGC) automatically predicts missing facts based on an incomplete KG. However, existing methods perform unsatisfactorily in real-world scenarios. On the one hand, their performance will dramatically degrade along with the increasing sparsity of KGs. On the other hand, the inference procedure for prediction is an untrustworthy black box. This paper proposes a novel explainable model for sparse KGC, compositing high-order reasoning into a graph convolutional network, namely HoGRN. It can not only improve the generalization ability to mitigate the information insufficiency issue but also provide interpretability while maintaining the model's effectiveness and efficiency. There are two main components that are seamlessly integrated for joint optimization. First, the high-order reasoning component learns high-quality relation representations by capturing endogenous correlation among relations. This can reflect logical rules to justify a broader of missing facts. Second, the entity updating component leverages a weight-free Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) to efficiently model KG structures with interpretability. Unlike conventional methods, we conduct entity aggregation and design composition-based attention in the relational space without additional parameters. The lightweight design makes HoGRN better suitable for sparse settings. For evaluation, we have conducted extensive experiments-the results of HoGRN on several sparse KGs present impressive improvements (9% MRR gain on average). Further ablation and case studies demonstrate the effectiveness of the main components. Our codes will be released upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）在许多应用程序中正成为越来越重要的基础设施，但同时也存在不完整性问题。知识图谱完成任务（KGC）根据不完整的知识图谱自动预测缺失的事实。然而，现有方法在现实场景中的表现并不令人满意。一方面，随着 KG 的稀疏性的增加，它们的性能将急剧下降。另一方面，预测的推理过程是一个不值得信任的黑匣子。本文提出了一种新颖的稀疏 KGC 可解释模型，将高阶推理组合到图卷积网络中，即 HoGRN。它不仅可以提高泛化能力以缓解信息不足问题，而且可以在保持模型有效性和效率的同时提供可解释性。有两个主要组件无缝集成以进行联合优化。首先，高阶推理组件通过捕获关系之间的内生相关性来学习高质量的关系表示。这可以反映逻辑规则来证明更广泛的缺失事实的合理性。其次，实体更新组件利用无权图卷积网络（GCN）来有效地建模具有可解释性的知识图谱结构。与传统方法不同，我们在关系空间中进行实体聚合和设计基于组合的注意力，而无需额外的参数。轻量级的设计使得HoGRN更适合稀疏的设置。为了进行评估，我们进行了广泛的实验 - HoGRN 在几个稀疏 KG 上的结果呈现出令人印象深刻的改进（平均 MRR 增益为 9%）。进一步的消融和案例研究证明了主要成分的有效性。我们的代码将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的稀疏知识图谱补全方法HoGRN，通过高阶图推理网络解决知识图谱稀疏性和模型可解释性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱补全方法在稀疏场景下性能下降明显，且模型预测过程缺乏可解释性，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 设计高阶推理组件捕获关系间内生关联，结合无权重图卷积网络实现实体更新，通过关系空间中的组合注意力机制提升效率与可解释性。
AI.result: 在多个稀疏知识图谱数据集上平均提升9%的MRR指标，消融实验和案例研究验证了核心模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HoGRN通过高阶推理与轻量设计有效解决了稀疏知识图谱补全的准确性与可解释性矛盾，为实际应用提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Anderson R. Avila,Khalil Bibi,Rui Heng Yang,Xinlin Li,Chao Xing,Xiao Chen
title: Low-bit Shift Network for End-to-End Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 用于端到端口语理解的低位移网络
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNN) have achieved impressive success in multiple domains. Over the years, the accuracy of these models has increased with the proliferation of deeper and more complex architectures. Thus, state-of-the-art solutions are often computationally expensive, which makes them unfit to be deployed on edge computing platforms. In order to mitigate the high computation, memory, and power requirements of inferring convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we propose the use of power-of-two quantization, which quantizes continuous parameters into low-bit power-of-two values. This reduces computational complexity by removing expensive multiplication operations and with the use of low-bit weights. ResNet is adopted as the building block of our solution and the proposed model is evaluated on a spoken language understanding (SLU) task. Experimental results show improved performance for shift neural network architectures, with our low-bit quantization achieving 98.76 \% on the test set which is comparable performance to its full-precision counterpart and state-of-the-art solutions.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNN) have achieved impressive success in multiple domains. Over the years, the accuracy of these models has increased with the proliferation of deeper and more complex architectures. Thus, state-of-the-art solutions are often computationally expensive, which makes them unfit to be deployed on edge computing platforms. In order to mitigate the high computation, memory, and power requirements of inferring convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we propose the use of power-of-two quantization, which quantizes continuous parameters into low-bit power-of-two values. This reduces computational complexity by removing expensive multiplication operations and with the use of low-bit weights. ResNet is adopted as the building block of our solution and the proposed model is evaluated on a spoken language understanding (SLU) task. Experimental results show improved performance for shift neural network architectures, with our low-bit quantization achieving 98.76 \% on the test set which is comparable performance to its full-precision counterpart and state-of-the-art solutions.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在多个领域取得了令人瞩目的成功。多年来，随着更深、更复杂架构的激增，这些模型的准确性不断提高。因此，最先进的解决方案通常计算成本昂贵，这使得它们不适合部署在边缘计算平台上。为了减轻推断卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的高计算、内存和功耗要求，我们建议使用二次幂量化，将连续参数量化为低位二次幂值。这通过消除昂贵的乘法运算和使用低位权重来降低计算复杂性。采用 ResNet 作为我们解决方案的构建块，并在口语理解 (SLU) 任务上评估所提出的模型。实验结果表明，移位神经网络架构的性能得到了改善，我们的低位量化在测试集上达到了 98.76％，这与全精度对应和最先进的解决方案的性能相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低比特移位网络，用于端到端的语音语言理解任务，通过低比特量化减少计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的深度神经网络模型计算量大、内存和功耗高，难以部署在边缘计算平台，需降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 采用幂-of-二量化技术将连续参数转换为低比特值，消除乘法运算；以ResNet为框架构建模型，并在语音语言理解任务中评估性能。
AI.result: 低比特量化模型在测试集上达到98.76%的准确率，性能与全精度模型及现有最佳方案相当。
AI.conclusion: 低比特移位网络在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度，适用于边缘设备部署。

search_text: Low-bit Shift Network for End-to-End Spoken Language Understanding 用于端到端口语理解的低位移网络 Deep neural networks (DNN) have achieved impressive success in multiple domains. Over the years, the accuracy of these models has increased with the proliferation of deeper and more complex architectures. Thus, state-of-the-art solutions are often computationally expensive, which makes them unfit to be deployed on edge computing platforms. In order to mitigate the high computation, memory, and power requirements of inferring convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we propose the use of power-of-two quantization, which quantizes continuous parameters into low-bit power-of-two values. This reduces computational complexity by removing expensive multiplication operations and with the use of low-bit weights. ResNet is adopted as the building block of our solution and the proposed model is evaluated on a spoken language understanding (SLU) task. Experimental results show improved performance for shift neural network architectures, with our low-bit quantization achieving 98.76 \% on the test set which is comparable performance to its full-precision counterpart and state-of-the-art solutions. 深度神经网络（DNN）在多个领域取得了令人瞩目的成功。多年来，随着更深、更复杂架构的激增，这些模型的准确性不断提高。因此，最先进的解决方案通常计算成本昂贵，这使得它们不适合部署在边缘计算平台上。为了减轻推断卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的高计算、内存和功耗要求，我们建议使用二次幂量化，将连续参数量化为低位二次幂值。这通过消除昂贵的乘法运算和使用低位权重来降低计算复杂性。采用 ResNet 作为我们解决方案的构建块，并在口语理解 (SLU) 任务上评估所提出的模型。实验结果表明，移位神经网络架构的性能得到了改善，我们的低位量化在测试集上达到了 98.76％，这与全精度对应和最先进的解决方案的性能相当。 本文提出了一种低比特移位网络，用于端到端的语音语言理解任务，通过低比特量化减少计算复杂度。 Anderson R. Avila,Khalil Bibi,Rui Heng Yang,Xinlin Li,Chao Xing,Xiao Chen cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Lilit Avetisyan,Jackie Ayoub,Feng Zhou
title: Investigating Explanations in Conditional and Highly Automated Driving: The Effects of Situation Awareness and Modality
title_zh: 研究有条件和高度自动驾驶的解释：情境意识和形态的影响
abstract: With the level of automation increases in vehicles, such as conditional and highly automated vehicles (AVs), drivers are becoming increasingly out of the control loop, especially in unexpected driving scenarios. Although it might be not necessary to require the drivers to intervene on most occasions, it is still important to improve drivers' situation awareness (SA) in unexpected driving scenarios to improve their trust in and acceptance of AVs. In this study, we conceptualized SA at the levels of perception (SA L1), comprehension (SA L2), and projection (SA L3), and proposed an SA level-based explanation framework based on explainable AI. Then, we examined the effects of these explanations and their modalities on drivers' situational trust, cognitive workload, as well as explanation satisfaction. A three (SA levels: SA L1, SA L2 and SA L3) by two (explanation modalities: visual, visual + audio) between-subjects experiment was conducted with 340 participants recruited from Amazon Mechanical Turk. The results indicated that by designing the explanations using the proposed SA-based framework, participants could redirect their attention to the important objects in the traffic and understand their meaning for the AV system. This improved their SA and filled the gap of understanding the correspondence of AV's behavior in the particular situations which also increased their situational trust in AV. The results showed that participants reported the highest trust with SA L2 explanations, although the mental workload was assessed higher in this level. The results also provided insights into the relationship between the amount of information in explanations and modalities, showing that participants were more satisfied with visual-only explanations in the SA L1 and SA L2 conditions and were more satisfied with visual and auditory explanations in the SA L3 condition.

Then, we examined the effects of these explanations and their modalities on drivers' situational trust, cognitive workload, as well as explanation satisfaction. A three (SA levels: SA L1, SA L2 and SA L3) by two (explanation modalities: visual, visual + audio) between-subjects experiment was conducted with 340 participants recruited from Amazon Mechanical Turk. The results indicated that by designing the explanations using the proposed SA-based framework, participants could redirect their attention to the important objects in the traffic and understand their meaning for the AV system. This improved their SA and filled the gap of understanding the correspondence of AV's behavior in the particular situations which also increased their situational trust in AV. The results also provided insights into the relationship between the amount of information in explanations and modalities, showing that participants were more satisfied with visual-only explanations in the SA L1 and SA L2 conditions and were more satisfied with visual and auditory explanations in the SA L3 condition.
abstract_zh: 随着车辆（例如有条件和高度自动化车辆（AV））自动化水平的提高，驾驶员越来越脱离控制环，特别是在意外的驾驶场景中。尽管在大多数情况下可能没有必要要求驾驶员进行干预，但提高驾驶员在意外驾驶场景中的态势感知（SA）仍然很重要，以提高他们对自动驾驶汽车的信任和接受度。在本研究中，我们从感知（SA L1）、理解（SA L2）和投射（SA L3）三个层面对SA进行概念化，并提出了基于可解释人工智能的基于SA级别的解释框架。然后，我们研究了这些解释及其模式对驾驶员情境信任、认知工作量以及解释满意度的影响。从 Amazon Mechanical Turk 招募了 340 名参与者，进行了三（SA 级别：SA L1、SA L2 和 SA L3）乘二（解释方式：视觉、视觉 + 音频）受试者间实验。结果表明，通过使用所提出的基于 SA 的框架设计解释，参与者可以将注意力转移到交通中的重要对象上，并理解它们对 AV 系统的意义。这提高了他们的 SA 并填补了理解 AV 行为在特定情况下的对应性的空白，这也增加了他们对 AV 的情境信任。结果显示，参与者对 SA L2 解释的信任程度最高，尽管该级别的脑力负荷评估较高。结果还深入了解了解释中的信息量和方式之间的关系，表明参与者对 SA L1 和 SA L2 条件下的仅视觉解释更满意，而对 SA L3 条件下的视觉和听觉解释更满意。

AI.tldr: 研究通过情境意识（SA）层级和解释模态，探讨其对自动驾驶车辆（AVs）驾驶员情境信任、认知负荷及解释满意度的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着车辆自动化水平提升，驾驶员在突发场景中可能脱离控制，需通过提升情境意识增强其对自动驾驶系统的信任与接受度。
AI.method: 基于可解释AI框架，构建SA三级（感知、理解、预测）解释模型，设计3（SA层级）×2（模态：视觉/视听）被试间实验，招募340名Amazon Mechanical Turk参与者进行测试。
AI.result: SA层级解释框架使参与者更关注交通关键对象并理解AV行为，SA L2解释显著提升情境信任，但认知负荷较高；视觉解释在L1/L2更受青睐，视听模态在L3更优。
AI.conclusion: 按SA层级定制解释内容及模态可有效提升AV信任与理解，但需权衡信息量与认知负荷，为自动驾驶人机交互设计提供理论依据。
