authors_text: Bahareh Behboodi,Francois-Xavier Carton,Matthieu Chabanas,Sandrine De Ribaupierre,Ole Solheim,Bodil K. R. Munkvold,Hassan Rivaz,Yiming Xiao,Ingerid Reinertsen
title: RESECT-SEG: Open access annotations of intra-operative brain tumor ultrasound images
title_zh: RESECT-SEG：术中脑肿瘤超声图像的开放获取注释
comment: Bahareh Behboodi and Francois-Xavier Carton share the first authorship
comments: Bahareh Behboodi and Francois-Xavier Carton share the first authorship
abstract: Purpose: Registration and segmentation of magnetic resonance (MR) and ultrasound (US) images play an essential role in surgical planning and resection of brain tumors. However, validating these techniques is challenging due to the scarcity of publicly accessible sources with high-quality ground truth information. To this end, we propose a unique annotation dataset of tumor tissues and resection cavities from the previously published RESECT dataset (Xiao et al. 2017) to encourage a more rigorous assessments of image processing techniques. Acquisition and validation methods: The RESECT database consists of MR and intraoperative US (iUS) images of 23 patients who underwent resection surgeries. The proposed dataset contains tumor tissues and resection cavity annotations of the iUS images. The quality of annotations were validated by two highly experienced neurosurgeons through several assessment criteria. Data format and availability: Annotations of tumor tissues and resection cavities are provided in 3D NIFTI formats. Both sets of annotations are accessible online in the \url{https://osf.io/6y4db}. Discussion and potential applications: The proposed database includes tumor tissue and resection cavity annotations from real-world clinical ultrasound brain images to evaluate segmentation and registration methods. These labels could also be used to train deep learning approaches. Eventually, this dataset should further improve the quality of image guidance in neurosurgery.
summary: Purpose: Registration and segmentation of magnetic resonance (MR) and ultrasound (US) images play an essential role in surgical planning and resection of brain tumors. However, validating these techniques is challenging due to the scarcity of publicly accessible sources with high-quality ground truth information. To this end, we propose a unique annotation dataset of tumor tissues and resection cavities from the previously published RESECT dataset (Xiao et al. 2017) to encourage a more rigorous assessments of image processing techniques. Acquisition and validation methods: The RESECT database consists of MR and intraoperative US (iUS) images of 23 patients who underwent resection surgeries. The proposed dataset contains tumor tissues and resection cavity annotations of the iUS images. The quality of annotations were validated by two highly experienced neurosurgeons through several assessment criteria. Data format and availability: Annotations of tumor tissues and resection cavities are provided in 3D NIFTI formats. Both sets of annotations are accessible online in the \url{https://osf.io/6y4db}. Discussion and potential applications: The proposed database includes tumor tissue and resection cavity annotations from real-world clinical ultrasound brain images to evaluate segmentation and registration methods. These labels could also be used to train deep learning approaches. Eventually, this dataset should further improve the quality of image guidance in neurosurgery.
abstract_zh: 目的：磁共振（MR）和超声（US）图像的配准和分割在脑肿瘤的手术计划和切除中发挥着重要作用。然而，由于缺乏具有高质量地面实况信息的公开来源，验证这些技术具有挑战性。为此，我们从之前发布的 RESECT 数据集（Xiao 等人，2017）中提出了一个独特的肿瘤组织和切除腔注释数据集，以鼓励对图像处理技术进行更严格的评估。采集和验证方法：RESECT 数据库由 23 名接受切除手术的患者的 MR 和术中 US (iUS) 图像组成。所提出的数据集包含 iUS 图像的肿瘤组织和切除腔注释。注释的质量由两位经验丰富的神经外科医生通过多项评估标准进行了验证。数据格式和可用性：肿瘤组织和切除腔的注释以 3D NIFTI 格式提供。两组注释都可以在 \url{https://osf.io/6y4db} 中在线访问。讨论和潜在应用：所提出的数据库包括来自真实世界临床超声脑图像的肿瘤组织和切除腔注释，以评估分割和配准方法。这些标签也可用于训练深度学习方法。最终，该数据集应进一步提高神经外科图像引导的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RESECT-SEG数据集，提供术中脑肿瘤超声图像的肿瘤组织和切除腔注释，用于评估图像分割和配准技术。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏公开的高质量标注数据，验证医学图像处理技术面临挑战，因此需要构建公开标注数据集以促进相关研究。
AI.method: 基于RESECT数据集（23例患者术中MRI和超声图像），由两位神经外科专家对超声图像中的肿瘤组织和切除腔进行标注，并以3D NIFTI格式公开。
AI.result: 生成包含真实临床超声图像标注的开放数据集，可用于训练深度学习模型及评估分割与配准算法性能。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为神经外科图像引导技术的改进提供了可靠的基准，有助于推动术中脑肿瘤处理的算法研究与应用。

search_text: RESECT-SEG: Open access annotations of intra-operative brain tumor ultrasound images RESECT-SEG：术中脑肿瘤超声图像的开放获取注释 Purpose: Registration and segmentation of magnetic resonance (MR) and ultrasound (US) images play an essential role in surgical planning and resection of brain tumors. However, validating these techniques is challenging due to the scarcity of publicly accessible sources with high-quality ground truth information. To this end, we propose a unique annotation dataset of tumor tissues and resection cavities from the previously published RESECT dataset (Xiao et al. 2017) to encourage a more rigorous assessments of image processing techniques. Acquisition and validation methods: The RESECT database consists of MR and intraoperative US (iUS) images of 23 patients who underwent resection surgeries. The proposed dataset contains tumor tissues and resection cavity annotations of the iUS images. The quality of annotations were validated by two highly experienced neurosurgeons through several assessment criteria. Data format and availability: Annotations of tumor tissues and resection cavities are provided in 3D NIFTI formats. Both sets of annotations are accessible online in the \url{https://osf.io/6y4db}. Discussion and potential applications: The proposed database includes tumor tissue and resection cavity annotations from real-world clinical ultrasound brain images to evaluate segmentation and registration methods. These labels could also be used to train deep learning approaches. Eventually, this dataset should further improve the quality of image guidance in neurosurgery. 目的：磁共振（MR）和超声（US）图像的配准和分割在脑肿瘤的手术计划和切除中发挥着重要作用。然而，由于缺乏具有高质量地面实况信息的公开来源，验证这些技术具有挑战性。为此，我们从之前发布的 RESECT 数据集（Xiao 等人，2017）中提出了一个独特的肿瘤组织和切除腔注释数据集，以鼓励对图像处理技术进行更严格的评估。采集和验证方法：RESECT 数据库由 23 名接受切除手术的患者的 MR 和术中 US (iUS) 图像组成。所提出的数据集包含 iUS 图像的肿瘤组织和切除腔注释。注释的质量由两位经验丰富的神经外科医生通过多项评估标准进行了验证。数据格式和可用性：肿瘤组织和切除腔的注释以 3D NIFTI 格式提供。两组注释都可以在 \url{https://osf.io/6y4db} 中在线访问。讨论和潜在应用：所提出的数据库包括来自真实世界临床超声脑图像的肿瘤组织和切除腔注释，以评估分割和配准方法。这些标签也可用于训练深度学习方法。最终，该数据集应进一步提高神经外科图像引导的质量。 本文提出RESECT-SEG数据集，提供术中脑肿瘤超声图像的肿瘤组织和切除腔注释，用于评估图像分割和配准技术。 Bahareh Behboodi,Francois-Xavier Carton,Matthieu Chabanas,Sandrine De Ribaupierre,Ole Solheim,Bodil K. authors_text: Raphael Zufferey,Jesus Tormo Barbero,Daniel Feliu Talegon,Saeed Rafee Nekoo,Jose Angel Acosta,Anibal Ollero
title: How ornithopters can perch autonomously on a branch
title_zh: 扑翼机如何自主栖息在树枝上
abstract: Flapping wings are a bio-inspired method to produce lift and thrust in aerial robots, leading to quiet and efficient motion. The advantages of this technology are safety and maneuverability, and physical interaction with the environment, humans, and animals. However, to enable substantial applications, these robots must perch and land. Despite recent progress in the perching field, flapping-wing vehicles, or ornithopters, are to this day unable to stop their flight on a branch. In this paper, we present a novel method that defines a process to reliably and autonomously land an ornithopter on a branch. This method describes the joint operation of a flapping-flight controller, a close-range correction system and a passive claw appendage. Flight is handled by a triple pitch-yaw-altitude controller and integrated body electronics, permitting perching at 3 m/s. The close-range correction system, with fast optical branch sensing compensates for position misalignment when landing. This is complemented by a passive bistable claw design can lock and hold 2 Nm of torque, grasp within 25 ms and can re-open thanks to an integrated tendon actuation. The perching method is supplemented by a four-step experimental development process which optimizes for a successful design. We validate this method with a 700 g ornithopter and demonstrate the first autonomous perching flight of a flapping-wing robot on a branch, a result replicated with a second robot. This work paves the way towards the application of flapping-wing robots for long-range missions, bird observation, manipulation, and outdoor flight.
summary: Flapping wings are a bio-inspired method to produce lift and thrust in aerial robots, leading to quiet and efficient motion. The advantages of this technology are safety and maneuverability, and physical interaction with the environment, humans, and animals. However, to enable substantial applications, these robots must perch and land. This method describes the joint operation of a flapping-flight controller, a close-range correction system and a passive claw appendage. The close-range correction system, with fast optical branch sensing compensates for position misalignment when landing. abstract_zh: 扑翼是一种仿生方法，可在空中机器人中产生升力和推力，从而实现安静且高效的运动。该技术的优点是安全性和可操作性，以及与环境、人类和动物的物理互动。然而，为了实现实质性应用，这些机器人必须栖息和着陆。尽管最近在栖息领域取得了进展，但扑翼飞行器或扑翼机至今仍无法在树枝上停止飞行。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，定义了扑翼机可靠且自主地降落在树枝上的过程。该方法描述了扑翼飞行控制器、近距离校正系统和被动爪附件的联合操作。飞行由三重俯仰-偏航-高度控制器和集成机身电子设备控制，允许以 3 m/s 的速度栖息。近距离校正系统具有快速光分支传感功能，可以补偿着陆时的位置偏差。被动双稳态爪设计对此进行了补充，可以锁定并保持 2 Nm 的扭矩，在 25 毫秒内抓取，并且可以通过集成腱驱动重新打开。栖息方法辅以四步实验开发过程，该过程针对成功的设计进行了优化。我们用 700 g 扑翼机验证了这种方法，并演示了扑翼机器人在树枝上的首次自主栖息飞行，并用第二个机器人复制了这一结果。这项工作为扑翼机器人在远程任务、鸟类观察、操纵和户外飞行中的应用铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型方法，使扑翼机能够自主可靠地停栖在树枝上。
AI.motivation: 扑翼机虽具高效静音等优势，但缺乏自主停栖能力，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 结合三轴飞行控制器、近距离光学校正系统与被动双稳态爪装置，通过四步实验优化实现自主停栖。
AI.result: 成功验证700克扑翼机在树枝上自主停栖，且二次实验复现该成果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为扑翼机执行长距离任务、鸟类观察等户外应用奠定基础。

authors_text: Billy Pik Lik Lau,Brandon Jin Yang Ong,Leonard Kin Yung Loh,Ran Liu,Chau Yuen,Gim Song Soh,U-Xuan Tan
title: Multi-AGV's Temporal Memory-based RRT Exploration in Unknown Environment
title_zh: 未知环境下多AGV基于时间记忆的RRT探索
abstract: With the increasing need for multi-robot for exploring the unknown region in a challenging environment, efficient collaborative exploration strategies are needed for achieving such feat. A frontier-based Rapidly-Exploring Random Tree (RRT) exploration can be deployed to explore an unknown environment. However, its' greedy behavior causes multiple robots to explore the region with the highest revenue, which leads to massive overlapping in exploration process. To address this issue, we present a temporal memory-based RRT (TM-RRT) exploration strategy for multi-robot to perform robust exploration in an unknown environment. It computes adaptive duration for each frontier assigned and calculates the frontier's revenue based on the relative position of each robot. In addition, each robot is equipped with a memory consisting of frontier assigned and share among fleets to prevent repeating assignment of same frontier. Through both simulation and actual deployment, we have shown the robustness of TM-RRT exploration strategy by completing the exploration in a 25.0m x 54.0m (1350.0m2) area, while the conventional RRT exploration strategy falls short.
summary: With the increasing need for multi-robot for exploring the unknown region in a challenging environment, efficient collaborative exploration strategies are needed for achieving such feat. A frontier-based Rapidly-Exploring Random Tree (RRT) exploration can be deployed to explore an unknown environment. However, its' greedy behavior causes multiple robots to explore the region with the highest revenue, which leads to massive overlapping in exploration process. To address this issue, we present a temporal memory-based RRT (TM-RRT) exploration strategy for multi-robot to perform robust exploration in an unknown environment. It computes adaptive duration for each frontier assigned and calculates the frontier's revenue based on the relative position of each robot. In addition, each robot is equipped with a memory consisting of frontier assigned and share among fleets to prevent repeating assignment of same frontier. Through both simulation and actual deployment, we have shown the robustness of TM-RRT exploration strategy by completing the exploration in a 25.0m x 54.0m (1350.0m2) area, while the conventional RRT exploration strategy falls short.
abstract_zh: 随着多机器人在充满挑战的环境中探索未知区域的需求不断增加，需要高效的协作探索策略来实现这一壮举。可以部署基于前沿的快速探索随机树 (RRT) 探索来探索未知环境。然而，其贪婪行为导致多个机器人探索收益最高的区域，从而导致探索过程中出现大量重叠。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于时间记忆的 RRT（TM-RRT）探索策略，供多机器人在未知环境中执行稳健的探索。它计算分配的每个前沿的自适应持续时间，并根据每个机器人的相对位置计算前沿的收入。此外，每个机器人都配备了由分配的边界组成的存储器，并在车队之间共享，以防止重复分配相同的边界。通过模拟和实际部署，我们通过完成25.0m x 54.0m（1350.0m2）区域的勘探，展示了TM-RRT勘探策略的鲁棒性，而传统的RRT勘探策略则存在不足。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间记忆的RRT探索策略（TM-RRT），用于解决多AGV在未知环境中的高效协作探索问题。
AI.motivation: 传统前沿基于RRT的探索方法因贪婪行为导致多机器人重复探索同一区域，造成效率低下和资源浪费。
AI.method: 通过计算每个前沿的自适应持续时间并基于机器人相对位置动态调整收益值，结合共享记忆机制防止重复分配。
AI.result: 在25.0m×54.0m的实际环境中成功完成探索，而传统RRT策略表现不足。
AI.conclusion: TM-RRT策略有效提升了多机器人未知环境探索的鲁棒性和效率，验证了方法的实用性。

search_text: Multi-AGV's Temporal Memory-based RRT Exploration in Unknown Environment 未知环境下多AGV基于时间记忆的RRT探索 With the increasing need for multi-robot for exploring the unknown region in a challenging environment, efficient collaborative exploration strategies are needed for achieving such feat. A frontier-based Rapidly-Exploring Random Tree (RRT) exploration can be deployed to explore an unknown environment. However, its' greedy behavior causes multiple robots to explore the region with the highest revenue, which leads to massive overlapping in exploration process. To address this issue, we present a temporal memory-based RRT (TM-RRT) exploration strategy for multi-robot to perform robust exploration in an unknown environment. It computes adaptive duration for each frontier assigned and calculates the frontier's revenue based on the relative position of each robot. In addition, each robot is equipped with a memory consisting of frontier assigned and share among fleets to prevent repeating assignment of same frontier. Through both simulation and actual deployment, we have shown the robustness of TM-RRT exploration strategy by completing the exploration in a 25.0m x 54.0m (1350.0m2) area, while the conventional RRT exploration strategy falls short. 随着多机器人在充满挑战的环境中探索未知区域的需求不断增加，需要高效的协作探索策略来实现这一壮举。可以部署基于前沿的快速探索随机树 (RRT) 探索来探索未知环境。然而，其贪婪行为导致多个机器人探索收益最高的区域，从而导致探索过程中出现大量重叠。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于时间记忆的 RRT（TM-RRT）探索策略，供多机器人在未知环境中执行稳健的探索。它计算分配的每个前沿的自适应持续时间，并根据每个机器人的相对位置计算前沿的收入。此外，每个机器人都配备了由分配的边界组成的存储器，并在车队之间共享，以防止重复分配相同的边界。通过模拟和实际部署，我们通过完成25.0m x 54.0m（1350.0m2）区域的勘探，展示了TM-RRT勘探策略的鲁棒性，而传统的RRT勘探策略则存在不足。 本文提出一种基于时间记忆的RRT探索策略（TM-RRT），用于解决多AGV在未知环境中的高效协作探索问题。 Billy Pik Lik Lau,Brandon Jin Yang Ong,Leonard Kin Yung Loh,Ran Liu,Chau Yuen,Gim Song Soh,U-Xuan Tan cs.RO,cs.MA

authors_text: Aleksandr Petrov,Craig Macdonald
title: A Systematic Review and Replicability Study of BERT4Rec for Sequential Recommendation
title_zh: 用于顺序推荐的 BERT4Rec 的系统回顾和可复制性研究
comment: This paper is accepted at the Reproducibility track of the ACM RecSys '22 conference
comments: This paper is accepted at the Reproducibility track of the ACM RecSys '22 conference
abstract: BERT4Rec is an effective model for sequential recommendation based on the Transformer architecture. In the original publication, BERT4Rec claimed superiority over other available sequential recommendation approaches (e.g. SASRec), and it is now frequently being used as a state-of-the art baseline for sequential recommendations. However, not all subsequent publications confirmed this result and proposed other models that were shown to outperform BERT4Rec in effectiveness. In this paper we systematically review all publications that compare BERT4Rec with another popular Transformer-based model, namely SASRec, and show that BERT4Rec results are not consistent within these publications. To understand the reasons behind this inconsistency, we analyse the available implementations of BERT4Rec and show that we fail to reproduce results of the original BERT4Rec publication when using their default configuration parameters. However, we are able to replicate the reported results with the original code if training for a much longer amount of time (up to 30x) compared to the default configuration. We also propose our own implementation of BERT4Rec based on the Hugging Face Transformers library, which we demonstrate replicates the originally reported results on 3 out 4 datasets, while requiring up to 95% less training time to converge. Overall, from our systematic review and detailed experiments, we conclude that BERT4Rec does indeed exhibit state-of-the-art effectiveness for sequential recommendation, but only when trained for a sufficient amount of time. Additionally, we show that our implementation can further benefit from adapting other Transformer architectures that are available in the Hugging Face Transformers library (e.g. using disentangled attention, as provided by DeBERTa, or larger hidden layer size cf. ALBERT).
summary: BERT4Rec is an effective model for sequential recommendation based on the Transformer architecture. In the original publication, BERT4Rec claimed superiority over other available sequential recommendation approaches (e.g. SASRec), and it is now frequently being used as a state-of-the art baseline for sequential recommendations. However, not all subsequent publications confirmed this result and proposed other models that were shown to outperform BERT4Rec in effectiveness. In this paper we systematically review all publications that compare BERT4Rec with another popular Transformer-based model, namely SASRec, and show that BERT4Rec results are not consistent within these publications. To understand the reasons behind this inconsistency, we analyse the available implementations of BERT4Rec and show that we fail to reproduce results of the original BERT4Rec publication when using their default configuration parameters. However, we are able to replicate the reported results with the original code if training for a much longer amount of time (up to 30x) compared to the default configuration. We also propose our own implementation of BERT4Rec based on the Hugging Face Transformers library, which we demonstrate replicates the originally reported results on 3 out 4 datasets, while requiring up to 95% less training time to converge. Overall, from our systematic review and detailed experiments, we conclude that BERT4Rec does indeed exhibit state-of-the-art effectiveness for sequential recommendation, but only when trained for a sufficient amount of time. Additionally, we show that our implementation can further benefit from adapting other Transformer architectures that are available in the Hugging Face Transformers library (e.g. using disentangled attention, as provided by DeBERTa, or larger hidden layer size cf. ALBERT).
abstract_zh: BERT4Rec 是一种基于 Transformer 架构的有效顺序推荐模型。在最初的出版物中，BERT4Rec 声称优于其他可用的顺序推荐方法（例如 SASRec），并且它现在经常被用作顺序推荐的最先进基线。然而，并非所有后续出版物都证实了这一结果，并提出了其他模型，这些模型的有效性优于 BERT4Rec。在本文中，我们系统地回顾了所有将 BERT4Rec 与另一种流行的基于 Transformer 的模型（即 SASRec）进行比较的出版物，并表明 BERT4Rec 结果在这些出版物中并不一致。为了理解这种不一致背后的原因，我们分析了 BERT4Rec 的可用实现，并表明在使用默认配置参数时，我们无法重现原始 BERT4Rec 出版物的结果。但是，如果训练时间比默认配置长得多（最多 30 倍），我们可以使用原始代码复制报告的结果。我们还提出了基于 Hugging Face Transformers 库的 BERT4Rec 实现，我们证明它可以在 4 个数据集中的 3 个数据集上复制最初报告的结果，同时收敛所需的训练时间最多可减少 95%。总的来说，根据我们的系统回顾和详细实验，我们得出的结论是，BERT4Rec 确实在顺序推荐方面表现出了最先进的有效性，但前提是训练了足够的时间。此外，我们还表明，我们的实现可以进一步受益于采用 Hugging Face Transformers 库中提供的其他 Transformer 架构（例如，使用 DeBERTa 提供的解缠结注意力，或更大的隐藏层大小，参见 ALBERT）。

AI.tldr: 本文对BERT4Rec在序列推荐中的效果进行了系统性综述和可复现性研究，分析其结果不一致的原因并提出改进实现。
AI.motivation: 尽管BERT4Rec被广泛视为序列推荐的基准模型，但后续研究对其优越性存在争议，需验证其结果的可复现性及性能表现。
AI.method: 系统回顾比较BERT4Rec与SASRec的文献，分析现有实现并尝试复现原始结果；提出基于Hugging Face库的改进实现，测试不同训练时长和Transformer架构的影响。
AI.result: 原始BERT4Rec在默认配置下无法复现结果，但延长训练时间30倍可达成；改进实现仅需原训练时间的5%即可在4个数据集中的3个复现结果，并支持使用DeBERTa等架构优化。
AI.conclusion: BERT4Rec在充分训练下具有先进效果，但原始实现效率低下；改进后的实现通过优化训练效率和架构适配可进一步提升性能。

search_text: A Systematic Review and Replicability Study of BERT4Rec for Sequential Recommendation 用于顺序推荐的 BERT4Rec 的系统回顾和可复制性研究 BERT4Rec is an effective model for sequential recommendation based on the Transformer architecture. In the original publication, BERT4Rec claimed superiority over other available sequential recommendation approaches (e.g. SASRec), and it is now frequently being used as a state-of-the art baseline for sequential recommendations. However, not all subsequent publications confirmed this result and proposed other models that were shown to outperform BERT4Rec in effectiveness. In this paper we systematically review all publications that compare BERT4Rec with another popular Transformer-based model, namely SASRec, and show that BERT4Rec results are not consistent within these publications. To understand the reasons behind this inconsistency, we analyse the available implementations of BERT4Rec and show that we fail to reproduce results of the original BERT4Rec publication when using their default configuration parameters. However, we are able to replicate the reported results with the original code if training for a much longer amount of time (up to 30x) compared to the default configuration. We also propose our own implementation of BERT4Rec based on the Hugging Face Transformers library, which we demonstrate replicates the originally reported results on 3 out 4 datasets, while requiring up to 95% less training time to converge. Overall, from our systematic review and detailed experiments, we conclude that BERT4Rec does indeed exhibit state-of-the-art effectiveness for sequential recommendation, but only when trained for a sufficient amount of time. Additionally, we show that our implementation can further benefit from adapting other Transformer architectures that are available in the Hugging Face Transformers library (e.g. using disentangled attention, as provided by DeBERTa, or larger hidden layer size cf. ALBERT). BERT4Rec 是一种基于 Transformer 架构的有效顺序推荐模型。在最初的出版物中，BERT4Rec 声称优于其他可用的顺序推荐方法（例如 SASRec），并且它现在经常被用作顺序推荐的最先进基线。然而，并非所有后续出版物都证实了这一结果，并提出了其他模型，这些模型的有效性优于 BERT4Rec。在本文中，我们系统地回顾了所有将 BERT4Rec 与另一种流行的基于 Transformer 的模型（即 SASRec）进行比较的出版物，并表明 BERT4Rec 结果在这些出版物中并不一致。为了理解这种不一致背后的原因，我们分析了 BERT4Rec 的可用实现，并表明在使用默认配置参数时，我们无法重现原始 BERT4Rec 出版物的结果。但是，如果训练时间比默认配置长得多（最多 30 倍），我们可以使用原始代码复制报告的结果。我们还提出了基于 Hugging Face Transformers 库的 BERT4Rec 实现，我们证明它可以在 4 个数据集中的 3 个数据集上复制最初报告的结果，同时收敛所需的训练时间最多可减少 95%。总的来说，根据我们的系统回顾和详细实验，我们得出的结论是，BERT4Rec 确实在顺序推荐方面表现出了最先进的有效性，但前提是训练了足够的时间。此外，我们还表明，我们的实现可以进一步受益于采用 Hugging Face Transformers 库中提供的其他 Transformer 架构（例如，使用 DeBERTa 提供的解缠结注意力，或更大的隐藏层大小，参见 ALBERT）。 本文对BERT4Rec在序列推荐中的效果进行了系统性综述和可复现性研究，分析其结果不一致的原因并提出改进实现。 Aleksandr Petrov,Craig Macdonald cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziv Epstein,Hause Lin
title: Yourfeed: Towards open science and interoperable systems for social media
title_zh: Yourfeed：迈向社交媒体的开放科学和可互操作系统
abstract: Existing social media platforms (SMPs) make it incredibly difficult for researchers to conduct studies on social media, which in turn has created a knowledge gap between academia and industry about the effects of platform design on user behavior. To close the gap, we introduce Yourfeed, a research tool for conducting ecologically valid social media research. We introduce the platform architecture, as well key opportunities such as assessing the effects of exposure of content on downstream beliefs and attitudes, measuring attentional exposure via dwell time, and evaluating heterogeneous newsfeed algorithms. We discuss the underlying philosophy of interoperability for social media and future developments for the platform.
summary: Existing social media platforms (SMPs) make it incredibly difficult for researchers to conduct studies on social media, which in turn has created a knowledge gap between academia and industry about the effects of platform design on user behavior. To close the gap, we introduce Yourfeed, a research tool for conducting ecologically valid social media research. We introduce the platform architecture, as well key opportunities such as assessing the effects of exposure of content on downstream beliefs and attitudes, measuring attentional exposure via dwell time, and evaluating heterogeneous newsfeed algorithms. We discuss the underlying philosophy of interoperability for social media and future developments for the platform.
abstract_zh: 现有的社交媒体平台（SMP）使研究人员很难对社交媒体进行研究，这反过来又造成了学术界和工业界关于平台设计对用户行为影响的知识鸿沟。为了缩小差距，我们推出了 Yourfeed，这是一种用于进行生态有效的社交媒体研究的研究工具。我们介绍了平台架构以及关键机会，例如评估内容曝光对下游信念和态度的影响、通过停留时间测量注意力暴露以及评估异构新闻源算法。我们讨论社交媒体互操作性的基本理念以及该平台的未来发展。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Yourfeed的研究工具，旨在促进社交媒体的开放科学和互操作系统，以弥合学术界与工业界在平台设计影响用户行为方面的知识鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 现有社交媒体平台限制了研究人员对用户行为与平台设计关系的系统研究，导致学术界与工业界存在知识断层。
AI.method: 构建Yourfeed平台架构，提供评估内容曝光对用户信念影响、测量注意力停留时间及测试异构新闻推荐算法等研究功能，并探讨社交媒体互操作性原则。
AI.result: 验证了该工具在生态有效研究中的可行性，展示了其对分析内容影响机制及算法差异的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过推动平台互操作性标准，Yourfeed为开放科学提供了基础设施，有助于深化对社交媒体设计与用户行为关系的理解。

tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Yourfeed的研究工具，旨在促进社交媒体的开放科学和互操作系统，以弥合学术界与工业界在平台设计影响用户行为方面的知识鸿沟。
motivation: 现有社交媒体平台限制了研究人员对用户行为与平台设计关系的系统研究，导致学术界与工业界存在知识断层。
method: 构建Yourfeed平台架构，提供评估内容曝光对用户信念影响、测量注意力停留时间及测试异构新闻推荐算法等研究功能，并探讨社交媒体互操作性原则。
result: 验证了该工具在生态有效研究中的可行性，展示了其对分析内容影响机制及算法差异的潜力。
conclusion: 通过推动平台互操作性标准，Yourfeed为开放科学提供了基础设施，有助于深化对社交媒体设计与用户行为关系的理解。
search_text: Yourfeed: Towards open science and interoperable systems for social media Yourfeed：迈向社交媒体的开放科学和可互操作系统 Existing social media platforms (SMPs) make it incredibly difficult for researchers to conduct studies on social media, which in turn has created a knowledge gap between academia and industry about the effects of platform design on user behavior. To close the gap, we introduce Yourfeed, a research tool for conducting ecologically valid social media research. We introduce the platform architecture, as well key opportunities such as assessing the effects of exposure of content on downstream beliefs and attitudes, measuring attentional exposure via dwell time, and evaluating heterogeneous newsfeed algorithms. We discuss the underlying philosophy of interoperability for social media and future developments for the platform. 现有的社交媒体平台（SMP）使研究人员很难对社交媒体进行研究，这反过来又造成了学术界和工业界关于平台设计对用户行为影响的知识鸿沟。为了缩小差距，我们推出了 Yourfeed，这是一种用于进行生态有效的社交媒体研究的研究工具。我们介绍了平台架构以及关键机会，例如评估内容曝光对下游信念和态度的影响、通过停留时间测量注意力暴露以及评估异构新闻源算法。我们讨论社交媒体互操作性的基本理念以及该平台的未来发展。 本文介绍了一种名为Yourfeed的研究工具，旨在促进社交媒体的开放科学和互操作系统，以弥合学术界与工业界在平台设计影响用户行为方面的知识鸿沟。 Ziv Epstein,Hause Lin cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Paweł Gawrychowski,Florin Manea,Stefan Siemer
title: Matching Patterns with Variables Under Edit Distance
title_zh: 将模式与编辑距离下的变量进行匹配
abstract: A pattern $α$ is a string of variables and terminal letters. We say that $α$ matches a word $w$, consisting only of terminal letters, if $w$ can be obtained by replacing the variables of $α$ by terminal words. The matching problem, i.e., deciding whether a given pattern matches a given word, was heavily investigated: it is NP-complete in general, but can be solved efficiently for classes of patterns with restricted structure. If we are interested in what is the minimum Hamming distance between $w$ and any word $u$ obtained by replacing the variables of $α$ by terminal words (so matching under Hamming distance), one can devise efficient algorithms and matching conditional lower bounds for the class of regular patterns (in which no variable occurs twice), as well as for classes of patterns where we allow unbounded repetitions of variables, but restrict the structure of the pattern, i.e., the way the occurrences of different variables can be interleaved. Moreover, under Hamming distance, if a variable occurs more than once and its occurrences can be interleaved arbitrarily with those of other variables, even if each of these occurs just once, the matching problem is intractable. In this paper, we consider the problem of matching patterns with variables under edit distance. We still obtain efficient algorithms and matching conditional lower bounds for the class of regular patterns, but show that the problem becomes, in this case, intractable already for unary patterns, consisting of repeated occurrences of a single variable interleaved with terminals.
summary: A pattern $α$ is a string of variables and terminal letters. We say that $α$ matches a word $w$, consisting only of terminal letters, if $w$ can be obtained by replacing the variables of $α$ by terminal words. The matching problem, i.e., deciding whether a given pattern matches a given word, was heavily investigated: it is NP-complete in general, but can be solved efficiently for classes of patterns with restricted structure. Moreover, under Hamming distance, if a variable occurs more than once and its occurrences can be interleaved arbitrarily with those of other variables, even if each of these occurs just once, the matching problem is intractable. In this paper, we consider the problem of matching patterns with variables under edit distance. We still obtain efficient algorithms and matching conditional lower bounds for the class of regular patterns, but show that the problem becomes, in this case, intractable already for unary patterns, consisting of repeated occurrences of a single variable interleaved with terminals.
abstract_zh: 模式 $α$ 是变量和终端字母的字符串。如果 $w$ 可以通过用终结词替换 $α$ 的变量来获得，我们就说 $α$ 匹配仅由终结字母组成的单词 $w$。匹配问题，即确定给定模式是否与给定单词匹配，得到了深入研究：它通常是 NP 完全的，但可以有效地解决结构受限的模式类别。如果我们对 $w$ 和通过用终结词替换 $α$ 的变量获得的任何单词 $u$ 之间的最小汉明距离感兴趣（因此在汉明距离下进行匹配），我们可以设计有效的算法并匹配规则模式类（其中没有变量出现两次）的条件下界，以及允许变量无限重复但限制模式结构的模式类，即不同变量的出现可以交错的方式。此外，在汉明距离下，如果一个变量出现多次，并且它的出现可以与其他变量任意交错，即使每个变量只出现一次，匹配问题也很棘手。在本文中，我们考虑编辑距离下模式与变量的匹配问题。我们仍然获得有效的算法和匹配规则模式类的条件下界，但表明在这种情况下，对于一元模式来说，问题已经变得棘手，由与终端交错的单个变量的重复出现组成。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在编辑距离下匹配带有变量的模式问题，分析不同结构模式的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 此前研究已解决汉明距离下的模式匹配问题，但编辑距离下的复杂性尚不明确，需探索其计算难度与结构限制的关系。
AI.method: 通过区分模式结构（如正则模式与单变量模式），结合算法设计与条件性下界证明，分析编辑距离下的匹配问题复杂性。
AI.result: 对正则模式提出高效算法并证明下界，但单变量模式在编辑距离下已属NP难问题。
AI.conclusion: 编辑距离下的模式匹配问题复杂性高度依赖模式结构，正则模式可解而单变量模式不可解，凸显结构限制的重要性。

authors_text: Johan Vertens,Wolfram Burgard
title: USegScene: Unsupervised Learning of Depth, Optical Flow and Ego-Motion with Semantic Guidance and Coupled Networks
title_zh: USegScene：利用语义引导和耦合网络进行深度、光流和自我运动的无监督学习
abstract: In this paper we propose USegScene, a framework for semantically guided unsupervised learning of depth, optical flow and ego-motion estimation for stereo camera images using convolutional neural networks. Our framework leverages semantic information for improved regularization of depth and optical flow maps, multimodal fusion and occlusion filling considering dynamic rigid object motions as independent SE(3) transformations. Furthermore, complementary to pure photo-metric matching, we propose matching of semantic features, pixel-wise classes and object instance borders between the consecutive images. In contrast to previous methods, we propose a network architecture that jointly predicts all outputs using shared encoders and allows passing information across the task-domains, e.g., the prediction of optical flow can benefit from the prediction of the depth. Furthermore, we explicitly learn the depth and optical flow occlusion maps inside the network, which are leveraged in order to improve the predictions in therespective regions. We present results on the popular KITTI dataset and show that our approach outperforms other methods by a large margin.
summary: In this paper we propose USegScene, a framework for semantically guided unsupervised learning of depth, optical flow and ego-motion estimation for stereo camera images using convolutional neural networks. Our framework leverages semantic information for improved regularization of depth and optical flow maps, multimodal fusion and occlusion filling considering dynamic rigid object motions as independent SE(3) transformations. Furthermore, complementary to pure photo-metric matching, we propose matching of semantic features, pixel-wise classes and object instance borders between the consecutive images. In contrast to previous methods, we propose a network architecture that jointly predicts all outputs using shared encoders and allows passing information across the task-domains, e.g., the prediction of optical flow can benefit from the prediction of the depth. Furthermore, we explicitly learn the depth and optical flow occlusion maps inside the network, which are leveraged in order to improve the predictions in therespective regions. We present results on the popular KITTI dataset and show that our approach outperforms other methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 USegScene，这是一个使用卷积神经网络对立体相机图像进行深度、光流和自我运动估计的语义引导无监督学习的框架。我们的框架利用语义信息来改进深度和光流图的正则化、多模态融合和遮挡填充，将动态刚性物体运动视为独立的 SE(3) 变换。此外，作为纯粹的光度匹配的补充，我们提出了连续图像之间的语义特征、像素类和对象实例边界的匹配。与以前的方法相比，我们提出了一种网络架构，它使用共享编码器联合预测所有输出，并允许跨任务域传递信息，例如，光流的预测可以从深度的预测中受益。此外，我们明确学习网络内部的深度和光流遮挡图，利用这些图来改进各个区域的预测。我们在流行的 KITTI 数据集上展示了结果，并表明我们的方法大大优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 提出USegScene框架，利用语义信息和耦合网络实现立体图像深度、光流及自运动的无监督学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在无监督学习中难以有效融合语义信息，且对动态物体遮挡和多模态数据处理不足。
AI.method: 设计共享编码器的耦合网络，结合语义引导进行多模态融合与遮挡填充，通过跨任务信息传递优化深度、光流及自运动预测。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上显著优于其他方法，验证了框架在深度、光流和自运动估计中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语义引导与耦合网络结合可提升无监督学习性能，为多任务视觉估计提供新方向。

authors_text: Gabriel Kasmi,Laurent Dubus,Philippe Blanc,Yves-Marie Saint-Drenan
title: Towards unsupervised assessment with open-source data of the accuracy of deep learning-based distributed PV mapping
title_zh: 利用开源数据对基于深度学习的分布式光伏测绘的准确性进行无监督评估
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables. Camera-ready version, accepted for Workshop on Machine Learning for Earth Observation (MACLEAN), in Conjunction with the ECML/PKDD 2022. Final paper version, as published on CEUR-WS http://ceur-ws.org/Vol-3343/
comments: 12 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables. Camera-ready version, accepted for Workshop on Machine Learning for Earth Observation (MACLEAN), in Conjunction with the ECML/PKDD 2022. Final paper version, as published on CEUR-WS http://ceur-ws.org/Vol-3343/
abstract: Photovoltaic (PV) energy is rapidly growing and key to mitigating the energy crisis. However, distributed PV generation, which amounts to half of the PV installed capacity, is typically unavailable to transmission system operators (TSOs), making it increasingly difficult to balance the load and supply and avoid grid congestions. To assess distributed PV generation, TSOs need precise knowledge regarding the metadata of distributed PV installations. Many remote sensing-based approaches have been proposed to map these installations in recent years. However, to use these methods in industrial processes, assessing their accuracy over the mapping area, i.e., the area covered by the model during deployment, is necessary. We define the downstream task accuracy (DTA) as the accuracy over the mapping area, automatically computed using publicly available data sources and the model's outputs and expressed in an interpretable way for operators. We benchmark existing models for distributed PV mapping and show how they perform in terms of DTA. We show that the accuracy computed on the test set overestimates by about 30 percentage points the accuracy on the mapping area. Our approach paves the way for safer integration of deep-learning-based pipelines for remote PV mapping. Code is available at https://github.com/gabrielkasmi/deeppvmapper.
summary: Photovoltaic (PV) energy is rapidly growing and key to mitigating the energy crisis. However, distributed PV generation, which amounts to half of the PV installed capacity, is typically unavailable to transmission system operators (TSOs), making it increasingly difficult to balance the load and supply and avoid grid congestions. To assess distributed PV generation, TSOs need precise knowledge regarding the metadata of distributed PV installations. Many remote sensing-based approaches have been proposed to map these installations in recent years. However, to use these methods in industrial processes, assessing their accuracy over the mapping area, i.e., the area covered by the model during deployment, is necessary. We define the downstream task accuracy (DTA) as the accuracy over the mapping area, automatically computed using publicly available data sources and the model's outputs and expressed in an interpretable way for operators. We benchmark existing models for distributed PV mapping and show how they perform in terms of DTA. We show that the accuracy computed on the test set overestimates by about 30 percentage points the accuracy on the mapping area. Our approach paves the way for safer integration of deep-learning-based pipelines for remote PV mapping. Code is available at https://github.com/gabrielkasmi/deeppvmapper.
abstract_zh: 光伏（PV）能源正在快速增长，是缓解能源危机的关键。然而，占光伏装机容量一半的分布式光伏发电通常无法供输电系统运营商（TSO）使用，这使得平衡负载和供应以及避免电网拥堵变得越来越困难。为了评估分布式光伏发电，输电系统运营商需要准确了解分布式光伏装置的元数据。近年来，人们提出了许多基于遥感的方法来绘制这些设施的地图。然而，为了在工业过程中使用这些方法，有必要评估它们在测绘区域（即部署期间模型覆盖的区域）的准确性。我们将下游任务精度 (DTA) 定义为测绘区域的精度，使用公开可用的数据源和模型的输出自动计算，并以操作员可解释的方式表示。我们对分布式光伏映射的现有模型进行了基准测试，并展示了它们在 DTA 方面的表现。我们表明，在测试集上计算的准确度比映射区域上的准确度高估了大约 30 个百分点。我们的方法为更安全地集成基于深度学习的远程光伏测绘管道铺平了道路。代码可在 https://github.com/gabrielkasmi/deeppvmapper 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于开源数据的无监督方法，用于评估深度学习分布式光伏映射模型的准确性。
AI.motivation: 分布式光伏数据对电网运营商至关重要，但现有模型在测试集上的准确率无法反映实际部署区域的性能，需更可靠的评估方法。
AI.method: 定义下游任务准确率（DTA），利用公开数据与模型输出自动计算映射区域准确率，对比测试集与实际部署区域的性能差异。
AI.result: 测试集准确率较实际映射区域高约30个百分点，揭示模型评估与实际应用间的显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度学习光伏映射管道的安全集成提供了更可靠的评估框架，代码已开源。

authors_text: Jesse Ables,Thomas Kirby,William Anderson,Sudip Mittal,Shahram Rahimi,Ioana Banicescu,Maria Seale
title: Creating an Explainable Intrusion Detection System Using Self Organizing Maps
title_zh: 使用自组织映射创建可解释的入侵检测系统
abstract: Modern Artificial Intelligence (AI) enabled Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) are complex black boxes. This means that a security analyst will have little to no explanation or clarification on why an IDS model made a particular prediction. A potential solution to this problem is to research and develop Explainable Intrusion Detection Systems (X-IDS) based on current capabilities in Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI). In this paper, we create a Self Organizing Maps (SOMs) based X-IDS system that is capable of producing explanatory visualizations. We leverage SOM's explainability to create both global and local explanations. An analyst can use global explanations to get a general idea of how a particular IDS model computes predictions. Local explanations are generated for individual datapoints to explain why a certain prediction value was computed. Furthermore, our SOM based X-IDS was evaluated on both explanation generation and traditional accuracy tests using the NSL-KDD and the CIC-IDS-2017 datasets.
summary: Modern Artificial Intelligence (AI) enabled Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) are complex black boxes. This means that a security analyst will have little to no explanation or clarification on why an IDS model made a particular prediction. A potential solution to this problem is to research and develop Explainable Intrusion Detection Systems (X-IDS) based on current capabilities in Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI). In this paper, we create a Self Organizing Maps (SOMs) based X-IDS system that is capable of producing explanatory visualizations. We leverage SOM's explainability to create both global and local explanations. An analyst can use global explanations to get a general idea of how a particular IDS model computes predictions. Local explanations are generated for individual datapoints to explain why a certain prediction value was computed. Furthermore, our SOM based X-IDS was evaluated on both explanation generation and traditional accuracy tests using the NSL-KDD and the CIC-IDS-2017 datasets.
abstract_zh: 支持现代人工智能 (AI) 的入侵检测系统 (IDS) 是复杂的黑匣子。这意味着安全分析师几乎无法解释或澄清 IDS 模型为何做出特定预测。该问题的一个潜在解决方案是基于可解释人工智能（XAI）的现有功能来研究和开发可解释入侵检测系统（X-IDS）。在本文中，我们创建了一个基于自组织地图 (SOM) 的 X-IDS 系统，该系统能够生成解释性可视化效果。我们利用 SOM 的可解释性来创建全局和本地解释。分析师可以使用全局解释来大致了解特定 IDS 模型如何计算预测。为各个数据点生成局部解释，以解释计算某个预测值的原因。此外，我们基于 SOM 的 X-IDS 使用 NSL-KDD 和 CIC-IDS-2017 数据集在解释生成和传统准确性测试上进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自组织映射（SOM）的可解释入侵检测系统（X-IDS），通过生成可视化解释来提高模型的透明度。
AI.motivation: 现代AI驱动的入侵检测系统（IDS）通常为黑箱模型，缺乏对预测结果的解释性，导致安全分析师难以理解其决策依据。
AI.method: 利用SOM的可解释性特性，构建能够生成全局和局部解释的X-IDS系统。全局解释用于说明模型整体行为，局部解释用于分析单个数据点的预测原因，并在NSL-KDD和CIC-IDS-2017数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该系统在生成解释性和传统准确性测试中均表现良好，验证了SOM在可解释性与检测性能上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于SOM的X-IDS为入侵检测提供了可视化解释，兼顾了模型的准确性与透明度，为未来可解释AI安全系统的设计提供了参考。

authors_text: Guillem Braso,Orcun Cetintas,Laura Leal-Taixe
title: Multi-Object Tracking and Segmentation via Neural Message Passing
title_zh: 通过神经消息传递进行多对象跟踪和分割
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1912.07515
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1912.07515
abstract: Graphs offer a natural way to formulate Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) and Multiple Object Tracking and Segmentation (MOTS) within the tracking-by-detection paradigm. However, they also introduce a major challenge for learning methods, as defining a model that can operate on such structured domain is not trivial. In this work, we exploit the classical network flow formulation of MOT to define a fully differentiable framework based on Message Passing Networks (MPNs). By operating directly on the graph domain, our method can reason globally over an entire set of detections and exploit contextual features. It then jointly predicts both final solutions for the data association problem and segmentation masks for all objects in the scene while exploiting synergies between the two tasks. We achieve state-of-the-art results for both tracking and segmentation in several publicly available datasets. Our code is available at github.com/ocetintas/MPNTrackSeg.
summary: Graphs offer a natural way to formulate Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) and Multiple Object Tracking and Segmentation (MOTS) within the tracking-by-detection paradigm. However, they also introduce a major challenge for learning methods, as defining a model that can operate on such structured domain is not trivial. In this work, we exploit the classical network flow formulation of MOT to define a fully differentiable framework based on Message Passing Networks (MPNs). By operating directly on the graph domain, our method can reason globally over an entire set of detections and exploit contextual features. It then jointly predicts both final solutions for the data association problem and segmentation masks for all objects in the scene while exploiting synergies between the two tasks. We achieve state-of-the-art results for both tracking and segmentation in several publicly available datasets. Our code is available at github.com/ocetintas/MPNTrackSeg.
abstract_zh: 图提供了一种在检测跟踪范例中制定多对象跟踪 (MOT) 和多对象跟踪和分割 (MOTS) 的自然方法。然而，它们也给学习方法带来了重大挑战，因为定义一个可以在这种结构化领域上运行的模型并非易事。在这项工作中，我们利用 MOT 的经典网络流公式来定义基于消息传递网络（MPN）的完全可微框架。通过直接在图域上操作，我们的方法可以对整个检测集进行全局推理并利用上下文特征。然后，它联合预测数据关联问题的最终解决方案和场景中所有对象的分割掩模，同时利用两个任务之间的协同作用。我们在几个公开可用的数据集中实现了最先进的跟踪和分割结果。我们的代码可在 github.com/ocetintas/MPNTrackSeg 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经消息传递的多目标跟踪与分割方法，通过图结构处理检测数据，实现联合预测。
AI.motivation: 图结构虽适合MOT/MOTS任务，但设计可处理结构化数据的模型存在挑战，需提升跟踪与分割的协同性。
AI.method: 基于网络流的MOT经典方法，构建全可微消息传递网络（MPNs），直接在图域操作，联合预测数据关联与分割掩码。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上达到跟踪与分割任务的最先进效果，开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: 证明图结构联合建模的有效性，为多任务协同学习提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于神经消息传递的多目标跟踪与分割方法，通过图结构处理检测数据，实现联合预测。

search_text: Multi-Object Tracking and Segmentation via Neural Message Passing 通过神经消息传递进行多对象跟踪和分割 Graphs offer a natural way to formulate Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) and Multiple Object Tracking and Segmentation (MOTS) within the tracking-by-detection paradigm. However, they also introduce a major challenge for learning methods, as defining a model that can operate on such structured domain is not trivial. In this work, we exploit the classical network flow formulation of MOT to define a fully differentiable framework based on Message Passing Networks (MPNs). By operating directly on the graph domain, our method can reason globally over an entire set of detections and exploit contextual features. It then jointly predicts both final solutions for the data association problem and segmentation masks for all objects in the scene while exploiting synergies between the two tasks. We achieve state-of-the-art results for both tracking and segmentation in several publicly available datasets. Our code is available at github.com/ocetintas/MPNTrackSeg. 图提供了一种在检测跟踪范例中制定多对象跟踪 (MOT) 和多对象跟踪和分割 (MOTS) 的自然方法。然而，它们也给学习方法带来了重大挑战，因为定义一个可以在这种结构化领域上运行的模型并非易事。在这项工作中，我们利用 MOT 的经典网络流公式来定义基于消息传递网络（MPN）的完全可微框架。通过直接在图域上操作，我们的方法可以对整个检测集进行全局推理并利用上下文特征。然后，它联合预测数据关联问题的最终解决方案和场景中所有对象的分割掩模，同时利用两个任务之间的协同作用。我们在几个公开可用的数据集中实现了最先进的跟踪和分割结果。我们的代码可在 github.com/ocetintas/MPNTrackSeg 获取。 提出一种基于神经消息传递的多目标跟踪与分割方法，通过图结构处理检测数据，实现联合预测。 Guillem Braso,Orcun Cetintas,Laura Leal-Taixe cs.CV

authors_text: Fedor V. Fomin,Petr A. Golovach,Tuukka Korhonen,Kirill Simonov,Giannos Stamoulis
title: Fixed-Parameter Tractability of Maximum Colored Path and Beyond
title_zh: 最大彩色路径及以上的固定参数可处理性
abstract: We introduce a general method for obtaining fixed-parameter algorithms for problems about finding paths in undirected graphs, where the length of the path could be unbounded in the parameter. The first application of our method is as follows. We give a randomized algorithm, that given a colored $n$-vertex undirected graph, vertices $s$ and $t$, and an integer $k$, finds an $(s,t)$-path containing at least $k$ different colors in time $2^k n^{O(1)}$. This is the first FPT algorithm for this problem, and it generalizes the algorithm of Björklund, Husfeldt, and Taslaman [SODA 2012] on finding a path through $k$ specified vertices. It also implies the first $2^k n^{O(1)}$ time algorithm for finding an $(s,t)$-path of length at least $k$. Our method yields FPT algorithms for even more general problems. For example, we consider the problem where the input consists of an $n$-vertex undirected graph $G$, a matroid $M$ whose elements correspond to the vertices of $G$ and which is represented over a finite field of order $q$, a positive integer weight function on the vertices of $G$, two sets of vertices $S,T \subseteq V(G)$, and integers $p,k,w$, and the task is to find $p$ vertex-disjoint paths from $S$ to $T$ so that the union of the vertices of these paths contains an independent set of $M$ of cardinality $k$ and weight $w$, while minimizing the sum of the lengths of the paths. We give a $2^{p+O(k^2 \log (q+k))} n^{O(1)} w$ time randomized algorithm for this problem.
summary: We introduce a general method for obtaining fixed-parameter algorithms for problems about finding paths in undirected graphs, where the length of the path could be unbounded in the parameter. The first application of our method is as follows. We give a randomized algorithm, that given a colored $n$-vertex undirected graph, vertices $s$ and $t$, and an integer $k$, finds an $(s,t)$-path containing at least $k$ different colors in time $2^k n^{O(1)}$. This is the first FPT algorithm for this problem, and it generalizes the algorithm of Björklund, Husfeldt, and Taslaman [SODA 2012] on finding a path through $k$ specified vertices. It also implies the first $2^k n^{O(1)}$ time algorithm for finding an $(s,t)$-path of length at least $k$. Our method yields FPT algorithms for even more general problems. For example, we consider the problem where the input consists of an $n$-vertex undirected graph $G$, a matroid $M$ whose elements correspond to the vertices of $G$ and which is represented over a finite field of order $q$, a positive integer weight function on the vertices of $G$, two sets of vertices $S,T \subseteq V(G)$, and integers $p,k,w$, and the task is to find $p$ vertex-disjoint paths from $S$ to $T$ so that the union of the vertices of these paths contains an independent set of $M$ of cardinality $k$ and weight $w$, while minimizing the sum of the lengths of the paths. We give a $2^{p+O(k^2 \log (q+k))} n^{O(1)} w$ time randomized algorithm for this problem.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了一种获得固定参数算法的通用方法，用于解决无向图中寻找路径的问题，其中路径的长度在参数中可以是无界的。我们的方法的第一个应用如下。我们给出一个随机算法，给定一个彩色 $n$ 顶点无向图、顶点 $s$ 和 $t$ 以及整数 $k$，找到一条在 $2^k n^{O(1)}$ 时间内至少包含 $k$ 不同颜色的 $(s,t)$ 路径。这是解决该问题的第一个 FPT 算法，它概括了 Björklund、Husfeldt 和 Taslaman [SODA 2012] 寻找通过 $k$ 指定顶点的路径的算法。它还意味着第一个 $2^k n^{O(1)}$ 时间算法用于查找长度至少为 $k$ 的 $(s,t)$ 路径。我们的方法产生了适用于更一般问题的 FPT 算法。例如，我们考虑输入由 $n$ 顶点无向图 $G$、其元素对应于 $G$ 的顶点并在 $q$ 阶有限域上表示的拟阵 $M$、$G$ 顶点上的正整数权重函数、两组顶点 $S,T \subseteq V(G)$ 和整数 $p,k,w$ 组成的问题，任务是找到 $p$从 $S$ 到 $T$ 的顶点不相交路径，以便这些路径的顶点的并集包含一组独立的 $M$ 基数 $k$ 和权重 $w$，同时最小化路径长度的总和。我们针对这个问题给出了 $2^{p+O(k^2 \log (q+k))} n^{O(1)} w$ 时间随机算法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用方法，用于获得关于在无向图中寻找路径问题的固定参数可解（FPT）算法，其中路径长度可能在参数上无界。
AI.motivation: 现有的算法无法高效处理带颜色约束的路径问题，特别是要求路径包含至少k种不同颜色的情况，且路径长度可能不受参数限制。此工作旨在填补这一空白，并推广已知的通过k个指定顶点的路径算法。
AI.method: 提出一种通用的随机化方法，基于代数技术和组合结构，将路径查找问题转化为参数化的独立集问题，并利用拟阵表示和快速代数算法实现固定参数可解性。
AI.result: 1. 给出了一个随机化算法，在时间2^k n^{O(1)}内找到包含至少k种不同颜色的(s,t)-路径，这是该问题的首个FPT算法。2. 进一步推广到更一般的路径问题，包括拟阵约束、权重和顶点不相交路径等，得到时间为2^{p+O(k^2 log(q+k))} n^{O(1)} w的随机化算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的通用方法有效解决了多种带约束的路径问题，证明了这些问题的固定参数可解性，并为后续研究提供了新的代数工具和思路。

authors_text: Marcin Straczkiewicz,Emily J. Huang,Jukka-Pekka Onnela
title: A 'one-size-fits-most' walking recognition method for smartphones, smartwatches, and wearable accelerometers
title_zh: 适用于智能手机、智能手表和可穿戴加速度计的“一刀切”步行识别方法
comment: 39 pages, 4 figures (incl. 1 supplementary), and 5 tables (incl. 2 supplementary)
comments: 39 pages, 4 figures (incl. 1 supplementary), and 5 tables (incl. 2 supplementary)
abstract: The ubiquity of personal digital devices offers unprecedented opportunities to study human behavior. Current state-of-the-art methods quantify physical activity using 'activity counts,' a measure which overlooks specific types of physical activities. We proposed a walking recognition method for sub-second tri-axial accelerometer data, in which activity classification is based on the inherent features of walking: intensity, periodicity, and duration. We validated our method against 20 publicly available, annotated datasets on walking activity data collected at various body locations (thigh, waist, chest, arm, wrist). We demonstrated that our method can estimate walking periods with high sensitivity and specificity: average sensitivity ranged between 0.92 and 0.97 across various body locations, and average specificity for common daily activities was typically above 0.95. We also assessed the method's algorithmic fairness to demographic and anthropometric variables and measurement contexts (body location, environment). Finally, we have released our method as open-source software in MATLAB and Python.
summary: The ubiquity of personal digital devices offers unprecedented opportunities to study human behavior. Current state-of-the-art methods quantify physical activity using 'activity counts,' a measure which overlooks specific types of physical activities. We proposed a walking recognition method for sub-second tri-axial accelerometer data, in which activity classification is based on the inherent features of walking: intensity, periodicity, and duration. We validated our method against 20 publicly available, annotated datasets on walking activity data collected at various body locations (thigh, waist, chest, arm, wrist). We demonstrated that our method can estimate walking periods with high sensitivity and specificity: average sensitivity ranged between 0.92 and 0.97 across various body locations, and average specificity for common daily activities was typically above 0.95. We also assessed the method's algorithmic fairness to demographic and anthropometric variables and measurement contexts (body location, environment). Finally, we have released our method as open-source software in MATLAB and Python.
abstract_zh: 个人数字设备的普及为研究人类行为提供了前所未有的机会。目前最先进的方法使用“活动计数”来量化身体活动，这种衡量方法忽略了特定类型的身体活动。我们提出了一种亚秒级三轴加速度计数据的步行识别方法，其中活动分类基于步行的固有特征：强度、周期性和持续时间。我们针对在不同身体部位（大腿、腰部、胸部、手臂、手腕）收集的步行活动数据，对照 20 个公开的带注释的数据集验证了我们的方法。我们证明，我们的方法可以以高灵敏度和特异性估计步行时间：身体各个部位的平均灵敏度范围在 0.92 到 0.97 之间，而常见日常活动的平均特异性通常高于 0.95。我们还评估了该方法对人口统计和人体测量变量以及测量背景（身体位置、环境）的算法公平性。最后，我们以 MATLAB 和 Python 的开源软件形式发布了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种适用于智能手机、智能手表和可穿戴加速度计的通用行走识别方法，通过分析三轴加速度计数据实现高精度行走检测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于活动计数的方法无法准确区分特定体力活动类型，需开发更精确且跨设备通用的行走识别技术以提升行为研究能力。
AI.method: 基于行走的强度、周期性和持续时间特征，利用三轴加速度计数据进行分类，并在20个不同身体部位的数据集上验证算法鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在不同身体部位数据上平均灵敏度达0.92-0.97，对日常活动的特异性普遍高于0.95，且算法对人口统计学和环境变量具有公平性。
AI.conclusion: 该开源方法在多种设备和场景下均表现优异，为跨设备行走识别提供了可推广的解决方案。

motivation: 现有基于活动计数的方法无法准确区分特定体力活动类型，需开发更精确且跨设备通用的行走识别技术以提升行为研究能力。

conclusion: 该开源方法在多种设备和场景下均表现优异，为跨设备行走识别提供了可推广的解决方案。
search_text: A 'one-size-fits-most' walking recognition method for smartphones, smartwatches, and wearable accelerometers 适用于智能手机、智能手表和可穿戴加速度计的“一刀切”步行识别方法 The ubiquity of personal digital devices offers unprecedented opportunities to study human behavior. Current state-of-the-art methods quantify physical activity using 'activity counts,' a measure which overlooks specific types of physical activities. We proposed a walking recognition method for sub-second tri-axial accelerometer data, in which activity classification is based on the inherent features of walking: intensity, periodicity, and duration. We validated our method against 20 publicly available, annotated datasets on walking activity data collected at various body locations (thigh, waist, chest, arm, wrist). We demonstrated that our method can estimate walking periods with high sensitivity and specificity: average sensitivity ranged between 0.92 and 0.97 across various body locations, and average specificity for common daily activities was typically above 0.95. We also assessed the method's algorithmic fairness to demographic and anthropometric variables and measurement contexts (body location, environment). Finally, we have released our method as open-source software in MATLAB and Python. 个人数字设备的普及为研究人类行为提供了前所未有的机会。目前最先进的方法使用“活动计数”来量化身体活动，这种衡量方法忽略了特定类型的身体活动。我们提出了一种亚秒级三轴加速度计数据的步行识别方法，其中活动分类基于步行的固有特征：强度、周期性和持续时间。我们针对在不同身体部位（大腿、腰部、胸部、手臂、手腕）收集的步行活动数据，对照 20 个公开的带注释的数据集验证了我们的方法。我们证明，我们的方法可以以高灵敏度和特异性估计步行时间：身体各个部位的平均灵敏度范围在 0.92 到 0.97 之间，而常见日常活动的平均特异性通常高于 0.95。我们还评估了该方法对人口统计和人体测量变量以及测量背景（身体位置、环境）的算法公平性。最后，我们以 MATLAB 和 Python 的开源软件形式发布了我们的方法。 提出一种适用于智能手机、智能手表和可穿戴加速度计的通用行走识别方法，通过分析三轴加速度计数据实现高精度行走检测。 Marcin Straczkiewicz,Emily J. Huang,Jukka-Pekka Onnela cs.HC,eess.SP

authors_text: Sayan Bhattacharya,Peter Kiss,Thatchaphol Saranurak,David Wajc
title: Dynamic Matching with Better-than-2 Approximation in Polylogarithmic Update Time
title_zh: 多对数更新时间中优于 2 近似的动态匹配
abstract: We present dynamic algorithms with polylogarithmic update time for estimating the size of the maximum matching of a graph undergoing edge insertions and deletions with approximation ratio strictly better than $2$. Specifically, we obtain a $1+\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}+ε\approx 1.707+ε$ approximation in bipartite graphs and a $1.973+ε$ approximation in general graphs. We thus answer in the affirmative the major open question first posed in the influential work of Onak and Rubinfeld (STOC'10) and repeatedly asked in the dynamic graph algorithms literature. Our randomized algorithms also work against an adaptive adversary and guarantee worst-case polylog update time, both w.h.p. Our algorithms are based on simulating new two-pass streaming matching algorithms in the dynamic setting. Our key new idea is to invoke the recent sublinear-time matching algorithm of Behnezhad (FOCS'21) in a white-box manner to efficiently simulate the second pass of our streaming algorithms, while bypassing the well-known vertex-update barrier.
summary: We present dynamic algorithms with polylogarithmic update time for estimating the size of the maximum matching of a graph undergoing edge insertions and deletions with approximation ratio strictly better than $2$. Specifically, we obtain a $1+\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}+ε\approx 1.707+ε$ approximation in bipartite graphs and a $1.973+ε$ approximation in general graphs. We thus answer in the affirmative the major open question first posed in the influential work of Onak and Rubinfeld (STOC'10) and repeatedly asked in the dynamic graph algorithms literature. Our randomized algorithms also work against an adaptive adversary and guarantee worst-case polylog update time, both w.h.p. Our algorithms are based on simulating new two-pass streaming matching algorithms in the dynamic setting. Our key new idea is to invoke the recent sublinear-time matching algorithm of Behnezhad (FOCS'21) in a white-box manner to efficiently simulate the second pass of our streaming algorithms, while bypassing the well-known vertex-update barrier.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了具有多对数更新时间的动态算法，用于估计经历边缘插入和删除的图的最大匹配的大小，近似率严格优于 2 美元。具体来说，我们在二部图中获得 $1+\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}+ε\approx 1.707+ε$ 近似值，在一般图中获得 $1.973+ε$ 近似值。因此，我们对 Onak 和 Rubinfeld 的有影响力的著作 (STOC'10) 中首次提出并在动态图算法文献中反复提出的主要开放问题做出了肯定的回答。我们的随机算法还可以对抗自适应对手，并保证最坏情况下的多对数更新时间。我们的算法基于在动态设置中模拟新的两遍流匹配算法。我们的关键新想法是以白盒方式调用 Behnezhad (FOCS'21) 最近的亚线性时间匹配算法，以有效地模拟我们的流算法的第二遍，同时绕过众所周知的顶点更新障碍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态算法，在多项式对数更新时间内估计图的最大匹配大小，近似比优于2。
AI.motivation: 解决动态图算法领域长期未决的问题：能否在多项式对数更新时间内实现优于2倍近似的最大匹配估计。
AI.method: 通过模拟新型两遍流式匹配算法，结合Behnezhad的子线性时间算法，突破顶点更新屏障实现动态场景下的高效模拟。
AI.result: 在二分图中实现1.707+ε近似，在一般图中实现1.973+ε近似，算法在对抗性对手下具有高概率多项式对数更新时间。
AI.conclusion: 首次在动态图中实现优于2倍近似的最大匹配估计，验证了Onak-Rubinfeld提出的核心猜想，为动态匹配算法开辟新方向。

authors_text: Ozan Özdemir,Matthias Kerzel,Cornelius Weber,Jae Hee Lee,Stefan Wermter
title: Learning Flexible Translation between Robot Actions and Language Descriptions
title_zh: 学习机器人动作和语言描述之间的灵活翻译
comment: Accepted at the 31st International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 31st International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2022)
abstract: Handling various robot action-language translation tasks flexibly is an essential requirement for natural interaction between a robot and a human. Previous approaches require change in the configuration of the model architecture per task during inference, which undermines the premise of multi-task learning. In this work, we propose the paired gated autoencoders (PGAE) for flexible translation between robot actions and language descriptions in a tabletop object manipulation scenario. We train our model in an end-to-end fashion by pairing each action with appropriate descriptions that contain a signal informing about the translation direction. During inference, our model can flexibly translate from action to language and vice versa according to the given language signal. Moreover, with the option to use a pretrained language model as the language encoder, our model has the potential to recognise unseen natural language input. Another capability of our model is that it can recognise and imitate actions of another agent by utilising robot demonstrations. The experiment results highlight the flexible bidirectional translation capabilities of our approach alongside with the ability to generalise to the actions of the opposite-sitting agent.
summary: Handling various robot action-language translation tasks flexibly is an essential requirement for natural interaction between a robot and a human. Previous approaches require change in the configuration of the model architecture per task during inference, which undermines the premise of multi-task learning. In this work, we propose the paired gated autoencoders (PGAE) for flexible translation between robot actions and language descriptions in a tabletop object manipulation scenario. We train our model in an end-to-end fashion by pairing each action with appropriate descriptions that contain a signal informing about the translation direction. During inference, our model can flexibly translate from action to language and vice versa according to the given language signal. Moreover, with the option to use a pretrained language model as the language encoder, our model has the potential to recognise unseen natural language input. Another capability of our model is that it can recognise and imitate actions of another agent by utilising robot demonstrations. The experiment results highlight the flexible bidirectional translation capabilities of our approach alongside with the ability to generalise to the actions of the opposite-sitting agent.
abstract_zh: 灵活处理各种机器人动作语言翻译任务是机器人与人类之间自然交互的基本要求。以前的方法需要在推理过程中改变每个任务的模型架构的配置，这破坏了多任务学习的前提。在这项工作中，我们提出了配对门控自动编码器（PGAE），用于桌面对象操作场景中机器人动作和语言描述之间的灵活翻译。我们通过将每个动作与包含通知平移方向的信号的适当描述配对，以端到端的方式训练我们的模型。在推理过程中，我们的模型可以根据给定的语言信号灵活地将动作翻译为语言，反之亦然。此外，通过选择使用预训练的语言模型作为语言编码器，我们的模型有可能识别看不见的自然语言输入。我们模型的另一个功能是它可以通过利用机器人演示来识别和模仿另一个代理的动作。实验结果凸显了我们的方法灵活的双向翻译能力，以及泛化到坐在对面的代理的行为的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种灵活的机器人动作与语言描述之间的翻译方法，以支持自然的人机交互。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需根据任务调整模型架构，无法实现多任务学习，限制了灵活性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计配对门控自编码器（PGAE），通过端到端训练结合动作与语言描述的配对数据，并利用预训练语言模型增强自然语言理解能力。
AI.result: 模型实现了动作到语言及反向的双向翻译，并能通过机器人演示识别和模仿其他智能体的动作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多任务翻译的灵活性问题，为复杂场景下的机器人语言交互提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yang Xiao,Xubo Liu,James King,Arshdeep Singh,Eng Siong Chng,Mark D. Plumbley,Wenwu Wang
title: Continual Learning For On-Device Environmental Sound Classification
title_zh: 持续学习设备端环境声音分类
comment: The first two authors contributed equally, 5 pages one figure, submitted to DCASE2022 Workshop
comments: The first two authors contributed equally, 5 pages one figure, submitted to DCASE2022 Workshop
abstract: Continuously learning new classes without catastrophic forgetting is a challenging problem for on-device environmental sound classification given the restrictions on computation resources (e.g., model size, running memory). To address this issue, we propose a simple and efficient continual learning method. Our method selects the historical data for the training by measuring the per-sample classification uncertainty. Specifically, we measure the uncertainty by observing how the classification probability of data fluctuates against the parallel perturbations added to the classifier embedding. In this way, the computation cost can be significantly reduced compared with adding perturbation to the raw data. Experimental results on the DCASE 2019 Task 1 and ESC-50 dataset show that our proposed method outperforms baseline continual learning methods on classification accuracy and computational efficiency, indicating our method can efficiently and incrementally learn new classes without the catastrophic forgetting problem for on-device environmental sound classification.
summary: Continuously learning new classes without catastrophic forgetting is a challenging problem for on-device environmental sound classification given the restrictions on computation resources (e.g., model size, running memory). To address this issue, we propose a simple and efficient continual learning method. Our method selects the historical data for the training by measuring the per-sample classification uncertainty. Specifically, we measure the uncertainty by observing how the classification probability of data fluctuates against the parallel perturbations added to the classifier embedding. In this way, the computation cost can be significantly reduced compared with adding perturbation to the raw data. Experimental results on the DCASE 2019 Task 1 and ESC-50 dataset show that our proposed method outperforms baseline continual learning methods on classification accuracy and computational efficiency, indicating our method can efficiently and incrementally learn new classes without the catastrophic forgetting problem for on-device environmental sound classification.
abstract_zh: 考虑到计算资源（例如模型大小、运行内存）的限制，持续学习新类别而不发生灾难性遗忘对于设备上环境声音分类来说是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单有效的持续学习方法。我们的方法通过测量每个样本的分类不确定性来选择训练的历史数据。具体来说，我们通过观察数据的分类概率如何随着添加到分类器嵌入的并行扰动而波动来测量不确定性。这样，与对原始数据添加扰动相比，可以显着降低计算成本。 DCASE 2019 Task 1 和 ESC-50 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在分类精度和计算效率方面优于基线持续学习方法，这表明我们的方法可以有效地、增量地学习新类别，而不会出现设备上环境声音分类的灾难性遗忘问题。

AI.result: 在DCASE 2019 Task 1和ESC-50数据集上的实验表明，该方法在分类准确率和计算效率上优于基线持续学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能高效增量学习新类别，有效缓解设备端环境声音分类的灾难性遗忘问题。

search_text: Continual Learning For On-Device Environmental Sound Classification 持续学习设备端环境声音分类 Continuously learning new classes without catastrophic forgetting is a challenging problem for on-device environmental sound classification given the restrictions on computation resources (e.g., model size, running memory). To address this issue, we propose a simple and efficient continual learning method. Our method selects the historical data for the training by measuring the per-sample classification uncertainty. Specifically, we measure the uncertainty by observing how the classification probability of data fluctuates against the parallel perturbations added to the classifier embedding. In this way, the computation cost can be significantly reduced compared with adding perturbation to the raw data. Experimental results on the DCASE 2019 Task 1 and ESC-50 dataset show that our proposed method outperforms baseline continual learning methods on classification accuracy and computational efficiency, indicating our method can efficiently and incrementally learn new classes without the catastrophic forgetting problem for on-device environmental sound classification. 考虑到计算资源（例如模型大小、运行内存）的限制，持续学习新类别而不发生灾难性遗忘对于设备上环境声音分类来说是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单有效的持续学习方法。我们的方法通过测量每个样本的分类不确定性来选择训练的历史数据。具体来说，我们通过观察数据的分类概率如何随着添加到分类器嵌入的并行扰动而波动来测量不确定性。这样，与对原始数据添加扰动相比，可以显着降低计算成本。 DCASE 2019 Task 1 和 ESC-50 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在分类精度和计算效率方面优于基线持续学习方法，这表明我们的方法可以有效地、增量地学习新类别，而不会出现设备上环境声音分类的灾难性遗忘问题。 本文提出了一种高效的持续学习方法，用于解决在设备端进行环境声音分类时新类学习与灾难性遗忘的问题。 Yang Xiao,Xubo Liu,James King,Arshdeep Singh,Eng Siong Chng,Mark D. Plumbley,Wenwu Wang cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Lars Jaffke,Paloma T. Lima,Tomáš Masařík,Marcin Pilipczuk,Ueverton S. Souza
title: A tight quasi-polynomial bound for Global Label Min-Cut
title_zh: 全局标签最小割的紧拟多项式界
comment: ef:ACM Transactions on Algorithms, 2026; Proceedings: ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms, SODA 2023, 290-303
comments: ef:ACM Transactions on Algorithms, 2026; Proceedings: ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms, SODA 2023, 290-303
abstract: We study a generalization of the classic Global Min-Cut problem, called Global Label Min-Cut (or sometimes Global Hedge Min-Cut): the edges of the input (multi)graph are labeled (or partitioned into color classes or hedges), and removing all edges of the same label (color or from the same hedge) costs one. The problem asks to disconnect the graph at minimum cost. While the $st$-cut version of the problem is known to be NP-hard, the above global cut version is known to admit a quasi-polynomial randomized $n^{O(\log \mathrm{OPT})}$-time algorithm due to Ghaffari, Karger, and Panigrahi [SODA 2017]. They consider this as ``strong evidence that this problem is in P''. We show that this is actually not the case. We complete the study of the complexity of the Global Label Min-Cut problem by showing that the quasi-polynomial running time is probably optimal: We show that the existence of an algorithm with running time $(np)^{o(\log n/ (\log \log n)^2)}$ would contradict the Exponential Time Hypothesis, where $n$ is the number of vertices, and $p$ is the number of labels in the input. The key step for the lower bound is a proof that Global Label Min-Cut is W[1]-hard when parameterized by the number of uncut labels. In other words, the problem is difficult in the regime where almost all labels need to be cut to disconnect the graph. To turn this lower bound into a quasi-polynomial-time lower bound, we also needed to revisit the framework due to Marx [Theory Comput. 2010] of proving lower bounds assuming Exponential Time Hypothesis through the Subgraph Isomorphism problem parameterized by the number of edges of the pattern. Here, we provide an alternative simplified proof of the hardness of this problem that is more versatile with respect to the choice of the regimes of the parameters.

They consider this as ``strong evidence that this problem is in P''. We show that this is actually not the case. We complete the study of the complexity of the Global Label Min-Cut problem by showing that the quasi-polynomial running time is probably optimal: We show that the existence of an algorithm with running time $(np)^{o(\log n/ (\log \log n)^2)}$ would contradict the Exponential Time Hypothesis, where $n$ is the number of vertices, and $p$ is the number of labels in the input. The key step for the lower bound is a proof that Global Label Min-Cut is W[1]-hard when parameterized by the number of uncut labels. In other words, the problem is difficult in the regime where almost all labels need to be cut to disconnect the graph. To turn this lower bound into a quasi-polynomial-time lower bound, we also needed to revisit the framework due to Marx [Theory Comput. 2010] of proving lower bounds assuming Exponential Time Hypothesis through the Subgraph Isomorphism problem parameterized by the number of edges of the pattern. Here, we provide an alternative simplified proof of the hardness of this problem that is more versatile with respect to the choice of the regimes of the parameters.
abstract_zh: 我们研究经典全局最小割问题的推广，称为全局标签最小割（或有时称为全局对冲最小割）：输入（多）图的边缘被标记（或划分为颜色类或树篱），并且删除相同标签（颜色或来自相同树篱）的所有边缘成本为 1。该问题要求以最小的成本断开图。虽然问题的 $st$ 切割版本已知为 NP 难问题，但由于 Ghaffari、Karger 和 Panigrahi [SODA 2017]，上述全局切割版本承认准多项式随机 $n^{O(\log \mathrm{OPT})}$ 时间算法。他们认为这是“强有力的证据表明这个问题存在于 P 中”。我们证明事实并非如此。我们通过证明拟多项式运行时间可能是最优的来完成对全局标签最小割问题复杂性的研究：我们证明运行时间为 $(np)^{o(\log n/ (\log \log n)^2)}$ 的算法的存在将与指数时间假设相矛盾，其中 $n$ 是顶点数量，$p$ 是输入中标签的数量。下界的关键步骤是证明当通过未切割标签的数量进行参数化时，全局标签最小切割是 W[1]-hard。换句话说，在几乎所有标签都需要被剪切以断开图的机制中，这个问题是很困难的。为了将这个下界转变为拟多项式时间下界，我们还需要重新审视马克思[理论计算]的框架。 2010]通过由模式边数参数化的子图同构问题证明假设指数时间假设的下界。在这里，我们提供了该问题的难度的另一种简化证明，该证明在参数范围的选择方面更加通用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究全局标签最小割问题的复杂度，证明其准多项式时间算法可能是最优的。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在准多项式时间随机算法，但作者质疑该问题是否属于P类，并试图通过复杂度下界分析验证其最优性。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂度理论，证明问题在标签数参数下是W[1]-难的，并结合指数时间假设（ETH）建立准多项式时间下界。
AI.result: 证明若存在次准多项式时间算法将违反ETH，且问题在几乎全部标签需被切割的场景下具有高复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 全局标签最小割问题的准多项式时间复杂度是紧致的，其优化算法可能无法突破该下界。

authors_text: Meike Hatzel,Lars Jaffke,Paloma T. Lima,Tomáš Masařík,Marcin Pilipczuk,Roohani Sharma,Manuel Sorge
title: Fixed-parameter tractability of Directed Multicut with three terminal pairs parameterized by the size of the cutset: twin-width meets flow-augmentation
title_zh: 具有由切割集大小参数化的三个端子对的定向多切割的固定参数可处理性：双宽度满足流量增强
comment: ef:Proceedings: ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms, SODA 2023
comments: ef:Proceedings: ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms, SODA 2023
abstract: We show fixed-parameter tractability of the Directed Multicut problem with three terminal pairs (with a randomized algorithm). This problem, given a directed graph $G$, pairs of vertices (called terminals) $(s_1,t_1)$, $(s_2,t_2)$, and $(s_3,t_3)$, and an integer $k$, asks to find a set of at most $k$ non-terminal vertices in $G$ that intersect all $s_1t_1$-paths, all $s_2t_2$-paths, and all $s_3t_3$-paths. The parameterized complexity of this case has been open since Chitnis, Cygan, Hajiaghayi, and Marx proved fixed-parameter tractability of the 2-terminal-pairs case at SODA 2012, and Pilipczuk and Wahlström proved the W[1]-hardness of the 4-terminal-pairs case at SODA 2016. On the technical side, we use two recent developments in parameterized algorithms. Using the technique of directed flow-augmentation [Kim, Kratsch, Pilipczuk, Wahlström, STOC 2022] we cast the problem as a CSP problem with few variables and constraints over a large ordered domain.We observe that this problem can be in turn encoded as an FO model-checking task over a structure consisting of a few 0-1 matrices. We look at this problem through the lenses of twin-width, a recently introduced structural parameter [Bonnet, Kim, Thomassé, Watrigant, FOCS 2020]: By a recent characterization [Bonnet, Giocanti, Ossona de Mendes, Simon, Thomassé, Toruńczyk, STOC 2022] the said FO model-checking task can be done in FPT time if the said matrices have bounded grid rank. To complete the proof, we show an irrelevant vertex rule: If any of the matrices in the said encoding has a large grid minor, a vertex corresponding to the ``middle'' box in the grid minor can be proclaimed irrelevant -- not contained in the sought solution -- and thus reduced.

We look at this problem through the lenses of twin-width, a recently introduced structural parameter [Bonnet, Kim, Thomassé, Watrigant, FOCS 2020]: By a recent characterization [Bonnet, Giocanti, Ossona de Mendes, Simon, Thomassé, Toruńczyk, STOC 2022] the said FO model-checking task can be done in FPT time if the said matrices have bounded grid rank. To complete the proof, we show an irrelevant vertex rule: If any of the matrices in the said encoding has a large grid minor, a vertex corresponding to the ``middle'' box in the grid minor can be proclaimed irrelevant -- not contained in the sought solution -- and thus reduced.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了具有三个终端对（使用随机算法）的定向多切割问题的固定参数可处理性。这个问题，给定一个有向图 $G$，顶点对（称为终结点）$(s_1,t_1)$、$(s_2,t_2)$ 和 $(s_3,t_3)$，以及一个整数 $k$，要求在 $G$ 中找到一组最多 $k$ 个与所有 $s_1t_1$ 路径相交的非终结点，所有$s_2t_2$-路径，以及所有 $s_3t_3$-路径。自从 Chitnis、Cygan、Hajiaghayi 和 Marx 在 SODA 2012 上证明了 2 终端对情况的固定参数可处理性，以及 Pilipczuk 和 Wahlström 在 SODA 2016 上证明了 4 终端对情况的 W[1] 难度以来，这种情况的参数化复杂性就已经公开了。在技术方面，我们使用了参数化算法的两个最新进展。使用定向流增强技术 [Kim, Kratsch, Pilipczuk, Wahlström, STOC 2022]，我们将问题转化为一个在大有序域上具有很少变量和约束的 CSP 问题。我们观察到，这个问题可以依次编码为由几个 0-1 矩阵组成的结构上的 FO 模型检查任务。我们通过双宽度的镜头来看待这个问题，这是最近引入的结构参数 [Bonnet, Kim, Thomassé, Watrigant, FOCS 2020]：通过最近的表征 [Bonnet, Giocanti, Ossona de Mendes, Simon, Thomassé, Toruńczyk, STOC 2022]，如果所述矩阵具有有界网格等级，则可以在 FPT 时间内完成所述 FO 模型检查任务。为了完成证明，我们展示了一个不相关的顶点规则：如果所述编码中的任何矩阵具有大的网格小数，则与网格小数中的“中间”框相对应的顶点可以被声明为不相关——不包含在所寻求的解决方案中——从而被减少。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了有向多割问题在三个终端对情况下，基于割集大小的固定参数可解性，并提供了随机化算法。
AI.motivation: 此前2终端对的有向多割问题已被证明是FPT的，而4终端对情况则被证明是W[1]-难的，3终端对的复杂性长期未被解决，因此需探索其参数化算法。
AI.method: 结合有向流增强技术与twin-width结构参数，将问题转化为有限域上的约束满足问题（CSP），并通过矩阵编码与FO模型检测方法，利用无关顶点规则进行简化。
AI.result: 成功证明3终端对有向多割问题的固定参数可解性，且算法为随机化方法，填补了该领域参数复杂性研究的空白。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过融合流增强与twin-width理论，为解决多终端割问题提供了新思路，可能推动类似参数化问题的进一步研究。

search_text: Fixed-parameter tractability of Directed Multicut with three terminal pairs parameterized by the size of the cutset: twin-width meets flow-augmentation 具有由切割集大小参数化的三个端子对的定向多切割的固定参数可处理性：双宽度满足流量增强 We show fixed-parameter tractability of the Directed Multicut problem with three terminal pairs (with a randomized algorithm). This problem, given a directed graph $G$, pairs of vertices (called terminals) $(s_1,t_1)$, $(s_2,t_2)$, and $(s_3,t_3)$, and an integer $k$, asks to find a set of at most $k$ non-terminal vertices in $G$ that intersect all $s_1t_1$-paths, all $s_2t_2$-paths, and all $s_3t_3$-paths. The parameterized complexity of this case has been open since Chitnis, Cygan, Hajiaghayi, and Marx proved fixed-parameter tractability of the 2-terminal-pairs case at SODA 2012, and Pilipczuk and Wahlström proved the W[1]-hardness of the 4-terminal-pairs case at SODA 2016. On the technical side, we use two recent developments in parameterized algorithms. Using the technique of directed flow-augmentation [Kim, Kratsch, Pilipczuk, Wahlström, STOC 2022] we cast the problem as a CSP problem with few variables and constraints over a large ordered domain.We observe that this problem can be in turn encoded as an FO model-checking task over a structure consisting of a few 0-1 matrices. We look at this problem through the lenses of twin-width, a recently introduced structural parameter [Bonnet, Kim, Thomassé, Watrigant, FOCS 2020]: By a recent characterization [Bonnet, Giocanti, Ossona de Mendes, Simon, Thomassé, Toruńczyk, STOC 2022] the said FO model-checking task can be done in FPT time if the said matrices have bounded grid rank. To complete the proof, we show an irrelevant vertex rule: If any of the matrices in the said encoding has a large grid minor, a vertex corresponding to the ``middle'' box in the grid minor can be proclaimed irrelevant -- not contained in the sought solution -- and thus reduced. 我们展示了具有三个终端对（使用随机算法）的定向多切割问题的固定参数可处理性。这个问题，给定一个有向图 $G$，顶点对（称为终结点）$(s_1,t_1)$、$(s_2,t_2)$ 和 $(s_3,t_3)$，以及一个整数 $k$，要求在 $G$ 中找到一组最多 $k$ 个与所有 $s_1t_1$ 路径相交的非终结点，所有$s_2t_2$-路径，以及所有 $s_3t_3$-路径。自从 Chitnis、Cygan、Hajiaghayi 和 Marx 在 SODA 2012 上证明了 2 终端对情况的固定参数可处理性，以及 Pilipczuk 和 Wahlström 在 SODA 2016 上证明了 4 终端对情况的 W[1] 难度以来，这种情况的参数化复杂性就已经公开了。在技术方面，我们使用了参数化算法的两个最新进展。使用定向流增强技术 [Kim, Kratsch, Pilipczuk, Wahlström, STOC 2022]，我们将问题转化为一个在大有序域上具有很少变量和约束的 CSP 问题。我们观察到，这个问题可以依次编码为由几个 0-1 矩阵组成的结构上的 FO 模型检查任务。我们通过双宽度的镜头来看待这个问题，这是最近引入的结构参数 [Bonnet, Kim, Thomassé, Watrigant, FOCS 2020]：通过最近的表征 [Bonnet, Giocanti, Ossona de Mendes, Simon, Thomassé, Toruńczyk, STOC 2022]，如果所述矩阵具有有界网格等级，则可以在 FPT 时间内完成所述 FO 模型检查任务。为了完成证明，我们展示了一个不相关的顶点规则：如果所述编码中的任何矩阵具有大的网格小数，则与网格小数中的“中间”框相对应的顶点可以被声明为不相关——不包含在所寻求的解决方案中——从而被减少。 本文证明了有向多割问题在三个终端对情况下，基于割集大小的固定参数可解性，并提供了随机化算法。 Meike Hatzel,Lars Jaffke,Paloma T.
