authors_text: Eun Jung Kim,Stefan Kratsch,Marcin Pilipczuk,Magnus Wahlström
title: Flow-augmentation III: Complexity dichotomy for Boolean CSPs parameterized by the number of unsatisfied constraints
title_zh: 流量增强 III：通过不满足约束的数量参数化的布尔 CSP 的复杂性二分法
comment: v2. Major update to all three flow-augmentation papers; v3. Final version accepted to SIAM J. Comput
comments: v2. Major update to all three flow-augmentation papers; v3. Final version accepted to SIAM J. Comput
abstract: We study the parameterized problem of satisfying ``almost all'' constraints of a given formula $F$ over a fixed, finite Boolean constraint language $Γ$, with or without weights. More precisely, for each finite Boolean constraint language $Γ$, we consider the following two problems. In Min SAT$(Γ)$, the input is a formula $F$ over $Γ$ and an integer $k$, and the task is to find an assignment $α\colon V(F) \to \{0,1\}$ that satisfies all but at most $k$ constraints of $F$, or determine that no such assignment exists. In Weighted Min SAT$(Γ$), the input additionally contains a weight function $w \colon F \to \mathbb{Z}_+$ and an integer $W$, and the task is to find an assignment $α$ such that (1) $α$ satisfies all but at most $k$ constraints of $F$, and (2) the total weight of the violated constraints is at most $W$. We give a complete dichotomy for the fixed-parameter tractability of these problems: We show that for every Boolean constraint language $Γ$, either Weighted Min SAT$(Γ)$ is FPT; or Weighted Min SAT$(Γ)$ is W[1]-hard but Min SAT$(Γ)$ is FPT; or Min SAT$(Γ)$ is W[1]-hard. This generalizes recent work of Kim et al. (SODA 2021) which did not consider weighted problems, and only considered languages $Γ$ that cannot express implications $(u \to v)$ (as is used to, e.g., model digraph cut problems). Our result generalizes and subsumes multiple previous results, including the FPT algorithms for Weighted Almost 2-SAT, weighted and unweighted $\ell$-Chain SAT, and Coupled Min-Cut, as well as weighted and directed versions of the latter. The main tool used in our algorithms is the recently developed method of directed flow-augmentation (Kim et al., STOC 2022).
summary: We study the parameterized problem of satisfying ``almost all'' constraints of a given formula $F$ over a fixed, finite Boolean constraint language $Γ$, with or without weights. More precisely, for each finite Boolean constraint language $Γ$, we consider the following two problems. In Min SAT$(Γ)$, the input is a formula $F$ over $Γ$ and an integer $k$, and the task is to find an assignment $α\colon V(F) \to \{0,1\}$ that satisfies all but at most $k$ constraints of $F$, or determine that no such assignment exists. In Weighted Min SAT$(Γ$), the input additionally contains a weight function $w \colon F \to \mathbb{Z}_+$ and an integer $W$, and the task is to find an assignment $α$ such that (1) $α$ satisfies all but at most $k$ constraints of $F$, and (2) the total weight of the violated constraints is at most $W$. We give a complete dichotomy for the fixed-parameter tractability of these problems: We show that for every Boolean constraint language $Γ$, either Weighted Min SAT$(Γ)$ is FPT; or Weighted Min SAT$(Γ)$ is W[1]-hard but Min SAT$(Γ)$ is FPT; or Min SAT$(Γ)$ is W[1]-hard. This generalizes recent work of Kim et al. (SODA 2021) which did not consider weighted problems, and only considered languages $Γ$ that cannot express implications $(u \to v)$ (as is used to, e.g., model digraph cut problems). Our result generalizes and subsumes multiple previous results, including the FPT algorithms for Weighted Almost 2-SAT, weighted and unweighted $\ell$-Chain SAT, and Coupled Min-Cut, as well as weighted and directed versions of the latter. The main tool used in our algorithms is the recently developed method of directed flow-augmentation (Kim et al., STOC 2022).
abstract_zh: 我们研究在固定的、有限的布尔约束语言 $Γ$ 上满足给定公式 $F$ 的“几乎所有”约束的参数化问题，无论有或没有权重。更准确地说，对于每个有限布尔约束语言$Γ$，我们考虑以下两个问题。在 Min SAT$(Γ)$ 中，输入是 $F$ 上的公式 $F$ 和一个整数 $k$，任务是找到一个分配 $α\colon V(F) \to \{0,1\}$，它满足 $F$ 的除最多 $k$ 之外的所有约束，或者确定不存在这样的分配。在 Weighted Min SAT$(Γ$) 中，输入还包含一个权重函数 $w \colon F \to \mathbb{Z}_+$ 和一个整数 $W$，任务是找到一个赋值 $α$，使得 (1) $α$ 满足 $F$ 的除最多 $k$ 之外的所有约束，并且 (2) 违反约束的总权重最多为 $W$。我们对这些问题的固定参数可处理性给出了完整的二分法：我们证明，对于每个布尔约束语言$ Г$，加权最小SAT$（Г）$是FPT；或加权最小 SAT$(Г)$ 是 W[1]-hard，但最小 SAT$(Г)$ 是 FPT；或 Min SAT$(Γ)$ 是 W[1]-hard。这概括了 Kim 等人最近的工作。 （SODA 2021）没有考虑加权问题，只考虑了无法表达含义 $(u \to v)$ 的语言 $Γ$ （用于模型二合图切割问题）。我们的结果概括并包含了多个先前的结果，包括加权近 2-SAT、加权和未加权 $\ell$-Chain SAT 和耦合 Min-Cut 的 FPT 算法，以及后者的加权和定向版本。我们的算法中使用的主要工具是最近开发的定向流量增强方法（Kim 等人，STOC 2022）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究布尔约束满足问题（CSP）在参数化框架下的复杂性分类，针对几乎满足所有约束的最小化问题进行分析。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未能涵盖带权重的约束语言或特定逻辑结构（如蕴含关系），本文旨在通过统一框架解决这一理论空白。
AI.method: 采用最新开发的有向流增强技术（directed flow-augmentation），结合参数化复杂性分析方法。
AI.result: 为每个布尔约束语言Γ建立了完全复杂性二分法：Weighted Min SAT(Γ)要么属于FPT，要么Min SAT(Γ)属于W[1]-hard，且该结果涵盖多项先前算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数化视角系统性地解决了布尔CSP的近似满足问题，为相关领域提供了统一的理论基础。

(SODA 2021) which did not consider weighted problems, and only considered languages $Γ$ that cannot express implications $(u \to v)$ (as is used to, e.g., model digraph cut problems). Our result generalizes and subsumes multiple previous results, including the FPT algorithms for Weighted Almost 2-SAT, weighted and unweighted $\ell$-Chain SAT, and Coupled Min-Cut, as well as weighted and directed versions of the latter. The main tool used in our algorithms is the recently developed method of directed flow-augmentation (Kim et al., STOC 2022). 我们研究在固定的、有限的布尔约束语言 $Γ$ 上满足给定公式 $F$ 的“几乎所有”约束的参数化问题，无论有或没有权重。更准确地说，对于每个有限布尔约束语言$Γ$，我们考虑以下两个问题。在 Min SAT$(Γ)$ 中，输入是 $F$ 上的公式 $F$ 和一个整数 $k$，任务是找到一个分配 $α\colon V(F) \to \{0,1\}$，它满足 $F$ 的除最多 $k$ 之外的所有约束，或者确定不存在这样的分配。在 Weighted Min SAT$(Γ$) 中，输入还包含一个权重函数 $w \colon F \to \mathbb{Z}_+$ 和一个整数 $W$，任务是找到一个赋值 $α$，使得 (1) $α$ 满足 $F$ 的除最多 $k$ 之外的所有约束，并且 (2) 违反约束的总权重最多为 $W$。我们对这些问题的固定参数可处理性给出了完整的二分法：我们证明，对于每个布尔约束语言$ Г$，加权最小SAT$（Г）$是FPT；或加权最小 SAT$(Г)$ 是 W[1]-hard，但最小 SAT$(Г)$ 是 FPT；或 Min SAT$(Γ)$ 是 W[1]-hard。这概括了 Kim 等人最近的工作。 （SODA 2021）没有考虑加权问题，只考虑了无法表达含义 $(u \to v)$ 的语言 $Γ$ （用于模型二合图切割问题）。我们的结果概括并包含了多个先前的结果，包括加权近 2-SAT、加权和未加权 $\ell$-Chain SAT 和耦合 Min-Cut 的 FPT 算法，以及后者的加权和定向版本。我们的算法中使用的主要工具是最近开发的定向流量增强方法（Kim 等人，STOC 2022）。 本文研究布尔约束满足问题（CSP）在参数化框架下的复杂性分类，针对几乎满足所有约束的最小化问题进行分析。 Eun Jung Kim,Stefan Kratsch,Marcin Pilipczuk,Magnus Wahlström cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Benjamin Alt,Christian Kunz,Darko Katic,Rayan Younis,Rainer Jäkel,Beat Peter Müller-Stich,Martin Wagner,Franziska Mathis-Ullrich
title: LapSeg3D: Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation of Point Clouds Representing Laparoscopic Scenes
title_zh: LapSeg3D：代表腹腔镜场景的点云的弱监督语义分割
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022), Kyoto, Japan
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022), Kyoto, Japan
abstract: The semantic segmentation of surgical scenes is a prerequisite for task automation in robot assisted interventions. We propose LapSeg3D, a novel DNN-based approach for the voxel-wise annotation of point clouds representing surgical scenes. As the manual annotation of training data is highly time consuming, we introduce a semi-autonomous clustering-based pipeline for the annotation of the gallbladder, which is used to generate segmented labels for the DNN. When evaluated against manually annotated data, LapSeg3D achieves an F1 score of 0.94 for gallbladder segmentation on various datasets of ex-vivo porcine livers. We show LapSeg3D to generalize accurately across different gallbladders and datasets recorded with different RGB-D camera systems.
summary: The semantic segmentation of surgical scenes is a prerequisite for task automation in robot assisted interventions. We propose LapSeg3D, a novel DNN-based approach for the voxel-wise annotation of point clouds representing surgical scenes. As the manual annotation of training data is highly time consuming, we introduce a semi-autonomous clustering-based pipeline for the annotation of the gallbladder, which is used to generate segmented labels for the DNN. When evaluated against manually annotated data, LapSeg3D achieves an F1 score of 0.94 for gallbladder segmentation on various datasets of ex-vivo porcine livers. We show LapSeg3D to generalize accurately across different gallbladders and datasets recorded with different RGB-D camera systems.
abstract_zh: 手术场景的语义分割是机器人辅助干预中任务自动化的先决条件。我们提出了 LapSeg3D，这是一种基于 DNN 的新颖方法，用于对代表手术场景的点云进行体素注释。由于训练数据的手动注释非常耗时，我们引入了一种基于半自主聚类的管道来注释胆囊，用于为 DNN 生成分段标签。根据手动注释的数据进行评估时，LapSeg3D 在离体猪肝脏的各种数据集上的胆囊分割的 F1 得分为 0.94。我们展示了 LapSeg3D 可以准确地概括不同的胆囊和使用不同 RGB-D 相机系统记录的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LapSeg3D，一种基于深度学习的弱监督方法，用于腹腔镜手术场景中点云的语义分割，重点实现胆囊的自动标注。
AI.motivation: 手术场景语义分割对机器人辅助手术自动化至关重要，但手动标注点云数据耗时且成本高，需开发高效标注方法。
AI.method: 设计半自主聚类管道生成胆囊分割标签，结合深度神经网络实现点云的体素级语义分割，减少人工标注依赖。
AI.result: 在离体猪肝数据集上，胆囊分割F1分数达0.94，且在不同RGB-D相机系统和数据集上均表现出良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LapSeg3D有效解决了手术场景点云分割的标注难题，为弱监督条件下的医学图像分析提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Arvind V. Mahankali,David P. Woodruff,Ziyu Zhang
title: Near-Linear Time and Fixed-Parameter Tractable Algorithms for Tensor Decompositions
title_zh: 张量分解的近线性时间和固定参数易处理算法
abstract: We study low rank approximation of tensors, focusing on the tensor train and Tucker decompositions, as well as approximations with tree tensor networks and more general tensor networks. For tensor train decomposition, we give a bicriteria $(1 + \eps)$-approximation algorithm with a small bicriteria rank and $O(q \cdot \nnz(A))$ running time, up to lower order terms, which improves over the additive error algorithm of \cite{huber2017randomized}. We also show how to convert the algorithm of \cite{huber2017randomized} into a relative error algorithm, but their algorithm necessarily has a running time of $O(qr^2 \cdot \nnz(A)) + n \cdot \poly(qk/\eps)$ when converted to a $(1 + \eps)$-approximation algorithm with bicriteria rank $r$. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to achieve polynomial time relative error approximation for tensor train decomposition. Our key technique is a method for obtaining subspace embeddings with a number of rows polynomial in $q$ for a matrix which is the flattening of a tensor train of $q$ tensors. We extend our algorithm to tree tensor networks. In addition, we extend our algorithm to tensor networks with arbitrary graphs (which we refer to as general tensor networks), by using a result of \cite{ms08_simulating_quantum_tensor_contraction} and showing that a general tensor network of rank $k$ can be contracted to a binary tree network of rank $k^{O(°(G)\tw(G))}$, allowing us to reduce to the case of tree tensor networks. Finally, we give new fixed-parameter tractable algorithms for the tensor train, Tucker, and CP decompositions, which are simpler than those of \cite{swz19_tensor_low_rank} since they do not make use of polynomial system solvers. Our technique of Gaussian subspace embeddings with exactly $k$ rows (and thus exponentially small success probability) may be of independent interest.
summary: We study low rank approximation of tensors, focusing on the tensor train and Tucker decompositions, as well as approximations with tree tensor networks and more general tensor networks. For tensor train decomposition, we give a bicriteria $(1 + \eps)$-approximation algorithm with a small bicriteria rank and $O(q \cdot \nnz(A))$ running time, up to lower order terms, which improves over the additive error algorithm of \cite{huber2017randomized}. We also show how to convert the algorithm of \cite{huber2017randomized} into a relative error algorithm, but their algorithm necessarily has a running time of $O(qr^2 \cdot \nnz(A)) + n \cdot \poly(qk/\eps)$ when converted to a $(1 + \eps)$-approximation algorithm with bicriteria rank $r$. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to achieve polynomial time relative error approximation for tensor train decomposition. Our key technique is a method for obtaining subspace embeddings with a number of rows polynomial in $q$ for a matrix which is the flattening of a tensor train of $q$ tensors. We extend our algorithm to tree tensor networks. In addition, we extend our algorithm to tensor networks with arbitrary graphs (which we refer to as general tensor networks), by using a result of \cite{ms08_simulating_quantum_tensor_contraction} and showing that a general tensor network of rank $k$ can be contracted to a binary tree network of rank $k^{O(°(G)\tw(G))}$, allowing us to reduce to the case of tree tensor networks. Finally, we give new fixed-parameter tractable algorithms for the tensor train, Tucker, and CP decompositions, which are simpler than those of \cite{swz19_tensor_low_rank} since they do not make use of polynomial system solvers. Our technique of Gaussian subspace embeddings with exactly $k$ rows (and thus exponentially small success probability) may be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 我们研究张量的低秩近似，重点关注张量序列和塔克分解，以及树张量网络和更一般的张量网络的近似。对于张量训练分解，我们给出了一个双标准$(1 + \eps)$-近似算法，具有较小的双标准等级和$O(q \cdot \nnz(A))$运行时间，直到低阶项，这比\cite{huber2017randomized}的加性误差算法有所改进。我们还展示了如何将 \cite{huber2017randomized} 的算法转换为相对误差算法，但当转换为双标准等级为 $r$ 的 $(1 + \eps)$ 近似算法时，它们的算法必然具有 $O(qr^2 \cdot \nnz(A)) + n \cdot \poly(qk/\eps)$ 的运行时间。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个实现张量序列分解的多项式时间相对误差近似的工作。我们的关键技术是一种获得子空间嵌入的方法，该子空间嵌入具有 $q$ 中的多个行多项式，该矩阵是 $q$ 张量张量序列的展平。我们将算法扩展到树张量网络。此外，我们将算法扩展到具有任意图的张量网络（我们将其称为一般张量网络），通过使用 \cite{ms08_simulated_quantum_tensor_contraction} 的结果，并表明等级 $k$ 的一般张量网络可以收缩为等级 $k^{O(°(G)\tw(G))}$ 的二叉树网络，从而允许我们简化为树张量网络的情况。最后，我们为张量训练、Tucker 和 CP 分解提供了新的固定参数易处理算法，这些算法比 swz19_tensor_low_rank 的算法更简单，因为它们不使用多项式系统求解器。我们的高斯子空间嵌入技术恰好具有 $k$ 行（因此成功概率呈指数级小）可能具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究张量分解的低秩近似，提出近线性时间和固定参数可解算法，重点针对张量列车分解、Tucker分解及树状张量网络。
AI.motivation: 现有张量分解算法在时间和参数复杂度上存在局限，需更高效且适用于复杂网络结构的近似方法。
AI.method: 设计双标准近似算法与子空间嵌入技术，结合树状网络收缩方法，扩展至通用张量网络并简化固定参数分解流程。
AI.result: 首次实现多项式时间相对误差张量列车分解，提出适用于树状及通用张量网络的算法，并给出更简洁的固定参数可解分解方法。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为张量分解提供了高效算法框架，其子空间嵌入技术与网络收缩方法对相关领域具有独立研究价值。

nz(A)) + n \cdot \poly(qk/\eps)$ 的运行时间。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个实现张量序列分解的多项式时间相对误差近似的工作。我们的关键技术是一种获得子空间嵌入的方法，该子空间嵌入具有 $q$ 中的多个行多项式，该矩阵是 $q$ 张量张量序列的展平。我们将算法扩展到树张量网络。此外，我们将算法扩展到具有任意图的张量网络（我们将其称为一般张量网络），通过使用 \cite{ms08_simulated_quantum_tensor_contraction} 的结果，并表明等级 $k$ 的一般张量网络可以收缩为等级 $k^{O(°(G)	w(G))}$ 的二叉树网络，从而允许我们简化为树张量网络的情况。最后，我们为张量训练、Tucker 和 CP 分解提供了新的固定参数易处理算法，这些算法比 swz19_tensor_low_rank 的算法更简单，因为它们不使用多项式系统求解器。我们的高斯子空间嵌入技术恰好具有 $k$ 行（因此成功概率呈指数级小）可能具有独立的意义。 本文研究张量分解的低秩近似，提出近线性时间和固定参数可解算法，重点针对张量列车分解、Tucker分解及树状张量网络。 Arvind V. Mahankali,David P. Woodruff,Ziyu Zhang cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Tianyu Zhao,Ruoxi Lyu,He Wang,Zhoujian Cao,Zhixiang Ren
title: Space-based gravitational wave signal detection and extraction with deep neural network
title_zh: 深度神经网络天基引力波信号检测与提取
abstract: Space-based gravitational wave (GW) detectors will be able to observe signals from sources that are otherwise nearly impossible from current ground-based detection. Consequently, the well established signal detection method, matched filtering, will require a complex template bank, leading to a computational cost that is too expensive in practice. Here, we develop a high-accuracy GW signal detection and extraction method for all space-based GW sources. As a proof of concept, we show that a science-driven and uniform multi-stage self-attention-based deep neural network can identify synthetic signals that are submerged in Gaussian noise. Our method exhibits a detection rate exceeding 99% in identifying signals from various sources, with the signal-to-noise ratio at 50, at a false alarm rate of 1%. while obtaining at least 95% similarity compared with target signals. We further demonstrate the interpretability and strong generalization behavior for several extended scenarios.
summary: Space-based gravitational wave (GW) detectors will be able to observe signals from sources that are otherwise nearly impossible from current ground-based detection. Consequently, the well established signal detection method, matched filtering, will require a complex template bank, leading to a computational cost that is too expensive in practice. Here, we develop a high-accuracy GW signal detection and extraction method for all space-based GW sources. As a proof of concept, we show that a science-driven and uniform multi-stage self-attention-based deep neural network can identify synthetic signals that are submerged in Gaussian noise. Our method exhibits a detection rate exceeding 99% in identifying signals from various sources, with the signal-to-noise ratio at 50, at a false alarm rate of 1%. while obtaining at least 95% similarity compared with target signals. We further demonstrate the interpretability and strong generalization behavior for several extended scenarios.
abstract_zh: 天基引力波（GW）探测器将能够观测到当前地面探测几乎不可能观测到的信号源。因此，完善的信号检测方法（匹配滤波）将需要复杂的模板库，导致实际中的计算成本过于昂贵。在这里，我们开发了一种适用于所有天基引力波源的高精度引力波信号检测和提取方法。作为概念证明，我们证明了科学驱动且统一的多级自注意力深度神经网络可以识别淹没在高斯噪声中的合成信号。我们的方法对各种来源的信号识别率超过 99%，信噪比为 50，误报率为 1%。同时与目标信号相比获得至少95%的相似度。我们进一步证明了几个扩展场景的可解释性和强泛化行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的空间基引力波信号检测与提取方法，以替代传统计算成本高昂的匹配滤波技术。
AI.motivation: 空间基引力波探测器需处理传统地面探测器无法观测的信号源，但现有匹配滤波方法因依赖复杂模板库导致计算成本过高。
AI.method: 开发了以多阶段自注意力机制为核心的深度神经网络，通过合成信号验证其检测能力，并测试其可解释性与泛化性。
AI.result: 在信噪比50时实现99%检测率（误报率1%），信号相似度达95%，且在扩展场景中展现良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算成本，为未来空间基引力波探测提供了高效可靠的信号处理新范式。

authors_text: Nicolás Schmidt,Jordi Pons,Marius Miron
title: PodcastMix: A dataset for separating music and speech in podcasts
title_zh: PodcastMix：用于分离播客中音乐和语音的数据集
comment: In proceedings of INTERSPEECH2022. Project webpage: http://www.jordipons.me/apps/podcastmix/
comments: In proceedings of INTERSPEECH2022. Project webpage: http://www.jordipons.me/apps/podcastmix/
abstract: We introduce PodcastMix, a dataset formalizing the task of separating background music and foreground speech in podcasts. We aim at defining a benchmark suitable for training and evaluating (deep learning) source separation models. To that end, we release a large and diverse training dataset based on programatically generated podcasts. However, current (deep learning) models can incur into generalization issues, specially when trained on synthetic data. To target potential generalization issues, we release an evaluation set based on real podcasts for which we design objective and subjective tests. Out of our experiments with real podcasts, we find that current (deep learning) models may have generalization issues. Yet, these can perform competently, e.g., our best baseline separates speech with a mean opinion score of 3.84 (rating "overall separation quality" from 1 to 5). The dataset and baselines are accessible online.
summary: We introduce PodcastMix, a dataset formalizing the task of separating background music and foreground speech in podcasts. We aim at defining a benchmark suitable for training and evaluating (deep learning) source separation models. To that end, we release a large and diverse training dataset based on programatically generated podcasts. However, current (deep learning) models can incur into generalization issues, specially when trained on synthetic data. To target potential generalization issues, we release an evaluation set based on real podcasts for which we design objective and subjective tests. Out of our experiments with real podcasts, we find that current (deep learning) models may have generalization issues. Yet, these can perform competently, e.g., our best baseline separates speech with a mean opinion score of 3.84 (rating "overall separation quality" from 1 to 5). The dataset and baselines are accessible online.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 PodcastMix，这是一个数据集，它正式化了播客中分离背景音乐和前景语音的任务。我们的目标是定义一个适合训练和评估（深度学习）源分离模型的基准。为此，我们发布了基于编程生成的播客的大型且多样化的训练数据集。然而，当前的（深度学习）模型可能会出现泛化问题，特别是在合成数据上进行训练时。为了解决潜在的泛化问题，我们发布了基于真实播客的评估集，并为其设计了客观和主观测试。通过对真实播客的实验，我们发现当前（深度学习）模型可能存在泛化问题。然而，这些可以很好地执行，例如，我们的最佳基线以平均意见得分 3.84 来分离语音（对“总体分离质量”进行从 1 到 5 的评分）。数据集和基线可在线访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PodcastMix数据集，用于解决播客中背景音乐与前景语音分离的任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在合成数据上训练时可能存在泛化问题，需基于真实数据的评估基准来验证模型性能。
AI.method: 构建程序生成的大型训练数据集，并发布基于真实播客的评估集，结合客观与主观测试进行模型评估。
AI.result: 实验表明当前模型存在泛化问题，但最佳基线模型在语音分离任务中获得3.84的平均意见得分（满分5分）。
AI.conclusion: 数据集和基线模型已公开，为源分离研究提供资源，同时揭示了模型在真实场景中的性能挑战。

authors_text: Panagiotis Kourtesis,Sebastian Vizcay,Maud Marchal,Claudio Pacchierotti,Ferran Argelaguet
title: Action-Specific Perception & Performance on a Fitts's Law Task in Virtual Reality: The Role of Haptic Feedback
title_zh: 虚拟现实中菲茨定律任务的具体动作感知和表现：触觉反馈的作用
comment: 12 pages, 3 tables, 9 figures, submitted and accepted to the Journal Track of the International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality(ISMAR 2022). It will be published in the journal IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
comments: 12 pages, 3 tables, 9 figures, submitted and accepted to the Journal Track of the International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality(ISMAR 2022). It will be published in the journal IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: While user's perception & performance are predominantly examined independently in virtual reality, the Action-Specific Perception (ASP) theory postulates that the performance of an individual on a task modulates this individual's spatial & time perception pertinent to the task's components & procedures. This paper examines the association between performance & perception & the potential effects that tactile feedback modalities could generate. This paper reports a user study (N=24), in which participants performed a Fitts's law target acquisition task by using three feedback modalities: visual, visuo-electrotactile, & visuo-vibrotactile. The users completed 3 Target Sizes X 2 Distances X 3 feedback modalities = 18 trials. The size perception, distance perception, & (movement) time perception were assessed at the end of each trial. Performance-wise, the results showed that electrotactile feedback facilitates a significantly better accuracy compared to vibrotactile & visual feedback, while vibrotactile provided the worst accuracy. Electrotactile & visual feedback enabled a comparable reaction time, while the vibrotactile offered a substantially slower reaction time than visual feedback. Although amongst feedback types the pattern of differences in perceptual aspects were comparable to performance differences, none of them was statistically significant. However, performance indeed modulated perception. Significant action-specific effects on spatial & time perception were detected. Changes in accuracy modulate both size perception & time perception, while changes in movement speed modulate distance perception. Also, the index of difficulty was found to modulate perception. These outcomes highlighted the importance of haptic feedback on performance, & importantly the significance of action-specific effects on spatial & time perception in VR, which should be considered in future VR studies.

The users completed 3 Target Sizes X 2 Distances X 3 feedback modalities = 18 trials. The size perception, distance perception, & (movement) time perception were assessed at the end of each trial. Performance-wise, the results showed that electrotactile feedback facilitates a significantly better accuracy compared to vibrotactile & visual feedback, while vibrotactile provided the worst accuracy. Electrotactile & visual feedback enabled a comparable reaction time, while the vibrotactile offered a substantially slower reaction time than visual feedback. Although amongst feedback types the pattern of differences in perceptual aspects were comparable to performance differences, none of them was statistically significant. However, performance indeed modulated perception. Significant action-specific effects on spatial & time perception were detected. Changes in accuracy modulate both size perception & time perception, while changes in movement speed modulate distance perception. Also, the index of difficulty was found to modulate perception. These outcomes highlighted the importance of haptic feedback on performance, & importantly the significance of action-specific effects on spatial & time perception in VR, which should be considered in future VR studies.
abstract_zh: 虽然用户的感知和表现主要在虚拟现实中独立检查，但特定动作感知 (ASP) 理论假设个体在任务中的表现会调节该个体与任务的组成部分和过程相关的空间和时间感知。本文研究了表现与感知之间的关联以及触觉反馈方式可能产生的潜在影响。本文报告了一项用户研究（N=24），其中参与者使用三种反馈方式执行菲茨定律目标获取任务：视觉、视觉电触觉和视觉振动触觉。用户完成了 3 个目标尺寸 X 2 个距离 X 3 种反馈方式 = 18 次试验。在每次试验结束时评估尺寸感知、距离感知和（运动）时间感知。在性能方面，结果表明，与振动触觉和视觉反馈相比，电触觉反馈的准确性显着提高，而振动触觉反馈的准确性最差。电触觉和视觉反馈的反应时间相当，而振动触觉的反应时间比视觉反馈慢得多。尽管在反馈类型中，感知方面的差异模式与绩效差异相当，但它们都不具有统计显着性。然而，表现确实会调节感知。检测到对空间和时间感知的显着的特定动作影响。准确度的变化会调节尺寸感知和时间感知，而移动速度的变化会调节距离感知。此外，还发现难度指数可以调节感知。这些结果强调了触觉反馈对性能的重要性，以及重要的是 VR 中特定动作对空间和时间感知的影响的重要性，这应该在未来的 VR 研究中考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了虚拟现实环境中不同触觉反馈模式对用户执行Fitts定律任务时的感知与表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统研究将虚拟现实中的感知与表现分开考察，而动作特异性感知理论认为任务表现会调整个体的空间与时间感知。本文旨在验证触觉反馈对感知与表现的关联性及影响。
AI.method: 通过用户实验（N=24），让参与者在三种反馈模式（视觉、电触觉、振动触觉）下完成Fitts定律目标获取任务，涉及3种目标尺寸×2种距离×3种反馈模式共18次试验，评估尺寸、距离及运动时间感知。
AI.result: 电触觉反馈显著提升准确性，振动触觉最差；电触觉与视觉反馈反应时间相近，振动触觉反应时间更长。尽管感知差异未达统计学显著性，但表现确实调整个体感知：准确性影响尺寸与时间感知，运动速度影响距离感知，任务难度也调节感知。
AI.conclusion: 触觉反馈对虚拟现实中的任务表现至关重要，且动作特异性效应显著影响空间与时间感知，未来VR研究需纳入此因素。

search_text: Action-Specific Perception & Performance on a Fitts's Law Task in Virtual Reality: The Role of Haptic Feedback 虚拟现实中菲茨定律任务的具体动作感知和表现：触觉反馈的作用 While user's perception & performance are predominantly examined independently in virtual reality, the Action-Specific Perception (ASP) theory postulates that the performance of an individual on a task modulates this individual's spatial & time perception pertinent to the task's components & procedures. This paper examines the association between performance & perception & the potential effects that tactile feedback modalities could generate. This paper reports a user study (N=24), in which participants performed a Fitts's law target acquisition task by using three feedback modalities: visual, visuo-electrotactile, & visuo-vibrotactile. The users completed 3 Target Sizes X 2 Distances X 3 feedback modalities = 18 trials. The size perception, distance perception, & (movement) time perception were assessed at the end of each trial. Performance-wise, the results showed that electrotactile feedback facilitates a significantly better accuracy compared to vibrotactile & visual feedback, while vibrotactile provided the worst accuracy. Electrotactile & visual feedback enabled a comparable reaction time, while the vibrotactile offered a substantially slower reaction time than visual feedback. Although amongst feedback types the pattern of differences in perceptual aspects were comparable to performance differences, none of them was statistically significant. However, performance indeed modulated perception. Significant action-specific effects on spatial & time perception were detected. Changes in accuracy modulate both size perception & time perception, while changes in movement speed modulate distance perception. Also, the index of difficulty was found to modulate perception. These outcomes highlighted the importance of haptic feedback on performance, & importantly the significance of action-specific effects on spatial & time perception in VR, which should be considered in future VR studies. 虽然用户的感知和表现主要在虚拟现实中独立检查，但特定动作感知 (ASP) 理论假设个体在任务中的表现会调节该个体与任务的组成部分和过程相关的空间和时间感知。本文研究了表现与感知之间的关联以及触觉反馈方式可能产生的潜在影响。本文报告了一项用户研究（N=24），其中参与者使用三种反馈方式执行菲茨定律目标获取任务：视觉、视觉电触觉和视觉振动触觉。用户完成了 3 个目标尺寸 X 2 个距离 X 3 种反馈方式 = 18 次试验。在每次试验结束时评估尺寸感知、距离感知和（运动）时间感知。在性能方面，结果表明，与振动触觉和视觉反馈相比，电触觉反馈的准确性显着提高，而振动触觉反馈的准确性最差。电触觉和视觉反馈的反应时间相当，而振动触觉的反应时间比视觉反馈慢得多。尽管在反馈类型中，感知方面的差异模式与绩效差异相当，但它们都不具有统计显着性。然而，表现确实会调节感知。检测到对空间和时间感知的显着的特定动作影响。准确度的变化会调节尺寸感知和时间感知，而移动速度的变化会调节距离感知。此外，还发现难度指数可以调节感知。这些结果强调了触觉反馈对性能的重要性，以及重要的是 VR 中特定动作对空间和时间感知的影响的重要性，这应该在未来的 VR 研究中考虑。 本文探讨了虚拟现实环境中不同触觉反馈模式对用户执行Fitts定律任务时的感知与表现的影响。 Panagiotis Kourtesis,Sebastian Vizcay,Maud Marchal,Claudio Pacchierotti,Ferran Argelaguet cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Mark Dukes
title: A simple declarative model of the Federal Disaster Assistance Policy -- modelling and measuring transparency
title_zh: 联邦灾难援助政策的简单声明性模型——建模和衡量透明度
abstract: In this paper we will provide a quantitative analysis of a simple model of the Federal Disaster Assistance policy from the viewpoint of three different stakeholders. This quantitative methodology is new and has applications to other areas such as business and healthcare processes. The stakeholders are interested in process transparency but each has a different opinion on precisely what constitutes transparency. We will also consider three modifications to the Federal Disaster Assistance policy and analyse, from a stakeholder viewpoint, how stakeholder satisfaction changes from process to process. This analysis is used to rank the favourability of four policies with respect to all collective stakeholder preferences.
summary: In this paper we will provide a quantitative analysis of a simple model of the Federal Disaster Assistance policy from the viewpoint of three different stakeholders. This quantitative methodology is new and has applications to other areas such as business and healthcare processes. The stakeholders are interested in process transparency but each has a different opinion on precisely what constitutes transparency. We will also consider three modifications to the Federal Disaster Assistance policy and analyse, from a stakeholder viewpoint, how stakeholder satisfaction changes from process to process. This analysis is used to rank the favourability of four policies with respect to all collective stakeholder preferences.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将从三个不同利益相关者的角度对联邦灾难援助政策的简单模型进行定量分析。这种定量方法是新的，可应用于其他领域，例如业务和医疗保健流程。利益相关者对流程透明度感兴趣，但每个人对于透明度的具体构成有不同的看法。我们还将考虑对联邦灾难援助政策进行三项修改，并从利益相关者的角度分析利益相关者的满意度如何随流程而变化。该分析用于对四项政策相对于所有利益相关者集体偏好的有利程度进行排名。

AI.tldr: 构建联邦灾难援助政策的简单模型，从多方利益相关者视角分析透明度并评估政策修改对满意度的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以全面评估政策透明度，需通过量化分析满足多方利益相关者需求并拓展至其他领域。
AI.method: 采用定量分析方法，结合三方利益相关者视角，通过模拟政策修改对比满意度变化。
AI.result: 识别三种政策修改对满意度的影响差异，并基于集体偏好排序四种政策优劣。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效评估政策透明度，可指导灾难援助政策优化，且具备跨领域应用潜力。

authors_text: Kyrill Schmid,Lenz Belzner,Robert Müller,Johannes Tochtermann,Claudia Linnhoff-Popien
title: Stochastic Market Games
title_zh: 随机市场游戏
abstract: Some of the most relevant future applications of multi-agent systems like autonomous driving or factories as a service display mixed-motive scenarios, where agents might have conflicting goals. In these settings agents are likely to learn undesirable outcomes in terms of cooperation under independent learning, such as overly greedy behavior. Motivated from real world societies, in this work we propose to utilize market forces to provide incentives for agents to become cooperative. As demonstrated in an iterated version of the Prisoner's Dilemma, the proposed market formulation can change the dynamics of the game to consistently learn cooperative policies. Further we evaluate our approach in spatially and temporally extended settings for varying numbers of agents. We empirically find that the presence of markets can improve both the overall result and agent individual returns via their trading activities.
summary: Some of the most relevant future applications of multi-agent systems like autonomous driving or factories as a service display mixed-motive scenarios, where agents might have conflicting goals. In these settings agents are likely to learn undesirable outcomes in terms of cooperation under independent learning, such as overly greedy behavior. Motivated from real world societies, in this work we propose to utilize market forces to provide incentives for agents to become cooperative. As demonstrated in an iterated version of the Prisoner's Dilemma, the proposed market formulation can change the dynamics of the game to consistently learn cooperative policies. Further we evaluate our approach in spatially and temporally extended settings for varying numbers of agents. We empirically find that the presence of markets can improve both the overall result and agent individual returns via their trading activities.
abstract_zh: 多智能体系统的一些最相关的未来应用（例如自动驾驶或工厂即服务）显示了混合动机场景，其中智能体可能有相互冲突的目标。在这些设置中，智能体可能会在独立学习下的合作中学到不良结果，例如过度贪婪的行为。受现实世界社会的启发，在这项工作中，我们建议利用市场力量来激励代理人进行合作。正如囚徒困境的迭代版本所示，所提出的市场公式可以改变游戏的动态，以持续学习合作政策。此外，我们在空间和时间扩展设置中针对不同数量的代理评估我们的方法。我们凭经验发现，市场的存在可以通过交易活动提高整体结果和代理人的个人回报。

AI.tldr: 提出利用市场机制促进多智能体系统中的合作，解决独立学习导致的不良协作问题
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶等多智能体系统中，独立学习导致合作失败，需借助市场机制激励合作
AI.method: 通过迭代囚徒困境和扩展时空环境测试市场机制，利用交易活动激励合作
AI.result: 市场机制提升了整体结果和智能体个体回报，通过交易活动促进合作
AI.conclusion: 市场机制能有效促进多智能体系统合作，提升整体和个体收益

motivation: 在自动驾驶等多智能体系统中，独立学习导致合作失败，需借助市场机制激励合作
method: 通过迭代囚徒困境和扩展时空环境测试市场机制，利用交易活动激励合作
result: 市场机制提升了整体结果和智能体个体回报，通过交易活动促进合作
conclusion: 市场机制能有效促进多智能体系统合作，提升整体和个体收益
search_text: Stochastic Market Games 随机市场游戏 Some of the most relevant future applications of multi-agent systems like autonomous driving or factories as a service display mixed-motive scenarios, where agents might have conflicting goals. In these settings agents are likely to learn undesirable outcomes in terms of cooperation under independent learning, such as overly greedy behavior. Motivated from real world societies, in this work we propose to utilize market forces to provide incentives for agents to become cooperative. As demonstrated in an iterated version of the Prisoner's Dilemma, the proposed market formulation can change the dynamics of the game to consistently learn cooperative policies. Further we evaluate our approach in spatially and temporally extended settings for varying numbers of agents. We empirically find that the presence of markets can improve both the overall result and agent individual returns via their trading activities. 多智能体系统的一些最相关的未来应用（例如自动驾驶或工厂即服务）显示了混合动机场景，其中智能体可能有相互冲突的目标。在这些设置中，智能体可能会在独立学习下的合作中学到不良结果，例如过度贪婪的行为。受现实世界社会的启发，在这项工作中，我们建议利用市场力量来激励代理人进行合作。正如囚徒困境的迭代版本所示，所提出的市场公式可以改变游戏的动态，以持续学习合作政策。此外，我们在空间和时间扩展设置中针对不同数量的代理评估我们的方法。我们凭经验发现，市场的存在可以通过交易活动提高整体结果和代理人的个人回报。 提出利用市场机制促进多智能体系统中的合作，解决独立学习导致的不良协作问题 Kyrill Schmid,Lenz Belzner,Robert Müller,Johannes Tochtermann,Claudia Linnhoff-Popien cs.MA,cs.AI

authors_text: Junkun Jiang,Jie Chen,Yike Guo
title: A Dual-Masked Auto-Encoder for Robust Motion Capture with Spatial-Temporal Skeletal Token Completion
title_zh: 用于具有时空骨骼令牌完成功能的鲁棒运动捕捉的双掩码自动编码器
abstract: Multi-person motion capture can be challenging due to ambiguities caused by severe occlusion, fast body movement, and complex interactions. Existing frameworks build on 2D pose estimations and triangulate to 3D coordinates via reasoning the appearance, trajectory, and geometric consistencies among multi-camera observations. However, 2D joint detection is usually incomplete and with wrong identity assignments due to limited observation angle, which leads to noisy 3D triangulation results. To overcome this issue, we propose to explore the short-range autoregressive characteristics of skeletal motion using transformer. First, we propose an adaptive, identity-aware triangulation module to reconstruct 3D joints and identify the missing joints for each identity. To generate complete 3D skeletal motion, we then propose a Dual-Masked Auto-Encoder (D-MAE) which encodes the joint status with both skeletal-structural and temporal position encoding for trajectory completion. D-MAE's flexible masking and encoding mechanism enable arbitrary skeleton definitions to be conveniently deployed under the same framework. In order to demonstrate the proposed model's capability in dealing with severe data loss scenarios, we contribute a high-accuracy and challenging motion capture dataset of multi-person interactions with severe occlusion. Evaluations on both benchmark and our new dataset demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed model, as well as its advantage against the other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Multi-person motion capture can be challenging due to ambiguities caused by severe occlusion, fast body movement, and complex interactions. Existing frameworks build on 2D pose estimations and triangulate to 3D coordinates via reasoning the appearance, trajectory, and geometric consistencies among multi-camera observations. However, 2D joint detection is usually incomplete and with wrong identity assignments due to limited observation angle, which leads to noisy 3D triangulation results. To overcome this issue, we propose to explore the short-range autoregressive characteristics of skeletal motion using transformer. First, we propose an adaptive, identity-aware triangulation module to reconstruct 3D joints and identify the missing joints for each identity. To generate complete 3D skeletal motion, we then propose a Dual-Masked Auto-Encoder (D-MAE) which encodes the joint status with both skeletal-structural and temporal position encoding for trajectory completion. D-MAE's flexible masking and encoding mechanism enable arbitrary skeleton definitions to be conveniently deployed under the same framework. In order to demonstrate the proposed model's capability in dealing with severe data loss scenarios, we contribute a high-accuracy and challenging motion capture dataset of multi-person interactions with severe occlusion. Evaluations on both benchmark and our new dataset demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed model, as well as its advantage against the other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于严重遮挡、快速身体运动和复杂交互导致的模糊性，多人动作捕捉可能具有挑战性。现有框架建立在 2D 位姿估计的基础上，并通过推理多相机观察结果之间的外观、轨迹和几何一致性来三角测量到 3D 坐标。然而，2D 联合检测通常是不完整的，并且由于观察角度有限而导致错误的身份分配，从而导致 3D 三角测量结果存在噪声。为了克服这个问题，我们建议使用变压器探索骨骼运动的短程自回归特性。首先，我们提出了一种自适应、身份感知三角测量模块来重建 3D 关节并识别每个身份的缺失关节。为了生成完整的 3D 骨骼运动，我们提出了一种双掩码自动编码器 (D-MAE)，它通过骨骼结构和时间位置编码来编码关节状态，以完成轨迹。 D-MAE灵活的屏蔽和编码机制使得任意骨架定义可以方便地部署在同一框架下。为了证明所提出的模型处理严重数据丢失场景的能力，我们提供了具有严重遮挡的多人交互的高精度且具有挑战性的运动捕捉数据集。对基准和新数据集的评估证明了我们提出的模型的效率，以及它相对于其他最先进方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双掩码自编码器（D-MAE），用于解决多人运动捕捉中因严重遮挡和复杂交互导致的骨骼数据缺失问题，通过时空骨骼标记补全实现鲁棒的3D运动重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D姿态估计的3D运动捕捉方法因视角限制导致关节检测不完整和身份分配错误，进而产生噪声3D结果，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计自适应身份感知的三角化模块重建3D骨骼，并提出D-MAE通过骨骼结构与时间编码联合建模，结合灵活掩码机制实现任意骨骼定义的轨迹补全。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和作者构建的高精度多人大规模遮挡数据集上均优于现有方法，验证了模型在严重数据丢失场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: D-MAE通过时空联合建模和灵活掩码机制有效解决了运动捕捉中的骨骼缺失问题，方法具有跨骨骼定义的通用性，为复杂交互场景提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Yizheng Wu,Min Shi,Shuaiyuan Du,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Weicai Zhong
title: 3D Instances as 1D Kernels
title_zh: 3D 实例作为 1D 内核
abstract: We introduce a 3D instance representation, termed instance kernels, where instances are represented by one-dimensional vectors that encode the semantic, positional, and shape information of 3D instances. We show that instance kernels enable easy mask inference by simply scanning kernels over the entire scenes, avoiding the heavy reliance on proposals or heuristic clustering algorithms in standard 3D instance segmentation pipelines. The idea of instance kernel is inspired by recent success of dynamic convolutions in 2D/3D instance segmentation. However, we find it non-trivial to represent 3D instances due to the disordered and unstructured nature of point cloud data, e.g., poor instance localization can significantly degrade instance representation. To remedy this, we construct a novel 3D instance encoding paradigm. First, potential instance centroids are localized as candidates. Then, a candidate merging scheme is devised to simultaneously aggregate duplicated candidates and collect context around the merged centroids to form the instance kernels. Once instance kernels are available, instance masks can be reconstructed via dynamic convolutions whose weights are conditioned on instance kernels. The whole pipeline is instantiated with a dynamic kernel network (DKNet). Results show that DKNet outperforms the state of the arts on both ScanNetV2 and S3DIS datasets with better instance localization. Code is available: https://github.com/W1zheng/DKNet.
summary: We introduce a 3D instance representation, termed instance kernels, where instances are represented by one-dimensional vectors that encode the semantic, positional, and shape information of 3D instances. We show that instance kernels enable easy mask inference by simply scanning kernels over the entire scenes, avoiding the heavy reliance on proposals or heuristic clustering algorithms in standard 3D instance segmentation pipelines. The idea of instance kernel is inspired by recent success of dynamic convolutions in 2D/3D instance segmentation. However, we find it non-trivial to represent 3D instances due to the disordered and unstructured nature of point cloud data, e.g., poor instance localization can significantly degrade instance representation. To remedy this, we construct a novel 3D instance encoding paradigm. First, potential instance centroids are localized as candidates. Then, a candidate merging scheme is devised to simultaneously aggregate duplicated candidates and collect context around the merged centroids to form the instance kernels. Once instance kernels are available, instance masks can be reconstructed via dynamic convolutions whose weights are conditioned on instance kernels. The whole pipeline is instantiated with a dynamic kernel network (DKNet). Results show that DKNet outperforms the state of the arts on both ScanNetV2 and S3DIS datasets with better instance localization. Code is available: https://github.com/W1zheng/DKNet.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种 3D 实例表示，称为实例内核，其中实例由对 3D 实例的语义、位置和形状信息进行编码的一维向量表示。我们表明，实例内核只需扫描整个场景的内核即可轻松进行掩码推理，避免了对标准 3D 实例分割管道中的提议或启发式聚类算法的严重依赖。实例内核的想法受到最近 2D/3D 实例分割中动态卷积的成功启发。然而，由于点云数据的无序性和非结构化性质，我们发现表示 3D 实例并不简单，例如，不良的实例定位会显着降低实例表示的质量。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了一种新颖的 3D 实例编码范例。首先，潜在的实例质心被本地化为候选。然后，设计候选合并方案以同时聚合重复的候选并收集合并质心周围的上下文以形成实例内核。一旦实例内核可用，就可以通过动态卷积来重建实例掩码，动态卷积的权重以实例内核为条件。整个管道是用动态内核网络（DKNet）实例化的。结果表明，DKNet 在 ScanNetV2 和 S3DIS 数据集上均优于现有技术，具有更好的实例定位。代码可用：https://github.com/W1zheng/DKNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将3D实例表示为一维向量的新型表示方法，通过动态卷积实现高效实例分割。
AI.motivation: 传统3D实例分割依赖复杂提案生成和聚类算法，难以处理点云数据的无序性问题，需寻找更高效的表示方式。
AI.method: 提出实例核表示法，通过定位候选中心、合并冗余候选并聚合上下文信息生成一维实例核，结合动态卷积重建实例掩码。
AI.result: 在ScanNetV2和S3DIS数据集上实现优于现有方法的实例定位精度，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 实例核表示法通过简化分割流程，为3D实例分割提供了新的高效解决方案。

The whole pipeline is instantiated with a dynamic kernel network (DKNet). Results show that DKNet outperforms the state of the arts on both ScanNetV2 and S3DIS datasets with better instance localization. Code is available: https://github.com/W1zheng/DKNet. 我们引入了一种 3D 实例表示，称为实例内核，其中实例由对 3D 实例的语义、位置和形状信息进行编码的一维向量表示。我们表明，实例内核只需扫描整个场景的内核即可轻松进行掩码推理，避免了对标准 3D 实例分割管道中的提议或启发式聚类算法的严重依赖。实例内核的想法受到最近 2D/3D 实例分割中动态卷积的成功启发。然而，由于点云数据的无序性和非结构化性质，我们发现表示 3D 实例并不简单，例如，不良的实例定位会显着降低实例表示的质量。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了一种新颖的 3D 实例编码范例。首先，潜在的实例质心被本地化为候选。然后，设计候选合并方案以同时聚合重复的候选并收集合并质心周围的上下文以形成实例内核。一旦实例内核可用，就可以通过动态卷积来重建实例掩码，动态卷积的权重以实例内核为条件。整个管道是用动态内核网络（DKNet）实例化的。结果表明，DKNet 在 ScanNetV2 和 S3DIS 数据集上均优于现有技术，具有更好的实例定位。代码可用：https://github.com/W1zheng/DKNet。 本文提出一种将3D实例表示为一维向量的新型表示方法，通过动态卷积实现高效实例分割。 Yizheng Wu,Min Shi,Shuaiyuan Du,Hao Lu,Zhiguo Cao,Weicai Zhong cs.CV

authors_text: Jianwei Lin,Jiatai Lin,Cheng Lu,Hao Chen,Huan Lin,Bingchao Zhao,Zhenwei Shi,Bingjiang Qiu,Xipeng Pan,Zeyan Xu,Biao Huang,Changhong Liang,Guoqiang Han,Zaiyi Liu,Chu Han
title: CKD-TransBTS: Clinical Knowledge-Driven Hybrid Transformer with Modality-Correlated Cross-Attention for Brain Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: CKD-TransBTS：临床知识驱动的混合变压器，具有模态相关的交叉注意力，用于脑肿瘤分割
abstract: Brain tumor segmentation (BTS) in magnetic resonance image (MRI) is crucial for brain tumor diagnosis, cancer management and research purposes. With the great success of the ten-year BraTS challenges as well as the advances of CNN and Transformer algorithms, a lot of outstanding BTS models have been proposed to tackle the difficulties of BTS in different technical aspects. However, existing studies hardly consider how to fuse the multi-modality images in a reasonable manner. In this paper, we leverage the clinical knowledge of how radiologists diagnose brain tumors from multiple MRI modalities and propose a clinical knowledge-driven brain tumor segmentation model, called CKD-TransBTS. Instead of directly concatenating all the modalities, we re-organize the input modalities by separating them into two groups according to the imaging principle of MRI. A dual-branch hybrid encoder with the proposed modality-correlated cross-attention block (MCCA) is designed to extract the multi-modality image features. The proposed model inherits the strengths from both Transformer and CNN with the local feature representation ability for precise lesion boundaries and long-range feature extraction for 3D volumetric images. To bridge the gap between Transformer and CNN features, we propose a Trans&CNN Feature Calibration block (TCFC) in the decoder. We compare the proposed model with five CNN-based models and six transformer-based models on the BraTS 2021 challenge dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed model achieves state-of-the-art brain tumor segmentation performance compared with all the competitors.
summary: Brain tumor segmentation (BTS) in magnetic resonance image (MRI) is crucial for brain tumor diagnosis, cancer management and research purposes. With the great success of the ten-year BraTS challenges as well as the advances of CNN and Transformer algorithms, a lot of outstanding BTS models have been proposed to tackle the difficulties of BTS in different technical aspects. However, existing studies hardly consider how to fuse the multi-modality images in a reasonable manner. In this paper, we leverage the clinical knowledge of how radiologists diagnose brain tumors from multiple MRI modalities and propose a clinical knowledge-driven brain tumor segmentation model, called CKD-TransBTS. Instead of directly concatenating all the modalities, we re-organize the input modalities by separating them into two groups according to the imaging principle of MRI. A dual-branch hybrid encoder with the proposed modality-correlated cross-attention block (MCCA) is designed to extract the multi-modality image features. The proposed model inherits the strengths from both Transformer and CNN with the local feature representation ability for precise lesion boundaries and long-range feature extraction for 3D volumetric images. To bridge the gap between Transformer and CNN features, we propose a Trans&CNN Feature Calibration block (TCFC) in the decoder. We compare the proposed model with five CNN-based models and six transformer-based models on the BraTS 2021 challenge dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed model achieves state-of-the-art brain tumor segmentation performance compared with all the competitors.
abstract_zh: 磁共振图像 (MRI) 中的脑肿瘤分割 (BTS) 对于脑肿瘤诊断、癌症管理和研究目的至关重要。随着十年BraTS挑战赛的巨大成功以及CNN和Transformer算法的进步，许多优秀的BTS模型被提出来解决BTS在不同技术方面的困难。然而，现有的研究很少考虑如何合理地融合多模态图像。在本文中，我们利用放射科医生如何通过多种 MRI 模式诊断脑肿瘤的临床知识，并提出了一种临床知识驱动的脑肿瘤分割模型，称为 CKD-TransBTS。我们没有直接连接所有模态，而是根据 MRI 成像原理将输入模态分为两组来重新组织输入模态。设计了一种具有所提出的模态相关交叉注意块（MCCA）的双分支混合编码器来提取多模态图像特征。该模型继承了 Transformer 和 CNN 的优点，具有精确病变边界的局部特征表示能力和 3D 体积图像的远程特征提取能力。为了弥合 Transformer 和 CNN 特征之间的差距，我们在解码器中提出了 Trans&CNN 特征校准块（TCFC）。我们将所提出的模型与 BraTS 2021 挑战数据集上的五个基于 CNN 的模型和六个基于 Transformer 的模型进行了比较。大量的实验表明，与所有竞争对手相比，所提出的模型实现了最先进的脑肿瘤分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合临床知识的混合Transformer模型CKD-TransBTS，用于改进多模态MRI脑肿瘤分割。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未能合理融合多模态MRI图像，且缺乏对放射科医生诊断流程的临床知识利用，导致分割精度不足。
AI.method: 基于MRI成像原理将模态分组，设计双分支混合编码器与模态相关交叉注意力模块（MCCA），结合Transformer的长程建模与CNN的局部特征提取能力，并引入Trans&CNN特征校准模块（TCFC）实现特征融合。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2021数据集上，该模型在五种CNN和六种Transformer基线模型中取得最先进的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 临床知识驱动的混合架构有效提升了多模态脑肿瘤分割精度，为医学影像分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fabian Wagner,Mareike Thies,Felix Denzinger,Mingxuan Gu,Mayank Patwari,Stefan Ploner,Noah Maul,Laura Pfaff,Yixing Huang,Andreas Maier
title: Trainable Joint Bilateral Filters for Enhanced Prediction Stability in Low-dose CT
title_zh: 用于增强低剂量 CT 预测稳定性的可训练联合双边滤波器
abstract: Low-dose computed tomography (CT) denoising algorithms aim to enable reduced patient dose in routine CT acquisitions while maintaining high image quality. Recently, deep learning~(DL)-based methods were introduced, outperforming conventional denoising algorithms on this task due to their high model capacity. However, for the transition of DL-based denoising to clinical practice, these data-driven approaches must generalize robustly beyond the seen training data. We, therefore, propose a hybrid denoising approach consisting of a set of trainable joint bilateral filters (JBFs) combined with a convolutional DL-based denoising network to predict the guidance image. Our proposed denoising pipeline combines the high model capacity enabled by DL-based feature extraction with the reliability of the conventional JBF. The pipeline's ability to generalize is demonstrated by training on abdomen CT scans without metal implants and testing on abdomen scans with metal implants as well as on head CT data. When embedding two well-established DL-based denoisers (RED-CNN/QAE) in our pipeline, the denoising performance is improved by $10\,\%$/$82\,\%$ (RMSE) and $3\,\%$/$81\,\%$ (PSNR) in regions containing metal and by $6\,\%$/$78\,\%$ (RMSE) and $2\,\%$/$4\,\%$ (PSNR) on head CT data, compared to the respective vanilla model. Concluding, the proposed trainable JBFs limit the error bound of deep neural networks to facilitate the applicability of DL-based denoisers in low-dose CT pipelines.
summary: Low-dose computed tomography (CT) denoising algorithms aim to enable reduced patient dose in routine CT acquisitions while maintaining high image quality. Recently, deep learning~(DL)-based methods were introduced, outperforming conventional denoising algorithms on this task due to their high model capacity. However, for the transition of DL-based denoising to clinical practice, these data-driven approaches must generalize robustly beyond the seen training data. We, therefore, propose a hybrid denoising approach consisting of a set of trainable joint bilateral filters (JBFs) combined with a convolutional DL-based denoising network to predict the guidance image. Our proposed denoising pipeline combines the high model capacity enabled by DL-based feature extraction with the reliability of the conventional JBF. The pipeline's ability to generalize is demonstrated by training on abdomen CT scans without metal implants and testing on abdomen scans with metal implants as well as on head CT data. When embedding two well-established DL-based denoisers (RED-CNN/QAE) in our pipeline, the denoising performance is improved by $10\,\%$/$82\,\%$ (RMSE) and $3\,\%$/$81\,\%$ (PSNR) in regions containing metal and by $6\,\%$/$78\,\%$ (RMSE) and $2\,\%$/$4\,\%$ (PSNR) on head CT data, compared to the respective vanilla model. Concluding, the proposed trainable JBFs limit the error bound of deep neural networks to facilitate the applicability of DL-based denoisers in low-dose CT pipelines.
abstract_zh: 低剂量计算机断层扫描 (CT) 降噪算法旨在减少常规 CT 采集中患者的剂量，同时保持高图像质量。最近，基于深度学习（DL）的方法被引入，由于其高模型容量，在该任务上优于传统的去噪算法。然而，为了将基于深度学习的去噪过渡到临床实践，这些数据驱动的方法必须能够稳健地推广到超出所见训练数据的范围。因此，我们提出了一种混合去噪方法，由一组可训练的联合双边滤波器（JBF）和基于卷积深度学习的去噪网络组成，以预测引导图像。我们提出的去噪管道将基于 DL 的特征提取实现的高模型容量与传统 JBF 的可靠性相结合。通过对无金属植入物的腹部 CT 扫描进行训练以及对有金属植入物的腹部扫描以及头部 CT 数据进行测试，证明了该流程的泛化能力。当在我们的管道中嵌入两个成熟的基于深度学习的降噪器 (RED-CNN/QAE) 时，去噪性能在包含金属的区域中提高了 $10\,\%$/$82\,\%$ (RMSE) 和 $3\,\%$/$81\,\%$ (PSNR)，在包含金属的区域中提高了 $6\,\%$/$78\,\%$ (RMSE) 和与相应的普通模型相比，头部 CT 数据的 $2\,\%$/$4\,\%$ (PSNR)。总之，所提出的可训练 JBF 限制了深度神经网络的误差范围，以促进基于 DL 的降噪器在低剂量 CT 管道中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合可训练联合双边滤波器（JBF）与深度学习网络的混合方法，以提高低剂量CT图像去噪的预测稳定性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习去噪方法在低剂量CT中表现优异，但缺乏对临床数据（如含金属植入物或头部CT）的泛化能力，需提升鲁棒性以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计包含可训练JBF的混合框架，利用卷积神经网络生成引导图像，并通过JBF增强稳定性，分别在腹部（含金属）和头部CT数据上验证泛化能力。
AI.result: 在含金属区域，RMSE和PSNR分别提升10%/82%和3%/81%；在头部CT数据中，RMSE提升6%/78%，PSNR提升2%/4%。
AI.conclusion: 可训练JBF通过限制深度网络误差边界，显著增强低剂量CT去噪模型的稳定性与临床适用性。

Concluding, the proposed trainable JBFs limit the error bound of deep neural networks to facilitate the applicability of DL-based denoisers in low-dose CT pipelines. 低剂量计算机断层扫描 (CT) 降噪算法旨在减少常规 CT 采集中患者的剂量，同时保持高图像质量。最近，基于深度学习（DL）的方法被引入，由于其高模型容量，在该任务上优于传统的去噪算法。然而，为了将基于深度学习的去噪过渡到临床实践，这些数据驱动的方法必须能够稳健地推广到超出所见训练数据的范围。因此，我们提出了一种混合去噪方法，由一组可训练的联合双边滤波器（JBF）和基于卷积深度学习的去噪网络组成，以预测引导图像。我们提出的去噪管道将基于 DL 的特征提取实现的高模型容量与传统 JBF 的可靠性相结合。通过对无金属植入物的腹部 CT 扫描进行训练以及对有金属植入物的腹部扫描以及头部 CT 数据进行测试，证明了该流程的泛化能力。当在我们的管道中嵌入两个成熟的基于深度学习的降噪器 (RED-CNN/QAE) 时，去噪性能在包含金属的区域中提高了 $10\,\%$/$82\,\%$ (RMSE) 和 $3\,\%$/$81\,\%$ (PSNR)，在包含金属的区域中提高了 $6\,\%$/$78\,\%$ (RMSE) 和与相应的普通模型相比，头部 CT 数据的 $2\,\%$/$4\,\%$ (PSNR)。总之，所提出的可训练 JBF 限制了深度神经网络的误差范围，以促进基于 DL 的降噪器在低剂量 CT 管道中的适用性。 本文提出一种结合可训练联合双边滤波器（JBF）与深度学习网络的混合方法，以提高低剂量CT图像去噪的预测稳定性。 Fabian Wagner,Mareike Thies,Felix Denzinger,Mingxuan Gu,Mayank Patwari,Stefan Ploner,Noah Maul,Laura Pfaff,Yixing Huang,Andreas Maier eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Robert Krauthgamer,Ron Mosenzon
title: Exact Flow Sparsification Requires Unbounded Size
title_zh: 精确的流稀疏化需要无限的尺寸
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures. The first version of this paper proved a weaker statement of Theorem 1.7 with 4 commodities. The current statement has only 3 commodities, and now fully refutes Seymour's conjectures
comments: 17 pages, 5 figures. The first version of this paper proved a weaker statement of Theorem 1.7 with 4 commodities. The current statement has only 3 commodities, and now fully refutes Seymour's conjectures
abstract: Given a large edge-capacitated network $G$ and a subset of $k$ vertices called terminals, an (exact) flow sparsifier is a small network $G'$ that preserves (exactly) all multicommodity flows that can be routed between the terminals. Flow sparsifiers were introduced by Leighton and Moitra [STOC 2010], and have been studied and used in many algorithmic contexts. A fundamental question that remained open for over a decade, asks whether every $k$-terminal network admits an exact flow sparsifier whose size is bounded by some function $f(k)$ (regardless of the size of $G$ or its capacities). We resolve this question in the negative by proving that there exist $6$-terminal networks $G$ whose flow sparsifiers $G'$ must have arbitrarily large size. This unboundedness is perhaps surprising, since the analogous sparsification that preserves all terminal cuts (called exact cut sparsifier or mimicking network) admits sparsifiers of size $f_0(k)\leq 2^{2^k}$ [Hagerup, Katajainen, Nishimura, and Ragde, JCSS 1998]. We prove our results by analyzing the set of all feasible demands in the network, known as the demand polytope. We identify an invariant of this polytope, essentially the slope of certain facets, that can be made arbitrarily large even for $k=6$, and implies an explicit lower bound on the size of the network. We further use this technique to answer, again in the negative, an open question of Seymour [JCTB 2015] regarding flow-sparsification that uses only contractions and preserves the infeasibility of one demand vector.
summary: Given a large edge-capacitated network $G$ and a subset of $k$ vertices called terminals, an (exact) flow sparsifier is a small network $G'$ that preserves (exactly) all multicommodity flows that can be routed between the terminals. Flow sparsifiers were introduced by Leighton and Moitra [STOC 2010], and have been studied and used in many algorithmic contexts. A fundamental question that remained open for over a decade, asks whether every $k$-terminal network admits an exact flow sparsifier whose size is bounded by some function $f(k)$ (regardless of the size of $G$ or its capacities). We resolve this question in the negative by proving that there exist $6$-terminal networks $G$ whose flow sparsifiers $G'$ must have arbitrarily large size. This unboundedness is perhaps surprising, since the analogous sparsification that preserves all terminal cuts (called exact cut sparsifier or mimicking network) admits sparsifiers of size $f_0(k)\leq 2^{2^k}$ [Hagerup, Katajainen, Nishimura, and Ragde, JCSS 1998]. We prove our results by analyzing the set of all feasible demands in the network, known as the demand polytope. We identify an invariant of this polytope, essentially the slope of certain facets, that can be made arbitrarily large even for $k=6$, and implies an explicit lower bound on the size of the network. We further use this technique to answer, again in the negative, an open question of Seymour [JCTB 2015] regarding flow-sparsification that uses only contractions and preserves the infeasibility of one demand vector.
abstract_zh: 给定一个大型边缘容量网络 $G$ 和称为终端的 $k$ 顶点子集，（精确）流稀疏器是一个小型网络 $G'$，它保留（精确）可以在终端之间路由的所有多商品流。流稀疏器由 Leighton 和 Moitra [STOC 2010] 引入，并已在许多算法环境中进行研究和使用。一个十多年来一直悬而未决的基本问题是，是否每个 $k$ 终端网络都承认一个精确的流稀疏器，其大小受到某个函数 $f(k)$ 的限制（无论 $G$ 的大小或其容量）。我们通过证明存在 $6$ 终端网络 $G$ 来解决这个问题，其流稀疏器 $G'$ 必须具有任意大的尺寸。这种无界性也许令人惊讶，因为保留所有终端切割的类似稀疏化（称为精确切割稀疏化器或模仿网络）允许大小为 $f_0(k)\leq 2^{2^k}$ 的稀疏化器 [Hagerup, Katajainen, Nishimura, and Ragde, JCSS 1998]。我们通过分析网络中所有可行需求的集合（称为需求多胞体）来证明我们的结果。我们确定了这个多面体的一个不变量，本质上是某些面的斜率，即使对于 $k=6$ 也可以任意大，并且意味着网络大小的明确下限。我们进一步使用这种技术来回答 Seymour [JCTB 2015] 的一个开放问题，该问题涉及仅使用收缩并保留一个需求向量的不可行性的流稀疏化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究是否存在仅依赖于终端数量k的函数f(k)，使得所有k终端网络均存在精确流稀疏化器。结果证明对于6终端网络，流稀疏化器大小必须无限大。
AI.motivation: 尽管精确割稀疏化器存在大小上限，但流稀疏化器的大小限制问题长期未解。该问题与网络流算法设计、复杂性分析等方向密切相关。
AI.method: 通过分析需求多面体的不变量（特定面的斜率），证明当k=6时该不变量可无限增大，从而推导出流稀疏化器大小的下界。
AI.result: 构造出6终端网络，其精确流稀疏化器大小必须无限大，否定存在f(k)的猜想；同时否定Seymour关于仅用收缩操作的流稀疏化问题的猜想。
AI.conclusion: 精确流稀疏化器的大小无法仅由终端数量k限制，与割稀疏化器存在本质差异，揭示了流问题与割问题在结构特性上的根本区别。

authors_text: Chaoqin Huang,Haoyan Guan,Aofan Jiang,Ya Zhang,Michael Spratling,Yan-Feng Wang
title: Registration based Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 基于注册的少样本异常检测
comment: ECCV 2022 Oral; Code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/RegAD
comments: ECCV 2022 Oral; Code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/RegAD
abstract: This paper considers few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD), a practical yet under-studied setting for anomaly detection (AD), where only a limited number of normal images are provided for each category at training. So far, existing FSAD studies follow the one-model-per-category learning paradigm used for standard AD, and the inter-category commonality has not been explored. Inspired by how humans detect anomalies, i.e., comparing an image in question to normal images, we here leverage registration, an image alignment task that is inherently generalizable across categories, as the proxy task, to train a category-agnostic anomaly detection model. During testing, the anomalies are identified by comparing the registered features of the test image and its corresponding support (normal) images. As far as we know, this is the first FSAD method that trains a single generalizable model and requires no re-training or parameter fine-tuning for new categories. Experimental results have shown that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art FSAD methods by 3%-8% in AUC on the MVTec and MPDD benchmarks.
summary: This paper considers few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD), a practical yet under-studied setting for anomaly detection (AD), where only a limited number of normal images are provided for each category at training. So far, existing FSAD studies follow the one-model-per-category learning paradigm used for standard AD, and the inter-category commonality has not been explored. Inspired by how humans detect anomalies, i.e., comparing an image in question to normal images, we here leverage registration, an image alignment task that is inherently generalizable across categories, as the proxy task, to train a category-agnostic anomaly detection model. During testing, the anomalies are identified by comparing the registered features of the test image and its corresponding support (normal) images. As far as we know, this is the first FSAD method that trains a single generalizable model and requires no re-training or parameter fine-tuning for new categories. Experimental results have shown that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art FSAD methods by 3%-8% in AUC on the MVTec and MPDD benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了少样本异常检测（FSAD），这是一种实用但尚未充分研究的异常检测（AD）设置，其中在训练时仅为每个类别提供有限数量的正常图像。到目前为止，现有的 FSAD 研究遵循标准 AD 所使用的每类别一个模型的学习范式，并且尚未探索类别间的共性。受到人类如何检测异常（即将有问题的图像与正常图像进行比较）的启发，我们在这里利用配准（一种本质上跨类别通用的图像对齐任务）作为代理任务来训练与类别无关的异常检测模型。在测试过程中，通过比较测试图像及其相应的支持（正常）图像的注册特征来识别异常。据我们所知，这是第一个训练单个可泛化模型并且不需要针对新类别进行重新训练或参数微调的 FSAD 方法。实验结果表明，该方法在 MVTec 和 MPDD 基准上的 AUC 优于最先进的 FSAD 方法 3%-8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像注册的少样本异常检测方法，通过跨类别通用的配准任务训练单一模型，无需针对新类别进行再训练。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本异常检测方法受限于每类单独训练的范式，未探索类别间共性。受人类通过比较待测图像与正常图像检测异常的启发，提出利用跨类别通用的图像配准任务训练通用模型。
AI.method: 以图像配准作为代理任务，通过对比测试图像与支持集（正常图像）的配准特征进行异常检测，训练过程无需类别特定参数调整。
AI.result: 在MVTec和MPDD基准测试中，AUC指标较现有SOTA方法提升3%-8%。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现无需再训练或参数调优的通用少样本异常检测模型，通过跨类别配准特征比较有效提升检测性能。

During testing, the anomalies are identified by comparing the registered features of the test image and its corresponding support (normal) images. As far as we know, this is the first FSAD method that trains a single generalizable model and requires no re-training or parameter fine-tuning for new categories. Experimental results have shown that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art FSAD methods by 3%-8% in AUC on the MVTec and MPDD benchmarks. 本文考虑了少样本异常检测（FSAD），这是一种实用但尚未充分研究的异常检测（AD）设置，其中在训练时仅为每个类别提供有限数量的正常图像。到目前为止，现有的 FSAD 研究遵循标准 AD 所使用的每类别一个模型的学习范式，并且尚未探索类别间的共性。受到人类如何检测异常（即将有问题的图像与正常图像进行比较）的启发，我们在这里利用配准（一种本质上跨类别通用的图像对齐任务）作为代理任务来训练与类别无关的异常检测模型。在测试过程中，通过比较测试图像及其相应的支持（正常）图像的注册特征来识别异常。据我们所知，这是第一个训练单个可泛化模型并且不需要针对新类别进行重新训练或参数微调的 FSAD 方法。实验结果表明，该方法在 MVTec 和 MPDD 基准上的 AUC 优于最先进的 FSAD 方法 3%-8%。 本文提出一种基于图像注册的少样本异常检测方法，通过跨类别通用的配准任务训练单一模型，无需针对新类别进行再训练。 Chaoqin Huang,Haoyan Guan,Aofan Jiang,Ya Zhang,Michael Spratling,Yan-Feng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Lingwei Dang,Yongwei Nie,Chengjiang Long,Qing Zhang,Guiqing Li
title: Diverse Human Motion Prediction via Gumbel-Softmax Sampling from an Auxiliary Space
title_zh: 通过辅助空间的 Gumbel-Softmax 采样进行多样化的人体运动预测
comment: Paper and Supp of our work accepted by ACM MM 2022
comments: Paper and Supp of our work accepted by ACM MM 2022
abstract: Diverse human motion prediction aims at predicting multiple possible future pose sequences from a sequence of observed poses. Previous approaches usually employ deep generative networks to model the conditional distribution of data, and then randomly sample outcomes from the distribution. While different results can be obtained, they are usually the most likely ones which are not diverse enough. Recent work explicitly learns multiple modes of the conditional distribution via a deterministic network, which however can only cover a fixed number of modes within a limited range. In this paper, we propose a novel sampling strategy for sampling very diverse results from an imbalanced multimodal distribution learned by a deep generative model. Our method works by generating an auxiliary space and smartly making randomly sampling from the auxiliary space equivalent to the diverse sampling from the target distribution. We propose a simple yet effective network architecture that implements this novel sampling strategy, which incorporates a Gumbel-Softmax coefficient matrix sampling method and an aggressive diversity promoting hinge loss function. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves both the diversity and accuracy of the samplings compared with previous state-of-the-art sampling approaches. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/Droliven/diverse_sampling.
summary: Diverse human motion prediction aims at predicting multiple possible future pose sequences from a sequence of observed poses. Previous approaches usually employ deep generative networks to model the conditional distribution of data, and then randomly sample outcomes from the distribution. While different results can be obtained, they are usually the most likely ones which are not diverse enough. Recent work explicitly learns multiple modes of the conditional distribution via a deterministic network, which however can only cover a fixed number of modes within a limited range. In this paper, we propose a novel sampling strategy for sampling very diverse results from an imbalanced multimodal distribution learned by a deep generative model. Our method works by generating an auxiliary space and smartly making randomly sampling from the auxiliary space equivalent to the diverse sampling from the target distribution. We propose a simple yet effective network architecture that implements this novel sampling strategy, which incorporates a Gumbel-Softmax coefficient matrix sampling method and an aggressive diversity promoting hinge loss function. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves both the diversity and accuracy of the samplings compared with previous state-of-the-art sampling approaches. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/Droliven/diverse_sampling.
abstract_zh: 多样化的人体运动预测旨在从观察到的姿势序列中预测多个可能的未来姿势序列。以前的方法通常采用深度生成网络来对数据的条件分布进行建模，然后从分布中随机采样结果。虽然可以获得不同的结果，但它们通常是最有可能的结果，但不够多样化。最近的工作通过确定性网络明确学习条件分布的多种模式，但只能覆盖有限范围内的固定数量的模式。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的采样策略，用于从深度生成模型学习的不平衡多模态分布中采样非常多样化的结果。我们的方法的工作原理是生成一个辅助空间，并巧妙地从辅助空间进行随机采样，相当于从目标分布中进行多样化采样。我们提出了一种简单而有效的网络架构来实现这种新颖的采样策略，该策略结合了 Gumbel-Softmax 系数矩阵采样方法和积极的多样性促进铰链损失函数。大量的实验表明，与以前最先进的采样方法相比，我们的方法显着提高了采样的多样性和准确性。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/Droliven/diverse_sampling 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过从辅助空间中进行Gumbel-Softmax采样来实现多样化人体运动预测的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在预测多样化人体运动时，通常只能生成最可能的结果，缺乏多样性；而现有方法虽然能学习多个条件分布模式，但模式数量和范围有限。
AI.method: 该方法通过生成辅助空间，并利用Gumbel-Softmax系数矩阵采样方法和一种促进多样性的铰链损失函数，实现从目标分布中进行多样化的采样。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多样性和准确性方面均显著优于现有最先进的采样方法。
AI.conclusion: 该论文提出的新采样策略有效提升了多样化人体运动预测的性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Svetlana Pavlitskaya,Bianca-Marina Codău,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Feasibility of Inconspicuous GAN-generated Adversarial Patches against Object Detection
title_zh: 针对目标检测的不显眼的 GAN 生成的对抗性补丁的可行性
comment: Accepted for publication at the IJCAI 2022 AISafety workshop
comments: Accepted for publication at the IJCAI 2022 AISafety workshop
abstract: Standard approaches for adversarial patch generation lead to noisy conspicuous patterns, which are easily recognizable by humans. Recent research has proposed several approaches to generate naturalistic patches using generative adversarial networks (GANs), yet only a few of them were evaluated on the object detection use case. Moreover, the state of the art mostly focuses on suppressing a single large bounding box in input by overlapping it with the patch directly. Suppressing objects near the patch is a different, more complex task. In this work, we have evaluated the existing approaches to generate inconspicuous patches. We have adapted methods, originally developed for different computer vision tasks, to the object detection use case with YOLOv3 and the COCO dataset. We have evaluated two approaches to generate naturalistic patches: by incorporating patch generation into the GAN training process and by using the pretrained GAN. For both cases, we have assessed a trade-off between performance and naturalistic patch appearance. Our experiments have shown, that using a pre-trained GAN helps to gain realistic-looking patches while preserving the performance similar to conventional adversarial patches.
summary: Standard approaches for adversarial patch generation lead to noisy conspicuous patterns, which are easily recognizable by humans. Recent research has proposed several approaches to generate naturalistic patches using generative adversarial networks (GANs), yet only a few of them were evaluated on the object detection use case. Moreover, the state of the art mostly focuses on suppressing a single large bounding box in input by overlapping it with the patch directly. Suppressing objects near the patch is a different, more complex task. In this work, we have evaluated the existing approaches to generate inconspicuous patches. We have adapted methods, originally developed for different computer vision tasks, to the object detection use case with YOLOv3 and the COCO dataset. We have evaluated two approaches to generate naturalistic patches: by incorporating patch generation into the GAN training process and by using the pretrained GAN. For both cases, we have assessed a trade-off between performance and naturalistic patch appearance. Our experiments have shown, that using a pre-trained GAN helps to gain realistic-looking patches while preserving the performance similar to conventional adversarial patches.
abstract_zh: 对抗性补丁生成的标准方法会产生嘈杂的显着模式，这些模式很容易被人类识别。最近的研究提出了几种使用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成自然补丁的方法，但其中只有少数在对象检测用例上进行了评估。此外，现有技术主要集中于通过将输入中的单个大边界框直接与补丁重叠来抑制输入中的单个大边界框。抑制补丁附近的对象是一项不同的、更复杂的任务。在这项工作中，我们评估了生成不显眼补丁的现有方法。我们采用了最初为不同计算机视觉任务开发的方法，以适应 YOLOv3 和 COCO 数据集的对象检测用例。我们评估了两种生成自然补丁的方法：将补丁生成合并到 GAN 训练过程中以及使用预训练的 GAN。对于这两种情况，我们评估了性能和自然斑块外观之间的权衡。我们的实验表明，使用预先训练的 GAN 有助于获得逼真的补丁，同时保持与传统对抗性补丁类似的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了使用GAN生成隐蔽对抗补丁在目标检测中的可行性，旨在生成更自然且不易被察觉的补丁以干扰检测系统。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗补丁存在明显噪声且难以抑制附近目标，现有研究缺乏对自然istic补丁在目标检测场景的系统评估。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv3和COCO数据集，对比两种GAN生成方法：1) 训练过程中集成补丁生成；2) 使用预训练GAN模型，分析自然度与攻击性能的权衡。
AI.result: 预训练GAN生成的补丁在视觉隐蔽性上优于训练集成方法，且保持与传统对抗补丁相当的检测干扰效果。
AI.conclusion: 预训练GAN为生成隐蔽对抗补丁提供了可行方案，未来需进一步优化生成质量与攻击鲁棒性的平衡。

authors_text: Yuxi Mi,Yuge Huang,Jiazhen Ji,Hongquan Liu,Xingkun Xu,Shouhong Ding,Shuigeng Zhou
title: DuetFace: Collaborative Privacy-Preserving Face Recognition via Channel Splitting in the Frequency Domain
title_zh: DuetFace：通过频域通道分裂进行协作隐私保护人脸识别
abstract: With the wide application of face recognition systems, there is rising concern that original face images could be exposed to malicious intents and consequently cause personal privacy breaches. This paper presents DuetFace, a novel privacy-preserving face recognition method that employs collaborative inference in the frequency domain. Starting from a counterintuitive discovery that face recognition can achieve surprisingly good performance with only visually indistinguishable high-frequency channels, this method designs a credible split of frequency channels by their cruciality for visualization and operates the server-side model on non-crucial channels. However, the model degrades in its attention to facial features due to the missing visual information. To compensate, the method introduces a plug-in interactive block to allow attention transfer from the client-side by producing a feature mask. The mask is further refined by deriving and overlaying a facial region of interest (ROI). Extensive experiments on multiple datasets validate the effectiveness of the proposed method in protecting face images from undesired visual inspection, reconstruction, and identification while maintaining high task availability and performance. Results show that the proposed method achieves a comparable recognition accuracy and computation cost to the unprotected ArcFace and outperforms the state-of-the-art privacy-preserving methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/TFace/tree/master/recognition/tasks/duetface.
summary: With the wide application of face recognition systems, there is rising concern that original face images could be exposed to malicious intents and consequently cause personal privacy breaches. This paper presents DuetFace, a novel privacy-preserving face recognition method that employs collaborative inference in the frequency domain. Starting from a counterintuitive discovery that face recognition can achieve surprisingly good performance with only visually indistinguishable high-frequency channels, this method designs a credible split of frequency channels by their cruciality for visualization and operates the server-side model on non-crucial channels. However, the model degrades in its attention to facial features due to the missing visual information. To compensate, the method introduces a plug-in interactive block to allow attention transfer from the client-side by producing a feature mask. The mask is further refined by deriving and overlaying a facial region of interest (ROI). Extensive experiments on multiple datasets validate the effectiveness of the proposed method in protecting face images from undesired visual inspection, reconstruction, and identification while maintaining high task availability and performance. Results show that the proposed method achieves a comparable recognition accuracy and computation cost to the unprotected ArcFace and outperforms the state-of-the-art privacy-preserving methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/TFace/tree/master/recognition/tasks/duetface.
abstract_zh: 随着人脸识别系统的广泛应用，人们越来越担心原始人脸图像可能会被恶意暴露，从而导致个人隐私泄露。本文提出了 DuetFace，一种采用频域协作推理的新型隐私保护人脸识别方法。从一个反直觉的发现出发，即人脸识别仅使用视觉上无法区分的高频通道就可以实现令人惊讶的良好性能，该方法根据可视化的重要性设计了可信的频率通道分割，并在非关键通道上运行服务器端模型。然而，由于缺少视觉信息，模型对面部特征的注意力下降。作为补偿，该方法引入了一个插件交互块，通过生成特征掩码来允许从客户端转移注意力。通过导出并覆盖面部感兴趣区域 (ROI)，进一步细化掩模。对多个数据集的大量实验验证了所提出的方法在保护人脸图像免受不需要的视觉检查、重建和识别的同时保持高任务可用性和性能的有效性。结果表明，所提出的方法实现了与未受保护的 ArcFace 相当的识别精度和计算成本，并且优于最先进的隐私保护方法。源代码位于https://github.com/Tencent/TFace/tree/master/recognition/tasks/duetface。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DuetFace，一种通过频域通道分割实现协作隐私保护的 face recognition 方法。
AI.motivation: 现有 face recognition 系统存在原始人脸图像泄露风险，需在保证识别性能的同时保护隐私。
AI.method: 通过频域通道分割策略，将关键视觉通道保留于客户端，非关键通道用于服务器端计算，并引入交互模块实现特征掩码生成与面部ROI叠加。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证有效，识别准确率与计算成本与ArcFace相当，优于现有隐私保护方法。
AI.conclusion: DuetFace 在保护人脸图像免受视觉检查与重建攻击的同时，实现了高任务可用性与识别性能。

search_text: DuetFace: Collaborative Privacy-Preserving Face Recognition via Channel Splitting in the Frequency Domain DuetFace：通过频域通道分裂进行协作隐私保护人脸识别 With the wide application of face recognition systems, there is rising concern that original face images could be exposed to malicious intents and consequently cause personal privacy breaches. This paper presents DuetFace, a novel privacy-preserving face recognition method that employs collaborative inference in the frequency domain. Starting from a counterintuitive discovery that face recognition can achieve surprisingly good performance with only visually indistinguishable high-frequency channels, this method designs a credible split of frequency channels by their cruciality for visualization and operates the server-side model on non-crucial channels. However, the model degrades in its attention to facial features due to the missing visual information. To compensate, the method introduces a plug-in interactive block to allow attention transfer from the client-side by producing a feature mask. The mask is further refined by deriving and overlaying a facial region of interest (ROI). Extensive experiments on multiple datasets validate the effectiveness of the proposed method in protecting face images from undesired visual inspection, reconstruction, and identification while maintaining high task availability and performance. Results show that the proposed method achieves a comparable recognition accuracy and computation cost to the unprotected ArcFace and outperforms the state-of-the-art privacy-preserving methods. The source code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/TFace/tree/master/recognition/tasks/duetface. 随着人脸识别系统的广泛应用，人们越来越担心原始人脸图像可能会被恶意暴露，从而导致个人隐私泄露。本文提出了 DuetFace，一种采用频域协作推理的新型隐私保护人脸识别方法。从一个反直觉的发现出发，即人脸识别仅使用视觉上无法区分的高频通道就可以实现令人惊讶的良好性能，该方法根据可视化的重要性设计了可信的频率通道分割，并在非关键通道上运行服务器端模型。然而，由于缺少视觉信息，模型对面部特征的注意力下降。作为补偿，该方法引入了一个插件交互块，通过生成特征掩码来允许从客户端转移注意力。通过导出并覆盖面部感兴趣区域 (ROI)，进一步细化掩模。对多个数据集的大量实验验证了所提出的方法在保护人脸图像免受不需要的视觉检查、重建和识别的同时保持高任务可用性和性能的有效性。结果表明，所提出的方法实现了与未受保护的 ArcFace 相当的识别精度和计算成本，并且优于最先进的隐私保护方法。源代码位于https://github.com/Tencent/TFace/tree/master/recognition/tasks/duetface。 本文提出DuetFace，一种通过频域通道分割实现协作隐私保护的 face recognition 方法。 Yuxi Mi,Yuge Huang,Jiazhen Ji,Hongquan Liu,Xingkun Xu,Shouhong Ding,Shuigeng Zhou cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Zongshun Wang,Yuping Shen
title: Fuzzy Labeling Semantics for Quantitative Argumentation
title_zh: 定量论证的模糊标签语义
abstract: Evaluating argument strength in quantitative argumentation systems has received increasing attention in the field of abstract argumentation. The concept of acceptability degree is widely adopted in gradual semantics, however, it may not be sufficient in many practical applications. In this paper, we provide a novel quantitative method called fuzzy labeling for fuzzy argumentation systems, in which a triple of acceptability, rejectability, and undecidability degrees is used to evaluate argument strength. Such a setting sheds new light on defining argument strength and provides a deeper understanding of the status of arguments. More specifically, we investigate the postulates of fuzzy labeling, which present the rationality requirements for semantics concerning the acceptability, rejectability, and undecidability degrees. We then propose a class of fuzzy labeling semantics conforming to the above postulates and investigate the relations between fuzzy labeling semantics and existing work in the literature.
summary: Evaluating argument strength in quantitative argumentation systems has received increasing attention in the field of abstract argumentation. The concept of acceptability degree is widely adopted in gradual semantics, however, it may not be sufficient in many practical applications. In this paper, we provide a novel quantitative method called fuzzy labeling for fuzzy argumentation systems, in which a triple of acceptability, rejectability, and undecidability degrees is used to evaluate argument strength. Such a setting sheds new light on defining argument strength and provides a deeper understanding of the status of arguments. More specifically, we investigate the postulates of fuzzy labeling, which present the rationality requirements for semantics concerning the acceptability, rejectability, and undecidability degrees. We then propose a class of fuzzy labeling semantics conforming to the above postulates and investigate the relations between fuzzy labeling semantics and existing work in the literature.
abstract_zh: 评估定量论证系统中的论证强度在抽象论证领域受到越来越多的关注。可接受度的概念在渐进语义中被广泛采用，但在许多实际应用中可能还不够。在本文中，我们为模糊论证系统提供了一种称为模糊标记的新颖定量方法，其中使用可接受性、拒绝性和不可判定性三重来评估论证强度。这样的设置为定义论证强度提供了新的思路，并提供了对论证状态的更深入的理解。更具体地说，我们研究了模糊标签的假设，它提出了有关可接受性、可拒绝性和不可判定性程度的语义合理性要求。然后，我们提出一类符合上述假设的模糊标记语义，并研究模糊标记语义与文献中现有工作之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 提出一种模糊标签语义方法，通过三元组评估定量论证中的论证强度
AI.motivation: 现有方法的可接受度概念在实际应用中可能不足，需更细致的评估
AI.method: 引入三元组（可接受度、可拒绝度、未定度）定义模糊标签，研究其公理并提出符合要求的语义
AI.result: 建立模糊标签语义的公理体系，提出符合的语义，并分析其与现有方法的关系
AI.conclusion: 模糊标签方法为定量论证系统提供了更深入的论证强度分析，拓展了渐进语义的应用
