authors_text: Khubaib Ahmed,Ahsan Adeel,Mario Franco,Mohsin Raza
title: Context-sensitive neocortical neurons transform the effectiveness and efficiency of neural information processing
title_zh: 上下文敏感的新皮质神经元改变神经信息处理的有效性和效率
abstract: Deep learning (DL) has big-data processing capabilities that are as good, or even better, than those of humans in many real-world domains, but at the cost of high energy requirements that may be unsustainable in some applications and of errors, that, though infrequent, can be large. We hypothesise that a fundamental weakness of DL lies in its intrinsic dependence on integrate-and-fire point neurons that maximise information transmission irrespective of whether it is relevant in the current context or not. This leads to unnecessary neural firing and to the feedforward transmission of conflicting messages, which makes learning difficult and processing energy inefficient. Here we show how to circumvent these limitations by mimicking the capabilities of context-sensitive neocortical neurons that receive input from diverse sources as a context to amplify and attenuate the transmission of relevant and irrelevant information, respectively. We demonstrate that a deep network composed of such local processors seeks to maximise agreement between the active neurons, thus restricting the transmission of conflicting information to higher levels and reducing the neural activity required to process large amounts of heterogeneous real-world data. As shown to be far more effective and efficient than current forms of DL, this two-point neuron study offers a possible step-change in transforming the cellular foundations of deep network architectures.
summary: Deep learning (DL) has big-data processing capabilities that are as good, or even better, than those of humans in many real-world domains, but at the cost of high energy requirements that may be unsustainable in some applications and of errors, that, though infrequent, can be large. We hypothesise that a fundamental weakness of DL lies in its intrinsic dependence on integrate-and-fire point neurons that maximise information transmission irrespective of whether it is relevant in the current context or not. This leads to unnecessary neural firing and to the feedforward transmission of conflicting messages, which makes learning difficult and processing energy inefficient. Here we show how to circumvent these limitations by mimicking the capabilities of context-sensitive neocortical neurons that receive input from diverse sources as a context to amplify and attenuate the transmission of relevant and irrelevant information, respectively. We demonstrate that a deep network composed of such local processors seeks to maximise agreement between the active neurons, thus restricting the transmission of conflicting information to higher levels and reducing the neural activity required to process large amounts of heterogeneous real-world data. As shown to be far more effective and efficient than current forms of DL, this two-point neuron study offers a possible step-change in transforming the cellular foundations of deep network architectures.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 的大数据处理能力与人类在许多现实世界领域中的处理能力一样好，甚至更好，但其代价是高能源需求，这在某些应用中可能不可持续，而且错误虽然不常见，但可能很大。我们假设深度学习的一个根本弱点在于它对整合和激发点神经元的内在依赖，这些神经元可以最大化信息传输，无论它是否与当前上下文相关。这会导致不必要的神经放电和冲突信息的前馈传输，从而使学习变得困难并且处理能量效率低下。在这里，我们展示了如何通过模仿上下文敏感新皮质神经元的能力来规避这些限制，这些神经元从不同来源接收输入作为上下文，分别放大和减弱相关和不相关信息的传输。我们证明，由此类本地处理器组成的深层网络旨在最大限度地提高活动神经元之间的一致性，从而限制冲突信息向更高级别的传输，并减少处理大量异构现实世界数据所需的神经活动。事实证明，这种两点神经元研究比当前的深度学习形式更加有效和高效，为改变深层网络架构的细胞基础提供了可能的阶跃变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过模仿上下文敏感的皮层神经元，改进深度学习的信息处理效率和效果，解决现有模型高能耗与错误率问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽具备强大数据处理能力，但依赖积分-触发点神经元导致不必要的神经放电与冲突信息传播，造成能耗高且学习效率低。
AI.method: 设计模仿上下文敏感神经元的深度网络，通过局部处理器调节信息传输，最大化活跃神经元一致性，抑制冲突信息向高层传递。
AI.result: 新方法在处理异构数据时显著降低神经活动能耗，较现有深度学习更高效，且能有效减少错误率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为深度网络架构的细胞基础革新提供可能，通过模拟生物神经元机制提升人工智能能效与准确性。

We hypothesise that a fundamental weakness of DL lies in its intrinsic dependence on integrate-and-fire point neurons that maximise information transmission irrespective of whether it is relevant in the current context or not. This leads to unnecessary neural firing and to the feedforward transmission of conflicting messages, which makes learning difficult and processing energy inefficient. Here we show how to circumvent these limitations by mimicking the capabilities of context-sensitive neocortical neurons that receive input from diverse sources as a context to amplify and attenuate the transmission of relevant and irrelevant information, respectively. We demonstrate that a deep network composed of such local processors seeks to maximise agreement between the active neurons, thus restricting the transmission of conflicting information to higher levels and reducing the neural activity required to process large amounts of heterogeneous real-world data. As shown to be far more effective and efficient than current forms of DL, this two-point neuron study offers a possible step-change in transforming the cellular foundations of deep network architectures. 深度学习 (DL) 的大数据处理能力与人类在许多现实世界领域中的处理能力一样好，甚至更好，但其代价是高能源需求，这在某些应用中可能不可持续，而且错误虽然不常见，但可能很大。我们假设深度学习的一个根本弱点在于它对整合和激发点神经元的内在依赖，这些神经元可以最大化信息传输，无论它是否与当前上下文相关。这会导致不必要的神经放电和冲突信息的前馈传输，从而使学习变得困难并且处理能量效率低下。在这里，我们展示了如何通过模仿上下文敏感新皮质神经元的能力来规避这些限制，这些神经元从不同来源接收输入作为上下文，分别放大和减弱相关和不相关信息的传输。我们证明，由此类本地处理器组成的深层网络旨在最大限度地提高活动神经元之间的一致性，从而限制冲突信息向更高级别的传输，并减少处理大量异构现实世界数据所需的神经活动。事实证明，这种两点神经元研究比当前的深度学习形式更加有效和高效，为改变深层网络架构的细胞基础提供了可能的阶跃变化。 本文提出通过模仿上下文敏感的皮层神经元，改进深度学习的信息处理效率和效果，解决现有模型高能耗与错误率问题。 Khubaib Ahmed,Ahsan Adeel,Mario Franco,Mohsin Raza cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaoxue Gao,Chitralekha Gupta,Haizhou Li
title: PoLyScriber: Integrated Fine-tuning of Extractor and Lyrics Transcriber for Polyphonic Music
title_zh: PoLyScriber：和弦音乐提取器和歌词转录器的集成微调
abstract: Lyrics transcription of polyphonic music is challenging as the background music affects lyrics intelligibility. Typically, lyrics transcription can be performed by a two-step pipeline, i.e. a singing vocal extraction front end, followed by a lyrics transcriber back end, where the front end and back end are trained separately. Such a two-step pipeline suffers from both imperfect vocal extraction and mismatch between front end and back end. In this work, we propose a novel end-to-end integrated fine-tuning framework, that we call PoLyScriber, to globally optimize the vocal extractor front end and lyrics transcriber back end for lyrics transcription in polyphonic music. The experimental results show that our proposed PoLyScriber achieves substantial improvements over the existing approaches on publicly available test datasets.
summary: Lyrics transcription of polyphonic music is challenging as the background music affects lyrics intelligibility. Typically, lyrics transcription can be performed by a two-step pipeline, i.e. a singing vocal extraction front end, followed by a lyrics transcriber back end, where the front end and back end are trained separately. Such a two-step pipeline suffers from both imperfect vocal extraction and mismatch between front end and back end. In this work, we propose a novel end-to-end integrated fine-tuning framework, that we call PoLyScriber, to globally optimize the vocal extractor front end and lyrics transcriber back end for lyrics transcription in polyphonic music. The experimental results show that our proposed PoLyScriber achieves substantial improvements over the existing approaches on publicly available test datasets.
abstract_zh: 复调音乐的歌词转录具有挑战性，因为背景音乐会影响歌词的清晰度。通常，歌词转录可以通过两步管道来执行，即歌声提取前端，然后是歌词转录器后端，其中前端和后端是分开训练的。这种两步管道会受到声音提取不完美以及前端和后端之间不匹配的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端集成微调框架，我们称之为 PoLyScriber，用于全局优化声音提取器前端和歌词转录器后端，用于复调音乐中的歌词转录。实验结果表明，我们提出的 PoLyScriber 在公开可用的测试数据集上比现有方法取得了实质性改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的集成微调框架PoLyScriber，用于优化多声部音乐中的歌词转录任务。
AI.motivation: 传统两步式方法存在声部提取不完美及前后端模型不匹配的问题，导致多声部音乐歌词转录效果受限。
AI.method: 设计集成微调框架PoLyScriber，联合优化声部提取器与歌词转录器，实现端到端全局优化。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上显著优于现有方法，证明了集成微调的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 集成微调方法能有效提升多声部音乐歌词转录准确性，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Xuhao Jiang,Weimin Tan,Ri Cheng,Shili Zhou,Bo Yan
title: Learning Parallax Transformer Network for Stereo Image JPEG Artifacts Removal
title_zh: 学习用于立体图像 JPEG 伪影去除的视差变换器网络
abstract: Under stereo settings, the performance of image JPEG artifacts removal can be further improved by exploiting the additional information provided by a second view. However, incorporating this information for stereo image JPEG artifacts removal is a huge challenge, since the existing compression artifacts make pixel-level view alignment difficult. In this paper, we propose a novel parallax transformer network (PTNet) to integrate the information from stereo image pairs for stereo image JPEG artifacts removal. Specifically, a well-designed symmetric bi-directional parallax transformer module is proposed to match features with similar textures between different views instead of pixel-level view alignment. Due to the issues of occlusions and boundaries, a confidence-based cross-view fusion module is proposed to achieve better feature fusion for both views, where the cross-view features are weighted with confidence maps. Especially, we adopt a coarse-to-fine design for the cross-view interaction, leading to better performance. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that our PTNet can effectively remove compression artifacts and achieves superior performance than other testing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Under stereo settings, the performance of image JPEG artifacts removal can be further improved by exploiting the additional information provided by a second view. However, incorporating this information for stereo image JPEG artifacts removal is a huge challenge, since the existing compression artifacts make pixel-level view alignment difficult. In this paper, we propose a novel parallax transformer network (PTNet) to integrate the information from stereo image pairs for stereo image JPEG artifacts removal. Specifically, a well-designed symmetric bi-directional parallax transformer module is proposed to match features with similar textures between different views instead of pixel-level view alignment. Due to the issues of occlusions and boundaries, a confidence-based cross-view fusion module is proposed to achieve better feature fusion for both views, where the cross-view features are weighted with confidence maps. Especially, we adopt a coarse-to-fine design for the cross-view interaction, leading to better performance. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that our PTNet can effectively remove compression artifacts and achieves superior performance than other testing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在立体设置下，通过利用第二视图提供的附加信息，可以进一步提高图像 JPEG 伪影去除的性能。然而，合并此信息以消除立体图像 JPEG 伪影是一个巨大的挑战，因为现有的压缩伪影使像素级视图对齐变得困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的视差变换器网络（PTNet）来集成立体图像对的信息，以消除立体图像 JPEG 伪影。具体来说，提出了一种精心设计的对称双向视差变换器模块来匹配不同视图之间具有相似纹理的特征，而不是像素级视图对齐。由于遮挡和边界问题，提出了一种基于置信度的跨视图融合模块，以实现两个视图更好的特征融合，其中跨视图特征用置信图进行加权。特别是，我们对跨视图交互采用了从粗到细的设计，从而获得了更好的性能。综合实验结果表明，我们的 PTNet 可以有效地消除压缩伪影，并实现比其他最先进的测试方法更优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于立体图像JPEG伪影去除的视差变换网络（PTNet），通过整合双视角信息提升去伪影效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在立体图像JPEG伪影去除中因压缩伪影导致像素级视图对齐困难，难以有效整合双视角信息，需改进。
AI.method: 设计对称双向视差变换模块匹配不同视角的纹理特征，结合置信度映射的跨视图融合模块，并采用粗到细的交互策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，PTNet在立体图像JPEG伪影去除任务中优于其他先进方法，具有更优性能。
AI.conclusion: PTNet通过有效整合双视角信息解决了像素级对齐难题，为立体图像JPEG伪影去除提供了新思路。

authors_text: Pappu Kumar Yadav,J. Alex Thomasson,Stephen W. Searcy,Robert G. Hardin,Ulisses Braga-Neto,Sorin C. Popescu,Daniel E. Martin,Roberto Rodriguez,Karem Meza,Juan Enciso,Jorge Solorzano Diaz,Tianyi Wang
title: Computer Vision for Volunteer Cotton Detection in a Corn Field with UAS Remote Sensing Imagery and Spot Spray Applications
title_zh: 利用 UAS 遥感图像和点喷雾应用，利用计算机视觉在玉米田中进行志愿棉花检测
abstract: To control boll weevil (Anthonomus grandis L.) pest re-infestation in cotton fields, the current practices of volunteer cotton (VC) (Gossypium hirsutum L.) plant detection in fields of rotation crops like corn (Zea mays L.) and sorghum (Sorghum bicolor L.) involve manual field scouting at the edges of fields. This leads to many VC plants growing in the middle of fields remain undetected that continue to grow side by side along with corn and sorghum. When they reach pinhead squaring stage (5-6 leaves), they can serve as hosts for the boll weevil pests. Therefore, it is required to detect, locate and then precisely spot-spray them with chemicals. In this paper, we present the application of YOLOv5m on radiometrically and gamma-corrected low resolution (1.2 Megapixel) multispectral imagery for detecting and locating VC plants growing in the middle of tasseling (VT) growth stage of cornfield. Our results show that VC plants can be detected with a mean average precision (mAP) of 79% and classification accuracy of 78% on images of size 1207 x 923 pixels at an average inference speed of nearly 47 frames per second (FPS) on NVIDIA Tesla P100 GPU-16GB and 0.4 FPS on NVIDIA Jetson TX2 GPU. We also demonstrate the application of a customized unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) for spot-spray applications based on the developed computer vision (CV) algorithm and how it can be used for near real-time detection and mitigation of VC plants growing in corn fields for efficient management of the boll weevil pests.
summary: To control boll weevil (Anthonomus grandis L.) pest re-infestation in cotton fields, the current practices of volunteer cotton (VC) (Gossypium hirsutum L.) plant detection in fields of rotation crops like corn (Zea mays L.) and sorghum (Sorghum bicolor L.) involve manual field scouting at the edges of fields. This leads to many VC plants growing in the middle of fields remain undetected that continue to grow side by side along with corn and sorghum. When they reach pinhead squaring stage (5-6 leaves), they can serve as hosts for the boll weevil pests. Therefore, it is required to detect, locate and then precisely spot-spray them with chemicals. In this paper, we present the application of YOLOv5m on radiometrically and gamma-corrected low resolution (1.2 Megapixel) multispectral imagery for detecting and locating VC plants growing in the middle of tasseling (VT) growth stage of cornfield. Our results show that VC plants can be detected with a mean average precision (mAP) of 79% and classification accuracy of 78% on images of size 1207 x 923 pixels at an average inference speed of nearly 47 frames per second (FPS) on NVIDIA Tesla P100 GPU-16GB and 0.4 FPS on NVIDIA Jetson TX2 GPU. We also demonstrate the application of a customized unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) for spot-spray applications based on the developed computer vision (CV) algorithm and how it can be used for near real-time detection and mitigation of VC plants growing in corn fields for efficient management of the boll weevil pests.
abstract_zh: 为了控制棉田中棉铃象甲虫 (Anthonomus grandis L.) 害虫的再次侵染，目前在玉米 (Zea mays L.) 和高粱 (Sorghum bicolor L.) 等轮作作物田地中进行自生棉 (VC) (Gossypium hirsutum L.) 植物检测的做法包括在田地边缘进行手动田间侦察。这导致许多生长在田地中央的 VC 植物未被发现，继续与玉米和高粱并列生长。当它们达到针头现蕾阶段（5-6叶）时，它们可以作为棉铃象甲害虫的宿主。因此，需要对其进行检测、定位，然后精确地对它们进行点喷。在本文中，我们介绍了 YOLOv5m 在辐射和伽马校正低分辨率（1.2 兆像素）多光谱图像上的应用，用于检测和定位玉米田抽雄 (VT) 生长阶段中期生长的 VC 植物。我们的结果表明，对于尺寸为 1207 x 923 像素的图像，在 NVIDIA Tesla P100 GPU-16GB 上平均推理速度接近 47 帧/秒 (FPS)，在 NVIDIA Jetson TX2 GPU 上平均推理速度为 0.4 FPS，可以以 79% 的平均精度 (mAP) 和 78% 的分类准确率检测 VC 植物。我们还展示了基于开发的计算机视觉 (CV) 算法的点喷应用定制无人机系统 (UAS) 的应用，以及如何将其用于近实时检测和缓解玉米田中生长的 VC 植物，从而有效管理棉铃象甲害虫。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用计算机视觉技术结合无人机遥感影像，在玉米田中检测杂草棉株并进行定点喷洒防治。
AI.motivation: 传统人工巡查无法及时发现玉米田中央的杂草棉株，导致其成为棉红铃虫宿主，需通过精准检测与定点喷药控制虫害。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv5m模型，采用辐射校正和伽马校正的低分辨率多光谱影像（1.2兆像素），在NVIDIA Tesla P100和Jetson TX2硬件上实现检测，结合定制无人机进行定点喷洒。
AI.result: 在1207x923像素图像上达到79%的mAP和78%的分类准确率，P100 GPU推理速度为47 FPS，Jetson TX2为0.4 FPS，并验证了无人机喷洒系统的实时性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了玉米田杂草棉株的自动化检测与精准防治，为棉红铃虫防控提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Computer Vision for Volunteer Cotton Detection in a Corn Field with UAS Remote Sensing Imagery and Spot Spray Applications 利用 UAS 遥感图像和点喷雾应用，利用计算机视觉在玉米田中进行志愿棉花检测 To control boll weevil (Anthonomus grandis L.) pest re-infestation in cotton fields, the current practices of volunteer cotton (VC) (Gossypium hirsutum L.) plant detection in fields of rotation crops like corn (Zea mays L.) and sorghum (Sorghum bicolor L.) involve manual field scouting at the edges of fields. This leads to many VC plants growing in the middle of fields remain undetected that continue to grow side by side along with corn and sorghum. When they reach pinhead squaring stage (5-6 leaves), they can serve as hosts for the boll weevil pests. Therefore, it is required to detect, locate and then precisely spot-spray them with chemicals. In this paper, we present the application of YOLOv5m on radiometrically and gamma-corrected low resolution (1.2 Megapixel) multispectral imagery for detecting and locating VC plants growing in the middle of tasseling (VT) growth stage of cornfield. Our results show that VC plants can be detected with a mean average precision (mAP) of 79% and classification accuracy of 78% on images of size 1207 x 923 pixels at an average inference speed of nearly 47 frames per second (FPS) on NVIDIA Tesla P100 GPU-16GB and 0.4 FPS on NVIDIA Jetson TX2 GPU. We also demonstrate the application of a customized unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) for spot-spray applications based on the developed computer vision (CV) algorithm and how it can be used for near real-time detection and mitigation of VC plants growing in corn fields for efficient management of the boll weevil pests. 为了控制棉田中棉铃象甲虫 (Anthonomus grandis L.) 害虫的再次侵染，目前在玉米 (Zea mays L.) 和高粱 (Sorghum bicolor L.) 等轮作作物田地中进行自生棉 (VC) (Gossypium hirsutum L.) 植物检测的做法包括在田地边缘进行手动田间侦察。这导致许多生长在田地中央的 VC 植物未被发现，继续与玉米和高粱并列生长。当它们达到针头现蕾阶段（5-6叶）时，它们可以作为棉铃象甲害虫的宿主。因此，需要对其进行检测、定位，然后精确地对它们进行点喷。在本文中，我们介绍了 YOLOv5m 在辐射和伽马校正低分辨率（1.2 兆像素）多光谱图像上的应用，用于检测和定位玉米田抽雄 (VT) 生长阶段中期生长的 VC 植物。我们的结果表明，对于尺寸为 1207 x 923 像素的图像，在 NVIDIA Tesla P100 GPU-16GB 上平均推理速度接近 47 帧/秒 (FPS)，在 NVIDIA Jetson TX2 GPU 上平均推理速度为 0.4 FPS，可以以 79% 的平均精度 (mAP) 和 78% 的分类准确率检测 VC 植物。我们还展示了基于开发的计算机视觉 (CV) 算法的点喷应用定制无人机系统 (UAS) 的应用，以及如何将其用于近实时检测和缓解玉米田中生长的 VC 植物，从而有效管理棉铃象甲害虫。 该论文提出利用计算机视觉技术结合无人机遥感影像，在玉米田中检测杂草棉株并进行定点喷洒防治。 Pappu Kumar Yadav,J. Alex Thomasson,Stephen W. Searcy,Robert G. Hardin,Ulisses Braga-Neto,Sorin C. Popescu,Daniel E. Martin,Roberto Rodriguez,Karem Meza,Juan Enciso,Jorge Solorzano Diaz,Tianyi Wang eess.IV,cs.AI

authors_text: Aurélien Colin,Pierre Tandeo,Charles Peureux,Romain Husson,Nicolas Longépé,Ronan Fablet
title: Rain regime segmentation of Sentinel-1 observation learning from NEXRAD collocations with Convolution Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络从 NEXRAD 搭配学习 Sentinel-1 观测的雨况分割
abstract: Remote sensing of rainfall events is critical for both operational and scientific needs, including for example weather forecasting, extreme flood mitigation, water cycle monitoring, etc. Ground-based weather radars, such as NOAA's Next-Generation Radar (NEXRAD), provide reflectivity and precipitation estimates of rainfall events. However, their observation range is limited to a few hundred kilometers, prompting the exploration of other remote sensing methods, particularly over the open ocean, that represents large areas not covered by land-based radars. Here we propose a deep learning approach to deliver a three-class segmentation of SAR observations in terms of rainfall regimes. SAR satellites deliver very high resolution observations with a global coverage. This seems particularly appealing to inform fine-scale rain-related patterns, such as those associated with convective cells with characteristic scales of a few kilometers. We demonstrate that a convolutional neural network trained on a collocated Sentinel-1/NEXRAD dataset clearly outperforms state-of-the-art filtering schemes such as the Koch's filters. Our results indicate high performance in segmenting precipitation regimes, delineated by thresholds at 24.7, 31.5, and 38.8 dBZ. Compared to current methods that rely on Koch's filters to draw binary rainfall maps, these multi-threshold learning-based models can provide rainfall estimation. They may be of interest in improving high-resolution SAR-derived wind fields, which are degraded by rainfall, and provide an additional tool for the study of rain cells.
summary: Remote sensing of rainfall events is critical for both operational and scientific needs, including for example weather forecasting, extreme flood mitigation, water cycle monitoring, etc. Ground-based weather radars, such as NOAA's Next-Generation Radar (NEXRAD), provide reflectivity and precipitation estimates of rainfall events. However, their observation range is limited to a few hundred kilometers, prompting the exploration of other remote sensing methods, particularly over the open ocean, that represents large areas not covered by land-based radars. Here we propose a deep learning approach to deliver a three-class segmentation of SAR observations in terms of rainfall regimes. SAR satellites deliver very high resolution observations with a global coverage. This seems particularly appealing to inform fine-scale rain-related patterns, such as those associated with convective cells with characteristic scales of a few kilometers. We demonstrate that a convolutional neural network trained on a collocated Sentinel-1/NEXRAD dataset clearly outperforms state-of-the-art filtering schemes such as the Koch's filters. Our results indicate high performance in segmenting precipitation regimes, delineated by thresholds at 24.7, 31.5, and 38.8 dBZ. Compared to current methods that rely on Koch's filters to draw binary rainfall maps, these multi-threshold learning-based models can provide rainfall estimation. They may be of interest in improving high-resolution SAR-derived wind fields, which are degraded by rainfall, and provide an additional tool for the study of rain cells.
abstract_zh: 降雨事件的遥感对于业务和科学需求至关重要，包括天气预报、极端洪水缓解、水循环监测等。地面天气雷达，例如 NOAA 的下一代雷达 (NEXRAD)，提供降雨事件的反射率和降水估计。然而，它们的观测范围仅限于几百公里，促使人们探索其他遥感方法，特别是在公海上，这代表了陆基雷达未覆盖的大片区域。在这里，我们提出了一种深度学习方法，根据降雨情况对 SAR 观测进行三级分割。 SAR 卫星提供覆盖全球的高分辨率观测结果。这似乎对于提供与降雨相关的细尺度模式特别有吸引力，例如与特征尺度为几公里的对流单元相关的模式。我们证明，在并置 Sentinel-1/NEXRAD 数据集上训练的卷积神经网络明显优于最先进的过滤方案（例如 Koch 过滤器）。我们的结果表明，在以 24.7、31.5 和 38.8 dBZ 阈值划分的降水状况分割方面具有较高的性能。与目前依靠科赫滤波器绘制二值降雨图的方法相比，这些基于多阈值学习的模型可以提供降雨估计。他们可能对改善高分辨率合成孔径雷达衍生的风场感兴趣，这些风场会因降雨而退化，并为雨细胞的研究提供额外的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用Sentinel-1合成孔径雷达（SAR）数据与NEXRAD雷达数据的联合定位，通过卷积神经网络（CNN）实现降雨制度的三类分割。
AI.motivation: 地面雷达观测范围有限，尤其在海洋区域缺乏覆盖，需探索基于SAR的高分辨率降雨监测方法以改进风场反演和降雨细胞研究。
AI.method: 构建卷积神经网络模型，以Sentinel-1 SAR观测与NEXRAD雷达数据的联合数据集为训练集，实现降雨强度的三阈值（24.7、31.5、38.8 dBZ）分割。
AI.result: 该模型在降雨制度分割任务中显著优于传统Koch滤波方法，能够提供更精确的降雨分布信息，有助于提升SAR反演风场的精度。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的降雨分割方法可有效利用SAR数据的全球覆盖优势，为高分辨率降雨监测和海洋气象研究提供新工具。

authors_text: Friedhelm Hamann,Guillermo Gallego
title: Stereo Co-capture System for Recording and Tracking Fish with Frame- and Event Cameras
title_zh: 用于使用帧相机和事件相机记录和跟踪鱼类的立体联合捕获系统
abstract: This work introduces a co-capture system for multi-animal visual data acquisition using conventional cameras and event cameras. Event cameras offer multiple advantages over frame-based cameras, such as a high temporal resolution and temporal redundancy suppression, which enable us to efficiently capture the fast and erratic movements of fish. We furthermore present an event-based multi-animal tracking algorithm, which proves the feasibility of the approach and sets the baseline for further exploration of combining the advantages of event cameras and conventional cameras for multi-animal tracking.
summary: This work introduces a co-capture system for multi-animal visual data acquisition using conventional cameras and event cameras. Event cameras offer multiple advantages over frame-based cameras, such as a high temporal resolution and temporal redundancy suppression, which enable us to efficiently capture the fast and erratic movements of fish. We furthermore present an event-based multi-animal tracking algorithm, which proves the feasibility of the approach and sets the baseline for further exploration of combining the advantages of event cameras and conventional cameras for multi-animal tracking.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了一种使用传统相机和事件相机进行多动物视觉数据采集的联合捕获系统。事件相机比基于帧的相机具有多种优势，例如高时间分辨率和时间冗余抑制，这使我们能够有效地捕捉鱼类快速且不稳定的运动。我们还提出了一种基于事件的多动物跟踪算法，证明了该方法的可行性，并为进一步探索结合事件相机和传统相机的多动物跟踪优势奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合传统帧相机与事件相机的立体共捕获系统，用于高效记录和追踪鱼类等快速运动的多动物目标。
AI.motivation: 传统帧相机在捕捉快速运动时存在运动模糊和冗余数据问题，而事件相机具有高时间分辨率和动态范围优势，需探索两者结合的多动物追踪方案。
AI.method: 设计立体视觉系统融合帧相机与事件相机数据，开发基于事件流的多动物跟踪算法，通过时空特征匹配实现对鱼类快速运动的精准捕捉。
AI.result: 验证了事件相机在高速运动场景下的有效性，建立了结合两种相机优势的多动物追踪基线方法，为后续研究提供参考框架。
AI.conclusion: 融合帧相机与事件相机的异构视觉系统可显著提升对快速运动生物的追踪性能，为多动物行为分析提供新思路。

search_text: Stereo Co-capture System for Recording and Tracking Fish with Frame- and Event Cameras 用于使用帧相机和事件相机记录和跟踪鱼类的立体联合捕获系统 This work introduces a co-capture system for multi-animal visual data acquisition using conventional cameras and event cameras. Event cameras offer multiple advantages over frame-based cameras, such as a high temporal resolution and temporal redundancy suppression, which enable us to efficiently capture the fast and erratic movements of fish. We furthermore present an event-based multi-animal tracking algorithm, which proves the feasibility of the approach and sets the baseline for further exploration of combining the advantages of event cameras and conventional cameras for multi-animal tracking. 这项工作介绍了一种使用传统相机和事件相机进行多动物视觉数据采集的联合捕获系统。事件相机比基于帧的相机具有多种优势，例如高时间分辨率和时间冗余抑制，这使我们能够有效地捕捉鱼类快速且不稳定的运动。我们还提出了一种基于事件的多动物跟踪算法，证明了该方法的可行性，并为进一步探索结合事件相机和传统相机的多动物跟踪优势奠定了基础。 本文提出一种结合传统帧相机与事件相机的立体共捕获系统，用于高效记录和追踪鱼类等快速运动的多动物目标。 Friedhelm Hamann,Guillermo Gallego cs.CV

authors_text: Rongyao Wang,Wenpeng Lu
title: Modeling Multi-interest News Sequence for News Recommendation
title_zh: 建模多兴趣新闻序列以进行新闻推荐
abstract: A session-based news recommender system recommends the next news to a user by modeling the potential interests embedded in a sequence of news read/clicked by her/him in a session. Generally, a user's interests are diverse, namely there are multiple interests corresponding to different types of news, e.g., news of distinct topics, within a session. %Modeling such multiple interests is critical for precise news recommendation. However, most of existing methods typically overlook such important characteristic and thus fail to distinguish and model the potential multiple interests of a user, impeding accurate recommendation of the next piece of news. Therefore, this paper proposes multi-interest news sequence (MINS) model for news recommendation. In MINS, a news encoder based on self-attention is devised on learn an informative embedding for each piece of news, and then a novel parallel interest network is devised to extract the potential multiple interests embedded in the news sequence in preparation for the subsequent next-news recommendations. The experimental results on a real-world dataset demonstrate that our model can achieve better performance than the state-of-the-art compared models.
summary: A session-based news recommender system recommends the next news to a user by modeling the potential interests embedded in a sequence of news read/clicked by her/him in a session. Generally, a user's interests are diverse, namely there are multiple interests corresponding to different types of news, e.g., news of distinct topics, within a session. %Modeling such multiple interests is critical for precise news recommendation. However, most of existing methods typically overlook such important characteristic and thus fail to distinguish and model the potential multiple interests of a user, impeding accurate recommendation of the next piece of news. Therefore, this paper proposes multi-interest news sequence (MINS) model for news recommendation. In MINS, a news encoder based on self-attention is devised on learn an informative embedding for each piece of news, and then a novel parallel interest network is devised to extract the potential multiple interests embedded in the news sequence in preparation for the subsequent next-news recommendations. The experimental results on a real-world dataset demonstrate that our model can achieve better performance than the state-of-the-art compared models.
abstract_zh: 基于会话的新闻推荐系统通过对用户在会话中阅读/点击的一系列新闻中嵌入的潜在兴趣进行建模，向用户推荐下一条新闻。一般来说，用户的兴趣是多种多样的，即在一个会话中，不同类型的新闻对应有多种兴趣，例如不同主题的新闻。 %对这种多重兴趣进行建模对于精准的新闻推荐至关重要。然而，大多数现有方法通常忽略了这一重要特征，因此无法区分和建模用户潜在的多种兴趣，从而妨碍了下一条新闻的准确推荐。因此，本文提出多兴趣新闻序列（MINS）模型进行新闻推荐。在MINS中，设计了一种基于自注意力的新闻编码器来学习每条新闻的信息嵌入，然后设计了一种新颖的并行兴趣网络来提取新闻序列中嵌入的潜在多个兴趣，为后续的下一条新闻推荐做好准备。真实数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的模型可以比最先进的比较模型获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多兴趣新闻序列建模的新闻推荐方法，通过捕捉用户会话中的多重兴趣提升推荐准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有新闻推荐方法未能有效区分用户在会话中的多维度兴趣，导致推荐结果不够精准。
AI.method: 设计基于自注意力机制的新闻编码器提取新闻特征，并构建并行兴趣网络挖掘序列中的潜在多兴趣表征。
AI.result: 在真实数据集实验中，MINS模型相较现有最优方法取得了更优的推荐性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模用户多兴趣特征，所提方法能有效提升新闻推荐系统的准确性与多样性。

authors_text: Naishan Zheng,Jie Huang,Qi Zhu,Man Zhou,Feng Zhao,Zheng-Jun Zha
title: Enhancement by Your Aesthetic: An Intelligible Unsupervised Personalized Enhancer for Low-Light Images
title_zh: 通过您的审美增强：一种可理解的、无监督的低光图像个性化增强器
abstract: Low-light image enhancement is an inherently subjective process whose targets vary with the user's aesthetic. Motivated by this, several personalized enhancement methods have been investigated. However, the enhancement process based on user preferences in these techniques is invisible, i.e., a "black box". In this work, we propose an intelligible unsupervised personalized enhancer (iUPEnhancer) for low-light images, which establishes the correlations between the low-light and the unpaired reference images with regard to three user-friendly attributions (brightness, chromaticity, and noise). The proposed iUP-Enhancer is trained with the guidance of these correlations and the corresponding unsupervised loss functions. Rather than a "black box" process, our iUP-Enhancer presents an intelligible enhancement process with the above attributions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm produces competitive qualitative and quantitative results while maintaining excellent flexibility and scalability. This can be validated by personalization with single/multiple references, cross-attribution references, or merely adjusting parameters.
summary: Low-light image enhancement is an inherently subjective process whose targets vary with the user's aesthetic. Motivated by this, several personalized enhancement methods have been investigated. However, the enhancement process based on user preferences in these techniques is invisible, i.e., a "black box". In this work, we propose an intelligible unsupervised personalized enhancer (iUPEnhancer) for low-light images, which establishes the correlations between the low-light and the unpaired reference images with regard to three user-friendly attributions (brightness, chromaticity, and noise). The proposed iUP-Enhancer is trained with the guidance of these correlations and the corresponding unsupervised loss functions. Rather than a "black box" process, our iUP-Enhancer presents an intelligible enhancement process with the above attributions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm produces competitive qualitative and quantitative results while maintaining excellent flexibility and scalability. This can be validated by personalization with single/multiple references, cross-attribution references, or merely adjusting parameters.
abstract_zh: 低光图像增强本质上是一个主观过程，其目标随用户的审美而变化。受此启发，人们研究了几种个性化增强方法。然而，这些技术中基于用户偏好的增强过程是不可见的，即“黑匣子”。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于低光图像的可理解的无监督个性化增强器（iUPEnhancer），它建立了低光图像和未配对参考图像之间关于三个用户友好属性（亮度、色度和噪声）的相关性。所提出的 iUP-Enhancer 是在这些相关性和相应的无监督损失函数的指导下进行训练的。我们的 iUP-Enhancer 不是一个“黑匣子”过程，而是提供了一个具有上述属性的可理解的增强过程。大量的实验表明，所提出的算法产生有竞争力的定性和定量结果，同时保持出色的灵活性和可扩展性。这可以通过使用单个/多个参考、交叉归因参考或仅调整参数的个性化来验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的无监督个性化低光图像增强方法iUPEnhancer，通过建立低光图像与参考图像在亮度、色度和噪声三个属性间的关联实现用户审美驱动的增强。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法缺乏对用户审美偏好的透明化表达，增强过程如同'黑箱'，无法满足个性化需求。
AI.method: 通过构建低光图像与无配对参考图像在亮度、色度和噪声三个用户友好属性间的关联，结合无监督损失函数训练模型，实现可解释的增强过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在定性和定量指标上均具有竞争力，支持单/多参考个性化、跨属性参考及参数调整等灵活应用场景。
AI.conclusion: iUPEnhancer为低光图像增强提供了可解释、可扩展的个性化解决方案，有效解决了传统方法的'黑箱'问题。

search_text: Enhancement by Your Aesthetic: An Intelligible Unsupervised Personalized Enhancer for Low-Light Images 通过您的审美增强：一种可理解的、无监督的低光图像个性化增强器 Low-light image enhancement is an inherently subjective process whose targets vary with the user's aesthetic. Motivated by this, several personalized enhancement methods have been investigated. However, the enhancement process based on user preferences in these techniques is invisible, i.e., a "black box". In this work, we propose an intelligible unsupervised personalized enhancer (iUPEnhancer) for low-light images, which establishes the correlations between the low-light and the unpaired reference images with regard to three user-friendly attributions (brightness, chromaticity, and noise). The proposed iUP-Enhancer is trained with the guidance of these correlations and the corresponding unsupervised loss functions. Rather than a "black box" process, our iUP-Enhancer presents an intelligible enhancement process with the above attributions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm produces competitive qualitative and quantitative results while maintaining excellent flexibility and scalability. This can be validated by personalization with single/multiple references, cross-attribution references, or merely adjusting parameters. 低光图像增强本质上是一个主观过程，其目标随用户的审美而变化。受此启发，人们研究了几种个性化增强方法。然而，这些技术中基于用户偏好的增强过程是不可见的，即“黑匣子”。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于低光图像的可理解的无监督个性化增强器（iUPEnhancer），它建立了低光图像和未配对参考图像之间关于三个用户友好属性（亮度、色度和噪声）的相关性。所提出的 iUP-Enhancer 是在这些相关性和相应的无监督损失函数的指导下进行训练的。我们的 iUP-Enhancer 不是一个“黑匣子”过程，而是提供了一个具有上述属性的可理解的增强过程。大量的实验表明，所提出的算法产生有竞争力的定性和定量结果，同时保持出色的灵活性和可扩展性。这可以通过使用单个/多个参考、交叉归因参考或仅调整参数的个性化来验证。 本文提出了一种可解释的无监督个性化低光图像增强方法iUPEnhancer，通过建立低光图像与参考图像在亮度、色度和噪声三个属性间的关联实现用户审美驱动的增强。 Naishan Zheng,Jie Huang,Qi Zhu,Man Zhou,Feng Zhao,Zheng-Jun Zha cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiazhen Ji,Huan Wang,Yuge Huang,Jiaxiang Wu,Xingkun Xu,Shouhong Ding,ShengChuan Zhang,Liujuan Cao,Rongrong Ji
title: Privacy-Preserving Face Recognition with Learnable Privacy Budgets in Frequency Domain
title_zh: 具有频域可学习隐私预算的隐私保护人脸识别
abstract: Face recognition technology has been used in many fields due to its high recognition accuracy, including the face unlocking of mobile devices, community access control systems, and city surveillance. As the current high accuracy is guaranteed by very deep network structures, facial images often need to be transmitted to third-party servers with high computational power for inference. However, facial images visually reveal the user's identity information. In this process, both untrusted service providers and malicious users can significantly increase the risk of a personal privacy breach. Current privacy-preserving approaches to face recognition are often accompanied by many side effects, such as a significant increase in inference time or a noticeable decrease in recognition accuracy. This paper proposes a privacy-preserving face recognition method using differential privacy in the frequency domain. Due to the utilization of differential privacy, it offers a guarantee of privacy in theory. Meanwhile, the loss of accuracy is very slight. This method first converts the original image to the frequency domain and removes the direct component termed DC. Then a privacy budget allocation method can be learned based on the loss of the back-end face recognition network within the differential privacy framework. Finally, it adds the corresponding noise to the frequency domain features. Our method performs very well with several classical face recognition test sets according to the extensive experiments.
summary: Face recognition technology has been used in many fields due to its high recognition accuracy, including the face unlocking of mobile devices, community access control systems, and city surveillance. As the current high accuracy is guaranteed by very deep network structures, facial images often need to be transmitted to third-party servers with high computational power for inference. However, facial images visually reveal the user's identity information. In this process, both untrusted service providers and malicious users can significantly increase the risk of a personal privacy breach. Current privacy-preserving approaches to face recognition are often accompanied by many side effects, such as a significant increase in inference time or a noticeable decrease in recognition accuracy. This paper proposes a privacy-preserving face recognition method using differential privacy in the frequency domain. Due to the utilization of differential privacy, it offers a guarantee of privacy in theory. Meanwhile, the loss of accuracy is very slight. This method first converts the original image to the frequency domain and removes the direct component termed DC. Then a privacy budget allocation method can be learned based on the loss of the back-end face recognition network within the differential privacy framework. Finally, it adds the corresponding noise to the frequency domain features. Our method performs very well with several classical face recognition test sets according to the extensive experiments.
abstract_zh: 人脸识别技术因其识别精度高而被应用于许多领域，包括移动设备的人脸解锁、社区门禁系统、城市监控等。由于目前的高精度是由非常深的网络结构保证的，因此面部图像往往需要传输到具有高算力的第三方服务器进行推理。然而，面部图像在视觉上揭示了用户的身份信息。在此过程中，不受信任的服务提供商和恶意用户都会显着增加个人隐私泄露的风险。当前的人脸识别隐私保护方法通常伴随着许多副作用，例如推理时间显着增加或识别准确性显着下降。本文提出了一种利用频域差分隐私保护隐私的人脸识别方法。由于差分隐私的利用，理论上提供了隐私的保证。同时，准确性的损失非常轻微。该方法首先将原始图像转换到频域并去除称为 DC 的直接分量。然后可以根据差分隐私框架内后端人脸识别网络的损失来学习隐私预算分配方法。最后，将相应的噪声添加到频域特征中。根据大量的实验，我们的方法在几个经典的人脸识别测试集上表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频率域可学习隐私预算的隐私保护人脸识别方法，通过差分隐私机制在保证高识别精度的同时保护用户隐私。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护人脸识别方法常伴随推理时间增加或精度显著下降的问题，需在理论隐私保障与实际性能间取得平衡。
AI.method: 将原始图像转换至频率域并移除直流分量，基于后端人脸识别网络损失在差分隐私框架下学习隐私预算分配策略，最终在频率域特征中添加噪声。
AI.result: 在多个经典人脸识别数据集上实验表明，该方法在保持高识别精度的同时有效保护了用户隐私。
AI.conclusion: 频率域差分隐私机制结合可学习隐私预算分配策略，为隐私保护人脸识别提供了理论保障与实际性能兼顾的解决方案。

authors_text: Shuguang Dou,Xinyang Jiang,Qingsong Zhao,Dongsheng Li,Cairong Zhao
title: Towards Privacy-Preserving Person Re-identification via Person Identify Shift
title_zh: 通过人员身份转变实现保护隐私的人员重新识别
abstract: Recently privacy concerns of person re-identification (ReID) raise more and more attention and preserving the privacy of the pedestrian images used by ReID methods become essential. De-identification (DeID) methods alleviate privacy issues by removing the identity-related of the ReID data. However, most of the existing DeID methods tend to remove all personal identity-related information and compromise the usability of de-identified data on the ReID task. In this paper, we aim to develop a technique that can achieve a good trade-off between privacy protection and data usability for person ReID. To achieve this, we propose a novel de-identification method designed explicitly for person ReID, named Person Identify Shift (PIS). PIS removes the absolute identity in a pedestrian image while preserving the identity relationship between image pairs. By exploiting the interpolation property of variational auto-encoder, PIS shifts each pedestrian image from the current identity to another with a new identity, resulting in images still preserving the relative identities. Experimental results show that our method has a better trade-off between privacy-preserving and model performance than existing de-identification methods and can defend against human and model attacks for data privacy.
summary: Recently privacy concerns of person re-identification (ReID) raise more and more attention and preserving the privacy of the pedestrian images used by ReID methods become essential. De-identification (DeID) methods alleviate privacy issues by removing the identity-related of the ReID data. However, most of the existing DeID methods tend to remove all personal identity-related information and compromise the usability of de-identified data on the ReID task. In this paper, we aim to develop a technique that can achieve a good trade-off between privacy protection and data usability for person ReID. To achieve this, we propose a novel de-identification method designed explicitly for person ReID, named Person Identify Shift (PIS). PIS removes the absolute identity in a pedestrian image while preserving the identity relationship between image pairs. By exploiting the interpolation property of variational auto-encoder, PIS shifts each pedestrian image from the current identity to another with a new identity, resulting in images still preserving the relative identities. Experimental results show that our method has a better trade-off between privacy-preserving and model performance than existing de-identification methods and can defend against human and model attacks for data privacy.
abstract_zh: 最近，行人重新识别（ReID）的隐私问题引起了越来越多的关注，保护 ReID 方法所使用的行人图像的隐私变得至关重要。去识别 (DeID) 方法通过删除与身份相关的 ReID 数据来缓解隐私问题。然而，大多数现有的 DeID 方法往往会删除所有与个人身份相关的信息，并损害去识别数据在 ReID 任务中的可用性。在本文中，我们的目标是开发一种能够在行人重识别的隐私保护和数据可用性之间实现良好权衡的技术。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种专门为行人 ReID 设计的新颖的去识别方法，称为行人识别转移（PIS）。 PIS 去除行人图像中的绝对身份，同时保留图像对之间的身份关系。通过利用变分自动编码器的插值特性，PIS 将每个行人图像从当前身份转移到另一个具有新身份的图像，从而导致图像仍然保留相对身份。实验结果表明，我们的方法比现有的去标识方法在隐私保护和模型性能之间具有更好的权衡，并且可以防御人类和模型对数据隐私的攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Person Identify Shift (PIS)的新方法，旨在实现行人重识别(ReID)中隐私保护与数据可用性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有去标识化方法过度移除身份信息，导致数据在ReID任务中实用性下降，需在隐私保护与数据可用性间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 利用变分自编码器的插值特性，PIS将行人图像从原身份映射到新身份，保留图像对间的身份关系而非绝对身份信息。
AI.result: 实验表明PIS在隐私保护与模型性能间取得更优平衡，能有效防御人工和模型攻击。
AI.conclusion: PIS通过身份映射而非完全去除身份信息，为隐私保护型ReID提供了更实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Haoran Yin,Meng Ge,Yanjie Fu,Gaoyan Zhang,Longbiao Wang,Lei Zhang,Lin Qiu,Jianwu Dang
title: MIMO-DoAnet: Multi-channel Input and Multiple Outputs DoA Network with Unknown Number of Sound Sources
title_zh: MIMO-DoAnet：声源数量未知的多通道输入多输出DoA网络
abstract: Recent neural network based Direction of Arrival (DoA) estimation algorithms have performed well on unknown number of sound sources scenarios. These algorithms are usually achieved by mapping the multi-channel audio input to the single output (i.e. overall spatial pseudo-spectrum (SPS) of all sources), that is called MISO. However, such MISO algorithms strongly depend on empirical threshold setting and the angle assumption that the angles between the sound sources are greater than a fixed angle. To address these limitations, we propose a novel multi-channel input and multiple outputs DoA network called MIMO-DoAnet. Unlike the general MISO algorithms, MIMO-DoAnet predicts the SPS coding of each sound source with the help of the informative spatial covariance matrix. By doing so, the threshold task of detecting the number of sound sources becomes an easier task of detecting whether there is a sound source in each output, and the serious interaction between sound sources disappears during inference stage. Experimental results show that MIMO-DoAnet achieves relative 18.6% and absolute 13.3%, relative 34.4% and absolute 20.2% F1 score improvement compared with the MISO baseline system in 3, 4 sources scenes. The results also demonstrate MIMO-DoAnet alleviates the threshold setting problem and solves the angle assumption problem effectively.
summary: Recent neural network based Direction of Arrival (DoA) estimation algorithms have performed well on unknown number of sound sources scenarios. These algorithms are usually achieved by mapping the multi-channel audio input to the single output (i.e. overall spatial pseudo-spectrum (SPS) of all sources), that is called MISO. However, such MISO algorithms strongly depend on empirical threshold setting and the angle assumption that the angles between the sound sources are greater than a fixed angle. To address these limitations, we propose a novel multi-channel input and multiple outputs DoA network called MIMO-DoAnet. Unlike the general MISO algorithms, MIMO-DoAnet predicts the SPS coding of each sound source with the help of the informative spatial covariance matrix. By doing so, the threshold task of detecting the number of sound sources becomes an easier task of detecting whether there is a sound source in each output, and the serious interaction between sound sources disappears during inference stage. Experimental results show that MIMO-DoAnet achieves relative 18.6% and absolute 13.3%, relative 34.4% and absolute 20.2% F1 score improvement compared with the MISO baseline system in 3, 4 sources scenes. The results also demonstrate MIMO-DoAnet alleviates the threshold setting problem and solves the angle assumption problem effectively.
abstract_zh: 最近基于神经网络的到达方向 (DoA) 估计算法在未知数量的声源场景中表现良好。这些算法通常是通过将多通道音频输入映射到单个输出（即所有源的整体空间伪频谱（SPS））来实现的，这称为 MISO。然而，此类MISO算法强烈依赖于经验阈值设置和声源之间的角度大于固定角度的角度假设。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的多通道输入和多输出 DoA 网络，称为 MIMO-DoAnet。与一般的 MISO 算法不同，MIMO-DoAnet 借助信息丰富的空间协方差矩阵来预测每个声源的 SPS 编码。通过这样做，检测声源数量的阈值任务变得更容易检测每个输出中是否存在声源，并且在推理阶段声源之间的严重交互消失。实验结果表明，与MISO基线系统相比，MIMO-DoAnet在3、4源场景下实现了相对18.6%和绝对13.3%、相对34.4%和绝对20.2%的F1分数提升。结果还表明，MIMO-DoAnet 缓解了阈值设置问题，并有效解决了角度假设问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MIMO-DoAnet的多通道输入和多输出的到达方向（DoA）网络，用于解决未知数量声源场景下的方向估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于神经网络的DoA估计算法（如MISO）依赖经验阈值设置和声源角度假设，存在阈值敏感性和角度限制的问题，需改进以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过引入多通道输入与多输出结构，结合信息丰富的空间协方差矩阵，预测每个声源的伪谱图（SPS），将源数量检测转化为各输出的有无判断，消除声源间干扰。
AI.result: 在3源和4源场景中，MIMO-DoAnet相较MISO基线系统分别实现相对18.6%/34.4%和绝对13.3%/20.2%的F1分数提升，有效缓解阈值设定与角度假设问题。
AI.conclusion: MIMO-DoAnet通过多输出设计与空间协方差矩阵利用，显著提升了未知声源数量场景下的DoA估计性能，解决了传统方法的局限性。

search_text: MIMO-DoAnet: Multi-channel Input and Multiple Outputs DoA Network with Unknown Number of Sound Sources MIMO-DoAnet：声源数量未知的多通道输入多输出DoA网络 Recent neural network based Direction of Arrival (DoA) estimation algorithms have performed well on unknown number of sound sources scenarios. These algorithms are usually achieved by mapping the multi-channel audio input to the single output (i.e. overall spatial pseudo-spectrum (SPS) of all sources), that is called MISO. However, such MISO algorithms strongly depend on empirical threshold setting and the angle assumption that the angles between the sound sources are greater than a fixed angle. To address these limitations, we propose a novel multi-channel input and multiple outputs DoA network called MIMO-DoAnet. Unlike the general MISO algorithms, MIMO-DoAnet predicts the SPS coding of each sound source with the help of the informative spatial covariance matrix. By doing so, the threshold task of detecting the number of sound sources becomes an easier task of detecting whether there is a sound source in each output, and the serious interaction between sound sources disappears during inference stage. Experimental results show that MIMO-DoAnet achieves relative 18.6% and absolute 13.3%, relative 34.4% and absolute 20.2% F1 score improvement compared with the MISO baseline system in 3, 4 sources scenes. The results also demonstrate MIMO-DoAnet alleviates the threshold setting problem and solves the angle assumption problem effectively. 最近基于神经网络的到达方向 (DoA) 估计算法在未知数量的声源场景中表现良好。这些算法通常是通过将多通道音频输入映射到单个输出（即所有源的整体空间伪频谱（SPS））来实现的，这称为 MISO。然而，此类MISO算法强烈依赖于经验阈值设置和声源之间的角度大于固定角度的角度假设。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的多通道输入和多输出 DoA 网络，称为 MIMO-DoAnet。与一般的 MISO 算法不同，MIMO-DoAnet 借助信息丰富的空间协方差矩阵来预测每个声源的 SPS 编码。通过这样做，检测声源数量的阈值任务变得更容易检测每个输出中是否存在声源，并且在推理阶段声源之间的严重交互消失。实验结果表明，与MISO基线系统相比，MIMO-DoAnet在3、4源场景下实现了相对18.6%和绝对13.3%、相对34.4%和绝对20.2%的F1分数提升。结果还表明，MIMO-DoAnet 缓解了阈值设置问题，并有效解决了角度假设问题。 本文提出了一种名为MIMO-DoAnet的多通道输入和多输出的到达方向（DoA）网络，用于解决未知数量声源场景下的方向估计问题。 Haoran Yin,Meng Ge,Yanjie Fu,Gaoyan Zhang,Longbiao Wang,Lei Zhang,Lin Qiu,Jianwu Dang eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: ChengHui Yu,MingKang Tang,ShengGe Yang,MingQing Wang,Zhe Xu,JiangPeng Yan,HanMo Chen,Yu Yang,Xiao-Jun Zeng,Xiu Li
title: Towards Better Dermoscopic Image Feature Representation Learning for Melanoma Classification
title_zh: 为黑色素瘤分类提供更好的皮肤镜图像特征表示学习
abstract: Deep learning-based melanoma classification with dermoscopic images has recently shown great potential in automatic early-stage melanoma diagnosis. However, limited by the significant data imbalance and obvious extraneous artifacts, i.e., the hair and ruler markings, discriminative feature extraction from dermoscopic images is very challenging. In this study, we seek to resolve these problems respectively towards better representation learning for lesion features. Specifically, a GAN-based data augmentation (GDA) strategy is adapted to generate synthetic melanoma-positive images, in conjunction with the proposed implicit hair denoising (IHD) strategy. Wherein the hair-related representations are implicitly disentangled via an auxiliary classifier network and reversely sent to the melanoma-feature extraction backbone for better melanoma-specific representation learning. Furthermore, to train the IHD module, the hair noises are additionally labeled on the ISIC2020 dataset, making it the first large-scale dermoscopic dataset with annotation of hair-like artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework as well as the effectiveness of each component. The improved dataset publicly avaliable at https://github.com/kirtsy/DermoscopicDataset.
summary: Deep learning-based melanoma classification with dermoscopic images has recently shown great potential in automatic early-stage melanoma diagnosis. However, limited by the significant data imbalance and obvious extraneous artifacts, i.e., the hair and ruler markings, discriminative feature extraction from dermoscopic images is very challenging. In this study, we seek to resolve these problems respectively towards better representation learning for lesion features. Specifically, a GAN-based data augmentation (GDA) strategy is adapted to generate synthetic melanoma-positive images, in conjunction with the proposed implicit hair denoising (IHD) strategy. Wherein the hair-related representations are implicitly disentangled via an auxiliary classifier network and reversely sent to the melanoma-feature extraction backbone for better melanoma-specific representation learning. Furthermore, to train the IHD module, the hair noises are additionally labeled on the ISIC2020 dataset, making it the first large-scale dermoscopic dataset with annotation of hair-like artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework as well as the effectiveness of each component. The improved dataset publicly avaliable at https://github.com/kirtsy/DermoscopicDataset.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的皮肤镜图像黑色素瘤分类最近在自动早期黑色素瘤诊断中显示出巨大的潜力。然而，由于显着的数据不平衡和明显的无关伪影，即头发和尺子标记，从皮肤镜图像中提取判别性特征非常具有挑战性。在本研究中，我们试图分别解决这些问题，以更好地表达病变特征的表示学习。具体来说，基于 GAN 的数据增强 (GDA) 策略与提出的隐式头发去噪 (IHD) 策略相结合，可生成合成的黑色素瘤阳性图像。其中，与头发相关的表示通过辅助分类器网络隐式解开，并反向发送到黑色素瘤特征提取主干，以实现更好的黑色素瘤特异性表示学习。此外，为了训练 IHD 模块，在 ISIC2020 数据集上额外标记了头发噪声，使其成为第一个带有头发状伪影注释的大规模皮肤镜数据集。大量的实验证明了所提出的框架的优越性以及每个组件的有效性。改进后的数据集可在 https://github.com/kirtsy/DermooscopyDataset 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进皮肤镜图像的特征表示学习，提高黑色素瘤分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于皮肤镜图像中存在显著的数据不平衡和明显的多余伪影（如头发和标尺标记），从这些图像中提取具有判别力的特征具有挑战性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的数据增强策略（GDA）生成合成的黑色素瘤阳性图像，并结合隐式去毛发策略（IHD），通过辅助分类器网络分离与毛发相关的表示，并将其反向传递至黑色素瘤特征提取主干网络，以提高黑色素瘤特定的特征表示学习。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的框架在性能上优于现有方法，且每个组件都有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架和改进的数据集为黑色素瘤分类提供了更准确和鲁棒的解决方案，并为未来的研究提供了基础。

authors_text: Jun Niu
title: Robust Deep Compressive Sensing with Recurrent-Residual Structural Constraints
title_zh: 具有循环残差结构约束的鲁棒深度压缩感知
abstract: Existing deep compressive sensing (CS) methods either ignore adaptive online optimization or depend on costly iterative optimizer during reconstruction. This work explores a novel image CS framework with recurrent-residual structural constraint, termed as R$^2$CS-NET. The R$^2$CS-NET first progressively optimizes the acquired samplings through a novel recurrent neural network. The cascaded residual convolutional network then fully reconstructs the image from optimized latent representation. As the first deep CS framework efficiently bridging adaptive online optimization, the R$^2$CS-NET integrates the robustness of online optimization with the efficiency and nonlinear capacity of deep learning methods. Signal correlation has been addressed through the network architecture. The adaptive sensing nature further makes it an ideal candidate for color image CS via leveraging channel correlation. Numerical experiments verify the proposed recurrent latent optimization design not only fulfills the adaptation motivation, but also outperforms classic long short-term memory (LSTM) architecture in the same scenario. The overall framework demonstrates hardware implementation feasibility, with leading robustness and generalization capability among existing deep CS benchmarks.
summary: Existing deep compressive sensing (CS) methods either ignore adaptive online optimization or depend on costly iterative optimizer during reconstruction. This work explores a novel image CS framework with recurrent-residual structural constraint, termed as R$^2$CS-NET. The R$^2$CS-NET first progressively optimizes the acquired samplings through a novel recurrent neural network. The cascaded residual convolutional network then fully reconstructs the image from optimized latent representation. As the first deep CS framework efficiently bridging adaptive online optimization, the R$^2$CS-NET integrates the robustness of online optimization with the efficiency and nonlinear capacity of deep learning methods. Signal correlation has been addressed through the network architecture. The adaptive sensing nature further makes it an ideal candidate for color image CS via leveraging channel correlation. Numerical experiments verify the proposed recurrent latent optimization design not only fulfills the adaptation motivation, but also outperforms classic long short-term memory (LSTM) architecture in the same scenario. The overall framework demonstrates hardware implementation feasibility, with leading robustness and generalization capability among existing deep CS benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 现有的深度压缩感知（CS）方法要么忽略自适应在线优化，要么在重建过程中依赖昂贵的迭代优化器。这项工作探索了一种具有循环残差结构约束的新型图像 CS 框架，称为 R$^2$CS-NET。 R$^2$CS-NET 首先通过新颖的循环神经网络逐步优化获取的采样。然后，级联残差卷积网络根据优化的潜在表示完全重建图像。作为第一个有效桥接自适应在线优化的深度 CS 框架，R$^2$CS-NET 将在线优化的鲁棒性与深度学习方法的效率和非线性能力相结合。信号相关性已通过网络架构得到解决。通过利用通道相关性，自适应传感特性进一步使其成为彩色图像 CS 的理想候选者。数值实验验证了所提出的循环潜在优化设计不仅满足了适应动机，而且在相同场景下优于经典的长短期记忆（LSTM）架构。整体框架展示了硬件实现的可行性，在现有深度CS基准测试中具有领先的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合递归残差结构约束的深度压缩感知框架R²CS-NET，旨在解决现有方法在自适应优化与重建效率之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有深度压缩感知方法要么忽视自适应在线优化，要么依赖耗时的迭代优化器，难以兼顾鲁棒性与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计递归神经网络逐步优化采样过程，并通过级联残差卷积网络从优化后的潜在表示中重建图像，利用通道相关性提升彩色图像压缩感知性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在适应性任务中优于经典LSTM结构，且具备硬件实现可行性，在鲁棒性和泛化能力上优于现有深度压缩感知基准。
AI.conclusion: R²CS-NET通过融合在线优化与深度学习优势，为压缩感知提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案，适用于多种实际场景。

search_text: Robust Deep Compressive Sensing with Recurrent-Residual Structural Constraints 具有循环残差结构约束的鲁棒深度压缩感知 Existing deep compressive sensing (CS) methods either ignore adaptive online optimization or depend on costly iterative optimizer during reconstruction. This work explores a novel image CS framework with recurrent-residual structural constraint, termed as R$^2$CS-NET. The R$^2$CS-NET first progressively optimizes the acquired samplings through a novel recurrent neural network. The cascaded residual convolutional network then fully reconstructs the image from optimized latent representation. As the first deep CS framework efficiently bridging adaptive online optimization, the R$^2$CS-NET integrates the robustness of online optimization with the efficiency and nonlinear capacity of deep learning methods. Signal correlation has been addressed through the network architecture. The adaptive sensing nature further makes it an ideal candidate for color image CS via leveraging channel correlation. Numerical experiments verify the proposed recurrent latent optimization design not only fulfills the adaptation motivation, but also outperforms classic long short-term memory (LSTM) architecture in the same scenario. The overall framework demonstrates hardware implementation feasibility, with leading robustness and generalization capability among existing deep CS benchmarks. 现有的深度压缩感知（CS）方法要么忽略自适应在线优化，要么在重建过程中依赖昂贵的迭代优化器。这项工作探索了一种具有循环残差结构约束的新型图像 CS 框架，称为 R$^2$CS-NET。 R$^2$CS-NET 首先通过新颖的循环神经网络逐步优化获取的采样。然后，级联残差卷积网络根据优化的潜在表示完全重建图像。作为第一个有效桥接自适应在线优化的深度 CS 框架，R$^2$CS-NET 将在线优化的鲁棒性与深度学习方法的效率和非线性能力相结合。信号相关性已通过网络架构得到解决。通过利用通道相关性，自适应传感特性进一步使其成为彩色图像 CS 的理想候选者。数值实验验证了所提出的循环潜在优化设计不仅满足了适应动机，而且在相同场景下优于经典的长短期记忆（LSTM）架构。整体框架展示了硬件实现的可行性，在现有深度CS基准测试中具有领先的鲁棒性和泛化能力。 本文提出了一种结合递归残差结构约束的深度压缩感知框架R²CS-NET，旨在解决现有方法在自适应优化与重建效率之间的矛盾。 Jun Niu eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Devdeep Ray,Srinivasan Seshan
title: CC-Fuzz: Genetic algorithm-based fuzzing for stress testing congestion control algorithms
title_zh: CC-Fuzz：基于遗传算法的模糊测试，用于压力测试拥塞控制算法
comment: This version was submitted to Hotnets 2022
comments: This version was submitted to Hotnets 2022
abstract: Congestion control research has experienced a significant increase in interest in the past few years, with many purpose-built algorithms being designed with the needs of specific applications in mind. These algorithms undergo limited testing before being deployed on the Internet, where they interact with other congestion control algorithms and run across a variety of network conditions. This often results in unforeseen performance issues in the wild due to algorithmic inadequacies or implementation bugs, and these issues are often hard to identify since packet traces are not available. In this paper, we present CC-Fuzz, an automated congestion control testing framework that uses a genetic search algorithm in order to stress test congestion control algorithms by generating adversarial network traces and traffic patterns. Initial results using this approach are promising - CC-Fuzz automatically found a bug in BBR that causes it to stall permanently, and is able to automatically discover the well-known low-rate TCP attack, among other things.
summary: Congestion control research has experienced a significant increase in interest in the past few years, with many purpose-built algorithms being designed with the needs of specific applications in mind. These algorithms undergo limited testing before being deployed on the Internet, where they interact with other congestion control algorithms and run across a variety of network conditions. This often results in unforeseen performance issues in the wild due to algorithmic inadequacies or implementation bugs, and these issues are often hard to identify since packet traces are not available. In this paper, we present CC-Fuzz, an automated congestion control testing framework that uses a genetic search algorithm in order to stress test congestion control algorithms by generating adversarial network traces and traffic patterns. Initial results using this approach are promising - CC-Fuzz automatically found a bug in BBR that causes it to stall permanently, and is able to automatically discover the well-known low-rate TCP attack, among other things.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，拥塞控制研究的兴趣显着增加，许多专用算法的设计都考虑了特定应用的需求。这些算法在部署到互联网上之前经过了有限的测试，它们与其他拥塞控制算法交互并在各种网络条件下运行。由于算法缺陷或实现错误，这通常会导致不可预见的性能问题，并且由于数据包跟踪不可用，这些问题通常很难识别。在本文中，我们提出了 CC-Fuzz，这是一种自动拥塞控制测试框架，它使用遗传搜索算法，通过生成对抗性网络跟踪和流量模式来对拥塞控制算法进行压力测试。使用这种方法的初步结果是有希望的 - CC-Fuzz 自动发现了 BBR 中导致其永久停止的错误，并且能够自动发现众所周知的低速率 TCP 攻击等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CC-Fuzz框架，利用遗传算法生成对抗性网络流量对拥塞控制算法进行压力测试。
AI.motivation: 现有拥塞控制算法在部署前测试不足，导致实际网络中因算法缺陷或实现错误引发性能问题，而传统测试方法难以复现这些问题。
AI.method: 基于遗传算法设计自动化测试框架，通过生成对抗性网络追踪和流量模式对目标算法进行压力测试。
AI.result: 成功发现BBR算法永久性停滞漏洞，并可自动识别已知的低速率TCP攻击等典型问题。
AI.conclusion: CC-Fuzz验证了遗传算法在暴露拥塞控制算法潜在缺陷方面的有效性，为算法测试提供了新方法。

authors_text: Soujanya Narayana,Shweta Jain,Harish Katti,Roland Goecke,Ramanathan Subramanian
title: Affective Computational Advertising Based on Perceptual Metrics
title_zh: 基于感知指标的情感计算广告
abstract: We present \textbf{ACAD}, an \textbf{a}ffective \textbf{c}omputational \textbf{ad}vertising framework expressly derived from perceptual metrics. Different from advertising methods which either ignore the emotional nature of (most) programs and ads, or are based on axiomatic rules, the ACAD formulation incorporates findings from a user study examining the effect of within-program ad placements on ad perception. A linear program formulation seeking to achieve (a) \emph{genuine} ad assessments and (b) \emph{maximal} ad recall is then proposed. Effectiveness of the ACAD framework is confirmed via a validational user study, where ACAD-induced ad placements are found to be optimal with respect to objectives (a) and (b) against competing approaches.
summary: We present \textbf{ACAD}, an \textbf{a}ffective \textbf{c}omputational \textbf{ad}vertising framework expressly derived from perceptual metrics. Different from advertising methods which either ignore the emotional nature of (most) programs and ads, or are based on axiomatic rules, the ACAD formulation incorporates findings from a user study examining the effect of within-program ad placements on ad perception. A linear program formulation seeking to achieve (a) \emph{genuine} ad assessments and (b) \emph{maximal} ad recall is then proposed. Effectiveness of the ACAD framework is confirmed via a validational user study, where ACAD-induced ad placements are found to be optimal with respect to objectives (a) and (b) against competing approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出\textbf{ACAD}，一个\textbf{a}有效的\textbf{c}计算\textbf{ad}广告框架，明确源自感知指标。与忽略（大多数）节目和广告的情感本质或基于公理规则的广告方法不同，ACAD 公式结合了一项用户研究的结果，该研究检查了节目内广告投放对广告感知的影响。然后提出了一种寻求实现（a）\emph{真实}广告评估和（b）\emph{最大}广告回忆的线性程序公式。 ACAD 框架的有效性通过验证性用户研究得到证实，其中发现 ACAD 诱导的广告投放相对于竞争方法在目标 (a) 和 (b) 方面是最佳的。

AI.tldr: 提出基于感知指标的情感计算广告框架ACAD，以优化广告效果
AI.motivation: 传统广告方法忽视情感因素或依赖公理规则，导致效果有限，需结合感知指标优化广告策略
AI.method: 基于用户研究的线性规划模型，同时优化广告的真实评估与回忆效果
AI.result: 验证性用户研究表明ACAD在广告评估和回忆效果上优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: ACAD框架有效提升广告效果，为情感计算广告提供新方法

Effectiveness of the ACAD framework is confirmed via a validational user study, where ACAD-induced ad placements are found to be optimal with respect to objectives (a) and (b) against competing approaches. 我们提出\textbf{ACAD}，一个\textbf{a}有效的\textbf{c}计算\textbf{ad}广告框架，明确源自感知指标。与忽略（大多数）节目和广告的情感本质或基于公理规则的广告方法不同，ACAD 公式结合了一项用户研究的结果，该研究检查了节目内广告投放对广告感知的影响。然后提出了一种寻求实现（a）\emph{真实}广告评估和（b）\emph{最大}广告回忆的线性程序公式。 ACAD 框架的有效性通过验证性用户研究得到证实，其中发现 ACAD 诱导的广告投放相对于竞争方法在目标 (a) 和 (b) 方面是最佳的。 提出基于感知指标的情感计算广告框架ACAD，以优化广告效果 Soujanya Narayana,Shweta Jain,Harish Katti,Roland Goecke,Ramanathan Subramanian cs.HC

authors_text: Kouhei Sekiguchi,Aditya Arie Nugraha,Yicheng Du,Yoshiaki Bando,Mathieu Fontaine,Kazuyoshi Yoshii
title: Direction-Aware Adaptive Online Neural Speech Enhancement with an Augmented Reality Headset in Real Noisy Conversational Environments
title_zh: 在真实嘈杂的对话环境中使用增强现实耳机进行方向感知自适应在线神经语音增强
abstract: This paper describes the practical response- and performance-aware development of online speech enhancement for an augmented reality (AR) headset that helps a user understand conversations made in real noisy echoic environments (e.g., cocktail party). One may use a state-of-the-art blind source separation method called fast multichannel nonnegative matrix factorization (FastMNMF) that works well in various environments thanks to its unsupervised nature. Its heavy computational cost, however, prevents its application to real-time processing. In contrast, a supervised beamforming method that uses a deep neural network (DNN) for estimating spatial information of speech and noise readily fits real-time processing, but suffers from drastic performance degradation in mismatched conditions. Given such complementary characteristics, we propose a dual-process robust online speech enhancement method based on DNN-based beamforming with FastMNMF-guided adaptation. FastMNMF (back end) is performed in a mini-batch style and the noisy and enhanced speech pairs are used together with the original parallel training data for updating the direction-aware DNN (front end) with backpropagation at a computationally-allowable interval. This method is used with a blind dereverberation method called weighted prediction error (WPE) for transcribing the noisy reverberant speech of a speaker, which can be detected from video or selected by a user's hand gesture or eye gaze, in a streaming manner and spatially showing the transcriptions with an AR technique. Our experiment showed that the word error rate was improved by more than 10 points with the run-time adaptation using only twelve minutes of observation.
summary: This paper describes the practical response- and performance-aware development of online speech enhancement for an augmented reality (AR) headset that helps a user understand conversations made in real noisy echoic environments (e.g., cocktail party). One may use a state-of-the-art blind source separation method called fast multichannel nonnegative matrix factorization (FastMNMF) that works well in various environments thanks to its unsupervised nature. Its heavy computational cost, however, prevents its application to real-time processing. In contrast, a supervised beamforming method that uses a deep neural network (DNN) for estimating spatial information of speech and noise readily fits real-time processing, but suffers from drastic performance degradation in mismatched conditions. Given such complementary characteristics, we propose a dual-process robust online speech enhancement method based on DNN-based beamforming with FastMNMF-guided adaptation. FastMNMF (back end) is performed in a mini-batch style and the noisy and enhanced speech pairs are used together with the original parallel training data for updating the direction-aware DNN (front end) with backpropagation at a computationally-allowable interval. This method is used with a blind dereverberation method called weighted prediction error (WPE) for transcribing the noisy reverberant speech of a speaker, which can be detected from video or selected by a user's hand gesture or eye gaze, in a streaming manner and spatially showing the transcriptions with an AR technique. Our experiment showed that the word error rate was improved by more than 10 points with the run-time adaptation using only twelve minutes of observation.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了增强现实 (AR) 耳机在线语音增强的实际响应和性能感知开发，可帮助用户理解真实嘈杂回声环境（例如鸡尾酒会）中进行的对话。人们可以使用一种最先进的盲源分离方法，称为快速多通道非负矩阵分解（FastMNMF），由于其无监督的性质，该方法在各种环境中都能很好地工作。然而，其繁重的计算成本阻碍了其应用于实时处理。相比之下，使用深度神经网络（DNN）来估计语音和噪声的空间信息的监督波束形成方法很容易适合实时处理，但在不匹配的条件下会出现性能急剧下降的问题。鉴于这种互补的特性，我们提出了一种基于 DNN 的波束成形和 FastMNMF 引导自适应的双进程鲁棒在线语音增强方法。 FastMNMF（后端）以小批量方式执行，噪声和增强语音对与原始并行训练数据一起使用，以计算允许的间隔通过反向传播更新方向感知 DNN（前端）。该方法与称为加权预测误差（WPE）的盲去混响方法一起使用，用于转录说话者的嘈杂混响语音，可以从视频中检测到或通过用户的手势或眼睛注视来选择，以流式传输方式并通过 AR 技术在空间上显示转录内容。我们的实验表明，仅用 12 分钟的观察时间，通过运行时自适应，单词错误率就提高了 10 个以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于增强现实（AR）耳机的实时语音增强方法，旨在帮助用户在嘈杂的现实环境中清晰理解对话。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如FastMNMF计算成本高，难以实时处理；而基于深度神经网络的波束成形方法在非匹配条件下性能下降明显，需结合两者优势以实现鲁棒的实时语音增强。
AI.method: 提出双过程方法：基于DNN的波束成形（前端）与FastMNMF引导的自适应（后端），通过小批量处理FastMNMF并利用增强语音数据更新DNN，结合WPE去混响技术及AR空间显示实现流式处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅需12分钟的运行时自适应即可使词错误率提升超过10个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合监督与非监督技术，在AR设备中实现了高效、鲁棒的实时语音增强，显著提升了嘈杂环境下的语音识别性能。

authors_text: Boluwatife E. Faremi,Kayode P. Ayodele,Abimbola M. Jubril,Afeez A. Fakunle,Mathew O. B. Olaogun,Micheal B. Fawale,Morenikeji A. Komolafe
title: A Simulation Study of Functional Electrical Stimulation for An Upper Limb Rehabilitation Robot using Iterative Learning Control (ILC) and Linear models
title_zh: 使用迭代学习控制（ILC）和线性模型对上肢康复机器人进行功能性电刺激的仿真研究
abstract: A proportional iterative learning control (P-ILC) for linear models of an existing hybrid stroke rehabilitation scheme is implemented for elbow extension/flexion during a rehabilitative task. Owing to transient error growth problem of P-ILC, a learning derivative constraint controller was included to ensure that the controlled system does not exceed a predefined velocity limit at every trial. To achieve this, linear transfer function models of the robot end-effector interaction with a stroke subject (plant) and muscle response to stimulation controllers were developed. A straight-line point-point trajectory of 0 - 0.3 m range served as the reference task space trajectory for the plant, feedforward, and feedback stimulation controllers. At each trial, a SAT-based bounded error derivative ILC algorithm served as the learning constraint controller. Three control configurations were developed and simulated. The system performance was evaluated using the root means square error (RMSE) and normalized RMSE. At different ILC gains over 16 iterations, a displacement error of 0.0060 m was obtained when control configurations were combined.
summary: A proportional iterative learning control (P-ILC) for linear models of an existing hybrid stroke rehabilitation scheme is implemented for elbow extension/flexion during a rehabilitative task. Owing to transient error growth problem of P-ILC, a learning derivative constraint controller was included to ensure that the controlled system does not exceed a predefined velocity limit at every trial. To achieve this, linear transfer function models of the robot end-effector interaction with a stroke subject (plant) and muscle response to stimulation controllers were developed. A straight-line point-point trajectory of 0 - 0.3 m range served as the reference task space trajectory for the plant, feedforward, and feedback stimulation controllers. At each trial, a SAT-based bounded error derivative ILC algorithm served as the learning constraint controller. Three control configurations were developed and simulated. The system performance was evaluated using the root means square error (RMSE) and normalized RMSE. At different ILC gains over 16 iterations, a displacement error of 0.0060 m was obtained when control configurations were combined.
abstract_zh: 针对现有混合中风康复方案的线性模型的比例迭代学习控制（P-ILC）被实施用于康复任务期间的肘部伸展/弯曲。由于 P-ILC 的瞬态误差增长问题，引入了学习导数约束控制器，以确保受控系统在每次试验中都不会超过预定义的速度限制。为了实现这一目标，开发了机器人末端执行器与中风受试者（植物）相互作用以及肌肉对刺激控制器的反应的线性传递函数模型。 0 - 0.3 m 范围的直线点对点轨迹作为设备、前馈和反馈刺激控制器的参考任务空间轨迹。在每次试验中，基于 SAT 的有界误差导数 ILC 算法用作学习约束控制器。开发并模拟了三种控制配置。使用均方根误差 (RMSE) 和归一化 RMSE 来评估系统性能。在 16 次迭代的不同 ILC 增益下，组合控制配置时获得 0.0060 m 的位移误差。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过仿真研究，利用迭代学习控制（ILC）和线性模型，探讨功能性电刺激（FES）在上肢康复机器人中的应用，以提高中风患者肘部屈伸运动的控制精度。
AI.motivation: 中风患者的上肢康复需要精确的控制策略以确保安全性和有效性，传统方法存在瞬态误差增长问题，需改进控制算法以满足康复训练需求。
AI.method: 建立机器人末端执行器与患者肌肉响应的线性传递函数模型，设计结合学习微分约束的P-ILC算法，通过三种控制配置仿真验证，使用RMSE和归一化RMSE评估性能。
AI.result: 在16次迭代后，结合控制配置的位移误差达到0.0060米，系统性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于线性模型的P-ILC结合微分约束控制器能有效减少瞬态误差，为上肢康复机器人提供可行的控制方案。

At different ILC gains over 16 iterations, a displacement error of 0.0060 m was obtained when control configurations were combined. 针对现有混合中风康复方案的线性模型的比例迭代学习控制（P-ILC）被实施用于康复任务期间的肘部伸展/弯曲。由于 P-ILC 的瞬态误差增长问题，引入了学习导数约束控制器，以确保受控系统在每次试验中都不会超过预定义的速度限制。为了实现这一目标，开发了机器人末端执行器与中风受试者（植物）相互作用以及肌肉对刺激控制器的反应的线性传递函数模型。 0 - 0.3 m 范围的直线点对点轨迹作为设备、前馈和反馈刺激控制器的参考任务空间轨迹。在每次试验中，基于 SAT 的有界误差导数 ILC 算法用作学习约束控制器。开发并模拟了三种控制配置。使用均方根误差 (RMSE) 和归一化 RMSE 来评估系统性能。在 16 次迭代的不同 ILC 增益下，组合控制配置时获得 0.0060 m 的位移误差。 本论文通过仿真研究，利用迭代学习控制（ILC）和线性模型，探讨功能性电刺激（FES）在上肢康复机器人中的应用，以提高中风患者肘部屈伸运动的控制精度。 Boluwatife E. Faremi,Kayode P. Ayodele,Abimbola M. Jubril,Afeez A. Fakunle,Mathew O. B. Olaogun,Micheal B. Fawale,Morenikeji A. Komolafe cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Mengping Yang,Zhe Wang,Ziqiu Chi,Wenyi Feng
title: WaveGAN: Frequency-aware GAN for High-Fidelity Few-shot Image Generation
title_zh: WaveGAN：用于高保真少样本图像生成的频率感知 GAN
abstract: Existing few-shot image generation approaches typically employ fusion-based strategies, either on the image or the feature level, to produce new images. However, previous approaches struggle to synthesize high-frequency signals with fine details, deteriorating the synthesis quality. To address this, we propose WaveGAN, a frequency-aware model for few-shot image generation. Concretely, we disentangle encoded features into multiple frequency components and perform low-frequency skip connections to preserve outline and structural information. Then we alleviate the generator's struggles of synthesizing fine details by employing high-frequency skip connections, thus providing informative frequency information to the generator. Moreover, we utilize a frequency L1-loss on the generated and real images to further impede frequency information loss. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and advancement of our method on three datasets. Noticeably, we achieve new state-of-the-art with FID 42.17, LPIPS 0.3868, FID 30.35, LPIPS 0.5076, and FID 4.96, LPIPS 0.3822 respectively on Flower, Animal Faces, and VGGFace. GitHub: https://github.com/kobeshegu/ECCV2022_WaveGAN
summary: Existing few-shot image generation approaches typically employ fusion-based strategies, either on the image or the feature level, to produce new images. However, previous approaches struggle to synthesize high-frequency signals with fine details, deteriorating the synthesis quality. To address this, we propose WaveGAN, a frequency-aware model for few-shot image generation. Concretely, we disentangle encoded features into multiple frequency components and perform low-frequency skip connections to preserve outline and structural information. Then we alleviate the generator's struggles of synthesizing fine details by employing high-frequency skip connections, thus providing informative frequency information to the generator. Moreover, we utilize a frequency L1-loss on the generated and real images to further impede frequency information loss. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and advancement of our method on three datasets. Noticeably, we achieve new state-of-the-art with FID 42.17, LPIPS 0.3868, FID 30.35, LPIPS 0.5076, and FID 4.96, LPIPS 0.3822 respectively on Flower, Animal Faces, and VGGFace. GitHub: https://github.com/kobeshegu/ECCV2022_WaveGAN
abstract_zh: 现有的少样本图像生成方法通常在图像或特征级别上采用基于融合的策略来生成新图像。然而，以前的方法很难合成具有精细细节的高频信号，从而降低了合成质量。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 WaveGAN，一种用于少样本图像生成的频率感知模型。具体来说，我们将编码特征分解为多个频率分量，并执行低频跳跃连接以保留轮廓和结构信息。然后，我们通过采用高频跳跃连接来减轻生成器合成精细细节的困难，从而为生成器提供丰富的频率信息。此外，我们在生成的图像和真实图像上利用频率 L1 损失来进一步阻止频率信息丢失。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在三个数据集上的有效性和先进性。值得注意的是，我们在 Flower、Animal Faces 和 VGGFace 上分别实现了 FID 42.17、LPIPS 0.3868、FID 30.35、LPIPS 0.5076 和 FID 4.96、LPIPS 0.3822。 GitHub：https://github.com/kobeshegu/ECCV2022_WaveGAN

AI.tldr: 本文提出WaveGAN，一种频率感知的生成对抗网络，用于高保真少样本图像生成，通过分离频率组件和引入跳接连接来提升细节合成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本图像生成方法难以合成高频细节，导致生成质量下降，需通过频率感知机制改进细节保留与重建能力。
AI.method: 将编码特征解耦为多频率组件，利用低频跳接保留结构信息，高频跳接辅助细节生成，并引入频率L1损失函数防止频率信息丢失。
AI.result: 在Flower、Animal Faces和VGGFace数据集上分别达到FID 42.17/LPIPS 0.3868、FID 30.35/LPIPS 0.5076、FID 4.96/LPIPS 0.3822，刷新多项SOTA指标。
AI.conclusion: WaveGAN通过频率感知设计有效提升了少样本图像生成的高频细节表现，实验验证了方法在多个数据集上的先进性。

authors_text: Yiwei Ma,Guohai Xu,Xiaoshuai Sun,Ming Yan,Ji Zhang,Rongrong Ji
title: X-CLIP: End-to-End Multi-grained Contrastive Learning for Video-Text Retrieval
title_zh: X-CLIP：用于视频文本检索的端到端多粒度对比学习
abstract: Video-text retrieval has been a crucial and fundamental task in multi-modal research. The development of video-text retrieval has been considerably promoted by large-scale multi-modal contrastive pre-training, which primarily focuses on coarse-grained or fine-grained contrast. However, cross-grained contrast, which is the contrast between coarse-grained representations and fine-grained representations, has rarely been explored in prior research. Compared with fine-grained or coarse-grained contrasts, cross-grained contrast calculate the correlation between coarse-grained features and each fine-grained feature, and is able to filter out the unnecessary fine-grained features guided by the coarse-grained feature during similarity calculation, thus improving the accuracy of retrieval. To this end, this paper presents a novel multi-grained contrastive model, namely X-CLIP, for video-text retrieval. However, another challenge lies in the similarity aggregation problem, which aims to aggregate fine-grained and cross-grained similarity matrices to instance-level similarity. To address this challenge, we propose the Attention Over Similarity Matrix (AOSM) module to make the model focus on the contrast between essential frames and words, thus lowering the impact of unnecessary frames and words on retrieval results. With multi-grained contrast and the proposed AOSM module, X-CLIP achieves outstanding performance on five widely-used video-text retrieval datasets, including MSR-VTT (49.3 R@1), MSVD (50.4 R@1), LSMDC (26.1 R@1), DiDeMo (47.8 R@1) and ActivityNet (46.2 R@1). It outperforms the previous state-of-theart by +6.3%, +6.6%, +11.1%, +6.7%, +3.8% relative improvements on these benchmarks, demonstrating the superiority of multi-grained contrast and AOSM.
summary: Video-text retrieval has been a crucial and fundamental task in multi-modal research. The development of video-text retrieval has been considerably promoted by large-scale multi-modal contrastive pre-training, which primarily focuses on coarse-grained or fine-grained contrast. However, cross-grained contrast, which is the contrast between coarse-grained representations and fine-grained representations, has rarely been explored in prior research. Compared with fine-grained or coarse-grained contrasts, cross-grained contrast calculate the correlation between coarse-grained features and each fine-grained feature, and is able to filter out the unnecessary fine-grained features guided by the coarse-grained feature during similarity calculation, thus improving the accuracy of retrieval. To this end, this paper presents a novel multi-grained contrastive model, namely X-CLIP, for video-text retrieval. However, another challenge lies in the similarity aggregation problem, which aims to aggregate fine-grained and cross-grained similarity matrices to instance-level similarity. To address this challenge, we propose the Attention Over Similarity Matrix (AOSM) module to make the model focus on the contrast between essential frames and words, thus lowering the impact of unnecessary frames and words on retrieval results. With multi-grained contrast and the proposed AOSM module, X-CLIP achieves outstanding performance on five widely-used video-text retrieval datasets, including MSR-VTT (49.3 R@1), MSVD (50.4 R@1), LSMDC (26.1 R@1), DiDeMo (47.8 R@1) and ActivityNet (46.2 R@1). It outperforms the previous state-of-theart by +6.3%, +6.6%, +11.1%, +6.7%, +3.8% relative improvements on these benchmarks, demonstrating the superiority of multi-grained contrast and AOSM.
abstract_zh: 视频文本检索一直是多模态研究中至关重要的基础任务。大规模多模态对比预训练极大地促进了视频文本检索的发展，该训练主要关注粗粒度或细粒度对比。然而，交叉粒度对比，即粗粒度表示和细粒度表示之间的对比，在先前的研究中很少被探索。与细粒度或粗粒度对比相比，跨粒度对比计算粗粒度特征与每个细粒度特征之间的相关性，能够在相似度计算时过滤掉由粗粒度特征引导的不必要的细粒度特征，从而提高检索的准确性。为此，本文提出了一种用于视频文本检索的新颖的多粒度对比模型，即 X-CLIP。然而，另一个挑战在于相似性聚合问题，其目的是将细粒度和跨粒度相似性矩阵聚合到实例级相似性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了注意力相似度矩阵（AOSM）模块，使模型专注于基本框架和单词之间的对比，从而降低不必要的框架和单词对检索结果的影响。凭借多粒度对比和提出的 AOSM 模块，X-CLIP 在五个广泛使用的视频文本检索数据集上取得了出色的性能，包括 MSR-VTT (49.3 R@1)、MSVD (50.4 R@1)、LSMDC (26.1 R@1)、DiDeMo (47.8 R@1) 和 ActivityNet (46.2 R@1)。它在这些基准测试中比之前的最先进技术提高了 +6.3%、+6.6%、+11.1%、+6.7%、+3.8% 的相对改进，展示了多粒度对比度和 AOSM 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-CLIP模型，通过多粒度对比学习和AOSM模块提升视频-文本检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注粗粒度或细粒度对比，而跨粒度对比（粗细粒度特征间关系）未被充分探索，且相似度聚合存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计X-CLIP模型，结合多粒度对比学习与注意力机制的AOSM模块，实现跨粒度特征关联与关键帧/词筛选。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT等五个数据集上取得SOTA结果，R@1指标平均提升6.3%-11.1%。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度对比与AOSM模块有效提升检索精度，验证了跨粒度特征交互的重要性。
